<!-- 📄 Page 412 -->
---


<div style="overflow-x: auto; max-width: 100%;">
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th width="50%">🇬🇧 English</th>
<th width="50%" style="background-color:#e8e8e8">🇨🇳 中文</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>

**CONSECUTIVE_TX_EXPLICIT_SEQ_NUM_FLITS Rules**

- When an Explicit Sequence Number Flit is transmitted:
  - CONSECUTIVE_TX_EXPLICIT_SEQ_NUM_FLITS is incremented.
- When a non-Explicit Sequence Number Flit is transmitted:
  - CONSECUTIVE_TX_EXPLICIT_SEQ_NUM_FLITS is set to 0b.
- Also see Replay Schedule Rule 0.

**REPLAY_TIMEOUT_FLIT_COUNT Rules:**

- When a Payload Flit or a NOP Flit is transmitted and the TX Retry Buffer is not empty:
  - REPLAY_TIMEOUT_FLIT_COUNT is incremented.
- When an Ack or Nak is received that causes a Flit stored TX Retry Buffer to be purged:
  - REPLAY_TIMEOUT_FLIT_COUNT is set to 0b.
- Also see Replay Schedule Rule 0.

**NEXT_TX_FLIT_SEQ_NUM Rules**

- After the Transmitter applies the Replay Command to a Payload Flit which is NOT being replayed from the TX Retry Buffer:
  - NEXT_TX_FLIT_SEQ_NUM is incremented.
- NEXT_TX_FLIT_SEQ_NUM does not change when sending any of the following:
  - An IDLE Flit
  - A NOP Flit
  - A Flit being replayed from the TX Retry Buffer

**Receiver Rules**

- If a Receiver has scheduled a Selective Nak Flit, it must continue to store non-NOP TLP bytes and Flit Sequence Number of subsequent Flits in the RX Retry Buffer.
  - After the Replay for a Selective Nak is received, received Flits must continue to be processed in order of Flit Sequence Number. The management of storage and processing of Flits received after the Selective Replay Flit is received is implementation specific
- See § Section 4.2.3.4.2.1.5 for Ack, Nak, and Discard rules.

**IMPLICIT_RX_FLIT_SEQ_NUM Rules**

- The value of IMPLICIT_RX_FLIT_SEQ_NUM must be updated before evaluating the rules in § Section 4.2.3.4.2.1.5
- IMPLICIT_RX_FLIT_SEQ_NUM does not change if ANY of the following are true:
  - An IDLE Flit is received.
  - An Explicit Sequence Number Flit is received with Flit Sequence Number 0.
  - Both of the following are true:
    - NON_IDLE_EXPLICIT_SEQ_NUM_FLIT_RCVD is 0b
    - Either of the following are true:
      - An invalid Flit is received.
      - A valid non-Explicit Sequence Number Flit is received.
  - Both of the following are true:
    - A valid NOP Flit is received with a non-explicit Flit Sequence Number.
    - Either of the following are true:

</td>
<td style="background-color:#e8e8e8">

**CONSECUTIVE_TX_EXPLICIT_SEQ_NUM_FLITS 规则**

- 当发送显式序列号 Flit 时：
  - CONSECUTIVE_TX_EXPLICIT_SEQ_NUM_FLITS 递增。
- 当发送非显式序列号 Flit 时：
  - CONSECUTIVE_TX_EXPLICIT_SEQ_NUM_FLITS 设置为 0b。
- 另请参见重放调度规则 0。

**REPLAY_TIMEOUT_FLIT_COUNT 规则：**

- 当发送 Payload Flit 或 NOP Flit，且 TX Retry Buffer 不为空时：
  - REPLAY_TIMEOUT_FLIT_COUNT 递增。
- 当收到导致 TX Retry Buffer 中已存储 Flit 被清除的 Ack 或 Nak 时：
  - REPLAY_TIMEOUT_FLIT_COUNT 设置为 0b。
- 另请参见重放调度规则 0。

**NEXT_TX_FLIT_SEQ_NUM 规则**

- 发送器对**非**从 TX Retry Buffer 重放的 Payload Flit 应用 Replay Command 之后：
  - NEXT_TX_FLIT_SEQ_NUM 递增。
- 发送以下任意一项时 NEXT_TX_FLIT_SEQ_NUM 不变：
  - IDLE Flit
  - NOP Flit
  - 从 TX Retry Buffer 重放的 Flit

**接收器规则**

- 如果接收器已调度一个选择性 Nak Flit，则必须继续在 RX Retry Buffer 中存储后续 Flit 的非 NOP TLP 字节和 Flit 序列号。
  - 收到针对选择性 Nak 的重放后，已接收 Flit 必须继续按 Flit 序列号顺序进行处理。在收到选择性重放 Flit 之后所接收 Flit 的存储和处理的管理方式由实现自行决定。
- 有关 Ack、Nak 和 Discard 规则，请参见 § 第 4.2.3.4.2.1.5 节。

**IMPLICIT_RX_FLIT_SEQ_NUM 规则**

- 在评估 § 第 4.2.3.4.2.1.5 节中的规则之前，必须先更新 IMPLICIT_RX_FLIT_SEQ_NUM 的值。
- 在以下任一条件成立时，IMPLICIT_RX_FLIT_SEQ_NUM 不变：
  - 收到 IDLE Flit。
  - 收到 Flit 序列号为 0 的显式序列号 Flit。
  - 以下两者同时成立：
    - NON_IDLE_EXPLICIT_SEQ_NUM_FLIT_RCVD 为 0b
    - 以下任一条件成立：
      - 收到无效 Flit。
      - 收到有效的非显式序列号 Flit。
  - 以下两者同时成立：
    - 收到 Flit 序列号为非显式的有效 NOP Flit。
    - 以下任一条件成立：

</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
</div>


---

<!-- 📄 Page 413 -->
---

<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th width="50%">🇬🇧 English</th>
<th width="50%" style="background-color:#e8e8e8">🇨🇳 中文</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>

      - NAK_WITHDRAWAL_ALLOWED is 0b
      - NAK_WITHDRAWAL_ALLOWED is 1b and Prior Flit was Payload is 1b
  - All of the following are true:
    - A valid Payload Flit with a non-explicit Flit Sequence Number is received.
    - NAK_WITHDRAWAL_ALLOWED is 1b
    - Prior Flit was Payload is 0b
- IMPLICIT_RX_FLIT_SEQ_NUM is incremented if both of the following are true:
  - NON_IDLE_EXPLICIT_SEQ_NUM_FLIT_RCVD is 1b
  - Any of the following are true:
    - A valid Payload Flit with a non-explicit Flit Sequence Number is received and NAK_WITHDRAWAL_ALLOWED is 0b.
    - A valid Payload Flit with a non-explicit Flit Sequence Number is received with Prior Flit was Payload set to 1b and NAK_WITHDRAWAL_ALLOWED is 1b.
    - A invalid Flit is received.
- IMPLICIT_RX_FLIT_SEQ_NUM is set to N if both of the following are true:
  - A valid non-IDLE Explicit Sequence Number Flit is received with Flit Sequence Number N.
  - N != 0.
- IMPLICIT_RX_FLIT_SEQ_NUM is decremented if ALL of the following are true:
  - A valid NOP Flit with a non-explicit Flit Sequence Number is received.
  - NAK_WITHDRAWAL_ALLOWED is 1b.
  - Prior Flit was Payload is 0b.

**General Rules**

- A Port enters this phase when the LTSSM enters Configuration.Idle or Recovery.Idle states.

**Transmitter Rules**

- The Transmitter must send IDLE Flits as required by the LTSSM rules.
- The Transmitter moves to the Sequence Number Handshake Phase when the LTSSM enters the L0 state.

**Receiver Rules**

- All received Flits are discarded.
- The Receiver moves to the Sequence Number Handshake Phase when two consecutive valid IDLE Flits have been received.

**General Rules**

- Devices are permitted to perform Data Link Feature Exchange and Flow Control Initialization in this phase if the Data Link Control and Management State Machine is in the DL_Feature or DL_Init states, respectively.
- The Port transitions to the Normal Flit Exchange Phase when both of the following are true:

</td>
<td style="background-color:#e8e8e8">

      - NAK_WITHDRAWAL_ALLOWED 为 0b
      - NAK_WITHDRAWAL_ALLOWED 为 1b 且 Prior Flit was Payload 为 1b
  - 以下全部成立：
    - 收到 Flit 序列号为非显式的有效 Payload Flit。
    - NAK_WITHDRAWAL_ALLOWED 为 1b
    - Prior Flit was Payload 为 0b
- 在以下两者同时成立时，IMPLICIT_RX_FLIT_SEQ_NUM 递增：
  - NON_IDLE_EXPLICIT_SEQ_NUM_FLIT_RCVD 为 1b
  - 以下任一条件成立：
    - 收到 Flit 序列号为非显式的有效 Payload Flit，且 NAK_WITHDRAWAL_ALLOWED 为 0b。
    - 收到 Flit 序列号为非显式、Prior Flit was Payload 为 1b 且 NAK_WITHDRAWAL_ALLOWED 为 1b 的有效 Payload Flit。
    - 收到无效 Flit。
- 在以下两者同时成立时，IMPLICIT_RX_FLIT_SEQ_NUM 设置为 N：
  - 收到 Flit 序列号为 N 的有效非 IDLE 显式序列号 Flit。
  - N != 0。
- 在以下全部成立时，IMPLICIT_RX_FLIT_SEQ_NUM 递减：
  - 收到 Flit 序列号为非显式的有效 NOP Flit。
  - NAK_WITHDRAWAL_ALLOWED 为 1b。
  - Prior Flit was Payload 为 0b。

<a id="sec-4-2-3-4-2-1-1"></a>
## 4.2.3.4.2.1.1 IDLE Flit Handshake Phase | IDLE Flit 握手阶段

**通用规则**

- 当 LTSSM 进入 Configuration.Idle 或 Recovery.Idle 状态时，端口 (Port) 进入此阶段。

**发送器规则**

- 发送器必须按 LTSSM 规则的要求发送 IDLE Flit。
- 当 LTSSM 进入 L0 状态时，发送器移至序列号握手阶段 (Sequence Number Handshake Phase)。

**接收器规则**

- 所有已接收的 Flit 都会被丢弃。
- 当接收到两个连续的有效 IDLE Flit 时，接收器移至序列号握手阶段。

<a id="sec-4-2-3-4-2-1-2"></a>
## 4.2.3.4.2.1.2 Sequence Number Handshake Phase | 序列号握手阶段

**通用规则**

- 如果数据链路控制与管理状态机分别处于 DL_Feature 或 DL_Init 状态，则允许设备在此阶段执行数据链路特性交换 (Data Link Feature Exchange) 和流控初始化 (Flow Control Initialization)。
- 当以下两个条件同时成立时，端口将转换至正常 Flit 交换阶段 (Normal Flit Exchange Phase)：

</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

---

<!-- 📄 Page 414 -->
---


<div style="overflow-x: auto; max-width: 100%;">
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th width="50%">🇬🇧 English</th>
<th width="50%" style="background-color:#e8e8e8">🇨🇳 中文</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>

  - The Port has transmitted 3 or more Ack Flits with non-zero Flit Sequence Numbers after having received one or more Explicit Sequence Number Flits with a non-zero Flit Sequence Number.
  - The Port has transmitted 9 or more Explicit Sequence Number Flits with a non-zero Flit Sequence Number.
- If the Port is in this phase after sending 512 Flits with 1b/1b encoding or 256 Flits with 8b/10b or 128b/130b encoding, the Port must enter Recovery.

**Transmitter Rules**

**Flit Replay Command Rules**

- The Transmitter alternates between sending three consecutive Explicit Sequence Number Flit and one Ack Flit or Nak Flit while in this phase.
  - The following conditions are listed in order of priority.
  - A Transmitter must send an Explicit Sequence Number Flit if the following is true:
    - CONSECUTIVE_TX_EXPLICIT_SEQ_NUM_FLITS < 3.
  - A Transmitter must send a Standard Nak Flit if all of the following are true:
    - NAK_SCHEDULED is 1b.
    - NAK_SCHEDULED_TYPE is STANDARD_NAK.
    - The conditions for sending an Explicit Sequence Number Flit were not met.
  - A Transmitter must send a Selective Nak Flit if all of the following are true:
    - NAK_SCHEDULED is 1b.
    - NAK_SCHEDULED_TYPE is SELECTIVE_NAK.
    - The conditions for sending an Explicit Sequence Number Flit were not met.
    - The conditions for sending a Standard Nak Flit were not met.
  - A Transmitter must send an Ack Flit if all of the following are true:
    - The conditions for sending an Explicit Sequence Number Flit were not met.
    - The conditions for sending a Standard Nak Flit were not met.
    - The conditions for sending a Selective Nak Flit were not met.
- The Transmitter may send up to six consecutive Explicit Sequence Number Flits if the CONSECUTIVE_TX_EXPLICIT_SEQ_NUM_FLITS counter is reset due to Replay Schedule Rule 0.

**Flit Replay Transmit Rules**

- The Transmitter must only begin replaying Flits from the TX Retry Buffer when sending an Explicit Sequence Number Flit and CONSECUTIVE_TX_EXPLICIT_SEQ_NUM_FLITS is 0b.
- If the Transmitter is replaying a Flit from the TX Retry Buffer, it must use the sequence number of the Flit from its TX Retry Buffer when sending an Explicit Sequence Number Flit.
- See § Section 4.2.3.4.2.1.7 for additional replay transmit rules.

**Flit Sequence Number Rules**

- When transmitting an Ack Flit or Nak Flit with a non-0 Flit Sequence Number:
  - The Flit Sequence Number is set to the value of TX_ACKNAK_FLIT_SEQ_NUM.
- When transmitting an Explicit Sequence Number Flit:
  - A NOP Flit must set Flit Sequence Number to NEXT_TX_FLIT_SEQ_NUM - 1.
  - A replayed Payload Flit must set Flit Sequence Number to the value stored for the Flit in the TX Retry Buffer.

</td>
<td style="background-color:#e8e8e8">

  - 在已收到一个或多个 Flit 序列号非零的显式序列号 Flit 之后，端口已发送 3 个或更多 Flit 序列号非零的 Ack Flit。
  - 端口已发送 9 个或更多 Flit 序列号非零的显式序列号 Flit。
- 如果端口在使用 1b/1b 编码发送 512 个 Flit 之后，或在使用 8b/10b 或 128b/130b 编码发送 256 个 Flit 之后仍处于此阶段，则端口必须进入 Recovery 状态。

**发送器规则**

**Flit Replay Command 规则**

- 在此阶段，发送器在发送三个连续的显式序列号 Flit 与一个 Ack Flit 或 Nak Flit 之间交替进行。
  - 以下条件按优先级顺序列出。
  - 在以下条件成立时，发送器必须发送显式序列号 Flit：
    - CONSECUTIVE_TX_EXPLICIT_SEQ_NUM_FLITS < 3。
  - 在以下全部条件成立时，发送器必须发送标准 Nak Flit：
    - NAK_SCHEDULED 为 1b。
    - NAK_SCHEDULED_TYPE 为 STANDARD_NAK。
    - 不满足发送显式序列号 Flit 的条件。
  - 在以下全部条件成立时，发送器必须发送选择性 Nak Flit：
    - NAK_SCHEDULED 为 1b。
    - NAK_SCHEDULED_TYPE 为 SELECTIVE_NAK。
    - 不满足发送显式序列号 Flit 的条件。
    - 不满足发送标准 Nak Flit 的条件。
  - 在以下全部条件成立时，发送器必须发送 Ack Flit：
    - 不满足发送显式序列号 Flit 的条件。
    - 不满足发送标准 Nak Flit 的条件。
    - 不满足发送选择性 Nak Flit 的条件。
- 如果 CONSECUTIVE_TX_EXPLICIT_SEQ_NUM_FLITS 计数器因重放调度规则 0 而复位，发送器可以发送最多 6 个连续的显式序列号 Flit。

**Flit Replay 发送规则**

- 发送器仅在发送显式序列号 Flit 且 CONSECUTIVE_TX_EXPLICIT_SEQ_NUM_FLITS 为 0b 时，才能开始从 TX Retry Buffer 重放 Flit。
- 如果发送器从 TX Retry Buffer 重放 Flit，则在发送显式序列号 Flit 时必须使用 TX Retry Buffer 中该 Flit 的序列号。
- 有关其他重放发送规则，请参见 § 第 4.2.3.4.2.1.7 节。

**Flit 序列号规则**

- 当发送 Flit 序列号非 0 的 Ack Flit 或 Nak Flit 时：
  - Flit 序列号设置为 TX_ACKNAK_FLIT_SEQ_NUM 的值。
- 当发送显式序列号 Flit 时：
  - NOP Flit 必须将 Flit 序列号设置为 NEXT_TX_FLIT_SEQ_NUM - 1。
  - 重放的 Payload Flit 必须将 Flit 序列号设置为 TX Retry Buffer 中为该 Flit 存储的值。

</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
</div>


---

<!-- 📄 Page 415 -->
---

<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th width="50%">🇬🇧 English</th>
<th width="50%" style="background-color:#e8e8e8">🇨🇳 中文</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>

  - A non-replayed Payload Flit must set Flit Sequence Number to NEXT_TX_FLIT_SEQ_NUM.

**Receiver Rules**

- Refer to § Section 4.2.3.4.2.1.4 for Ack and Nak processing rules.
- Refer to § Section 4.2.3.4.2.1.5 for Ack and Nak scheduling rules.
- Refer to § Section 4.2.3.4.2.1.6 for Replay scheduling rules.

**Transmitter Rules**

- While in this Phase, Explicit Sequence Number Flits are only sent according to the Flit Replay Command Rules defined in this section.
- If a Nak Flit is sent in this phase:
  - A minimum of three consecutive Nak Flits must be sent unless any of the following are true:
    - CONSECUTIVE_TX_NAK_FLITS is reset due to Replay Schedule Rule 0.
    - The transmission of Flits is interrupted by an exit from the L0 state.
    - The NAK_SCHEDULED flag is cleared.
- If an Explicit Sequence Number Flit is sent in this phase:
  - Exactly three consecutive Explicit Sequence Number Flits must be sent unless either of the following are true:
    - CONSECUTIVE_TX_EXPLICIT_SEQ_NUM_FLITS is reset due to Replay Schedule Rule 0.
    - The transmission of Flits is interrupted by an exit from the L0 state.

**Flit Replay Command Rules**

- The following conditions are listed in order of priority.
- A Transmitter must send an Explicit Sequence Number Flit if all of the following are true:
  - Any of the following are true:
    - REPLAY_SCHEDULED is 1b.
    - REPLAY_IN_PROGRESS is 1b.
    - CONSECUTIVE_TX_EXPLICIT_SEQ_NUM_FLITS > 0.
    - All of the following are true⁶⁴:
      - REPLAY_SCHEDULED is 0b.
      - REPLAY_IN_PROGRESS is 0b.
      - NAK_IGNORE_FLIT_SEQ_NUM != 000h
  - CONSECUTIVE_TX_EXPLICIT_SEQ_NUM_FLITS < 3.
  - Either of the following are true:
    - CONSECUTIVE_TX_NAK_FLITS equals 0.
    - CONSECUTIVE_TX_NAK_FLITS > 2.
- A Transmitter must send a Standard Nak Flit if all of the following are true:
  - NAK_SCHEDULED is 1b.
  - NAK_SCHEDULED_TYPE is STANDARD_NAK.

</td>
<td style="background-color:#e8e8e8">

  - 非重放的 Payload Flit 必须将 Flit 序列号设置为 NEXT_TX_FLIT_SEQ_NUM。

**接收器规则**

- 有关 Ack 和 Nak 处理规则，请参见 § 第 4.2.3.4.2.1.4 节。
- 有关 Ack 和 Nak 调度规则，请参见 § 第 4.2.3.4.2.1.5 节。
- 有关 Replay 调度规则，请参见 § 第 4.2.3.4.2.1.6 节。

**发送器规则**

- 在此阶段，显式序列号 Flit 仅按本节定义的 Flit Replay Command 规则进行发送。
- 如果在此阶段发送 Nak Flit：
  - 必须至少发送三个连续的 Nak Flit，除非以下任一条件成立：
    - CONSECUTIVE_TX_NAK_FLITS 因重放调度规则 0 而复位。
    - Flit 发送因退出 L0 状态而中断。
    - NAK_SCHEDULED 标志被清除。
- 如果在此阶段发送显式序列号 Flit：
  - 必须恰好发送三个连续的显式序列号 Flit，除非以下任一条件成立：
    - CONSECUTIVE_TX_EXPLICIT_SEQ_NUM_FLITS 因重放调度规则 0 而复位。
    - Flit 发送因退出 L0 状态而中断。

**Flit Replay Command 规则**

- 以下条件按优先级顺序列出。
- 在以下全部条件成立时，发送器必须发送显式序列号 Flit：
  - 以下任一条件成立：
    - REPLAY_SCHEDULED 为 1b。
    - REPLAY_IN_PROGRESS 为 1b。
    - CONSECUTIVE_TX_EXPLICIT_SEQ_NUM_FLITS > 0。
    - 以下全部条件成立⁶⁴：
      - REPLAY_SCHEDULED 为 0b。
      - REPLAY_IN_PROGRESS 为 0b。
      - NAK_IGNORE_FLIT_SEQ_NUM != 000h
  - CONSECUTIVE_TX_EXPLICIT_SEQ_NUM_FLITS < 3。
  - 以下任一条件成立：
    - CONSECUTIVE_TX_NAK_FLITS 等于 0。
    - CONSECUTIVE_TX_NAK_FLITS > 2。
- 在以下全部条件成立时，发送器必须发送标准 Nak Flit：
  - NAK_SCHEDULED 为 1b。
  - NAK_SCHEDULED_TYPE 为 STANDARD_NAK。

</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>


---

<a id="sec-4-2-3-4-2-1-3"></a>
## 4.2.3.4.2.1.3 Normal Flit Exchange Phase | 正常 Flit 交换阶段


<div style="overflow-x: auto; max-width: 100%;">
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th width="50%">🇬🇧 English</th>
<th width="50%" style="background-color:#e8e8e8">🇨🇳 中文</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>

64. This covers the case where a Nak is received with Flit Sequence Number = NEXT_TX_FLIT_SEQ_NUM - 1.

◦
The conditions for sending an Explicit Sequence Number Flit were not met.

- A Transmitter must send a Selective Nak Flit if all of the following are true:
  - NAK_SCHEDULED is 1b.
  - NAK_SCHEDULED_TYPE is SELECTIVE_NAK.
  - The conditions for sending an Explicit Sequence Number Flit were not met.
  - The conditions for sending a Standard Nak Flit were not met.
- A Transmitter must send an Ack Flit if all of the following are true:
  - The conditions for sending an Explicit Sequence Number Flit were not met.
  - The conditions for sending a Standard Nak Flit were not met.
  - The conditions for sending a Selective Nak Flit were not met.
- The Transmitter may send up to six consecutive Explicit Sequence Number Flits if the CONSECUTIVE_TX_EXPLICIT_SEQ_NUM_FLITS counter is reset due to Replay Schedule Rule 0.

**Flit Replay Transmit Rules**

- The Transmitter must only begin replaying Flits from the TX Retry Buffer when sending an Explicit Sequence Number Flit and CONSECUTIVE_TX_EXPLICIT_SEQ_NUM_FLITS is 0b.
- If the Transmitter is replaying a Flit from the TX Retry Buffer, it must use the sequence number of the Flit from its TX Retry Buffer when sending an Explicit Sequence Number Flit.
- See § Section 4.2.3.4.2.1.7 for additional replay transmit rules.

**Flit Sequence Number Rules**

- When transmitting an Ack Flit or Nak Flit:
  - The Flit Sequence Number is set to the value of TX_ACKNAK_FLIT_SEQ_NUM.
- When transmitting an Explicit Sequence Number Flit:
  - A NOP Flit must set Flit Sequence Number to NEXT_TX_FLIT_SEQ_NUM - 1.
  - A replayed Payload Flit must set Flit Sequence Number to the value stored for the Flit in the TX Retry Buffer.
  - A non-replayed Payload Flit must set Flit Sequence Number to NEXT_TX_FLIT_SEQ_NUM.

**CONSECUTIVE_TX_NAK_FLITS Rules**

- When a Nak Flit is transmitted:
  - CONSECUTIVE_TX_NAK_FLITS is incremented.
- When a non-Nak Flit is transmitted:
  - CONSECUTIVE_TX_NAK_FLITS is set to 0b.
- Also see Replay Schedule Rule 0.

**Receiver Rules**

- Refer to § Section 4.2.3.4.2.1.4 for Ack and Nak processing rules.
- Refer to § Section 4.2.3.4.2.1.5 for Ack and Nak scheduling rules.
- Refer to § Section 4.2.3.4.2.1.6 for Replay scheduling rules.
- A received Ack or Nak with Flit Sequence Number 0 must be ignored.

</td>
<td style="background-color:#e8e8e8">

64. 此处涵盖接收到 Flit Sequence Number = NEXT_TX_FLIT_SEQ_NUM - 1 的 Nak 的情形。

◦
不满足发送 Explicit Sequence Number Flit 的条件。

- 当以下所有条件均成立时,发送器必须发送 Selective Nak Flit:
  - NAK_SCHEDULED 为 1b。
  - NAK_SCHEDULED_TYPE 为 SELECTIVE_NAK。
  - 不满足发送 Explicit Sequence Number Flit 的条件。
  - 不满足发送 Standard Nak Flit 的条件。
- 当以下所有条件均成立时,发送器必须发送 Ack Flit:
  - 不满足发送 Explicit Sequence Number Flit 的条件。
  - 不满足发送 Standard Nak Flit 的条件。
  - 不满足发送 Selective Nak Flit 的条件。
- 如果 CONSECUTIVE_TX_EXPLICIT_SEQ_NUM_FLITS 计数器因 Replay Schedule Rule 0 而被复位,则发送器最多可发送 6 个连续的 Explicit Sequence Number Flit。

**Flit 重放发送规则 (Flit Replay Transmit Rules)**

- 发送器仅在发送 Explicit Sequence Number Flit 且 CONSECUTIVE_TX_EXPLICIT_SEQ_NUM_FLITS 为 0b 时,才能从 TX Retry Buffer 开始重放 Flit。
- 如果发送器正在从 TX Retry Buffer 重放 Flit,则在发送 Explicit Sequence Number Flit 时必须使用 TX Retry Buffer 中该 Flit 的序列号。
- 其它重放发送规则请参见 § Section 4.2.3.4.2.1.7。

**Flit 序列号规则 (Flit Sequence Number Rules)**

- 在发送 Ack Flit 或 Nak Flit 时:
  - Flit 序列号设置为 TX_ACKNAK_FLIT_SEQ_NUM 的值。
- 在发送 Explicit Sequence Number Flit 时:
  - NOP Flit 必须将 Flit 序列号设置为 NEXT_TX_FLIT_SEQ_NUM - 1。
  - 重放的 Payload Flit 必须将 Flit 序列号设置为 TX Retry Buffer 中为该 Flit 存储的值。
  - 非重放的 Payload Flit 必须将 Flit 序列号设置为 NEXT_TX_FLIT_SEQ_NUM。

**CONSECUTIVE_TX_NAK_FLITS 规则**

- 当发送 Nak Flit 时:
  - CONSECUTIVE_TX_NAK_FLITS 加 1。
- 当发送非 Nak Flit 时:
  - CONSECUTIVE_TX_NAK_FLITS 置为 0b。
- 另见 Replay Schedule Rule 0。

**接收器规则 (Receiver Rules)**

- 有关 Ack 和 Nak 处理规则,请参见 § Section 4.2.3.4.2.1.4。
- 有关 Ack 和 Nak 调度规则,请参见 § Section 4.2.3.4.2.1.5。
- 有关 Replay 调度规则,请参见 § Section 4.2.3.4.2.1.6。
- 收到的 Flit 序列号为 0 的 Ack 或 Nak 必须被忽略。

</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
</div>


[⬆️ 返回目录](#-本章目录-table-of-contents)

---

<a id="sec-4-2-3-4-2-1-4"></a>
## 4.2.3.4.2.1.4 Received Ack and Nak Processing | 已接收 Ack 与 Nak 的处理

<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th width="50%">🇬🇧 English</th>
<th width="50%" style="background-color:#e8e8e8">🇨🇳 中文</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>

- Processing of received Ack or Nak Flits must not interrupt a replay in progress.
- Handling an invalid Flit Sequence Number in a received Ack Flit or Nak Flit:
  - If:
    - A valid Ack Flit or Nak Flit is received with Flit Sequence Number N where one or more of the following are true:
    - ((NEXT_TX_FLIT_SEQ_NUM - 1) - N) mod 1023 > MAX_UNACKNOWLEDGED_FLITS
    - (N - ACKD_FLIT_SEQ_NUM) mod 1023 > MAX_UNACKNOWLEDGED_FLITS
  - Then:
    - The received Ack or Nak is ignored.
    - A Data Link Protocol Error is logged in the receiving Port (see § Section 6.2 ).
- If a Receiver receives a valid Ack Flit or Nak Flit with Flit Sequence Number N, it must:
  - Purge all Flits stored the TX Retry Buffer that are older than and including the Flit with Flit Sequence Number N.
  - If (N - ACKD_FLIT_SEQ_NUM) mod 1023 > 0:
    - FLIT_REPLAY_NUM is cleared.
    - ACKD_FLIT_SEQ_NUM is set to N.
  - If the received Flit was an Ack Flit:
    - NAK_IGNORE_FLIT_SEQ_NUM is cleared to 000h.
    - If (N - TX_REPLAY_FLIT_SEQ_NUM) mod 1023 < MAX_UNACKNOWLEDGED_FLITS:
      - Set TX_REPLAY_FLIT_SEQ_NUM to 000h
      - Set REPLAY_SCHEDULED to 0b
  - If the received Flit was a Nak Flit:
    - If N = NEXT_TX_FLIT_SEQ_NUM - 1:
      - NAK_IGNORE_FLIT_SEQ_NUM is set to N.
      - NAK_IGNORE_FLIT_SEQ_NUM is cleared to 000h if all of the following are true:
        - A valid Nak Flit is received with Flit Sequence Number N.
        - N != NAK_IGNORE_FLIT_SEQ_NUM
        - N != NEXT_TX_FLIT_SEQ_NUM - 1
        - It is recommended that NAK_IGNORE_FLIT_SEQ_NUM is cleared to 000h if all of the following are true:
          - A valid Standard Nak Flit is received with Flit Sequence Number N.
          - N == NAK_IGNORE_FLIT_SEQ_NUM
          - REPLAY_SCHEDULED_TYPE is SELECTIVE_REPLAY
          - TX_REPLAY_FLIT_SEQ_NUM == N + 1
          - Schedule a replay as necessary, following the Flit Replay Scheduling rules in § Section 4.2.3.4.2.1.6 .
          - The value of NAK_IGNORE_FLIT_SEQ_NUM must be updated before evaluating the rules in § Section 4.2.3.4.2.1.6 .

</td>
<td style="background-color:#e8e8e8">

- 对已接收 Ack 或 Nak Flit 的处理不得打断正在进行的重放。
- 处理已接收 Ack Flit 或 Nak Flit 中无效的 Flit Sequence Number:
  - 如果:
    - 收到一个有效的 Ack Flit 或 Nak Flit,其 Flit Sequence Number N 满足以下条件之一:
    - ((NEXT_TX_FLIT_SEQ_NUM - 1) - N) mod 1023 > MAX_UNACKNOWLEDGED_FLITS
    - (N - ACKD_FLIT_SEQ_NUM) mod 1023 > MAX_UNACKNOWLEDGED_FLITS
  - 那么:
    - 忽略收到的 Ack 或 Nak。
    - 在接收端口 (Port) 记录一个 Data Link Protocol Error(参见 § Section 6.2)。
- 如果接收器收到一个 Flit Sequence Number 为 N 的有效 Ack Flit 或 Nak Flit,则必须:
  - 从 TX Retry Buffer 中清除所有早于(含)Flit Sequence Number N 的 Flit。
  - 如果 (N - ACKD_FLIT_SEQ_NUM) mod 1023 > 0:
    - 清零 FLIT_REPLAY_NUM。
    - 将 ACKD_FLIT_SEQ_NUM 置为 N。
  - 如果收到的 Flit 是 Ack Flit:
    - 将 NAK_IGNORE_FLIT_SEQ_NUM 清零为 000h。
    - 如果 (N - TX_REPLAY_FLIT_SEQ_NUM) mod 1023 < MAX_UNACKNOWLEDGED_FLITS:
      - 将 TX_REPLAY_FLIT_SEQ_NUM 置为 000h
      - 将 REPLAY_SCHEDULED 置为 0b
  - 如果收到的 Flit 是 Nak Flit:
    - 如果 N = NEXT_TX_FLIT_SEQ_NUM - 1:
      - 将 NAK_IGNORE_FLIT_SEQ_NUM 置为 N。
      - 当以下所有条件均成立时,NAK_IGNORE_FLIT_SEQ_NUM 清零为 000h:
        - 收到一个 Flit Sequence Number 为 N 的有效 Nak Flit。
        - N != NAK_IGNORE_FLIT_SEQ_NUM
        - N != NEXT_TX_FLIT_SEQ_NUM - 1
        - 建议当以下所有条件均成立时,NAK_IGNORE_FLIT_SEQ_NUM 清零为 000h:
          - 收到一个 Flit Sequence Number 为 N 的有效 Standard Nak Flit。
          - N == NAK_IGNORE_FLIT_SEQ_NUM
          - REPLAY_SCHEDULED_TYPE 为 SELECTIVE_REPLAY
          - TX_REPLAY_FLIT_SEQ_NUM == N + 1
          - 按照 § Section 4.2.3.4.2.1.6 中的 Flit Replay Scheduling 规则,在必要时调度一次重放。
          - NAK_IGNORE_FLIT_SEQ_NUM 的值必须在求值 § Section 4.2.3.4.2.1.6 中的规则之前更新。

</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

[⬆️ 返回目录](#-本章目录-table-of-contents)

---

<!-- 📄 Page 416 -->
---

<a id="sec-4-2-3-4-2-1-5"></a>
## 4.2.3.4.2.1.5 Ack, Nak, and Discard Rules | Ack、Nak 与丢弃规则


<div style="overflow-x: auto; max-width: 100%;">
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th width="50%">🇬🇧 English</th>
<th width="50%" style="background-color:#e8e8e8">🇨🇳 中文</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>

```
if (NON_IDLE_EXPLICIT_SEQ_NUM_FLIT_RCVD == 0b) {
  See Receiver Rules in IDLE Flit Handshake Phase
}
# Invalid Flit Handling
else if (Received Invalid Flit) {
  if (NAK_SCHEDULED == 1) {
    if (NAK_SCHEDULED_TYPE == STANDARD_NAK) {
      Flit Discard 1
    }
    else {
      Nak Schedule 6
    }
  }
  else {
    if (NAK_WITHDRAWAL_ALLOWED == 1) {
      Nak Schedule 1
    }
    else {
      Nak Schedule 0
    }
  }
}
# Valid Flit Handling
else if (Received Valid Flit) {
  if ((Explicit Sequence Number Flit) && (Flit Sequence Number == 0)) {
    Flit Discard 2
  }
  else if (NAK_WITHDRAWAL_ALLOWED == 1b) {
    NAK_WITHDRAWAL_ALLOWED = 0b;
    if (Prior Flit was Payload) {
      if (NOP Flit) {
        # Schedule a Standard or Selective Nak
        Discard Flit's TLP Bytes
        NAK_SCHEDULED = 1b;
        TX_ACKNAK_FLIT_SEQ_NUM = NEXT_EXPECTED_RX_FLIT_SEQ_NUM - 1;
        NAK_SCHEDULED_TYPE = STANDARD_NAK or SELECTIVE_NAK
        NEXT_EXPECTED_RX_FLIT_SEQ_NUM does not change;
        if (Scheduling a Selective Nak) {
          NEXT_RX_FLIT_SEQ_NUM_TO_STORE = NEXT_EXPECTED_RX_FLIT_SEQ_NUM + 1
        }
      }
      # Current Flit is Payload Flit
      else {
        # Schedule a Standard Nak
        if (Scheduling a Standard Nak) {
          standard_nak_procedure()
        }
        # Schedule a Selective Nak
        else {
          NEXT_RX_FLIT_SEQ_NUM_TO_STORE = NEXT_EXPECT_RX_FLIT_SEQ_NUM + 1;
          selective_nak_procedure()
        }
      }
    }
    # Prior Flit was NOP
    else {
      if (bad_sequence_number() || ((NOP Flit) && bad_nop_sequence_number())) {
        Nak Schedule 2
      }
      # Withdraw Nak
      else {
        if (((Payload Flit) && duplicate_sequence_number()) || (NOP Flit)) {
          # Schedule Ack for NEXT_EXPECTED_RX_FLIT_SEQ_NUM - 1
          TX_ACKNAK_FLIT_SEQ_NUM is set to NEXT_EXPECTED_RX_FLIT_SEQ_NUM - 1
          Discard Flit's TLP Bytes
        }
        if ((Payload Flit) && (NEXT_EXPECTED_RX_FLIT_SEQ_NUM == IMPLICIT_RX_FLIT_SEQ_NUM)) {
          # Schedule Ack for NEXT_EXPECTED_RX_FLIT_SEQ_NUM
          TX_ACKNAK_FLIT_SEQ_NUM is set to NEXT_EXPECTED_RX_FLIT_SEQ_NUM
          Increment NEXT_EXPECTED_RX_FLIT_SEQ_NUM
        }
      }
    }
  }
  # NAK_WITHDRAWAL_ALLOWED == 0b
  else {
    if (NAK_SCHEDULED == 1b) {
      if (NAK_SCHEDULED_TYPE == Standard Nak) {
        if (NOP Flit) {
          if ((Explicit Sequence Number Flit) &&
              (IMPLICIT_RX_FLIT_SEQ_NUM == (NEXT_EXPECTED_RX_FLIT_SEQ_NUM-1))) {
            NAK_SCHEDULED = 0b
            Discard Flit's TLP Bytes
          }
          else {
            Flit Discard 0
          }
        }
        # Payload Flit
        else {
          standard_nak_procedure()
        }
      }
      # Selective Nak
      else {
        if (NOP Flit) {
          Flit Discard 0
        }
        # Payload Flit
        else {
          selective_nak_procedure()
        }
      }
    }
    else {
      if (NOP Flit) {
        if (bad_nop_sequence_number())) {
          Nak Schedule 2
        }
        else {
          Flit Discard 0
        }
      }
      # Payload Flit
      else {
        if (duplicate_sequence_number()) {
          Flit Discard 0
        }
        else if (bad_sequence_number()){
          Nak Schedule 2
        }
        else {
          # Forward Progress
          Ack Schedule 0
        }
      }
    }
  }
}

# Bad Sequence Number Check Logic
def bad_sequence_number() {
  return (NEXT_EXPECT_RX_FLIT_SEQ_NUM - IMPLICIT_RX_FLIT_SEQ_NUM) mod 1023 > 511
}
def bad_nop_sequence_number() {
  return bad_sequence_number() || (IMPLICIT_RX_FLIT_SEQ_NUM == NEXT_EXPECTED_RX_FLIT_SEQ_NUM)
}
# Duplicate Sequence Number Check Logic
def duplicate_sequence_number() {
  return ((TX_ACKNAK_FLIT_SEQ_NUM - IMPLICIT_RX_FLIT_SEQ_NUM) mod 1023 < 511)
}

# Ack/Nak/Discard Logic when scheduling a Standard Nak or when a Standard Nak is
outstanding.
def standard_nak_procedure() {
  if (duplicate_sequence_number()) {
    if (NAK_SCHEDULED == 1b) {
      Flit Discard 0
    }
    else {
      Nak Schedule 2
    }
  }
  else if ((Received Flit is Explicit Sequence Number Flit) &&
           (IMPLICIT_RX_FLIT_SEQ_NUM == NEXT_EXPECTED_RX_FLIT_SEQ_NUM)) {
    Ack Schedule 1
  }
  else {
    if (NAK_SCHEDULED == 1b) {
      Flit Discard 0
    }
    else {
      Nak Schedule 2
    }
  }
}

# Ack/Nak/Discard Logic when scheduling a Selective Nak or when a Selective Nak is
outstanding.
def selective_nak_procedure() {
  if (duplicate_sequence_number()) {
    Flit Discard 0
  }
  else if ((Received Flit is Explicit Sequence Number Flit) &&
           (IMPLICIT_RX_FLIT_SEQ_NUM == NEXT_EXPECTED_RX_FLIT_SEQ_NUM)) {
    if (RX_RETRY_BUFFER_OVERFLOW == 1) {
      Nak Schedule 5
    }
    else {
      Ack Schedule 2
    }
  }
  else if (IMPLICIT_RX_FLIT_SEQ_NUM == NEXT_RX_FLIT_SEQ_NUM_TO_STORE) {
    if (RX RETRY BUFFER FULL) {
      Nak Schedule 4
    }
    else {
      Nak Schedule 3
    }
  }
  else {
    # RX Retry Buffer Overflow
    if ((Received Flit is Valid) && (RX_RETRY_BUFFER_OVERFLOW == 1)) {
      Either Flit Discard 0 or NAK Schedule 2 65
    }
    # Bad Sequence Number
    else {
      Nak Schedule 2
    }
  }
}
```

65. Flit Discard 0 is the preferred behavior in this scenario. Nak Schedule 2 is allowed but is less performant.

</td>
<td style="background-color:#e8e8e8">

```
if (NON_IDLE_EXPLICIT_SEQ_NUM_FLIT_RCVD == 0b) {
  参见 IDLE Flit 握手阶段的接收器规则
}
# 无效 Flit 处理
else if (收到无效 Flit) {
  if (NAK_SCHEDULED == 1) {
    if (NAK_SCHEDULED_TYPE == STANDARD_NAK) {
      Flit Discard 1
    }
    else {
      Nak Schedule 6
    }
  }
  else {
    if (NAK_WITHDRAWAL_ALLOWED == 1) {
      Nak Schedule 1
    }
    else {
      Nak Schedule 0
    }
  }
}
# 有效 Flit 处理
else if (收到有效 Flit) {
  if ((Explicit Sequence Number Flit) && (Flit Sequence Number == 0)) {
    Flit Discard 2
  }
  else if (NAK_WITHDRAWAL_ALLOWED == 1b) {
    NAK_WITHDRAWAL_ALLOWED = 0b;
    if (前一 Flit 是 Payload) {
      if (NOP Flit) {
        # 调度 Standard 或 Selective Nak
        丢弃该 Flit 的 TLP 字节
        NAK_SCHEDULED = 1b;
        TX_ACKNAK_FLIT_SEQ_NUM = NEXT_EXPECTED_RX_FLIT_SEQ_NUM - 1;
        NAK_SCHEDULED_TYPE = STANDARD_NAK 或 SELECTIVE_NAK
        NEXT_EXPECTED_RX_FLIT_SEQ_NUM 不变;
        if (正在调度 Selective Nak) {
          NEXT_RX_FLIT_SEQ_NUM_TO_STORE = NEXT_EXPECTED_RX_FLIT_SEQ_NUM + 1
        }
      }
      # 当前 Flit 是 Payload Flit
      else {
        # 调度 Standard Nak
        if (正在调度 Standard Nak) {
          standard_nak_procedure()
        }
        # 调度 Selective Nak
        else {
          NEXT_RX_FLIT_SEQ_NUM_TO_STORE = NEXT_EXPECT_RX_FLIT_SEQ_NUM + 1;
          selective_nak_procedure()
        }
      }
    }
    # 前一 Flit 是 NOP
    else {
      if (bad_sequence_number() || ((NOP Flit) && bad_nop_sequence_number())) {
        Nak Schedule 2
      }
      # 撤回 Nak
      else {
        if (((Payload Flit) && duplicate_sequence_number()) || (NOP Flit)) {
          # 为 NEXT_EXPECTED_RX_FLIT_SEQ_NUM - 1 调度 Ack
          TX_ACKNAK_FLIT_SEQ_NUM 置为 NEXT_EXPECTED_RX_FLIT_SEQ_NUM - 1
          丢弃该 Flit 的 TLP 字节
        }
        if ((Payload Flit) && (NEXT_EXPECTED_RX_FLIT_SEQ_NUM == IMPLICIT_RX_FLIT_SEQ_NUM)) {
          # 为 NEXT_EXPECTED_RX_FLIT_SEQ_NUM 调度 Ack
          TX_ACKNAK_FLIT_SEQ_NUM 置为 NEXT_EXPECTED_RX_FLIT_SEQ_NUM
          NEXT_EXPECTED_RX_FLIT_SEQ_NUM 加 1
        }
      }
    }
  }
  # NAK_WITHDRAWAL_ALLOWED == 0b
  else {
    if (NAK_SCHEDULED == 1b) {
      if (NAK_SCHEDULED_TYPE == Standard Nak) {
        if (NOP Flit) {
          if ((Explicit Sequence Number Flit) &&
              (IMPLICIT_RX_FLIT_SEQ_NUM == (NEXT_EXPECTED_RX_FLIT_SEQ_NUM-1))) {
            NAK_SCHEDULED = 0b
            丢弃该 Flit 的 TLP 字节
          }
          else {
            Flit Discard 0
          }
        }
        # Payload Flit
        else {
          standard_nak_procedure()
        }
      }
      # Selective Nak
      else {
        if (NOP Flit) {
          Flit Discard 0
        }
        # Payload Flit
        else {
          selective_nak_procedure()
        }
      }
    }
    else {
      if (NOP Flit) {
        if (bad_nop_sequence_number())) {
          Nak Schedule 2
        }
        else {
          Flit Discard 0
        }
      }
      # Payload Flit
      else {
        if (duplicate_sequence_number()) {
          Flit Discard 0
        }
        else if (bad_sequence_number()){
          Nak Schedule 2
        }
        else {
          # 推进 (Forward Progress)
          Ack Schedule 0
        }
      }
    }
  }
}

# 错误序列号检查逻辑
def bad_sequence_number() {
  return (NEXT_EXPECT_RX_FLIT_SEQ_NUM - IMPLICIT_RX_FLIT_SEQ_NUM) mod 1023 > 511
}
def bad_nop_sequence_number() {
  return bad_sequence_number() || (IMPLICIT_RX_FLIT_SEQ_NUM == NEXT_EXPECTED_RX_FLIT_SEQ_NUM)
}
# 重复序列号检查逻辑
def duplicate_sequence_number() {
  return ((TX_ACKNAK_FLIT_SEQ_NUM - IMPLICIT_RX_FLIT_SEQ_NUM) mod 1023 < 511)
}

# 调度 Standard Nak 或 Standard Nak 未决时的 Ack/Nak/丢弃逻辑
def standard_nak_procedure() {
  if (duplicate_sequence_number()) {
    if (NAK_SCHEDULED == 1b) {
      Flit Discard 0
    }
    else {
      Nak Schedule 2
    }
  }
  else if ((收到的 Flit 是 Explicit Sequence Number Flit) &&
           (IMPLICIT_RX_FLIT_SEQ_NUM == NEXT_EXPECTED_RX_FLIT_SEQ_NUM)) {
    Ack Schedule 1
  }
  else {
    if (NAK_SCHEDULED == 1b) {
      Flit Discard 0
    }
    else {
      Nak Schedule 2
    }
  }
}

# 调度 Selective Nak 或 Selective Nak 未决时的 Ack/Nak/丢弃逻辑
def selective_nak_procedure() {
  if (duplicate_sequence_number()) {
    Flit Discard 0
  }
  else if ((收到的 Flit 是 Explicit Sequence Number Flit) &&
           (IMPLICIT_RX_FLIT_SEQ_NUM == NEXT_EXPECTED_RX_FLIT_SEQ_NUM)) {
    if (RX_RETRY_BUFFER_OVERFLOW == 1) {
      Nak Schedule 5
    }
    else {
      Ack Schedule 2
    }
  }
  else if (IMPLICIT_RX_FLIT_SEQ_NUM == NEXT_RX_FLIT_SEQ_NUM_TO_STORE) {
    if (RX RETRY BUFFER FULL) {
      Nak Schedule 4
    }
    else {
      Nak Schedule 3
    }
  }
  else {
    # RX Retry Buffer 溢出
    if ((收到的 Flit 有效) && (RX_RETRY_BUFFER_OVERFLOW == 1)) {
      Flit Discard 0 或 NAK Schedule 2 65
    }
    # 错误序列号
    else {
      Nak Schedule 2
    }
  }
}
```

65. 在此场景下,Flit Discard 0 是推荐行为。Nak Schedule 2 也被允许,但性能较差。

</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
</div>

<!-- 📄 Page 418 -->

<a id="sec-4-2-3-4-2-1-5-schedules"></a>
## 4.2.3.4.2.1.5 Nak/Ack/Discard Schedule Definitions | Nak/Ack/丢弃调度定义

<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th width="50%">🇬🇧 English</th>
<th width="50%" style="background-color:#e8e8e8">🇨🇳 中文</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>

**Nak Schedule 0**

- The received Flit is discarded.
- NAK_WITHDRAWAL_ALLOWED is set to 1b.
- NEXT_EXPECTED_RX_FLIT_SEQ_NUM does not change.

**Nak Schedule 1**

- The received Flit is discarded.
- NAK_SCHEDULED is set to 1b.
- TX_ACKNAK_FLIT_SEQ_NUM is set to NEXT_EXPECTED_RX_FLIT_SEQ_NUM - 1.
- NAK_SCHEDULED_TYPE is set to STANDARD_NAK.
- NAK_WITHDRAWAL_ALLOWED is cleared.
- NEXT_EXPECTED_RX_FLIT_SEQ_NUM does not change.

**Nak Schedule 2**

- The TLP Bytes of the received Flit are discarded.
- TX_ACKNAK_FLIT_SEQ_NUM is set to NEXT_EXPECTED_RX_FLIT_SEQ_NUM - 1.
- NAK_SCHEDULED is set to 1b.
- NAK_SCHEDULED_TYPE is set to STANDARD_NAK.
- RX_RETRY_BUFFER_LAST_FLIT_SEQ_NUM is set to 000h.
- NEXT_EXPECTED_RX_FLIT_SEQ_NUM does not change.

**Nak Schedule 3**

- If NAK_SCHEDULED is 0b
  - NAK_SCHEDULED is set to 1b.
  - NAK_SCHEDULED_TYPE is set to SELECTIVE_NAK
  - TX_ACKNAK_FLIT_SEQ_NUM is set to NEXT_EXPECTED_RX_FLIT_SEQ_NUM - 1.
- Store the Received Flit in the RX Retry Buffer.
- RX_RETRY_BUFFER_LAST_FLIT_SEQ_NUM is set to IMPLICIT_RX_FLIT_SEQ_NUM.
- NEXT_RX_FLIT_SEQ_NUM_TO_STORE is incremented.
- NEXT_EXPECTED_RX_FLIT_SEQ_NUM does not change.

**Nak Schedule 4**

- The TLP Bytes of the received Flit that cannot be stored in the RX Retry Buffer are discarded.
- If the Receiver chooses to continue with the Selective Nak:
  - RX_RETRY_BUFFER_OVERFLOW is set to 1b.
  - RX_RETRY_BUFFER_LAST_FLIT_SEQ_NUM does not change.
- If the Receiver chooses to change the Selective Nak to a Standard Nak:
  - NAK_SCHEDULED_TYPE is set to STANDARD_NAK.
  - TX_ACKNAK_FLIT_SEQ_NUM is set to NEXT_EXPECTED_RX_FLIT_SEQ_NUM - 1.
  - All Flits stored in the RX Retry Buffer are purged.
  - RX_RETRY_BUFFER_LAST_FLIT_SEQ_NUM is set to 000h.
- NEXT_EXPECTED_RX_FLIT_SEQ_NUM does not change.

**Nak Schedule 5**

- NAK_SCHEDULED remains 1b.
- NAK_SCHEDULED_TYPE is set to STANDARD_NAK.
- TX_ACKNAK_FLIT_SEQ_NUM is set to RX_RETRY_BUFFER_LAST_FLIT_SEQ_NUM.
- RX_RETRY_BUFFER_OVERFLOW is cleared.
- NEXT_EXPECTED_RX_FLIT_SEQ_NUM is set to RX_RETRY_BUFFER_LAST_FLIT_SEQ_NUM + 1.
- RX_RETRY_BUFFER_LAST_FLIT_SEQ_NUM is set to 000h.

**Nak Schedule 6**

- The received Flit is discarded.
- NAK_SCHEDULED remains 1b.
- NAK_SCHEDULED_TYPE is set to STANDARD_NAK.
- RX_RETRY_BUFFER_OVERFLOW is cleared.
- TX_ACKNAK_FLIT_SEQ_NUM is set to NEXT_EXPECTED_RX_FLIT_SEQ_NUM - 1.
- All Flits stored in the RX Retry Buffer are purged.
- RX_RETRY_BUFFER_LAST_FLIT_SEQ_NUM is set to 000h.

**Nak Schedule 7**

- A Receiver is permitted to change a scheduled Selective Nak of TX_ACKNAK_FLIT_SEQ_NUM to a Standard Nak of TX_ACKNAK_FLIT_SEQ_NUM for any reason.

**Ack Schedule 0**

- TX_ACKNAK_FLIT_SEQ_NUM is set to NEXT_EXPECTED_RX_FLIT_SEQ_NUM.
- NEXT_EXPECTED_RX_FLIT_SEQ_NUM is incremented.

**Ack Schedule 1**

- NAK_SCHEDULED is cleared.
- TX_ACKNAK_FLIT_SEQ_NUM is set to IMPLICIT_RX_FLIT_SEQ_NUM.
- NEXT_EXPECTED_RX_FLIT_SEQ_NUM is set to IMPLICIT_RX_FLIT_SEQ_NUM + 1.

**Ack Schedule 2**

- NAK_SCHEDULED is cleared.
- If RX Retry Buffer is empty:
  - TX_ACKNAK_FLIT_SEQ_NUM is set to IMPLICIT_RX_FLIT_SEQ_NUM.
  - NEXT_EXPECTED_RX_FLIT_SEQ_NUM is set to IMPLICIT_RX_FLIT_SEQ_NUM + 1.
- If RX Retry Buffer is NOT empty:
  - TX_ACKNAK_FLIT_SEQ_NUM is set to RX_RETRY_BUFFER_LAST_FLIT_SEQ_NUM.
  - NEXT_EXPECTED_RX_FLIT_SEQ_NUM is set to RX_RETRY_BUFFER_LAST_FLIT_SEQ_NUM + 1.
- RX_RETRY_BUFFER_LAST_FLIT_SEQ_NUM is set to 000h.

**Flit Discard 0**

- The TLP Bytes of the received Flit are discarded.
- NEXT_EXPECTED_RX_FLIT_SEQ_NUM does not change.

**Flit Discard 1**

- The received Flit is discarded.
- NEXT_EXPECTED_RX_FLIT_SEQ_NUM does not change.

**Flit Discard 2**

- The received Flit is discarded.
- A Data Link Protocol Error is logged in the receiving Port (see § Section 6.2 ).
- NEXT_EXPECTED_RX_FLIT_SEQ_NUM does not change.
- NAK_WITHDRAWAL_ALLOWED is cleared.

</td>
<td style="background-color:#e8e8e8">

**Nak Schedule 0**

- 丢弃收到的 Flit。
- NAK_WITHDRAWAL_ALLOWED 置为 1b。
- NEXT_EXPECTED_RX_FLIT_SEQ_NUM 不变。

**Nak Schedule 1**

- 丢弃收到的 Flit。
- NAK_SCHEDULED 置为 1b。
- TX_ACKNAK_FLIT_SEQ_NUM 置为 NEXT_EXPECTED_RX_FLIT_SEQ_NUM - 1。
- NAK_SCHEDULED_TYPE 置为 STANDARD_NAK。
- 清零 NAK_WITHDRAWAL_ALLOWED。
- NEXT_EXPECTED_RX_FLIT_SEQ_NUM 不变。

**Nak Schedule 2**

- 丢弃收到的 Flit 的 TLP 字节。
- TX_ACKNAK_FLIT_SEQ_NUM 置为 NEXT_EXPECTED_RX_FLIT_SEQ_NUM - 1。
- NAK_SCHEDULED 置为 1b。
- NAK_SCHEDULED_TYPE 置为 STANDARD_NAK。
- RX_RETRY_BUFFER_LAST_FLIT_SEQ_NUM 置为 000h。
- NEXT_EXPECTED_RX_FLIT_SEQ_NUM 不变。

**Nak Schedule 3**

- 如果 NAK_SCHEDULED 为 0b
  - NAK_SCHEDULED 置为 1b。
  - NAK_SCHEDULED_TYPE 置为 SELECTIVE_NAK
  - TX_ACKNAK_FLIT_SEQ_NUM 置为 NEXT_EXPECTED_RX_FLIT_SEQ_NUM - 1。
- 将收到的 Flit 存入 RX Retry Buffer。
- RX_RETRY_BUFFER_LAST_FLIT_SEQ_NUM 置为 IMPLICIT_RX_FLIT_SEQ_NUM。
- NEXT_RX_FLIT_SEQ_NUM_TO_STORE 加 1。
- NEXT_EXPECTED_RX_FLIT_SEQ_NUM 不变。

**Nak Schedule 4**

- 丢弃 RX Retry Buffer 中无法存储的该 Flit 的 TLP 字节。
- 如果接收器选择继续 Selective Nak:
  - RX_RETRY_BUFFER_OVERFLOW 置为 1b。
  - RX_RETRY_BUFFER_LAST_FLIT_SEQ_NUM 不变。
- 如果接收器选择将 Selective Nak 改为 Standard Nak:
  - NAK_SCHEDULED_TYPE 置为 STANDARD_NAK。
  - TX_ACKNAK_FLIT_SEQ_NUM 置为 NEXT_EXPECTED_RX_FLIT_SEQ_NUM - 1。
  - 清空 RX Retry Buffer 中的所有 Flit。
  - RX_RETRY_BUFFER_LAST_FLIT_SEQ_NUM 置为 000h。
- NEXT_EXPECTED_RX_FLIT_SEQ_NUM 不变。

**Nak Schedule 5**

- NAK_SCHEDULED 保持为 1b。
- NAK_SCHEDULED_TYPE 置为 STANDARD_NAK。
- TX_ACKNAK_FLIT_SEQ_NUM 置为 RX_RETRY_BUFFER_LAST_FLIT_SEQ_NUM。
- 清零 RX_RETRY_BUFFER_OVERFLOW。
- NEXT_EXPECTED_RX_FLIT_SEQ_NUM 置为 RX_RETRY_BUFFER_LAST_FLIT_SEQ_NUM + 1。
- RX_RETRY_BUFFER_LAST_FLIT_SEQ_NUM 置为 000h。

**Nak Schedule 6**

- 丢弃收到的 Flit。
- NAK_SCHEDULED 保持为 1b。
- NAK_SCHEDULED_TYPE 置为 STANDARD_NAK。
- 清零 RX_RETRY_BUFFER_OVERFLOW。
- TX_ACKNAK_FLIT_SEQ_NUM 置为 NEXT_EXPECTED_RX_FLIT_SEQ_NUM - 1。
- 清空 RX Retry Buffer 中的所有 Flit。
- RX_RETRY_BUFFER_LAST_FLIT_SEQ_NUM 置为 000h。

**Nak Schedule 7**

- 接收器可出于任何原因将已调度的 Selective Nak(TX_ACKNAK_FLIT_SEQ_NUM)更改为 Standard Nak(TX_ACKNAK_FLIT_SEQ_NUM)。

**Ack Schedule 0**

- TX_ACKNAK_FLIT_SEQ_NUM 置为 NEXT_EXPECTED_RX_FLIT_SEQ_NUM。
- NEXT_EXPECTED_RX_FLIT_SEQ_NUM 加 1。

**Ack Schedule 1**

- 清零 NAK_SCHEDULED。
- TX_ACKNAK_FLIT_SEQ_NUM 置为 IMPLICIT_RX_FLIT_SEQ_NUM。
- NEXT_EXPECTED_RX_FLIT_SEQ_NUM 置为 IMPLICIT_RX_FLIT_SEQ_NUM + 1。

**Ack Schedule 2**

- 清零 NAK_SCHEDULED。
- 如果 RX Retry Buffer 为空:
  - TX_ACKNAK_FLIT_SEQ_NUM 置为 IMPLICIT_RX_FLIT_SEQ_NUM。
  - NEXT_EXPECTED_RX_FLIT_SEQ_NUM 置为 IMPLICIT_RX_FLIT_SEQ_NUM + 1。
- 如果 RX Retry Buffer 非空:
  - TX_ACKNAK_FLIT_SEQ_NUM 置为 RX_RETRY_BUFFER_LAST_FLIT_SEQ_NUM。
  - NEXT_EXPECTED_RX_FLIT_SEQ_NUM 置为 RX_RETRY_BUFFER_LAST_FLIT_SEQ_NUM + 1。
- RX_RETRY_BUFFER_LAST_FLIT_SEQ_NUM 置为 000h。

**Flit Discard 0**

- 丢弃收到的 Flit 的 TLP 字节。
- NEXT_EXPECTED_RX_FLIT_SEQ_NUM 不变。

**Flit Discard 1**

- 丢弃收到的 Flit。
- NEXT_EXPECTED_RX_FLIT_SEQ_NUM 不变。

**Flit Discard 2**

- 丢弃收到的 Flit。
- 在接收端口 (Port) 记录一个 Data Link Protocol Error(参见 § Section 6.2)。
- NEXT_EXPECTED_RX_FLIT_SEQ_NUM 不变。
- 清零 NAK_WITHDRAWAL_ALLOWED。

</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

> **Figure 4-33.** Flit Ack, Nak, and Discard Rules Flow Chart (Zoom-In to View)
> <img src="figures/chapter_04/fig_0424_1_tight.png" width="700">

<a id="sec-4-2-3-4-2-1-5-flowchart"></a>
## Ack, Nak, and Discard Rules Flow Chart | Ack、Nak 与丢弃规则流程图


<div style="overflow-x: auto; max-width: 100%;">
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th width="50%">🇬🇧 English</th>
<th width="50%" style="background-color:#e8e8e8">🇨🇳 中文</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>

**Ack, Nak, and Discard Rules Flow Chart (v1.0, 2022-02-15)**

[Flow chart contents describing the logic of processing received Flits and scheduling Ack, Nak, or Discard operations. Key decision points include:]

- **Received Valid Flit?**
  - Set IMPLICIT_RX_FLIT_SEQ_NUM to Flit Sequence Number of received Flit
  - If Explicit Sequence Number Flit? → Increment IMPLICIT_RX_FLIT_SEQ_NUM
- **Duplicate Sequence Number check**: (TX_ACKNAK_FLIT_SEQ_NUM - IMPLICIT_RX_FLIT_SEQ_NUM) mod 1023 < MAX_UNACKNOWLEDGED_FLITS
- **Bad Sequence Number check**: (NEXT_EXPECT_RX_FLIT_SEQ_NUM - IMPLICIT_RX_FLIT_SEQ_NUM) mod 1023 > 511
- **NAK_SCHEDULED == 1b?** — yes/no branch
- **NAK_SCHEDULED_TYPE == STANDARD_NAK?** — yes/no branch
- **Nak Schedule branches** (Standard Nak / Selective Nak)
- **Ack Schedule branches** (Ack Schedule 0 / 1 / 2)
- **Flit Discard branches** (Flit Discard 0 / 1 / 2)
- **IDLE Flit Handshake Phase Rules:**
  - All received Flits are discarded.
  - The Receiver moves to the Sequence Number Handshake Phase when two consecutive valid IDLE Flits have been received.
- **Implementation specific move to Standard NAK** — at any point during selective replay has been scheduled, implementation specific can move to standard replay for any reasons.
- **Nak Schedule Rule 7**

</td>
<td style="background-color:#e8e8e8">

**Ack、Nak 与丢弃规则流程图 (v1.0, 2022-02-15)**

[流程图内容,描述处理收到的 Flit 并调度 Ack、Nak 或丢弃操作的逻辑。关键决策点包括:]

- **是否收到有效 Flit?**
  - 将 IMPLICIT_RX_FLIT_SEQ_NUM 置为所收到 Flit 的 Flit Sequence Number
  - 若为 Explicit Sequence Number Flit? → IMPLICIT_RX_FLIT_SEQ_NUM 加 1
- **重复序列号检查**:(TX_ACKNAK_FLIT_SEQ_NUM - IMPLICIT_RX_FLIT_SEQ_NUM) mod 1023 < MAX_UNACKNOWLEDGED_FLITS
- **错误序列号检查**:(NEXT_EXPECT_RX_FLIT_SEQ_NUM - IMPLICIT_RX_FLIT_SEQ_NUM) mod 1023 > 511
- **NAK_SCHEDULED == 1b?** —— 是/否分支
- **NAK_SCHEDULED_TYPE == STANDARD_NAK?** —— 是/否分支
- **Nak Schedule 分支**(Standard Nak / Selective Nak)
- **Ack Schedule 分支**(Ack Schedule 0 / 1 / 2)
- **Flit Discard 分支**(Flit Discard 0 / 1 / 2)
- **IDLE Flit 握手阶段规则:**
  - 所有收到的 Flit 都被丢弃。
  - 当连续收到两个有效的 IDLE Flit 时,接收器进入 Sequence Number Handshake Phase。
- **实现相关的 Standard NAK 切换** —— 在已调度 selective replay 期间的任何时刻,出于实现相关的原因,可切换至 standard replay。
- **Nak Schedule Rule 7**

</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
</div>

<a id="sec-4-2-3-4-2-1-6"></a>
## 4.2.3.4.2.1.6 Flit Replay Scheduling | Flit 重放调度

<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th width="50%">🇬🇧 English</th>
<th width="50%" style="background-color:#e8e8e8">🇨🇳 中文</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>

**Replay Schedule Rule 0**
Replay Timeout

- If all of the following are true:
  - REPLAY_TIMEOUT_FLIT_COUNT >= 1500 66
  - REPLAY_SCHEDULED is 0b.
  - REPLAY_IN_PROGRESS is 0b.
- Then:
  - REPLAY_SCHEDULED is set to 1b.
  - REPLAY_SCHEDULED_TYPE is set to STANDARD_REPLAY.
  - TX_REPLAY_FLIT_SEQ_NUM is set to (ACKD_FLIT_SEQ_NUM + 1).
  - CONSECUTIVE_TX_EXPLICIT_SEQ_NUM_FLITS is set to 0b. 67
  - CONSECUTIVE_TX_NAK_FLITS is set to 0b. 68
  - REPLAY_TIMEOUT_FLIT_COUNT is set to 0b.
  - A Replay Timer Timeout error is logged in the Port (see § Section 6.2 ).

**Replay Schedule Rule 1**
Received Nak for Payload Flit.

- If all of the following are true:
  - Received a valid Nak Flit with Flit Sequence Number N.
  - A Payload Flit with Flit Sequence Number N + 1 is stored in the TX Retry Buffer.
  - REPLAY_SCHEDULED is 0b.
  - REPLAY_IN_PROGRESS is 0b.
  - Either of the following are true:
    - NAK_IGNORE_FLIT_SEQ_NUM != N.
    - The Nak Ignore Window has not been started or has elapsed.
- Then:
  - REPLAY_SCHEDULED is set to 1b.
  - TX_REPLAY_FLIT_SEQ_NUM is set to N + 1.
  - NAK_IGNORE_FLIT_SEQ_NUM is set to N.
  - If the received Flit is Standard Nak Flit:
    - REPLAY_SCHEDULED_TYPE is set to STANDARD_REPLAY.
  - If the received Flit is a Selective Nak Flit:
    - REPLAY_SCHEDULED_TYPE is set to SELECTIVE_REPLAY.

**Replay Schedule Rule 2**
Received Standard Nak after Selective Nak for Payload Flit.

- If all of the following are true:
  - Received a valid Standard Nak Flit with Flit Sequence Number N.
  - N+1 equals TX_REPLAY_FLIT_SEQ_NUM.
  - REPLAY_SCHEDULED is 1b.
  - REPLAY_IN_PROGRESS is 0b.
  - REPLAY_SCHEDULED_TYPE is SELECTIVE_REPLAY.
- Then:
  - REPLAY_SCHEDULED is set to 1b.
  - TX_REPLAY_FLIT_SEQ_NUM does not change.
  - REPLAY_SCHEDULED_TYPE is set to STANDARD_REPLAY.

66. The max Ordered set insertion interval in § Table 4-21 is 748. 1500 is 748*2 rounded up.
67. CONSECUTIVE_TX_EXPLICIT_SEQ_NUM_FLITS is cleared to allow the Transmitter to begin replaying Flits right away and avoid overflowing the TX Retry Buffer sending NOP Flits while waiting to send another Explicit Sequence Number Flit to begin the replay.
68. Same reason as clearing CONSECUTIVE_TX_EXPLICIT_SEQ_NUM_FLITS above.

</td>
<td style="background-color:#e8e8e8">

**Replay Schedule Rule 0**
重放超时 (Replay Timeout)

- 如果以下所有条件均成立:
  - REPLAY_TIMEOUT_FLIT_COUNT >= 1500 66
  - REPLAY_SCHEDULED 为 0b。
  - REPLAY_IN_PROGRESS 为 0b。
- 那么:
  - REPLAY_SCHEDULED 置为 1b。
  - REPLAY_SCHEDULED_TYPE 置为 STANDARD_REPLAY。
  - TX_REPLAY_FLIT_SEQ_NUM 置为 (ACKD_FLIT_SEQ_NUM + 1)。
  - CONSECUTIVE_TX_EXPLICIT_SEQ_NUM_FLITS 置为 0b。67
  - CONSECUTIVE_TX_NAK_FLITS 置为 0b。68
  - REPLAY_TIMEOUT_FLIT_COUNT 置为 0b。
  - 在端口 (Port) 记录一个 Replay Timer Timeout 错误(参见 § Section 6.2)。

**Replay Schedule Rule 1**
收到针对 Payload Flit 的 Nak。

- 如果以下所有条件均成立:
  - 收到一个 Flit Sequence Number 为 N 的有效 Nak Flit。
  - TX Retry Buffer 中存有 Flit Sequence Number 为 N + 1 的 Payload Flit。
  - REPLAY_SCHEDULED 为 0b。
  - REPLAY_IN_PROGRESS 为 0b。
  - 以下条件之一为真:
    - NAK_IGNORE_FLIT_SEQ_NUM != N。
    - Nak Ignore Window 尚未启动或已到期。
- 那么:
  - REPLAY_SCHEDULED 置为 1b。
  - TX_REPLAY_FLIT_SEQ_NUM 置为 N + 1。
  - NAK_IGNORE_FLIT_SEQ_NUM 置为 N。
  - 如果收到的 Flit 是 Standard Nak Flit:
    - REPLAY_SCHEDULED_TYPE 置为 STANDARD_REPLAY。
  - 如果收到的 Flit 是 Selective Nak Flit:
    - REPLAY_SCHEDULED_TYPE 置为 SELECTIVE_REPLAY。

**Replay Schedule Rule 2**
针对 Payload Flit,在 Selective Nak 之后收到 Standard Nak。

- 如果以下所有条件均成立:
  - 收到一个 Flit Sequence Number 为 N 的有效 Standard Nak Flit。
  - N + 1 等于 TX_REPLAY_FLIT_SEQ_NUM。
  - REPLAY_SCHEDULED 为 1b。
  - REPLAY_IN_PROGRESS 为 0b。
  - REPLAY_SCHEDULED_TYPE 为 SELECTIVE_REPLAY。
- 那么:
  - REPLAY_SCHEDULED 置为 1b。
  - TX_REPLAY_FLIT_SEQ_NUM 不变。
  - REPLAY_SCHEDULED_TYPE 置为 STANDARD_REPLAY。

66. § Table 4-21 中 Ordered set 插入的最大间隔为 748。1500 是 748*2 向上取整。
67. 清零 CONSECUTIVE_TX_EXPLICIT_SEQ_NUM_FLITS 是为了允许发送器立即开始重放 Flit,避免在等待发送下一个 Explicit Sequence Number Flit 以开始重放时,因持续发送 NOP Flit 而导致 TX Retry Buffer 溢出。
68. 与清零 CONSECUTIVE_TX_EXPLICIT_SEQ_NUM_FLITS 同理。

</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

[⬆️ 返回目录](#-本章目录-table-of-contents)

<!-- 📄 Page 426 -->
---

<a id="sec-4-2-3-4-2-1-7"></a>
## 4.2.3.4.2.1.7 Flit Replay Transmit Rules | Flit 重放发送规则


<div style="overflow-x: auto; max-width: 100%;">
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th width="50%">🇬🇧 English</th>
<th width="50%" style="background-color:#e8e8e8">🇨🇳 中文</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>

**Flit Replay Transmit Rule 0**
Standard Replay Scenario.

- If all of the following conditions are true:
  - REPLAY_SCHEDULED is 1b.
  - REPLAY_IN_PROGRESS is 0b.
  - REPLAY_SCHEDULED_TYPE is STANDARD_REPLAY.
  - Either of the following are true:
    - The transmitter is in the Sequence Number Handshake Phase.
    - CONSECUTIVE_TX_NAK_FLITS is either 0 or greater than 2.
  - Either of the following are true:
    - Data rate is 64.0 GT/s and FLIT_REPLAY_NUM < 111b.
    - Data rate <= 32.0 GT/s and FLIT_REPLAY_NUM < 110b.
- Then:
  - The Transmitter must replay all unacknowledged Flits from the TX Retry Buffer beginning with the Flit containing Flit Sequence Number TX_REPLAY_FLIT_SEQ_NUM.
  - If the data rate is 64.0 GT/s:
    - FLIT_REPLAY_NUM is incremented by 1.
  - If the data rate <= 32.0 GT/s:
    - FLIT_REPLAY_NUM is incremented by 2 69.
  - REPLAY_IN_PROGRESS is set to 1b.
  - REPLAY_SCHEDULED is set to 0b.

**Flit Replay Transmit Rule 1**
Selective Replay Scenario.

- If all of the following conditions are true:
  - REPLAY_SCHEDULED is 1b.
  - REPLAY_IN_PROGRESS is 0b.
  - REPLAY_SCHEDULED_TYPE is SELECTIVE_REPLAY.
  - Either of the following are true:
    - The transmitter is in the Sequence Number Handshake Phase.
    - CONSECUTIVE_TX_NAK_FLITS is either 0 or greater than 2.
  - Either of the following are true:
    - Data rate is 64.0 GT/s and FLIT_REPLAY_NUM < 111b.
    - Data rate <= 32.0 GT/s and FLIT_REPLAY_NUM < 110b.
- Then:
  - The Transmitter must replay the Flit from the TX Retry Buffer which contains the Flit Sequence Number that matches TX_REPLAY_FLIT_SEQ_NUM.
  - If the data rate is 64.0 GT/s:
    - FLIT_REPLAY_NUM is incremented by 1.
  - If the data rate <= 32.0 GT/s:
    - FLIT_REPLAY_NUM is incremented by 2. 70
  - REPLAY_IN_PROGRESS is set to 1b.
  - REPLAY_SCHEDULED is set to 0b.

**Flit Replay Transmit Rule 2**
Replay Rollover Scenario.

- If all of the following conditions are true:
  - REPLAY_SCHEDULED is 1b.
  - REPLAY_IN_PROGRESS is 0b.
  - Either of the following are true:
    - Data rate is 64.0 GT/s and FLIT_REPLAY_NUM equals 111b.
    - Data rate <= 32.0 GT/s and FLIT_REPLAY_NUM >= 110b.
- Then:
  - If the data rate is 64.0 GT/s:
    - FLIT_REPLAY_NUM is incremented by 1 (causing a rollover to 000b).
  - If the data rate <= 32.0 GT/s:
    - FLIT_REPLAY_NUM is incremented by 2 (causing a rollover to 000b or 001b).
  - A REPLAY_NUM Rollover error is logged in the Port (see § Section 6.2 ).
  - The Port must enter Recovery.

69. Replays should happen less often at speeds lower than 64.0 GT/s. We increment FLIT_REPLAY_NUM by 2 so that the Replay Rollover will happen after fewer Replays.
70. Previous versions of this specification had this as increment by 1. This remains permitted, although not optimal, behavior.

</td>
<td style="background-color:#e8e8e8">

**Flit Replay Transmit Rule 0**
Standard Replay 场景。

- 如果以下所有条件均成立:
  - REPLAY_SCHEDULED 为 1b。
  - REPLAY_IN_PROGRESS 为 0b。
  - REPLAY_SCHEDULED_TYPE 为 STANDARD_REPLAY。
  - 以下条件之一为真:
    - 发送器处于 Sequence Number Handshake Phase。
    - CONSECUTIVE_TX_NAK_FLITS 为 0 或大于 2。
  - 以下条件之一为真:
    - 数据速率为 64.0 GT/s 且 FLIT_REPLAY_NUM < 111b。
    - 数据速率 <= 32.0 GT/s 且 FLIT_REPLAY_NUM < 110b。
- 那么:
  - 发送器必须从 TX Retry Buffer 中重放所有未确认的 Flit,从 Flit Sequence Number 等于 TX_REPLAY_FLIT_SEQ_NUM 的 Flit 开始。
  - 如果数据速率为 64.0 GT/s:
    - FLIT_REPLAY_NUM 加 1。
  - 如果数据速率 <= 32.0 GT/s:
    - FLIT_REPLAY_NUM 加 2。69
  - REPLAY_IN_PROGRESS 置为 1b。
  - REPLAY_SCHEDULED 置为 0b。

**Flit Replay Transmit Rule 1**
Selective Replay 场景。

- 如果以下所有条件均成立:
  - REPLAY_SCHEDULED 为 1b。
  - REPLAY_IN_PROGRESS 为 0b。
  - REPLAY_SCHEDULED_TYPE 为 SELECTIVE_REPLAY。
  - 以下条件之一为真:
    - 发送器处于 Sequence Number Handshake Phase。
    - CONSECUTIVE_TX_NAK_FLITS 为 0 或大于 2。
  - 以下条件之一为真:
    - 数据速率为 64.0 GT/s 且 FLIT_REPLAY_NUM < 111b。
    - 数据速率 <= 32.0 GT/s 且 FLIT_REPLAY_NUM < 110b。
- 那么:
  - 发送器必须从 TX Retry Buffer 中重放 Flit Sequence Number 与 TX_REPLAY_FLIT_SEQ_NUM 匹配的 Flit。
  - 如果数据速率为 64.0 GT/s:
    - FLIT_REPLAY_NUM 加 1。
  - 如果数据速率 <= 32.0 GT/s:
    - FLIT_REPLAY_NUM 加 2。70
  - REPLAY_IN_PROGRESS 置为 1b。
  - REPLAY_SCHEDULED 置为 0b。

**Flit Replay Transmit Rule 2**
Replay Rollover 场景。

- 如果以下所有条件均成立:
  - REPLAY_SCHEDULED 为 1b。
  - REPLAY_IN_PROGRESS 为 0b。
  - 以下条件之一为真:
    - 数据速率为 64.0 GT/s 且 FLIT_REPLAY_NUM 等于 111b。
    - 数据速率 <= 32.0 GT/s 且 FLIT_REPLAY_NUM >= 110b。
- 那么:
  - 如果数据速率为 64.0 GT/s:
    - FLIT_REPLAY_NUM 加 1(产生回绕至 000b)。
  - 如果数据速率 <= 32.0 GT/s:
    - FLIT_REPLAY_NUM 加 2(产生回绕至 000b 或 001b)。
  - 在端口 (Port) 记录一个 REPLAY_NUM Rollover 错误(参见 § Section 6.2)。
  - 端口必须进入 Recovery。

69. 在低于 64.0 GT/s 的速率下,重放应更少发生。我们将 FLIT_REPLAY_NUM 加 2,以便在更少的重放次数后就发生 Replay Rollover。
70. 此规范的早期版本规定此处加 1。该行为仍被允许,但不是最优。

</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
</div>


[⬆️ 返回目录](#-本章目录-table-of-contents)

---

<!-- 📄 Page 428 -->
---

<a id="sec-impl-note-flit-ack-nak-replay-example"></a>
## IMPLEMENTATION NOTE: FLIT ACK/NAK/REPLAY EXAMPLE | 实现说明:FLIT ACK/NAK/REPLAY 示例

<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th width="50%">🇬🇧 English</th>
<th width="50%" style="background-color:#e8e8e8">🇨🇳 中文</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>

Consider two devices A and B connected through a Retimer, as shown in § Figure 4-34.

1. Both Device A and Device B are in the Normal Flit Exchange Phase
2. B receives valid Payload Flits 1 through 10 from A. B sends Acks for those Flits back to A. (Ack Schedule 0)
3. B receives an invalid NOP Flit 10 71 and sets NAK_WITHDRAWAL_ALLOWED to 1b. (Nak Schedule 0)
4. B then receives a valid Flit 11 with Prior Flit was Payload set to 0b, indicating that prior Flit was a NOP Flit. B sends an Ack with Flit Sequence Number 11 to A.
   - NAK_WITHDRAWAL_ALLOWED is cleared and a Nak is never sent for the invalid NOP Flit 10.
5. B then receives an invalid Payload Flit 12 and sends sets NAK_WITHDRAWAL_ALLOWED to 1b. (Nak Schedule 0)
6. B then receives a valid Flit 13 that indicates that Flit 12 was a Payload Flit, and sends a Selective Nak Flit with Flit Sequence Number 11, requesting A to Replay only Flit 12. (Nak Schedule 1)
   - B will then send a minimum of three consecutive Selective Nak Flits with Flit Sequence Number 11.
   - If B was sending Explicit Sequence Number Flits when the Nak of invalid Flit 12 was scheduled, it would have held off sending the Nak Flit until it had finished sending 3 consecutive Explicit Sequence Number Flits (Replay Command Rules in Normal Flit Exchange Phase).
   - The choice of a Selective Nak by B is an optimization in this case. B has enough space in its RX Retry Buffer to store the subsequent Flits.
   - If B were to receive an invalid Flit with a Selective Nak outstanding, it would be required to change the outstanding Selective Nak to a Standard Nak. (Nak Schedule 6)
   - B is also permitted to change the outstanding Selective Nak to a Standard Nak for any implementation specific reason. (Nak Schedule 7)
7. After B sends 3 consecutive Nak Flits with Flit Sequence Number 11, B will continue following the Replay Command Rules in Normal Flit Exchange Phase to determine whether to send Nak Flits or Explicit Sequence Number Flits.
8. In the time it took for A to receive the Selective Nak of Flit 12 and schedule a Replay of Flit 12, valid Payload Flits 13 and 14 and NOP Flit 14 were received by B. B stores Payload Flits 13 and 14 in its RX Retry Buffer. The TLP Bytes of NOP Flit 14 are discarded and the Flit is not stored in the RX Retry Buffer (Flit Discard 0).
9. B then receives replayed Flit 12 from A and processes Flit 12 as well as Payload Flits 13 and 14 that were stored in the B's RX Retry Buffer.
   - Note that Payload Flits 12 and 15 and NOP Flit 15 are all sent with explicit Flit Sequence Numbers in adherence to the Replay Command Rules in Normal Flit Exchange Phase
10. Next, B receives valid Payload Flit 15, and then invalid NOP Flit 15. B sets NAK_WITHDRAWAL_ALLOWED to 1b.
11. B then receives invalid Flit 16, and since there's no way for B to know that the previous invalid Flit was a NOP Flit, the Nak can't be withdrawn and B sends a Standard Nak with Flit Sequence Number 15.
    - Note that B cannot send a Selective Nak since two consecutive invalid Flits were received.
12. B then receives valid Payload Flits 17 and 18, but since B has a Standard Nak outstanding, the TLP Bytes of these Flits are discarded (Flit Discard 0).
13. A then replays all unacknowledged Flits from its TX Retry Buffer (Flits 16, 17, and 18), which B receives as valid Flits and Acks accordingly.

71. NOP Flits do not consume a Flit Sequence Number and just use the Flit Sequence Number of the last non-replay Payload Flit sent.

</td>
<td style="background-color:#e8e8e8">

考虑通过 Retimer 连接的两个设备 A 和 B,如图 § Figure 4-34 所示。

1. 设备 A 和设备 B 均处于 Normal Flit Exchange Phase。
2. B 收到来自 A 的有效 Payload Flit 1 至 10。B 向 A 发送这些 Flit 的 Ack。(Ack Schedule 0)
3. B 收到一个无效的 NOP Flit 10 71,并将 NAK_WITHDRAWAL_ALLOWED 置为 1b。(Nak Schedule 0)
4. 然后 B 收到一个有效的 Flit 11,其 Prior Flit was Payload 为 0b,表明前一 Flit 是 NOP Flit。B 向 A 发送 Flit Sequence Number 为 11 的 Ack。
   - 清零 NAK_WITHDRAWAL_ALLOWED,且永远不会为无效的 NOP Flit 10 发送 Nak。
5. 接着 B 收到一个无效的 Payload Flit 12,并将 NAK_WITHDRAWAL_ALLOWED 置为 1b。(Nak Schedule 0)
6. 接着 B 收到一个有效的 Flit 13,表明 Flit 12 是 Payload Flit,并发送一个 Flit Sequence Number 为 11 的 Selective Nak Flit,请求 A 仅重放 Flit 12。(Nak Schedule 1)
   - 随后 B 将至少连续发送 3 个 Flit Sequence Number 为 11 的 Selective Nak Flit。
   - 如果在为无效的 Flit 12 调度 Nak 时,B 正在发送 Explicit Sequence Number Flit,则它将延迟发送该 Nak Flit,直到连续发送完 3 个 Explicit Sequence Number Flit 为止(Normal Flit Exchange Phase 中的 Replay Command Rules)。
   - 在此情况下 B 选择 Selective Nak 是一种优化。B 的 RX Retry Buffer 有足够空间存储后续 Flit。
   - 如果 B 在已发出 Selective Nak 的情况下又收到一个无效 Flit,则必须将已发出的 Selective Nak 更改为 Standard Nak。(Nak Schedule 6)
   - B 出于任何实现相关的原因,也可将已发出的 Selective Nak 更改为 Standard Nak。(Nak Schedule 7)
7. 在 B 连续发送 3 个 Flit Sequence Number 为 11 的 Nak Flit 之后,B 将继续遵循 Normal Flit Exchange Phase 中的 Replay Command Rules,以决定发送 Nak Flit 还是 Explicit Sequence Number Flit。
8. 在 A 收到针对 Flit 12 的 Selective Nak 并调度 Flit 12 的重放这段时间内,B 收到了有效 Payload Flit 13 和 14 以及 NOP Flit 14。B 将 Payload Flit 13 和 14 存入其 RX Retry Buffer。NOP Flit 14 的 TLP 字节被丢弃,该 Flit 不被存入 RX Retry Buffer(Flit Discard 0)。
9. 然后 B 收到 A 重放的 Flit 12,并处理 Flit 12 以及先前存放在 B 的 RX Retry Buffer 中的 Payload Flit 13 和 14。
   - 注意,Payload Flit 12 和 15 以及 NOP Flit 15 均按 Normal Flit Exchange Phase 中 Replay Command Rules 的要求,使用显式 Flit Sequence Number 发送。
10. 接着,B 收到有效 Payload Flit 15,然后收到无效 NOP Flit 15。B 将 NAK_WITHDRAWAL_ALLOWED 置为 1b。
11. 然后 B 收到无效 Flit 16。由于 B 无法得知上一个无效 Flit 是 NOP Flit,因此 Nak 无法被撤回,B 发送 Flit Sequence Number 为 15 的 Standard Nak。
    - 注意 B 不能发送 Selective Nak,因为已收到两个连续的无效 Flit。
12. 接着 B 收到有效 Payload Flit 17 和 18,但由于 B 有未决的 Standard Nak,这些 Flit 的 TLP 字节被丢弃(Flit Discard 0)。
13. 之后 A 从其 TX Retry Buffer(Flit 16、17 和 18)中重放所有未确认的 Flit,B 将这些 Flit 作为有效 Flit 接收并相应地发送 Ack。

71. NOP Flit 不消耗 Flit Sequence Number,而是直接使用上一次发送的非重放 Payload Flit 的 Flit Sequence Number。

</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

<a id="sec-impl-note-tx-throttling"></a>
## IMPLEMENTATION NOTE: TRANSMITTER THROTTLING AFTER SELECTIVE REPLAY | 实现说明:SELECTIVE REPLAY 之后的发送器限流


<div style="overflow-x: auto; max-width: 100%;">
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th width="50%">🇬🇧 English</th>
<th width="50%" style="background-color:#e8e8e8">🇨🇳 中文</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>

In some situations, it will reduce link latency if the transmitter throttles its Flit transmission rate after sending a Selective Replay Flit.

When the receiver issues a Selective Nak and is waiting for the selective replay, it stores valid Payload Flits in an RX retry buffer and processes these Flits after the selective replay is received. Payload Flits that arrive after the selective replay must also be stored in the RX retry buffer. All Payload Flits are processed in sequence number order.

Without transmitter throttling, this RX retry buffer adds latency to the receive path since all the entries must be consumed in order. Latency can be reduced and this performance impact can be mitigated if the transmitter throttles Flit transmission earlier allowing the RX retry buffer to drain. This early transmitter throttling does not affect overall performance – the TLPs that get delayed at the transmitter would have been delayed at the receiver. Performing early throttling at the transmitter allows the RX retry buffer to drain so that subsequent TLPs have reduced latency.

Throttling is only needed when the Link is operating at the drain rate of the receiver. If the Link is operating at a reduced width (e.g., due to L0p), throttling may not be needed as the RX retry buffer drain rate may be faster than the Link rate.

To compute how to throttle, the Transmitter can assume that the initial link width is the drain rate of the receiver. On receiving a selective Nak, the Transmitter can compute the number of Payload Flits in the Receiver's RX retry buffer (or on the way to that buffer) since it knows how many Payload Flits are currently in its TX retry buffer. The transmitter should throttle and/or enforce a certain bandwidth efficiency (i.e., restrict the number of NOP TLPs in a Payload Flit) in each new Payload Flit it transmits from its Transaction Layer to allow the Receiver's RX retry buffer to drain.

For example, suppose a x8 Link receives a selective Nak for Flit number X and the Transmitter has sent 4 Payload Flits after it initially sent Flit number X. In this case, the transmitter should throttle its upper layers to create a 4 Flit "bubble". For a x8 Link, Flits are 16 Symbols and SKP Ordered Sets are 32 Symbols so this "bubble" is either 4 NOP Flits, 2 NOP Flits and 1 SKP Ordered Set, or 2 SKP Ordered Sets. One mechanism to implement the throttling is for the transmitter to enforce <Y% NOP TLPs (e.g., Y = 25) in its Payload Flits until it has sent the "bubble" (if TLPs are constantly being transmitted this could take 2 SKP Ordered Sets).

</td>
<td style="background-color:#e8e8e8">

在某些情况下,如果发送器在发送 Selective Replay Flit 之后对其 Flit 发送速率进行限流,将有助于降低链路延迟。

当接收器发出 Selective Nak 并等待 selective replay 时,它会将有效的 Payload Flit 存入 RX retry buffer,并在收到 selective replay 后处理这些 Flit。Selective replay 之后到达的 Payload Flit 也必须存入 RX retry buffer。所有 Payload Flit 按序列号顺序处理。

若不进行发送器限流,该 RX retry buffer 会增加接收路径的延迟,因为所有条目必须按顺序消耗。如果发送器更早地对 Flit 发送进行限流,使 RX retry buffer 能够排空,则可以降低延迟并缓解该性能影响。这种早期发送器限流不影响整体性能——在发送器被延迟的 TLP 本来在接收器侧也会被延迟。在发送器侧进行早期限流,可使 RX retry buffer 排空,从而使后续 TLP 的延迟降低。

仅当链路以接收器的排空速率 (drain rate) 运行时才需要限流。如果链路以较窄的宽度运行(例如因 L0p),由于 RX retry buffer 的排空速率可能快于链路速率,因此可能无需限流。

为计算限流程度,发送器可假设初始链路宽度即为接收器的排空速率。在收到 selective Nak 时,发送器可计算接收器 RX retry buffer 中(或在通往该 buffer 路径上)的 Payload Flit 数,因为它知道其 TX retry buffer 中当前有多少 Payload Flit。发送器应在从其事务层 (Transaction Layer) 发送的每个新 Payload Flit 中进行限流并/或强制一定的带宽效率(即限制 Payload Flit 中 NOP TLP 的数量),以使接收器的 RX retry buffer 能够排空。

例如,假设 x8 链路收到针对 Flit X 的 selective Nak,且发送器在最初发送 Flit X 之后已发送了 4 个 Payload Flit。在这种情况下,发送器应对其上层进行限流,以形成一个 4 Flit 的"气泡"。对于 x8 链路,Flit 为 16 个 Symbol,SKP Ordered Set 为 32 个 Symbol,因此该"气泡"可以是 4 个 NOP Flit、2 个 NOP Flit + 1 个 SKP Ordered Set、或 2 个 SKP Ordered Set。一种实现限流的机制是:发送器在已发送"气泡"之前,强制其 Payload Flit 中 NOP TLP 的比例小于 Y%(例如 Y = 25)(若 TLP 持续传输,这可能需要 2 个 SKP Ordered Set)。

</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
</div>

<a id="sec-4-2-3-4-3"></a>
## 4.2.3.4.3 CRC Bytes in Flit | Flit 中的 CRC 字节

<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th width="50%">🇬🇧 English</th>
<th width="50%" style="background-color:#e8e8e8">🇨🇳 中文</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>

The CRC generator polynomial, defined over GF(28), is g(x) = (x+α)(x+α2)… (x+α8), where α is the root of the primitive polynomial of degree 8: x8+x5+x3+x+1. Thus, g(x) = x8+ α172 x7 + α116 x6 + α186 x5+ α172 x4+ α195 x3+ α134 x2+ α199 x+ α36.

Figure 4-35 demonstrates how CRC bytes are generated for the Transmit as well as Receive side. On the Receive side the generated CRC bytes are compared against the received CRC bytes (after the FEC decode/ correct) and any mismatch represents an uncorrectable error.

The CRC generator using MATLAB code to output the generator matrix, the generator matrix, as well as the RTL code is provided in § Appendix K. The CRC bytes are generated by 242 Bytes of Data * Gen Matrix. Thus, Data is 1x1936 bits, Gen matrix is 1936x64 bits. Data is arranged from MSB to LSB – [(241,7), (241,6), (241,5), (241,4) ……….. (0,7), (0,6),(0,5),(0,4),(0,3),(0,2),(0,1),(0,0)] where (x,y) is yth bit of xth byte. The generator matrix appears in § Appendix K. and must be considered the standard to implement the CRC during encode and decode. Any pipelined implementation must match this mechanism. The code is provided for the Transmit side. It takes 242 Bytes as input and generates the 8B of CRC. On the Receive side, after the ECC decode/ correction, the first 242 Bytes of the Flit will be used to generate the expected 8 Bytes of CRC and each of these 8 Bytes will be compared against the received 8B of CRC. Any mismatch results in the Flit being declared not Valid and a replay requested, if needed, as described earlier.

The FEC code is a 3-way interleaved, as described before, where the ECC Symbols are defined over GF(28). Thus, three consecutive Bytes in a wire belong to three different ECC groups, as shown by different colors in § Table 4-10 through § Table 4-14. Thus, any burst of length ≤16 in a wire is guaranteed not to impact more than one Symbol in a code word which is capable of correcting single byte errors in an effort to minimize the FEC latency.

A sample RTL code for the FEC is provided in § Appendix J. The rest of this section describes the construction of the FEC code. The sample RTL in the appendix is the reference should any confusion arise out of the description here. While an implementation may follow a different approach (e.g., pipelining), it must still match the RTL sample results for all permutations of values in the bytes both for the encoder as well as the decoder function.

Let α be the root of a primitive polynomial x8+x4+x3+x2+1 (represented as 0x1D). Hence, α8= α4+ α3+ α2+1 which can also be represented as {0001_1101}. Thus, each 8-bit symbol (over GF(28)) can be expressed as a polynomial as powers of alpha (1 through 254) or as a degree 8 polynomial. We calculate powers of α along with an 8-bit representation as follows: Should be: α0 (=1): {0000_0001}, α1: {0000_0010}, …, α7: {1000_0000}, α8: {0001_1101},… α255 = 1. Thus, we get 255 distinct numbers as powers of α (all 0s is not a power of α), as shown in § Figure 4-36. The log function is given in § Figure 4-37 (which is basically the inverse of constructing the power of α from a given 8-bit non-zero Syndrome which will be used for error correction). The H matrix consists of two parts: Horizontal Parity and Check bits, as shown in § Figure 4-38 and § Figure 4-39. The Horizontal Parity is the bit-wise XORs of Symbols (see § Equation 4-1). The Check bits (see § Equation 4-2) is similar to a CRC calculation represented as follows:

</td>
<td style="background-color:#e8e8e8">

CRC 生成多项式在 GF(28) 上定义,为 g(x) = (x+α)(x+α2)…(x+α8),其中 α 是 8 次本原多项式 x8+x5+x3+x+1 的根。因此,g(x) = x8+ α172 x7 + α116 x6 + α186 x5+ α172 x4+ α195 x3+ α134 x2+ α199 x+ α36。

§ Figure 4-35 演示了在发送侧和接收侧如何生成 CRC 字节。在接收侧,将生成的 CRC 字节与收到的 CRC 字节(在 FEC 解码/纠错之后)进行比较,任何不匹配都表示一个不可纠正的错误。

CRC 生成器使用 MATLAB 代码输出生成矩阵,生成矩阵以及 RTL 代码见 § Appendix K。CRC 字节由 242 字节数据 × 生成矩阵生成。因此,Data 为 1x1936 位,Gen matrix 为 1936x64 位。数据按从 MSB 到 LSB 排列——[(241,7), (241,6), (241,5), (241,4) ……….. (0,7), (0,6),(0,5),(0,4),(0,3),(0,2),(0,1),(0,0)],其中 (x,y) 表示第 x 字节的第 y 位。生成矩阵见 § Appendix K,必须将其视为编码和解码过程中实现 CRC 的标准。任何流水线实现必须与该机制匹配。代码为发送侧提供,接收 242 字节作为输入,并生成 8 字节 CRC。在接收侧,经过 ECC 解码/纠错后,将使用 Flit 的前 242 字节生成预期的 8 字节 CRC,并将这 8 字节逐一与收到的 8 字节 CRC 进行比较。任何不匹配都导致该 Flit 被判定为无效(Not Valid),并在需要时按前文所述请求重放。

FEC 码是 3 路交织的,如前所述,其中 ECC 符号在 GF(28) 上定义。因此,线缆上 3 个连续的字节属于 3 个不同的 ECC 组,如 § Table 4-10 至 § Table 4-14 中以不同颜色所示。因此,线缆上长度 ≤ 16 的突发错误保证不会影响同一码字中的多于一个 Symbol;FEC 能够纠正单字节错误,以尽量减小 FEC 延迟。

FEC 的示例 RTL 代码见 § Appendix J。本节其余部分描述 FEC 码的构造。如果此处描述存在任何歧义,附录中的示例 RTL 即为参考。尽管实现可以采用不同的方法(例如流水线),但无论编码器还是解码器,都必须与 RTL 示例对所有字节取值排列所得到的结果完全匹配。

设 α 为本原多项式 x8+x4+x3+x2+1(表示为 0x1D)的根。因此,α8 = α4+ α3+ α2+1,也可表示为 {0001_1101}。每个 8 位符号(在 GF(28) 上)既可表示为 α 的幂(1 到 254)的多项式,也可表示为 8 次多项式。我们按如下方式计算 α 的幂及其 8 位表示:应为:α0 (=1):{0000_0001},α1:{0000_0010},…,α7:{1000_0000},α8:{0001_1101},…α255 = 1。因此,如 § Figure 4-36 所示,共有 255 个不同的数(全 0 不是 α 的幂)。对数函数见 § Figure 4-37(其本质上是从给定的 8 位非零 Syndrome 构造 α 的幂的逆过程,用于纠错)。H 矩阵由两部分组成:水平奇偶校验 (Horizontal Parity) 和校验位 (Check bits),如 § Figure 4-38 和 § Figure 4-39 所示。Horizontal Parity 是各 Symbol 的按位异或(见 § Equation 4-1)。Check bits(见 § Equation 4-2)与 CRC 计算类似,具体表示如下:

</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

<a id="sec-4-2-3-4-4-fec-arrangement"></a>
## 4.2.3.4.4 ECC Bytes - FEC Check Bits Arrangement | ECC 字节 - FEC 校验位排列


<div style="overflow-x: auto; max-width: 100%;">
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th width="50%">🇬🇧 English</th>
<th width="50%" style="background-color:#e8e8e8">🇨🇳 中文</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>

```
        α^84  α^85  α^86  α^87  α^88  α^89  α^90  α^91
         0     1     2     3     4     5     6     7
B0       1     1     1     1     1     1     1     1
B1       α     1     1     1     1     1     1     1
B2       α^2   α     1     1     1     1     1     1
...
B82      α^82  α^81  α^80  α^79  α^78  α^77  α^76  α^75
B83      α^83  α^82  α^81  α^80  α^79  α^78  α^77  α^76
B84      α^84  α^85  α^86  α^87  α^88  α^89  α^90  α^91    ← Check Bits
B85      p0    p1    p2    p3    p4    p5    p6    p7      ← Row Parity [N-3:0]
```

**Powers of alpha for the check bits for Bytes 0 to 84**

**Figure 4-39 Weight of check bits for different Bytes/bits**

The Transmitter has to calculate B[N-1] (horizontal parity) and B[N-2] (Check Symbol) during encoding from the remaining (N-2) Bytes, as described above. The same mechanism will be used to compute the corresponding two Syndrome bytes at the Receiver. N = 86. However, only one of the three groups has 86B in its code word, whereas the other two have 85 Bytes each to form the 256B Flit. This is resolved by forcing B83 = 0 for the information part so that two groups that have 85 Bytes each effectively become 86B with 84B as information (the last Byte being 0) and two Bytes of ECC. The mapping of the Flit Byte i to an ECC group and the Byte-offset within the group can be derived as follows:

</td>
<td style="background-color:#e8e8e8">

```
        α^84  α^85  α^86  α^87  α^88  α^89  α^90  α^91
         0     1     2     3     4     5     6     7
B0       1     1     1     1     1     1     1     1
B1       α     1     1     1     1     1     1     1
B2       α^2   α     1     1     1     1     1     1
...
B82      α^82  α^81  α^80  α^79  α^78  α^77  α^76  α^75
B83      α^83  α^82  α^81  α^80  α^79  α^78  α^77  α^76
B84      α^84  α^85  α^86  α^87  α^88  α^89  α^90  α^91    ← 校验位 (Check Bits)
B85      p0    p1    p2    p3    p4    p5    p6    p7      ← 行奇偶校验 [N-3:0]
```

**字节 0 到 84 的校验位 α 幂次**

**图 4-39 不同字节/位的校验位权重**

发送器在编码时,需要从剩余的 (N-2) 个字节计算 B[N-1](水平奇偶校验)和 B[N-2](校验符号),如上所述。同样的机制也将用于在接收器处计算对应的两个 Syndrome 字节。N = 86。然而,只有三个组中的一个组的码字包含 86B,而其他两个组各包含 85 个字节,以构成 256B Flit。解决方法是将信息部分的 B83 强制设为 0,这样两个各包含 85 字节的组实际上变成了 86B,其中 84B 为信息(最后一个字节为 0)和两个字节的 ECC。Flit 字节 i 到 ECC 组的映射以及组内的字节偏移可以按如下方式推导:

</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
</div>

<a id="sec-4-2-3-4-4-ecc-mapping"></a>
## 4.2.3.4.4 ECC Bytes - Byte Mapping and Decode | ECC 字节 - 字节映射与解码

<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th width="50%">🇬🇧 English</th>
<th width="50%" style="background-color:#e8e8e8">🇨🇳 中文</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>

For 0 ≤ i ≤ 249,
- Byte i in Flit is mapped to ECC Group i mod 3
- with Byte Offset floor(i/3)
- ECC Group 1 Byte Offset 83 is 0
- ECC Group 2 Byte Offset 83 is 0

For 250 ≤ i ≤ 255 (the ECC Bytes),
- Byte i in Flit is mapped to ECC Group (i-249) mod 3
- with Byte Offset ceil(i/3)

Thus:
- Byte 0 of Flit maps to ECC Group 0, Byte offset 0;
- Byte 1 of Flit maps to ECC Group 1, Byte offset 0;
- Byte 2 of Flit maps to ECC group 2, Byte offset 0;
- Byte 3 of Flit maps to ECC Group 0, Byte offset 1;
- Byte 4 of Flit maps to ECC Group 1, Byte offset 1;
- ...
- Byte 248 maps to ECC group 2, Byte Offset 82;
- Byte 249 maps to ECC group 0, Byte offset 83.
- ECC group 1, Byte offset 83 is 00h.
- ECC group 2, Byte offset 83 is 00h.

The ECC Bytes are then allocated as:
- Bytes 250 and 253 of the Flit maps to ECC Group 1, Byte offsets 84 and 85 respectively;
- Bytes 251 and 254 of the Flit maps to ECC Group 2, Byte offsets 84 and 85 respectively; and
- Bytes 252 and 255 of the Flit maps to ECC Group 0, Bytes offsets 84 and 85 respectively.

The basic idea is that horizontal parity (Synd_Parity) identifies the bits in the Symbol (or Byte) that has flipped and the check bits (Synd_Check) identifies the Symbol number that has the error. Looking at the expanded bit arrangement, one can see that knowing the bit positions one can reverse map the column number. Figure 4-40 shows the ECC decode function. The Syndrome Parity is the XOR of B0..B83 and B85 (Synd_Parity). The Syndrome Check (Synd_Check) is calculated by computing the expected B84 from B0..B83 received and XORing with received B84. Once the two Syndrome Symbols (Bytes) are calculated, the following steps are taken:

**Table 4-20: ECC Decode Actions (paraphrased)**

| Synd_Check | Synd_Parity | Description |
|------------|-------------|-------------|
| = 00h | = 00h | No error |
| = 00h | ≠ 00h | Error in B85: Corrected B85 = B85 ^ Synd_Parity |
| ≠ 00h | = 00h | Error in B84: Corrected B84 = B84 ^ Synd_Check |
| ≠ 00h | ≠ 00h | Follow the log table for Synd_Check, Synd_Parity and then follow the modulo subtraction +1 logic to identify the failing column number. It is possible that we point to a non-existing column, in that case it is an uncorrectable error. Once the column number is known, we can correct the Symbol and the corresponding CRC correction (if applicable) |

</td>
<td style="background-color:#e8e8e8">

对于 0 ≤ i ≤ 249:
- Flit 中的字节 i 映射到 ECC Group i mod 3
- 字节偏移为 floor(i/3)
- ECC Group 1 的 Byte Offset 83 为 0
- ECC Group 2 的 Byte Offset 83 为 0

对于 250 ≤ i ≤ 255(即 ECC 字节):
- Flit 中的字节 i 映射到 ECC Group (i-249) mod 3
- 字节偏移为 ceil(i/3)

因此:
- Flit 的 Byte 0 映射到 ECC Group 0,Byte offset 0;
- Flit 的 Byte 1 映射到 ECC Group 1,Byte offset 0;
- Flit 的 Byte 2 映射到 ECC group 2,Byte offset 0;
- Flit 的 Byte 3 映射到 ECC Group 0,Byte offset 1;
- Flit 的 Byte 4 映射到 ECC Group 1,Byte offset 1;
- ...
- Byte 248 映射到 ECC group 2,Byte Offset 82;
- Byte 249 映射到 ECC group 0,Byte offset 83。
- ECC group 1 的 Byte offset 83 为 00h。
- ECC group 2 的 Byte offset 83 为 00h。

ECC 字节的分配如下:
- Flit 的 Bytes 250 和 253 映射到 ECC Group 1,字节偏移分别为 84 和 85;
- Flit 的 Bytes 251 和 254 映射到 ECC Group 2,字节偏移分别为 84 和 85;以及
- Flit 的 Bytes 252 和 255 映射到 ECC Group 0,字节偏移分别为 84 和 85。

基本思想是:水平奇偶校验 (Synd_Parity) 标识发生翻转的 Symbol(或 Byte)中的位,而校验位 (Synd_Check) 标识出错的 Symbol 编号。查看扩展的位排列,可知一旦知道位位置,就可以反向映射出列号。图 4-40 显示了 ECC 解码功能。Syndrome Parity 是 B0..B83 与 B85 的 XOR 结果(Synd_Parity)。Syndrome Check (Synd_Check) 通过根据接收到的 B0..B83 计算期望的 B84,并与接收到的 B84 进行 XOR 计算得出。一旦计算出两个 Syndrome Symbols(字节),将执行以下步骤:

**表 4-20:ECC 解码操作(释义)**

| Synd_Check | Synd_Parity | 描述 |
|------------|-------------|------|
| = 00h | = 00h | 无错误 |
| = 00h | ≠ 00h | B85 出错:纠正后的 B85 = B85 ^ Synd_Parity |
| ≠ 00h | = 00h | B84 出错:纠正后的 B84 = B84 ^ Synd_Check |
| ≠ 00h | ≠ 00h | 根据 Synd_Check、Synd_Parity 查阅对数表,然后按照模减 +1 逻辑确定出错的列号。如果指向不存在的列,则属于不可纠正错误。一旦知道列号,就可以纠正 Symbol 并执行相应的 CRC 纠正(如果适用) |

</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

[⬆️ 返回目录](#-本章目录-table-of-contents)

---

<!-- 📄 Page 436 -->
---

<a id="fig-4-40"></a>
#### Figure 4-40 ECC Decoder Function | 图 4-40 ECC 解码器功能

<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th width="50%">🇬🇧 English</th>
<th width="50%" style="background-color:#e8e8e8">🇨🇳 中文</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>

The Receive side check is as follows on the 256B flit (as shown in Figure 4-41). Each of the three ECC decoders, performs correction and error reporting as needed. In the final stage of CRC check, a decision is made whether the received flit can be accepted or retried.

</td>
<td style="background-color:#e8e8e8">

接收端的检查过程如下(如图 4-41 所示)。三个 ECC 解码器中的每一个,根据需要执行纠正和错误报告。在 CRC 检查的最后阶段,会做出决定,判断接收到的 flit 可以被接受还是需要重试。

</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

> **Figure 4-40.** ECC Decoder function
> <img src="figures/chapter_04/fig_0436_1_tight.png" width="700">

<!-- 📄 Page 437 -->
---

<a id="fig-4-41"></a>
#### Figure 4-41 3-way ECC Decode on Receive Side | 图 4-41 接收端 3 路 ECC 解码


<div style="overflow-x: auto; max-width: 100%;">
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th width="50%">🇬🇧 English</th>
<th width="50%" style="background-color:#e8e8e8">🇨🇳 中文</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>

For Data Rates of 2.5 GT/s or 5.0 GT/s, the SKP Ordered Set insertion interval does not change (e.g., between 1180 and 1538 Symbols), but occurs at the Flit boundary. The other Ordered Sets that can occur with up-size or down-size with L0p is provided in Section 4.2.6.7.

For Data Rates of 8.0 GT/s and above, the following rules apply:
- A Control SKP Ordered Set must immediately follow the SDS Ordered Set sequence marking the start of the Data Stream, irrespective of when the prior Control SKP Ordered Set was transmitted.
- Once the Data Stream has started, an Ordered Set must be transmitted in fixed intervals, as defined Table 4-21, as follows:
  - If the Data Stream will continue, a SKP Ordered Set must be transmitted on all the active (or to be activated) Lanes.
    - On an up-size with L0p: The Lanes that will be activated to join the active Lanes, an SDS Ordered Set must be transmitted on all the Lanes that will be activated (not in those that are already active) just prior to sending the SKP Ordered Set across all the wider Link, after which Flits will be sent on the wider Link
  - Else If the Link will enter a low-power state, an EIOSQ must be transmitted on all the active Lanes
  - Else (the Link needs to enter Recovery): An EIEOS must be transmitted on all the configured Lanes of the Link
  - If the Link enters Recovery, the appropriate SKP Ordered Set must be transmitted immediately after the first Ordered Set (EIEOS).

</td>
<td style="background-color:#e8e8e8">

对于 2.5 GT/s 或 5.0 GT/s 的数据速率,SKP 有序集的插入间隔不变(例如,在 1180 到 1538 个 Symbol 之间),但插入位置在 Flit 边界处发生。L0p 状态下随链路加宽或变窄可能出现的其他有序集,请参见 § Section 4.2.6.7。

对于 8.0 GT/s 及以上的数据速率,适用以下规则:
- Control SKP 有序集必须紧跟在标记数据流开始的 SDS 有序集序列之后,无论先前的 Control SKP 有序集何时发送。
- 一旦数据流开始,必须按固定间隔发送有序集(定义见 表 4-21),具体如下:
  - 如果数据流将继续,则必须在所有活动(或将要激活)通道 (Lane) 上发送 SKP 有序集。
    - 在 L0p 加宽时:对于将要激活以加入活动通道的通道,必须在这些将要激活的通道(而非已经处于活动状态的通道)上,在跨更宽链路发送 SKP 有序集之前,先发送 SDS 有序集;之后将在更宽的链路上发送 Flit。
  - 否则,如果链路将进入低功耗状态,则必须在所有活动通道上发送 EIOSQ。
  - 否则(链路需要进入 Recovery):必须在链路的所有已配置通道上发送 EIEOS。
  - 如果链路进入 Recovery,则必须在第一个有序集(EIEOS)之后立即发送相应的 SKP 有序集。

</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

> **Figure 4-41.** 3-way ECC decode followed by CRC check of flit on the Receive side
> <img src="figures/chapter_04/fig_0437_1_tight.png" width="700">

</div>

</tr>
