<a id="sec-4-2-4"></a>
## 4.2.4 Link Equalization Procedure for 8.0 GT/s and Higher Data Rates | 4.2.4 8.0 GT/s 及更高数据速率的链路均衡 (Equalization) 过程


<div style="overflow-x: auto; max-width: 100%;">
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th width="50%">🇬🇧 English</th>
<th width="50%" style="background-color:#e8e8e8">🇨🇳 中文</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>

The Link equalization procedure enables components to adjust the Transmitter and the Receiver setup of each Lane to improve the signal quality and meet the requirements specified in Chapter 8., when operating at 8.0 GT/s and higher data rates. All the Lanes that are associated with the LTSSM (i.e., those Lanes that are currently operational or may be operational in the future due to Link Upconfigure) must participate in the equalization procedure. The procedure must be executed during the first data rate change to any data rate at 8.0 GT/s or above, unless all components in the Link have advertised that no equalization is needed. Components must arrive at the appropriate Transmitter setup for all the operating conditions and data rates that they will encounter in the future when LinkUp=1b. Components must not require that the equalization procedure be repeated at any data rate for reliable operation, although there is provision to repeat the procedure. Components must store the Transmitter setups that were agreed to during the equalization procedures and use them for future operation at 8.0 GT/s and higher data rates. Components are permitted to fine-tune their Receiver setup even after the equalization procedure is complete as long as doing so does not cause the Link to be unreliable (i.e., does not meet the requirements in Chapter 8.) or go to Recovery.

The Link equalization procedure is not required for any data rates and can be completely bypassed if all components in the Link have advertised that no equalization is needed in its TS1/TS2 Ordered Sets or Modified TS1/TS2 Ordered Sets (see Table 4-25, Table 4-26, and Table 4-27). A component may choose to advertise that it does not need equalization at any rates above 5.0 GT/s if it supports 32.0 GT/s or higher data rates and can either operate reliably with equalization settings stored from a prior equalization procedure or does not need equalization for reliable operation.

The equalization procedure can be initiated either autonomously or by software. It is strongly recommended that components use the autonomous mechanism for all the data rates above 5.0 GT/s that they intend to operate in. However, a component that chooses not to participate in the autonomous mechanism for all the data rates above 5.0 GT/s must have its associated software ensure that the software based mechanism is applied to the data rates above 5.0 GT/s where the autonomous mechanism was not applied, prior to operating at that data rate.

> **IMPLEMENTATION NOTE:**
> **CONSECUTIVE SKP ORDERED SETS IN FLIT MODE**
>
> Two consecutive SKP Ordered Sets in a Data Stream in Flit Mode are always equidistant for a given width and clocking mode when either 1b/1b encoding or 128b/130b encoding is used. For example, for a x1 Link in SRIS Mode with 128b/130b encoding, a SKP Ordered Set is always sent after two Flits, which will occupy 32 Data Blocks. However, the same spacing cannot be guaranteed with 8b/10b encoding, as the SKPs are "scheduled" every 1180 to 1583 Symbol times in non-SRIS mode and less than 154 Symbol times in SRIS mode. For example, a x1 Link in SRIS mode with 8b/10b encoding sends an average of 1.66 (=256/154) SKP Ordered Sets after every Flit (256 Symbols): sometimes it sends one SKP Ordered Set after every Flit and other times it sends two back-to-back SKP Ordered Sets.

</td>
<td style="background-color:#e8e8e8">

链路均衡 (Equalization) 过程使组件能够在 8.0 GT/s 及更高数据速率下,调整每个通道 (Lane) 的发送器和接收器设置,以改善信号质量并满足第 8 章规定的要求。与 LTSSM 相关联的所有通道(即当前可运行的通道,或由于链路加宽配置 (Link Upconfigure) 在未来可能可运行的通道)必须参与均衡过程。该过程必须在向 8.0 GT/s 或以上数据速率的首次速率切换期间执行,除非链路中的所有组件都已通告无需均衡。组件必须为未来 LinkUp=1b 时将遇到的所有工作条件和数据速率准备好合适的发送器设置。组件不得要求在任何数据速率上重复均衡过程以保证可靠运行,尽管规范中允许重复此过程。组件必须存储均衡过程中商定的发送器设置,并将其用于未来 8.0 GT/s 及更高数据速率的运行。即使在均衡过程完成之后,也允许组件对其接收器设置进行微调,只要这样做不会导致链路不可靠(即不满足第 8 章要求)或进入 Recovery。

如果链路中的所有组件已在 TS1/TS2 有序集或 Modified TS1/TS2 有序集(参见 表 4-25、表 4-26 和 表 4-27)中通告其无需均衡,则任何数据速率下都不需要链路均衡过程,并且可以完全绕过。组件可选择在 5.0 GT/s 以上的任何速率上通告其不需要均衡,前提是该组件支持 32.0 GT/s 或更高的数据速率,并且既可以使用先前均衡过程中存储的均衡设置可靠运行,或者在任何 5.0 GT/s 以上的数据速率中均不需要均衡即可可靠运行。

均衡过程可以由自主 (autonomous) 方式发起,也可以由软件发起。强烈建议组件对其打算运行的所有 5.0 GT/s 以上数据速率使用自主机制。然而,对于选择不参与 5.0 GT/s 以上所有数据速率自主机制的组件,其关联的软件必须确保在运行该数据速率之前,对那些未应用自主机制的 5.0 GT/s 以上数据速率应用基于软件的机制。

> **实现注意 (IMPLEMENTATION NOTE):**
> **FLIT 模式下连续的 SKP 有序集**
>
> 在 Flit 模式下的数据流中,使用 1b/1b 编码或 128b/130b 编码时,两个连续的 SKP 有序集在给定的宽度和时钟模式下始终是等距的。例如,对于 x1 链路在 SRIS 模式下使用 128b/130b 编码,总是在每两个 Flit(即 32 个 Data Blocks)之后发送一个 SKP 有序集。但是,使用 8b/10b 编码时,无法保证相同的间距,因为 SKP 在非 SRIS 模式下每 1180 到 1583 个 Symbol 时间"调度"一次,在 SRIS 模式下少于 154 个 Symbol 时间。例如,x1 链路在 SRIS 模式下使用 8b/10b 编码时,每发送一个 Flit(256 个 Symbols)平均发送 1.66 (=256/154) 个 SKP 有序集:有时在每个 Flit 后发送一个 SKP 有序集,有时发送两个背靠背的 SKP 有序集。

</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
</div>


[⬆️ 返回目录](#-本章目录-table-of-contents)

---

<!-- 📄 Page 439 -->
---

<a id="sec-4-2-4-equalization-rules"></a>
### 4.2.4 Equalization Bypass and Highest NRZ Rate | 4.2.4 均衡绕过与最高 NRZ 速率

<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th width="50%">🇬🇧 English</th>
<th width="50%" style="background-color:#e8e8e8">🇨🇳 中文</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>

Normally, equalization is performed at a higher data rate only if equalization has successfully completed at all lower data rates above 5.0 GT/s. For example, a Link will complete equalization successfully at 8.0 GT/s, followed by 16.0 GT/s, followed by 32.0 GT/s, followed by 64.0 GT/s. However, an optional mechanism to begin the equalization procedures at the highest NRZ rate supported, 32.0 GT/s, is permitted if all components support data rates of 32.0 GT/s or higher and the mechanism is supported by all components in the Link, as advertised in the TS1/TS2 Ordered sets or Modified TS1/TS2 Ordered Sets. When this optional mechanism is enabled and successfully negotiated between the components, equalization is not performed the 8.0 GT/s and 16.0 GT/s data rates; the equalization procedures are performed at all common data rates above 16.0 GT/s beginning with the 32.0 GT/s data rate For all the data rates above 5.0 GT/s where equalization is not performed (specifically 8.0 GT/s and 16.0 GT/s), the expectation is that the Link will not operate at those data rates and the components will not advertise those data rates (neither 8.0 GT/s nor 16.0 GT/s) as the highest data rate supported. For example, a Link may train to L0 in 2.5 GT/s, enter Recovery and perform equalization at 32.0 GT/s, and then re-enter Recovery and perform equalization at 64.0 GT/s, skipping equalization at 8.0 GT/s and 16.0 GT/s. In this case, the intended data rates of operation of the Link are 2.5 GT/s, 5.0 GT/s, 32.0 GT/s, or 64.0 GT/s. If any of the equalization procedures attempted at 32.0 GT/s or 64.0 GT/s is unsuccessful even after re-equalization attempts and the Link needs to equalize at lower data rates, the Downstream Port must stop advertising Equalization Bypass to Highest NRZ Rate Support and ensure that the Link returns to operation at 2.5 GT/s or 5.0 GT/s. The required equalization procedures are then performed as they would have been if the optional mechanism to skip over equalization to the highest common data rate(s) was never supported. If the equalization procedure at the highest NRZ rate supported is initially successful but the Link is not able to operate reliably at that data rate, the Downstream Port is permitted to initiate a speed change to any lower data rate followed by an equalization procedure at that rate (when necessary). The requirements of Table 4-22 must be followed. The Upstream Port must disable Equalization Bypass to Highest NRZ Rate support as soon as an equalization procedure at the 8.0 GT/s data rate is performed. If the equalization procedure at the lower data rates is driven by software, it must set the Equalization Bypass to Highest NRZ Rate Disable and No Equalization Needed Disable register bits to 1b each; set the target Link speed such that the Link will be operational at 2.5 GT/s or 5.0 GT/s; and then set the target Link speed to equalize at the lower rates starting with 8.0 GT/s onwards. A port must not advertise the Equalization Bypass to Highest NRZ Rate Support if the Equalization Bypass to Highest NRZ Rate Disable bit is Set to 1b.

Another optional mechanism to skip the entire equalization process and go directly to the highest common data rate is permitted if all components support data rates of 32.0 GT/s or higher and the No Equalization Needed mechanism is supported by all components in the Link, as advertised in the TS1/TS2 or Modified TS1/TS2 Ordered sets. This is done if a component is either able to retrieve the equalization and other circuit settings at all the data rates from a prior equalization that will work for the component, or it does not need equalization at all in all data rates above 5.0 GT/s. A component must not advertise this capability if the Equalization Bypass to Highest NRZ Rate Disable bit is Set to 1b. Components supporting 64.0 GT/s or higher data rate are strongly encouraged to support this mode, especially after the equalization has been performed at least once since power was applied. This would be helpful for faster resume times after the devices in the Link go through deep power savings states.

If one direction of the Link is advertising No Equalization Needed and the other side is advertising Equalization Bypass to Highest NRZ Rate Support in the TS1/TS2 Ordered Sets, the Link will operate in the Equalization Bypass to Highest NRZ Rate Support since the No Equalization Needed bit also indicates that the device is capable of bypassing Equalization to the highest data rate. In the Modified TS1/TS2 Ordered Sets, a device that sets No Equalization Needed bit to 1b must also set the Equalization Bypass to Highest NRZ Rate Support to 1b. If one direction of the Link is advertising No Equalization Needed bit and the other side is advertising Equalization Bypass to Highest NRZ Rate Support only in the Modified TS1/TS2 Ordered Sets, the Link will operate in the Equalization Bypass to Highest NRZ Rate Support. Link operation is undefined if a device advertises No Equalization Needed bit as 1b and Equalization Bypass to Highest NRZ Rate Support to 0b in the Modified TS1/TS2 Ordered Sets it transmits. Components are permitted to go straight to 64.0 GT/s from any data rate without having to go through 32.0 GT/s data rate if No Equalization Needed has been negotiated, since no equalization is involved.

</td>
<td style="background-color:#e8e8e8">

通常,只有在 5.0 GT/s 以上的所有较低数据速率上均衡已成功完成时,才在更高的数据速率上执行均衡。例如,链路将依次在 8.0 GT/s、16.0 GT/s、32.0 GT/s、64.0 GT/s 成功完成均衡。然而,如果所有组件都支持 32.0 GT/s 或更高的数据速率,并且该机制得到链路中所有组件的支持(如 TS1/TS2 有序集或 Modified TS1/TS2 有序集所通告),则允许使用一种可选机制,直接从所支持的最高 NRZ 速率(32.0 GT/s)开始均衡过程。当启用此可选机制并在组件之间成功协商后,8.0 GT/s 和 16.0 GT/s 数据速率将不执行均衡;均衡过程将在 16.0 GT/s 以上的所有公共数据速率上执行,从 32.0 GT/s 数据速率开始。对于 5.0 GT/s 以上未执行均衡的数据速率(具体指 8.0 GT/s 和 16.0 GT/s),预期链路不会以这些数据速率运行,并且组件也不会将这些数据速率(8.0 GT/s 和 16.0 GT/s)通告为所支持的最高数据速率。例如,链路可能在 2.5 GT/s 训练到 L0,进入 Recovery 并在 32.0 GT/s 执行均衡,然后再次进入 Recovery 并在 64.0 GT/s 执行均衡,跳过 8.0 GT/s 和 16.0 GT/s 的均衡。在这种情况下,链路计划运行的数据速率为 2.5 GT/s、5.0 GT/s、32.0 GT/s 或 64.0 GT/s。如果在 32.0 GT/s 或 64.0 GT/s 尝试的均衡过程即使在重新均衡尝试后仍未成功,并且链路需要在较低的数据速率上均衡,则 Downstream Port 必须停止通告 Equalization Bypass to Highest NRZ Rate Support,并确保链路恢复到 2.5 GT/s 或 5.0 GT/s 运行。然后执行所需的均衡过程,就像从未支持跳到最高公共数据速率的可选机制一样。如果在所支持的最高 NRZ 速率下均衡过程最初成功,但链路不能在该数据速率下可靠运行,则允许 Downstream Port 发起向任何较低数据速率的速率切换,并在必要时在该速率下执行均衡过程。必须遵循表 4-22 的要求。一旦在 8.0 GT/s 数据速率上执行了均衡过程,Upstream Port 必须立即禁用 Equalization Bypass to Highest NRZ Rate 支持。如果在较低数据速率下的均衡过程由软件驱动,则必须将 Equalization Bypass to Highest NRZ Rate Disable 和 No Equalization Needed Disable 寄存器位各置 1b;将目标链路速度设置为使链路可在 2.5 GT/s 或 5.0 GT/s 运行;然后将目标链路速度设置为从 8.0 GT/s 开始在较低速率下均衡。如果 Equalization Bypass to Highest NRZ Rate Disable 位被置 1b,则端口不得通告 Equalization Bypass to Highest NRZ Rate Support。

如果所有组件都支持 32.0 GT/s 或更高的数据速率,并且 No Equalization Needed 机制得到链路中所有组件的支持(如 TS1/TS2 或 Modified TS1/TS2 有序集所通告),则允许使用另一种可选机制,跳过整个均衡过程并直接进入最高公共数据速率。如果组件能够从先前的均衡中获取在该组件上有效的所有数据速率的均衡和其他电路设置,或者在 5.0 GT/s 以上的所有数据速率中均不需要均衡,则会执行此机制。如果 Equalization Bypass to Highest NRZ Rate Disable 位被置 1b,则组件不得通告此能力。强烈鼓励支持 64.0 GT/s 或更高数据速率的组件支持此模式,特别是在上电后至少完成了一次均衡的情况下。这将有助于在链路中的设备经历深度节能状态后更快地恢复。

如果链路的一个方向在 TS1/TS2 有序集中通告 No Equalization Needed,而另一侧通告 Equalization Bypass to Highest NRZ Rate Support,则链路将以 Equalization Bypass to Highest NRZ Rate Support 模式运行,因为 No Equalization Needed 位也表示设备能够将均衡绕过到最高数据速率。在 Modified TS1/TS2 有序集中,将 No Equalization Needed 位置 1b 的设备也必须将 Equalization Bypass to Highest NRZ Rate Support 置 1b。如果链路的一个方向通告 No Equalization Needed 位,另一侧仅在 Modified TS1/TS2 有序集中通告 Equalization Bypass to Highest NRZ Rate Support,则链路将以 Equalization Bypass to Highest NRZ Rate Support 模式运行。如果设备在其发送的 Modified TS1/TS2 有序集中将 No Equalization Needed 位通告为 1b,而将 Equalization Bypass to Highest NRZ Rate Support 通告为 0b,则链路操作未定义。如果已经协商好 No Equalization Needed,则允许组件从任何数据速率直接跳到 64.0 GT/s,无需经过 32.0 GT/s 数据速率,因为不涉及均衡。

</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

[⬆️ 返回目录](#-本章目录-table-of-contents)

---

<!-- 📄 Page 440 -->
---

<a id="sec-4-2-4-autonomous"></a>
### 4.2.4 Autonomous Equalization Mechanism | 4.2.4 自主均衡机制


<div style="overflow-x: auto; max-width: 100%;">
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th width="50%">🇬🇧 English</th>
<th width="50%" style="background-color:#e8e8e8">🇨🇳 中文</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>

The autonomous mechanism is executed if both components advertise that they are capable of at least the 8.0 GT/s data rate (via the TS1 and TS2 Ordered Sets) during the initial Link negotiation (when LinkUp is set to 1b) and the Downstream Port chooses to perform the equalization procedure at the intended data rates of operation above 5.0 GT/s. While not recommended, the Downstream Port may choose to perform the autonomous mechanism only on a subset of the intended data rates of operation above 5.0 GT/s. In that case, the software based mechanism must be executed in order to perform the equalization procedure for the intended data rates of operation above 5.0 GT/s, not covered by the autonomous mechanism. For example, if both components advertised 8.0 GT/s, 16.0 GT/s, and 32.0 GT/s Data Rates but autonomous equalization was performed for only 8.0 GT/s and 16.0 GT/s Data Rates, then software based mechanism must be adopted for equalization at 32.0 GT/s Data Rate.

In the autonomous mechanism, after entering L0, irrespective of the current Link speed, neither component must transmit any DLLP, except the NOP2 DLLP, if the equalization procedure must be performed and until the equalization procedure completes. The equalization procedure is considered complete once the Transmitter and Receiver setup of each Lane has been adjusted for each common data rate supported above 5.0 GT/s for which the Downstream Port intends to perform equalization using the autonomous mechanism. The Downstream Port is required to initiate the speed change to the data rate where the equalization needs to be performed. During any equalization (autonomous or software initiated or re-equalization), the Downstream Port must not advertise support for any data rate above the data rate for which equalization needs to be performed in Recovery. The following example is provided to illustrate the equalization flow.

**Example:** Consider a Link where equalization needs to be performed autonomously at 8.0 GT/s, and 16.0 GT/s. The Downstream Port enters Recovery to perform equalization at 8.0 GT/s by not advertising any data rates above 8.0 GT/s. The 8.0 GT/s equalization procedure is deemed to have been successfully executed if the Equalization 8.0 GT/s Phase 3 Successful bit and Equalization 8.0 GT/s Complete bit of the Link Status 2 register are both set to 1b. Immediately following the transition from Recovery to L0, after the initial data rate change to 8.0 GT/s, the Downstream Port is required to transition from L0 to Recovery, advertise 16.0 GT/s data rate support (but not advertise support for 32.0 GT/s, even if it is capable of supporting 32.0 GT/s), change the data rate to 16.0 GT/s and perform the 16.0 GT/s equalization procedure.

If the Downstream Port detects equalization problems or the Upstream Port made an equalization redo request (by setting the Request Equalization bit to 1b) the Downstream Port may redo equalization prior to proceeding to operate at the data rate where the equalization failed or performing equalization at a higher data rate. The number of back-to-back equalization redos at a given data rate is implementation specific but must be finite. If at the conclusion of the initial or subsequent equalization process and the execution of an implementation specific number of equalization redo's, the Link is not able to operate reliably at the data rate where equalization was performed, then it must revert back to a lower data rate of operation.

Components using the autonomous mechanism must not initiate any autonomous Link width downsizing until the equalization procedure completes. An Upstream Port must not transmit any DLLP, except the NOP2 DLLP, until it receives a non-NOP2 DLLP from the Downstream Port. If the Downstream Port performs equalization again, it must not transmit any DLLP, except the NOP2 DLLP, until it completes the equalization procedure. A Downstream Port may perform equalization again based on its own needs or based on the request from the Upstream Port, if it can meet its system requirements. Executing equalization multiple times may interfere with software determination of Link and device status, as described in Section 6.6.

</td>
<td style="background-color:#e8e8e8">

在初始链路协商期间(当 LinkUp 被置 1b 时),如果两个组件都通过 TS1 和 TS2 有序集通告其至少支持 8.0 GT/s 数据速率,并且 Downstream Port 选择在 5.0 GT/s 以上的目标运行数据速率上执行均衡过程,则执行自主机制。虽然不推荐,但 Downstream Port 可以选择仅对 5.0 GT/s 以上目标运行数据速率的子集执行自主机制。在这种情况下,对于自主机制未覆盖的 5.0 GT/s 以上的目标运行数据速率,必须执行基于软件的机制以执行均衡过程。例如,如果两个组件均通告支持 8.0 GT/s、16.0 GT/s 和 32.0 GT/s 数据速率,但仅对 8.0 GT/s 和 16.0 GT/s 数据速率执行了自主均衡,则在 32.0 GT/s 数据速率下必须采用基于软件的机制进行均衡。

在自主机制中,进入 L0 之后,无论当前链路速度如何,如果必须执行均衡过程,则任何组件都不得发送除 NOP2 DLLP 之外的任何 DLLP,直到均衡过程完成。一旦为 Downstream Port 计划使用自主机制执行均衡的 5.0 GT/s 以上的每个公共数据速率,调整了每个通道 (Lane) 的发送器和接收器设置,均衡过程即视为完成。Downstream Port 负责发起向需要执行均衡的数据速率的速率切换。在任何均衡过程中(自主、软件发起或重新均衡),Downstream Port 在 Recovery 中不得通告支持高于需要执行均衡的数据速率的任何数据速率。下面提供一个示例以说明均衡流程。

**示例:** 考虑一条需要在 8.0 GT/s 和 16.0 GT/s 自主执行均衡的链路。Downstream Port 进入 Recovery,通过不通告任何高于 8.0 GT/s 的数据速率,在 8.0 GT/s 执行均衡。如果 Link Status 2 寄存器的 Equalization 8.0 GT/s Phase 3 Successful 位和 Equalization 8.0 GT/s Complete 位均被置 1b,则 8.0 GT/s 均衡过程被视为已成功执行。在首次数据速率切换到 8.0 GT/s 之后,紧接从 Recovery 到 L0 的转换之后,Downstream Port 必须从 L0 转换到 Recovery,通告 16.0 GT/s 数据速率支持(但不通告 32.0 GT/s 的支持,即使它能够支持 32.0 GT/s),将数据速率切换到 16.0 GT/s,并执行 16.0 GT/s 均衡过程。

如果 Downstream Port 检测到均衡问题,或 Upstream Port 发出均衡重做请求(通过将 Request Equalization 位置 1b),则 Downstream Port 可在继续运行均衡失败的数据速率或执行更高数据速率均衡之前重新进行均衡。在给定数据速率上连续均衡重做的次数是实现特定的,但必须是有限的。如果在初始或后续均衡过程结束时,以及执行实现特定次数的均衡重做之后,链路仍不能在执行均衡的数据速率上可靠运行,则必须恢复到较低的数据速率运行。

使用自主机制的组件在均衡过程完成之前不得启动任何自主链路宽度收窄。Upstream Port 不得发送除 NOP2 DLLP 之外的任何 DLLP,直到从 Downstream Port 接收到非 NOP2 DLLP。如果 Downstream Port 再次执行均衡,则不得发送除 NOP2 DLLP 之外的任何 DLLP,直到均衡过程完成。Downstream Port 可根据自身需要或根据 Upstream Port 的请求再次执行均衡(若能满足其系统要求)。多次执行均衡可能会干扰软件对链路和设备状态的判断,详见 § Section 6.6。

</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
</div>


[⬆️ 返回目录](#-本章目录-table-of-contents)

---

<!-- 📄 Page 441 -->
---

<a id="sec-4-2-4-sw-mechanism"></a>
### 4.2.4 Software-Based Equalization and DLLP Blocking | 4.2.4 基于软件的均衡与 DLLP 阻塞

<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th width="50%">🇬🇧 English</th>
<th width="50%" style="background-color:#e8e8e8">🇨🇳 中文</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>

When using the software based mechanism, software must guarantee that there will be no side-effects for transactions in flight (e.g., no timeout), if any, due to the Link undergoing the equalization procedure. Software can write 1b to the Perform Equalization bit in the Link Control 3 Register, followed by a write to the Target Link Speed field in the Link Control 2 register to enable the Link to run at 8.0 GT/s or higher, followed by a write of 1b to the Retrain Link bit in the Link Control register of the Downstream Port to perform equalization. Software must not enable the Link to run at a data rate above 8.0 GT/s during a software initiated equalization procedure if the equalization procedure at all the lower data rates starting with 8.0 GT/s have not been successfully executed and the Link is not capable of bypassing equalization to higher data rate(s) (i.e., either Equalization Bypass to Highest NRZ Rate Supported is 0b or Equalization Bypass to Highest NRZ Rate Disable is 1b). The equalization procedure is deemed successful as follows for the following data rates:
- 8.0 GT/s: Equalization 8.0 GT/s Phase 3 Successful bit and Equalization 8.0 GT/s Complete bit of the Link Status 2 register are both set to 1b
- 16.0 GT/s: Equalization 16.0 GT/s Phase 3 Successful bit and Equalization 16.0 GT/s Complete bit of the 16.0 GT/s Status Register are both set to 1b
- 32.0 GT/s: Equalization 32.0 GT/s Phase 3 Successful bit and Equalization 32.0 GT/s Complete bit of the 32.0 GT/s Link Status Register are both set to 1b
- 64.0 GT/s: Equalization 64.0 GT/s Phase 3 Successful bit and Equalization 64.0 GT/s Complete bit of the 64.0 GT/s Link Status Register are both set to 1b

Software may set the Hardware Autonomous Width Disable bit of the Link Control register in both components, or use some other mechanism to ensure that the Link is in its full functional width prior to setting the Perform Equalization bit in the Downstream Port. The component that had initiated the autonomous width downsizing is responsible to upconfigure the Link to go to its full functional width by initiating the transition to Recovery and Configuration within 1 ms of the Hardware Autonomous Width Disable bit being set to 1b. If an Upstream Port does not advertise the 8.0 GT/s data rate, the 16.0 GT/s data rate, the 32.0 GT/s, or the 64.0 GT/s data rate initially and did not participate in the autonomous

> **IMPLEMENTATION NOTE:**
> **DLLP BLOCKING DURING AUTONOMOUS EQUALIZATION**
>
> When using the autonomous mechanism for equalization at 8.0 GT/s or higher data rates, the Downstream Port is required to block the transmission of DLLPs until equalization has completed at all data rates for which the autonomous equalization mechanism will be performed, and the Upstream Port is required to block the transmission of DLLPs until a DLLP is received from the Downstream Port. If both components advertise that they are capable of the 16.0 GT/s (or higher) data rate but the Downstream Port only uses the autonomous mechanism for equalization at 8.0 GT/s, the Downstream Port is only required to block DLLP transmission until 8.0 GT/s equalization has completed. Similarly, if both components advertise that they are capable of the 32.0 GT/s data rate but the Downstream Port only uses the autonomous mechanism for equalization at 16.0 GT/s, the Downstream Port is only required to block DLLP transmission until 16.0 GT/s equalization has completed. If the Downstream Port delays entering Recovery from L0 while DLLP transmission is blocked, either the L0 Inferred Electrical Idle timeout (see Section 4.2.5.4) or the DLLP timeout (see Section 2.6.1.2) may expire in the Upstream or Downstream Ports. If either of these two timeouts occurs, it will result in the initiation of an entry to Recovery to perform Link retraining. Neither of these two timeouts is a reportable error condition, and the resulting Link retraining has no impact on proper Link operation.
>
> The DLLP limitations described in this implementation note do not apply to NOP2 DLLPs. When operating in Flit Mode, since entry to Recovery must happen on an Ordered Set boundary, Flit transmission may occur prior to the completion of equalization at all data rates for which the autonomous equalization mechanism will be performed. These Flits will be transmitting NOP2 DLLPs. The receipt of NOP2 DLLPs cannot be used by the Upstream Port to unblock the transmission of non-NOP2 DLLPs.

</td>
<td style="background-color:#e8e8e8">

使用基于软件的机制时,软件必须保证正在进行的交易(若有)不会因链路正在进行均衡过程而产生副作用(例如,不会超时)。软件可向 Link Control 3 寄存器中的 Perform Equalization 位写 1b,然后向 Link Control 2 寄存器中的 Target Link Speed 字段写入以使链路运行在 8.0 GT/s 或更高,接着向 Downstream Port 的 Link Control 寄存器中的 Retrain Link 位写 1b 以执行均衡。如果从 8.0 GT/s 开始的所有较低数据速率的均衡过程未成功执行,且链路无法绕过均衡到更高数据速率(即,Equalization Bypass to Highest NRZ Rate Supported 为 0b 或 Equalization Bypass to Highest NRZ Rate Disable 为 1b),则软件不得在软件发起的均衡过程中使链路运行在 8.0 GT/s 以上的数据速率。各数据速率下均衡成功的判定标准如下:
- 8.0 GT/s:Link Status 2 寄存器的 Equalization 8.0 GT/s Phase 3 Successful 位和 Equalization 8.0 GT/s Complete 位均被置 1b
- 16.0 GT/s:16.0 GT/s Status 寄存器的 Equalization 16.0 GT/s Phase 3 Successful 位和 Equalization 16.0 GT/s Complete 位均被置 1b
- 32.0 GT/s:32.0 GT/s Link Status 寄存器的 Equalization 32.0 GT/s Phase 3 Successful 位和 Equalization 32.0 GT/s Complete 位均被置 1b
- 64.0 GT/s:64.0 GT/s Link Status 寄存器的 Equalization 64.0 GT/s Phase 3 Successful 位和 Equalization 64.0 GT/s Complete 位均被置 1b

软件可在两个组件中将 Link Control 寄存器的 Hardware Autonomous Width Disable 位置 1b,或使用其他机制以确保在 Downstream Port 设置 Perform Equalization 位之前,链路处于其全功能宽度。启动自主宽度收窄的组件负责通过在 Hardware Autonomous Width Disable 位置 1b 后 1 ms 内发起向 Recovery 和 Configuration 的转换,将链路加宽到其全功能宽度。如果 Upstream Port 初始未通告 8.0 GT/s、16.0 GT/s、32.0 GT/s 或 64.0 GT/s 数据速率,并且未参与针对未通告速率的自主均衡机制,

> **实现注意 (IMPLEMENTATION NOTE):**
> **自主均衡期间的 DLLP 阻塞**
>
> 在 8.0 GT/s 或更高数据速率下使用自主机制进行均衡时,Downstream Port 必须阻塞 DLLP 的发送,直到自主均衡机制将执行的所有数据速率的均衡完成;Upstream Port 必须阻塞 DLLP 的发送,直到从 Downstream Port 接收到 DLLP。如果两个组件都通告其支持 16.0 GT/s(或更高)数据速率,但 Downstream Port 仅在 8.0 GT/s 数据速率上使用自主均衡机制,则 Downstream Port 只需阻塞 DLLP 发送,直到 8.0 GT/s 均衡完成。类似地,如果两个组件都通告其支持 32.0 GT/s 数据速率,但 Downstream Port 仅在 16.0 GT/s 数据速率上使用自主均衡机制,则 Downstream Port 只需阻塞 DLLP 发送,直到 16.0 GT/s 均衡完成。如果 Downstream Port 在 DLLP 发送被阻塞时延迟从 L0 进入 Recovery,则 L0 Inferred Electrical Idle 超时(参见 § Section 4.2.5.4)或 DLLP 超时(参见 § Section 2.6.1.2)可能在 Upstream 或 Downstream Port 中到期。如果这两个超时中的任何一个发生,将启动进入 Recovery 以执行链路重训练。这两个超时都不是可报告的错误状态,由此产生的链路重训练不会影响链路的正常运行。
>
> 本实现注意中描述的 DLLP 限制不适用于 NOP2 DLLP。在 Flit 模式下运行时,由于进入 Recovery 必须发生在有序集边界,因此 Flit 发送可能在自主均衡机制将执行的所有数据速率的均衡完成之前发生。这些 Flit 将发送 NOP2 DLLP。Upstream Port 不得使用接收到 NOP2 DLLP 来解除对非 NOP2 DLLP 发送的阻塞。

</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

<!-- 📄 Page 442 -->

<a id="sec-4-2-4-eq-problems"></a>
### 4.2.4 Equalization Setting Problem Reporting | 4.2.4 均衡设置问题上报


<div style="overflow-x: auto; max-width: 100%;">
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th width="50%">🇬🇧 English</th>
<th width="50%" style="background-color:#e8e8e8">🇨🇳 中文</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>

equalization mechanism for the non-advertised rates, its associated software must ensure there will be no side-effects for transactions in flight, if any, during equalization, before it instructs the Upstream Port to go to Recovery and advertise the previously non-advertised data rates and initiate a speed change. The Downstream Port subsequently initiates the equalization procedure during the initial speed change to the data rate advertised by the Upstream Port when it transitions to Recovery.

Upstream Ports are required to check for equalization setting problems in the Recovery.RcvrLock state (see Section 4.2.7.4.1). However, both Downstream and Upstream Ports are permitted to use implementation specific methods to detect equalization problems at any time. A Port that detects a problem with its equalization settings is required to undertake the following actions, for each the following data rates:
- 8.0 GT/s: Link Equalization Request 8.0 GT/s bit in the Link Status 2 Register is set to 1b.
- 16.0 GT/s: Link Equalization Request 16.0 GT/s bit in the 16.0 GT/s Status Register is set to 1b.
- 32.0 GT/s: Link Equalization Request 32.0 GT/s bit in the 32.0 GT/s Status Register is set to 1b.
- 64.0 GT/s: Link Equalization Request 64.0 GT/s bit in the 64.0 GT/s Status Register is set to 1b.

In addition to setting the appropriate Link Equalization Request bit to 1b, an Upstream Port must initiate a transition to Recovery (if necessary) and request equalization at the appropriate data rate in the Recovery.RcvrCfg state by setting the Request Equalization bit of its transmitted TS2 Ordered Sets to 1b and the Equalization Request Data Rate bits to the data rate of the detected problem. If it requests equalization, it must request equalization for each detected problem only once. When requesting equalization, the Upstream Port is also permitted, but not required, to set the Quiesce Guarantee bit to 1b to inform the Downstream Port that an equalization process initiated within 1 ms will not cause any side-effects to its operation.

When a Downstream Port receives an equalization request from an Upstream Port (when it is in the Recovery.RcvrCfg state and receives 8 consecutive TS2 Ordered Sets with the Request Equalization bit set to 1b), it must either initiate an equalization process at the requested data rate (as defined by the received Equalization Request Data Rate bits) within 1 ms of completing the next Recovery to L0 transition, or it must set the appropriate Link Equalization Request 8.0 GT/s in its Link Status 2 register, Link Equalization Request 16.0 GT/s bit in its 16.0 GT/s Status Register, Link Equalization Request 32.0 GT/s bit in its 32.0 GT/s Status Register, or Link Equalization Request 64.0 GT/s bit in its 64.0 GT/s Status Register. It should initiate an equalization process only if it can guarantee that executing the equalization process will not cause any side-effects to either its operation or the Upstream Port's operation. The Downstream Port is permitted, but not required, to use the received Quiesce Guarantee bit to determine the Upstream Port's ability to execute an equalization process without side-effects.

If a Downstream Port wants to initiate an equalization process and can guarantee that it will not cause side-effects to its own operation but is unable to directly determine whether the equalization process will cause side-effects to the Upstream Port's operation, then it is permitted to request that the Upstream Port initiate an equalization request. The Downstream Port does so by transitioning to Recovery and in the Recovery.RcvrCfg state setting the Request Equalization bit of its transmitted TS2 Ordered Sets to 1b, the Equalization Request Data Rate bits to the desired data rate, and the Quiesce Guarantee bit to 1b. When an Upstream Port receives such an equalization request from a Downstream Port (when it is in the Recovery.RcvrCfg state and receives 8 consecutive TS2 Ordered Sets with the Request Equalization and Quiesce Guarantee bits set to 1b), it is permitted, but not required, to quiesce its operation and prepare to execute an equalization process at the data rate requested by the Downstream Port, and then request equalization at that same data rate (using the method described previously for reporting equalization setting problems) and with the Quiesce Guarantee bit set to 1b. There is no time limit on how long the Upstream Port can take to respond, but it should attempt to do so as quickly as possible. If a Downstream Port makes a request and receives such a response from the Upstream Port, then it must either initiate an equalization process at the agreed-upon data rate within 1 ms of completing the next Recovery to L0 transition if it can still guarantee that executing the equalization process will not cause any side-effects to its operation, or it must set the appropriate Link Equalization Request 8.0 GT/s bit in its Link Status 2 register, Link Equalization Request 16.0 GT/s bit in its 16.0 GT/s Status Register, Link Equalization Request 32.0 GT/s bit in its 32.0 GT/s Status Register, or Link Equalization Request 64.0 GT/s bit in its 64.0 GT/s Status Register.

</td>
<td style="background-color:#e8e8e8">

其关联的软件必须确保均衡期间正在进行的交易(若有)不会产生副作用,然后再指示 Upstream Port 进入 Recovery 并通告之前未通告的数据速率并发起速率切换。当过渡到 Recovery 时,Downstream Port 随后在 Upstream Port 通告的数据速率的初始速率切换期间启动均衡过程。

Upstream Port 需要在 Recovery.RcvrCfg 状态(参见 § Section 4.2.7.4.1)检查均衡设置问题。但是,Downstream 和 Upstream Port 都允许使用实现特定的方法在任何时间检测均衡问题。检测到均衡设置存在问题的端口必须针对以下每个数据速率执行以下操作:
- 8.0 GT/s:Link Status 2 寄存器中的 Link Equalization Request 8.0 GT/s 位置 1b。
- 16.0 GT/s:16.0 GT/s Status 寄存器中的 Link Equalization Request 16.0 GT/s 位置 1b。
- 32.0 GT/s:32.0 GT/s Status 寄存器中的 Link Equalization Request 32.0 GT/s 位置 1b。
- 64.0 GT/s:64.0 GT/s Status 寄存器中的 Link Equalization Request 64.0 GT/s 位置 1b。

除了将相应的 Link Equalization Request 位置 1b 外,Upstream Port 还必须启动向 Recovery 的转换(如有必要),并在 Recovery.RcvrCfg 状态中,通过将其发送的 TS2 有序集的 Request Equalization 位置 1b、Equalization Request Data Rate 位设置为检测到问题的数据速率,来在相应的数据速率上请求均衡。如果请求均衡,则必须仅对每个检测到的问题请求一次均衡。请求均衡时,Upstream Port 也允许(但不是必须)将 Quiesce Guarantee 位置 1b,以通知 Downstream Port 在 1 ms 内发起的均衡过程不会对其操作造成任何副作用。

当 Downstream Port 接收到来自 Upstream Port 的均衡请求时(当它处于 Recovery.RcvrCfg 状态并接收到 8 个连续的 Request Equalization 位置 1b 的 TS2 有序集时),它必须执行以下操作之一:在完成下一次 Recovery 到 L0 转换后的 1 ms 内,在所请求的数据速率(由接收到的 Equalization Request Data Rate 位定义)上启动均衡过程;或将其 Link Status 2 寄存器中相应的 Link Equalization Request 8.0 GT/s 位、16.0 GT/s Status 寄存器中 Link Equalization Request 16.0 GT/s 位、32.0 GT/s Status 寄存器中 Link Equalization Request 32.0 GT/s 位,或 64.0 GT/s Status 寄存器中 Link Equalization Request 64.0 GT/s 位置 1b。仅当 Downstream Port 能保证执行均衡过程不会对其自身操作或 Upstream Port 的操作造成任何副作用时,才应启动均衡过程。Downstream Port 允许(但不是必须)使用接收到的 Quiesce Guarantee 位来判断 Upstream Port 是否能够在没有副作用的情况下执行均衡过程。

如果 Downstream Port 希望启动均衡过程,并且能够保证不会对其自身操作造成副作用,但无法直接确定均衡过程是否会对 Upstream Port 的操作造成副作用,则允许其请求 Upstream Port 发起均衡请求。Downstream Port 通过转换到 Recovery 并在 Recovery.RcvrCfg 状态中将其发送的 TS2 有序集的 Request Equalization 位置 1b、Equalization Request Data Rate 位设置为所需的数据速率、Quiesce Guarantee 位置 1b 来实现。当 Upstream Port 收到来自 Downstream Port 的此类均衡请求时(当它处于 Recovery.RcvrCfg 状态并接收到 8 个连续的 Request Equalization 和 Quiesce Guarantee 位均置 1b 的 TS2 有序集时),允许(但不是必须)暂停其操作并准备在 Downstream Port 请求的数据速率上执行均衡过程,然后以 Quiesce Guarantee 位置 1b 在相同的数据速率上请求均衡(使用先前描述的用于上报均衡设置问题的方法)。Upstream Port 响应所花费的时间没有限制,但应尽快完成。如果 Downstream Port 发出请求并收到 Upstream Port 的此类响应,则在完成下一次 Recovery 到 L0 转换后的 1 ms 内,如果仍能保证执行均衡过程不会对其操作造成任何副作用,则必须在协商一致的数据速率上启动均衡过程;或将其 Link Status 2 寄存器中相应的 Link Equalization Request 8.0 GT/s 位、16.0 GT/s Status 寄存器中 Link Equalization Request 16.0 GT/s 位、32.0 GT/s Status 寄存器中 Link Equalization Request 32.0 GT/s 位,或 64.0 GT/s Status 寄存器中 Link Equalization Request 64.0 GT/s 位置 1b。

</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
</div>


[⬆️ 返回目录](#-本章目录-table-of-contents)

<a id="sec-4-2-4-redo-eq"></a>
### 4.2.4 Redo Equalization and Rate Change | 4.2.4 重新均衡与速率切换

<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th width="50%">🇬🇧 English</th>
<th width="50%" style="background-color:#e8e8e8">🇨🇳 中文</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>

A component may operate at a lower data rate after reporting its equalization problems, either by timing out through Recovery.Speed or by initiating a data rate change to a lower data rate. Any data rate change required to perform the equalization procedure is exempt from the 200 ms requirement in Section 6.11. Table 4-22 describes the mechanism for performing redo Equalization. Sometimes it may be necessary to perform a speed change to an intermediate data rate to redo equalization. For example, if the Downstream Port wants to redo equalization at 16.0 GT/s, bypass equalization is not supported, and the current data rate is either 2.5 GT/s or 5.0 GT/s, the Downstream Port must first initiate a speed change to 8.0 GT/s (the 8.0 GT/s equalization procedure will not be executed unless necessary) from which it will launch the redo equalization for 16.0 GT/s. The equalization procedure can be performed at most once in each trip through the Recovery state.

**Table 4-22 Equalization Requirements Under Different Conditions**

| From | Conditions | Mechanism |
|---|---|---|
| 2.5 GT/s or 5.0 GT/s to 8.0 GT/s Equalization | | The mechanisms described here are identical for all flavors of equalization: initial or redo equalization; autonomous or software initiated.<br><br>The Downstream Port communicates the Transmitter preset values and the Receiver preset hints, if applicable, for each Lane to the Upstream Port using 8b/10b encoding. These values are communicated using the EQ TS2 Ordered Sets (defined in Section 4.2.5.1) in Recovery.RcvrCfg, when a data rate change to the higher data rate has been negotiated, prior to transitioning to the higher data rate to perform equalization. The preset values sent in the EQ TS2 Ordered Sets are derived as follows:<br>- For equalization at 8.0 GT/s: Upstream Port 8.0 GT/s Transmitter Preset and Upstream Port 8.0 GT/s Receiver Preset Hint fields of each Lane Equalization Control Register Entry.<br><br>After the data rate change to the higher data rate where equalization needs to be performed, the Upstream Port transmits TS1 Ordered Sets with the preset values it received. The preset values must be within the operable range defined in Section 8.3.3.3 if reduced swing will be used by the Transmitter.<br><br>After the data rate change to the higher data rate where equalization needs to be performed, the Downstream Port transmits TS1 Ordered Sets with the preset values as follows with the assumption that the preset values must be within the operable range defined in Section 8.3.3.3 if reduced swing will be used by the Transmitter:<br>- For equalization at 8.0 GT/s: Downstream Port 8.0 GT/s Transmitter Preset and optionally Downstream Port 8.0 GT/s Receiver Preset Hint fields of each Lane Equalization Control Register Entry.<br><br>To perform redo equalization, the Downstream Port must request speed change through EQ TS1 Ordered Sets in Recovery.RcvrLock at 2.5 GT/s or 5.0 GT/s to inform the Upstream Port that it intends to redo equalization at the higher data rate. An Upstream Port should advertise the higher data rate in Recovery if it receives EQ TS1 Ordered Sets with speed change bit set to 1b and if it intends to operate at the higher data rate in the future. |
| 8.0 GT/s to 16.0 GT/s Equalization, OR from 16.0 GT/s to 32.0 GT/s Equalization, OR from 32.0 GT/s to 64.0 GT/s Equalization | | The mechanisms described here are identical for all flavors of equalization: initial or redo equalization; autonomous or software initiated.<br><br>When negotiating to the higher data rate, the Downstream Port communicates the Transmitter preset values for each Lane to the Upstream Port using 128b/130b encoding. These values are communicated using 128b/130b EQ TS2 Ordered Sets (defined in Section 4.2.5.1) in Recovery.RcvrCfg, when a data rate change to the higher data rate has been negotiated, prior to transitioning to the higher data rate. The preset values sent in the 128b/130b EQ TS2 Ordered Sets are derived as follows:<br>- For equalization at 16.0 GT/s: Upstream Port 16.0 GT/s Transmitter Preset field of the 16.0 GT/s Lane Equalization Control Register Entry corresponding to the Lane.<br>- For equalization at 32.0 GT/s: Upstream Port 32.0 GT/s Transmitter Preset field of the 32.0 GT/s Lane Equalization Control Register Entry corresponding to the Lane.<br>- For equalization at 64.0 GT/s: Upstream Port 64.0 GT/s Transmitter Preset field of the 64.0 GT/s Lane Equalization Control Register Entry corresponding to the Lane.<br><br>Optionally, the Upstream Port communicates initial Transmitter preset settings to the Downstream Port using the 128b/130b EQ TS2 Ordered Sets sent in Recovery.RcvrCfg, when a data rate change to the higher data rate has been negotiated, prior to transitioning to the higher data rate at which equalization needs to be performed. These preset values are determined by implementation specific means. After the data rate change to the higher data rate, the Upstream Port transmits TS1 Ordered Sets with the preset values it received. If the Downstream Port did not receive preset values in Recovery.RcvrCfg, after the data rate change to the higher data rate, it transmits TS1 Ordered Sets with the presets as follows:<br>- For equalization at 16.0 GT/s: Downstream Port 16.0 GT/s Transmitter Preset field of the 16.0 GT/s Lane Equalization Control Register Entry corresponding to the Lane.<br>- For equalization at 32.0 GT/s: Downstream Port 32.0 GT/s Transmitter Preset field of the 32.0 GT/s Lane Equalization Control Register Entry corresponding to the Lane.<br>- For equalization at 64.0 GT/s: Downstream Port 64.0 GT/s Transmitter Preset field of the 64.0 GT/s Lane Equalization Control Register Entry corresponding to the Lane.<br>The preset values must be within the operable range defined in Section 8.3.3.3 if reduced swing will be used by the Transmitter.<br><br>To perform redo equalization, the Downstream Port must request speed change through TS1 Ordered Sets in Recovery.RcvrLock with the Equalization Redo bit set to 1b to inform the Upstream Port that it intends to redo equalization. An Upstream Port should advertise the higher data rate in Recovery if it receives TS1 Ordered Sets with speed change bit set to 1b, Equalization Redo bit set to 1b and it intends to operate at the higher data rate in the future. |

</td>
<td style="background-color:#e8e8e8">

组件在上报其均衡问题后,可以通过在 Recovery.Speed 状态超时或通过发起向较低数据速率的速率切换来以较低数据速率运行。执行均衡过程所需的任何数据速率切换都免于遵守 § Section 6.11 中的 200 ms 要求。表 4-22 描述了执行重新均衡的机制。有时可能需要先切换到中间数据速率才能重新均衡。例如,如果 Downstream Port 希望在 16.0 GT/s 重新均衡,不支持均衡绕过,且当前数据速率为 2.5 GT/s 或 5.0 GT/s,则 Downstream Port 必须首先发起向 8.0 GT/s 的速率切换(8.0 GT/s 均衡过程将不会执行,除非必要),从该数据速率启动针对 16.0 GT/s 的重新均衡。每次通过 Recovery 状态的过程中最多只能执行一次均衡过程。

**表 4-22 不同条件下的均衡要求**

| 起始 | 条件 | 机制 |
|---|---|---|
| 从 2.5 GT/s 或 5.0 GT/s 到 8.0 GT/s 均衡 | | 此处描述的机制对于所有类型的均衡均相同:初始或重新均衡;自主或软件发起。<br><br>Downstream Port 使用 8b/10b 编码,将每个通道 (Lane) 的发送器预设值和接收器预设提示(若适用)传达给 Upstream Port。这些值使用 Recovery.RcvrCfg 中的 EQ TS2 有序集(在 § Section 4.2.5.1 中定义)进行传达,在已协商向更高数据速率的切换、且过渡到更高数据速率以执行均衡之前传达。EQ TS2 有序集中发送的预设值推导如下:<br>- 8.0 GT/s 均衡:每个通道均衡控制寄存器条目的 Upstream Port 8.0 GT/s Transmitter Preset 和 Upstream Port 8.0 GT/s Receiver Preset Hint 字段。<br><br>在切换到需要执行均衡的更高数据速率之后,Upstream Port 发送带有其接收到的预设值的 TS1 有序集。如果发送器使用降摆幅,则预设值必须在 § Section 8.3.3.3 定义的可操作范围内。<br><br>在切换到需要执行均衡的更高数据速率之后,Downstream Port 按以下方式发送带有预设值的 TS1 有序集,假设如果发送器使用降摆幅,则预设值必须在 § Section 8.3.3.3 定义的可操作范围内:<br>- 8.0 GT/s 均衡:每个通道均衡控制寄存器条目的 Downstream Port 8.0 GT/s Transmitter Preset 字段,以及可选的 Downstream Port 8.0 GT/s Receiver Preset Hint 字段。<br><br>要执行重新均衡,Downstream Port 必须在 2.5 GT/s 或 5.0 GT/s 的 Recovery.RcvrCfg 状态下,通过 EQ TS1 有序集请求速率切换,以通知 Upstream Port 它打算在更高数据速率上重新均衡。如果 Upstream Port 接收到 speed change 位置 1b 的 EQ TS1 有序集,并且打算将来以更高数据速率运行,则应在 Recovery 中通告更高的数据速率。 |
| 从 8.0 GT/s 到 16.0 GT/s 均衡,或从 16.0 GT/s 到 32.0 GT/s 均衡,或从 32.0 GT/s 到 64.0 GT/s 均衡 | | 此处描述的机制对于所有类型的均衡均相同:初始或重新均衡;自主或软件发起。<br><br>在协商向更高数据速率切换时,Downstream Port 使用 128b/130b 编码,将每个通道 (Lane) 的发送器预设值传达给 Upstream Port。这些值使用 128b/130b EQ TS2 有序集(在 § Section 4.2.5.1 中定义)进行传达,在已协商向更高数据速率的切换、过渡到更高数据速率之前传达。128b/130b EQ TS2 有序集中发送的预设值推导如下:<br>- 16.0 GT/s 均衡:对应通道的 16.0 GT/s 通道均衡控制寄存器条目的 Upstream Port 16.0 GT/s Transmitter Preset 字段。<br>- 32.0 GT/s 均衡:对应通道的 32.0 GT/s 通道均衡控制寄存器条目的 Upstream Port 32.0 GT/s Transmitter Preset 字段。<br>- 64.0 GT/s 均衡:对应通道的 64.0 GT/s 通道均衡控制寄存器条目的 Upstream Port 64.0 GT/s Transmitter Preset 字段。<br><br>可选地,Upstream Port 使用在 Recovery.RcvrCfg 中发送的 128b/130b EQ TS2 有序集,在已协商向更高数据速率的切换、过渡到需要执行均衡的更高数据速率之前,将初始发送器预设设置传达给 Downstream Port。这些预设值由实现特定的方式确定。在切换到更高数据速率之后,Upstream Port 发送带有其接收到的预设值的 TS1 有序集。如果 Downstream Port 在 Recovery.RcvrCfg 中未接收到预设值,则在切换到更高数据速率之后,按以下方式发送带有预设值的 TS1 有序集:<br>- 16.0 GT/s 均衡:对应通道的 16.0 GT/s 通道均衡控制寄存器条目的 Downstream Port 16.0 GT/s Transmitter Preset 字段。<br>- 32.0 GT/s 均衡:对应通道的 32.0 GT/s 通道均衡控制寄存器条目的 Downstream Port 32.0 GT/s Transmitter Preset 字段。<br>- 64.0 GT/s 均衡:对应通道的 64.0 GT/s 通道均衡控制寄存器条目的 Downstream Port 64.0 GT/s Transmitter Preset 字段。<br>如果发送器使用降摆幅,则预设值必须在 § Section 8.3.3.3 定义的可操作范围内。<br><br>要执行重新均衡,Downstream Port 必须在 Recovery.RcvrCfg 状态下,通过将 Equalization Redo 位置 1b 的 TS1 有序集请求速率切换,以通知 Upstream Port 它打算重新均衡。如果 Upstream Port 接收到 speed change 位和 Equalization Redo 位均置 1b 的 TS1 有序集,并且打算将来以更高数据速率运行,则应在 Recovery 中通告更高的数据速率。 |

</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

<a id="sec-4-2-4-table-4-22-cont"></a>
### 4.2.4 Table 4-22 (Continued) | 4.2.4 表 4-22(续)


<div style="overflow-x: auto; max-width: 100%;">
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th width="50%">🇬🇧 English</th>
<th width="50%" style="background-color:#e8e8e8">🇨🇳 中文</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>

> **IMPLEMENTATION NOTE:**
> **USING QUIESCE GUARANTEE MECHANISM**
>
> Side-effects due to executing equalization after the Data Link Layer is in DL_Active can occur at the Port, Device, or system level. For example, the time required to execute the equalization process could cause a Completion Timeout error to occur - possibly in a different system component. The Quiesce Guarantee information allows Ports to decide whether to execute a requested equalization or not.

**Table 4-22 (Continued) Equalization Requirements Under Different Conditions**

| From | Conditions | Mechanism |
|---|---|---|
| 2.5 GT/s or 5.0 GT/s to 32.0 GT/s Equalization | | Equalization to 32.0 GT/s from 2.5 GT/s or 5.0 GT/s is possible only if the Link is capable of bypassing equalization to higher data rate(s) (i.e., Equalization Bypass to Highest NRZ Rate Supported in 32.0 GT/s Capabilities register is 1b and Equalization Bypass to Highest NRZ Rate Disable in the 32.0 GT/s Control Register is 0b).<br><br>The mechanisms described here are identical for all flavors of equalization: initial or redo equalization; autonomous or software initiated.<br><br>The Downstream Port communicates the Transmitter preset values and the Receiver preset hints, if applicable, for each Lane to the Upstream Port using 8b/10b encoding. These values are communicated using the EQ TS2 Ordered Sets (defined in Section 4.2.5.1) in Recovery.RcvrCfg, when a data rate change to the higher data rate has been negotiated, prior to transitioning to the higher data rate to perform equalization. The preset values sent in the EQ TS2 Ordered Sets are derived as follows:<br>- For equalization at 32.0 GT/s: Upstream Port 32.0 GT/s Transmitter Preset field of the 32.0 GT/s Lane Equalization Control Register Entry corresponding to the Lane. The Receiver Preset Hint field must be set to 000b.<br><br>After the data rate change to the higher data rate where equalization needs to be performed, the Upstream Port transmits TS1 Ordered Sets with the preset values it received. The preset values must be within the operable range defined in Section 8.3.3.3 if reduced swing will be used by the Transmitter. |
| 2.5 GT/s or 5.0 GT/s to 64.0 GT/s Equalization | | Equalization to 64.0 GT/s from 2.5 GT/s or 5.0 GT/s is not supported. All equalization procedures at the 64.0 GT/s data rate, including re-equalization, must be initiated from the 32.0 GT/s data rate only. |
| Equalization at a data rate from a data rate equal to the target equalization data rate | | This is only possible with a redo equalization. The combinations covered here are: 8.0 GT/s equalization from 8.0 GT/s data rate, 16.0 GT/s equalization from 16.0 GT/s data rate, and 32.0 GT/s equalization from 32.0 GT/s data rate.<br><br>In this case, the initial preset used during equalization is equal to the initial preset used during the last time the equalization was performed at the data rate where equalization is being performed.<br>64.0 GT/s equalization from 64.0 GT/s is not supported. |

</td>
<td style="background-color:#e8e8e8">

> **实现注意 (IMPLEMENTATION NOTE):**
> **使用 QUIESCE GUARANTEE 机制**
>
> 在数据链路层 (Data Link Layer) 处于 DL_Active 之后执行均衡所引起的副作用可能发生在端口、设备或系统级别。例如,执行均衡过程所需的时间可能导致完成超时 (Completion Timeout) 错误——可能发生在不同的系统组件中。Quiesce Guarantee 信息允许端口决定是否执行所请求的均衡。

**表 4-22(续) 不同条件下的均衡要求**

| 起始 | 条件 | 机制 |
|---|---|---|
| 从 2.5 GT/s 或 5.0 GT/s 到 32.0 GT/s 均衡 | | 只有在链路能够绕过均衡到更高数据速率时(即 32.0 GT/s Capabilities 寄存器中的 Equalization Bypass to Highest NRZ Rate Supported 为 1b,且 32.0 GT/s Control 寄存器中的 Equalization Bypass to Highest NRZ Rate Disable 为 0b),才支持从 2.5 GT/s 或 5.0 GT/s 均衡到 32.0 GT/s。<br><br>此处描述的机制对于所有类型的均衡均相同:初始或重新均衡;自主或软件发起。<br><br>Downstream Port 使用 8b/10b 编码,将每个通道 (Lane) 的发送器预设值和接收器预设提示(若适用)传达给 Upstream Port。这些值使用 Recovery.RcvrCfg 中的 EQ TS2 有序集(在 § Section 4.2.5.1 中定义)进行传达,在已协商向更高数据速率的切换、过渡到更高数据速率以执行均衡之前传达。EQ TS2 有序集中发送的预设值推导如下:<br>- 32.0 GT/s 均衡:对应通道的 32.0 GT/s 通道均衡控制寄存器条目的 Upstream Port 32.0 GT/s Transmitter Preset 字段。Receiver Preset Hint 字段必须设置为 000b。<br><br>在切换到需要执行均衡的更高数据速率之后,Upstream Port 发送带有其接收到的预设值的 TS1 有序集。如果发送器使用降摆幅,则预设值必须在 § Section 8.3.3.3 定义的可操作范围内。 |
| 从 2.5 GT/s 或 5.0 GT/s 到 64.0 GT/s 均衡 | | 不支持从 2.5 GT/s 或 5.0 GT/s 均衡到 64.0 GT/s。所有 64.0 GT/s 数据速率下的均衡过程(包括重新均衡)必须只能从 32.0 GT/s 数据速率发起。 |
| 在等于目标均衡数据速率的数据速率上均衡 | | 这仅在重新均衡时可行。此处涵盖的组合包括:从 8.0 GT/s 数据速率到 8.0 GT/s 均衡、从 16.0 GT/s 数据速率到 16.0 GT/s 均衡,以及从 32.0 GT/s 数据速率到 32.0 GT/s 均衡。<br><br>在这种情况下,均衡期间使用的初始预设在执行均衡的数据速率上,与上次执行均衡时使用的初始预设相同。<br>不支持从 64.0 GT/s 到 64.0 GT/s 的均衡。 |

</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
</div>

<!-- 📄 Page 445 -->

<a id="sec-4-2-4-eq-phases"></a>
### 4.2.4 Equalization Phases 0-3 | 4.2.4 均衡阶段 0-3

<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th width="50%">🇬🇧 English</th>
<th width="50%" style="background-color:#e8e8e8">🇨🇳 中文</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>

The equalization procedure consists of up to four Phases, as described below. When operating at 8.0 GT/s or higher data rates, the Phase information is transmitted using the Equalization Control (EC) field in the TS0 or TS1 Ordered Sets.

**Phase 0**
This phase is executed while negotiating (and prior to) to the data rate where equalization would be performed. The preset to be used for equalization is determined as described in Table 4-22.

**Phase 1**
Both components make the Link operational enough at the current data rate to be able to exchange TS1 Ordered Sets to complete the remaining phases for the fine-tuning of their Transmitter/Receiver pairs. For the Data Rates of 8.0 GT/s, 16.0 GT/s, and 32.0 GT/s, TS1 Ordered Sets are exchanged in this Phase. For the Data Rate of 64.0 GT/s, TS0 Ordered Sets are exchanged in this Phase and each Pseudo-Port or Port must be able to exchange the TS0 Ordered Sets for Phase 1 and Phase 2 in the Upstream Direction (from the Upstream Port to Downstream Port) reliably when it exits this Phase. It is expected that the Link will operate at a BER of less than 10-4 before the component is ready to move on to the next Phase. Each Transmitter uses the preset values as described in Table 4-22.

The Downstream Port initiates Phase 1 by transmitting TS1 Ordered Sets for Data Rates of 8.0 GT/s, 16.0 GT/s and 32.0 GT/s and TS0 Ordered Sets for the Data Rate of 64.0 GT/s with EC=01b (indicating Phase 1). The Upstream Port, after adjusting its Receiver, if necessary, to ensure that it can progress with the equalization process, receives these TS0 or TS1 Ordered Sets and transitions to Phase 1 (where it transmits TS1 Ordered Sets with EC=01b if the Data Rate is 8.0 GT/s, 16.0 GT/s, or 32.0 GT/s or TS0 Ordered Sets with EC=01b if the Data Rate is 64.0 GT/s). The Downstream Port ensures that it can reliably receive the bit stream from the Upstream Port to continue through the rest of the Phases when it receives TS0 or TS1 Ordered Sets from the Upstream Port with EC=01b before it moves on to Phase 2.

After the data rate change to the higher data rate where equalization needs to be performed, the Downstream Port transmits TS1 Ordered Sets with the preset values as follows with the assumption that the preset values must be within the operable range defined in Section 8.3.3.3 if reduced swing will be used by the Transmitter:
- If eight consecutive EQ TS2 Ordered Sets were received with supported Transmitter Preset values in the most recent transition through Recovery.RcvrCfg, the Transmitter Preset value from those EQ TS2 Ordered Sets must be used.
- Otherwise: Downstream Port 32.0 GT/s Transmitter Preset field of the 32.0 GT/s Lane Equalization Control Register Entry corresponding to the Lane must be used.

To perform redo equalization, the Downstream Port must request speed change through EQ TS1 Ordered Sets in Recovery.RcvrLock at 2.5 GT/s or 5.0 GT/s to inform the Upstream Port that it intends to redo equalization at the higher data rate. An Upstream Port should advertise the higher data rate in Recovery if it receives EQ TS1 Ordered Sets with speed change bit set to 1b and if it intends to operate at the higher data rate in the future.

</td>
<td style="background-color:#e8e8e8">

均衡过程最多包含四个阶段,如下所述。在 8.0 GT/s 或更高数据速率下运行时,阶段信息使用 TS0 或 TS1 有序集中的 Equalization Control (EC) 字段传送。

**阶段 0 (Phase 0)**
此阶段在协商(以及协商之前)将要执行均衡的数据速率时执行。均衡使用的预设如 表 4-22 中所述确定。

**阶段 1 (Phase 1)**
两个组件使链路在当前数据速率下能够运行得足够好,以便能够交换 TS1 有序集,从而完成对其发送器/接收器对进行微调的剩余阶段。对于 8.0 GT/s、16.0 GT/s 和 32.0 GT/s 的数据速率,在此阶段交换 TS1 有序集。对于 64.0 GT/s 的数据速率,在此阶段交换 TS0 有序集,并且每个 Pseudo-Port 或 Port 在退出此阶段时必须能够在上游方向(从 Upstream Port 到 Downstream Port)可靠地交换 Phase 1 和 Phase 2 的 TS0 有序集。预期链路将在组件准备进入下一阶段之前以小于 10^-4 的 BER 运行。每个发送器使用 表 4-22 中所述的预设值。

Downstream Port 通过发送 Data Rate 为 8.0 GT/s、16.0 GT/s 和 32.0 GT/s 时的 TS1 有序集,以及 Data Rate 为 64.0 GT/s 时的 TS0 有序集(EC=01b,表示 Phase 1)来启动 Phase 1。Upstream Port 在必要时调整其接收器以确保其能够推进均衡过程,接收到这些 TS0 或 TS1 有序集后,转换到 Phase 1(如果 Data Rate 为 8.0 GT/s、16.0 GT/s 或 32.0 GT/s,则发送 EC=01b 的 TS1 有序集;如果 Data Rate 为 64.0 GT/s,则发送 EC=01b 的 TS0 有序集)。Downstream Port 确保在从 Upstream Port 接收到 EC=01b 的 TS0 或 TS1 有序集之后,在进入 Phase 2 之前,可以可靠地接收来自 Upstream Port 的比特流,以继续完成其余阶段。

在切换到需要执行均衡的更高数据速率之后,Downstream Port 按以下方式发送带有预设值的 TS1 有序集,假设如果发送器使用降摆幅,则预设值必须在 § Section 8.3.3.3 定义的可操作范围内:
- 如果在最近一次经过 Recovery.RcvrCfg 的过程中,接收到 8 个连续的、带有受支持发送器预设值的 EQ TS2 有序集,则必须使用这些 EQ TS2 有序集中的发送器预设值。
- 否则:必须使用对应通道的 32.0 GT/s 通道均衡控制寄存器条目的 Downstream Port 32.0 GT/s Transmitter Preset 字段。

要执行重新均衡,Downstream Port 必须在 2.5 GT/s 或 5.0 GT/s 的 Recovery.RcvrCfg 状态下,通过 EQ TS1 有序集请求速率切换,以通知 Upstream Port 它打算在更高数据速率上重新均衡。如果 Upstream Port 接收到 speed change 位置 1b 的 EQ TS1 有序集,并且打算将来以更高数据速率运行,则应在 Recovery 中通告更高的数据速率。

</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

[⬆️ 返回目录](#-本章目录-table-of-contents)

---

<!-- 📄 Page 446 -->
---

<a id="sec-4-2-4-phase-2-3"></a>
### 4.2.4 Phase 2 and Phase 3 | 4.2.4 阶段 2 与阶段 3


<div style="overflow-x: auto; max-width: 100%;">
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th width="50%">🇬🇧 English</th>
<th width="50%" style="background-color:#e8e8e8">🇨🇳 中文</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>

**Phase 2**
In this Phase the Upstream Port adjusts the Transmitter setting of the Downstream Port along with its own Receiver setting, independently, on each Lane, to ensure it receives the bit stream compliant with the requirements in Chapter 8. (e.g., each operational Downstream Lane has a BER less than 10-12 for a Data Rate of 32.0 GT/s or lower or 10-6 for the Data Rate of 64.0 GT/s). If the Data Rate is 8.0 GT/s, 16.0 GT/s or 32.0 GT/s, both the Downstream Port and the Upstream Port transmit TS1 Ordered Sets. If the Data Rate is 64.0 GT/s, the Downstream Port transmits TS0 Ordered Sets until it receives TS0 Ordered Sets and then it transmits TS1 Ordered Sets whereas the Upstream Port transmits TS0 Ordered Sets. The Downstream Port initiates the move to Phase 2 by transmitting TS0/TS1 Ordered Sets with EC=10b to the Upstream Port. The Downstream Port advertises the Transmitter coefficients and the preset it is using per the rules below in Phase 1 for preset only and in Phase 2 for preset and coefficients. The Upstream Port receives these Ordered Sets and may request different coefficient or preset settings and continue to evaluate each setting until it arrives at the best setting for operating the Downstream Lanes. After the Upstream Port has completed this Phase, it moves the Link to Phase 3 by transmitting TS1 Ordered Sets for a Data Rate of 32.0 GT/s or lower and TS0 Ordered Sets for a Data Rate of 64.0 GT/s with EC=11b to the Downstream Port.

**Phase 3**
In this Phase the Downstream Port adjusts the Transmitter setting of the Upstream Port along with its own Receiver setting, independently, on each Lane, using a handshake and evaluation process similar to Phase 2 with the exception that EC=11b. The Downstream Port signals the end of Phase 3 (and the equalization procedure) by transmitting TS1 Ordered Sets with EC=00b.

The algorithm used by a component to adjust the transmitter of its Link partner and the evaluation of that Transmitter set-up with its Receiver set-up is implementation specific. A component may request changes to any number of Lanes and can request different settings for each Lane. Each requested setting can be a preset or a set of coefficients that meets the requirements defined in Section 4.2.4.1. Each component is responsible for ensuring that at the end of the fine-tuning (Phase 2 for Upstream Ports and Phase 3 for Downstream Ports), its Link partner has the Transmitter setting in each Lane that will cause the Link to meet the requirements in Chapter 8.

A Link partner receiving the request to adjust its Transmitter must evaluate the request and act on it. If a valid preset value is requested and the Transmitter is operating in full swing mode, it must be reflected in the Transmitter set-up and subsequently in the preset and coefficient fields of the TS1 Ordered Set that the Link partner transmits. If a preset value is requested, the Transmitter is operating in reduced swing mode, and the requested preset is supported as defined in Section 8.3.3.3 it must be reflected in the Transmitter set-up and subsequently in the preset and coefficient fields of the TS1 Ordered Set that the Link partner transmits. Transmitters operating in reduced swing mode are permitted to reject preset requests that are not supported as defined in Section 8.3.3.3. A request for adjusting the coefficients may be accepted or rejected. If the set of coefficients requested for a Lane is accepted, it must be reflected in the Transmitter set-up and subsequently in the transmitted TS1 Ordered Sets. If the set of coefficients requested for a Lane is rejected, the Transmitter set-up is not changed, but the transmitted TS1 Ordered Sets must reflect the requested coefficients along with the Reject Coefficient Values bit set to 1b. In either case of responding to a coefficient request, the preset field of the transmitted TS1 Ordered Sets is not changed from the last preset value that was transmitted. A request for adjusting the coefficients may be rejected by the Link partner only if the set of coefficients requested is not compliant with the rules defined in Section 4.2.4.1.

When performing equalization of a crosslink, the component that played the role of the Downstream Port during the earlier crosslink initialization at the lower data rate also assumes the responsibility of the Downstream Port for equalization.

If a Lane receives a Transmitter Preset value (from a TS0, TS1 or TS2 sequence) with a Reserved or unsupported value in Polling.Compliance, Loopback, or Phase 0 or Phase 1 of Recovery.Equalization, then the Lane is permitted to use any supported Transmitter preset setting in an implementation specific manner. The Reserved or unsupported Transmitter preset value is transmitted in any subsequent compliance patterns or Ordered Sets, and not the implementation specific Transmitter preset value chosen by the Lane. For example, if a Lane of an Upstream Port receives a Transmitter preset value 1111b (Reserved) with the EQ TS2 Ordered Sets it receives in Recovery.RcvrCfg, it is permitted to use any supported Transmitter preset value for its transmitter setting after changing the data rate to 8.0 GT/s, but it must

</td>
<td style="background-color:#e8e8e8">

**阶段 2 (Phase 2)**
在此阶段,Upstream Port 在每个通道上独立调整 Downstream Port 的发送器设置及其自身的接收器设置,以确保其接收到的比特流符合第 8 章中的要求(例如,对于 32.0 GT/s 或更低的数据速率,每个可运行的 Downstream Lane 的 BER 应小于 10^-12;对于 64.0 GT/s 的数据速率,BER 应小于 10^-6)。如果数据速率为 8.0 GT/s、16.0 GT/s 或 32.0 GT/s,则 Downstream Port 和 Upstream Port 都发送 TS1 有序集。如果数据速率为 64.0 GT/s,则 Downstream Port 在接收到 TS0 有序集之前发送 TS0 有序集,之后发送 TS1 有序集;而 Upstream Port 发送 TS0 有序集。Downstream Port 通过向 Upstream Port 发送 EC=10b 的 TS0/TS1 有序集来启动向 Phase 2 的切换。Downstream Port 按以下规则通告其正在使用的发送器系数和预设:在 Phase 1 中仅通告预设;在 Phase 2 中通告预设和系数。Upstream Port 接收到这些有序集后,可以请求不同的系数或预设设置,并继续评估每个设置,直到找到运行 Downstream Lanes 的最佳设置。在 Upstream Port 完成此阶段后,它通过向 Downstream Port 发送 32.0 GT/s 或更低数据速率的 EC=11b 的 TS1 有序集,以及 64.0 GT/s 数据速率的 EC=11b 的 TS0 有序集,将链路推进到 Phase 3。

**阶段 3 (Phase 3)**
在此阶段,Downstream Port 在每个通道上独立调整 Upstream Port 的发送器设置及其自身的接收器设置,使用与 Phase 2 类似的握手和评估过程,区别在于 EC=11b。Downstream Port 通过发送 EC=00b 的 TS1 有序集来发出 Phase 3(以及均衡过程)结束的信号。

组件用于调整其链路伙伴的发送器,以及使用其接收器设置评估该发送器设置的算法是实现特定的。组件可以请求对任意数量的通道进行更改,并可以为每个通道请求不同的设置。每个请求的设置可以是预设或一组满足 § Section 4.2.4.1 中定义要求的系数。每个组件负责确保在微调结束时(Upstream Port 为 Phase 2,Downstream Port 为 Phase 3),其链路伙伴在每个通道上的发送器设置将使链路满足第 8 章中的要求。

接收到调整其发送器请求的链路伙伴必须评估该请求并采取行动。如果请求了有效的预设值,并且发送器正在以全摆幅 (Full Swing) 模式运行,则必须将其反映在发送器设置中,并随后反映在链路伙伴发送的 TS1 有序集的预设和系数字段中。如果请求了预设值,发送器正在以降摆幅 (Reduced Swing) 模式运行,并且所请求的预设为 § Section 8.3.3.3 中定义的受支持预设,则必须将其反映在发送器设置中,并随后反映在链路伙伴发送的 TS1 有序集的预设和系数字段中。以降摆幅模式运行的发送器允许拒绝 § Section 8.3.3.3 中定义的、不受支持的预设请求。调整系数的请求可以被接受或拒绝。如果为某通道请求的系数集被接受,则必须将其反映在发送器设置中,并随后反映在发送的 TS1 有序集中。如果为某通道请求的系数集被拒绝,则发送器设置不变,但发送的 TS1 有序集必须反映所请求的系数,同时 Reject Coefficient Values 位置 1b。无论以何种方式响应系数请求,发送的 TS1 有序集的预设字段都不会从上次发送的预设值更改。仅当为某通道请求的系数集不符合 § Section 4.2.4.1 中定义的规则时,链路伙伴才能拒绝调整系数的请求。

对 crosslink 执行均衡时,在较低数据速率的早期 crosslink 初始化中扮演 Downstream Port 角色的组件,也会在均衡中承担 Downstream Port 的责任。

如果通道接收到带有 Reserved 或不受支持的 Transmitter Preset 值(来自 TS0、TS1 或 TS2 序列),在 Polling.Compliance、Loopback 或 Recovery.Equalization 的 Phase 0 或 Phase 1 中,则允许该通道以实现特定的方式使用任何受支持的 Transmitter Preset 设置。Reserved 或不受支持的 Transmitter Preset 值会在随后的任何一致性码型或有序集中发送,而不是该通道选择的实现特定的 Transmitter Preset 值。例如,如果 Upstream Port 的某通道在 Recovery.RcvrCfg 中接收到的 EQ TS2 有序集中接收到 Transmitter Preset 值 1111b(Reserved),则允许该通道在将数据速率切换到 8.0 GT/s 后,使用任何受支持的 Transmitter Preset 值作为其发送器设置,但必须

</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
</div>

<a id="sec-4-2-4-loopback-compliance"></a>
### 4.2.4 Loopback and Compliance for Equalization | 4.2.4 均衡的 Loopback 与 Compliance

<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th width="50%">🇬🇧 English</th>
<th width="50%" style="background-color:#e8e8e8">🇨🇳 中文</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>

transmit 1111b as its Transmitter preset value in the TS1 Ordered Sets it transmits in Phase 0 and Phase 1 of Recovery.Equalization.

In the Loopback state, the Loopback Lead is responsible for communicating the Transmitter and Receiver settings it wants the Follower to use through the EQ TS1 Ordered Sets it transmits in the 2.5 GT/s or 5.0 GT/s data rate, and the preset or coefficient settings it wants the device under test to operate under in the TS1 Ordered Sets it transmits in the 8.0 GT/s or higher data rate. Similarly, if the Polling.Compliance state for 8.0 GT/s or higher Data Rates is entered through TS1 Ordered Sets, the entity that is performing the test is required to send the appropriate settings in EQ TS1 Ordered Sets and preseets for the device under test to operate with, according to the mechanism defined in Section 4.2.7.2.

</td>
<td style="background-color:#e8e8e8">

在 Recovery.Equalization 的 Phase 0 和 Phase 1 中发送的 TS1 有序集中,将 1111b 作为其 Transmitter Preset 值发送。

在 Loopback 状态中,Loopback Lead 负责通过其在 2.5 GT/s 或 5.0 GT/s 数据速率下发送的 EQ TS1 有序集,向 Follower 传达其希望使用的 Transmitter 和 Receiver 设置;并通过其在 8.0 GT/s 或更高数据速率下发送的 TS1 有序集,传达其希望被测设备 (DUT) 使用的 Preset 或 Coefficient 设置。类似地,如果 8.0 GT/s 或更高数据速率的 Polling.Compliance 状态是通过 TS1 有序集进入的,则执行测试的实体需要根据 § Section 4.2.7.2 中定义的机制,在 EQ TS1 有序集和 Presets 中发送适当的设置,以供被测设备使用。

</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

<div style="overflow-x: auto; max-width: 100%;">
<table>

<td>

> **IMPLEMENTATION NOTE:**
> **EQUALIZATION EXAMPLE**
>
> Some examples are presented in this note to help explain Link equalization. This is not a complete listing of all allowable equalization scenarios.
>
> The following diagram is an example illustrating how two devices may complete the equalization procedure. If the maximum common data rate supported by both Ports is 8.0 GT/s, the equalization procedure is complete at the conclusion of the 8.0 GT/s equalization procedure. If the maximum common data rate supported by both Ports is 16.0 GT/s, the 8.0 GT/s equalization procedure is followed by the 16.0 GT/s equalization procedure. If either the 8.0 GT/s or 16.0 GT/s equalization procedure is repeated and is performed while the Link is in 8.0 GT/s data rate (for the 8.0 GT/s equalization) or in 16.0 GT/s (for the 16.0 GT/s equalization), Phase 0 may be skipped since there is no need for the Link to go back to 2.5 GT/s or 5.0 GT/s (for the 8.0 GT/s equalization) or 8.0 GT/s (for the 16.0 GT/s equalization) to resend the same EQ TS2 Ordered Sets to convey the presets. A Downstream Port may choose to skip Phase 2 and Phase 3 if it determines that fine-tuning of the Transmitter is not needed based on the channel and components in the platform.
>
> Figure 4-44 shows an example flow for 64.0 GT/s after the Link completes the 32.0 GT/s equalization with the use of TS0 and TS1 Ordered Sets.
>
> Note that some transitions may not be covered; such as the transition from receiving TS0 to receiving TS1 in a given sub-state.

</td>
<td style="background-color:#e8e8e8">

> **实现注意 (IMPLEMENTATION NOTE):**
> **均衡示例 (EQUALIZATION EXAMPLE)**
>
> 本说明中给出了一些示例,以帮助解释链路均衡。这里并未列出所有允许的均衡场景。
>
> 下图是一个示例,说明两个设备如何完成均衡过程。如果两个端口共同支持的最大数据速率为 8.0 GT/s,则均衡过程在 8.0 GT/s 均衡过程结束时完成。如果两个端口共同支持的最大数据速率为 16.0 GT/s,则在 8.0 GT/s 均衡过程之后,接着进行 16.0 GT/s 均衡过程。如果重复执行 8.0 GT/s 或 16.0 GT/s 均衡过程,并且在链路处于 8.0 GT/s 数据速率(对于 8.0 GT/s 均衡)或 16.0 GT/s 数据速率(对于 16.0 GT/s 均衡)时执行,则可以跳过 Phase 0,因为链路无需返回到 2.5 GT/s 或 5.0 GT/s(对于 8.0 GT/s 均衡)或 8.0 GT/s(对于 16.0 GT/s 均衡)以重新发送相同的 EQ TS2 有序集来传达预设。Downstream Port 可以根据平台上的通道和组件,判断是否不需要对发送器进行微调,从而选择跳过 Phase 2 和 Phase 3。
>
> 图 4-44 显示了在链路使用 TS0 和 TS1 有序集完成 32.0 GT/s 均衡之后,64.0 GT/s 的示例流程。
>
> 请注意,某些转换可能未涵盖,例如在给定子状态中从接收 TS0 转换到接收 TS1。

<a id="fig-4-44"></a>
#### Figure 4-44 64.0 GT/s Equalization Flow | 图 4-44 64.0 GT/s 均衡流程

<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th width="50%">🇬🇧 English</th>
<th width="50%" style="background-color:#e8e8e8">🇨🇳 中文</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>

> **Figure 4-44.** 64.0 GT/s Equalization Flow
> <img src="figures/chapter_04/fig_0449_1_tight.png" width="700">

**Description of Figure 4-44 (64.0 GT/s Equalization Flow):**

*Phase 0: 128b/130b EQ TS2 Ordered Sets sent from Downstream Port to Upstream Port.*

*Phase 1: Both sides exchange TS0 Ordered Sets to establish an operational Link. EIEOS sent every 32 TS0 Ordered Sets.*

*Phase 2: Upstream Port requests Downstream Port to set its Transmitter's coefficients/presets to have its incoming Link meet the electrical requirements. The Downstream Port may send EIEOS in up to 65536 TS1 Ordered Sets, based on the Upstream Port's request. The Upstream Port sends an EIEOS every 32 TS0 Ordered Sets.*

*Phase 3: Downstream Port requests Upstream Port to set its Transmitter's coefficients/presets to have its incoming Link meet the electrical requirements. The Upstream Port may send EIEOS in up to 65536 TS1 Ordered Sets, based on the Downstream Port's request. The Downstream Port sends an EIEOS every 32 TS1 Ordered Sets.*

*Post 64.0 GT/s Equalization: LTSSM goes through Recovery.RcvrLock, Recovery.RcvrCfg, and Recovery.Idle to L0. EIEOS sent after every 32 TS1/TS2 Ordered Sets.*

*Equalization Complete:*
- 32.0 GT/s data rate – Speed negotiation, Downstream Port advertises 64.0 GT/s maximum data rate, Exchange Presets for 64.0 GT/s data rate
- 64.0 GT/s data rate – Equalization
- 64.0 GT/s data rate L0

*TS0: EC = 0010, Value C1 (Downstream Port)*
*TS0: EC = 0000, Value C2 (Upstream Port)*
*TS0: EC = 0010, Value C2 (Upstream Port)*
*TS0: EC = 1000, Value C1', C1" (Upstream Port)*
*TS1: EC = 10, Value C1, C1', C1" (Downstream Port)*
*TS1: EC = 11, Value C2, C2', C2" (Upstream Port)*
*TS1: EC = 00, Value C1" (Downstream Port)*
*TS1: EC = 00, Value C2" (Upstream Port)*
*TS2's followed by IDLE Flits*

</td>
<td style="background-color:#e8e8e8">


**图 4-44 说明(64.0 GT/s 均衡流程):**

*阶段 0 (Phase 0):从 Downstream Port 向 Upstream Port 发送 128b/130b EQ TS2 有序集。*

*阶段 1 (Phase 1):双方交换 TS0 有序集以建立可运行的链路。每 32 个 TS0 有序集发送一次 EIEOS。*

*阶段 2 (Phase 2):Upstream Port 请求 Downstream Port 设置其发送器的系数/预设,以使其入向链路满足电气要求。根据 Upstream Port 的请求,Downstream Port 可在最多 65536 个 TS1 有序集中发送 EIEOS。Upstream Port 每 32 个 TS0 有序集发送一次 EIEOS。*

*阶段 3 (Phase 3):Downstream Port 请求 Upstream Port 设置其发送器的系数/预设,以使其入向链路满足电气要求。根据 Downstream Port 的请求,Upstream Port 可在最多 65536 个 TS1 有序集中发送 EIEOS。Downstream Port 每 32 个 TS1 有序集发送一次 EIEOS。*

*64.0 GT/s 均衡之后:LTSSM 经过 Recovery.RcvrLock、Recovery.RcvrCfg 和 Recovery.Idle 转换到 L0。每 32 个 TS1/TS2 有序集之后发送 EIEOS。*

*均衡完成:*
- 32.0 GT/s 数据速率 – 速率协商,Downstream Port 通告 64.0 GT/s 最大数据速率,交换 64.0 GT/s 数据速率的预设
- 64.0 GT/s 数据速率 – 均衡
- 64.0 GT/s 数据速率 L0

*TS0:EC = 0010,Value C1(Downstream Port)*
*TS0:EC = 0000,Value C2(Upstream Port)*
*TS0:EC = 0010,Value C2(Upstream Port)*
*TS0:EC = 1000,Value C1'、C1"(Upstream Port)*
*TS1:EC = 10,Value C1、C1'、C1"(Downstream Port)*
*TS1:EC = 11,Value C2、C2'、C2"(Upstream Port)*
*TS1:EC = 00,Value C1"(Downstream Port)*
*TS1:EC = 00,Value C2"(Upstream Port)*
*TS2 之后跟随 IDLE Flits*

</td>
</tr>

<a id="sec-4-2-4-fir-coefficients"></a>
### 4.2.4 FIR Coefficients and Equalization Bypass Example | 4.2.4 FIR 系数与均衡绕过示例


<div style="overflow-x: auto; max-width: 100%;">
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th width="50%">🇬🇧 English</th>
<th width="50%" style="background-color:#e8e8e8">🇨🇳 中文</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>

The explanation of the coefficients and the FIR filter it represents are provided in Section 8.3.3.1. The following rules apply to both the advertised as well as requested coefficient settings.

1. C-2, C-1, and C+1 are the coefficients used in the FIR equation and represent the 2nd pre-cursor, pre-cursor and post-cursor, respectively. The pre-cursors and post-cursor values communicated in the TS1 Ordered Sets represent their absolute values. C0 represents the cursor coefficient setting and is a positive entity. The coefficient C-2 is used only for 64.0 GT/s and higher Data Rates.

2. The sum of the absolute values of the coefficients defines the FS (Full Swing; FS = |C-2|+|C-1|+C0+|C+1|). FS is advertised to the Link partner in Phase 1. The Transmitter FS range is defined below:
   - FS ∈ {24, …, 63} (i.e., FS must have a value from 24 through 63) for full swing mode.
   - FS ∈ {12, …, 63} for reduced swing mode.
   - C-2 is set to 0 for Data Rates lower than 64.0 GT/s.

> **IMPLEMENTATION NOTE:**
> **EQUALIZATION BYPASS EXAMPLE**
>
> The following flow-chart provides an example flow where a Link may bypass equalization at lower Data Rates and go to the highest supported NRZ rate for equalization. For example, when n=5, the Link can train to L0 in Gen 1 data rate, establish that all components (including Retimers, if any) can bypass equalization to Gen 5, change the data rate to Gen 5 and just perform equalization at Gen 5.

</td>
<td style="background-color:#e8e8e8">

关于系数及其所代表的 FIR 滤波器的说明,请参见 § Section 8.3.3.1。以下规则适用于通告的以及请求的系数设置。

1. C-2、C-1 和 C+1 是 FIR 等式中使用的系数,分别表示第二前游标 (2nd pre-cursor)、前游标 (pre-cursor) 和后游标 (post-cursor)。TS1 有序集中传达的前游标和后游标值表示其绝对值。C0 表示游标系数设置,是一个正值。系数 C-2 仅用于 64.0 GT/s 及更高的数据速率。

2. 系数绝对值之和定义了 FS(全摆幅,FS = |C-2|+|C-1|+C0+|C+1|)。FS 在 Phase 1 中通告给链路伙伴。发送器 FS 范围定义如下:
   - FS ∈ {24, …, 63}(即 FS 必须具有 24 到 63 之间的值)用于全摆幅模式。
   - FS ∈ {12, …, 63}用于降摆幅模式。
   - 对于低于 64.0 GT/s 的数据速率,C-2 设置为 0。

> **实现注意 (IMPLEMENTATION NOTE):**
> **均衡绕过示例 (EQUALIZATION BYPASS EXAMPLE)**
>
> 下面的流程图给出了一个示例流程,说明链路如何在较低数据速率上绕过均衡,并直接进入所支持的最高 NRZ 速率以执行均衡。例如,当 n=5 时,链路可在 Gen 1 数据速率训练到 L0,确认所有组件(包括 Retimers,若有)能够将均衡绕过到 Gen 5,将数据速率切换到 Gen 5,并仅在 Gen 5 执行均衡。

</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

> **Figure 4-45.** Equalization Bypass Example
> <img src="figures/chapter_04/fig_0450_1_tight.png" width="700">

</div>

<a id="sec-4-2-4-1"></a>
### 4.2.4.1 Rules for Transmitter Coefficients | 发送器系数规则

<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th width="50%">🇬🇧 English</th>
<th width="50%" style="background-color:#e8e8e8">🇨🇳 中文</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>

3. A Transmitter advertises its LF (Low Frequency) value during Phase 1.

   - This corresponds to the minimum differential voltage that can be generated by the Transmitter which is LF/FS times the Transmitters maximum differential voltage. The Transmitter must ensure that LF meets the electrical requirements defined in § Section 8.3.3.9 for VTX-EIEOS-FS and VTX-EIEOS-RS.

4. The following rules must be satisfied before a set of coefficients can be requested of the Link partner's Transmitter. Upon reception of an update request for TX coefficient settings, a Port must verify that the new request meets the following conditions and reject the request if any of following conditions are violated:

   a. |C-1| ≤ Floor (FS/4)

   b. |C-1| + |C-2| + C0 + |C+1| = FS
      (Do not allow peak power to change with adaptation)

   c. C0 − |C-1| + |C-2| − |C+1| ≥ LF

   d. |C-2| ≤ Floor (FS/8)

Definition of the Transmitter and Receiver Preset Hints appears in § Chapter 8. The encoding for the Transmitter Preset and Receiver Preset Hint are provided in § Table 4-23 and § Table 4-24. There are two classes of presets: P0 through P10 are defined for data rates of 8.0 GT/s, 16.0 GT/s, and 32.0 GT/s whereas Q0 through Q10 are defined for the data rate of 64.0 GT/s. Even though 8 of the 11 presets across these two sets overlap, it is possible that the same preset values may get different encodings between the two classes. Receiver Preset Hints are optional and only defined for the 8.0 GT/s data rate.

</td>
<td style="background-color:#e8e8e8">

3. 发送器 (Transmitter) 在 Phase 1 期间通告其 LF (Low Frequency, 低频) 值。

   - LF/FS 对应发送器可产生的最小差分电压与发送器最大差分电压的比值。发送器必须确保 LF 满足 § 8.3.3.9 节中 VTX-EIEOS-FS 和 VTX-EIEOS-RS 的电气要求。

4. 在向链路对端 (Link partner) 发送器请求一组系数之前,必须满足以下规则。端口 (Port) 在接收到 TX 系数设置的更新请求时,必须验证新请求是否满足以下条件;若违反任何条件,必须拒绝该请求:

   a. |C-1| ≤ Floor (FS/4)

   b. |C-1| + |C-2| + C0 + |C+1| = FS
      (不允许峰值功率随适配而变化)

   c. C0 − |C-1| + |C-2| − |C+1| ≥ LF

   d. |C-2| ≤ Floor (FS/8)

发送器预设 (Transmitter Preset) 和接收器预设提示 (Receiver Preset Hint) 的定义见 § 第 8 章。发送器预设和接收器预设提示的编码见 § 表 4-23 和 § 表 4-24。预设分为两类:P0 至 P10 定义用于 8.0 GT/s、16.0 GT/s 和 32.0 GT/s 数据率;Q0 至 Q10 定义用于 64.0 GT/s 数据率。尽管这两组 11 个预设中有 8 个是重叠的,但同一预设值在两类之间可能有不同的编码。接收器预设提示是可选的,仅针对 8.0 GT/s 数据率定义。

</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

**Table 4-23 Transmitter Preset Encoding | 表 4-23 发送器预设编码**

| Encoding | Preset Number in § Table 8-1 | Preset Number in § Table 8-2 |
|----------|------------------------------|------------------------------|
| 0000b    | P0                           | Q0                           |
| 0001b    | P1                           | Q1                           |
| 0010b    | P2                           | Q2                           |
| 0011b    | P3                           | Q3                           |
| 0100b    | P4                           | Q4                           |
| 0101b    | P5                           | Q5                           |
| 0110b    | P6                           | Q6                           |
| 0111b    | P7                           | Q7                           |
| 1000b    | P8                           | Q8                           |
| 1001b    | P9                           | Q9                           |
| 1010b    | P10                          | Q10                          |
| 1011b through 1111b | Reserved         | Reserved                     |

<a id="sec-4-2-4-2"></a>
### 4.2.4.2 Encoding of Presets | 4.2.4.2 预设的编码


<div style="overflow-x: auto; max-width: 100%;">
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th width="50%">🇬🇧 English</th>
<th width="50%" style="background-color:#e8e8e8">🇨🇳 中文</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>

This section defines the Physical Layer control process that configures and initializes each Link for normal operation. This section covers the following features:

- configuring and initializing the Link
- supporting normal packet transfers
- supported state transitions when recovering from Link errors
- restarting a Port from low power states.

The following are discovered and determined during the training process:

- Link width
- Link data rate
- Lane reversal
- Lane polarity

Training does:

- Link data rate negotiation
- Bit lock per Lane

</td>
<td style="background-color:#e8e8e8">

本节定义物理层 (Physical Layer) 的控制过程,该过程配置和初始化每个链路 (Link) 以便正常工作。本节涵盖以下特性:

- 配置和初始化链路
- 支持正常的数据包传输
- 从链路错误恢复时支持的状态转换
- 从低功耗状态重启端口 (Port)

训练过程中发现和确定以下内容:

- 链路宽度 (Link width)
- 链路数据率 (Link data rate)
- 通道反转 (Lane reversal)
- 通道极性 (Lane polarity)

训练执行的操作:

- 链路数据率协商
- 每条通道的位锁定 (Bit lock)

</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
</div>


**Table 4-24 Receiver Preset Hint | 表 4-24 接收器预设提示**

| Encoding | Encoding for 8.0 GT/s | Receiver Preset Value |
|----------|----------------------|------------------------|
| 000b     | -6 dB                | -6 dB                  |
| 001b     | -7 dB                | -7 dB                  |
| 010b     | -8 dB                | -8 dB                  |
| 011b     | -9 dB                | -9 dB                  |
| 100b     | -10 dB               | -10 dB                 |
| 101b     | -11 dB               | -11 dB                 |
| 110b     | -12 dB               | -12 dB                 |
| 111b     | Reserved             | Reserved               |

>>> IMPLEMENTATION NOTE
>>> QUANTIZATION ERRORS AT 64.0 GT/S
>>> Due to the tighter preset tolerance at 64.0 GT/s some FS values will result in a quantization error larger than is allowed for the specified tolerance of the presets in § Table 8-2 of § Section 8.3.3.3. The implementation must compensate for any quantization error from its selection of FS to meet the specified preset accuracy.

>>> 实现说明:64.0 GT/s 的量化误差
>>> 由于 64.0 GT/s 下预设容差更严,某些 FS 值会导致量化误差超过 § 8.3.3.3 节 § 表 8-2 中指定的预设容差。实现必须补偿因选择 FS 而产生的任何量化误差,以满足指定的预设精度。

<!-- 📄 Page 452 -->
