<a id="sec-4-2-7-3-2-2-body"></a>
### Configuration.Linkwidth.Accept — Upstream Lanes | 上游通道配置链路宽度接受


<div style="overflow-x: auto; max-width: 100%;">
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th width="50%">🇬🇧 English</th>
<th width="50%" style="background-color:#e8e8e8">🇨🇳 中文</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>

- LinkUp = 0b
- The component has transmitted Modified TS1/TS2 Ordered Sets supported value (11b) in the Enhanced Link Behavior Control field in Symbol 5 of all TS1 and TS2 Ordered Sets in Polling and Configuration states since entering the Polling State
- The received eight consecutive TS2 Ordered Sets on all Lanes of the configured Link that could be formed (see 1st bullet of § Section 4.2.7.3.2.2 ) that were part of the group that caused the transition from Polling.Configuration to Configuration state had the Modified TS1/TS2 Ordered Sets supported value (11b) in the Enhanced Link Behavior Control field in Symbol 5 and 32.0 GT/s data rate is supported bit is Set to 1b in the received eight consecutive TS2 Ordered Sets
- The Flit_Mode_Enabled variable must be set to 1b if all of the following conditions are true:
  - LinkUp = 0b
  - The component had transmitted Flit Mode Supported bit in the 'Data Rate Identifier' field (Symbol 4, Bit 0) in the TS1 and TS2 Ordered Sets in Polling and Configuration states since entering the Polling State
  - The received eight consecutive TS2 Ordered Sets on all Lanes of the currently configured Link that caused the transition from Polling.Configuration to Configuration state had the Flit Mode Supported bit in the Data Rate Identifier field (Symbol 4, Bit 0) set to 1b in the received eight consecutive TS2 Ordered Sets
- The next state is Detect after a 2 ms timeout or if no Link can be configured or if all Lanes receive two consecutive TS1 Ordered Sets with Link and Lane numbers set to PAD.

**IMPLEMENTATION NOTE:**
**NEGOTIATING FLIT MODE AND THE**
**MODIFIED TS1/TS2 USAGE**

Negotiating Flit Mode and the Modified TS1/TS2 usage is orthogonal (i.e., a device can advertise and negotiate support for neither, either, or both). This note applies to the Downstream and Upstream Ports.
§

</td>
<td style="background-color:#e8e8e8">

- LinkUp = 0b
- 组件自进入 Polling 状态以来,在 Polling 和 Configuration 状态期间,在所有 TS1 和 TS2 有序集的 Symbol 5 中的 Enhanced Link Behavior Control 字段中已发送 Modified TS1/TS2 有序集支持值(11b)
- 在所形成已配置链路(参见 § Section 4.2.7.3.2.2 的第 1 项)所有通道上、属于引发从 Polling.Configuration 转到 Configuration 状态的那一组的、接收到的八个连续 TS2 有序集,在 Symbol 5 中的 Enhanced Link Behavior Control 字段中具有 Modified TS1/TS2 有序集支持值(11b),且在这接收到的八个连续 TS2 有序集中 32.0 GT/s 数据速率支持位被设置为 1b
- Flit_Mode_Enabled 变量必须在以下所有条件均满足时被设置为 1b:
  - LinkUp = 0b
  - 组件自进入 Polling 状态以来,在 Polling 和 Configuration 状态期间,在 TS1 和 TS2 有序集的 'Data Rate Identifier' 字段(Symbol 4, Bit 0)中已发送 Flit Mode Supported 位
  - 在当前已配置链路上、引发从 Polling.Configuration 转到 Configuration 状态的所有通道上接收到的八个连续 TS2 有序集,在 Data Rate Identifier 字段(Symbol 4, Bit 0)中 Flit Mode Supported 位被设置为 1b
- 在 2 ms 超时之后,或若无法配置任何链路,或若所有通道接收到两个连续的、链路号和通道号均置为 PAD 的 TS1 有序集,则下一状态为 Detect。

**实现说明 (IMPLEMENTATION NOTE):**
**协商 Flit 模式与 Modified TS1/TS2 使用 (NEGOTIATING FLIT MODE AND THE MODIFIED TS1/TS2 USAGE)**

Flit 模式与 Modified TS1/TS2 的使用彼此正交(orthogonal)(即设备可以通告和协商支持两者皆不支持、任一支持或两者皆支持)。本说明同时适用于下游端口 (Downstream Port) 和上游端口 (Upstream Port)。
§

</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
</div>


---

<!-- 📄 Page 517 -->
---

<a id="sec-4-2-7-3-2-modified"></a>
### Modified TS1 有序集使用 | Modified TS1 Ordered Set Usage

<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th width="50%">🇬🇧 English</th>
<th width="50%" style="background-color:#e8e8e8">🇨🇳 中文</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>

In this sub-state, if use_modified_TS1_TS2_Ordered_Set variable is set to 1b:

- Transmitter must send Modified TS1 Ordered sets instead of TS1 Ordered Sets

**IMPLEMENTATION NOTE:**
**EXAMPLE CASES**

Notable examples related to the configuration of Downstream Lanes:

1. A x8 Downstream Port, which can be divided into two x4 Links, sends two different Link numbers on to two x4 Upstream Ports. The Upstream Ports respond simultaneously by picking the two Link numbers. The Downstream Port will have to choose one of these sets of Link numbers to configure as a Link, and leave the other for a secondary LTSSM to configure (which will ultimately happen in Configuration.Complete).
2. A x8 Downstream Port where only seven Lanes are receiving TS1 Ordered Sets with the same received Link number (non-PAD and matching one that was transmitted by the Downstream Lanes) and an eighth Lane, which is in the middle or adjacent to those same Lanes, is not receiving a TS1 Ordered Set. In this case, the eighth Lane is treated the same as the other seven Lanes and Lane numbering for a x8 Lane should occur as described above.

Notable examples related to the configuration of Upstream Lanes:

1. A x8 Upstream Port is presented with Lane numbers that are backward from the preferred numbering. If the optional behavior of Lane reversal is supported by the Upstream Port, the Upstream Port transmits the same Lane numbers back to the Downstream Port. Otherwise, the opposite Lane numbers are transmitted back to the Downstream Port, and it will be up to the Downstream Port to optionally fix the Lane ordering or exit Configuration.

   Optional Lane reversal behavior is required to configure a Link where the Lane numbers are reversed and the Downstream Port does not support Lane reversal. Specifically, the Upstream Port Lane reversal will accommodate the scenario where the default Upstream sequential Lane numbering (0 to n-1) is receiving a reversed Downstream sequential Lane number (n-1 to 0).
2. A x8 Upstream Port is not receiving TS1 Ordered Sets on the Upstream Port Lane 0:
   a. In the case where the Upstream Port can only support a x8 or x1 Link and the Upstream Port can support Lane reversal. The Upstream Port will assign a Lane 0 to only the received Lane 7 (received Lane number n-1) and the remaining seven Lanes must transmit TS1 Ordered Sets with Link and Lane numbers set to PAD.
   b. In the case where the Upstream Port can only support a x8 or x1 Link and the Upstream Port cannot support Lane reversal. No Link can be formed and the Upstream Port will eventually timeout after 2 ms and exit to Detect.
3. An optional x8 Upstream crosslink Port, which can be divided into two x4 Links, is attached to two x4 Downstream Ports that present the same Link number, and each x4 Downstream Port presents Lane numbers simultaneously that were each numbered 0 to 3. The Upstream Port will have to choose one of these sets of Lane numbers to configure as a Link, and leave the other for a second pass through Configuration.
§

</td>
<td style="background-color:#e8e8e8">

在此子状态中,若 use_modified_TS1_TS2_Ordered_Set 变量被设置为 1b:

- 发送器必须发送 Modified TS1 有序集来代替 TS1 有序集

**实现说明 (IMPLEMENTATION NOTE):**
**示例情形 (EXAMPLE CASES)**

与下游通道 (Downstream Lanes) 配置相关的值得关注的示例:

1. 一个可被划分为两个 x4 链路的 x8 下游端口,向两个 x4 上游端口分别发送两个不同的链路号 (Link number)。两个上游端口同时通过选定这两个链路号进行响应。下游端口此时必须从这两组链路号中选择一组用于配置一条链路,并将另一组留给次级 LTSSM 进行配置(此配置最终将在 Configuration.Complete 中完成)。
2. 一个 x8 下游端口,仅在七个通道上接收到带有相同接收链路号(非 PAD 且与下游通道所发送的某一链路号相匹配)的 TS1 有序集,而第八个通道(位于这七个通道中间或与之相邻)未接收到 TS1 有序集。在此情况下,该第八个通道被当作与另外七个通道相同,应按上述方式对一个 x8 链路进行通道编号 (Lane numbering)。

与上游通道 (Upstream Lanes) 配置相关的值得关注的示例:

1. 一个 x8 上游端口所接收到的通道号与所期望的编号顺序相反。若该上游端口支持通道反转 (Lane reversal) 这一可选行为,则上游端口将相同的通道号回传给下游端口。否则,上游端口将相反的通道号回传给下游端口,由下游端口可选地修正通道顺序,或退出 Configuration 状态。

   当通道号被反转且下游端口不支持通道反转时,需要采用可选的通道反转行为来配置该链路。具体而言,上游端口的通道反转将适应如下场景:默认的上游顺序通道编号(0 到 n-1)正在接收反转的下游顺序通道编号(n-1 到 0)。
2. 一个 x8 上游端口在其 Upstream Port Lane 0 上未接收到 TS1 有序集:
   a. 在上游端口仅能支持 x8 或 x1 链路、且上游端口支持通道反转的情况下,上游端口将仅把 Lane 0 分配给所接收的 Lane 7(接收通道号 n-1),其余七个通道必须发送链路号和通道号均置为 PAD 的 TS1 有序集。
   b. 在上游端口仅能支持 x8 或 x1 链路、且上游端口不支持通道反转的情况下,无法形成任何链路,上游端口最终将在 2 ms 后超时并退出至 Detect 状态。
3. 一个可选的 x8 上游 crosslink 端口(可被划分为两个 x4 链路)连接到两个呈现相同链路号的 x4 下游端口,且每个 x4 下游端口同时呈现各自编号为 0 到 3 的通道号。上游端口必须从这两组通道号中选择一组用于配置一条链路,并将另一组留待 Configuration 的第二次遍历时配置。
§

</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>


---

<a id="sec-4-2-7-3-3"></a>
## 4.2.7.3.3 Configuration.Lanenum.Accept | Configuration.Lanenum.Accept 子状态

<!-- 📄 Page 518 -->
---


<div style="overflow-x: auto; max-width: 100%;">
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th width="50%">🇬🇧 English</th>
<th width="50%" style="background-color:#e8e8e8">🇨🇳 中文</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>

- Receiver must check for receipt of Modified TS1 Ordered Sets instead of TS1 Ordered Sets [Note: See § Section 4.2.5.1 for the definition of identical consecutive modified TS1 Ordered Sets.]
- If two consecutive TS1 Ordered Sets are received with non-PAD Link and non-PAD Lane numbers that match all the non-PAD Link and non-PAD Lane numbers (or reversed Lane numbers if Lane reversal is optionally supported) that are being transmitted in Downstream Lane TS1 Ordered Sets, the next state is Configuration.Complete. If the use_modified_TS1_TS2_Ordered_Set variable is Set and an Alternate Protocol Negotiation is being performed, the transition to Configuration.Complete must be delayed for 10 μs or until the Downstream Port receives the Upstream Port's response to that protocol request (whichever happens first). See § Section 4.2.5.2 for Alternate Protocol Negotiation details. Note that Retimers are permitted to delay the transition to Configuration.Complete, as described in § Section 4.3.9 .
  - The SRIS_Mode_Enabled variable is Set to 1b if all of the following conditions are true:
    - LinkUp = 0b
    - The Port has been transmitting SRIS Clocking (Symbol 4, bit 7 = 1b) in the transmitted TS1 Ordered Sets since it entered Configuration state.
  - The Link Bandwidth Management Status and Link Autonomous Bandwidth Status bits of the Link Status Register must be updated as follows on a Link bandwidth change if the current transition to Configuration state was from the Recovery state:
    a. If the bandwidth change was initiated by the Downstream Port due to reliability issues, the Link Bandwidth Management Status bit is Set.
    b. Else if the bandwidth change was not initiated by the Downstream Port and the Autonomous Change bit (Symbol 4 bit 6) in two consecutive received TS1 Ordered Sets is 0b, the Link Bandwidth Management Status bit is Set.
    c. Else the Link Autonomous Bandwidth Status bit is Set.
  - The condition of Reversed Lane numbers is defined strictly as the Downstream Lane 0 receiving a TS1 Ordered Set with a Lane number equal to n-1 and the Downstream Lane n-1 receiving a TS1 Ordered Set with a Lane number equal to 0.
  - If any possible multi-Lane Link received an error in a TS1 Ordered Set, lost 128b/130b Block Alignment, or lost Block/Flit alignment with 1b/1b encoding on a subset of the received Lanes, it is recommended to do the following to avoid configuring a smaller Link than is possible:
    - When using 8b/10b encoding, delay the evaluation listed above by an additional two or more TS1 Ordered Sets, but must not delay by more than 1 ms.
    - When using 128b/130b or 1b/1b encoding, delay the evaluation listed above by an additional 34 or more TS1 Ordered Sets, but must not delay by more than 1 ms.
- If a configured Link can be formed with any subset of the Lanes that receive two consecutive TS1 Ordered Sets with the same transmitted non-PAD Link numbers and any non-PAD Lane numbers, TS1 Ordered Sets are transmitted with the same non-PAD Link numbers and new Lane numbers assigned and the next state is Configuration.Lanenum.Wait.
  - The newly assigned transmitted Lane numbers must range from 0 to m-1, be assigned sequentially only to some continuous grouping of the Lanes that are receiving non-PAD Lane numbers (i.e., Lanes which are not receiving any TS1 Ordered Sets always disrupt a continuous grouping and must not be included in this grouping), must include either Lane 0 or Lane n-1 (largest received Lane number), and m-1 must be equal to or smaller than the largest received Lane number (n-1). Any left over Lanes must transmit TS1 Ordered Sets with the Link and Lane number set to PAD.

</td>
<td style="background-color:#e8e8e8">

- 接收器 (Receiver) 必须检查是否收到了 Modified TS1 Ordered Set（修改型 TS1 有序集）而非 TS1 Ordered Set [注：相同连续修改型 TS1 有序集的定义见 § 4.2.5.1。]
- 若在两个连续的 TS1 Ordered Set 中接收到的非 PAD 链路号与非 PAD 通道号，与在下游通道 TS1 Ordered Set 中发送的所有非 PAD 链路号及非 PAD 通道号全部匹配（若可选支持通道反转，则为反转后的通道号），则下一状态为 Configuration.Complete。若 use_modified_TS1_TS2_Ordered_Set 变量已被置位且正在执行 Alternate Protocol Negotiation（替代协议协商），则向 Configuration.Complete 的跃迁必须延迟 10 μs，或延迟到下游端口 (Downstream Port) 收到上游端口 (Upstream Port) 对该协议请求的响应为止（以先发生者为准）。替代协议协商的详细信息见 § 4.2.5.2。Retimer 允许延迟向 Configuration.Complete 的跃迁，详见 § 4.3.9。
  - 当以下所有条件均满足时，SRIS_Mode_Enabled 变量被置为 1b：
    - LinkUp = 0b
    - 自进入 Configuration 状态以来，端口 (Port) 一直在发送的 TS1 Ordered Set 中携带 SRIS Clocking（Symbol 4，bit 7 = 1b）。
  - 若当前向 Configuration 状态的跃迁来自 Recovery 状态，则当发生链路带宽 (Bandwidth) 变更时，Link Status 寄存器中的 Link Bandwidth Management Status 与 Link Autonomous Bandwidth Status 比特必须按如下规则更新：
    a. 若带宽变更是下游端口因可靠性问题而发起的，则将 Link Bandwidth Management Status 位置 1。
    b. 否则，若带宽变更并非由下游端口发起，且在连续两个接收到的 TS1 Ordered Set 中 Autonomous Change bit（Symbol 4 bit 6）为 0b，则将 Link Bandwidth Management Status 位置 1。
    c. 否则，将 Link Autonomous Bandwidth Status 位置 1。
  - 反转通道号条件严格定义为：下游通道 0 收到通道号为 n-1 的 TS1 Ordered Set，同时下游通道 n-1 收到通道号为 0 的 TS1 Ordered Set。
  - 若任何可能的多通道链路 (multi-Lane Link) 在部分接收通道上出现 TS1 Ordered Set 错误、丢失 128b/130b 块对齐 (Block Alignment)，或在使用 1b/1b 编码时丢失 Block/Flit 对齐 (alignment)，建议采取以下措施以避免配置出小于实际可用的链路宽度：
    - 使用 8b/10b 编码时，将上述评估额外延迟两个或更多 TS1 Ordered Set，但总延迟不得超过 1 ms。
    - 使用 128b/130b 编码或 1b/1b 编码时，将上述评估额外延迟 34 个或更多 TS1 Ordered Set，但总延迟不得超过 1 ms。
- 若能利用任意一个接收通道子集（这些通道接收到两个连续的 TS1 Ordered Set，其携带相同的发送端非 PAD 链路号与任意非 PAD 通道号）形成一条已配置的链路 (Link)，则以相同的非 PAD 链路号并分配新通道号发送 TS1 Ordered Set，下一状态为 Configuration.Lanenum.Wait。
  - 新分配的发送通道号必须从 0 到 m-1 连续编号，仅分配给那些正在接收非 PAD 通道号的通道的某一连续组（即未收到任何 TS1 Ordered Set 的通道会中断该连续组，不得纳入此组），必须包含通道 0 或通道 n-1（最大接收通道号）之一，且 m-1 必须等于或小于最大接收通道号 (n-1)。其余通道必须以链路号与通道号均置为 PAD 的 TS1 Ordered Set 进行发送。

</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
</div>

<a id="sec-4-2-7-3-3-1"></a>
## 4.2.7.3.3.1 Downstream Lanes | 下游通道

<!-- 📄 Page 519 -->

<tr>
<th width="50%">🇬🇧 English</th>
<th width="50%" style="background-color:#e8e8e8">🇨🇳 中文</th>

<tr>
<td>

- If any possible multi-Lane Link received an error in a TS1 Ordered Set, lost 128b/130b Block Alignment, or lost Block/Flit alignment with 1b/1b encoding on a subset of the received Lanes, it is recommended to do the following to avoid configuring a smaller Link than is possible:
  - When using 8b/10b encoding, delay the evaluation listed above by an additional two or more TS1 Ordered Sets, but must not delay by more than 1 ms.
  - When using 128b/130b or 1b/1b encoding, delay the evaluation listed above by an additional 34 or more TS1 Ordered Sets, but must not delay by more than 1 ms.
- The next state is Detect if no Link can be configured or if all Lanes receive two consecutive TS1 Ordered Sets with Link and Lane numbers set to PAD.
- If two consecutive TS2 Ordered Sets are received with non-PAD Link and non-PAD Lane numbers that match all non-PAD Link and non-PAD Lane numbers that are being transmitted in Upstream Lane TS1 Ordered Sets, the next state is Configuration.Complete. If the use_modified_TS1_TS2_Ordered_Set variable is Set, an Alternate Protocol Negotiation was performed, and the Downstream Port decided not to use any Alternate Protocol, the received TS2 Ordered Sets will have Modified TS Usage set to a value as defined in § Table 4-30. See § Section 4.2.5.2 for Alternate Protocol Negotiation details.

  The SRIS_Mode_Enabled variable is set to 1b if all of the following conditions are true:
  - LinkUp = 0b
  - Any configured Lane in the Port has the SRIS Clocking bit set (Symbol 4, bit 7 = 1b) in the two consecutive TS2 Ordered Sets

  Note that Retimers are permitted to delay the transition to Configuration.Complete, as described in § Section 4.3.9 .
- If a configured Link can be formed with any subset of the Lanes that receive two consecutive TS1 Ordered Sets with the same transmitted non-PAD Link numbers and any non-PAD Lane numbers, TS1 Ordered Sets are transmitted with the same non-PAD Link numbers and new Lane numbers assigned and the next state is Configuration.Lanenum.Wait.
  - The newly assigned transmitted Lane numbers must range from 0 to m-1, be assigned sequentially only to some continuous grouping of Lanes that are receiving non-PAD Lane numbers (i.e., Lanes which are not receiving any TS1 Ordered Sets always disrupt a continuous grouping and must not be included in this grouping), must include either Lane 0 or Lane n-1 (largest received Lane number), and m-1 must be equal to or smaller than the largest received Lane number (n-1). Any left over Lanes must transmit TS1 Ordered Sets with the Link and Lane number set to PAD.
  - If any possible multi-Lane Link received an error in a TS1 Ordered Set, lost 128b/130b Block Alignment, or lost Block/Flit alignment with 1b/1b encoding on a subset of the received Lanes, it is recommended to do the following to avoid configuring a smaller Link than is possible:

</td>
<td style="background-color:#e8e8e8">

- 若任何可能的多通道链路在部分接收通道上出现 TS1 Ordered Set 错误、丢失 128b/130b 块对齐，或在使用 1b/1b 编码时丢失 Block/Flit 对齐，建议采取以下措施以避免配置出小于实际可用的链路宽度：
  - 使用 8b/10b 编码时，将上述评估额外延迟两个或更多 TS1 Ordered Set，但总延迟不得超过 1 ms。
  - 使用 128b/130b 编码或 1b/1b 编码时，将上述评估额外延迟 34 个或更多 TS1 Ordered Set，但总延迟不得超过 1 ms。
- 若无法配置链路，或所有通道均收到两个连续的、链路号与通道号均置为 PAD 的 TS1 Ordered Set，则下一状态为 Detect。
- 若在两个连续的 TS2 Ordered Set 中接收到的非 PAD 链路号与非 PAD 通道号，与上游通道 TS1 Ordered Set 中发送的所有非 PAD 链路号及非 PAD 通道号全部匹配，则下一状态为 Configuration.Complete。若 use_modified_TS1_TS2_Ordered_Set 变量已置位、且已执行过替代协议协商且下游端口决定不使用任何替代协议，则接收到的 TS2 Ordered Set 中 Modified TS Usage 将按 § 表 4-30 所定义的值进行设置。替代协议协商的详细信息见 § 4.2.5.2。

  当以下所有条件均满足时，SRIS_Mode_Enabled 变量被置为 1b：
  - LinkUp = 0b
  - 端口中任何已配置通道在两个连续 TS2 Ordered Set 中的 SRIS Clocking bit（Symbol 4，bit 7）已置 1b。

  Retimer 允许延迟向 Configuration.Complete 的跃迁，详见 § 4.3.9。
- 若能利用任意一个接收通道子集（这些通道接收到两个连续的 TS1 Ordered Set，其携带相同的发送端非 PAD 链路号与任意非 PAD 通道号）形成一条已配置的链路，则以相同的非 PAD 链路号并分配新通道号发送 TS1 Ordered Set，下一状态为 Configuration.Lanenum.Wait。
  - 新分配的发送通道号必须从 0 到 m-1 连续编号，仅分配给那些正在接收非 PAD 通道号的通道的某一连续组（即未收到任何 TS1 Ordered Set 的通道会中断该连续组，不得纳入此组），必须包含通道 0 或通道 n-1（最大接收通道号）之一，且 m-1 必须等于或小于最大接收通道号 (n-1)。其余通道必须以链路号与通道号均置为 PAD 的 TS1 Ordered Set 进行发送。
  - 若任何可能的多通道链路在部分接收通道上出现 TS1 Ordered Set 错误、丢失 128b/130b 块对齐，或在使用 1b/1b 编码时丢失 Block/Flit 对齐，建议采取以下措施以避免配置出小于实际可用的链路宽度：

<a id="sec-4-2-7-3-3-2"></a>
## 4.2.7.3.3.2 Upstream Lanes | 上游通道

<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th width="50%">🇬🇧 English</th>
<th width="50%" style="background-color:#e8e8e8">🇨🇳 中文</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>

**IMPLEMENTATION NOTE:**
**CLOCKING WITH SRIS MODE VS. NON-SRIS MODE**

Clocking with SRIS mode vs. non-SRIS mode advertisement was added for Flit Mode support since there is no sync hdr in the 1b/1b encoding. It is advertised by the Downstream Port. However, it is defined as orthogonal to Flit Mode support. This note applies to the Downstream and Upstream Ports.

</td>
<td style="background-color:#e8e8e8">

**实现注意事项：**
**SRIS 模式与非 SRIS 模式的时钟通告**

之所以新增 SRIS 模式与非 SRIS 模式的时钟通告，是为了支持 Flit 模式 (Flit Mode)，因为 1b/1b 编码中不存在同步头 (sync hdr)。该通告由下游端口发出。但其定义与 Flit 模式支持相互独立。本说明同时适用于下游端口与上游端口。

</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

<!-- 📄 Page 520 -->
---


<div style="overflow-x: auto; max-width: 100%;">
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th width="50%">🇬🇧 English</th>
<th width="50%" style="background-color:#e8e8e8">🇨🇳 中文</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>

  - When using 8b/10b encoding, delay the evaluation listed above by an additional two or more TS1 Ordered Sets, but must not delay by more than 1 ms.
  - When using 128b/130b or 1b/1b encoding, delay the evaluation listed above by an additional 34 or more TS1 Ordered Sets, but must not delay by more than 1 ms.
- The next state is Detect if no Link can be configured or if all Lanes receive two consecutive TS1 Ordered Sets with Link and Lane numbers set to PAD.

In this sub-state, if use_modified_TS1_TS2_Ordered_Set variable is set to 1b:
- Transmitter must send Modified TS1 Ordered Sets instead of TS1 Ordered Sets
- Receiver must check for receipt of Modified TS1 Ordered Sets instead of TS1 Ordered Sets though it may receive TS1 Ordered Sets initially while the Link partner is transitioning to this sub-state [Note: These must be identical consecutive Modified TS1 Ordered Sets with valid parity in the last Symbol]
- The next state is Configuration.Lanenum.Accept if any of the Lanes that detected a Receiver during Detect receive two consecutive TS1 Ordered Sets which have a Lane number different from when the Lane first entered Configuration.Lanenum.Wait, and not all the Lanes' Link numbers are set to PAD or two consecutive TS1 Ordered Sets have been received on all Lanes, with Link and Lane numbers that match what is being transmitted on all Lanes.

The Upstream Lanes are permitted to delay up to 1 ms before transitioning to Configuration.Lanenum.Accept. The reason for delaying up to 1 ms before transitioning is to prevent received errors or skew between Lanes affecting the final configured Link width.

The condition of requiring reception of any Lane number different from when the Lane(s) first entered Configuration.Lanenum.Wait is necessary in order to allow the two Ports to settle on an agreed upon Link width. The exact meaning of the statement "any of the Lanes receive two consecutive TS1 Ordered Sets, which have a Lane number different from when the Lane first entered Configuration.Lanenum.Wait" requires that a Lane number must have changed from when the Lanes most recently entered Configuration.Lanenum.Wait before a transition to Configuration.Lanenum.Accept can occur.
- The next state is Detect after a 2 ms timeout or if all Lanes receive two consecutive TS1 Ordered Sets with Link and Lane numbers set to PAD.
- The next state is Configuration.Lanenum.Accept
  a. If any of the Lanes receive two consecutive TS1 Ordered Sets that have a Lane number different from when the Lane first entered Configuration.Lanenum.Wait, and not all the Lanes' Link numbers are set to PAD

  or

  b. If any Lane receives two consecutive TS2 Ordered Sets

</td>
<td style="background-color:#e8e8e8">

  - 使用 8b/10b 编码时，将上述评估额外延迟两个或更多 TS1 Ordered Set，但总延迟不得超过 1 ms。
  - 使用 128b/130b 编码或 1b/1b 编码时，将上述评估额外延迟 34 个或更多 TS1 Ordered Set，但总延迟不得超过 1 ms。
- 若无法配置链路，或所有通道均收到两个连续的、链路号与通道号均置为 PAD 的 TS1 Ordered Set，则下一状态为 Detect。

在本子状态中，若 use_modified_TS1_TS2_Ordered_Set 变量被置 1b：
- 发送器 (Transmitter) 必须发送 Modified TS1 Ordered Set 而非 TS1 Ordered Set。
- 接收器必须检查是否收到了 Modified TS1 Ordered Set 而非 TS1 Ordered Set，尽管在链路对端正在跃迁至本子状态时，初始阶段仍可能收到 TS1 Ordered Set [注：这些必须是最后 Symbol 具有有效奇偶校验的相同连续 Modified TS1 Ordered Set]。
- 若 Detect 期间检测到接收器的任意通道收到两个连续的 TS1 Ordered Set，且其通道号与该通道首次进入 Configuration.Lanenum.Wait 时的通道号不同，且并非所有通道的链路号均置为 PAD；或者所有通道均已接收到两个连续的 TS1 Ordered Set，且其链路号与通道号与所有通道上正在发送的内容匹配，则下一状态为 Configuration.Lanenum.Accept。

允许上游通道在跃迁至 Configuration.Lanenum.Accept 之前最多延迟 1 ms。延迟最多 1 ms 的原因在于防止接收错误或通道间偏移影响最终配置的链路宽度。

要求接收到的通道号与通道首次进入 Configuration.Lanenum.Wait 时的通道号不同这一条件，是为了让两个端口就一致的链路宽度达成共识所必需的。"任意通道接收到两个连续的 TS1 Ordered Set，且其通道号与该通道首次进入 Configuration.Lanenum.Wait 时的通道号不同"这一表述的准确含义是：在跃迁至 Configuration.Lanenum.Accept 之前，通道号必须相对最近一次进入 Configuration.Lanenum.Wait 时发生变化。
- 2 ms 超时之后，或所有通道均接收到两个连续的、链路号与通道号均置为 PAD 的 TS1 Ordered Set 时，下一状态为 Detect。
- 满足以下条件时，下一状态为 Configuration.Lanenum.Accept：
  a. 若任意通道接收到两个连续的 TS1 Ordered Set，且其通道号与该通道首次进入 Configuration.Lanenum.Wait 时的通道号不同，且并非所有通道的链路号均置为 PAD；

  或

  b. 若任意通道接收到两个连续的 TS2 Ordered Set。

</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
</div>

<a id="sec-4-2-7-3-4"></a>
## 4.2.7.3.4 Configuration.Lanenum.Wait | Configuration.Lanenum.Wait 子状态

<a id="sec-4-2-7-3-4-1"></a>
## 4.2.7.3.4.1 Downstream Lanes | 下游通道

<a id="sec-4-2-7-3-4-2"></a>
## 4.2.7.3.4.2 Upstream Lanes | 上游通道

<!-- 📄 Page 521 -->
---

<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th width="50%">🇬🇧 English</th>
<th width="50%" style="background-color:#e8e8e8">🇨🇳 中文</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>

- The next state is Detect after a 2 ms timeout or if all Lanes receive two consecutive TS1 Ordered Sets with Link and Lane numbers set to PAD.
- A Port is allowed to change the supported data rates that it advertises when it enters this substate, but it must not change those values while in this substate.
- If Flit_Mode_Enabled is 0b and LinkUp=1b, a Port is permitted to change the Upconfigure that it advertises when it enters this substate, but it must not change the value while in this substate.
- If Flit_Mode_Enabled is 1b and LinkUp=0b, a Port is permitted to change the L0p Capability that it advertises when it enters this substate, but it must not change the value while in this substate.
- In this sub-state, if use_modified_TS1_TS2_Ordered_Set variable is set to 1b:
  - Transmitter must send Modified TS2 Ordered sets instead of TS2 Ordered Sets
  - Receiver must check for receipt of Modified TS2 Ordered Sets, instead of TS2 Ordered Sets [Note: See § Section 4.2.5.1 for the definition of identical consecutive Modified TS1 Ordered Sets.]
- TS2 Ordered Sets are transmitted using Link and Lane numbers that match the received TS1 Ordered Set Link and Lane numbers.
  - The Link Upconfigure / L0p Capability bit of the TS2 Ordered Sets is permitted to be set to 1b to indicate that the Port is capable of supporting down to a x1 Link on the currently assigned Lane 0 and up-configuring the Link while LinkUp = 1b. Advertising this capability is optional.
- N_FTS must be noted for use in L0s when leaving this state.
- When using 8b/10b encoding, Lane-to-Lane de-skew must be completed when leaving this state.
- Scrambling is disabled if all configured Lanes have the Disable Scrambling bit asserted in two consecutively received TS2 Ordered Sets.
  - The Port that is sending the Disable Scrambling bit on all of the configured Lanes must also disable scrambling. Scrambling can only be disabled when using 8b/10b encoding.
- The next state is Configuration.Idle immediately after all Lanes that are transmitting TS2 Ordered Sets receive eight consecutive TS2 Ordered Sets with matching Lane and Link numbers (non-PAD) and identical data rate identifiers (including identical Link Upconfigure / L0p Capability bit(Symbol 4 bit 6)), and 16 TS2 Ordered Sets are sent after receiving one TS2 Ordered Set. Implementations with the Retimer Presence Detect Supported bit of the Link Capabilities 2 Register set to 1b must also receive the eight consecutive TS2 Ordered Sets with identical Retimer Present (Symbol 5 bit 4) when the data rate is 2.5 GT/s. Implementations with Two Retimers Presence Detect Supported bit of the Link Capabilities 2 Register set to 1b must also receive the eight consecutive TS2 Ordered Sets with identical Retimer Present (Symbol 5 bits 5:4) when the data rate is 2.5 GT/s.
  - If the data rate of operation is 2.5 GT/s:
    - If the Retimer Presence Detect Supported bit of the Link Capabilities 2 Register is set to 1b and any configured Lane received the Retimer Present bit set to 1b in the eight consecutively received TS2 Ordered Sets, then the Retimer Presence Detected bit must be set to 1b in the Link Status 2 Register otherwise the Retimer Presence Detected bit must be set to 0b.
    - If the Two Retimers Presence Detect Supported bit of the Link Capabilities 2 Register is set to 1b and any configured Lane received the Two Retimers Present bit set to 1b in the eight

</td>
<td style="background-color:#e8e8e8">

- 2 ms 超时之后，或所有通道均接收到两个连续的、链路号与通道号均置为 PAD 的 TS1 Ordered Set 时，下一状态为 Detect。
- 端口在进入本子状态时可以更改其所通告的所支持数据速率，但在本子状态期间不得更改这些值。
- 若 Flit_Mode_Enabled 为 0b 且 LinkUp=1b，则允许端口在进入本子状态时更改其通告的 Upconfigure 能力，但在本子状态期间不得更改该值。
- 若 Flit_Mode_Enabled 为 1b 且 LinkUp=0b，则允许端口在进入本子状态时更改其通告的 L0p Capability（L0p 能力），但在本子状态期间不得更改该值。
- 在本子状态中，若 use_modified_TS1_TS2_Ordered_Set 变量被置 1b：
  - 发送器必须发送 Modified TS2 Ordered Set 而非 TS2 Ordered Set。
  - 接收器必须检查是否收到了 Modified TS2 Ordered Set 而非 TS2 Ordered Set [注：相同连续 Modified TS1 Ordered Set 的定义见 § 4.2.5.1。]
- TS2 Ordered Set 的发送使用与所接收的 TS1 Ordered Set 的链路号与通道号相匹配的链路号与通道号。
  - 允许将 TS2 Ordered Set 的 Link Upconfigure / L0p Capability bit 置为 1b，以表示该端口能够在当前所分配的 Lane 0 上支持低至 x1 链路，并在 LinkUp = 1b 时上配置 (up-configure) 链路。是否通告该能力为可选项。
- 必须记录 N_FTS，以便在离开本状态进入 L0s 时使用。
- 使用 8b/10b 编码时，必须在离开本状态时完成通道间去歪斜 (Lane-to-Lane de-skew)。
- 若所有已配置通道在连续两个接收到的 TS2 Ordered Set 中均将 Disable Scrambling bit 置位，则禁用加扰 (Scrambling)。
  - 在所有已配置通道上发送 Disable Scrambling bit 的端口也必须禁用加扰。加扰仅在使用 8b/10b 编码时才可被禁用。
- 在所有正在发送 TS2 Ordered Set 的通道均接收到八个连续的、通道号与链路号（非 PAD）匹配且数据速率标识符相同（包括 Link Upconfigure / L0p Capability bit（Symbol 4 bit 6）相同）的 TS2 Ordered Set，且在收到一个 TS2 Ordered Set 之后已发送 16 个 TS2 Ordered Set 时，下一状态立即为 Configuration.Idle。对于 Link Capabilities 2 寄存器的 Retimer Presence Detect Supported bit 置 1b 的实现，在数据速率为 2.5 GT/s 时，还必须接收到八个连续的 Retimer Present（Symbol 5 bit 4）相同的 TS2 Ordered Set。对于 Link Capabilities 2 寄存器的 Two Retimers Presence Detect Supported bit 置 1b 的实现，在数据速率为 2.5 GT/s 时，还必须接收到八个连续的 Retimer Present（Symbol 5 bits 5:4）相同的 TS2 Ordered Set。
  - 若运行数据速率为 2.5 GT/s：
    - 若 Link Capabilities 2 寄存器的 Retimer Presence Detect Supported bit 被置 1b，且任何已配置通道在连续八个接收到的 TS2 Ordered Set 中收到了 Retimer Present bit 置 1b，则 Link Status 2 寄存器中的 Retimer Presence Detected bit 必须置 1b，否则该 bit 必须置 0b。
    - 若 Link Capabilities 2 寄存器的 Two Retimers Presence Detect Supported bit 被置 1b，且任何已配置通道在连续八个

</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

---

<a id="sec-4-2-7-3-5"></a>
## 4.2.7.3.5 Configuration.Complete | Configuration.Complete 子状态

<a id="sec-4-2-7-3-5-1"></a>
## 4.2.7.3.5.1 Downstream Lanes | 下游通道

<!-- 📄 Page 522 -->
---


<div style="overflow-x: auto; max-width: 100%;">
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th width="50%">🇬🇧 English</th>
<th width="50%" style="background-color:#e8e8e8">🇨🇳 中文</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>

consecutively received TS2 Ordered Sets then the Two Retimers Presence Detected bit must be set to 1b in the Link Status 2 Register, otherwise the Two Retimers Presence Detected bit must be set to 0b.
- If the device supports greater than 2.5 GT/s data rate, it must record the data rate identifier received on any configured Lane of the Link. This will override any previously recorded value. A variable to track speed change in recovery state, changed_speed_recovery, is reset to 0b.
- If Flit_Mode_Enabled is 0b:

  If the device sends TS2 Ordered Sets with the Link Upconfigure / L0p Capability bit (Symbol 4 bit 6) set to 1b, and receives eight consecutive TS2 Ordered Sets with the Link Upconfigure / L0p Capability bit set to 1b, the variable upconfigure_capable is set to 1b, else it is reset to 0b.
- If Flit_Mode_Enabled is 1b and LinkUp=0b:

  If the device sends TS2 Ordered Sets with the Link Upconfigure / L0p Capability bit (Symbol 4 bit 6) set to 1b, and receives eight consecutive TS2 Ordered Sets with the Link Upconfigure / L0p Capability bit set to 1b:
  - The variable L0p_capable is set to 1b.
  - The Remote L0p Supported bit in the Device Status 3 Register is set to 1b.
- All remaining Lanes that are not part of the configured Link are no longer associated with the LTSSM in progress and must:
  i. Be associated with a new LTSSM if this optional feature is supported.

  or

  ii. All Lanes that cannot be associated with an optional new LTSSM must transition to Electrical Idle.<sup>82</sup> Those Lanes that formed a Link up to the L0 state, and LinkUp has been 1b since then, but are not a part of the currently configured Link, must be associated with the same LTSSM if the LTSSM advertises Link width upconfigure capability. It is recommended that the Receiver terminations of these Lanes be left on. If they are not left on, they must be turned on when the LTSSM enters the Recovery.RcvrCfg substate until it reaches the Configuration.Complete substate if upconfigure_capable is set to 1b to allow for potential Link width upconfiguration. Any Lane that was not part of the LTSSM during the initial Link training through L0 cannot become a part of the LTSSM as part of the Link width upconfiguration process.
  - In the case of an optional crosslink, the Receiver terminations are required to meet ZRX-HIGH-IMP-DC-POS and ZRX-HIGH-IMP-DC-NEG (see § Table 8-12).
  - These Lanes must be re-associated with the LTSSM immediately after the LTSSM in progress transitions back to Detect.
  - An EIOS does not need to be sent before transitioning to Electrical Idle, and the transition to Electrical Idle does not need to occur on a Symbol or Ordered Set boundary.
- After a 2 ms timeout:
  - The next state is Detect if the current data rate is 2.5 GT/s or 5.0 GT/s.
  - The next state is Configuration.Idle if the idle_to_rlock_transitioned variable is less than FFh and the current data rate is 8.0 GT/s or higher.
    i. The changed_speed_recovery variable is reset to 0b.

</td>
<td style="background-color:#e8e8e8">

连续接收到的 TS2 Ordered Set 中收到了 Two Retimers Present bit 置 1b，则 Link Status 2 寄存器中的 Two Retimers Presence Detected bit 必须置 1b，否则该 bit 必须置 0b。
- 若设备支持高于 2.5 GT/s 的数据速率，则必须记录在链路的任何已配置通道上接收到的数据速率标识符。该值将覆盖此前记录的所有值。用于跟踪 Recovery 状态中速率变更的变量 changed_speed_recovery 被复位为 0b。
- 若 Flit_Mode_Enabled 为 0b：

  若设备发送的 TS2 Ordered Set 中 Link Upconfigure / L0p Capability bit（Symbol 4 bit 6）置 1b，且接收到八个连续的 Link Upconfigure / L0p Capability bit 置 1b 的 TS2 Ordered Set，则变量 upconfigure_capable 被置 1b，否则被复位为 0b。
- 若 Flit_Mode_Enabled 为 1b 且 LinkUp=0b：

  若设备发送的 TS2 Ordered Set 中 Link Upconfigure / L0p Capability bit（Symbol 4 bit 6）置 1b，且接收到八个连续的 Link Upconfigure / L0p Capability bit 置 1b 的 TS2 Ordered Set：
  - 变量 L0p_capable 被置 1b。
  - Device Status 3 寄存器中的 Remote L0p Supported bit 被置 1b。
- 其余所有不属于已配置链路的通道不再与正在进行的 LTSSM (链路训练与状态机) 关联，并且必须：
  i. 若支持此可选特性，则与一个新的 LTSSM 关联。

  或

  ii. 任何无法与可选的新 LTSSM 关联的通道必须跃迁至电气空闲 (Electrical Idle)。<sup>82</sup> 那些此前曾经形成过链路进入 L0 状态、且自此 LinkUp 一直为 1b、但并不属于当前已配置链路的通道，若 LTSSM 通告具有链路宽度上配置能力，则必须与同一 LTSSM 关联。建议保持这些通道接收器端接 (Receiver termination) 处于开启状态。若未保持开启，则当 upconfigure_capable 置 1b 时，必须在 LTSSM 进入 Recovery.RcvrCfg 子状态时将其打开，直至到达 Configuration.Complete 子状态，以允许潜在的链路宽度上配置。在初始链路训练至 L0 期间不属于该 LTSSM 的任何通道，均不能在链路宽度上配置过程中成为该 LTSSM 的一部分。
  - 在可选 crosslink 情况下，接收器端接必须满足 ZRX-HIGH-IMP-DC-POS 与 ZRX-HIGH-IMP-DC-NEG（见 § 表 8-12）。
  - 这些通道必须在正在进行的 LTSSM 跃迁回 Detect 之后立即重新与该 LTSSM 关联。
  - 在跃迁至电气空闲之前无需发送 EIOS，且向电气空闲的跃迁也无需发生在 Symbol 或 Ordered Set 边界。
- 2 ms 超时之后：
  - 若当前数据速率为 2.5 GT/s 或 5.0 GT/s，则下一状态为 Detect。
  - 若 idle_to_rlock_transitioned 变量小于 FFh 且当前数据速率为 8.0 GT/s 或更高，则下一状态为 Configuration.Idle。
    i. 变量 changed_speed_recovery 被复位为 0b。

</tr>

<sup>82</sup> The common mode being driven does not need to meet the Absolute Delta Between DC Common Mode During L0 and Electrical Idle (VTX-CM-DC-ACTIVE-IDLE-DELTA) specification (see § Table 8-7).

<td>

  ii. Lanes that are not part of the configured Link are no longer associated with the LTSSM in progress and must meet requirement (i) or (ii) specified above for the non-timeout transition to Configuration.Idle.
  iii. The upconfigure_capable variable is permitted, but not required, to be updated if at least one Lane received eight consecutive TS2 Ordered Sets with matching Lane and Link numbers (non-PAD). If updated, the upconfigure_capable variable is set to 1b when the transmitted and received Link Upconfigure bits are 1b, else it is reset to 0b.
- Else the next state is Detect.
- TS2 Ordered Sets are transmitted using Link and Lane numbers that match the received TS2 Link and Lane numbers.
  - The Link Upconfigure / L0p Capability bit of the TS2 Ordered Sets is permitted to be set to 1b to indicate that the Port is capable of supporting a x1 Link on the currently assigned Lane 0 and up-configuring the Link while LinkUp = 1b. Advertising this capability is optional.
- N_FTS must be noted for use in L0s when leaving this state.
- When using 8b/10b encoding, Lane-to-Lane de-skew must be completed when leaving this state.
- Scrambling is disabled if all configured Lanes have the Disable Scrambling bit asserted in two consecutively received TS2 Ordered Sets.
  - The Port that is sending the Disable Scrambling bit on all of the configured Lanes must also disable scrambling. Scrambling can only be disabled when using 8b/10b encoding.
- The next state is Configuration.Idle immediately after all Lanes that are transmitting TS2 Ordered Sets receive eight consecutive TS2 Ordered Sets with matching Lane and Link numbers (non-PAD) and identical data rate identifiers (including identical Link Upconfigure / L0p Capability bit (Symbol 4 bit 6)), and 16 consecutive TS2 Ordered Sets are sent after receiving one TS2 Ordered Set. Implementations with the Retimer Presence Detect Supported bit of the Link Capabilities 2 Register set to 1b must also receive the eight consecutive TS2 Ordered Sets with identical Retimer Present (Symbol 5 bit 4) when the data rate is 2.5 GT/s. Implementations with Two Retimers Presence Detect Supported bit of the Link Capabilities 2 Register set to 1b must also receive the eight consecutive TS2 Ordered Sets with identical Retimer Present (Symbol 5 bits 5:4) when the data rate is 2.5 GT/s.
  - If the data rate of operation is 2.5 GT/s:
    - If the Retimer Presence Detect Supported bit of the Link Capabilities 2 Register is set to 1b and any configured Lane received the Retimer Present bit set to 1b in the eight consecutively received TS2 Ordered Sets, then the Retimer Presence Detected bit must be set to 1b in the Link Status 2 Register otherwise the Retimer Presence Detected bit must be set to 0b.
    - If the Two Retimers Presence Detect Supported bit of the Link Capabilities 2 Register is set to 1b and any configured Lane received the Two Retimers Present bit set to 1b in the eight consecutively received TS2 Ordered Sets then the Two Retimers Presence Detected bit must be set to 1b in the Link Status 2 Register, otherwise the Two Retimers Presence Detected bit must be set to 0b.
  - If the device supports greater than 2.5 GT/s data rate, it must record the data rate identifier received on any configured Lane of the Link. This will override any previously recorded value. A variable to track speed change in recovery state, changed_speed_recovery, is reset to 0b.
  - If Flit_Mode_Enabled is 0b:

</td>
<td style="background-color:#e8e8e8">

  ii. 不属于已配置链路的通道不再与正在进行的 LTSSM 关联，并且必须满足上文针对非超时跃迁至 Configuration.Idle 时所规定的要求 (i) 或 (ii)。
  iii. 若至少有一个通道接收到八个连续的、通道号与链路号（非 PAD）匹配的 TS2 Ordered Set，则允许（但非必须）更新 upconfigure_capable 变量。若更新，当发送与接收的 Link Upconfigure bit 均为 1b 时，upconfigure_capable 被置 1b，否则被复位为 0b。
- 否则，下一状态为 Detect。
- TS2 Ordered Set 的发送使用与所接收的 TS2 链路号与通道号相匹配的链路号与通道号。
  - 允许将 TS2 Ordered Set 的 Link Upconfigure / L0p Capability bit 置为 1b，以表示该端口能够在当前所分配的 Lane 0 上支持 x1 链路，并在 LinkUp = 1b 时上配置 (up-configure) 链路。是否通告该能力为可选项。
- 必须记录 N_FTS，以便在离开本状态进入 L0s 时使用。
- 使用 8b/10b 编码时，必须在离开本状态时完成通道间去歪斜。
- 若所有已配置通道在连续两个接收到的 TS2 Ordered Set 中均将 Disable Scrambling bit 置位，则禁用加扰。
  - 在所有已配置通道上发送 Disable Scrambling bit 的端口也必须禁用加扰。加扰仅在使用 8b/10b 编码时才可被禁用。
- 在所有正在发送 TS2 Ordered Set 的通道均接收到八个连续的、通道号与链路号（非 PAD）匹配且数据速率标识符相同（包括 Link Upconfigure / L0p Capability bit（Symbol 4 bit 6）相同）的 TS2 Ordered Set，且在收到一个 TS2 Ordered Set 之后已发送 16 个连续的 TS2 Ordered Set 时，下一状态立即为 Configuration.Idle。对于 Link Capabilities 2 寄存器的 Retimer Presence Detect Supported bit 置 1b 的实现，在数据速率为 2.5 GT/s 时，还必须接收到八个连续的 Retimer Present（Symbol 5 bit 4）相同的 TS2 Ordered Set。对于 Link Capabilities 2 寄存器的 Two Retimers Presence Detect Supported bit 置 1b 的实现，在数据速率为 2.5 GT/s 时，还必须接收到八个连续的 Retimer Present（Symbol 5 bits 5:4）相同的 TS2 Ordered Set。
  - 若运行数据速率为 2.5 GT/s：
    - 若 Link Capabilities 2 寄存器的 Retimer Presence Detect Supported bit 被置 1b，且任何已配置通道在连续八个接收到的 TS2 Ordered Set 中收到了 Retimer Present bit 置 1b，则 Link Status 2 寄存器中的 Retimer Presence Detected bit 必须置 1b，否则该 bit 必须置 0b。
    - 若 Link Capabilities 2 寄存器的 Two Retimers Presence Detect Supported bit 被置 1b，且任何已配置通道在连续八个接收到的 TS2 Ordered Set 中收到了 Two Retimers Present bit 置 1b，则 Link Status 2 寄存器中的 Two Retimers Presence Detected bit 必须置 1b，否则该 bit 必须置 0b。
  - 若设备支持高于 2.5 GT/s 的数据速率，则必须记录在链路的任何已配置通道上接收到的数据速率标识符。该值将覆盖此前记录的所有值。用于跟踪 Recovery 状态中速率变更的变量 changed_speed_recovery 被复位为 0b。
  - 若 Flit_Mode_Enabled 为 0b：

<a id="sec-4-2-7-3-5-2"></a>
## 4.2.7.3.5.2 Upstream Lanes | 上游通道

<!-- 📄 Page 524 -->
---

<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th width="50%">🇬🇧 English</th>
<th width="50%" style="background-color:#e8e8e8">🇨🇳 中文</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>

  If the device sends TS2 Ordered Sets with the Link Upconfigure / L0p Capability bit (Symbol 4 bit 6) set to 1b, as well as receives eight consecutive TS2 Ordered Sets with the Link Upconfigure / L0p Capability bit set to 1b, the variable upconfigure_capable is set to 1b, else it is reset to 0b.
- If Flit_Mode_Enabled is 1b and LinkUp=0b:

  If the device sends TS2 Ordered Sets with the Link Upconfigure / L0p Capability bit (Symbol 4 bit 6) set to 1b, and receives eight consecutive TS2 Ordered Sets with the Link Upconfigure / L0p Capability bit set to 1b:
  - The variable L0p_capable is set to 1b.
  - The Remote L0p Supported bit in the Device Status 3 Register is set to 1b.
- All remaining Lanes that are not part of the configured Link are no longer associated with the LTSSM in progress and must:
  i. Optionally be associated with a new crosslink LTSSM if this feature is supported.

  or

  ii. All remaining Lanes that are not associated with a new crosslink LTSSM must transition to Electrical Idle,<sup>83</sup> and Receiver terminations are required to meet ZRX-HIGH-IMP-DC-POS and ZRX-HIGH-IMP-DC-NEG (see § Table 8-12). Those Lanes that formed a Link up to the L0 state, and LinkUp has been 1b since then, but are not a part of the currently configured Link, must be associated with the same LTSSM if the LTSSM advertises Link width upconfigure capability. It is recommended that the Receiver terminations of these Lanes be left on. If they are not left on, they must be turned on when the LTSSM enters the Recovery.RcvrCfg substate until it reaches the Configuration.Complete substate if upconfigure_capable is set to 1b to allow for potential Link width upconfiguration. Any Lane that was not part of the LTSSM during the initial Link training through L0 cannot become a part of the LTSSM as part of the Link width upconfiguration process.
  - These Lanes must be re-associated with the LTSSM immediately after the LTSSM in progress transitions back to Detect.
  - EIOS does not need to be sent before transitioning to Electrical Idle, and the transition to Electrical Idle does not need to occur on a Symbol or Ordered Set boundary.
- After a 2 ms timeout:
  - The next state is Detect if the current data rate is 2.5 GT/s or 5.0 GT/s.
  - The next state is Configuration.Idle if the idle_to_rlock_transitioned variable is less than FFh and the current data rate is 8.0 GT/s or higher.
    i. The changed_speed_recovery variable is reset to 0b.
    ii. Lanes that are not part of the configured Link are no longer associated with the LTSSM in progress and must meet requirement (i) or (ii) specified above for the non-timeout transition to Configuration.Idle.
    iii. The upconfigure_capable variable is permitted, but not required, to be updated if at least one Lane received eight consecutive TS2 Ordered Sets with matching Lane and Link numbers (non-PAD). If updated, the upconfigure_capable variable is set to 1b when the transmitted and received Link Upconfigure bits are 1b, else it is reset to 0b.
- Else the next state is Detect.

</td>
<td style="background-color:#e8e8e8">

  若设备发送的 TS2 Ordered Set 中 Link Upconfigure / L0p Capability bit（Symbol 4 bit 6）置 1b，并且接收到八个连续的 Link Upconfigure / L0p Capability bit 置 1b 的 TS2 Ordered Set，则变量 upconfigure_capable 被置 1b，否则被复位为 0b。
- 若 Flit_Mode_Enabled 为 1b 且 LinkUp=0b：

  若设备发送的 TS2 Ordered Set 中 Link Upconfigure / L0p Capability bit（Symbol 4 bit 6）置 1b，且接收到八个连续的 Link Upconfigure / L0p Capability bit 置 1b 的 TS2 Ordered Set：
  - 变量 L0p_capable 被置 1b。
  - Device Status 3 寄存器中的 Remote L0p Supported bit 被置 1b。
- 其余所有不属于已配置链路的通道不再与正在进行的 LTSSM 关联，并且必须：
  i. 若支持 crosslink 特性，可选择与一个新的 crosslink LTSSM 关联。

  或

  ii. 所有未与新 crosslink LTSSM 关联的其余通道必须跃迁至电气空闲，<sup>83</sup> 且接收器端接必须满足 ZRX-HIGH-IMP-DC-POS 与 ZRX-HIGH-IMP-DC-NEG（见 § 表 8-12）。那些此前曾经形成过链路进入 L0 状态、且自此 LinkUp 一直为 1b、但并不属于当前已配置链路的通道，若 LTSSM 通告具有链路宽度上配置能力，则必须与同一 LTSSM 关联。建议保持这些通道接收器端接处于开启状态。若未保持开启，则当 upconfigure_capable 置 1b 时，必须在 LTSSM 进入 Recovery.RcvrCfg 子状态时将其打开，直至到达 Configuration.Complete 子状态，以允许潜在的链路宽度上配置。在初始链路训练至 L0 期间不属于该 LTSSM 的任何通道，均不能在链路宽度上配置过程中成为该 LTSSM 的一部分。
  - 这些通道必须在正在进行的 LTSSM 跃迁回 Detect 之后立即重新与该 LTSSM 关联。
  - 在跃迁至电气空闲之前无需发送 EIOS，且向电气空闲的跃迁也无需发生在 Symbol 或 Ordered Set 边界。
- 2 ms 超时之后：
  - 若当前数据速率为 2.5 GT/s 或 5.0 GT/s，则下一状态为 Detect。
  - 若 idle_to_rlock_transitioned 变量小于 FFh 且当前数据速率为 8.0 GT/s 或更高，则下一状态为 Configuration.Idle。
    i. 变量 changed_speed_recovery 被复位为 0b。
    ii. 不属于已配置链路的通道不再与正在进行的 LTSSM 关联，并且必须满足上文针对非超时跃迁至 Configuration.Idle 时所规定的要求 (i) 或 (ii)。
    iii. 若至少有一个通道接收到八个连续的、通道号与链路号（非 PAD）匹配的 TS2 Ordered Set，则允许（但非必须）更新 upconfigure_capable 变量。若更新，当发送与接收的 Link Upconfigure bit 均为 1b 时，upconfigure_capable 被置 1b，否则被复位为 0b。
- 否则，下一状态为 Detect。

</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

<sup>83</sup> The common mode being driven does not need to meet the Absolute Delta Between DC Common Mode During L0 and Electrical Idle (VTX-CM-DC-ACTIVE-IDLE-DELTA) specification (see § Table 8-7).

<thead>
<tr>
<th width="50%">🇬🇧 English</th>
<th width="50%" style="background-color:#e8e8e8">🇨🇳 中文</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>

<sup>83</sup> The common mode being driven does not need to meet the Absolute Delta Between DC Common Mode During L0 and Electrical Idle (VTX-CM-DC-ACTIVE-IDLE-DELTA) specification (see § Table 8-7).

</td>
<td style="background-color:#e8e8e8">

<sup>83</sup> 所驱动的共模电压无需满足 L0 与电气空闲 (Electrical Idle) 之间直流共模绝对差 (VTX-CM-DC-ACTIVE-IDLE-DELTA) 的规范（见 § 表 8-7）。

</td>
</tr>

<!-- 📄 Page 525 -->

<div style="overflow-x: auto; max-width: 100%;">
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th width="50%">🇬🇧 English</th>
<th width="50%" style="background-color:#e8e8e8">🇨🇳 中文</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>

- When using 8b/10b encoding, the Transmitter sends Idle data Symbols on all configured Lanes in Non-Flit Mode and IDLE Flits across all configured Lanes in Flit Mode.
- If LinkUp = 0b and 64.0 GT/s data rate is supported by all components in the Link, as advertised in the eight consecutive TS2 or eight consecutive and identical Modified TS2 Ordered Sets received prior to entering Configuration.Idle:
  - If the No Equalization Needed bit (bit 1 of Symbol 5) was set to 1b in the received eight consecutive and identical Modified TS2 Ordered Sets and in the transmitted Modified TS2 Ordered Sets in all the configured Lanes of the Link or if No Equalization Needed value (10b) was received in the Enhanced Link Behavior Control field (bits 7:6 of Symbol 5) in the eight consecutive TS2 Ordered Sets and was also set in the Enhanced Link Behavior Control field of the transmitted TS2 Ordered Sets:
    - The equalization_done_8GT_data_rate, equalization_done_16GT_data_rate, equalization_done_32GT_data_rate, and equalization_done_64GT_data_rate variables are each set to 1b.
    - The No Equalization Needed Received bit in the 64.0 GT/s Status Register is set to 1b.
  - Else If the Equalization Bypass to Highest NRZ Rate bit (bit 0 of Symbol 5) was set to 1b in the received eight consecutive and identical Modified TS2 Ordered Sets as well as in the transmitted Modified TS2 Ordered Sets in all the configured Lanes of the Link or if either No Equalization Needed or Equalization Bypass to Highest NRZ Rate value (01b or 10b) was received in the Enhanced Link Behavior Control field (bits 7:6 of Symbol 5) in the eight consecutive TS2 Ordered Sets and either No Equalization Needed or Equalization Bypass to Highest NRZ Rate value (01b or 10b) was also set in the Enhanced Link Behavior Control field of the transmitted TS2 Ordered Sets:
    - The equalization_done_8GT_data_rate and equalization_done_16GT_data_rate variables are each set to 1b.
  - If entry to this sub-state was caused by receipt of eight consecutive and identical Modified TS2 Ordered Sets and LinkUp = 0b
    - If the Modified TS Usage field in the received eight consecutive Modified TS2 Ordered Sets was set to 010b (Alternate Protocols) and the same value was set in the Modified TS Usage field of the transmitted Modified TS2 Ordered Sets and the Modified TS Information 1 and Alternate Protocol Vendor ID fields are identical between the transmitted and received Modified TS2 Ordered Sets in all the configured Lanes of the Link:
      - The Modified TS Received bit in the 32.0 GT/s Status Register is set to 1b. The details of the negotiation will be reflected in the Received Modified TS Data 1 Register and Received Modified TS Data 2 Register based on the eight consecutive Modified TS2 Ordered Sets received.
- If LinkUp = 0b and 32.0 GT/s data rate is supported by all components in the Link, as advertised in the eight consecutive TS2 or eight consecutive and identical Modified TS2 Ordered Sets received prior to entering Configuration.Idle:
  - If the No Equalization Needed bit (bit 1 of Symbol 5) was set to 1b in the received eight consecutive and identical Modified TS2 Ordered Sets and was also set in the transmitted Modified TS2 Ordered Sets in all the configured Lanes of the Link or if No Equalization Needed value (10b) was received in the Enhanced Link Behavior Control field (bits 7:6 of Symbol 5) in the eight consecutive TS2 Ordered Sets and was also set in the Enhanced Link Behavior Control field of the transmitted TS2 Ordered Sets:
    - The equalization_done_8GT_data_rate, equalization_done_16GT_data_rate, and equalization_done_32GT_data_rate variables are each set to 1b.

</td>
<td style="background-color:#e8e8e8">

- 使用 8b/10b 编码时，发送器在非 Flit 模式 (Non-Flit Mode) 下在所有已配置通道上发送 Idle 数据 Symbol；在 Flit 模式下在所有已配置通道上发送 IDLE Flit。
- 若 LinkUp = 0b 且链路上所有组件均支持 64.0 GT/s 数据速率（依据进入 Configuration.Idle 之前接收到的八个连续 TS2 或八个连续且相同的 Modified TS2 Ordered Set 的通告）：
  - 若在接收到的八个连续且相同的 Modified TS2 Ordered Set 以及链路所有已配置通道上发送的 Modified TS2 Ordered Set 中，No Equalization Needed bit（Symbol 5 bit 1）均被置 1b；或在八个连续 TS2 Ordered Set 的 Enhanced Link Behavior Control 字段（Symbol 5 bits 7:6）中收到 No Equalization Needed 值（10b），且在发送的 TS2 Ordered Set 的 Enhanced Link Behavior Control 字段中也设置了该值：
    - 变量 equalization_done_8GT_data_rate、equalization_done_16GT_data_rate、equalization_done_32GT_data_rate 与 equalization_done_64GT_data_rate 均被置 1b。
    - 64.0 GT/s Status 寄存器中的 No Equalization Needed Received bit 被置 1b。
  - 否则，若在接收到的八个连续且相同的 Modified TS2 Ordered Set 以及链路所有已配置通道上发送的 Modified TS2 Ordered Set 中，Equalization Bypass to Highest NRZ Rate bit（Symbol 5 bit 0）均被置 1b；或在八个连续 TS2 Ordered Set 的 Enhanced Link Behavior Control 字段（Symbol 5 bits 7:6）中收到 No Equalization Needed 或 Equalization Bypass to Highest NRZ Rate 值（01b 或 10b），且在发送的 TS2 Ordered Set 的 Enhanced Link Behavior Control 字段中也设置了 No Equalization Needed 或 Equalization Bypass to Highest NRZ Rate 值（01b 或 10b）：
    - 变量 equalization_done_8GT_data_rate 与 equalization_done_16GT_data_rate 均被置 1b。
  - 若进入本子状态是因接收到八个连续且相同的 Modified TS2 Ordered Set 且 LinkUp = 0b 所致：
    - 若接收到的八个连续 Modified TS2 Ordered Set 的 Modified TS Usage 字段被设置为 010b（替代协议 Alternate Protocols），且发送的 Modified TS2 Ordered Set 的 Modified TS Usage 字段也设置为相同值，并且链路所有已配置通道上的发送与接收 Modified TS2 Ordered Set 中的 Modified TS Information 1 和 Alternate Protocol Vendor ID 字段均相同：
      - 32.0 GT/s Status 寄存器中的 Modified TS Received bit 被置 1b。协商的具体细节将基于接收到的八个连续 Modified TS2 Ordered Set，反映在 Received Modified TS Data 1 寄存器与 Received Modified TS Data 2 寄存器中。
- 若 LinkUp = 0b 且链路上所有组件均支持 32.0 GT/s 数据速率（依据进入 Configuration.Idle 之前接收到的八个连续 TS2 或八个连续且相同的 Modified TS2 Ordered Set 的通告）：
  - 若在接收到的八个连续且相同的 Modified TS2 Ordered Set 中，No Equalization Needed bit（Symbol 5 bit 1）被置 1b，且在链路所有已配置通道上发送的 Modified TS2 Ordered Set 中也设置了该 bit；或在八个连续 TS2 Ordered Set 的 Enhanced Link Behavior Control 字段（Symbol 5 bits 7:6）中收到 No Equalization Needed 值（10b），且在发送的 TS2 Ordered Set 的 Enhanced Link Behavior Control 字段中也设置了该值：
    - 变量 equalization_done_8GT_data_rate、equalization_done_16GT_data_rate 与 equalization_done_32GT_data_rate 均被置 1b。

</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
</div>

<a id="sec-4-2-7-3-6"></a>
## 4.2.7.3.6 Configuration.Idle | Configuration.Idle 子状态

<!-- 📄 Page 526 -->
---

<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th width="50%">🇬🇧 English</th>
<th width="50%" style="background-color:#e8e8e8">🇨🇳 中文</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>

- The No Equalization Needed Received bit in the 32.0 GT/s Status Register is set to 1b.
- Else If the Equalization Bypass to Highest NRZ Rate bit (bit 0 of Symbol 5) was set to 1b in the received eight consecutive and identical Modified TS2 Ordered Sets and was also set in the transmitted Modified TS2 Ordered Sets in all the configured Lanes of the Link or if either No Equalization Needed or Equalization Bypass to Highest NRZ Rate value (01b or 10b) was received in the Enhanced Link Behavior Control field (bits 7:6 of Symbol 5) in the eight consecutive TS2 Ordered Sets and either No Equalization Needed or Equalization Bypass to Highest NRZ Rate value (01b or 10b) was also set in the Enhanced Link Behavior Control field of the transmitted TS2 Ordered Sets:
  - The equalization_done_8GT_data_rate and equalization_done_16GT_data_rate variables are each set to 1b.
- If entry to this sub-state was caused by receipt of eight consecutive and identical Modified TS2 Ordered Sets and LinkUp = 0b
  - If the Modified TS Usage field in the received eight consecutive Modified TS2 Ordered Sets was set to 010b (Alternate Protocols) and the same value was set in the Modified TS Usage field of the transmitted Modified TS2 Ordered Sets and the Modified TS Information 1 and Alternate Protocol Vendor ID fields are identical between the transmitted and received Modified TS2 Ordered Sets in all the configured Lanes of the Link:
    - The Modified TS Received bit in the 32.0 GT/s Status Register is set to 1b. The details of the negotiation will be reflected in the Received Modified TS Data 1 Register and Received Modified TS Data 2 Register based on the eight consecutive modified TS2 Ordered Sets received.
- When using 128b/130b encoding in Non-Flit Mode:
  - If the data rate is 8.0 GT/s, the Transmitter sends one SDS Ordered Set on all configured Lanes to start a Data Stream and then sends Idle data Symbols on all configured Lanes. The first Idle data Symbol transmitted on Lane 0 is the first Symbol of the Data Stream.
  - If the data rate is 16.0 GT/s or higher, the Transmitter sends one Control SKP Ordered Set followed immediately by one SDS Ordered Set on all configured Lanes to start a Data Stream and then sends Idle data Symbols on all configured Lanes. The first Idle data Symbol transmitted on Lane 0 is the first Symbol of the Data Stream.
- When using 1b/1b encoding or 128b/130b encoding in Flit Mode:
  - Transmitter sends an SDS Ordered Set sequence followed by one Control SKP Ordered Set on all configured Lanes to start a Data Stream with IDLE Flits.
- Receiver waits for Idle data in Non-Flit Mode and for IDLE Flits in Flit Mode.
- LinkUp = 1b
- When using 8b/10b encoding in Non-Flit Mode, the next state is L0 if eight consecutive Symbol Times of Idle data are received on all configured Lanes and 16 Idle data Symbols are sent after receiving one Idle data Symbol.
  - If software has written a 1b to the Retrain Link bit in the Link Control Register since the last transition to L0 from Recovery or Configuration, the Downstream Port must set the Link Bandwidth Management Status bit of the Link Status Register to 1b.
  - The use_modified_TS1_TS2_Ordered_Set variable is reset to 0b on transition to L0.
- When using 128b/130b encoding in Non-Flit Mode, next state is L0 if eight consecutive Symbol Times of Idle data are received on all configured Lanes, 16 Idle data Symbols are sent after receiving one Idle data Symbol, and this state was not entered by a timeout from Configuration.Complete.
  - The Idle data Symbols must be received in Data Blocks.
  - Lane-to-Lane de-skew must be completed before Data Stream processing starts.

</td>
<td style="background-color:#e8e8e8">

- 32.0 GT/s Status 寄存器中的 No Equalization Needed Received 比特被置为 1b。
- 否则，若 Equalization Bypass to Highest NRZ Rate 比特（Symbol 5 的 bit 0）在接收到的 8 个连续且相同的 Modified TS2 Ordered Set 中被置为 1b，且在链路 (Link) 所有已配置通道 (Lane) 发送的 Modified TS2 Ordered Set 中也已被置 1b；或者在 8 个连续 TS2 Ordered Set 的 Enhanced Link Behavior Control 字段（Symbol 5 的 bits 7:6）中收到了 No Equalization Needed 或 Equalization Bypass to Highest NRZ Rate 的值（01b 或 10b），且发送的 TS2 Ordered Set 的 Enhanced Link Behavior Control 字段中也已置入 No Equalization Needed 或 Equalization Bypass to Highest NRZ Rate 的值（01b 或 10b）：
  - equalization_done_8GT_data_rate 与 equalization_done_16GT_data_rate 变量均被置为 1b。
- 若进入本子状态是由于收到了 8 个连续且相同的 Modified TS2 Ordered Set，且 LinkUp = 0b
  - 若接收到的 8 个连续 Modified TS2 Ordered Set 中的 Modified TS Usage 字段被置为 010b（Alternate Protocols），且发送的 Modified TS2 Ordered Set 中 Modified TS Usage 字段也被置为相同值，且在链路所有已配置通道上发送与接收的 Modified TS2 Ordered Set 中的 Modified TS Information 1 与 Alternate Protocol Vendor ID 字段均相同：
    - 32.0 GT/s Status 寄存器中的 Modified TS Received 比特被置为 1b。协商的细节将根据所接收到的 8 个连续 modified TS2 Ordered Set，反映在 Received Modified TS Data 1 寄存器与 Received Modified TS Data 2 寄存器中。
- 在非 Flit 模式 (Non-Flit Mode) 下使用 128b/130b 编码时：
  - 若数据速率为 8.0 GT/s，发送器 (Transmitter) 在所有已配置通道上发送一个 SDS Ordered Set 以启动 Data Stream，随后在所有已配置通道上发送 Idle data Symbol。Lane 0 上发送的第一个 Idle data Symbol 即为 Data Stream 的第一个 Symbol。
  - 若数据速率为 16.0 GT/s 或更高，发送器在所有已配置通道上发送一个 Control SKP Ordered Set 后紧接发送一个 SDS Ordered Set 以启动 Data Stream，随后在所有已配置通道上发送 Idle data Symbol。Lane 0 上发送的第一个 Idle data Symbol 即为 Data Stream 的第一个 Symbol。
- 在 Flit 模式 (Flit Mode) 下使用 1b/1b 编码或 128b/130b 编码时：
  - 发送器在所有已配置通道上发送一个 SDS Ordered Set 序列后紧接发送一个 Control SKP Ordered Set，以启动包含 IDLE Flit 的 Data Stream。
- 接收器 (Receiver) 在非 Flit 模式下等待 Idle data，在 Flit 模式下等待 IDLE Flit。
- LinkUp = 1b
- 在非 Flit 模式下使用 8b/10b 编码时，若在所有已配置通道上接收到 8 个连续 Symbol Time 的 Idle data，且在接收到一个 Idle data Symbol 后发送了 16 个 Idle data Symbol，则下一状态为 L0。
  - 若自上一次从 Recovery 或 Configuration 向 L0 的跃迁以来，软件已向 Link Control 寄存器的 Retrain Link 比特写入 1b，则下游端口 (Downstream Port) 必须将 Link Status 寄存器的 Link Bandwidth Management Status 比特置为 1b。
  - 在向 L0 跃迁时，use_modified_TS1_TS2_Ordered_Set 变量被复位为 0b。
- 在非 Flit 模式下使用 128b/130b 编码时，若在所有已配置通道上接收到 8 个连续 Symbol Time 的 Idle data，且在接收到一个 Idle data Symbol 后发送了 16 个 Idle data Symbol，并且本状态并非因 Configuration.Complete 的超时而进入，则下一状态为 L0。
  - Idle data Symbol 必须以 Data Block 形式接收。
  - 在 Data Stream 处理开始之前，必须完成 Lane-to-Lane de-skew。

</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

<!-- 📄 Page 527 -->
---


<div style="overflow-x: auto; max-width: 100%;">
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th width="50%">🇬🇧 English</th>
<th width="50%" style="background-color:#e8e8e8">🇨🇳 中文</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>

- If software has written a 1b to the Retrain Link bit in the Link Control Register since the last transition to L0 from Recovery or Configuration, the Downstream Port must set the Link Bandwidth Management Status bit of the Link Status Register to 1b.
- The idle_to_rlock_transitioned variable is reset to 00h on transition to L0.
- In Flit Mode, the next state is L0 if two consecutive IDLE Flits are received and the minimum number of IDLE Flits are sent after receiving one IDLE Flit and this state was not entered by a timeout from Configuration.Complete. The minimum number of IDLE Flits to send is 4 with 8b/10b or 128b/130b encoding and 8 with 1b/1b encoding.
  - Lane-to-Lane de-skew must be completed before Data Stream processing starts.
  - If software has written a 1b to the Retrain Link bit in the Link Control Register since the last transition to L0 from Recovery or Configuration, the Downstream Port must set the Link Bandwidth Management Status bit of the Link Status Register to 1b.
  - The idle_to_rlock_transitioned variable is reset to 00h and the use_modified_TS1_TS2_Ordered_Set variable is reset to 0b on transition to L0.
- Otherwise, after a minimum 2 ms timeout:
  - If the idle_to_rlock_transitioned variable is less than FFh, the next state is Recovery.RcvrLock.
    - On transition to Recovery.RcvrLock:
      - If the data rate is 8.0 GT/s or higher, the idle_to_rlock_transitioned variable is incremented by 1.
      - If the data rate is 2.5 GT/s or 5.0 GT/s, the idle_to_rlock_transitioned variable is set to FFh and the use_modified_TS1_TS2_Ordered_Set variable is reset to 0b.
  - Else the next state is Detect.

</td>
<td style="background-color:#e8e8e8">

- 若自上一次从 Recovery 或 Configuration 向 L0 的跃迁以来，软件已向 Link Control 寄存器的 Retrain Link 比特写入 1b，则下游端口必须将 Link Status 寄存器的 Link Bandwidth Management Status 比特置为 1b。
- 在向 L0 跃迁时，idle_to_rlock_transitioned 变量被复位为 00h。
- 在 Flit 模式下，若接收到两个连续的 IDLE Flit 且在接收到一个 IDLE Flit 后发送了最少数量的 IDLE Flit，并且本状态并非因 Configuration.Complete 的超时而进入，则下一状态为 L0。在使用 8b/10b 或 128b/130b 编码时，所发送的 IDLE Flit 最少数量为 4 个；使用 1b/1b 编码时为 8 个。
  - 在 Data Stream 处理开始之前，必须完成 Lane-to-Lane de-skew。
  - 若自上一次从 Recovery 或 Configuration 向 L0 的跃迁以来，软件已向 Link Control 寄存器的 Retrain Link 比特写入 1b，则下游端口必须将 Link Status 寄存器的 Link Bandwidth Management Status 比特置为 1b。
  - 在向 L0 跃迁时，idle_to_rlock_transitioned 变量被复位为 00h，use_modified_TS1_TS2_Ordered_Set 变量被复位为 0b。
- 否则，在最短 2 ms 超时之后：
  - 若 idle_to_rlock_transitioned 变量小于 FFh，则下一状态为 Recovery.RcvrLock。
    - 在向 Recovery.RcvrLock 跃迁时：
      - 若数据速率为 8.0 GT/s 或更高，idle_to_rlock_transitioned 变量加 1。
      - 若数据速率为 2.5 GT/s 或 5.0 GT/s，idle_to_rlock_transitioned 变量被置为 FFh，且 use_modified_TS1_TS2_Ordered_Set 变量被复位为 0b。
  - 否则下一状态为 Detect。

</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
</div>

<thead>
<tr>
<th width="50%">🇬🇧 English</th>
<th width="50%" style="background-color:#e8e8e8">🇨🇳 中文</th>

<tr>
<td>

> **Figure 4-52.** Configuration Substate Machine
> <img src="figures/chapter_04/fig_0528_1_tight.png" width="700">

State transitions for Configuration substate machine:

- Entry: Configuration
- Exit to Recovery: Configuration.Linkwidth.Start, Configuration.Linkwidth.Accept, Configuration.Lanenum.Wait, Configuration.Lanenum.Accept, Configuration.Complete, Configuration.Idle
- Exit to L0
- Exit to Loopback
- Exit to Disabled
- Exit to Detect

OM13802C

</td>
<td style="background-color:#e8e8e8">


Configuration 子状态机的状态跃迁：

- 进入：Configuration
- 跃迁至 Recovery：Configuration.Linkwidth.Start、Configuration.Linkwidth.Accept、Configuration.Lanenum.Wait、Configuration.Lanenum.Accept、Configuration.Complete、Configuration.Idle
- 跃迁至 L0
- 跃迁至 Loopback
- 跃迁至 Disabled
- 跃迁至 Detect

OM13802C

<!-- 📄 Page 529 -->
---


<div style="overflow-x: auto; max-width: 100%;">
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th width="50%">🇬🇧 English</th>
<th width="50%" style="background-color:#e8e8e8">🇨🇳 中文</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>

The Recovery substate machine is shown in § Figure 4-53. For the data rate of 64.0 GT/s, any reference to Pre-cursor implies the two pre-cursors used.

If the Link is operating at a data rate of 8.0 GT/s or higher, a Receiver must consider any TS0, TS1, or TS2 Ordered Set to be received only after it obtains Block Alignment in that Lane. If entry to this substate is from L1 or Recovery.Speed or L0s, the Block Alignment must be obtained after exiting Electrical Idle condition. If entry to this substate is from L0, the Block Alignment must be obtained after the end of the last Data Stream.

- If the data rate of operation is 8.0 GT/s or higher:
  - If the start_equalization_w_preset variable is set to 1b:
    - An Upstream Port must use the Transmitter preset values it registered from the received appropriate eight consecutive TS2 Ordered Sets (EQ TS2 if 8.0 GT/s, EQ TS2 if 32.0 GT/s and Equalization Bypass to Highest NRZ Rate was negotiated, and 128b/130b EQ TS2 if 16.0 GT/s, 32.0 GT/s, or 64.0 GT/s) in Recovery.RcvrCfg in its Transmitter setting as soon as it starts transmitting in the data rate at which equalization will be performed and ensure that it meets the preset definition in § Chapter 8. . Lanes that received a Reserved or unsupported Transmitter preset value must use an implementation specific method to choose a supported Transmitter preset setting for use as soon as it starts transmitting at the data rate where equalization needs to be performed.
    - A Downstream Port must use the Transmitter preset settings according to the rules below as soon as it starts transmitting at the data rate where equalization must be performed:
      1. If the data rate of equalization is 16.0 GT/s or 32.0 GT/s or 64.0 GT/s and eight consecutive EQ TS2 Ordered Sets (for the case where equalization bypass to 32.0 GT/s is to be performed) or 128b/130b EQ TS2 Ordered Sets were received with supported Transmitter Preset values in the most recent transition through Recovery.RcvrCfg, the Transmitter Preset value from those EQ TS2 or 128b/130b EQ TS2 Ordered Sets must be used.
      2. Else, if the Transmitter Preset value defined in the Downstream Port Transmitter Preset field of the appropriate Lane Equalization Control Register Entry, as defined below is supported, then it must be used:

| Data Rate of Equalization | Transmitter Preset value to be used as soon as the Link transitions to the data rate of equalization |
|---|---|
| 8.0 GT/s | Transmitter Preset field defined in the Lane Equalization Control Register Entry for each Lane. The Downstream Port may optionally use the Downstream Port 8.0 GT/s Receiver Preset Hint field defined in the Lane Equalization Control Register Entry for each of its Receivers corresponding to the Lane, if they are not Reserved values. |
| 16.0 GT/s | Downstream Port 16.0 GT/s Transmitter Preset field of the 16.0 GT/s Lane Equalization Control Register Entry |
| 32.0 GT/s | Downstream Port 32.0 GT/s Transmitter Preset field of the 32.0 GT/s Lane Equalization Control Register Entry |

<a id="sec-4-2-7-4-2"></a>
<a id="sec-4-2-7-4-1-2"></a>

## 4.2.7.4 Recovery | Recovery 状态

## 4.2.7.4.1 Recovery.RcvrLock | Recovery.RcvrLock 子状态

</td>
<td style="background-color:#e8e8e8">

Recovery 子状态机如 § 图 4-53 所示。对于 64.0 GT/s 数据速率，任何对 Pre-cursor 的引用均隐含使用了两个 pre-cursor。

若链路以 8.0 GT/s 或更高的数据速率运行，则接收器必须在获得该通道的 Block Alignment (块对齐) 之后，才可认为已收到 TS0、TS1 或 TS2 Ordered Set。若本子状态由 L1、Recovery.Speed 或 L0s 进入，则 Block Alignment 必须在退出电气空闲 (Electrical Idle) 状态之后获得。若本子状态由 L0 进入，则 Block Alignment 必须在最后一个 Data Stream 结束之后获得。

- 若运行的数据速率为 8.0 GT/s 或更高：
  - 若 start_equalization_w_preset 变量被置为 1b：
    - 上游端口 (Upstream Port) 必须使用在 Recovery.RcvrCfg 中从所接收到的 8 个连续 TS2 Ordered Set（8.0 GT/s 时为 EQ TS2，32.0 GT/s 且已协商 Equalization Bypass to Highest NRZ Rate 时为 EQ TS2，16.0 GT/s、32.0 GT/s 或 64.0 GT/s 时为 128b/130b EQ TS2）所登记的 Transmitter preset (预设) 值，作为其发送器在即将进行均衡 (Equalization) 的数据速率下开始发送时所使用的发送器设置，并确保其满足 § 第 8 章 中的 preset 定义。对于收到 Reserved 或不受支持的 Transmitter preset 值的通道，必须使用实现特定 (implementation specific) 的方法选择一种受支持的 Transmitter preset 设置，以便在即将进行均衡的数据速率下开始发送时使用。
    - 下游端口必须按照以下规则使用 Transmitter preset 设置，作为其在即将进行均衡的数据速率下开始发送时所使用的发送器设置：
      1. 若均衡的数据速率为 16.0 GT/s、32.0 GT/s 或 64.0 GT/s，且在最近一次通过 Recovery.RcvrCfg 的跃迁中收到了 8 个连续的 EQ TS2 Ordered Set（针对将执行 equalization bypass to 32.0 GT/s 的情况）或 128b/130b EQ TS2 Ordered Set，且其中包含受支持的 Transmitter Preset 值，则必须使用这些 EQ TS2 或 128b/130b EQ TS2 Ordered Set 中的 Transmitter Preset 值。
      2. 否则，若相应 Lane Equalization Control Register Entry 的 Downstream Port Transmitter Preset 字段中定义的 Transmitter Preset 值受支持，则必须使用该值：

| 均衡数据速率 | 链路跃迁至均衡数据速率时所使用的 Transmitter Preset 值 |
|---|---|
| 8.0 GT/s | 每个通道的 Lane Equalization Control Register Entry 中定义的 Transmitter Preset 字段。若对应通道的每个接收器的 Lane Equalization Control Register Entry 中定义的 Downstream Port 8.0 GT/s Receiver Preset Hint 字段不是 Reserved 值，下游端口可选择性地使用该字段。 |
| 16.0 GT/s | 16.0 GT/s Lane Equalization Control Register Entry 的 Downstream Port 16.0 GT/s Transmitter Preset 字段 |
| 32.0 GT/s | 32.0 GT/s Lane Equalization Control Register Entry 的 Downstream Port 32.0 GT/s Transmitter Preset 字段 |

<a id="sec-4-2-7-4"></a>
<a id="sec-4-2-7-4-1"></a>

## 4.2.7.4 Recovery | Recovery 状态

## 4.2.7.4.1 Recovery.RcvrLock | Recovery.RcvrLock 子状态

</tr>

| Data Rate of Equalization | Transmitter Preset value to be used as soon as the Link transitions to the data rate of equalization |
|---|---|
| 64.0 GT/s | Downstream Port 64.0 GT/s Transmitter Preset field of the 64.0 GT/s Lane Equalization Control Register Entry |

      3. Else, use an implementation specific method to choose a supported Transmitter preset setting.

    The Downstream Port must ensure that it meets the preset definition in § Chapter 8. .

    - Next state is Recovery.Equalization.
  - Else:
    - The Transmitter must use the coefficient settings agreed upon at the conclusion of the last equalization procedure.
    - If this substate was entered from Recovery.Equalization, in the transmitted TS1 Ordered Sets, a Downstream Port must set the Pre-cursor, Cursor, and Post-cursor Coefficient fields to the current Transmitter settings, and if the last accepted request in Phase 2 of Recovery.Equalization was a preset request, it must set the Transmitter Preset bits to the accepted preset of that request.
    - It is recommended that in this substate, in the transmitted TS1 Ordered Sets, all Ports set the Pre-cursor, Cursor, and Post-cursor Coefficient fields to the current Transmitter settings, and set the Transmitter Preset bits to the most recent preset that the Transmitter settings were set to.
    - An Upstream Port that receives eight consecutive TS0 or eight consecutive TS1 Ordered Sets on all configured Lanes with the following characteristics must transition to Recovery.Equalization
      - If eight consecutive TS1 Ordered Sets were received, Link and Lane numbers in the received TS1 Ordered Sets match with the Link and Lane numbers in the transmitted TS1 Ordered Sets on each Lane. See § Section 4.2.7 for more on Matching Link and Lane Numbers for 1b/1b Encoding.
      - If eight consecutive TS1 Ordered Sets were received, speed_change bit is equal to 0b
      - If eight consecutive TS0 Ordered Sets were received, and the latest transition to Recovery.RcvrLock was from Recovery.Speed substate
      - If eight consecutive TS1 Ordered Sets were received, with the EC bits not equal to 00b
    - Next state for a Downstream Port is Recovery.Equalization if Recovery.RcvrLock was not entered from Configuration.Idle or Recovery.Idle and the Perform Equalization bit in the Link

> **IMPLEMENTATION NOTE:**
> **REDOING EQUALIZATION**
> A Downstream Port may use this provision to redo some parts of the Transmitter Equalization process using software help or some other implementation specific means while ensuring no transactions are in flight on the Link to avoid any timeouts.

</td>
<td style="background-color:#e8e8e8">

| 均衡数据速率 | 链路跃迁至均衡数据速率时所使用的 Transmitter Preset 值 |
|---|---|
| 64.0 GT/s | 64.0 GT/s Lane Equalization Control Register Entry 的 Downstream Port 64.0 GT/s Transmitter Preset 字段 |

      3. 否则，使用实现特定的方法选择一种受支持的 Transmitter preset 设置。

    下游端口必须确保其满足 § 第 8 章 中的 preset 定义。

    - 下一状态为 Recovery.Equalization。
  - 否则：
    - 发送器必须使用上一次均衡过程结束时所商定的系数设置 (coefficient settings)。
    - 若本子状态由 Recovery.Equalization 进入，则在所发送的 TS1 Ordered Set 中，下游端口必须将 Pre-cursor、Cursor 和 Post-cursor Coefficient 字段设置为当前的 Transmitter 设置；若 Recovery.Equalization Phase 2 中最后接受的是 preset 请求，则必须将 Transmitter Preset 比特设置为该请求所接受的 preset。
    - 建议在本子状态中，所有端口 (Port) 在所发送的 TS1 Ordered Set 中将 Pre-cursor、Cursor 和 Post-cursor Coefficient 字段设置为当前的 Transmitter 设置，并将 Transmitter Preset 比特设置为最近一次将 Transmitter 设置置为的 preset。
    - 上游端口若在所有已配置通道上收到具有以下特征的 8 个连续 TS0 或 8 个连续 TS1 Ordered Set，则必须跃迁至 Recovery.Equalization
      - 若收到的是 8 个连续 TS1 Ordered Set，则所接收 TS1 Ordered Set 中的 Link 号与 Lane 号与每条通道上所发送的 TS1 Ordered Set 中的 Link 号与 Lane 号相匹配。1b/1b 编码下 Link 号与 Lane 号匹配的更多信息见 § 4.2.7。
      - 若收到的是 8 个连续 TS1 Ordered Set，则 speed_change 比特等于 0b
      - 若收到的是 8 个连续 TS0 Ordered Set，且最近一次进入 Recovery.RcvrLock 来自 Recovery.Speed 子状态
      - 若收到的是 8 个连续 TS1 Ordered Set，且 EC 比特不等于 00b
    - 对于下游端口，若 Recovery.RcvrLock 并非由 Configuration.Idle 或 Recovery.Idle 进入，且 Link Control 3 寄存器的 Perform Equalization 比特被置位，或实现特定的机制判定需要执行均衡，则下一状态为 Recovery.Equalization，并遵循 § 4.2.4 中描述的流程。

> **实现注记 (IMPLEMENTATION NOTE):**
> **重做均衡 (REDOING EQUALIZATION)**
> 下游端口可利用此规定，在确保链路上没有正在进行的 transaction 以避免任何超时的前提下，借助软件帮助或其他实现特定的方式，重做发送器均衡 (Transmitter Equalization) 流程的某些部分。

</td>
</tr>

<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th width="50%">🇬🇧 English</th>
<th width="50%" style="background-color:#e8e8e8">🇨🇳 中文</th>

<tbody>
<tr>
<td>

Control 3 Register is set or an implementation specific mechanism determined equalization needs to be performed, following procedures described in § Section 4.2.4 .

The Downstream Port must ensure that no more than 2 TS1 Ordered Sets with EC=00b are transmitted due to being in Recovery.RcvrLock before transitioning to Recovery.Equalization and starting to transmit the TS0/TS1 Ordered Sets.

- Transmitter sends TS1 Ordered Sets on all configured Lanes using the same Link and Lane numbers that were set after leaving Configuration. The speed_change bit (bit 7 of the Data Rate Identifier Symbol in TS1 Ordered Set) must be set to 1b if the directed_speed_change variable is set to 1b. The directed_speed_change variable is set to 1b if any configured Lane receives eight consecutive TS1 Ordered Sets with the speed_change bit set to 1b. Only those data rates greater than 2.5 GT/s should be advertised that can be supported reliably. In Non-Flit Mode of operation, the N_FTS value in the TS1 Ordered Set transmitted reflects the number at the current speed of operation. A device is allowed to change the supported data rates that it advertises when it enters this substate.

A Downstream Port that intends to redo equalization with a data rate change from 2.5 GT/s or 5.0 GT/s to 8.0 GT/s or 32.0 GT/s when Equalization Bypass to Highest NRZ Rate is supported must:

- Send EQ TS1 Ordered Sets with the speed_change bit set to 1b and advertising the following data rates:
  - 8.0 GT/s Data Rate Identifier if redo equalization is for 8.0 GT/s Data Rate
  - 32.0 GT/s Data Rate Identifier if redo equalization is for 32.0 GT/s Data Rate
- If the equalization redo attempt is initiated by the hardware as described in § Section 4.2.4 , then hardware must ensure that the Data Rate is 2.5 GT/s or 5.0 GT/s before initiating the attempt.
- If the equalization redo attempt is initiated by the software mechanism as described in § Section 4.2.4 , then software must ensure that the Data Rate is 2.5 GT/s or 5.0 GT/s before initiating the attempt.

A Downstream Port that intends to redo equalization with a data rate change from 8.0 GT/s to 16.0 GT/s, 16.0 GT/s to 32.0 GT/s, or 32.0 GT/s to 64.0 GT/s must:

- Send TS1 Ordered Sets with the Equalization Redo bit set to 1b, the speed_change bit set to 1b, and advertising the Data Rate Identifier at which equalization redo will be performed (16.0 GT/s, 32.0 GT/s, or 64.0 GT/s).
- If the equalization redo attempt is initiated by the hardware as described in § Section 4.2.4 , then hardware must ensure that the Data Rate is the following before initiating the attempt to redo equalization:
  - 8.0 GT/s if the equalization redo is for 16.0 GT/s Data Rate
  - 16.0 GT/s if the equalization redo is for 32.0 GT/s Data Rate
  - 32.0 GT/s if the equalization redo is for 64.0 GT/s Data Rate
- If the equalization redo attempt is initiated by the software mechanism as described in § Section 4.2.4 , then software must ensure that the Data Rate is the following before initiating the attempt to redo equalization:
  - 8.0 GT/s if the equalization redo is for 16.0 GT/s Data Rate
  - 16.0 GT/s if the equalization redo is for 32.0 GT/s Data Rate
  - 32.0 GT/s if the equalization redo is for 64.0 GT/s Data Rate

An Upstream Port must advertise the highest data rate support in the TS2 Ordered Sets it transmits in Recovery.RcvrCfg, and optionally in the TS1 Ordered Sets it transmits in this substate, unless the Upstream Port has determined that a problem unrelated to the highest data rate equalization prevents it from operating

</td>
<td style="background-color:#e8e8e8">

Control 3 寄存器的 Perform Equalization 比特被置位，或实现特定的机制判定需要执行均衡，则遵循 § 4.2.4 中描述的流程进行。

下游端口必须确保在跃迁至 Recovery.Equalization 并开始发送 TS0/TS1 Ordered Set 之前，由于处于 Recovery.RcvrLock 而发送的 EC=00b 的 TS1 Ordered Set 不得超过 2 个。

- 发送器在所有已配置通道上使用离开 Configuration 状态时所设置的相同 Link 号与 Lane 号发送 TS1 Ordered Set。若 directed_speed_change 变量被置为 1b，则 speed_change 比特（TS1 Ordered Set 中 Data Rate Identifier Symbol 的 bit 7）必须被置为 1b。若任何已配置通道接收到 8 个连续 speed_change 比特为 1b 的 TS1 Ordered Set，则 directed_speed_change 变量被置为 1b。仅应通告 (advertise) 大于 2.5 GT/s 且能够可靠支持的数据速率。在非 Flit 模式 (Non-Flit Mode) 下运行时，所发送 TS1 Ordered Set 中的 N_FTS 值反映了当前运行速度下的数量。设备可在进入本子状态时更改其所通告的支持数据速率。

当下游端口在支持 Equalization Bypass to Highest NRZ Rate 的情况下，计划通过将数据速率从 2.5 GT/s 或 5.0 GT/s 变更为 8.0 GT/s 或 32.0 GT/s 来重做均衡时，必须：

- 发送 speed_change 比特置为 1b 且通告以下数据速率的 EQ TS1 Ordered Set：
  - 若重做均衡针对 8.0 GT/s 数据速率，则使用 8.0 GT/s Data Rate Identifier
  - 若重做均衡针对 32.0 GT/s 数据速率，则使用 32.0 GT/s Data Rate Identifier
- 若重做均衡的尝试由 § 4.2.4 所述的硬件发起，则硬件必须确保在发起该尝试之前，数据速率为 2.5 GT/s 或 5.0 GT/s。
- 若重做均衡的尝试由 § 4.2.4 所述的软件机制发起，则软件必须确保在发起该尝试之前，数据速率为 2.5 GT/s 或 5.0 GT/s。

当下游端口计划通过将数据速率从 8.0 GT/s 变更为 16.0 GT/s、从 16.0 GT/s 变更为 32.0 GT/s，或从 32.0 GT/s 变更为 64.0 GT/s 来重做均衡时，必须：

- 发送 Equalization Redo 比特置为 1b、speed_change 比特置为 1b，并通告将执行均衡重做的目标 Data Rate Identifier（16.0 GT/s、32.0 GT/s 或 64.0 GT/s）的 TS1 Ordered Set。
- 若重做均衡的尝试由 § 4.2.4 所述的硬件发起，则硬件必须确保在发起重做均衡的尝试之前，数据速率为：
  - 若均衡重做针对 16.0 GT/s 数据速率，则为 8.0 GT/s
  - 若均衡重做针对 32.0 GT/s 数据速率，则为 16.0 GT/s
  - 若均衡重做针对 64.0 GT/s 数据速率，则为 32.0 GT/s
- 若重做均衡的尝试由 § 4.2.4 所述的软件机制发起，则软件必须确保在发起重做均衡的尝试之前，数据速率为：
  - 若均衡重做针对 16.0 GT/s 数据速率，则为 8.0 GT/s
  - 若均衡重做针对 32.0 GT/s 数据速率，则为 16.0 GT/s
  - 若均衡重做针对 64.0 GT/s 数据速率，则为 32.0 GT/s

上游端口必须在 Recovery.RcvrCfg 中所发送的 TS2 Ordered Set，以及可选地在 Recovery.RcvrLock 中所发送的 TS1 Ordered Set 中通告 (advertise) 最高数据速率支持，除非上游端口已判定与最高数据速率均衡无关的问题会阻止其在被请求执行均衡的最高数据速率下可靠运行

<th width="50%" style="background-color:#e8e8e8">🇨🇳 中文</th>
