<a id="sec-4-2-7-4-2-2-1"></a>
## 4.2.7.4.2.2.1 Phase 0 of Transmitter Equalization | 发送器均衡 Phase 0


<div style="overflow-x: auto; max-width: 100%;">
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th width="50%">🇬🇧 English</th>
<th width="50%" style="background-color:#e8e8e8">🇨🇳 中文</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>

- If the data rate is 16.0 GT/s, the Equalization 16.0 GT/s Complete bit of the 16.0 GT/s Status Register is set to 1b.
- If the data rate is 32.0 GT/s, the Equalization 32.0 GT/s Complete bit of the 32.0 GT/s Status Register is set to 1b.
- If the data rate is 64.0 GT/s, the Equalization 64.0 GT/s Complete bit of the 64.0 GT/s Status Register is set to 1b.
- Transmitter sends TS0/TS1 Ordered Sets using the Transmitter settings determined in Phase 0. In the TS0/TS1 Ordered Sets, the EC field is set to 01b, and the FS, LF, and (in TS1 Ordered Sets only) Post-cursor Coefficient fields of each Lane are set to values corresponding to the Lane's current Transmitter settings.
- If Recovery.Equalization was entered from Loopback.Entry and perform_equalization_for_loopback_64GT is 1b, Loopback Follower must advertise 64.0 GT/s support in the transmitted TS0/TS1 Ordered Sets (i.e, Data Rate Identifier must use the Flit Mode Encoding).
- Next phase is Phase 2 if all configured Lanes receive two consecutive TS0/TS1 Ordered Sets with EC=10b
  - If the data rate is 8.0 GT/s, the Equalization 8.0 GT/s Phase 1 Successful bit of the Link Status 2 Register are set to 1b.
  - If the data rate is 16.0 GT/s, the Equalization 16.0 GT/s Phase 1 Successful bit of the 16.0 GT/s Status Register is set to 1b.
  - If the data rate is 32.0 GT/s and perform_equalization_for_loopback is 0b, the Equalization 32.0 GT/s Phase 1 Successful bit of the 32.0 GT/s Status Register is set to 1b.
  - If the data rate is 64.0 GT/s and perform_equalization_for_loopback is 0b, the Equalization 64.0 GT/s Phase 1 Successful bit of the 64.0 GT/s Status Register is set to 1b.
- Next state is Loopback.Entry after a 12 ms timeout if perform_equalization_for_loopback is 1b.
- Next state is Recovery.RcvrLock if all configured Lanes receive eight consecutive TS0/TS1 Ordered Sets with EC=00b and perform_equalization_for_loopback is 0b.
  - If the data rate is 8.0 GT/s, the Equalization 8.0 GT/s Phase 1 Successful and Equalization 8.0 GT/s Complete bits of the Link Status 2 Register are set to 1b
  - If the data rate is 16.0 GT/s, the Equalization 16.0 GT/s Phase 1 Successful and Equalization 16.0 GT/s Complete bits of the 16.0 GT/s Status Register are set to 1b.
  - If the data rate is 32.0 GT/s, the Equalization 32.0 GT/s Phase 1 Successful and Equalization 32.0 GT/s Complete bits of the 32.0 GT/s Status Register are set to 1b.
  - If the data rate is 64.0 GT/s, the Equalization 64.0 GT/s Phase 1 Successful and Equalization 64.0 GT/s Complete bits of the 64.0 GT/s Status Register are set to 1b.
- Else, next state is Recovery.Speed after a 12 ms timeout if perform_equalization_for_loopback is 0b
  - successful_speed_negotiation is set to 0b.
  - If the data rate is 8.0 GT/s, the Equalization 8.0 GT/s Complete bit of the Link Status 2 Register for the current data rate of operation is set to 1b.
  - If the data rate is 16.0 GT/s, the Equalization 16.0 GT/s Complete bit of the 16.0 GT/s Status Register is set to 1b.
  - If the data rate is 32.0 GT/s, the Equalization 32.0 GT/s Complete bit of the 32.0 GT/s Status Register is set to 1b.

</td>
<td style="background-color:#e8e8e8">

- 如果数据速率为 16.0 GT/s,则 16.0 GT/s Status Register 中的 Equalization 16.0 GT/s Complete 位被设置为 1b。
- 如果数据速率为 32.0 GT/s,则 32.0 GT/s Status Register 中的 Equalization 32.0 GT/s Complete 位被设置为 1b。
- 如果数据速率为 64.0 GT/s,则 64.0 GT/s Status Register 中的 Equalization 64.0 GT/s Complete 位被设置为 1b。
- 发送器使用在 Phase 0 中确定的 Transmitter 设置来发送 TS0/TS1 Ordered Sets。在 TS0/TS1 Ordered Sets 中,EC 字段被设置为 01b,每个 Lane 的 FS、LF 以及(仅在 TS1 Ordered Sets 中)Post-cursor Coefficient 字段被设置为与该 Lane 当前 Transmitter 设置相对应的值。
- 如果 Recovery.Equalization 是从 Loopback.Entry 进入的,并且 perform_equalization_for_loopback_64GT 为 1b,则 Loopback Follower 必须在发送的 TS0/TS1 Ordered Sets 中通告 64.0 GT/s 支持(即,Data Rate Identifier 必须使用 Flit Mode Encoding)。
- 当所有已配置的 Lane 收到两个连续的 EC=10b 的 TS0/TS1 Ordered Sets 时,下一阶段为 Phase 2
  - 如果数据速率为 8.0 GT/s,则 Link Status 2 Register 中的 Equalization 8.0 GT/s Phase 1 Successful 位被设置为 1b。
  - 如果数据速率为 16.0 GT/s,则 16.0 GT/s Status Register 中的 Equalization 16.0 GT/s Phase 1 Successful 位被设置为 1b。
  - 如果数据速率为 32.0 GT/s 且 perform_equalization_for_loopback 为 0b,则 32.0 GT/s Status Register 中的 Equalization 32.0 GT/s Phase 1 Successful 位被设置为 1b。
  - 如果数据速率为 64.0 GT/s 且 perform_equalization_for_loopback 为 0b,则 64.0 GT/s Status Register 中的 Equalization 64.0 GT/s Phase 1 Successful 位被设置为 1b。
- 如果 perform_equalization_for_loopback 为 1b,则在 12 ms 超时后下一状态为 Loopback.Entry。
- 如果所有已配置的 Lane 收到八个连续的 EC=00b 的 TS0/TS1 Ordered Sets,并且 perform_equalization_for_loopback 为 0b,则下一状态为 Recovery.RcvrLock。
  - 如果数据速率为 8.0 GT/s,则 Link Status 2 Register 中的 Equalization 8.0 GT/s Phase 1 Successful 和 Equalization 8.0 GT/s Complete 位被设置为 1b
  - 如果数据速率为 16.0 GT/s,则 16.0 GT/s Status Register 中的 Equalization 16.0 GT/s Phase 1 Successful 和 Equalization 16.0 GT/s Complete 位被设置为 1b。
  - 如果数据速率为 32.0 GT/s,则 32.0 GT/s Status Register 中的 Equalization 32.0 GT/s Phase 1 Successful 和 Equalization 32.0 GT/s Complete 位被设置为 1b。
  - 如果数据速率为 64.0 GT/s,则 64.0 GT/s Status Register 中的 Equalization 64.0 GT/s Phase 1 Successful 和 Equalization 64.0 GT/s Complete 位被设置为 1b。
- 否则,如果 perform_equalization_for_loopback 为 0b,则在 12 ms 超时后下一状态为 Recovery.Speed
  - successful_speed_negotiation 被设置为 0b。
  - 如果数据速率为 8.0 GT/s,则当前运行数据速率的 Link Status 2 Register 中的 Equalization 8.0 GT/s Complete 位被设置为 1b。
  - 如果数据速率为 16.0 GT/s,则 16.0 GT/s Status Register 中的 Equalization 16.0 GT/s Complete 位被设置为 1b。
  - 如果数据速率为 32.0 GT/s,则 32.0 GT/s Status Register 中的 Equalization 32.0 GT/s Complete 位被设置为 1b。

</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
</div>

<a id="sec-4-2-7-4-2-2-2"></a>
## 4.2.7.4.2.2.2 Phase 1 of Transmitter Equalization | 发送器均衡 Phase 1(上游)

<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th width="50%">🇬🇧 English</th>
<th width="50%" style="background-color:#e8e8e8">🇨🇳 中文</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>

- If the data rate is 64.0 GT/s, the Equalization 64.0 GT/s Complete bit of the 64.0 GT/s Status Register is set to 1b.
- Transmitter sends TS0/TS1 Ordered Sets with EC = 10b
- The Port must evaluate and arrive at the optimal settings independently on each Lane. When perform_equalization_for_loopback is 1b, the equalization procedure is only performed on the Lane under test. To evaluate a new preset or coefficient setting that is legal, as per the rules in § Section 4.2.4 and § Chapter 8. :
  - Request a new preset by setting the Transmitter Preset bits to the desired value and set the Use Preset bit to 1b. Alternatively, request a new set of coefficients by setting the Pre-cursor, Cursor, and Post-cursor Coefficient fields to the desired values and set the Use Preset bit to 0b. Once a request is made, it must be continuously requested for at least 1 μs or until the evaluation of the request is completed, whichever is later.
  - Wait for the required time (500 ns plus the roundtrip delay including the logic delays through the Upstream Port) to ensure that, if accepted, the Downstream Port is transmitting using the requested settings. Obtain Block Alignment and then evaluate the incoming Ordered Sets. Note: The Upstream Port may simply ignore anything it receives during this waiting period as the incoming bit stream may be illegal during the transition to the requested settings. Hence the requirement to validate Block Alignment after this waiting period. If Block Alignment cannot be obtained after an implementation specific amount of time (in addition to the required waiting period specified above) it is recommended to proceed to perform receiver evaluation on the incoming bit stream regardless.
  - If two consecutive TS1 Ordered Sets are received with the Transmitter Preset bits (for a preset request) or the Pre-cursor, Cursor, and Post-Cursor Coefficient fields (for a coefficients request) identical to what was requested and the Reject Coefficient Values bit is Clear, then the requested setting was accepted and, depending on the results of receiver evaluation, can be considered as a candidate final setting.
  - If two consecutive TS1 Ordered Sets are received with the Transmitter Preset bits (for a preset request) or the Pre-Cursor, Cursor, and Post-Cursor Coefficient fields (for a coefficients request) identical to what was requested and the Reject Coefficient Values bit is Set, then the requested setting was rejected and must not be considered as a candidate final setting.
  - If, after an implementation specific amount of time following the start of receiver evaluation, no consecutive TS1s with the Transmitter Preset bits (for a preset request) or the Pre-Cursor, Cursor, and Post-Cursor Coefficient fields (for a coefficients request) identical to what was requested are received, then the requested setting must not be considered as a candidate final setting.
  - The Upstream Port is responsible for setting the Reset EIEOS Interval Count bit in the TS0/TS1 Ordered Sets it transmits according to its evaluation criteria and requirements. The Use Preset bit of the received TS1 Ordered Sets must not be used to determine whether a request is accepted or rejected.

</td>
<td style="background-color:#e8e8e8">

- 如果数据速率为 64.0 GT/s,则 64.0 GT/s Status Register 中的 Equalization 64.0 GT/s Complete 位被设置为 1b。
- 发送器发送 EC = 10b 的 TS0/TS1 Ordered Sets
- 该端口必须独立地在每个 Lane 上评估并确定最佳设置。当 perform_equalization_for_loopback 为 1b 时,均衡过程仅在被测 Lane 上执行。要评估合法的新预设值或系数设置(根据 § 4.2.4 节和第 8 章中的规则):
  - 通过将 Transmitter Preset 位设置为所需值并将 Use Preset 位设置为 1b 来请求新的预设值。或者,通过将 Pre-cursor、Cursor 和 Post-cursor Coefficient 字段设置为所需值并将 Use Preset 位设置为 0b 来请求一组新的系数。一旦发出请求,必须持续请求该设置至少 1 μs,或直到对该请求的评估完成(以较晚者为准)。
  - 等待所需的时间(500 ns 加上包括通过 Upstream Port 的逻辑延迟在内的往返延迟),以确保如果请求被接受,Downstream Port 正在使用请求的设置进行发送。获取块对齐(Block Alignment)然后评估传入的 Ordered Sets。注意:Upstream Port 可以简单地忽略在此等待期间收到的任何内容,因为在转换到请求设置的过程中,传入的比特流可能是非法的。因此需要在此等待期之后验证块对齐。如果在实现特定的一段时间之后(除了上述指定的所需等待期之外)仍无法获得块对齐,建议继续对传入比特流执行接收器评估,无论如何。
  - 如果收到两个连续的 TS1 Ordered Sets,其 Transmitter Preset 位(对于预设请求)或 Pre-cursor、Cursor 和 Post-Cursor Coefficient 字段(对于系数请求)与请求相同,并且 Reject Coefficient Values 位被清零(Clear),则请求的设置已被接受,并且根据接收器评估的结果,可以将其视为候选最终设置。
  - 如果收到两个连续的 TS1 Ordered Sets,其 Transmitter Preset 位(对于预设请求)或 Pre-Cursor、Cursor 和 Post-Cursor Coefficient 字段(对于系数请求)与请求相同,并且 Reject Coefficient Values 位被置位(Set),则请求的设置已被拒绝,不得将其视为候选最终设置。
  - 如果在接收器评估开始后的实现特定时间内,没有收到连续的 TS1(其 Transmitter Preset 位(对于预设请求)或 Pre-Cursor、Cursor 和 Post-Cursor Coefficient 字段(对于系数请求)与请求相同),则请求的设置不得被视为候选最终设置。
  - Upstream Port 负责根据其评估标准和要求,在其发送的 TS0/TS1 Ordered Sets 中设置 Reset EIEOS Interval Count 位。所接收的 TS1 Ordered Sets 的 Use Preset 位不得用于确定请求是被接受还是被拒绝。

</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

[⬆️ 返回目录](#-本章目录-table-of-contents)

<!-- 📄 Page 546 -->
---

<a id="sec-4-2-7-4-2-2-3"></a>
## 4.2.7.4.2.2.3 Phase 2 of Transmitter Equalization | 发送器均衡 Phase 2


<div style="overflow-x: auto; max-width: 100%;">
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th width="50%">🇬🇧 English</th>
<th width="50%" style="background-color:#e8e8e8">🇨🇳 中文</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>

◦
At 32.0 GT/s and below data rates, the total amount of time spent per preset or coefficients request from transmission of the request to the completion of the evaluation must be less than 2 ms. Implementations that need a longer evaluation time at the final stage of optimization may continue requesting the same setting beyond the 2 ms limit but must adhere to the timeout in this phase (24 ms for 8.0, 16.0, and 32.0 GT/s and 48 ms for 64.0 GT/s) and must not take this exception more than two times. If the requester is unable to receive Ordered Sets within the timeout period, it may assume that the requested setting does not work in that Lane.

◦
At 64.0 GT/s and higher data rates, a device is permitted to evaluate each preset or coefficients request for an arbitrary amount of time. Evaluation must be carefully managed such that the search for an acceptable preset or coefficients can be successful. The total time spent in this Phase must still adhere to the timeout.

◦
All new preset or coefficient settings must be presented on all configured Lanes simultaneously. Any given Lane is permitted to continue to transmit the current preset or coefficients as its new value if it does not want to change the setting at that time.

•
If perform_equalization_for_loopback is 1b and the Lane under test is operating at its optimal setting and two consecutive TS1 Ordered Sets with the Retimer Equalization Extend bit set to 0b are received, next phase is Phase 3.

•
If perform_equalization_for_loopback is 0b and all configured Lanes are operating at their optimal settings and either the data rate of operation is 8.0 GT/s or all Lanes receive two consecutive TS1 Ordered Sets with the Retimer Equalization Extend bit set to 0b, next phase is Phase 3.

◦
If the data rate of operation is 8.0 GT/s: The Equalization 8.0 GT/s Phase 2 Successful bit of the Link Status 2 Register are set to 1b.

◦
If the data rate of operation is 16.0 GT/s: The Equalization 16.0 GT/s Phase 2 Successful bit of the 16.0 GT/s Status Register is set to 1b.

◦
If the data rate of operation is 32.0 GT/s: The Equalization 32.0 GT/s Phase 2 Successful bit of the 32.0 GT/s Status Register is set to 1b.

◦
If the data rate of operation is 64.0 GT/s: The Equalization 64.0 GT/s Phase 2 Successful bit of the 64.0 GT/s Status Register is set to 1b.

•
Next state is Loopback.Entry after a timeout of 24 ms with a tolerance of -0 ms and +2 ms if perform_equalization_for_loopback is 1b and current data rate is less than 64.0 GT/s.

•
Next state is Loopback.Entry after a timeout of 48 ms with a tolerance of -0 ms and +2 ms if perform_equalization_for_loopback is 1b and current data rate is 64.0 GT/s.

> **IMPLEMENTATION NOTE: RESET EIEOS AND COEFFICIENT/PRESET REQUESTS**
> A Port may set Reset EIEOS Interval Count to 1b when it wants a longer PRBS pattern and subsequently clear it when it needs to obtain Block Alignment.
> All TS0/TS1 Ordered Sets transmitted in this phase are requests. The first request maybe a new preset or a new coefficient request or a request to maintain the current link partner transmitter settings by reflecting the settings received in the two consecutive TS1 Ordered Sets with EC=10b that cause the transition to Phase 2.

</td>
<td style="background-color:#e8e8e8">

◦
在 32.0 GT/s 及以下数据速率下,每个预设值或系数请求从发送请求到完成评估所花费的总时间必须小于 2 ms。在优化最后阶段需要更长评估时间的实现,可以超过 2 ms 限制继续请求同一设置,但必须遵守本阶段的超时(8.0、16.0 和 32.0 GT/s 为 24 ms,64.0 GT/s 为 48 ms),且此例外情况使用次数不得超过两次。如果请求者在超时期间内无法接收到有序集,则可假定所请求的设置在该通道 (Lane) 上不可用。

◦
在 64.0 GT/s 及以上数据速率下,允许设备对每个预设值或系数请求评估任意时长。必须仔细管理评估过程,以确保能成功搜索到可接受的预设值或系数。本阶段花费的总时间仍必须遵守超时规定。

◦
所有新的预设值或系数设置必须在所有已配置通道 (Lane) 上同时呈现。任意已配置通道若不希望在此时更改设置,可继续发送其当前预设值或系数作为新值。

•
若 perform_equalization_for_loopback 为 1b,且被测试的通道工作在其最佳设置,并且接收到两个连续将 Retimer Equalization Extend 位置为 0b 的 TS1 有序集,则下一阶段为 Phase 3。

•
若 perform_equalization_for_loopback 为 0b,且所有已配置通道均工作在其最佳设置,并且工作数据速率为 8.0 GT/s 或所有通道接收到两个连续将 Retimer Equalization Extend 位置为 0b 的 TS1 有序集,则下一阶段为 Phase 3。

◦
若工作数据速率为 8.0 GT/s:Link Status 2 寄存器的 Equalization 8.0 GT/s Phase 2 Successful 位置为 1b。

◦
若工作数据速率为 16.0 GT/s:16.0 GT/s Status 寄存器的 Equalization 16.0 GT/s Phase 2 Successful 位置为 1b。

◦
若工作数据速率为 32.0 GT/s:32.0 GT/s Status 寄存器的 Equalization 32.0 GT/s Phase 2 Successful 位置为 1b。

◦
若工作数据速率为 64.0 GT/s:64.0 GT/s Status 寄存器的 Equalization 64.0 GT/s Phase 2 Successful 位置为 1b。

•
若 perform_equalization_for_loopback 为 1b 且当前数据速率低于 64.0 GT/s,则在 24 ms(容差 -0 ms / +2 ms)超时后,下一状态为 Loopback.Entry。

•
若 perform_equalization_for_loopback 为 1b 且当前数据速率为 64.0 GT/s,则在 48 ms(容差 -0 ms / +2 ms)超时后,下一状态为 Loopback.Entry。

> **实现说明:RESET EIEOS 与系数/预设值请求**
> 当端口 (Port) 期望获得更长的 PRBS 码型时,可将 Reset EIEOS Interval Count 置为 1b;在需要获得块对齐 (Block Alignment) 时再清除该位。
> 本阶段发送的所有 TS0/TS1 有序集均为请求。第一个请求可以是新的预设值请求或新的系数请求,也可以是维持当前链路对端发送器设置的请求——通过回显导致进入 Phase 2 的那两个 EC=10b 的连续 TS1 有序集中的设置实现。

</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
</div>


<!-- 📄 Page 548 -->
---

<a id="sec-4-2-7-4-2-2-3-continued"></a>
## 4.2.7.4.2.2.3 Phase 2 of Transmitter Equalization (continued) | 发送器均衡 Phase 2(续)

<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th width="50%">🇬🇧 English</th>
<th width="50%" style="background-color:#e8e8e8">🇨🇳 中文</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>

•
Else, if the current data rate is less than 64.0 GT/s: next state is Recovery.Speed after a timeout of 24 ms with a tolerance of -0 ms and +2 ms

◦
successful_speed_negotiation is set to 0b.

◦
If the data rate of operation is 8.0 GT/s: The Equalization 8.0 GT/s Complete bit of the Link Status 2 Register is set to 1b.

◦
If the data rate of operation is 16.0 GT/s: The Equalization 16.0 GT/s Complete bit of the 16.0 GT/s Status Register is set to 1b.

◦
If the data rate of operation is 32.0 GT/s: The Equalization 32.0 GT/s Complete bit of the 32.0 GT/s Status Register is set to 1b.

•
Else, if the current data rate is 64.0 GT/s: next state is Recovery.Speed after a timeout of 48 ms with a tolerance of -0 ms and +2 ms

◦
successful_speed_negotiation is set to 0b.

◦
The Equalization 64.0 GT/s Complete bit of the 64.0 GT/s Status Register is set to 1b.

•
The Transmitter sends TS0 Ordered Sets with EC=11b if the data rate is 64.0 GT/s and all Lanes have not received two consecutive TS1 Ordered Sets with EC=11b since entering this Phase; else it sends TS1 Ordered Sets.

•
Transmitter sends TS0/TS1 Ordered Sets with EC = 11b and the coefficient settings, set on each configured Lane independently, as follows:

◦
If two consecutive TS1 Ordered Sets with EC=11b have been received since entering Phase 3, or two consecutive TS1 Ordered Sets with EC=11b and a preset or set of coefficients (as specified by the Use Preset bit) different than the last two consecutive TS1 Ordered Sets with EC=11b:

▪
If the preset or coefficients requested in the most recent two consecutive TS Ordered Sets are legal and supported (see § Section 4.2.4 and § Chapter 8.):

▪
Change the transmitter settings to the requested preset or coefficients such that the new settings are effective at the Transmitter pins within 500 ns of when the end of the second TS1 Ordered Set requesting the new setting was received at the Receiver pin. The change of Transmitter settings must not cause any illegal voltage level or parameter at the Transmitter pin for more than 1 ns.

▪
In the transmitted TS1 Ordered Sets, the Transmitter Preset bits are set to the requested preset (for a preset request), the Pre-cursor, Cursor, and Post-cursor Coefficient fields are set to the Transmitter settings (for a preset or a coefficients request), and the Reject Coefficient Values bit is Clear.

▪
Else (the requested preset or coefficients are illegal or unsupported): Do not change the Transmitter settings used, but reflect the requested preset or coefficient values in the transmitted TS1 Ordered Sets and set the Reject Coefficient Values bit to 1b.

◦
Else: the preset and coefficients currently being used by the Transmitter.

▪
The Transmitter preset value initially transmitted on entry to Phase 3 can be the Transmitter preset value transmitted in Phase 0 for the same Data Rate or the Transmitter preset setting currently being used by the Transmitter.

•
Next state is Loopback.Entry if perform_equalization_for_loopback is 1b, the current data rate is less than 64.0 GT/s, and one of the following conditions is satisfied:

a.
The Lane under test receives two consecutive TS1 Ordered Sets with EC=00b.

</td>
<td style="background-color:#e8e8e8">

•
否则,若当前数据速率低于 64.0 GT/s:在 24 ms(容差 -0 ms / +2 ms)超时后,下一状态为 Recovery.Speed。

◦
successful_speed_negotiation 置为 0b。

◦
若工作数据速率为 8.0 GT/s:Link Status 2 寄存器的 Equalization 8.0 GT/s Complete 位置为 1b。

◦
若工作数据速率为 16.0 GT/s:16.0 GT/s Status 寄存器的 Equalization 16.0 GT/s Complete 位置为 1b。

◦
若工作数据速率为 32.0 GT/s:32.0 GT/s Status 寄存器的 Equalization 32.0 GT/s Complete 位置为 1b。

•
否则,若当前数据速率为 64.0 GT/s:在 48 ms(容差 -0 ms / +2 ms)超时后,下一状态为 Recovery.Speed。

◦
successful_speed_negotiation 置为 0b。

◦
64.0 GT/s Status 寄存器的 Equalization 64.0 GT/s Complete 位置为 1b。

•
若数据速率为 64.0 GT/s,且自进入本阶段以来所有通道均未接收到两个连续 EC=11b 的 TS1 有序集,则发送器 (Transmitter) 发送 EC=11b 的 TS0 有序集;否则发送 TS1 有序集。

•
发送器在每个已配置通道上独立发送 EC=11b 的 TS0/TS1 有序集及系数设置,具体如下:

◦
若自进入 Phase 3 以来已接收到两个连续 EC=11b 的 TS1 有序集,或者接收到两个连续 EC=11b 的 TS1 有序集所携带的预设值或系数集(由 Use Preset 位指定)与最近两个连续 EC=11b 的 TS1 有序集不同:

▪
若最近两个连续 TS 有序集中请求的预设值或系数合法且受支持(见 § 4.2.4 节与第 8 章):

▪
将发送器设置更改为所请求的预设值或系数,新设置必须在接收器 (Receiver) 引脚端接收到请求新设置的第二个 TS1 有序集末尾之后的 500 ns 内,在发送器引脚上生效。发送器设置的更改不得在发送器引脚上产生任何超过 1 ns 的非法电压电平或参数。

▪
在所发送的 TS1 有序集中,Transmitter Preset 字段设置为所请求的预设值(对于预设值请求),Pre-cursor、Cursor 和 Post-cursor Coefficient 字段设置为发送器设置(对于预设值请求或系数请求),且 Reject Coefficient Values 位清零。

▪
否则(所请求的预设值或系数非法或不受支持):不更改发送器所使用的设置,但在所发送的 TS1 有序集中回显所请求的预设值或系数,并将 Reject Coefficient Values 位置为 1b。

◦
否则:使用发送器当前正在使用的预设值和系数。

▪
进入 Phase 3 时最初发送的发送器预设值,可为同一数据速率下 Phase 0 中发送的发送器预设值,或发送器当前正在使用的发送器预设设置。

•
若 perform_equalization_for_loopback 为 1b、当前数据速率低于 64.0 GT/s,且满足以下任一条件,则下一状态为 Loopback.Entry:

a.
被测试的通道接收到两个连续 EC=00b 的 TS1 有序集。

</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

<a id="sec-4-2-7-4-2-2-4"></a>
## 4.2.7.4.2.2.4 Phase 3 of Transmitter Equalization | 发送器均衡 Phase 3


<div style="overflow-x: auto; max-width: 100%;">
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th width="50%">🇬🇧 English</th>
<th width="50%" style="background-color:#e8e8e8">🇨🇳 中文</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>

b.
A timeout of 32 ms with a tolerance of -0 ms and +4 ms.

•
Next state is Loopback.Entry if perform_equalization_for_loopback is 1b, the current data rate is equal to 64.0 GT/s, and one of the following conditions is satisfied:

a.
The Lane under test receives two consecutive TS1 Ordered Sets with EC=00b.

b.
A timeout of 64 ms with a tolerance of -0 ms and +4 ms.

•
Next state is Recovery.RcvrLock if all configured Lanes receive two consecutive TS1 Ordered Sets with EC=00b.

◦
If the data rate is 8.0 GT/s, the Equalization 8.0 GT/s Phase 3 Successful and Equalization 8.0 GT/s Complete bits of the Link Status 2 Register are set to 1b.

◦
If the data rate is 16.0 GT/s, the Equalization 16.0 GT/s Phase 3 Successful and Equalization 16.0 GT/s Complete bits of the 16.0 GT/s Status Register are set to 1b.

◦
If the data rate is 32.0 GT/s, the Equalization 32.0 GT/s Phase 3 Successful and Equalization 32.0 GT/s Complete bits of the 32.0 GT/s Status Register are set to 1b.

◦
If the data rate is 64.0 GT/s, the Equalization 64.0 GT/s Phase 3 Successful and Equalization 64.0 GT/s Complete bits of the 64.0 GT/s Status Register are set to 1b.

•
Else, if the current data rate is less than 64.0 GT/s: next state is Recovery.Speed after a timeout of 32 ms with a tolerance of -0 ms and +4 ms

◦
successful_speed_negotiation is set to 0b.

◦
If the data rate is 8.0 GT/s, the Equalization 8.0 GT/s Complete bit of the Link Status 2 Register is set to 1b.

◦
If the data rate is 16.0 GT/s, the Equalization 16.0 GT/s Complete bit of the 16.0 GT/s Status Register is set to 1b.

◦
If the data rate is 32.0 GT/s, the Equalization 32.0 GT/s Complete bit of the 32.0 GT/s Status Register is set to 1b.

•
Else, if current data rate is 64.0 GT/s: next state is Recovery.Speed after a timeout of 64 ms with a tolerance of -0 ms and +4 ms

◦
successful_speed_negotiation is set to 0b.

◦
The Equalization 64.0 GT/s Complete bit of the 64.0 GT/s Status Register is set to 1b.

•
The Transmitter enters Electrical Idle and stays there until the Receiver Lanes have entered Electrical Idle, and then additionally remains there for at least 800 ns on a successful speed negotiation (i.e., successful_speed_negotiation = 1b) or at least 6 μs on an unsuccessful speed negotiation (i.e., successful_speed_negotiation = 0b), but stays there no longer than an additional 1 ms. The frequency of operation is permitted to be changed to the new data rate only after the Receiver Lanes have entered Electrical Idle. If the negotiated data rate is 5.0 GT/s, and if operating in full swing mode, -6 dB de-emphasis level must be selected for operation if the select_deemphasis variable is 0b and -3.5 dB de-emphasis level must be selected for operation if the select_deemphasis variable is 1b. Note that if the link is already operating at the highest data rate supported by both Ports, Recovery.Speed is executed but the data rate is not changed.

An EIOSQ must be sent prior to entering Electrical Idle.

The DC common mode voltage is not required to be within specification.

An Electrical Idle condition exists on the Lanes if an EIOS is received on any of the configured Lanes or Electrical Idle is detected/inferred as described in § Section 4.2.5.4 .

</td>
<td style="background-color:#e8e8e8">

b.
32 ms(容差 -0 ms / +4 ms)超时。

•
若 perform_equalization_for_loopback 为 1b、当前数据速率等于 64.0 GT/s,且满足以下任一条件,则下一状态为 Loopback.Entry:

a.
被测试的通道接收到两个连续 EC=00b 的 TS1 有序集。

b.
64 ms(容差 -0 ms / +4 ms)超时。

•
若所有已配置通道接收到两个连续 EC=00b 的 TS1 有序集,则下一状态为 Recovery.RcvrLock。

◦
若数据速率为 8.0 GT/s,Link Status 2 寄存器的 Equalization 8.0 GT/s Phase 3 Successful 和 Equalization 8.0 GT/s Complete 位置为 1b。

◦
若数据速率为 16.0 GT/s,16.0 GT/s Status 寄存器的 Equalization 16.0 GT/s Phase 3 Successful 和 Equalization 16.0 GT/s Complete 位置为 1b。

◦
若数据速率为 32.0 GT/s,32.0 GT/s Status 寄存器的 Equalization 32.0 GT/s Phase 3 Successful 和 Equalization 32.0 GT/s Complete 位置为 1b。

◦
若数据速率为 64.0 GT/s,64.0 GT/s Status 寄存器的 Equalization 64.0 GT/s Phase 3 Successful 和 Equalization 64.0 GT/s Complete 位置为 1b。

•
否则,若当前数据速率低于 64.0 GT/s:在 32 ms(容差 -0 ms / +4 ms)超时后,下一状态为 Recovery.Speed。

◦
successful_speed_negotiation 置为 0b。

◦
若数据速率为 8.0 GT/s,Link Status 2 寄存器的 Equalization 8.0 GT/s Complete 位置为 1b。

◦
若数据速率为 16.0 GT/s,16.0 GT/s Status 寄存器的 Equalization 16.0 GT/s Complete 位置为 1b。

◦
若数据速率为 32.0 GT/s,32.0 GT/s Status 寄存器的 Equalization 32.0 GT/s Complete 位置为 1b。

•
否则,若当前数据速率为 64.0 GT/s:在 64 ms(容差 -0 ms / +4 ms)超时后,下一状态为 Recovery.Speed。

◦
successful_speed_negotiation 置为 0b。

◦
64.0 GT/s Status 寄存器的 Equalization 64.0 GT/s Complete 位置为 1b。

•
发送器进入电气空闲 (Electrical Idle) 状态并保持,直到接收器通道也进入电气空闲;在成功速率协商(即 successful_speed_negotiation = 1b)时,在接收器进入电气空闲后再额外保持至少 800 ns;在不成功速率协商(即 successful_speed_negotiation = 0b)时,再额外保持至少 6 μs;但额外保持的时间不得超过 1 ms。仅当接收器通道进入电气空闲后,才允许将工作频率更改为新数据速率。若协商数据速率为 5.0 GT/s 且工作于全摆幅模式,则当 select_deemphasis 变量为 0b 时必须选择 -6 dB 去加重 (De-emphasis) 电平;当 select_deemphasis 变量为 1b 时必须选择 -3.5 dB 去加重电平。注意,若链路已经工作在双方端口都支持的最高数据速率,则会执行 Recovery.Speed 但不更改数据速率。

在进入电气空闲之前必须发送一个 EIOSQ。

直流共模电压不要求满足规范要求。

若在任何已配置通道上接收到 EIOS,或按 § 4.2.5.4 节所述检测/推断出电气空闲,则通道上存在电气空闲状态。

</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
</div>


<!-- 📄 Page 550 -->
---

<a id="sec-4-2-7-4-3"></a>
## 4.2.7.4.3 Recovery.Speed | Recovery.Speed 子状态

<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th width="50%">🇬🇧 English</th>
<th width="50%" style="background-color:#e8e8e8">🇨🇳 中文</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>

◦
On entry to this substate following a successful speed negotiation (i.e., successful_speed_negotiation = 1b), an Electrical Idle condition may be inferred on the Receiver Lanes if a TS1 or TS2 Ordered Set has not been received in any configured Lane in a time interval specified in § Table 4-39. (This covers the case where the Link is operational and both sides have successfully received TS Ordered Sets. Hence, a lack of a TS1 or TS2 Ordered Set in the specified间隔内 can be interpreted as entry to Electrical Idle.)

◦
Else on entry to this substate following an unsuccessful speed negotiation (i.e., successful_speed_negotiation = 0b) if an exit from Electrical Idle has not been detected at least once in any configured Lane in a time interval specified in § Table 4-39. (This covers the case where at least one side is having trouble receiving TS Ordered Sets that was transmitted by the other agent, and hence a lack of exit from Electrical Idle in a longer interval can be treated as equivalent to entry to Electrical Idle.)

•
Next state is Recovery.RcvrLock after the Transmitter Lanes are no longer required to be in Electrical Idle as described in the condition above.

◦
If this substate has been entered from Recovery.RcvrCfg following a successful speed change negotiation (i.e., successful_speed_negotiation = 1b), the new data rate is changed on all the configured Lanes to the highest common data rate advertised by both sides of the Link. The changed_speed_recovery variable is set to 1b.

◦
Else if this substate is being entered for a second time since entering Recovery from L0 or L1 (i.e., changed_speed_recovery = 1b), the new data rate will be the data rate at which the LTSSM entered Recovery from L0 or L1. The changed_speed_recovery variable will be reset to 0b.

◦
Else if the latest encoding used before entering Recovery.Speed was 1b/1b, the new data rate will be 32.0 GT/s. The changed_speed_recovery variable remains reset at 0b.

◦
Else the new data rate will be 2.5 GT/s. The changed_speed_recovery variable remains reset at 0b.

Note: This represents the case where the frequency of operation in L0 was greater than 2.5 GT/s and one side could not operate at that frequency and timed out in Recovery.RcvrLock the first time it entered that substate from L0 or L1.

•
Next state is Detect after a 48 ms timeout if the Link Speed at which Recovery.Speed was entered was < 64.0 GT/s.

◦
Note: This transition is not possible under normal conditions.

•
Next state is Detect after a 96 ms timeout or 48 ms timeout if the Link Speed at which Recovery.Speed was entered was ≥ 64.0 GT/s.

◦
Note: The 96 ms timeout is strongly recommended because the 48 ms timeout could cause an unintended timeout to Detect at 64.0 GT/s. This timeout to Detect can occur due to the 64.0 GT/s Recovery.Equalization Phase 2 timeout (64 ms) being larger than the Phase 1 timeout (12 ms) + Recovery.Speed timeout (48 ms).

•
The directed_speed_change variable will be reset to 0b. The new data rate must be reflected in the Current Link Speed field of the Link Status Register.

◦
On a Link bandwidth change, if successful_speed_negotiation is set to 1b and the Autonomous Change bit (bit 6 of Symbol 4) in the eight consecutive TS2 Ordered Sets received while in Recovery.RcvrCfg is set to 1b or the speed change was initiated by the Downstream Port for autonomous reasons (non-reliability and not due to the setting of the Link Retrain bit), the Link Autonomous Bandwidth Status bit of the Link Status Register is set to 1b.

◦
Else: on a Link bandwidth change, the Link Bandwidth Management Status bit of the Link Status Register is set to 1b.

</td>
<td style="background-color:#e8e8e8">

◦
在成功完成速率协商(即 successful_speed_negotiation = 1b)后进入本子状态时,若在 § 表 4-39 规定的时间间隔内任何已配置通道均未接收到 TS1 或 TS2 有序集,则可在接收器通道上推断存在电气空闲状态。(这涵盖了链路正在工作且双方都已成功接收到 TS 有序集的情况。因此,在规定的时间间隔内缺少 TS1 或 TS2 有序集可被解释为进入电气空闲。)

◦
否则,在不成功速率协商(即 successful_speed_negotiation = 0b)后进入本子状态时,若在 § 表 4-39 规定的时间间隔内,任何已配置通道上至少一次未检测到退出电气空闲,则可推断存在电气空闲状态。(这涵盖了至少一方难以接收对端发送的 TS 有序集的情况,因此在更长时间间隔内未退出电气空闲可被视为等效于进入电气空闲。)

•
在发送器通道不再被要求保持电气空闲(见上述条件)后,下一状态为 Recovery.RcvrLock。

◦
若本子状态是在成功完成速率变更协商(即 successful_speed_negotiation = 1b)后从 Recovery.RcvrCfg 进入的,则将所有已配置通道的数据速率更改为链路双方所通告的最高公共数据速率。changed_speed_recovery 变量置为 1b。

◦
否则,若本子状态是自 L0 或 L1 进入 Recovery 以来第二次进入本子状态(即 changed_speed_recovery = 1b),则新数据速率将为 LTSSM 自 L0 或 L1 进入 Recovery 时的数据速率。changed_speed_recovery 变量将复位为 0b。

◦
否则,若进入 Recovery.Speed 之前使用的最新编码为 1b/1b,则新数据速率将为 32.0 GT/s。changed_speed_recovery 变量保持复位(0b)。

◦
否则,新数据速率将为 2.5 GT/s。changed_speed_recovery 变量保持复位(0b)。

注:这表示 L0 下的工作频率高于 2.5 GT/s,且某一方无法在该频率下工作,在自 L0 或 L1 首次进入 Recovery.RcvrLock 子状态时超时。

•
若进入 Recovery.Speed 时的链路速率 < 64.0 GT/s,则在 48 ms 超时后,下一状态为 Detect。

◦
注:此转换在正常情况下不会发生。

•
若进入 Recovery.Speed 时的链路速率 ≥ 64.0 GT/s,则在 96 ms 或 48 ms 超时后,下一状态为 Detect。

◦
注:强烈建议使用 96 ms 超时,因为 48 ms 超时可能在 64.0 GT/s 下导致意外超时返回 Detect。由于 64.0 GT/s 下 Recovery.Equalization Phase 2 的超时(64 ms)大于 Phase 1 超时(12 ms)+ Recovery.Speed 超时(48 ms)之和,因此可能出现这种返回 Detect 的超时。

•
directed_speed_change 变量将复位为 0b。新数据速率必须反映在 Link Status 寄存器的 Current Link Speed 字段中。

◦
在链路带宽变更时,若 successful_speed_negotiation 置为 1b,且在 Recovery.RcvrCfg 期间接收到的八个连续 TS2 有序集中的 Autonomous Change 位(Symbol 4 的 bit 6)为 1b,或该速率变更是由下游端口 (Downstream Port) 因自主原因(非可靠性原因,非由于设置 Link Retrain 位)发起,则 Link Status 寄存器的 Link Autonomous Bandwidth Status 位置为 1b。

◦
否则:在链路带宽变更时,Link Status 寄存器的 Link Bandwidth Management Status 位置为 1b。

</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

<!-- 📄 Page 551 -->
---

<a id="sec-4-2-7-4-4"></a>
## 4.2.7.4.4 Recovery.RcvrCfg | Recovery.RcvrCfg 子状态


<div style="overflow-x: auto; max-width: 100%;">
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th width="50%">🇬🇧 English</th>
<th width="50%" style="background-color:#e8e8e8">🇨🇳 中文</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>

In Non-Flit Mode, Transmitter sends TS2 Ordered Sets on all configured Lanes using the same Link and Lane numbers that were set after leaving Configuration. In Flit Mode, Transmitter sends TS2 Ordered Sets on all configured Lanes with the Link number field sets as follows: if the LTSSM is initiating a Link width change by transitioning to Configuration from this State and the Lane will be removed from the Link, then the Link number field is set to PAD; otherwise it is set as the Link number. In 1b/1b TS2 Ordered Sets, if an equalization request is being communicated, Symbols 1,9 represent Equalization Byte 0 (instead of Link Number), the Request Equalization bit is set to 1b and the other fields are set as described in § Section 4.2.4 and § Table 4-28. The LTSSM must not initiate a width change if speed_change is set to 1b or the LTSSM went through Recovery.Equalization followed by Recovery.RcvrLock prior to entering this substate. The speed_change bit (bit 7 of data rate identifier Symbol in TS2 Ordered Set) must be set to 1b if the directed_speed_change variable is already set to 1b. The N_FTS value in the transmitted TS2 Ordered Sets should reflect the number at the current data rate for Non-Flit Mode of operation. In Flit Mode, the appropriate Training Control bit of the TS2 Ordered set must be set, if the Port intends to drive the Link to Hot Reset, Disabled, or Loopback state immediately after exiting this sub-state.

The Downstream Port must transmit EQ TS2 Ordered Sets (TS2 Ordered Sets with Symbol 6 bit 7 set to 1b) on each configured Lane with the Transmitter Preset and Receiver Preset Hint fields set to the values specified by the Upstream 8.0 GT/s Port Transmitter Preset and the Upstream 8.0 GT/s Port Receiver Preset Hint fields from the corresponding Lane Equalization Control Register Entry if all of the following conditions are satisfied:

a.
The Downstream Port advertised 8.0 GT/s data rate support in Recovery.RcvrLock, and 8.0 GT/s data rate support has been advertised in the Configuration.Complete or Recovery.RcvrCfg substates by the Upstream Port since exiting the Detect state, and eight consecutive TS1 or TS2 Ordered Sets were received on any configured Lane prior to entry to this substate with speed_change bit set to 1b

b.
The equalization_done_8GT_data_rate variable is 0b or if the Perform Equalization bit in the Link Control 3 Register is Set or if an implementation specific mechanism determined equalization needs to be performed, following procedures described in § Section 4.2.4

c.
The current data rate of operation is 2.5 GT/s or 5.0 GT/s

The Downstream Port must transmit EQ TS2 Ordered Sets (TS2 Ordered Sets with Symbol 6 bit 7 set to 1b) on each configured Lane with the Transmitter Preset bits set to the values specified by the 32.0 GT/s Upstream Port Transmitter Preset bits from the corresponding 32.0 GT/s Lane Equalization Control Register Entry and Receiver Preset Hint field set to 000b if all of the following conditions are satisfied:

a.
The Downstream Port advertised 32.0 GT/s data rate support in Recovery.RcvrLock, and 32.0 GT/s data rate support has been advertised in the Configuration.Complete or Recovery.RcvrCfg substates by the Upstream Port since exiting the Detect state, and eight consecutive TS1 or TS2 Ordered Sets were received on any configured Lane prior to entry to this substate with speed_change bit set to 1b

b.
The equalization_done_32GT_data_rate variable is 0b or if the Perform Equalization bit in the Link Control 3 Register is Set or if an implementation specific mechanism determined equalization needs to be performed, following procedures described in § Section 4.2.4

c.
The equalization_done_8GT_data_rate and equalization_done_16GT_data_rate variables are 1b each

d.
Equalization Bypass to Highest NRZ Rate was negotiated between the components during Configuration state

e.
The current data rate of operation is 2.5 GT/s or 5.0 GT/s

The Downstream Port must transmit 128b/130b EQ TS2 Ordered Sets (TS2 Ordered Sets with Symbol 7 bit 7 set to 1b) on each configured Lane with the Transmitter Preset bits set to the values specified by the 16.0 GT/s Upstream Port Transmitter Preset bits from the corresponding 16.0 GT/s Lane Equalization Control Register Entry if all of the following conditions are satisfied:

a.
The Downstream Port advertised 16.0 GT/s data rate support in Recovery.RcvrLock, and 16.0 GT/s data rate support has been advertised in the Configuration.Complete or Recovery.RcvrCfg substates by the Upstream Port since exiting the Detect state, and eight consecutive TS1 or TS2 Ordered Sets were received on any configured Lane prior to entry to this substate with speed_change bit set to 1b

b.
The equalization_done_16GT_data_rate variable is 0b or if the Perform Equalization bit in the Link Control 3 Register is set or an implementation specific mechanism determined equalization needs to be performed, following procedures described in § Section 4.2.4

c.
The current data rate of operation is 8.0 GT/s

The Downstream Port must transmit 128b/130b EQ TS2 Ordered Sets (TS2 Ordered Sets with Symbol 7 bit 7 set to 1b) on each configured Lane with the Transmitter Preset bits set to the values specified by the 32.0 GT/s Upstream Port Transmitter Preset bits from the corresponding 32.0 GT/s Lane Equalization Control Register Entry if all of the following conditions are satisfied:

a.
The Downstream Port advertised 32.0 GT/s data rate support in Recovery.RcvrLock, and 32.0 GT/s data rate support has been advertised in the Configuration.Complete or Recovery.RcvrCfg substates by the Upstream Port since exiting the Detect state, and eight consecutive TS1 or TS2 Ordered Sets were received on any configured Lane prior to entry to this substate with speed_change bit set to 1b

b.
The equalization_done_32GT_data_rate variable is 0b or the Perform Equalization bit in the Link Control 3 Register is set or an implementation specific mechanism determined equalization needs to be performed, following procedures described in § Section 4.2.4

c.
The current data rate of operation is 16.0 GT/s

The Downstream Port must transmit 128b/130b EQ TS2 Ordered Sets (TS2 Ordered Sets with Symbol 7 bit 7 set to 1b) on each configured Lane with the Transmitter Preset bits set to the values specified by the 64.0 GT/s Upstream Port Transmitter Preset bits from the corresponding 64.0 GT/s Lane Equalization Control Register Entry if all of the following conditions are satisfied:

a.
The Downstream Port advertised 64.0 GT/s data rate support in Recovery.RcvrLock, and 64.0 GT/s data rate support has been advertised in the Configuration.Complete or Recovery.RcvrCfg substates by the Upstream Port since exiting the Detect state, and eight consecutive TS1 or TS2 Ordered Sets were received on any configured Lane prior to entry to this substate with speed_change bit set to 1b

b.
The equalization_done_64GT_data_rate variable is 0b or the Perform Equalization bit in the Link Control 3 Register is set or an implementation specific mechanism determined equalization needs to be performed, following procedures described in § Section 4.2.4

c.
The current data rate of operation is 32.0 GT/s

The Upstream Port is permitted to transmit 128b/130b EQ TS2 Ordered Sets with the 16.0 GT/s Transmitter Preset bits set to implementation specific values if all of the following conditions are satisfied:

a.
The Upstream Port advertised 16.0 GT/s data rate support in Recovery.RcvrLock, and 16.0 GT/s data rate support has been advertised in the Configuration.Complete or Recovery.RcvrCfg substates, or optionally, but strongly recommended, in the Recovery.RcvrLock substate by the Downstream Port since exiting the Detect state, and eight consecutive TS1 or TS2 Ordered Sets were received on any configured Lane prior to entry to this substate with speed_change bit set to 1b

b.
The equalization_done_16GT_data_rate variable is 0b or if directed by an implementation specific mechanism, following procedures described in § Section 4.2.4

c.
The current data rate of operation is 8.0 GT/s

</td>
<td style="background-color:#e8e8e8">

在非 Flit 模式 (Non-Flit Mode) 下,发送器在所有已配置通道上使用离开 Configuration 后所设置的同一链路号 (Link number) 和通道号 (Lane number) 发送 TS2 有序集。在 Flit 模式 (Flit Mode) 下,发送器在所有已配置通道上发送 TS2 有序集,链路号 (Link number) 字段的设置如下:若 LTSSM 通过从本状态转换到 Configuration 来发起链路宽度变更,且该通道将从链路中移除,则链路号字段设置为 PAD;否则设置为链路号。在 1b/1b 的 TS2 有序集中,若正在传送均衡请求,则 Symbol 1、9 表示 Equalization Byte 0(而不是 Link Number),Request Equalization 位置 1b,其他字段按 § 4.2.4 节和 § 表 4-28 所述设置。若 speed_change 置为 1b,或 LTSSM 在进入本子状态之前经过了 Recovery.Equalization 接着 Recovery.RcvrLock,则 LTSSM 不得发起宽度变更。若 directed_speed_change 变量已置为 1b,则 TS2 有序集中数据速率标识符符号的 speed_change 位(bit 7)必须置为 1b。所发送 TS2 有序集中的 N_FTS 值应反映非 Flit 模式工作下当前数据速率对应的数值。在 Flit 模式下,若端口打算在退出本子状态后立即将链路驱动至热复位 (Hot Reset)、禁用 (Disabled) 或回环 (Loopback) 状态,则必须设置 TS2 有序集中相应的 Training Control 位。

若满足以下所有条件,下游端口 (Downstream Port) 必须在每个已配置通道上发送 EQ TS2 有序集(Symbol 6 bit 7 置为 1b 的 TS2 有序集),其中 Transmitter Preset 和 Receiver Preset Hint 字段设置为对应通道的 Lane Equalization Control Register Entry 中 Upstream 8.0 GT/s Port Transmitter Preset 和 Upstream 8.0 GT/s Port Receiver Preset Hint 字段所规定的值:

a.
下游端口已在 Recovery.RcvrLock 中通告支持 8.0 GT/s 数据速率,且上游端口 (Upstream Port) 自退出 Detect 状态以来已在 Configuration.Complete 或 Recovery.RcvrCfg 子状态中通告支持 8.0 GT/s 数据速率,且在进入本子状态前在任何已配置通道上接收到八个连续且 speed_change 位置 1b 的 TS1 或 TS2 有序集。

b.
equalization_done_8GT_data_rate 变量为 0b,或 Link Control 3 寄存器中的 Perform Equalization 位置 1,或由实现特定机制判定需要执行均衡,过程遵循 § 4.2.4 节所述。

c.
当前工作数据速率为 2.5 GT/s 或 5.0 GT/s。

若满足以下所有条件,下游端口必须在每个已配置通道上发送 EQ TS2 有序集(Symbol 6 bit 7 置为 1b 的 TS2 有序集),其中 Transmitter Preset 位设置为对应 32.0 GT/s Lane Equalization Control Register Entry 中 32.0 GT/s Upstream Port Transmitter Preset 位所规定的值,Receiver Preset Hint 字段设置为 000b:

a.
下游端口已在 Recovery.RcvrLock 中通告支持 32.0 GT/s 数据速率,且上游端口自退出 Detect 状态以来已在 Configuration.Complete 或 Recovery.RcvrCfg 子状态中通告支持 32.0 GT/s 数据速率,且在进入本子状态前在任何已配置通道上接收到八个连续且 speed_change 位置 1b 的 TS1 或 TS2 有序集。

b.
equalization_done_32GT_data_rate 变量为 0b,或 Link Control 3 寄存器中的 Perform Equalization 位置 1,或由实现特定机制判定需要执行均衡,过程遵循 § 4.2.4 节所述。

c.
equalization_done_8GT_data_rate 和 equalization_done_16GT_data_rate 变量均为 1b。

d.
在 Configuration 状态期间,双方组件之间已协商通过"均衡旁路至最高 NRZ 速率(Equalization Bypass to Highest NRZ Rate)"。

e.
当前工作数据速率为 2.5 GT/s 或 5.0 GT/s。

若满足以下所有条件,下游端口必须在每个已配置通道上发送 128b/130b EQ TS2 有序集(Symbol 7 bit 7 置为 1b 的 TS2 有序集),其中 Transmitter Preset 位设置为对应 16.0 GT/s Lane Equalization Control Register Entry 中 16.0 GT/s Upstream Port Transmitter Preset 位所规定的值:

a.
下游端口已在 Recovery.RcvrLock 中通告支持 16.0 GT/s 数据速率,且上游端口自退出 Detect 状态以来已在 Configuration.Complete 或 Recovery.RcvrCfg 子状态中通告支持 16.0 GT/s 数据速率,且在进入本子状态前在任何已配置通道上接收到八个连续且 speed_change 位置 1b 的 TS1 或 TS2 有序集。

b.
equalization_done_16GT_data_rate 变量为 0b,或 Link Control 3 寄存器中的 Perform Equalization 位置 1,或由实现特定机制判定需要执行均衡,过程遵循 § 4.2.4 节所述。

c.
当前工作数据速率为 8.0 GT/s。

若满足以下所有条件,下游端口必须在每个已配置通道上发送 128b/130b EQ TS2 有序集(Symbol 7 bit 7 置为 1b 的 TS2 有序集),其中 Transmitter Preset 位设置为对应 32.0 GT/s Lane Equalization Control Register Entry 中 32.0 GT/s Upstream Port Transmitter Preset 位所规定的值:

a.
下游端口已在 Recovery.RcvrLock 中通告支持 32.0 GT/s 数据速率,且上游端口自退出 Detect 状态以来已在 Configuration.Complete 或 Recovery.RcvrCfg 子状态中通告支持 32.0 GT/s 数据速率,且在进入本子状态前在任何已配置通道上接收到八个连续且 speed_change 位置 1b 的 TS1 或 TS2 有序集。

b.
equalization_done_32GT_data_rate 变量为 0b,或 Link Control 3 寄存器中的 Perform Equalization 位置 1,或由实现特定机制判定需要执行均衡,过程遵循 § 4.2.4 节所述。

c.
当前工作数据速率为 16.0 GT/s。

若满足以下所有条件,下游端口必须在每个已配置通道上发送 128b/130b EQ TS2 有序集(Symbol 7 bit 7 置为 1b 的 TS2 有序集),其中 Transmitter Preset 位设置为对应 64.0 GT/s Lane Equalization Control Register Entry 中 64.0 GT/s Upstream Port Transmitter Preset 位所规定的值:

a.
下游端口已在 Recovery.RcvrLock 中通告支持 64.0 GT/s 数据速率,且上游端口自退出 Detect 状态以来已在 Configuration.Complete 或 Recovery.RcvrCfg 子状态中通告支持 64.0 GT/s 数据速率,且在进入本子状态前在任何已配置通道上接收到八个连续且 speed_change 位置 1b 的 TS1 或 TS2 有序集。

b.
equalization_done_64GT_data_rate 变量为 0b,或 Link Control 3 寄存器中的 Perform Equalization 位置 1,或由实现特定机制判定需要执行均衡,过程遵循 § 4.2.4 节所述。

c.
当前工作数据速率为 32.0 GT/s。

若满足以下所有条件,允许上游端口发送 16.0 GT/s Transmitter Preset 位设置为实现特定值的 128b/130b EQ TS2 有序集:

a.
上游端口已在 Recovery.RcvrLock 中通告支持 16.0 GT/s 数据速率,且 16.0 GT/s 数据速率支持已在 Configuration.Complete 或 Recovery.RcvrCfg 子状态中被通告,或(可选但强烈推荐)在自退出 Detect 状态以来的 Recovery.RcvrLock 子状态中被下游端口所通告,且在进入本子状态前在任何已配置通道上接收到八个连续且 speed_change 位置 1b 的 TS1 或 TS2 有序集。

b.
equalization_done_16GT_data_rate 变量为 0b,或由实现特定机制按 § 4.2.4 节所述过程指示。

c.
当前工作数据速率为 8.0 GT/s。

</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
</div>


<!-- 📄 Page 553 -->
---

<a id="sec-4-2-7-4-4-continued"></a>
## 4.2.7.4.4 Recovery.RcvrCfg (continued) | Recovery.RcvrCfg 子状态(续)

<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th width="50%">🇬🇧 English</th>
<th width="50%" style="background-color:#e8e8e8">🇨🇳 中文</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>

The Upstream Port that intends to bypass equalization to the highest data rate of 32.0 GT/s or higher must transmit 8b/10b EQ TS2 Ordered Sets with the 32.0 GT/s Transmitter Preset bits set to implementation specific values if all of the following conditions are satisfied:

a.
The equalization bypass to the highest NRZ rate was negotiated during the Configuration state

b.
Either the Upstream Port requires precoding, or the Upstream Port intends to provide the Downstream Port's starting 32.0 GT/s Transmitter Preset for equalization

c.
The Upstream Port advertised 32.0 GT/s data rate support in Recovery.RcvrLock, and 32.0 GT/s data rate support has been advertised in the Configuration.Complete or Recovery.RcvrCfg substates by the Downstream Port since exiting the Detect state, and eight consecutive TS1 or TS2 Ordered Sets were received on any configured Lane prior to entry to this substate with speed_change bit set to 1b

d.
The equalization_done_32GT_data_rate variable is 0b or if directed by an implementation specific mechanism, following procedures described in § Section 4.2.4

e.
The current data rate of operation is 2.5 GT/s or 5.0 GT/s

The Upstream Port is permitted to transmit 128b/130b EQ TS2 Ordered Sets with the 32.0 GT/s Transmitter Preset bits set to implementation specific values if all of the following conditions are satisfied:

a.
The Upstream Port advertised 32.0 GT/s data rate support in Recovery.RcvrLock, and 32.0 GT/s data rate support has been advertised in the Configuration.Complete or Recovery.RcvrCfg substates, or optionally, but strongly recommended, in the Recovery.RcvrLock substate by the Downstream Port since exiting the Detect state, and eight consecutive TS1 or TS2 Ordered Sets were received on any configured Lane prior to entry to this substate with speed_change bit set to 1b

b.
The equalization_done_32GT_data_rate variable is 0b or if directed

c.
The current data rate of operation is 16.0 GT/s

The Upstream Port is permitted to transmit 128b/130b EQ TS2 Ordered Sets with the 64.0 GT/s Transmitter Preset bits set to implementation specific values if all of the following conditions are satisfied:

a.
The Upstream Port advertised 64.0 GT/s data rate support in Recovery.RcvrLock, and 64.0 GT/s data rate support has been advertised in the Configuration.Complete, Recovery.RcvrLock or Recovery.RcvrCfg substates by the Downstream Port since exiting the Detect state, and eight consecutive TS1 or TS2 Ordered Sets were received on any configured Lane prior to entry to this substate with speed_change bit set to 1b

b.
The equalization_done_64GT_data_rate variable is 0b or if directed

c.
The current data rate of operation is 32.0 GT/s

</td>
<td style="background-color:#e8e8e8">

打算将均衡旁路至 32.0 GT/s 或更高数据速率的上游端口,若满足以下所有条件,必须发送 32.0 GT/s Transmitter Preset 位设置为实现特定值的 8b/10b EQ TS2 有序集:

a.
在 Configuration 状态期间已协商通过"均衡旁路至最高 NRZ 速率"。

b.
上游端口需要预编码 (precoding),或上游端口打算为均衡提供下游端口的起始 32.0 GT/s 发送器预设值。

c.
上游端口已在 Recovery.RcvrLock 中通告支持 32.0 GT/s 数据速率,且 32.0 GT/s 数据速率支持自退出 Detect 状态以来已在 Configuration.Complete 或 Recovery.RcvrCfg 子状态中被下游端口所通告,且在进入本子状态前在任何已配置通道上接收到八个连续且 speed_change 位置 1b 的 TS1 或 TS2 有序集。

d.
equalization_done_32GT_data_rate 变量为 0b,或由实现特定机制按 § 4.2.4 节所述过程指示。

e.
当前工作数据速率为 2.5 GT/s 或 5.0 GT/s。

若满足以下所有条件,允许上游端口发送 32.0 GT/s Transmitter Preset 位设置为实现特定值的 128b/130b EQ TS2 有序集:

a.
上游端口已在 Recovery.RcvrLock 中通告支持 32.0 GT/s 数据速率,且 32.0 GT/s 数据速率支持已在 Configuration.Complete 或 Recovery.RcvrCfg 子状态中被通告,或(可选但强烈推荐)在自退出 Detect 状态以来的 Recovery.RcvrLock 子状态中被下游端口所通告,且在进入本子状态前在任何已配置通道上接收到八个连续且 speed_change 位置 1b 的 TS1 或 TS2 有序集。

b.
equalization_done_32GT_data_rate 变量为 0b,或被指示。

c.
当前工作数据速率为 16.0 GT/s。

若满足以下所有条件,允许上游端口发送 64.0 GT/s Transmitter Preset 位设置为实现特定值的 128b/130b EQ TS2 有序集:

a.
上游端口已在 Recovery.RcvrLock 中通告支持 64.0 GT/s 数据速率,且 64.0 GT/s 数据速率支持自退出 Detect 状态以来已在 Configuration.Complete、Recovery.RcvrLock 或 Recovery.RcvrCfg 子状态中被下游端口所通告,且在进入本子状态前在任何已配置通道上接收到八个连续且 speed_change 位置 1b 的 TS1 或 TS2 有序集。

b.
equalization_done_64GT_data_rate 变量为 0b,或被指示。

c.
当前工作数据速率为 32.0 GT/s。

</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

<a id="sec-4-2-7-4-4-rcvrcfg-page554"></a>
## 4.2.7.4.4 Recovery.RcvrCfg (continued) | Recovery.RcvrCfg 子状态(续)


<div style="overflow-x: auto; max-width: 100%;">
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th width="50%">🇬🇧 English</th>
<th width="50%" style="background-color:#e8e8e8">🇨🇳 中文</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>

When using 128b/130b or 1b/1b encoding, Upstream and Downstream Ports use the Request Equalization, Equalization Request Data Rate, and Quiesce Guarantee bits of their transmitted TS2 Ordered Sets to communicate equalization requests as described in § Section 4.2.4 . When not requesting equalization, the Request Equalization, Equalization Request Data Rate, and Quiesce Guarantee bits must be set to 0b.

The start_equalization_w_preset variable is reset to 0b upon entry to this substate.

•
On entry to this substate, a Downstream Port must set the select_deemphasis variable equal to the Selectable De-emphasis field in the Link Control 2 Register or adopt some implementation specific mechanism to set the select_deemphasis variable, including using the value requested by the Upstream Port in the eight consecutive TS1 Ordered Sets it received. A Downstream Port advertising 5.0 GT/s data rate support must set the Selectable De-emphasis bit (Symbol 4 bit 6) of the TS2 Ordered Sets it transmits identical to the select_deemphasis variable. An Upstream Port must set its Autonomous Change bit (Symbol 4 bit 6) to 1b in the TS2 Ordered Set if it intends to change the Link bandwidth for autonomous reasons.

◦
For devices that support Link width upconfigure, it is recommended that the Electrical Idle detection circuitry be activated in the set of currently inactive Lanes in this substate, the Recovery.Idle substate, and Configuration.Linkwidth.Start substates, if the directed_speed_change variable is reset to 0b. This is done so that during a Link upconfigure, the side that does not initiate the upconfiguration does not miss the first EIEOSQ sent by the initiator during the Configuration.Linkwidth.Start substate.

•
Next state is Recovery.Speed if all of the following conditions are true:

◦
One of the following conditions is satisfied:

i.
Eight consecutive TS2 Ordered Sets are received on any configured Lane with identical data rate identifiers, identical values in Symbol 6, and the speed_change bit set to 1b and eight consecutive TS2 Ordered Sets are standard TS2 Ordered Sets if either 8b/10b or 128b/130b encoding is used

ii.
Eight consecutive EQ TS2 or 128b/130b EQ TS2 Ordered Sets are received on all configured Lanes with identical data rate identifiers, identical value in Symbol 6, and the speed_change bit set to 1b

iii.
Eight consecutive EQ TS2 or 128b/130b EQ TS2 Ordered Sets are received on any configured Lane with identical data rate identifiers, identical value in Symbol 6, and the speed_change

> **IMPLEMENTATION NOTE: ISSUES WITH SOFTWARE INITIATED SPEED CHANGE**
> In prior versions of the specification, the EQ TS2 Ordered Sets from the Upstream Port may not be registered by the Downstream Port in the case where hardware autonomous equalization was not adopted. The Downstream Port enters Recovery and advertises a higher data rate (16.0 GT/s and above) for the first time with the software initiated speed change; the Upstream Port did not observe the new speed in Configuration.Complete. So if it was acting on the new speed based on observation in Recovery.RcvrCfg (as was required in prior versions of this specification), it may decide to switch from TS2 to EQ TS2 Ordered Sets while in Recovery.RcvrCfg. The Downstream Port may have satisfied its requirements with 8 consecutive TS2 Ordered Sets and missed the Preset request (for 16.0 GT/s or higher data rate) or Precoding request (for 32.0 GT/s or higher data rate) in the subsequent EQ TS2 Ordered Sets.
> The situation described above can be avoided if the Upstream Port decides to send EQ TS2 Ordered Sets based on the higher speed being advertised by the Downstream Port while it is in Recovery.RcvrLock or if software requests re-equalization at the same data rate through the configuration register in the Downstream Port.

</td>
<td style="background-color:#e8e8e8">

在使用 128b/130b 或 1b/1b 编码时,上游和下游端口使用所发送的 TS2 有序集中的 Request Equalization、Equalization Request Data Rate 和 Quiesce Guarantee 位来传送均衡请求,详见 § 4.2.4 节。当不请求均衡时,Request Equalization、Equalization Request Data Rate 和 Quiesce Guarantee 位必须置为 0b。

进入本子状态时,start_equalization_w_preset 变量复位为 0b。

•
进入本子状态时,下游端口必须将 select_deemphasis 变量设置为 Link Control 2 寄存器中 Selectable De-emphasis 字段的值,或采用某种实现特定机制来设置 select_deemphasis 变量,包括使用从其接收到的八个连续 TS1 有序集中上游端口所请求的值。通告支持 5.0 GT/s 数据速率的下游端口必须将其发送的 TS2 有序集中的 Selectable De-emphasis 位(Symbol 4 bit 6)设置为与 select_deemphasis 变量相同。若上游端口打算因自主原因更改链路带宽,则必须将其 TS2 有序集中的 Autonomous Change 位(Symbol 4 bit 6)置为 1b。

◦
对于支持链路宽度向上配置 (Link width upconfigure) 的设备,建议在 directed_speed_change 变量复位为 0b 时,在本子状态、Recovery.Idle 子状态和 Configuration.Linkwidth.Start 子状态中激活当前未激活通道集合上的电气空闲检测电路。这样做是为了在链路向上配置期间,未发起向上配置的一方不会漏掉发起方在 Configuration.Linkwidth.Start 子状态期间发送的第一个 EIEOSQ。

•
若满足以下所有条件,则下一状态为 Recovery.Speed:

◦
满足以下条件之一:

i.
在任何已配置通道上接收到数据速率标识符相同、Symbol 6 值相同且 speed_change 位置 1b 的八个连续 TS2 有序集;且若使用 8b/10b 或 128b/130b 编码,则八个连续 TS2 有序集为标准 TS2 有序集。

ii.
在所有已配置通道上接收到数据速率标识符相同、Symbol 6 值相同且 speed_change 位置 1b 的八个连续 EQ TS2 或 128b/130b EQ TS2 有序集。

iii.
在任何已配置通道上接收到数据速率标识符相同、Symbol 6 值相同且 speed_change 位

> **实现说明:软件发起的速率变更相关问题**
> 在本规范的先前版本中,在未采用硬件自主均衡的情况下,来自上游端口的 EQ TS2 有序集可能未被下游端口登记。下游端口进入 Recovery,并在软件发起的速率变更中首次通告更高的数据速率(16.0 GT/s 及以上);上游端口在 Configuration.Complete 中未观察到该新速率。因此,若其根据 Recovery.RcvrCfg 中的观察结果(此规范先前版本所要求)对新速率采取行动,则可能决定在 Recovery.RcvrCfg 中从 TS2 切换为 EQ TS2 有序集。下游端口可能已用 8 个连续 TS2 有序集满足其要求,而遗漏后续 EQ TS2 有序集中的 Preset 请求(对 16.0 GT/s 或更高数据速率)或 Precoding 请求(对 32.0 GT/s 或更高数据速率)。
> 若上游端口在 Recovery.RcvrLock 中根据下游端口所通告的更高速率决定发送 EQ TS2 有序集,或软件通过下游端口中的配置寄存器请求在同一数据速率下重新均衡,则可避免上述情况。

</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
</div>
