<a id="sec-4-2-7-4-4-rcvrcfg-page555"></a>
## 4.2.7.4.4 Recovery.RcvrCfg (continued) | Recovery.RcvrCfg 子状态(续)

<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th width="50%">🇬🇧 English</th>
<th width="50%" style="background-color:#e8e8e8">🇨🇳 中文</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>

bit set to 1b and 1 ms has expired since the receipt of the eight consecutive EQ Ordered Sets on any configured Lane

iv.
Eight consecutive and identical TS2 Ordered Sets are received on any configured Lane with the speed_change bit set to 1b when 1b/1b encoding is used

◦
Either the current data rate is greater than 2.5 GT/s or greater than 2.5 GT/s data rate identifiers are set both in the transmitted and the (eight consecutive) received TS2 Ordered Sets

◦
For 8b/10b encoding, at least 32 TS2 Ordered Sets, without being interrupted by any intervening EIEOS, are transmitted with the speed_change bit set to 1b after receiving one TS2 Ordered Set with the speed_change bit set to 1b in the same configured Lane. For 128b/130b and 1b/1b encoding, at least 128 TS2 Ordered Sets are transmitted with the speed_change bit set to 1b after receiving one TS2 Ordered Set with the speed_change bit set to 1b in the same configured Lane.

The data rate(s) advertised on the received eight consecutive TS2 Ordered Sets with the speed_change bit set is noted as the data rate(s) that can be supported by the other Port. The Autonomous Change bit (Symbol 4 bit 6) in these received eight consecutive TS2 Ordered Sets is noted by the Downstream Port for possible logging in the Link Status Register in Recovery.Speed substate. Upstream Ports must register the Selectable De-emphasis bit (bit 6 of Symbol 4) advertised in these eight consecutive TS2 Ordered Sets in the select_deemphasis variable. The new speed to change to in Recovery.Speed is the highest data rate that can be supported by both Ports on the Link.

For an Upstream Port, if the current data rate of operation is 2.5 GT/s or 5.0 GT/s and these eight consecutive TS2 Ordered Sets are EQ TS2 Ordered Sets advertising 8.0 GT/s as the highest data rate supported, it must set the start_equalization_w_preset variable to 1b and update the Upstream Port 8.0 GT/s Transmitter Preset and Upstream Port 8.0 GT/s Receiver Preset Hint fields of the Lane Equalization Control Register Entry with the values received in the eight consecutive EQ TS2 Ordered Sets for the corresponding Lane.

For an Upstream Port, if the current data rate of operation is 2.5 GT/s or 5.0 GT/s and these eight consecutive TS2 Ordered Sets are EQ TS2 Ordered Sets advertising 32.0 GT/s as the highest data rate supported and equalization bypass to the highest NRZ rate was negotiated between the components during the Configuration state, it must set the start_equalization_w_preset variable to 1b and update the Upstream Port 32.0 GT/s Transmitter Preset field of the 32.0 GT/s Lane Equalization Control Register Entry with the values received in the eight consecutive EQ TS2 Ordered Sets for the corresponding Lane.

For an Upstream Port, if the current data rate of operation is 8.0 GT/s, 16.0 GT/s support is advertised by both ends, and these eight consecutive TS2 Ordered Sets are 128b/130b EQ TS2 Ordered Sets, it must set the start_equalization_w_preset variable to 1b and update the Upstream Port 16.0 GT/s Transmitter Preset field of the 16.0 GT/s Lane Equalization Control Register Entry with the values received in the eight consecutive 128b/130b EQ TS2 Ordered Sets for the corresponding Lane.

For an Upstream Port, if the current data rate of operation is 16.0 GT/s, 32.0 GT/s support is advertised by both ends, and these eight consecutive TS2 Ordered Sets are 128b/130b EQ TS2 Ordered Sets, it must set the start_equalization_w_preset variable to 1b and update the Upstream Port 32.0 GT/s Transmitter Preset field of the 32.0 GT/s Lane Equalization Control Register Entry with the values received in the eight consecutive 128b/130b EQ TS2 Ordered Sets for the corresponding Lane.

For an Upstream Port, if the current data rate of operation is 32.0 GT/s, 64.0 GT/s support is advertised by both ends, and these eight consecutive TS2 Ordered Sets are 128b/130b EQ TS2 Ordered Sets, it must set the start_equalization_w_preset variable to 1b and update the Upstream Port 64.0 GT/s Transmitter Preset field of the 64.0 GT/s Lane Equalization Control Register Entry with the values received in the eight consecutive 128b/130b EQ TS2 Ordered Sets for the corresponding Lane.

Any configured Lanes which do not receive EQ TS2 or 128b/130b EQ TS2 Ordered Sets meeting this criteria will use implementation dependent preset values when first operating at 8.0, 16.0, 32.0, or 64.0 GT/s prior to

</td>
<td style="background-color:#e8e8e8">

置 1b,且自任何已配置通道上接收到八个连续 EQ 有序集起 1 ms 已过。

iv.
使用 1b/1b 编码时,在任何已配置通道上接收到八个连续且相同的、speed_change 位置 1b 的 TS2 有序集。

◦
当前数据速率高于 2.5 GT/s,或在所发送的及(连续八个)所接收的 TS2 有序集中均设置了高于 2.5 GT/s 的数据速率标识符。

◦
对于 8b/10b 编码,在同一已配置通道上接收到一个 speed_change 位置 1b 的 TS2 有序集之后,必须在不被任何介入的 EIEOS 中断的情况下,发送至少 32 个 speed_change 位置 1b 的 TS2 有序集。对于 128b/130b 和 1b/1b 编码,发送至少 128 个 speed_change 位置 1b 的 TS2 有序集。

在所接收到的 speed_change 位置 1b 的八个连续 TS2 有序集上所通告的数据速率被记录为对端端口所能支持的数据速率。下游端口会记录这八个连续 TS2 有序集中的 Autonomous Change 位(Symbol 4 bit 6),以便在 Recovery.Speed 子状态中可能记录到 Link Status 寄存器中。上游端口必须将其所接收到的这八个连续 TS2 有序集中通告的 Selectable De-emphasis 位(Symbol 4 bit 6)登记到 select_deemphasis 变量中。在 Recovery.Speed 中要更改为的新速率,是链路上双方端口都支持的最高数据速率。

对于上游端口:若当前工作数据速率为 2.5 GT/s 或 5.0 GT/s,且这八个连续 TS2 有序集是通告 8.0 GT/s 为所支持最高数据速率的 EQ TS2 有序集,则必须将 start_equalization_w_preset 变量置为 1b,并使用对应通道上八个连续 EQ TS2 有序集中接收到的值,更新 Lane Equalization Control Register Entry 的 Upstream Port 8.0 GT/s Transmitter Preset 和 Upstream Port 8.0 GT/s Receiver Preset Hint 字段。

对于上游端口:若当前工作数据速率为 2.5 GT/s 或 5.0 GT/s,且这八个连续 TS2 有序集是通告 32.0 GT/s 为所支持最高数据速率的 EQ TS2 有序集,且在 Configuration 状态期间双方组件之间已协商通过"均衡旁路至最高 NRZ 速率",则必须将 start_equalization_w_preset 变量置为 1b,并使用对应通道上八个连续 EQ TS2 有序集中接收到的值,更新 32.0 GT/s Lane Equalization Control Register Entry 的 Upstream Port 32.0 GT/s Transmitter Preset 字段。

对于上游端口:若当前工作数据速率为 8.0 GT/s、双方均通告支持 16.0 GT/s,且这八个连续 TS2 有序集为 128b/130b EQ TS2 有序集,则必须将 start_equalization_w_preset 变量置为 1b,并使用对应通道上八个连续 128b/130b EQ TS2 有序集中接收到的值,更新 16.0 GT/s Lane Equalization Control Register Entry 的 Upstream Port 16.0 GT/s Transmitter Preset 字段。

对于上游端口:若当前工作数据速率为 16.0 GT/s、双方均通告支持 32.0 GT/s,且这八个连续 TS2 有序集为 128b/130b EQ TS2 有序集,则必须将 start_equalization_w_preset 变量置为 1b,并使用对应通道上八个连续 128b/130b EQ TS2 有序集中接收到的值,更新 32.0 GT/s Lane Equalization Control Register Entry 的 Upstream Port 32.0 GT/s Transmitter Preset 字段。

对于上游端口:若当前工作数据速率为 32.0 GT/s、双方均通告支持 64.0 GT/s,且这八个连续 TS2 有序集为 128b/130b EQ TS2 有序集,则必须将 start_equalization_w_preset 变量置为 1b,并使用对应通道上八个连续 128b/130b EQ TS2 有序集中接收到的值,更新 64.0 GT/s Lane Equalization Control Register Entry 的 Upstream Port 64.0 GT/s Transmitter Preset 字段。

任何未接收到符合此标准的 EQ TS2 或 128b/130b EQ TS2 有序集的已配置通道,在首次以 8.0、16.0、32.0 或 64.0 GT/s 速率工作、并执行链路均衡之前,将使用与实现相关的预设值。

</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

<!-- 📄 Page 556 -->
---

<a id="sec-4-2-7-4-4-rcvrcfg-page556"></a>
## 4.2.7.4.4 Recovery.RcvrCfg (continued) | Recovery.RcvrCfg 子状态(续)


<div style="overflow-x: auto; max-width: 100%;">
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th width="50%">🇬🇧 English</th>
<th width="50%" style="background-color:#e8e8e8">🇨🇳 中文</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>

performing link equalization. A Downstream Port must set the start_equalization_w_preset variable to 1b if any of the following are true:

◦
the equalization_done_8GT_data_rate variable is 0b

◦
16.0 GT/s support is advertised by both ends and the equalization_done_16GT_data_rate variable is 0b

◦
32.0 GT/s support is advertised by both ends and the equalization_done_32GT_data_rate variable is 0b

◦
64.0 GT/s support is advertised by both ends and the equalization_done_64GT_data_rate variable is 0b

◦
the Perform Equalization bit in Link Control 3 Register is Set

◦
an implementation specific mechanism determined that equalization needs to be performed, following procedures described in § Section 4.2.4 .

A Downstream Port must record the 16.0 GT/s, 32.0 GT/s, or 64.0 GT/s Transmitter Preset settings advertised in the eight consecutive TS2 Ordered Sets received if they are 128b/130b EQ TS2 Ordered Sets, and 16.0 GT/s, 32.0 GT/s, or 64.0 GT/s support is advertised by both ends. The variable successful_speed_negotiation is set to 1b. Note that if the Link is already operating at the highest data rate supported by both Ports, Recovery.Speed is executed but the data rate is not changed. If 128b/130b or 1b/1b encoding is used and the Request Equalization bit is Set in the eight consecutive TS2 Ordered Sets, the Port must handle it as an equalization request as described in § Section 4.2.4 .

•
Next state is Recovery.Idle if the following two conditions are both true:

◦
Eight consecutive TS2 Ordered Sets are received on all configured Lanes with the same Link and Lane number that match what is being transmitted on those same Lanes (see § Section 4.2.7 for more on Matching Link and Lane Numbers for 1b/1b Encoding) with identical data rate identifiers within each Lane and one of the following two sub-conditions are true:

▪
the speed_change bit is 0b in the received eight consecutive TS2 Ordered Sets

▪
current data rate is 2.5 GT/s and either no 5.0 GT/s, or higher, data rate identifiers are set in the received eight consecutive TS2 Ordered Sets, or no 5.0 GT/s, or higher, data rate identifiers are being transmitted in the TS2 Ordered Sets

◦
16 TS2 Ordered Sets are sent after receiving one TS2 Ordered Set without being interrupted by any intervening EIEOS. The changed_speed_recovery variable and the directed_speed_change variable are reset to 0b on entry to Recovery.Idle.

◦
In Flit Mode, if the received eight consecutive TS2 Ordered Sets have the Hot Reset bit, the Disable Link bit, or the Loopback bit set on any configured Lane, the corresponding directed bit must be set.

◦
If the N_FTS value was changed, the new value must be used for future L0s states.

◦
When using 8b/10b encoding, Lane-to-Lane de-skew must be completed before leaving Recovery.RcvrCfg.

◦
The device must note the data rate identifier advertised on any configured Lane in the eight consecutive TS2 Ordered Sets described in this state transition. This will override any previously recorded value.

> **IMPLEMENTATION NOTE:**
> The above requirement ensures that both the components will immediately exit from Recovery.Idle to the corresponding Hot Reset/Disable/Loopback state without the follower having to send a data stream and waiting till the next scheduled SKP Ordered Set boundary.

</td>
<td style="background-color:#e8e8e8">

下游端口在以下任一条件为真时,必须将 start_equalization_w_preset 变量置为 1b:

◦
equalization_done_8GT_data_rate 变量为 0b。

◦
双方均通告支持 16.0 GT/s,且 equalization_done_16GT_data_rate 变量为 0b。

◦
双方均通告支持 32.0 GT/s,且 equalization_done_32GT_data_rate 变量为 0b。

◦
双方均通告支持 64.0 GT/s,且 equalization_done_64GT_data_rate 变量为 0b。

◦
Link Control 3 寄存器中的 Perform Equalization 位置 1。

◦
由实现特定机制判定需要执行均衡,过程遵循 § 4.2.4 节所述。

下游端口若接收到的八个连续 TS2 有序集为 128b/130b EQ TS2 有序集,且双方均通告支持 16.0 GT/s、32.0 GT/s 或 64.0 GT/s,则必须记录这八个连续 TS2 有序集中所通告的 16.0 GT/s、32.0 GT/s 或 64.0 GT/s 发送器预设设置。变量 successful_speed_negotiation 置为 1b。注意,若链路已经工作在双方端口都支持的最高数据速率,则会执行 Recovery.Speed 但不更改数据速率。若使用 128b/130b 或 1b/1b 编码,且八个连续 TS2 有序集中的 Request Equalization 位置 1,则端口必须按 § 4.2.4 节所述将其作为均衡请求处理。

•
若以下两个条件同时为真,则下一状态为 Recovery.Idle:

◦
在所有已配置通道上接收到八个连续 TS2 有序集,这些有序集具有与本端在同一通道上发送的相同链路号 (Link number) 和通道号 (Lane number)(关于 1b/1b 编码下链路号与通道号匹配详见 § 4.2.7 节),且每个通道内的数据速率标识符相同,并满足以下两个子条件之一:

▪
所接收的八个连续 TS2 有序集中 speed_change 位为 0b。

▪
当前数据速率为 2.5 GT/s,且所接收的八个连续 TS2 有序集中未设置 5.0 GT/s 或更高的数据速率标识符,或所发送的 TS2 有序集中未设置 5.0 GT/s 或更高的数据速率标识符。

◦
在接收到一个 TS2 有序集之后,在不被任何介入的 EIEOS 中断的情况下,发送 16 个 TS2 有序集。进入 Recovery.Idle 时,changed_speed_recovery 变量和 directed_speed_change 变量复位为 0b。

◦
在 Flit 模式下,若所接收的八个连续 TS2 有序集中,在任何已配置通道上设置 Hot Reset 位、Disable Link 位或 Loopback 位,则必须设置对应的 directed 位。

◦
若 N_FTS 值已更改,则新值必须用于以后的 L0s 状态。

◦
使用 8b/10b 编码时,必须在离开 Recovery.RcvrCfg 之前完成通道间去歪斜 (Lane-to-Lane de-skew)。

◦
设备必须记录本状态转换所述的八个连续 TS2 有序集中在任何已配置通道上所通告的数据速率标识符。这将覆盖之前记录的值。

> **实现说明:**
> 上述要求确保双方组件都将立即从 Recovery.Idle 退出至对应的 Hot Reset/Disable/Loopback 状态,而无需让跟随方发送数据流并等待下一个调度的 SKP 有序集边界。

</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
</div>


<!-- 📄 Page 557 -->
---

<a id="sec-4-2-7-4-4-rcvrcfg-page557"></a>
## 4.2.7.4.4 Recovery.RcvrCfg (continued) | Recovery.RcvrCfg 子状态(续)

<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th width="50%">🇬🇧 English</th>
<th width="50%" style="background-color:#e8e8e8">🇨🇳 中文</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>

◦
When using 128b/130b or 1b/1b encoding and if the Request Equalization bit is Set in the eight consecutive TS2 Ordered Sets, the device must note it and follow the rules in § Section 4.2.4 .

•
Next state is Configuration in Non-Flit Mode if eight consecutive TS1 Ordered Sets are received on any configured Lanes with Link or Lane numbers that do not match what is being transmitted on those same Lanes and 16 TS2 Ordered Sets are sent after receiving one TS1 Ordered Set, either 8b/10b or 128b/130b encoding is used, and one of the following two conditions apply:

◦
the speed_change bit is 0b on the received TS1 Ordered Sets

◦
current data rate is 2.5 GT/s and either no 5.0 GT/s, or higher, data rate identifiers are set in the received eight consecutive TS1 Ordered Sets, or no 5.0 GT/s, or higher, data rate identifiers are being transmitted in the TS2 Ordered Sets

The changed_speed_recovery variable and the directed_speed_change variable are reset to 0b if the LTSSM transitions to Configuration.

◦
If the N_FTS value was changed, the new value must be used for future L0s states.

•
Next state is Configuration in Flit Mode if all the following conditions are true:

◦
1 msec has elapsed after receiving one TS1 or TS2 Ordered Set in any configured Lane in this sub-state.

◦
One of the following conditions is true:

▪
Eight consecutive TS1 Ordered Sets are received after receiving a TS2 Ordered Set on any configured Lane

▪
Eight consecutive TS1 Ordered Sets are received with the Link or Lane number set to PAD and no TS2 Ordered Set was received on any configured Lane

▪
Eight consecutive TS2 Ordered Sets are received with Link number PAD on any configured Lane or a PAD is being transmitted in the TS2 Ordered Sets in any configured Lane (see § Section 4.2.7 for more on Matching Link and Lane Numbers for 1b/1b Encoding)

◦
At least 16 TS2 Ordered Sets have been transmitted after receiving either of the following:

▪
One TS1 Ordered Set with Link or Lane number set to PAD

▪
One TS2 Ordered Set

◦
The speed_change bit is 0b on the received TS1 or TS2 Ordered Sets.

The changed_speed_recovery variable and the directed_speed_change variable are reset to 0b if the LTSSM transitions to Configuration.

•
Next state is Recovery.Speed if the speed of operation has changed to a mutually negotiated data rate since entering Recovery from L0 or L1 (i.e., changed_speed_recovery = 1b) and an EIOS has been detected or an Electrical Idle condition has been inferred/detected on any of the configured Lanes and no configured Lane received a TS2 Ordered Set since entering this substate (Recovery.RcvrCfg). The new data rate to operate after leaving Recovery.Speed will be reverted back to the speed of operation during entry to Recovery from L0 or L1.

> **IMPLEMENTATION NOTE: REDUCING LINK WIDTH DUE TO ERRORS IN FLIT MODE**
> With Flit Mode, since there is no upconfig support, the reason to make the transition for Recovery → Configuration is to reduce the Link width due to errors. In that case, the Port that wants to reduce the Link width should send PAD in the Link Number field on those Lanes it does not want to be part of the configured Link.

</td>
<td style="background-color:#e8e8e8">

◦
使用 128b/130b 或 1b/1b 编码时,若八个连续 TS2 有序集中的 Request Equalization 位置 1,则设备必须记录该情况并遵循 § 4.2.4 节中的规则。

•
若在任何已配置通道上接收到八个连续 TS1 有序集,其链路号或通道号与本端在同一通道上发送的不匹配,且在接收到一个 TS1 有序集之后发送 16 个 TS2 有序集,使用 8b/10b 或 128b/130b 编码,且满足以下两个条件之一,则在非 Flit 模式下,下一状态为 Configuration:

◦
所接收的 TS1 有序集中 speed_change 位为 0b。

◦
当前数据速率为 2.5 GT/s,且所接收的八个连续 TS1 有序集中未设置 5.0 GT/s 或更高的数据速率标识符,或所发送的 TS2 有序集中未设置 5.0 GT/s 或更高的数据速率标识符。

若 LTSSM 转换至 Configuration,则 changed_speed_recovery 变量和 directed_speed_change 变量复位为 0b。

◦
若 N_FTS 值已更改,则新值必须用于以后的 L0s 状态。

•
若满足以下所有条件,则在 Flit 模式下,下一状态为 Configuration:

◦
在本子状态下,在任何已配置通道上接收到一个 TS1 或 TS2 有序集起 1 ms 已过。

◦
满足以下条件之一:

▪
在任何已配置通道上接收到一个 TS2 有序集之后,接收到八个连续 TS1 有序集。

▪
接收到八个连续 TS1 有序集,其链路号或通道号设置为 PAD,且任何已配置通道上未接收到 TS2 有序集。

▪
在任何已配置通道上接收到八个连续链路号设置为 PAD 的 TS2 有序集,或在任何已配置通道的 TS2 有序集中正在发送 PAD(关于 1b/1b 编码下链路号与通道号匹配详见 § 4.2.7 节)。

◦
在接收到以下任一情况之后,已发送至少 16 个 TS2 有序集:

▪
一个链路号或通道号设置为 PAD 的 TS1 有序集。

▪
一个 TS2 有序集。

◦
所接收的 TS1 或 TS2 有序集中 speed_change 位为 0b。

若 LTSSM 转换至 Configuration,则 changed_speed_recovery 变量和 directed_speed_change 变量复位为 0b。

•
若自 L0 或 L1 进入 Recovery 以来,工作速率已更改为双方协商的数据速率(即 changed_speed_recovery = 1b),且已检测到 EIOS,或在任何已配置通道上推断/检测到电气空闲状态,且自进入本子状态(Recovery.RcvrCfg)以来任何已配置通道均未接收到 TS2 有序集,则下一状态为 Recovery.Speed。离开 Recovery.Speed 后将要工作的新数据速率,将恢复为自 L0 或 L1 进入 Recovery 时的工作速率。

> **实现说明:Flit 模式下因错误而减少链路宽度**
> 在 Flit 模式下,由于不支持向上配置(upconfig),从 Recovery → Configuration 转换的原因是为了在发生错误时减少链路宽度。在这种情况下,希望减少链路宽度的端口应在其不希望成为已配置链路一部分的通道上的链路号 (Link Number) 字段中发送 PAD。

</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

<!-- 📄 Page 558 -->
---

<a id="sec-4-2-7-4-4-rcvrcfg-page558"></a>
## 4.2.7.4.4 Recovery.RcvrCfg (continued) | Recovery.RcvrCfg 子状态(续)


<div style="overflow-x: auto; max-width: 100%;">
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th width="50%">🇬🇧 English</th>
<th width="50%" style="background-color:#e8e8e8">🇨🇳 中文</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>

As described in § Section 4.2.5.4 , an Electrical Idle condition may be inferred if a TS1 or TS2 Ordered Set has not been received in a time interval specified in § Table 4-39.

•
Next state is Recovery.Speed if the speed of operation has not changed to a mutually negotiated data rate since entering Recovery from L0 or L1 (i.e., changed_speed_recovery = 0b) and the current speed of operation is greater than 2.5 GT/s and an EIOS has been detected or an Electrical Idle condition has been detected/inferred on any of the configured Lanes and no configured Lane received a TS2 Ordered Set since entering this substate (Recovery.RcvrCfg). The new data rate to operate after leaving Recovery.Speed will be 2.5 GT/s if 8b/10b or 128b/130b encoding is used. The new data rate to operate after leaving Recovery.Speed will be 32.0 GT/s if 1b/1b encoding is used.

As described in § Section 4.2.5.4 , an Electrical Idle condition may be inferred if a TS1 or TS2 Ordered Set has not been received in a time interval specified in § Table 4-39.

Note: This transition implies that the other side was unable to achieve Symbol lock or Block alignment at the speed with which it was operating. Hence both sides will go back to the 2.5 GT/s speed of operation and neither device will attempt to change the speed again without exiting Recovery state. It should also be noted that even though a speed change is involved here, the changed_speed_recovery will be 0b.

•
After a 48 ms timeout;

◦
The next state is Detect if the current data rate is 2.5 GT/s or 5.0 GT/s.

◦
The next state is Recovery.Idle if the idle_to_rlock_transitioned variable is less than FFh and the current data rate is 8.0 GT/s or higher.

i.
The changed_speed_recovery variable and the directed_speed_change variable are reset to 0b on entry to Recovery.Idle.

◦
Else the next state is Detect.

•
Next state is Disabled if directed.

◦
Note: "if directed" applies to a Downstream or optional crosslink Port that is instructed by a higher Layer to assert the Disable Link bit (TS1 and TS2) on the Link.

The clause, "if directed", also applies to an Upstream Port in Flit Mode that transitioned to this state with the Disable Link bit set in the training control field in any configured Lane in the eight consecutive TS2 Ordered Sets that resulted in the transition to this state.

•
Next state is Hot Reset if directed.

◦
Note: "if directed" applies to a Downstream or optional crosslink Port that is instructed by a higher Layer to assert the Hot Reset bit (TS1 and TS2) on the Link.

The clause, "if directed", also applies to an Upstream Port in Flit Mode that transitioned to this state with the Hot Reset bit set in the training control field in any configured Lane in the eight consecutive TS2 Ordered Sets that resulted in the transition to this state.

•
Next state is Configuration if directed.

◦
Note: "if directed" applies to a Port that is instructed by a higher Layer to optionally re-configure the Link (i.e., different width Link).

•
Next state is Loopback if directed to this state, and the Transmitter is capable of being a Loopback Lead, which is determined by implementation specific means.

◦
Note: "if directed" applies to a Port that is instructed by a higher Layer to assert the Loopback bit (TS1 and TS2) on the Link. and the Port becomes the Loopback Lead.

</td>
<td style="background-color:#e8e8e8">

如 § 4.2.5.4 节所述,若在 § 表 4-39 规定的时间间隔内未接收到 TS1 或 TS2 有序集,则可推断存在电气空闲状态。

•
若自 L0 或 L1 进入 Recovery 以来,工作速率未更改为双方协商的数据速率(即 changed_speed_recovery = 0b),且当前工作速率高于 2.5 GT/s,且已检测到 EIOS,或在任何已配置通道上检测/推断出电气空闲状态,且自进入本子状态(Recovery.RcvrCfg)以来任何已配置通道均未接收到 TS2 有序集,则下一状态为 Recovery.Speed。离开 Recovery.Speed 后将要工作的新数据速率:若使用 8b/10b 或 128b/130b 编码,则为 2.5 GT/s;若使用 1b/1b 编码,则为 32.0 GT/s。

如 § 4.2.5.4 节所述,若在 § 表 4-39 规定的时间间隔内未接收到 TS1 或 TS2 有序集,则可推断存在电气空闲状态。

注:此转换意味着对端无法在其工作速率下达到符号锁定 (Symbol lock) 或块对齐。因此双方将返回 2.5 GT/s 工作速率,且任何一方都不会在不退出 Recovery 状态的情况下再次尝试更改速率。还需注意,即使此处涉及速率变更,changed_speed_recovery 也将为 0b。

•
在 48 ms 超时后:

◦
若当前数据速率为 2.5 GT/s 或 5.0 GT/s,则下一状态为 Detect。

◦
若 idle_to_rlock_transitioned 变量小于 FFh,且当前数据速率为 8.0 GT/s 或更高,则下一状态为 Recovery.Idle。

i.
进入 Recovery.Idle 时,changed_speed_recovery 变量和 directed_speed_change 变量复位为 0b。

◦
否则下一状态为 Detect。

•
若被指示,则下一状态为 Disabled。

◦
注:"if directed"适用于由更高层指示在链路上置位 Disable Link 位(TS1 和 TS2)的下游端口或可选 crosslink 端口。

"if directed"条款也适用于 Flit 模式下的上游端口,该端口以导致进入本状态的八个连续 TS2 有序集中,任何已配置通道的 training control 字段中置位 Disable Link 位的方式转换至本状态。

•
若被指示,则下一状态为 Hot Reset。

◦
注:"if directed"适用于由更高层指示在链路上置位 Hot Reset 位(TS1 和 TS2)的下游端口或可选 crosslink 端口。

"if directed"条款也适用于 Flit 模式下的上游端口,该端口以导致进入本状态的八个连续 TS2 有序集中,任何已配置通道的 training control 字段中置位 Hot Reset 位的方式转换至本状态。

•
若被指示,则下一状态为 Configuration。

◦
注:"if directed"适用于由更高层指示可选地重新配置链路(即不同宽度的链路)的端口。

•
若被指示进入本状态,且发送器能够成为 Loopback Lead(由实现特定方式确定),则下一状态为 Loopback。

◦
注:"if directed"适用于由更高层指示在链路上置位 Loopback 位(TS1 和 TS2)的端口。该端口成为 Loopback Lead。

</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
</div>


<!-- 📄 Page 559 -->
---

<a id="sec-4-2-7-4-5"></a>
## 4.2.7.4.5 Recovery.Idle | Recovery.Idle 子状态

<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th width="50%">🇬🇧 English</th>
<th width="50%" style="background-color:#e8e8e8">🇨🇳 中文</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>

•
Next state is Disabled immediately after any configured Lane has the Disable Link bit asserted in two consecutively received TS1 Ordered Sets.

◦
Note: This is behavior only applicable to Upstream and optional crosslink Ports in Non-Flit Mode.

•
Next state is Hot Reset immediately after any configured Lane has the Hot Reset bit asserted in two consecutive TS1 Ordered Sets.

◦
Note: This is behavior only applicable to Upstream and optional crosslink Ports in Non-Flit Mode.

•
Next state is Configuration if two consecutive TS1 Ordered Sets are received on any configured Lane with a Lane number set to PAD. See § Section 4.2.7 for more on Matching Link and Lane Numbers for 1b/1b Encoding.

◦
Note: A Port that optionally transitions to Configuration to change the Link configuration is guaranteed to send Lane numbers set to PAD on all Lanes.

◦
Note: It is recommended that in Non-Flit Mode, the LTSSM initiate a Link width up/downsizing using this transition to reduce the time it takes to change the Link width. In Flit Mode, the Recovery.RcvrCfg to Configuration transition should be used.

•
Next state is Loopback if one of the following conditions is true:

◦
The Port is operating in Non-Flit Mode and any configured Lane has the Loopback bit asserted in two consecutive TS1 Ordered Sets.

◦
The port is operating in Flit Mode and the received eight consecutive TS2 Ordered Sets that resulted in the transition to this state had the Loopback bit set in the training control field in any configured Lane.

◦
Note: The device receiving the Ordered Set with the Loopback bit set becomes the Loopback Follower.

•
When using 8b/10b encoding, the Transmitter sends Idle data Symbols on all configured Lanes in Non-Flit Mode and IDLE Flits across all configured Lanes in Flit Mode.

•
When using 128b/130b encoding in Non-Flit Mode:

◦
If the data rate is 8.0 GT/s, the Transmitter sends one SDS Ordered Set on all configured Lanes to start a Data Stream and then sends Idle data Symbols on all configured Lanes. The first Idle data Symbol transmitted on Lane 0 is the first Symbol of the Data Stream.

◦
If the data rate is 16.0 GT/s or higher, the Transmitter sends one Control SKP Ordered Set followed immediately by one SDS Ordered Set on all configured Lanes to start a Data Stream and then sends Idle data Symbols on all configured Lanes. The first Idle data Symbol transmitted on Lane 0 is the first Symbol of the Data Stream.

◦
If directed to other states, Idle Symbols do not have to be sent, and must not be sent with 128b/130b encoding, before transitioning to the other states (i.e., Disabled, Hot Reset, Configuration, or Loopback)

•
When using 1b/1b encoding or 128b/130b encoding in Flit Mode:

> **IMPLEMENTATION NOTE: EDS USAGE**
> In 128b/130b encoding in Non-Flit Mode, on transition to Configuration or Loopback or Hot Reset or Disabled, an EDS must be sent if a Data Stream is active (i.e., an SDS Ordered Set has been sent). It is possible that the side that is not initiating Link Upconfigure has already transmitted SDS and transmitting Data Stream (Logical IDL) when it receives the TS1 Ordered Sets. In that situation, it will send EDS in the set of Lanes that are active before sending the TS1 Ordered Sets in Configuration.

</td>
<td style="background-color:#e8e8e8">

•
在任何已配置通道上连续接收到的两个 TS1 有序集中 Disable Link 位置位后,立即进入下一状态 Disabled。

◦
注:此行为仅适用于非 Flit 模式下的上游端口和可选 crosslink 端口。

•
在任何已配置通道上连续两个 TS1 有序集中 Hot Reset 位置位后,立即进入下一状态 Hot Reset。

◦
注:此行为仅适用于非 Flit 模式下的上游端口和可选 crosslink 端口。

•
若在任何已配置通道上接收到两个连续通道号设置为 PAD 的 TS1 有序集,则下一状态为 Configuration。关于 1b/1b 编码下链路号与通道号匹配详见 § 4.2.7 节。

◦
注:可选地转换至 Configuration 以更改链路配置的端口,保证在所有通道上发送通道号设置为 PAD。

◦
注:建议在非 Flit 模式下,LTSSM 通过此转换发起链路宽度增大/缩小,以减少更改链路宽度所需的时间。在 Flit 模式下,应使用从 Recovery.RcvrCfg 至 Configuration 的转换。

•
若满足以下条件之一,则下一状态为 Loopback:

◦
端口工作在非 Flit 模式下,且在任何已配置通道上连续两个 TS1 有序集中 Loopback 位置位。

◦
端口工作在 Flit 模式下,且导致进入本状态的所接收八个连续 TS2 有序集中,任何已配置通道的 training control 字段中 Loopback 位置位。

◦
注:接收到 Loopback 位置位的有序集的设备成为 Loopback Follower。

•
使用 8b/10b 编码时,发送器在非 Flit 模式下在所有已配置通道上发送 Idle 数据符号,在 Flit 模式下在所有已配置通道上发送 IDLE Flit。

•
在非 Flit 模式下使用 128b/130b 编码时:

◦
若数据速率为 8.0 GT/s,发送器在所有已配置通道上发送一个 SDS 有序集以启动数据流 (Data Stream),然后在所有已配置通道上发送 Idle 数据符号。在 Lane 0 上发送的第一个 Idle 数据符号是数据流的第一个符号。

◦
若数据速率为 16.0 GT/s 或更高,发送器在所有已配置通道上发送一个 Control SKP 有序集后立即跟随一个 SDS 有序集以启动数据流,然后在所有已配置通道上发送 Idle 数据符号。在 Lane 0 上发送的第一个 Idle 数据符号是数据流的第一个符号。

◦
若被指示进入其他状态,则不必发送 Idle 符号,且在使用 128b/130b 编码时,在转换至其他状态(即 Disabled、Hot Reset、Configuration 或 Loopback)之前不得发送。

•
在 Flit 模式下使用 1b/1b 编码或 128b/130b 编码时:

> **实现说明:EDS 的使用**
> 在非 Flit 模式下使用 128b/130b 编码时,在向 Configuration、Loopback、Hot Reset 或 Disabled 转换时,若数据流处于活动状态(即已发送 SDS 有序集),则必须发送 EDS。可能会出现未发起链路向上配置 (Link Upconfigure) 的一方在接收到 TS1 有序集时已发送 SDS 并正在发送数据流(逻辑 IDL)的情况。在这种情况下,该方将在 Configuration 中发送 TS1 有序集之前,在处于活动状态的通道集合中发送 EDS。

</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

<!-- 📄 Page 560 -->
---

<a id="sec-4-2-7-4-5-idle-page560"></a>
## 4.2.7.4.5 Recovery.Idle (continued) | Recovery.Idle 子状态(续)


<div style="overflow-x: auto; max-width: 100%;">
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th width="50%">🇬🇧 English</th>
<th width="50%" style="background-color:#e8e8e8">🇨🇳 中文</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>

◦
Transmitter sends one SDS Ordered Set sequence followed by a Control SKP Ordered Set on all configured Lanes followed by IDLE Flits to start a Data Stream.

◦
If directed to other states, Idle Flits do not have to be sent, and must not be sent before transitioning to the other states (i.e., Disabled, Hot Reset, Configuration, or Loopback)

•
When using 8b/10b encoding in Non-Flit Mode, next state is L0 if eight consecutive Symbol Times of Idle data are received on all configured Lanes and 16 Idle data Symbols are sent after receiving one Idle data Symbol.

◦
If software has written a 1b to the Retrain Link bit in the Link Control Register since the last transition to L0 from Recovery or Configuration, the Downstream Port must set the Link Bandwidth Management Status bit of the Link Status Register to 1b.

•
When using 128b/130b encoding in Non-Flit Mode, next state is L0 if eight consecutive Symbol Times of Idle data are received on all configured Lanes, 16 Idle data Symbols are sent after receiving one Idle data Symbol, and this state was not entered by a timeout from Recovery.RcvrCfg

◦
The Idle data Symbols must be received in Data Blocks.

◦
Lane-to-Lane de-skew must be completed before Data Stream processing starts.

◦
If software has written a 1b to the Retrain Link bit in the Link Control Register since the last transition to L0 from Recovery or Configuration, the Downstream Port must set the Link Bandwidth Management Status bit of the Link Status Register to 1b.

◦
The idle_to_rlock_transitioned variable is reset to 00h on transition to L0.

•
In Flit Mode, the next state is L0 if two consecutive IDLE Flits are received and the minimum number of IDLE Flits are sent after receiving one IDLE Flit and this state was not entered by a timeout from Recovery.RcvrCfg. The minimum number of IDLE Flits to send is 4 with 8b/10b or 128b/130b encoding and 8 with 1b/1b encoding.

◦
Lane-to-Lane de-skew must be completed before Data Stream processing starts.

◦
If software has written a 1b to the Retrain Link bit in the Link Control Register since the last transition to L0 from Recovery or Configuration, the Downstream Port must set the Link Bandwidth Management Status bit of the Link Status Register to 1b.

◦
The idle_to_rlock_transitioned variable is reset to 00h on transition to L0

•
Otherwise, after a 2 ms timeout:

◦
If the idle_to_rlock_transitioned variable is less than FFh, the next state is Recovery.RcvrLock.

▪
If the data rate is 8.0 GT/s or higher, the idle_to_rlock_transitioned variable is incremented by 1b upon transitioning to Recovery.RcvrLock.

▪
If the data rate is 5.0 GT/s (or, if supported in 2.5 GT/s), the idle_to_rlock_transitioned variable is set to FFh, upon transitioning to Recovery.RcvrLock.

◦
Else the next state is Detect

> **Figure 4-53 Recovery Substate Machine** §

Exit to
Disabled

Exit to
Loopback

A-0522A

Entry
Recovery

Exit to
Detect

Exit to
L0

Exit to
Configuration

Exit to
Hot Reset

Recovery.Equalization
Recovery.Idle
Recovery.RcvrLock
Recovery.Speed
Recovery.RcvrCfg

</td>
<td style="background-color:#e8e8e8">

◦
发送器在所有已配置通道上发送一个 SDS 有序集序列,后接一个 Control SKP 有序集,再接 IDLE Flit,以启动数据流。

◦
若被指示进入其他状态,则不必发送 Idle Flit,且在转换至其他状态(即 Disabled、Hot Reset、Configuration 或 Loopback)之前不得发送。

•
在非 Flit 模式下使用 8b/10b 编码时,若在所有已配置通道上接收到八个连续符号时间 (Symbol Time) 的 Idle 数据,且在接收到一个 Idle 数据符号后发送 16 个 Idle 数据符号,则下一状态为 L0。

◦
若自上一次从 Recovery 或 Configuration 转换至 L0 以来,软件已向 Link Control 寄存器的 Retrain Link 位写入 1b,则下游端口必须将 Link Status 寄存器的 Link Bandwidth Management Status 位置为 1b。

•
在非 Flit 模式下使用 128b/130b 编码时,若在所有已配置通道上接收到八个连续符号时间的 Idle 数据,在接收到一个 Idle 数据符号后发送 16 个 Idle 数据符号,且本状态不是因 Recovery.RcvrCfg 的超时而进入,则下一状态为 L0。

◦
Idle 数据符号必须在数据块 (Data Block) 中接收。

◦
数据流处理启动之前必须完成通道间去歪斜。

◦
若自上一次从 Recovery 或 Configuration 转换至 L0 以来,软件已向 Link Control 寄存器的 Retrain Link 位写入 1b,则下游端口必须将 Link Status 寄存器的 Link Bandwidth Management Status 位置为 1b。

◦
转换至 L0 时,idle_to_rlock_transitioned 变量复位为 00h。

•
在 Flit 模式下,若接收到两个连续 IDLE Flit,且在接收到一个 IDLE Flit 后发送最少数量的 IDLE Flit,且本状态不是因 Recovery.RcvrCfg 的超时而进入,则下一状态为 L0。8b/10b 或 128b/130b 编码下,发送的最少 IDLE Flit 数量为 4;1b/1b 编码下为 8。

◦
数据流处理启动之前必须完成通道间去歪斜。

◦
若自上一次从 Recovery 或 Configuration 转换至 L0 以来,软件已向 Link Control 寄存器的 Retrain Link 位写入 1b,则下游端口必须将 Link Status 寄存器的 Link Bandwidth Management Status 位置为 1b。

◦
转换至 L0 时,idle_to_rlock_transitioned 变量复位为 00h。

•
否则,在 2 ms 超时后:

◦
若 idle_to_rlock_transitioned 变量小于 FFh,则下一状态为 Recovery.RcvrLock。

▪
若数据速率为 8.0 GT/s 或更高,在转换至 Recovery.RcvrLock 时,idle_to_rlock_transitioned 变量加 1b。

▪
若数据速率为 5.0 GT/s(或在 2.5 GT/s 下受支持时),在转换至 Recovery.RcvrLock 时,idle_to_rlock_transitioned 变量置为 FFh。

◦
否则下一状态为 Detect。

> **Figure 4-53 Recovery Substate Machine | Recovery 子状态机** §

Exit to
Disabled
(退出至 Disabled)

Exit to
Loopback
(退出至 Loopback)

A-0522A

(Recovery 入口)

(退出至 L0)

Exit to

(退出至 Hot Reset)

Recovery.Equalization
Recovery.Idle
Recovery.RcvrLock
Recovery.Speed
Recovery.RcvrCfg

</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
</div>


<!-- 📄 Page 561 -->

<a id="sec-4-2-7-4-6-L0"></a>
## 4.2.7.4.6 L0 State | L0 状态

<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th width="50%">🇬🇧 English</th>
<th width="50%" style="background-color:#e8e8e8">🇨🇳 中文</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>

This is the normal operational state. It includes the L0p state, where some Lanes can be in idle state.

•
LinkUp = 1b (status is set true).

◦
On receipt of an STP or SDP Symbol, the idle_to_rlock_transitioned variable is reset to 00h.

•
For an Upstream Port, the directed_speed_change variable must not be set to 1b if it has never recorded greater than 2.5 GT/s data rate support advertised in Configuration.Complete or Recovery.RcvrCfg substates by the Downstream Port since exiting the Detect state.

•
For a Downstream Port, the directed_speed_change variable must not be set to 1b if it has never recorded greater than 2.5 GT/s data rate support advertised in Configuration.Complete or Recovery.RcvrCfg substates by the Upstream Port since exiting the Detect state. If greater than 2.5 GT/s data rate support has been noted, the Downstream Port must set the directed_speed_change variable to 1b if the Retrain Link bit of the Link Control Register is set to 1b and the Target Link Speed field in the Link Control 2 Register is not equal to the current Link speed.

•
A Port supporting greater than 2.5 GT/s data rates must participate in the speed change even if the Link is not in DL_Active state if it is requested by the other side through the TS Ordered Sets.

•
Next state is Recovery if directed to change speed (directed_speed_change variable = 1b) by a higher layer and any of the following three conditions are satisfied:

◦
both sides support greater than 2.5 GT/s data rates and the Link is in DL_Active state

◦
both sides support 8.0 GT/s or higher data rates, in order to perform Transmitter Equalization at a data rate supported by both sides, in which case the changed_speed_recovery bit is reset to 0b

◦
an alternate protocol was selected by the Downstream Port and the current data rate of operation is not an operational data rate in the negotiated alternate protocol

•
Next state is Recovery if directed to change Link width.

◦
The upper layer must not direct a Port to increase the Link width if the other Port did not advertise the capability to upconfigure the Link width during the Configuration state or if the Link is currently operating at the maximum possible width it negotiated on initial entry to the L0 state.

◦
Normally, the upper layer will not reduce width if upconfigure_capable is reset to 0b other than for reliability reasons, since the Link will not be able to go back to the original width if upconfigure_capable is 0b. A Port must not initiate reducing the Link width for reasons other than reliability if the Hardware Autonomous Width Disable bit in the Link Control Register is set to 1b.

◦
The decision to initiate an increase or decrease in the Link width, as allowed by the specification, is implementation specific.

•
Next state is Recovery if a TS1 or TS2 Ordered Set is received on any configured Lane or an EIEOS is received on any configured Lane in 128b/130b or 1b/1b encoding.

•
Next state is Recovery if directed to this state. If Electrical Idle is detected/inferred on all Lanes without receiving an EIOS on any Lane, the Port may transition to the Recovery state or may remain in L0. In the event that the Port is in L0 and the Electrical Idle condition occurs without receiving an EIOS, errors may occur and the Port may be directed to transition to Recovery.

◦
As described in § Section 4.2.5.4 , an Electrical Idle condition may be inferred on all Lanes under any one of the following conditions: (i) absence of a Flow Control Update DLLP in any 128 μs window, (ii) absence of a SKP Ordered Set in any of the configured Lanes in any 128 μs window, or (iii) absence of a Flow Control Update DLLP, an Optimized_Update_FC, or a SKP Ordered Set in any of the configured Lanes in any 128 μs window.

</td>
<td style="background-color:#e8e8e8">

这是正常的工作状态。它包括 L0p 状态,在 L0p 状态下部分通道可以处于空闲状态。

•
LinkUp = 1b(状态置真)。

◦
在接收到 STP 或 SDP 符号时,idle_to_rlock_transitioned 变量复位为 00h。

•
对于上游端口,若自退出 Detect 状态以来从未记录到下游端口在 Configuration.Complete 或 Recovery.RcvrCfg 子状态中通告支持高于 2.5 GT/s 的数据速率,则不得将 directed_speed_change 变量置为 1b。

•
对于下游端口,若自退出 Detect 状态以来从未记录到上游端口在 Configuration.Complete 或 Recovery.RcvrCfg 子状态中通告支持高于 2.5 GT/s 的数据速率,则不得将 directed_speed_change 变量置为 1b。若已记录支持高于 2.5 GT/s 的数据速率,则当 Link Control 寄存器的 Retrain Link 位置为 1b 且 Link Control 2 寄存器的 Target Link Speed 字段不等于当前链路速率时,下游端口必须将 directed_speed_change 变量置为 1b。

•
支持高于 2.5 GT/s 数据速率的端口,即使链路不处于 DL_Active 状态,只要对端通过 TS 有序集请求速率变更,也必须参与速率变更。

•
若由更高层指示更改速率(directed_speed_change 变量 = 1b),且满足以下三个条件中的任一条件,则下一状态为 Recovery:

◦
双方均支持高于 2.5 GT/s 的数据速率,且链路处于 DL_Active 状态。

◦
双方均支持 8.0 GT/s 或更高数据速率,以在双方都支持的数据速率上执行发送器均衡,此时 changed_speed_recovery 位复位为 0b。

◦
由下游端口选择了备用协议 (alternate protocol),且当前工作数据速率不是所协商备用协议中的可操作数据速率。

•
若被指示更改链路宽度,则下一状态为 Recovery。

◦
若对端端口在 Configuration 状态期间未通告向上配置链路宽度的能力,或链路当前工作于其初始进入 L0 状态时所协商的最大可能宽度,则上层不得指示端口增大链路宽度。

◦
通常,除非出于可靠性原因,若 upconfigure_capable 复位为 0b,则上层不会减小宽度,因为若 upconfigure_capable 为 0b,链路将无法恢复到原始宽度。若 Link Control 寄存器中的 Hardware Autonomous Width Disable 位置为 1b,则端口不得因可靠性以外的原因发起链路宽度减小。

◦
在规范允许范围内,发起链路宽度增大或减小的决定由实现自行决定。

•
若在任何已配置通道上接收到 TS1 或 TS2 有序集,或在 128b/130b 或 1b/1b 编码下在任何已配置通道上接收到 EIEOS,则下一状态为 Recovery。

•
若被指示进入本状态,则下一状态为 Recovery。若在所有通道上检测/推断出电气空闲而未在任何通道上接收到 EIOS,则端口可转换至 Recovery 状态,或可保持在 L0 状态。在端口处于 L0 状态且在未接收到 EIOS 的情况下发生电气空闲条件时,可能会发生错误,且端口可能被指示转换至 Recovery。

◦
如 § 4.2.5.4 节所述,在以下任一情况下,可在所有通道上推断存在电气空闲状态:(i) 在 128 μs 时间窗口内未出现流控更新 DLLP (Flow Control Update DLLP),(ii) 在 128 μs 时间窗口内,任何已配置通道上未出现 SKP 有序集,或 (iii) 在 128 μs 时间窗口内,任何已配置通道上未出现流控更新 DLLP、Optimized_Update_FC 或 SKP 有序集。

</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>


---

<a id="sec-4-2-7-5"></a>
## 4.2.7.5 L0 | L0


<div style="overflow-x: auto; max-width: 100%;">
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th width="50%">🇬🇧 English</th>
<th width="50%" style="background-color:#e8e8e8">🇨🇳 中文</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>

Note: "if directed" applies to a Port that is instructed by a higher Layer to transition to Recovery including the Retrain Link bit in the Link Control Register being set.

The Transmitter may complete any TLP or DLLP in progress.

- Next state is L0s for only the Transmitter if directed to this state and the Transmitter implements L0s. See § Section 4.2.7.6.2.

  Note: "if directed" applies to a Port that is instructed by a higher Layer to initiate L0s (see § Section 5.4.1.1.1).

  Note: This is a point where the TX and RX may diverge into different LTSSM (链路训练与状态机) states.

- Next state is L0s for only the Receiver if an EIOS is received on any Lane, the Receiver implements L0s, and the Port is not directed to L1 or L2 states by any higher layers. See § Section 4.2.7.6.1.

  Note: This is a point where the TX and RX may diverge into different LTSSM states.

- Next state is Recovery if an EIOS is received on any Lane, the Receiver does not implement L0s, the Port is not directed to L1 or L2 states by any higher layers, and the EIOS is not expected as part of an L0p transition to a lower width. See § Section 4.2.7.6.1 and § Section 4.2.6.7.

- Next state is L1:
  i. If directed
  and
  ii. an EIOS is received on any Lane
  and
  iii. an EIOSQ is transmitted on all Lanes.

  Note: "if directed" is defined as both ends of the Link having agreed to enter L1 immediately after the condition of both the receipt and transmission of the EIOS(s) is met. A transition to L1 can be initiated by PCI-PM (see § Section 5.3.2.1) or by ASPM (see § Section 4.2.7.6.1).

  Note: When directed by a higher Layer one side of the Link always initiates and exits to L1 by transmitting the EIOS(s) on all Lanes, followed by a transition to Electrical Idle.<sup>86</sup> The same Port then waits for the receipt of an EIOS on any Lane, and then immediately transitions to L1. Conversely, the side of the Link that first receives the EIOS(s) on any Lane must send an EIOSQ on all Lanes and immediately transition to L1.

- Next state is L2:
  i. If directed
  and
  ii. an EIOS is received on any Lane
  and
  iii. an EIOSQ is transmitted on all Lanes.

  Note: "if directed" is defined as both ends of the Link having agreed to enter L2 immediately after the condition of both the receipt and transmission of the EIOS(s) is met (see § Section 5.3.2.3 for more details).

  Note: When directed by a higher Layer, one side of the Link always initiates and exits to L2 by transmitting EIOS on all Lanes followed by a transition to Electrical Idle.<sup>87</sup> The same Port then waits for the receipt of EIOS on any Lane, and then immediately transitions to L2. Conversely, the side of the Link that first receives an EIOS on any Lane must send an EIOSQ on all Lanes and immediately transition to L2.

The L0s substate machine is shown in § Figure 4-54.

A Receiver must implement L0s if its Port advertises support for L0s, as indicated by the ASPM Support field in the Link Capabilities Register. It is permitted for a Receiver to implement L0s even if its Port does not advertise support for L0s.

- Next state is Rx_L0s.Idle after a T<sub>TX-IDLE-MIN</sub> (§ Table 8-7) timeout.

  Note: This is the minimum time the Transmitter must be in an Electrical Idle condition.

- Next state is Rx_L0s.FTS if the Receiver detects an exit from Electrical Idle on any Lane of the configured Link.

- Next state is Rx_L0s.FTS after a 100 ms timeout if the current data rate is 8.0 GT/s or higher and the Port's Receivers do not meet the Z<sub>RX-DC</sub> specification for 2.5 GT/s (see § Table 8-12). All Ports are permitted to implement the timeout and transition to Rx_L0s.FTS when the data rate is 8.0 GT/s or higher.

- The next state is L0 if a SKP Ordered Set is received in 8b/10b encoding or the SDS Ordered Set is received for 128b/130b encoding on all configured Lanes of the Link.

  The Receiver must be able to accept valid data immediately after the SKP Ordered Set for 8b/10b encoding.

  The Receiver must be able to accept valid data immediately after the SDS Ordered Set for 128b/130b encoding.

  Lane-to-Lane de-skew must be completed before leaving Rx_L0s.FTS.

- Otherwise, next state is Recovery after the N_FTS timeout.

  When using 8b/10b encoding: The N_FTS timeout shall be no shorter than 40*[N_FTS+3]*UI (The 3 * 40 UI is derived from six Symbols to cover a maximum SKP Ordered Set + four Symbols for a possible extra FTS+2 Symbols of design margin), and no longer than twice this amount. When the Extended Synch bit is Set the Receiver N_FTS timeout must be adjusted to no shorter than 40*[2048]*UI (2048 FTSs) and no longer than 40* [4096]*UI (4096 FTSs). Implementations must take into account the worst case Lane to Lane skew, their design margins, as well as the four to eight consecutive EIE Symbols in speeds other than 2.5 GT/s when choosing the appropriate timeout value within the specification's defined range.

---

86. The common mode being driven must meet the Absolute Delta Between DC Common Mode During L0 and Electrical Idle (V<sub>TX-CM-DC-ACTIVE-IDLE-DELTA</sub>) specification (see § Table 8-7).
87. The common mode being driven does not need to meet the Absolute Delta Between DC Common Mode During L0 and Electrical Idle (V<sub>TX-CM-DC-ACTIVE-IDLE-DELTA</sub>) specification (see § Table 8-7).

</td>
<td style="background-color:#e8e8e8">

注:"if directed(若被指示)"适用于被更高层指示进入 Recovery 状态的端口,包括 Link Control Register 中的 Retrain Link 位被置位的情况。

发送器 (Transmitter) 可以完成任何正在进行的 TLP 或 DLLP。

- 下一状态为 L0s(仅针对发送器):若被指示进入此状态且发送器实现了 L0s。参见 § Section 4.2.7.6.2。

  注:"if directed"适用于被更高层指示发起 L0s 的端口(参见 § Section 5.4.1.1.1)。

  注:这是一个 TX 和 RX 可能分叉进入不同 LTSSM 状态的位置。

- 下一状态为 L0s(仅针对接收器):若在任意 Lane 上接收到 EIOS、接收器实现了 L0s,且端口未被任何更高层指示进入 L1 或 L2 状态。参见 § Section 4.2.7.6.1。

  注:这是一个 TX 和 RX 可能分叉进入不同 LTSSM 状态的位置。

- 下一状态为 Recovery:若在任意 Lane 上接收到 EIOS、接收器未实现 L0s、端口未被任何更高层指示进入 L1 或 L2 状态,且该 EIOS 不被预期为 L0p 降宽度转换的一部分。参见 § Section 4.2.7.6.1 和 § Section 4.2.6.7。

- 下一状态为 L1:
  i. 若被指示
  且
  ii. 在任意 Lane 上接收到 EIOS
  且
  iii. 在所有 Lane 上发送 EIOSQ。

  注:"if directed"定义为链路两端已同意在满足 EIOS 收发条件后立即进入 L1。L1 转换可由 PCI-PM 发起(参见 § Section 5.3.2.1)或由 ASPM 发起(参见 § Section 4.2.7.6.1)。

  注:当被更高层指示时,链路一侧始终通过在所有 Lane 上发送 EIOS 并随后过渡到电气空闲 (Electrical Idle) 来启动并退出至 L1。<sup>86</sup> 同一端口随后等待在任意 Lane 上接收到 EIOS,然后立即过渡到 L1。反之,首先在任意 Lane 上接收到 EIOS 的链路一侧必须在所有 Lane 上发送 EIOSQ 并立即过渡到 L1。

- 下一状态为 L2:
  i. 若被指示
  且
  ii. 在任意 Lane 上接收到 EIOS
  且
  iii. 在所有 Lane 上发送 EIOSQ。

  注:"if directed"定义为链路两端已同意在满足 EIOS 收发条件后立即进入 L2(更多细节参见 § Section 5.3.2.3)。

  注:当被更高层指示时,链路一侧始终通过在所有 Lane 上发送 EIOS 并随后过渡到电气空闲来启动并退出至 L2。<sup>87</sup> 同一端口随后等待在任意 Lane 上接收到 EIOS,然后立即过渡到 L2。反之,首先在任意 Lane 上接收到 EIOS 的链路一侧必须在所有 Lane 上发送 EIOSQ 并立即过渡到 L2。

L0s 子状态机如 § Figure 4-54 所示。

若端口通过 Link Capabilities Register 中 ASPM Support 字段通告支持 L0s,则接收器必须实现 L0s。即使端口未通告支持 L0s,接收器也被允许实现 L0s。

- 在 T<sub>TX-IDLE-MIN</sub>(§ Table 8-7)超时后,下一状态为 Rx_L0s.Idle。

  注:这是发送器必须处于电气空闲状态的最小时间。

- 若接收器在配置链路 (Link) 的任意 Lane 上检测到退出电气空闲,则下一状态为 Rx_L0s.FTS。

- 若当前数据速率为 8.0 GT/s 或更高,且端口的接收器不满足 2.5 GT/s 下的 Z<sub>RX-DC</sub> 规范(参见 § Table 8-12),则在 100 ms 超时后下一状态为 Rx_L0s.FTS。当数据速率为 8.0 GT/s 或更高时,所有端口均允许实现该超时并转换至 Rx_L0s.FTS。

- 下一状态为 L0:若在链路的所有已配置 Lane 上接收到 8b/10b 编码下的 SKP 有序集,或接收到 128b/130b 编码下的 SDS 有序集。

  接收器必须能够在 8b/10b 编码下 SKP 有序集之后立即接受有效数据。

  接收器必须能够在 128b/130b 编码下 SDS 有序集之后立即接受有效数据。

  在离开 Rx_L0s.FTS 之前必须完成 Lane 间去偏斜 (de-skew)。

- 否则,在 N_FTS 超时后下一状态为 Recovery。

  使用 8b/10b 编码时:N_FTS 超时不得短于 40*[N_FTS+3]*UI(3 * 40 UI 来自 6 个符号以覆盖最大 SKP 有序集 + 4 个符号以应对可能的额外 FTS + 2 个符号的设计裕量),且不得超过该值的两倍。当 Extended Synch 位置 1 时,接收器 N_FTS 超时必须调整为不短于 40*[2048]*UI(2048 个 FTS)且不长于 40*[4096]*UI(4096 个 FTS)。在选择规范定义范围内的适当超时时,实现必须考虑最坏情况的 Lane 间偏斜、其设计裕量,以及在 2.5 GT/s 以外速率下连续 4 到 8 个 EIE 符号。

---

86. 所驱动的共模电压必须满足 L0 与电气空闲之间 DC 共模绝对差 (V<sub>TX-CM-DC-ACTIVE-IDLE-DELTA</sub>) 规范(参见 § Table 8-7)。
87. 所驱动的共模电压无需满足 L0 与电气空闲之间 DC 共模绝对差 (V<sub>TX-CM-DC-ACTIVE-IDLE-DELTA</sub>) 规范(参见 § Table 8-7)。

</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
</div>

<a id="sec-4-2-7-6"></a>
## 4.2.7.6 L0s | L0s

<a id="sec-4-2-7-6-1"></a>
### 4.2.7.6.1 Receiver L0s | 接收器 L0s

<a id="sec-4-2-7-6-1-1"></a>
#### 4.2.7.6.1.1 Rx_L0s.Entry | Rx_L0s.Entry

<a id="sec-4-2-7-6-1-2"></a>
#### 4.2.7.6.1.2 Rx_L0s.Idle | Rx_L0s.Idle

<a id="sec-4-2-7-6-1-3"></a>
#### 4.2.7.6.1.3 Rx_L0s.FTS | Rx_L0s.FTS

<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th width="50%">🇬🇧 English</th>
<th width="50%" style="background-color:#e8e8e8">🇨🇳 中文</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>

When using 128b/130b encoding: The N_FTS timeout shall be no shorter than 130*[N_FTS+5+12+Floor(N_FTS/32)]*UI and no longer than twice this amount for 8.0 GT/s and 16.0 GT/s data rates. For 32.0 GT/s and above data rates, the N_FTS timeout shall be no shorter than 130*[N_FTS+10+12+2*Floor(N_FTS/32)]*UI and no longer than twice this amount. The 5+Floor(N_FTS/32) accounts for the first EIEOS, the last EIEOS, the SDS, the periodic EIEOS and an additional EIEOS in case an implementation chooses to send two EIEOS followed by an SDS when N_FTS is divisible by 32 for 8.0 GT/s and 16.0 GT/s data rates and correspondingly doubled for the 32.0 GT/s and higher data rates. The 12 is there to account for the number of SKP Ordered Sets that will be transmitted if the Extended Synch bit is Set. When the Extended Synch bit is Set, the timeout should be the same as the normal case with N_FTS equal to 4096.

The Transmitter must also transition to Recovery, but is permitted to complete any TLP or DLLP in progress.

It is recommended that the N_FTS field be increased when transitioning to Recovery to prevent future transitions to Recovery from Rx_L0s.FTS.

A Transmitter must implement L0s if its Port advertises support for L0s, as indicated by the ASPM Support field in the Link Capabilities Register. It is permitted for a Transmitter to implement L0s even if its Port does not advertise support for L0s.

- Transmitter sends an EIOSQ and enters Electrical Idle.

  The DC common mode voltage must be within specification by T<sub>TX-IDLE-SET-TO-IDLE</sub>.<sup>88</sup>

- Next state is Tx_L0s.Idle after a T<sub>TX-IDLE-MIN</sub> (§ Table 8-7) timeout.

- Next state is Tx_L0s.FTS if directed.

</td>
<td style="background-color:#e8e8e8">

使用 128b/130b 编码时:对于 8.0 GT/s 和 16.0 GT/s 数据速率,N_FTS 超时不得短于 130*[N_FTS+5+12+Floor(N_FTS/32)]*UI,且不得超过该值的两倍。对于 32.0 GT/s 及以上数据速率,N_FTS 超时不得短于 130*[N_FTS+10+12+2*Floor(N_FTS/32)]*UI,且不得超过该值的两倍。5+Floor(N_FTS/32) 用于涵盖第一个 EIEOS、最后一个 EIEOS、SDS、周期性 EIEOS,以及在 8.0 GT/s 和 16.0 GT/s 数据速率下 N_FTS 能被 32 整除时,实现选择发送两个 EIEOS 后跟一个 SDS 的额外 EIEOS,32.0 GT/s 及更高数据速率下则相应加倍。12 用于计入在 Extended Synch 位置 1 时将发送的 SKP 有序集数量。当 Extended Synch 位置 1 时,超时应与 N_FTS 等于 4096 时的常规情况相同。

发送器也必须过渡到 Recovery,但允许完成任何正在进行的 TLP 或 DLLP。

建议在过渡到 Recovery 时增大 N_FTS 字段,以防止未来从 Rx_L0s.FTS 再次进入 Recovery。

若端口通过 Link Capabilities Register 中 ASPM Support 字段通告支持 L0s,则发送器必须实现 L0s。即使端口未通告支持 L0s,发送器也被允许实现 L0s。

- 发送器发送 EIOSQ 并进入电气空闲。

  在 T<sub>TX-IDLE-SET-TO-IDLE</sub> 之前,DC 共模电压必须满足规范要求。<sup>88</sup>

- 在 T<sub>TX-IDLE-MIN</sub>(§ Table 8-7)超时后,下一状态为 Tx_L0s.Idle。

- 若被指示,下一状态为 Tx_L0s.FTS。

</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

---

<a id="sec-4-2-7-6-2"></a>
### 4.2.7.6.2 Transmitter L0s | 发送器 L0s

<a id="sec-4-2-7-6-2-1"></a>
#### 4.2.7.6.2.1 Tx_L0s.Entry | Tx_L0s.Entry

<a id="sec-4-2-7-6-2-2"></a>
#### 4.2.7.6.2.2 Tx_L0s.Idle | Tx_L0s.Idle

> **IMPLEMENTATION NOTE:**
> **INCREASE OF N_FTS DUE TO TIMEOUT IN RX_L0S.FTS | Rx_L0s.FTS 超时导致 N_FTS 增加**
>
> The Transmitter sends the N_FTS Fast Training Sequences by going through Tx_L0s.FTS substate to enable the Receiver to reacquire its bit and Symbol lock or Block alignment. In the absence of the N_FTS Fast Training Sequence, the Receiver will timeout in Rx_L0s.FTS substate and may increase the N_FTS number it advertises in the Recovery state.
> §
>
> 发送器通过经过 Tx_L0s.FTS 子状态来发送 N_FTS 快速训练序列 (Fast Training Sequences),以使接收器能够重新获取其位和符号锁定或块对齐。若没有 N_FTS 快速训练序列,接收器将在 Rx_L0s.FTS 子状态中超时,并可能增大其在 Recovery 状态中通告的 N_FTS 数量。

---

88. 所驱动的共模电压必须满足 L0 与电气空闲之间 DC 共模绝对差 (V<sub>TX-CM-DC-ACTIVE-IDLE-DELTA</sub>) 规范(参见 § Table 8-7)。

[⬆️ 返回目录](#-本章目录-table-of-contents)

---

<!-- 📄 Page 565 -->
---

<a id="sec-4-2-7-6-2-3"></a>
#### 4.2.7.6.2.3 Tx_L0s.FTS | Tx_L0s.FTS


<div style="overflow-x: auto; max-width: 100%;">
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th width="50%">🇬🇧 English</th>
<th width="50%" style="background-color:#e8e8e8">🇨🇳 中文</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>

- Transmitter must send N_FTS Fast Training Sequences on all configured Lanes.

  Four to eight EIE Symbols must be sent prior to transmitting the N_FTS (or 4096 if the Extended Synch bit is Set) number of FTS in 5.0 GT/s data rates. An EIEOSQ must be sent prior to transmitting the N_FTS (or 4096 if the Extended Synch bit is Set) number of FTS with 128b/130b encoding. In 2.5 GT/s speed, up to one full FTS may be sent before the N_FTS (or 4096 if the Extended Synch bit is Set) number of FTSs are sent.

  SKP Ordered Sets must not be inserted before all FTSs as defined by the agreed upon N_FTS parameter are transmitted.

  If the Extended Synch bit is Set, the Transmitter must send 4096 Fast Training Sequences, inserting SKP Ordered Sets according to the requirements in § Section 4.2.5.6.

- When using 8b/10b encoding, the Transmitter must send a single SKP Ordered Set on all configured Lanes.

- When using 128b/130b encoding, the Transmitter must send one EIEOSQ followed by one SDS Ordered Set on all configured Lanes. Note: The first Symbol transmitted on Lane 0 after the SDS Ordered Set is the first Symbol of the Data Stream.

- Next state must be L0, after completing the above required transmissions.

</td>
<td style="background-color:#e8e8e8">

- 发送器必须在所有已配置 Lane 上发送 N_FTS 快速训练序列。

  在 5.0 GT/s 数据速率下,必须在发送 N_FTS 个(若 Extended Synch 位置 1 则为 4096 个)FTS 之前发送 4 到 8 个 EIE 符号。使用 128b/130b 编码时,必须在发送 N_FTS 个(若 Extended Synch 位置 1 则为 4096 个)FTS 之前发送一个 EIEOSQ。在 2.5 GT/s 速率下,可在发送 N_FTS 个(若 Extended Synch 位置 1 则为 4096 个)FTS 之前发送最多一个完整的 FTS。

  在按协商一致的 N_FTS 参数定义的所有 FTS 发送完毕之前,不得插入 SKP 有序集。

  若 Extended Synch 位置 1,发送器必须发送 4096 个快速训练序列,并根据 § Section 4.2.5.6 中的要求插入 SKP 有序集。

- 使用 8b/10b 编码时,发送器必须在所有已配置 Lane 上发送单个 SKP 有序集。

- 使用 128b/130b 编码时,发送器必须在所有已配置 Lane 上发送一个 EIEOSQ 后跟一个 SDS 有序集。注:SDS 有序集之后在 Lane 0 上发送的第一个符号是数据流 (Data Stream) 的第一个符号。

- 完成上述所需发送后,下一状态必须为 L0。

</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
</div>


> **IMPLEMENTATION NOTE:**
> **NO SKP ORDERED SET REQUIREMENT WHEN EXITING L0S AT 16.0 GT/S OR HIGHER DATA RATES | 在 16.0 GT/s 或更高数据速率退出 L0s 时无需 SKP 有序集**
>
> Unlike in other LTSSM states, when exiting Tx_L0s.FTS no Control SKP Ordered Set is transmitted before transmitting the SDS. This results in the Data Parity information associated with the last portion of the previous datastream being discarded. Not sending the Control SKP Ordered Set reduces complexity and improves exit latency.
> §
>
> 与其他 LTSSM 状态不同,从 Tx_L0s.FTS 退出时,在发送 SDS 之前不会发送 Control SKP 有序集。这导致与先前数据流最后部分关联的数据奇偶校验信息被丢弃。不发送 Control SKP 有序集可降低复杂度并改善退出延迟。

> **Figure 4-54.** L0s Substate Machine
> <img src="figures/chapter_04/fig_0566_1_tight.png" width="700">

<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th width="50%">🇬🇧 English</th>
<th width="50%" style="background-color:#e8e8e8">🇨🇳 中文</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>

The L1 substate machine is shown in § Figure 4-55.

- All configured Transmitters are in Electrical Idle.

  The DC common mode voltage must be within specification by T<sub>TX-IDLE-SET-TO-IDLE</sub>.

- The next state is L1.Idle after a T<sub>TX-IDLE-MIN</sub> (§ Table 8-7) timeout.

  Note: This guarantees that the Transmitter has established the Electrical Idle condition.

- Transmitter remains in Electrical Idle.

</td>
<td style="background-color:#e8e8e8">

L1 子状态机如 § Figure 4-55 所示。

- 所有已配置的发送器均处于电气空闲状态。

  在 T<sub>TX-IDLE-SET-TO-IDLE</sub> 之前,DC 共模电压必须满足规范要求。

- 在 T<sub>TX-IDLE-MIN</sub>(§ Table 8-7)超时后,下一状态为 L1.Idle。

  注:这保证了发送器已建立电气空闲条件。

- 发送器保持电气空闲。

</td>
</tr>

</table>

<!-- 📄 Page 567 -->

<a id="sec-4-2-7-7-1"></a>
## 4.2.7.7.1 L1.Entry | L1.Entry


<div style="overflow-x: auto; max-width: 100%;">
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th width="50%">🇬🇧 English</th>
<th width="50%" style="background-color:#e8e8e8">🇨🇳 中文</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>

This is the entry substate to L1. Refer to § Figure 4-54 for a graphical depiction of all L1 substates.

- All Receivers must meet the ZRX-DC specification for 2.5 GT/s within 1 ms (see § Table 8-12).
- All configured Transmitters must remain in Electrical Idle for a minimum time of TTX-IDLE-MIN.
  - The DC common mode voltage does not have to be within specification.
  - The Receiver needs to wait a minimum of TTX-IDLE-MIN to start looking for Electrical Idle Exit.
- Next state is L1.Idle after a minimum time of TTX-IDLE-MIN.

</td>
<td style="background-color:#e8e8e8">

L1 的入口子状态。所有 L1 子状态的图形化描述请参见 § Figure 4-54。

- 所有接收器必须在 1 ms 内满足 2.5 GT/s 的 ZRX-DC 规范 (见 § Table 8-12)。
- 所有已配置的发送器必须在电气空闲 (Electrical Idle) 状态保持至少 TTX-IDLE-MIN 时间。
  - 此时 DC 共模电压不必满足规范要求。
  - 接收器需要至少等待 TTX-IDLE-MIN 后才开始侦测电气空闲退出。
- 在至少经过 TTX-IDLE-MIN 时间后,下一状态为 L1.Idle。

</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
</div>


[⬆️ 返回目录](#-本章目录-table-of-contents)

---

<a id="sec-4-2-7-7-2"></a>
## 4.2.7.7.2 L1.Idle | L1.Idle

<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th width="50%">🇬🇧 English</th>
<th width="50%" style="background-color:#e8e8e8">🇨🇳 中文</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>

- The DC common mode voltage must be within specification, except as allowed by L1 PM Substates, when applicable.^(89)
- A substate of L1 is entered when the conditions for L1 PM Substates are satisfied (see § Section 5.5).
  - The L1 PM Substate must be L1.0 when L1.Idle is entered or exited.
- Next state is Recovery if exit from Electrical Idle is detected on any Lane of a configured Link, or directed after remaining in this substate for a minimum of 40 ns in speeds other than 2.5 GT/s.
  - Ports are not required to arm the Electrical Idle exit detectors on all Lanes of the Link.
  - Note: A minimum stay of 40 ns is required in this substate in speeds other than 2.5 GT/s to account for the delay in the logic levels to arm the Electrical Idle detection circuitry in case the Link enters L1 and immediately exits the L1 state.
  - A Port is allowed to set the directed_speed_change variable to 1b following identical rules described in L0 for setting this variable. When making such a transition, the changed_speed_recovery variable must be reset to 0b. A Port may also go through Recovery back to L0 and then set the directed_speed_change variable to 1b on the transition from L0 to Recovery.
  - A Port is also allowed to enter Recovery from L1 if directed to change the Link width. The Port must follow identical rules for changing the Link width as described in the L0 state.
- Next state is Recovery after a 100 ms timeout if the current data rate is 8.0 GT/s or higher and the Port's Receivers do not meet the ZRX-DC specification for 2.5 GT/s. All Ports are permitted, but not encouraged, to implement the timeout and transition to Recovery when the data rate is 8.0 GT/s or higher.
  - This timeout is not affected by the L1 PM Substates mechanism.

**IMPLEMENTATION NOTE: 100 MS TIMEOUT IN L1**

Ports that meet the ZRX-DC specification for 2.5 GT/s while in the L1.Idle state and are therefore not required to implement the 100 ms timeout and transition to Recovery should avoid implementing it, since it will reduce the power savings expected from the L1 state.

^(89). The common mode being driven must meet the Absolute Delta Between DC Common Mode During L0 and Electrical Idle (VTX-CM-DC-ACTIVE-IDLE-DELTA) specification (see § Table 8-7).

</td>
<td style="background-color:#e8e8e8">

- DC 共模电压必须满足规范要求,除非 L1 PM Substates 另有允许。^(89)
- 当满足 L1 PM Substates 的条件时,即进入 L1 的子状态 (见 § Section 5.5)。
  - 在进入或退出 L1.Idle 时,L1 PM Substate 必须为 L1.0。
- 在 2.5 GT/s 以外的速度下,在该子状态停留至少 40 ns 之后,若检测到任一已配置链路的通道 (Lane) 退出电气空闲,或者被指示进入下一状态,则下一状态为 Recovery。
  - 端口无需在链路的所有通道上都使能电气空闲退出检测器。
  - 注:在 2.5 GT/s 以外的速度下,需要在该子状态至少停留 40 ns,以便在链路刚进入 L1 又立即退出 L1 的情况下,逻辑电平有足够的时间使能电气空闲检测电路。
  - 端口允许按照 L0 中所述的相同规则将 directed_speed_change 变量置为 1b。在进行此转换时,changed_speed_recovery 变量必须复位为 0b。端口也可以经过 Recovery 回到 L0,然后在 L0 向 Recovery 转换时将 directed_speed_change 变量置为 1b。
  - 端口也被允许在收到更改链路宽度 (Link width) 的指示时,从 L1 进入 Recovery。端口必须遵循与 L0 状态中描述的相同的链路宽度更改规则。
- 当当前数据速率为 8.0 GT/s 或更高,且端口的接收器不满足 2.5 GT/s 的 ZRX-DC 规范时,经过 100 ms 超时后,下一状态为 Recovery。所有端口在数据速率为 8.0 GT/s 或更高时,可以(但不推荐)实现该超时并转换到 Recovery。
  - 该超时不受 L1 PM Substates 机制的影响。

**实现提示:L1 中的 100 ms 超时 (100 MS TIMEOUT IN L1)**

在 L1.Idle 状态期间,若端口的接收器满足 2.5 GT/s 的 ZRX-DC 规范,因此不必实现 100 ms 超时并转换到 Recovery,则端口应避免实现该超时,因为这将降低 L1 状态预期带来的省电效果。

^(89). 驱动出的共模电压必须满足 L0 与电气空闲之间 DC 共模绝对差值 (VTX-CM-DC-ACTIVE-IDLE-DELTA) 规范 (见 § Table 8-7)。

</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

---

<!-- 📄 Page 568 -->
---

> **Figure 4-55.** L1 Substate Machine / 图 4-55 L1 子状态机
> <img src="figures/chapter_04/fig_0568_1_tight.png" width="700">

<a id="sec-4-2-7-8"></a>
## 4.2.7.8 L2 | L2


<div style="overflow-x: auto; max-width: 100%;">
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th width="50%">🇬🇧 English</th>
<th width="50%" style="background-color:#e8e8e8">🇨🇳 中文</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>

The L2 substate machine is shown in § Figure 4-56.

- All Receivers must meet the ZRX-DC specification for 2.5 GT/s within 1 ms (see § Table 8-12).
- All configured Transmitters must remain in Electrical Idle for a minimum time of TTX-IDLE-MIN.
  - The DC common mode voltage does not have to be within specification.
  - The Receiver needs to wait a minimum of TTX-IDLE-MIN to start looking for Electrical Idle Exit.
- For Downstream Lanes:
  - For all Downstream Ports, the next state is Detect if a Beacon is received on at least Lane 0 or if directed.
    - Main power must be restored before entering Detect.
    - Note: "if directed" is defined as a higher layer decides to exit to Detect.
  - For a Switch, if a Beacon is received on at least Lane 0 of any of its Downstream Ports and the Upstream Port is in L2.Idle, the Upstream Port must be directed to L2.TransmitWake.
- For Upstream Lanes:
  - The next state is Detect if Electrical Idle Exit is detected on any predetermined set of Lanes.
    - The predetermined set of Lanes must include but is not limited to any Lane which has the potential of negotiating to Lane 0 of a Link. For multi-Lane Links the number of Lanes in the predetermined set must be greater than or equal to two.
    - A Switch must transition any Downstream Lanes to Detect.
  - Next state is L2.TransmitWake for an Upstream Port if directed to transmit a Beacon.

</td>
<td style="background-color:#e8e8e8">

L2 子状态机如 § Figure 4-56 所示。

- 所有接收器必须在 1 ms 内满足 2.5 GT/s 的 ZRX-DC 规范 (见 § Table 8-12)。
- 所有已配置的发送器必须在电气空闲状态保持至少 TTX-IDLE-MIN 时间。
  - 此时 DC 共模电压不必满足规范要求。
  - 接收器需要至少等待 TTX-IDLE-MIN 后才开始侦测电气空闲退出。
- 对于下游通道 (Downstream Lanes):
  - 对于所有下游端口 (Downstream Port),如果在 Lane 0 上接收到 Beacon 信号,或被指示,则下一状态为 Detect。
    - 在进入 Detect 之前必须恢复主电源。
    - 注:"被指示 (if directed)" 意味着由更高层决定退出到 Detect。
  - 对于交换机 (Switch),如果其任一 Downstream Port 的 Lane 0 上接收到 Beacon 信号,并且其 Upstream Port 处于 L2.Idle,则该 Upstream Port 必须被指示进入 L2.TransmitWake。
- 对于上游通道 (Upstream Lanes):
  - 如果在预定义通道集合中的任一通道上检测到电气空闲退出,则下一状态为 Detect。
    - 预定义通道集合必须包含但不限于任何可能协商成为 Lane 0 的通道。对于多通道链路,该预定义集合中的通道数必须大于或等于 2。
    - 交换机必须将所有 Downstream Lanes 转换到 Detect。
  - 对于 Upstream Port,如果被指示发送 Beacon,则下一状态为 L2.TransmitWake。

</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
</div>


[⬆️ 返回目录](#-本章目录-table-of-contents)

---

<a id="sec-4-2-7-8-1"></a>
## 4.2.7.8.1 L2.Idle | L2.Idle

<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th width="50%">🇬🇧 English</th>
<th width="50%" style="background-color:#e8e8e8">🇨🇳 中文</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>

- Note: Beacons may only be transmitted on Upstream Ports in the direction of the Root Complex.
- This state only applies to Upstream Ports.
- Transmit the Beacon on at least Lane 0.
- Next state is Detect if Electrical Idle exit is detected on any Upstream Port's Receiver that is in the direction of the Root Complex.
  - Note: Power is guaranteed to be restored when Upstream Receivers see Electrical Idle exited, but it may also be restored prior to Electrical Idle being exited.

</td>
<td style="background-color:#e8e8e8">

- 注:Beacon 信号只能在指向根复合体 (Root Complex) 方向的 Upstream Port 上发送。
- 此状态仅适用于 Upstream Port。
- 在至少 Lane 0 上发送 Beacon 信号。
- 如果在任一指向 Root Complex 方向的 Upstream Port 接收器上检测到电气空闲退出,则下一状态为 Detect。
  - 注:当 Upstream 接收器检测到电气空闲退出时,电源保证已恢复,但电源也可能在电气空闲退出之前就已经恢复。

</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

> **Figure 4-56.** L2 Substate Machine / 图 4-56 L2 子状态机
> <img src="figures/chapter_04/fig_0569_1_tight.png" width="700">

<a id="sec-4-2-7-8-2"></a>
## 4.2.7.8.2 L2.TransmitWake | L2.TransmitWake


<div style="overflow-x: auto; max-width: 100%;">
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th width="50%">🇬🇧 English</th>
<th width="50%" style="background-color:#e8e8e8">🇨🇳 中文</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>

- It is recommended to Clear LinkUp upon entry to Disabled, without waiting for the EIOSQ to be transmitted or the EIOS to be received.
- All Lanes transmit 16 to 32 TS1 Ordered Sets with the Disable Link bit asserted and then transition to Electrical Idle.
  - An EIOSQ must be sent prior to entering Electrical Idle.
  - The DC common mode voltage does not have to be within specification.^(90)
- If an EIOSQ was transmitted and an EIOS was received on any Lane (even while transmitting TS1 with the Disable Link bit asserted), then:
  - LinkUp = 0b (False), unless already Cleared, as recommended above.
    - At this point, the Lanes are considered Disabled.
    - For Upstream Ports: All Receivers must meet the ZRX-DC specification for 2.5 GT/s within 1 ms (see § Table 8-12).
    - For Upstream Ports: The next state is Detect when Electrical Idle exit is detected on at least one Lane.
- For Downstream Ports: The next state is Detect when directed (e.g., when the Link Disable bit is reset to 0b by software).
- For Upstream Ports: If no EIOS is received after a 2 ms timeout, the next state is Detect.

^(90). The common mode being driven does need to meet the Absolute Delta Between DC Common Mode During L0 and Electrical Idle (VTX-CM-DC-ACTIVE-IDLE-DELTA) specification (see § Table 8-7).

</td>
<td style="background-color:#e8e8e8">

- 推荐在进入 Disabled 时清除 LinkUp,而不必等待 EIOSQ 发送完成或 EIOS 接收完成。
- 所有通道发送 16 到 32 个 Disable Link 位置 1 的 TS1 有序集 (Ordered Set),然后转换到电气空闲。
  - 在进入电气空闲之前必须发送 EIOSQ。
  - 此时 DC 共模电压不必满足规范要求。^(90)
- 如果已发送 EIOSQ,并且在任何通道上接收到 EIOS(即使在发送 Disable Link 位置 1 的 TS1 时),则:
  - LinkUp = 0b (假),除非如上所述已预先清除。
    - 此时,这些通道被视为已禁用 (Disabled)。
    - 对于 Upstream Port:所有接收器必须在 1 ms 内满足 2.5 GT/s 的 ZRX-DC 规范 (见 § Table 8-12)。
    - 对于 Upstream Port:当在至少一条通道上检测到电气空闲退出时,下一状态为 Detect。
- 对于 Downstream Port:被指示时(例如,软件将 Link Disable 位复位为 0b),下一状态为 Detect。
- 对于 Upstream Port:如果在 2 ms 超时内未接收到 EIOS,则下一状态为 Detect。

^(90). 驱动出的共模电压确实需要满足 L0 与电气空闲之间 DC 共模绝对差值 (VTX-CM-DC-ACTIVE-IDLE-DELTA) 规范 (见 § Table 8-7)。

</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
</div>

<!-- 📄 Page 570 -->
