<a id="sec-4-2-7-9"></a>
## 4.2.7.9 Disabled | Disabled

<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th width="50%">🇬🇧 English</th>
<th width="50%" style="background-color:#e8e8e8">🇨🇳 中文</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>

The Loopback substate machine is shown in § Figure 4-57.

- LinkUp = 0b (False)
- The Link and Lane numbers received in the TS1 or TS2 Ordered Sets are ignored by the Receiver while in this substate.
- Loopback Lead requirements:
  - If the Loopback Lead was directed, in an implementation specific manner, to perform a 64.0 GT/s equalization procedure on one active Lane, to be referred to as the 'Lane under test', before entering Loopback.Entry with LinkUp set to 0b, the perform_equalization_for_loopback_64GT variable must be set to 1b.
  - If Loopback.Entry was entered from Recovery.Equalization and the current data rate is 32.0 GT/s and perform_equalization_for_loopback_64GT is 1b and the equalization_done_64GT_data_rate variable is 0b, determine the highest common data rate of the data rates supported by the Lead and the highest data rates advertised by the Loopback Follower in the TS1s that it transmitted in Phase 1 of Recovery.Equalization on the 'Lane Under Test'. If the highest common data rate is 64.0 GT/s, transmit 16 consecutive TS1 Ordered Sets with the Loopback bit asserted, followed by an EIOSQ, and then transition to Electrical Idle for 1 ms. During the period of Electrical Idle, change the data rate to 64.0 GT/s.
    - The 16 consecutive TS1 Ordered Sets transmitted on the Lane under test prior to the rate change to 64.0 GT/s must have the bits listed below as follows:
      - The Enhanced Link Behavior Control bits must be set to 01b. The equalization procedure must be performed on the same 'Lane under test' for both equalization procedures.
      - The Transmit Modified Compliance Pattern in Loopback bit must be set to 1b if the Loopback Follower is required to transmit the Modified Compliance Pattern on the Lanes that are not under test.
  - If Loopback.Entry was entered from Configuration.Linkwidth.Start, the highest common data rate is 64.0 GT/s when LinkUp = 0b, the Loopback Lead intends to operate at 64.0 GT/s and the Loopback Lead has prior knowledge that the Loopback Follower also supports 64.0 GT/s. Otherwise, determine the highest common data rate of the data rates supported by the Lead and the data rates received in two consecutive TS1 or TS2 Ordered Sets on any active Lane at the time the transition to Loopback.Entry occurred. If the current data rate is not the highest common data rate:
    - Transmit 16 consecutive TS1 Ordered Sets with the Loopback bit asserted, followed by an EIOSQ, and then transition to Electrical Idle for 1 ms. During the period of Electrical Idle, if the perform_equalization_for_loopback_64GT variable is 1b and the highest common data rate is 64.0 GT/s, change the data rate to 32.0 GT/s. Otherwise, change the data rate to the highest common data rate.
    - If LinkUp is 0b, the Supported Link Speeds field of the Data Rate Identifier must use the Flit Mode data rate encoding if the Flit Mode Supported field in the PCI Express Capabilities Register is 1b and 64.0 GT/s is supported and the consecutive TS2 Ordered Sets received on the last transition from Polling.Configuration had the Flit Mode Supported bit set to 1b.
    - The Loopback Lead may be directed, in an implementation specific manner, to perform a 32.0 GT/s equalization procedure on one active Lane, to be referred to as the 'Lane under test', before entering Loopback.Entry. If the highest common data rate is 32.0 GT/s, the equalization_done_32GT_data_rate variable is 0b, and the equalization procedure is to be executed, the 16 consecutive TS1 Ordered Sets transmitted on the Lane under test prior to the data rate change to the highest common data rate must have the bits listed below as follows:
      - The Enhanced Link Behavior Control bits must be set to 01b.
      - The Transmit Modified Compliance Pattern in Loopback bit must be set to 1b if the Loopback Follower is required to transmit the Modified Compliance Pattern on the Lanes that are not under test.
    - If the highest common data rate is 5.0 GT/s, the follower's transmitter de-emphasis is controlled by setting the Selectable De-emphasis bit of the transmitted TS1 Ordered Sets to the desired value (1b = -3.5 dB, 0b = -6 dB).
    - For data rates of 5.0 GT/s and above, the Lead is permitted to choose its own transmitter settings in an implementation specific manner, regardless of the settings it transmitted to the follower.
    - Note: If Loopback is entered after LinkUp has been set to 1b, it is possible for one Port to enter Loopback from Recovery and the other to enter Loopback from Configuration. The Port that entered from Configuration might attempt to change data rate while the other Port does not. If this occurs, the results are undefined. The test set-up must avoid such conflicting directed clauses.

**IMPLEMENTATION NOTE: LANE UNDER TEST USAGE EXPECTATIONS**

The method whereby one active Lane is defined as the 'Lane under test' and is affected by the NEXT/FEXT aggressor Lanes (see § Section 8.5.1.1) so that measurements are performed on the Lane under test (after a speed change and completion of an equalization procedure at a rate of 32.0 GT/s or above) is defined for system configurations where a test apparatus, such as (but not limited to) a BERT, acts as the Loopback Lead. In such a system configuration, the expectation of this test method is that the Loopback Lead is able to provide the necessary stimulus for the state traversals and protocol negotiations required to establish and exercise the 'Lane under test' without any specific guidance from this specification.

This test mode is only defined for use while LinkUp = 0b (prior to entering Loopback.Entry). The test apparatus must be cognizant of the capabilities of the 'Lane under test'. A mechanism to "re-do" equalization when this test procedure is performed is not defined. The Loopback Lead must only send TS1s with Flit Mode Encoding in Loopback if it received TS2s with the Flit Mode Supported bit set to 1b in Polling.Configuration - these TS2s indicate that the Loopback Follower will properly interpret TS1s with Flit Mode Data Rate Encoding.

</td>
<td style="background-color:#e8e8e8">

回环 (Loopback) 子状态机如 § Figure 4-57 所示。

- LinkUp = 0b (假)
- 在此子状态期间,接收器忽略 TS1 或 TS2 有序集中接收到的 Link 和 Lane 编号。
- Loopback Lead 要求:
  - 如果以实现特定的方式指示 Loopback Lead 在进入 Loopback.Entry 之前(LinkUp 置为 0b),对一条处于 Active 状态的通道执行 64.0 GT/s 的均衡 (equalization) 过程,该通道称为"被测通道 (Lane under test)",则 perform_equalization_for_loopback_64GT 变量必须置为 1b。
  - 如果 Loopback.Entry 是从 Recovery.Equalization 进入,且当前数据速率为 32.0 GT/s,perform_equalization_for_loopback_64GT 为 1b,equalization_done_64GT_data_rate 变量为 0b,则确定 Lead 所支持的数据速率与 Loopback Follower 在 Recovery.Equalization 第 1 阶段中在"被测通道"上发送的 TS1 中所通告的最高数据速率之间的最高公共数据速率。如果该最高公共数据速率为 64.0 GT/s,则发送 16 个连续的 Loopback 位置 1 的 TS1 有序集,随后发送 EIOSQ,然后进入电气空闲状态 1 ms。在该电气空闲期间,将数据速率切换到 64.0 GT/s。
    - 在切换到 64.0 GT/s 之前,在被测通道上发送的 16 个连续 TS1 有序集的位字段设置如下:
      - Enhanced Link Behavior Control 位必须设为 01b。两次均衡过程必须在同一"被测通道"上执行。
      - 如果 Loopback Follower 需要在非被测通道上发送 Modified Compliance Pattern,则 Loopback 中的 Transmit Modified Compliance Pattern 位必须设为 1b。
  - 如果 Loopback.Entry 是从 Configuration.Linkwidth.Start 进入,且 LinkUp = 0b 时最高公共数据速率为 64.0 GT/s,Loopback Lead 计划以 64.0 GT/s 运行,并且 Loopback Lead 预先知道 Loopback Follower 也支持 64.0 GT/s,则按此处理。否则,确定 Lead 所支持的数据速率与进入 Loopback.Entry 时在任何 Active 通道上收到的两个连续 TS1 或 TS2 有序集中所含数据速率之间的最高公共数据速率。如果当前数据速率不是该最高公共数据速率:
    - 发送 16 个连续的 Loopback 位置 1 的 TS1 有序集,随后发送 EIOSQ,然后进入电气空闲状态 1 ms。在该电气空闲期间,如果 perform_equalization_for_loopback_64GT 变量为 1b 且最高公共数据速率为 64.0 GT/s,则将数据速率切换到 32.0 GT/s;否则,将数据速率切换到该最高公共数据速率。
    - 如果 LinkUp 为 0b,则当 PCI Express 能力寄存器中的 Flit Mode Supported 字段为 1b、支持 64.0 GT/s,并且从 Polling.Configuration 最后一次转换时收到的连续 TS2 有序集中的 Flit Mode Supported 位为 1b 时,Data Rate Identifier 的 Supported Link Speeds 字段必须使用 Flit Mode 数据速率编码。
    - Loopback Lead 可以以实现特定的方式被指示在进入 Loopback.Entry 之前对一条 Active 通道(称为"被测通道")执行 32.0 GT/s 均衡过程。如果最高公共数据速率为 32.0 GT/s、equalization_done_32GT_data_rate 变量为 0b 且需要执行均衡过程,则在切换到该最高公共数据速率之前,在被测通道上发送的 16 个连续 TS1 有序集的位字段设置如下:
      - Enhanced Link Behavior Control 位必须设为 01b。
      - 如果 Loopback Follower 需要在非被测通道上发送 Modified Compliance Pattern,则 Loopback 中的 Transmit Modified Compliance Pattern 位必须设为 1b。
    - 如果最高公共数据速率为 5.0 GT/s,则 Follower 的发送器去加重 (de-emphasis) 通过将所发送的 TS1 有序集的 Selectable De-emphasis 位设置为期望值(1b = -3.5 dB,0b = -6 dB)来控制。
    - 对于 5.0 GT/s 及以上的数据速率,Lead 允许以实现特定的方式选择其自身的发送器设置,无论其向 Follower 发送的设置是什么。
    - 注:如果在 LinkUp 已置为 1b 之后进入 Loopback,有可能一个端口从 Recovery 进入 Loopback,而另一个端口从 Configuration 进入 Loopback。从 Configuration 进入的端口可能会尝试更改数据速率,而另一个端口则不会。如果发生这种情况,结果是未定义的。测试设置必须避免此类相互冲突的指示性条款。

**实现提示:被测通道 (Lane under test) 使用期望 (LANE UNDER TEST USAGE EXPECTATIONS)**

将一条 Active 通道定义为"被测通道",并使其受到 NEXT/FEXT 干扰通道 (见 § Section 8.5.1.1) 的影响,从而在(数据速率切换和完成 32.0 GT/s 或以上速率的均衡过程之后)在被测通道上进行测量 —— 此方法适用于测试设备(例如但不限于 BERT)充当 Loopback Lead 的系统配置。在此类系统配置中,此测试方法的预期是:Loopback Lead 能够为建立和测试"被测通道"所需的状态遍历和协议协商提供必要的激励,而无需本规范的任何特定指导。

此测试模式仅在 LinkUp = 0b 时(进入 Loopback.Entry 之前)定义可用。测试设备必须清楚"被测通道"的能力。本规范未定义在执行此测试过程时"重新进行均衡"的机制。Loopback Lead 仅在 Polling.Configuration 中收到 Flit Mode Supported 位置 1 的 TS2 时,才可以在 Loopback 中发送带 Flit Mode 编码的 TS1 —— 这些 TS2 表明 Loopback Follower 将能够正确地解释带 Flit Mode 数据速率编码的 TS1。

</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

[⬆️ 返回目录](#-本章目录-table-of-contents)

---

<!-- 📄 Page 571 -->
---

<a id="sec-4-2-7-10"></a>
## 4.2.7.10 Loopback | Loopback


<div style="overflow-x: auto; max-width: 100%;">
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th width="50%">🇬🇧 English</th>
<th width="50%" style="background-color:#e8e8e8">🇨🇳 中文</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>

- Transmit TS1 Ordered Sets with the Loopback bit asserted.
  - If Loopback.Entry was entered from Recovery.Equalization, the EC field of the transmitted TS1 Ordered Sets must be set to 00b.
  - The Lead is also permitted to assert the Compliance Receive bit of TS1 Ordered Sets transmitted in Loopback.Entry, including those transmitted before a data rate change. If it asserts the Compliance Receive bit, it must not deassert it again while in the Loopback.Entry state. This usage model might be helpful for test and validation purposes when one or both Ports have difficulty obtaining bit lock, Symbol lock, or Block alignment after a data rate change. The ability to set the Compliance Receive bit is implementation specific.
- Next state is Recovery.Equalization if the data rate was changed to 32.0 or 64.0 GT/s and 16 consecutive TS1 Ordered Sets were sent on any Lane with the Enhanced Link Behavior Control bits set to 01b.
  - The perform_equalization_for_loopback variable is set to 1b.
- Next state is Loopback.Active after 2 ms if the Compliance Receive bit of the transmitted TS1 Ordered Sets is asserted.
- Next state is Loopback.Active if Loopback.Entry was entered from Recovery.Equalization and the Lane under test receives two consecutive TS1 Ordered Sets with the Loopback bit asserted.
- Next state is Loopback.Active if the Compliance Receive bit of the transmitted TS1 Ordered Sets is deasserted and an implementation specific set of Lanes receive two consecutive TS1 Ordered Sets with the Loopback bit asserted.
- If the data rate was changed and the equalization procedure was not performed at either 32.0 GT/s or 64.0 GT/s, the Lead must take into account the amount of time the follower can be in Electrical Idle and transmit a sufficient number of TS1 Ordered Sets for the follower to acquire Symbol lock or Block alignment before proceeding to Loopback.Active. These TS1 Ordered Sets may be used to specify Transmitter settings for the Loopback Follower when the data rate of operation is 8.0 GT/s or above by setting the value of the EC field appropriately for the follower's Port direction (10b or 11b) and requesting a preset or a set of valid coefficients.
- Next state is Loopback.Exit after an implementation specific timeout of less than 100 ms.

**IMPLEMENTATION NOTE: LANE NUMBERING WITH 128B/130B ENCODING IN LOOPBACK**

If the current data rate uses 128b/130b 编码 encoding and Lane numbers have not been negotiated, it is possible that the Lead and follower will not be able to decode received information because their Lanes are using different scrambling LFSR seed values (since the LFSR seed values are determined by the Lane numbers). This situation can be avoided by allowing the Lead and follower to negotiate Lane numbers before directing the Lead to Loopback, directing the Lead to assert the Compliance Receive bit during Loopback.Entry, or by using some other method of ensuring that the LFSR seed values match.

</td>
<td style="background-color:#e8e8e8">

- 发送 Loopback 位置 1 的 TS1 有序集。
  - 如果 Loopback.Entry 是从 Recovery.Equalization 进入,则所发送 TS1 有序集的 EC 字段必须设为 00b。
  - Lead 也允许在 Loopback.Entry 中发送的 TS1 有序集(包括数据速率切换前发送的)中置位 Compliance Receive 位。一旦置位,在 Loopback.Entry 状态期间不得再清除该位。当一个或两个端口在数据速率切换后难以获得 bit lock、Symbol lock 或 Block alignment 时,这种使用方式可能有助于测试和验证。设置 Compliance Receive 位的能力是实现特定的。
- 如果数据速率切换到 32.0 GT/s 或 64.0 GT/s,且已在任一通道上发送 16 个连续的 Enhanced Link Behavior Control 位为 01b 的 TS1 有序集,则下一状态为 Recovery.Equalization。
  - perform_equalization_for_loopback 变量置为 1b。
- 如果所发送的 TS1 有序集的 Compliance Receive 位置位,则在 2 ms 后下一状态为 Loopback.Active。
- 如果 Loopback.Entry 是从 Recovery.Equalization 进入,且被测通道接收到两个连续的 Loopback 位置 1 的 TS1 有序集,则下一状态为 Loopback.Active。
- 如果所发送 TS1 有序集的 Compliance Receive 位被清除,且一个实现特定的通道集合接收到两个连续的 Loopback 位置 1 的 TS1 有序集,则下一状态为 Loopback.Active。
- 如果数据速率发生切换,且在 32.0 GT/s 或 64.0 GT/s 速率下均未执行均衡过程,则 Lead 必须考虑 Follower 可处于电气空闲的时间,并在进入 Loopback.Active 之前发送足够数量的 TS1 有序集,以使 Follower 获得 Symbol lock 或 Block alignment。当运行数据速率为 8.0 GT/s 或以上时,这些 TS1 有序集可通过将 EC 字段设置为适合 Follower 端口方向(10b 或 11b)的值,并请求预设 (preset) 或一组有效系数,用于指定 Loopback Follower 的发送器设置。
- 在不超过 100 ms 的实现特定超时之后,下一状态为 Loopback.Exit。

**实现提示:Loopback 中 128b/130b 编码的通道编号 (LANE NUMBERING WITH 128B/130B ENCODING IN LOOPBACK)**

如果当前数据速率使用 128b/130b 编码 (encoding) 且尚未协商通道编号,则 Lead 和 Follower 可能由于各自的通道使用不同的加扰 LFSR 种子值(LFSR 种子值由通道编号决定)而无法解码收到的信息。可以通过以下方法避免这种情况:在指示 Lead 进入 Loopback 之前先让 Lead 和 Follower 协商通道编号;在 Loopback.Entry 期间指示 Lead 置位 Compliance Receive 位;或采用其他方法确保 LFSR 种子值匹配。

</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
</div>


[⬆️ 返回目录](#-本章目录-table-of-contents)

<a id="sec-4-2-7-10-1"></a>
## 4.2.7.10.1 Loopback.Entry | Loopback.Entry

<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th width="50%">🇬🇧 English</th>
<th width="50%" style="background-color:#e8e8e8">🇨🇳 中文</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>

- Loopback Follower requirements:
  - If Loopback.Entry was entered from Configuration.Linkwidth.Start with LinkUp set to 0b, the TS1 Ordered Sets that directed the follower to this state advertised 64.0 GT/s support and had Enhanced Link Behavior Control set to 01b and the follower intends to operate at 64.0 GT/s, perform_equalization_for_loopback_64GT must be set to 1b.
  - If Loopback.Entry was entered from Recovery.Equalization and the current data rate is 32.0 GT/s and perform_equalization_for_loopback_64GT is 1b and the equalization_done_64GT_data_rate variable is 0b, and 64.0 GT/s is advertised by the Loopback Follower in the TS1s that it transmitted in Phase 1 of Recovery.Equalization on the 'Lane under test':
    - Transmit an EIOSQ, and then transition to Electrical Idle for 2 ms. During the period of Electrical Idle, change the data rate to 64.0 GT/s.
    - If the Loopback Follower is a Downstream Port, transmit 16 consecutive TS1 Ordered Sets on the 'Lane under test' prior to transmitting the EIOSQ. The TS1 Ordered Sets must have the Equalization Control bits set to 00b.
    - Next state is Recovery.Equalization.
    - The 'Lane under test', perform_equalization_for_loopback variable, transmit_modified_compliance_pattern_in_loopback variable and the Link and Lane numbers for both the 32.0 GT/s and 64.0 GT/s equalization procedures must be the same.
  - If Loopback.Entry was entered from Configuration.Linkwidth.Start, determine the highest common data rate of the data rates supported by the follower and the data rates received in the two consecutive TS1 Ordered Sets that directed the follower to this state. If the current data rate is not the highest common data rate:
    - Transmit an EIOSQ, and then transition to Electrical Idle for 2 ms. During the period of Electrical Idle, if the perform_equalization_for_loopback_64GT variable is 1b and the highest common data rate is 64.0 GT/s, change the data rate to 32.0 GT/s. Otherwise, change the data rate to the highest common data rate.
    - If operating in full swing mode and the highest common data rate is 5.0 GT/s, set the transmitter's de-emphasis to the setting specified by the Selectable De-emphasis bit received in the TS1 Ordered Sets that directed the follower to this state. The de-emphasis is -3.5 dB if the Selectable De-emphasis bit was 1b, and it is -6 dB if the Selectable De-emphasis bit was 0b.
    - If the highest common data rate is 8.0 GT/s or higher and EQ TS1 Ordered Sets directed the follower to this state, set the transmitter to the settings specified by the Preset field of the EQ TS1 Ordered Sets. See § Section 4.2.4.2. If the highest common data rate is 8.0 GT/s or higher but standard TS1 Ordered Sets directed the follower to this state, the follower is permitted to use its default transmitter settings.
  - Next state is Recovery.Equalization if Loopback.Entry was entered from Configuration.Linkwidth.Start, the highest common data rate is 32.0 GT/s or higher and the Enhanced Link Behavior Control bits of the TS1 Ordered Sets that directed the follower to this state were 01b.
    - The perform_equalization_for_loopback variable is set to 1b.
    - The transmit_modified_compliance_pattern_in_loopback variable is set to 1b if the Transmit Modified Compliance Pattern in Loopback bit is Set to 1b in the TS1 Ordered Sets that directed the follower to this state.
    - When Recovery.Equalization is entered from Loopback.Entry, the Lane that received two consecutive TS1 Ordered Sets with the Enhanced Link Behavior Control bits set to 01b in Configuration.Linkwidth.Start is the Lane under test for the purposes of Loopback and Recovery.Equalization.
    - The Loopback Follower must select a valid Link number in an implementation specific manner. (See § Section 4.2.2.4 for more on assigning Lane numbers and other Scrambler requirements.) The test measurement equipment that facilitates this state transition must ensure, in an implementation specific manner, that it uses a matching Lane number and LFSR seed value.

</td>
<td style="background-color:#e8e8e8">

- Loopback Follower 要求:
  - 如果 Loopback.Entry 是从 Configuration.Linkwidth.Start 进入,且 LinkUp 置为 0b,指示 Follower 进入此状态的 TS1 有序集通告支持 64.0 GT/s 且 Enhanced Link Behavior Control 设为 01b,并且 Follower 计划以 64.0 GT/s 运行,则 perform_equalization_for_loopback_64GT 必须置为 1b。
  - 如果 Loopback.Entry 是从 Recovery.Equalization 进入,且当前数据速率为 32.0 GT/s,perform_equalization_for_loopback_64GT 为 1b,equalization_done_64GT_data_rate 变量为 0b,并且 Loopback Follower 在 Recovery.Equalization 第 1 阶段中在"被测通道"上发送的 TS1 中通告了 64.0 GT/s:
    - 发送 EIOSQ,然后进入电气空闲状态 2 ms。在该电气空闲期间,将数据速率切换到 64.0 GT/s。
    - 如果 Loopback Follower 是 Downstream Port,则在发送 EIOSQ 之前,在"被测通道"上发送 16 个连续的 TS1 有序集。这些 TS1 有序集的 Equalization Control 位必须设为 00b。
    - 下一状态为 Recovery.Equalization。
    - 32.0 GT/s 和 64.0 GT/s 两次均衡过程中的"被测通道"、perform_equalization_for_loopback 变量、transmit_modified_compliance_pattern_in_loopback 变量以及 Link 和 Lane 编号必须相同。
  - 如果 Loopback.Entry 是从 Configuration.Linkwidth.Start 进入,则确定 Follower 所支持的数据速率与指示 Follower 进入此状态的两个连续 TS1 有序集中所含数据速率之间的最高公共数据速率。如果当前数据速率不是该最高公共数据速率:
    - 发送 EIOSQ,然后进入电气空闲状态 2 ms。在该电气空闲期间,如果 perform_equalization_for_loopback_64GT 变量为 1b 且最高公共数据速率为 64.0 GT/s,则将数据速率切换到 32.0 GT/s;否则,将数据速率切换到该最高公共数据速率。
    - 如果在全摆幅 (full swing) 模式下运行且最高公共数据速率为 5.0 GT/s,则将发送器的去加重设置为指示 Follower 进入此状态的 TS1 有序集中 Selectable De-emphasis 位所指定的值。Selectable De-emphasis 位为 1b 时去加重为 -3.5 dB,为 0b 时为 -6 dB。
    - 如果最高公共数据速率为 8.0 GT/s 或更高,且由 EQ TS1 有序集指示 Follower 进入此状态,则将发送器设置为该 EQ TS1 有序集 Preset 字段所指定的设置。参见 § Section 4.2.4.2。如果最高公共数据速率为 8.0 GT/s 或更高,但由标准 TS1 有序集指示 Follower 进入此状态,则允许 Follower 使用其默认发送器设置。
  - 如果 Loopback.Entry 是从 Configuration.Linkwidth.Start 进入,最高公共数据速率为 32.0 GT/s 或更高,且指示 Follower 进入此状态的 TS1 有序集的 Enhanced Link Behavior Control 位为 01b,则下一状态为 Recovery.Equalization。
    - perform_equalization_for_loopback 变量置为 1b。
    - 如果指示 Follower 进入此状态的 TS1 有序集中 Loopback 中的 Transmit Modified Compliance Pattern 位置 1,则 transmit_modified_compliance_pattern_in_loopback 变量置为 1b。
    - 当从 Loopback.Entry 进入 Recovery.Equalization 时,在 Configuration.Linkwidth.Start 中收到 Enhanced Link Behavior Control 位为 01b 的两个连续 TS1 有序集的那条通道,即作为 Loopback 和 Recovery.Equalization 用途的"被测通道"。
    - Loopback Follower 必须以实现特定的方式选择一个有效的 Link 编号(有关通道编号分配及其它加扰器 (Scrambler) 要求的更多信息,参见 § Section 4.2.2.4)。促成此状态转换的测试测量设备必须以实现特定的方式确保其使用匹配的 Lane 编号和 LFSR 种子值。

</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

<!-- 📄 Page 573 -->

<a id="sec-4-2-7-10-2"></a>
## 4.2.7.10.2 Loopback.Active | Loopback.Active


<div style="overflow-x: auto; max-width: 100%;">
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th width="50%">🇬🇧 English</th>
<th width="50%" style="background-color:#e8e8e8">🇨🇳 中文</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>

- Next state is Loopback.Active if the Compliance Receive bit of the TS1 Ordered Sets that directed the follower to this state was asserted.
  - The follower's transmitter does not need to transition to transmitting looped-back data on any boundary, and it is permitted to truncate any Ordered Set in progress.
- Else, the follower transmits TS1 Ordered Sets with Link and Lane numbers set to PAD.
  - If Loopback.Entry was entered from Recovery.Equalization:
    - The EC field of the transmitted TS1 Ordered Sets must be set to 00b.
    - The next state is Loopback.Active after two consecutive TS1 Ordered Sets with the Loopback bit asserted are received by the Lane under test.
  - Else, the next state is Loopback.Active if one of the following conditions is true:
    - The data rate is 2.5 GT/s or 5.0 GT/s and Symbol lock is obtained on all active Lanes.
    - The data rate is 8.0 GT/s or higher and two consecutive TS1 Ordered Sets are received on all active Lanes. The equalization settings specified by the received TS1 Ordered Sets must be evaluated and applied to the transmitter if the value of the EC field is appropriate for the follower's Port direction (10b or 11b) and the requested setting is a preset or a set of valid coefficients. (Note: This is the equivalent behavior for the Recovery.Equalization state.) Optionally, the follower can accept both EC field values. If the settings are applied, they must take effect within 500 ns of being received, and they must not cause the transmitter to violate any electrical specification for more than 1 ns. Unlike Recovery.Equalization, the new settings are not reflected in the TS1 Ordered Sets that the follower transmits.
    - When using 8b/10b 编码 encoding, the follower's transmitter must transition to transmitting looped-back data on a Symbol boundary, but it is permitted to truncate any Ordered Set in progress. When using 128b/130b or 1b/1b encoding, the follower's transmitter does not need to transition to transmitting looped-back data on any boundary and is permitted to truncate any Ordered Set in progress.
- The Loopback Lead must send valid encoded data. The Loopback Lead must not transmit EIOS as data until it wants to exit Loopback. When operating with 128b/130b encoding, Loopback Leads must follow the requirements of § Section 4.2.2.6.
- When operating with 1b/1b encoding, the Loopback Lead must follow the requirements of § Section 4.2.3.1, when it starts a Data Stream. The Loopback Lead is permitted to substitute the CRC and FEC bytes with any bytes of its choice. If the Link width has been negotiated by entering L0 since leaving the Detect State, that width is to be used; else the width must be assumed to be x1.
- A Loopback Follower that entered Loopback from Recovery.Equalization must transmit the Modified Compliance Pattern on all Lanes that detected Receivers in Detect.Active but are not under test if the transmit_modified_compliance_pattern_in_loopback variable is set to 1b, otherwise those Lanes must be transitioned into Electrical Idle. The Lane under test must follow Loopback Follower rules described below. State transitions must be based only on Link activity on the Lane under test.
- A Loopback Follower is required to retransmit the received encoded information as received, with the polarity inversion determined in Polling applied, while continuing to perform clock tolerance compensation:
  - When operating with 1b/1b encoding: The Loopback Follower must track when the Data Stream transition happens and subsequently distinguish an Ordered Set from Data Stream bytes as defined in § Section 4.2.3.1, using the Ordered Set insertion interval of § Table 4-21 as follows:
    - If the Link width has been negotiated by entering L0 since leaving the Detect State, that width is to be used; else the width must be assumed to be x1
    - For Upstream Lanes, the SRIS mode is determined from the TS1 Ordered Set (Symbol 4, Bit 7) received in the Configuration state whereas for Downstream Lanes it comes from the SRIS Clocking bit in the Link Control Register.
  - SKPs must be added or deleted on a per-Lane basis as outlined in § Section 4.2.8 with the exception that SKPs do not have to be simultaneously added or removed across Lanes of a configured Link.
    - For 8b/10b 编码 encoding, if a SKP Ordered Set retransmission requires adding a SKP Symbol to accommodate timing tolerance correction, the SKP Symbol is inserted in the retransmitted Symbol stream anywhere adjacent to a SKP Symbol in the SKP Ordered Set following the COM Symbol. The inserted SKP Symbol must be of the same disparity as the received SKPs Symbol(s) in the SKP Ordered Set.
    - For 8b/10b 编码 encoding, if a SKP Ordered Set retransmission requires dropping a SKP Symbol to accommodate timing tolerance correction, the SKP Symbol is simply not retransmitted.
    - For 128b/130b encoding, if a SKP Ordered Set retransmission requires adding SKP Symbols to accommodate timing tolerance correction, four SKP Symbols are inserted in the retransmitted Symbol stream prior to the SKP_END Symbol in the SKP Ordered Set.
    - For 128b/130b encoding, if a SKP Ordered Set retransmission requires dropping SKP Symbols to accommodate timing tolerance correction, four SKP Symbols prior to the SKP_END Symbol in the SKP Ordered Set are simply not retransmitted.
    - For 1b/1b encoding, if a SKP Ordered Set retransmission requires adding SKP Symbols to accommodate timing tolerance correction, eight SKP Symbols are inserted in the retransmitted Symbol stream prior to the SKP_END Symbol in the SKP Ordered Set.
    - For 1b/1b encoding, if a SKP Ordered Set retransmission requires dropping SKP Symbols to accommodate timing tolerance correction, eight SKP Symbols prior to the SKP_END Symbol in the SKP Ordered Set are simply not retransmitted.
  - No modifications of the received encoded data (except for polarity inversion determined in Polling) are allowed by the Loopback Follower even if it is determined to be an invalid encoding (i.e., no legal translation to a control or data value possible for 8b/10b 编码 encoding or invalid Sync Header or invalid Ordered Set for 128b/130b encoding).

<!-- 📄 Page 575 -->
---

<!-- 📄 Page 576 -->
---

- Next state of the Loopback Follower is Loopback.Exit if one of the following conditions apply:
  - If directed or if four consecutive EIOSs are received on any Lane. The Requirements for detecting an EIOS are specified in § Section 4.2.5.3.
  - Optionally, if current Link speed is 2.5 GT/s and an EIOS is received or Electrical Idle is detected/inferred on any Lane.
    - Note: As described in § Section 4.2.5.4, an Electrical Idle condition may be inferred if any of the configured Lanes remained electrically idle continuously for 128 μs by not detecting an exit from Electrical Idle in the entire 128 μs window.
    - A Loopback Follower must be able to detect an Electrical Idle condition on any Lane within 1 ms of the EIOS being received by the Loopback Follower.
    - Note: During the time after an EIOS is received and before Electrical Idle is actually detected by the Loopback Follower, the Loopback Follower may receive a bit stream that is undefined by the encoding scheme, which may be looped back by the transmitter.
    - The TTX-IDLE-SET-TO-IDLE parameter does not apply in this case since the Loopback Follower may not even detect Electrical Idle until as much as 1 ms after the EIOS.

</td>
<td style="background-color:#e8e8e8">

- 如果指示 Follower 进入此状态的 TS1 有序集的 Compliance Receive 位置位,则下一状态为 Loopback.Active。
  - Follower 的发送器无需在任何边界开始回环 (loop-back) 数据发送,且允许截断正在发送的任意有序集。
- 否则,Follower 发送 Link 和 Lane 编号设为 PAD 的 TS1 有序集。
  - 如果 Loopback.Entry 是从 Recovery.Equalization 进入:
    - 所发送 TS1 有序集的 EC 字段必须设为 00b。
    - 在被测通道接收到两个连续的 Loopback 位置 1 的 TS1 有序集之后,下一状态为 Loopback.Active。
  - 否则,在以下任一条件成立时,下一状态为 Loopback.Active:
    - 数据速率为 2.5 GT/s 或 5.0 GT/s,且在所有 Active 通道上获得 Symbol lock。
    - 数据速率为 8.0 GT/s 或更高,且在所有 Active 通道上接收到两个连续的 TS1 有序集。当所接收 TS1 有序集的 EC 字段值适合 Follower 端口方向(10b 或 11b),且所请求的设置为预设 (preset) 或一组有效系数时,必须评估该 TS1 有序集所指定的均衡设置并将其应用于发送器。(注:这与 Recovery.Equalization 状态下的行为等同。)可选地,Follower 也可以接受这两种 EC 字段值。如果应用了这些设置,则必须在收到后 500 ns 内生效,且不得使发送器在任何电气规范上违例超过 1 ns。与 Recovery.Equalization 不同,Follower 发送的 TS1 有序集不会反映这些新设置。
    - 使用 8b/10b 编码 (encoding) 时,Follower 的发送器必须在 Symbol 边界开始回环数据发送,但允许截断正在发送的任意有序集。使用 128b/130b 或 1b/1b 编码时,Follower 的发送器无需在任何边界开始回环数据发送,且允许截断正在发送的任意有序集。
- Loopback Lead 必须发送有效的编码数据。Loopback Lead 在希望退出 Loopback 之前,不得将 EIOS 作为数据进行发送。在 128b/130b 编码下运行时,Loopback Lead 必须遵循 § Section 4.2.2.6 中的要求。
- 在 1b/1b 编码下运行时,Loopback Lead 在启动数据流 (Data Stream) 时必须遵循 § Section 4.2.3.1 中的要求。Loopback Lead 允许用任意字节替换 CRC 和 FEC 字节。如果自离开 Detect 状态以来已通过进入 L0 协商过链路宽度,则应使用该宽度;否则,宽度必须假定为 x1。
- 从 Recovery.Equalization 进入 Loopback 的 Loopback Follower,如果 transmit_modified_compliance_pattern_in_loopback 变量置 1b,则必须在 Detect.Active 中检测到接收器、但不在测试范围内的所有通道上发送 Modified Compliance Pattern,否则这些通道必须转换到电气空闲。被测通道必须遵循下文描述的 Loopback Follower 规则。状态转换必须仅基于被测通道上的链路活动。
- Loopback Follower 必须按接收到的形式(应用在 Polling 中确定的极性反转)重传接收到的编码信息,并继续执行时钟容差补偿:
  - 在 1b/1b 编码下运行时:Loopback Follower 必须跟踪数据流转换发生的时刻,并随后按 § Section 4.2.3.1 中的定义区分有序集与数据流字节,使用 § Table 4-21 中的有序集插入间隔,具体如下:
    - 如果自离开 Detect 状态以来已通过进入 L0 协商过链路宽度,则应使用该宽度;否则,宽度必须假定为 x1。
    - 对于 Upstream Lanes,SRIS 模式根据 Configuration 状态中接收到的 TS1 有序集(Symbol 4,Bit 7)确定;对于 Downstream Lanes,SRIS 模式取自 Link Control 寄存器中的 SRIS Clocking 位。
  - SKP 必须按 § Section 4.2.8 中所述以每通道 (per-Lane) 为基础添加或删除,但有一个例外:对于已配置链路上的各通道,SKP 不必同时添加或删除。
    - 对于 8b/10b 编码 (encoding),如果 SKP 有序集重传需要添加 SKP Symbol 以适应时序容差修正,则该 SKP Symbol 插入到重传的 Symbol 流中 SKP 有序集内 COM Symbol 之后的 SKP Symbol 相邻位置。插入的 SKP Symbol 必须与 SKP 有序集中接收到的 SKP Symbol 具有相同的不平衡度 (disparity)。
    - 对于 8b/10b 编码 (encoding),如果 SKP 有序集重传需要删除 SKP Symbol 以适应时序容差修正,则该 SKP Symbol 不被重传。
    - 对于 128b/130b 编码,如果 SKP 有序集重传需要添加 SKP Symbol 以适应时序容差修正,则在重传的 Symbol 流中,SKP 有序集内 SKP_END Symbol 之前插入四个 SKP Symbol。
    - 对于 128b/130b 编码,如果 SKP 有序集重传需要删除 SKP Symbol 以适应时序容差修正,则 SKP 有序集内 SKP_END Symbol 之前的四个 SKP Symbol 不被重传。
    - 对于 1b/1b 编码,如果 SKP 有序集重传需要添加 SKP Symbol 以适应时序容差修正,则在重传的 Symbol 流中,SKP 有序集内 SKP_END Symbol 之前插入八个 SKP Symbol。
    - 对于 1b/1b 编码,如果 SKP 有序集重传需要删除 SKP Symbol 以适应时序容差修正,则 SKP 有序集内 SKP_END Symbol 之前的八个 SKP Symbol 不被重传。
  - Loopback Follower 不允许对接收到的编码数据作任何修改(Polling 中确定的极性反转除外),即使其被判定为无效编码(例如 8b/10b 编码 (encoding) 下无法合法翻译为控制或数据值,或 128b/130b 编码下无效的 Sync Header 或无效的有序集)。

- 在以下任一条件成立时,Loopback Follower 的下一状态为 Loopback.Exit:
  - 被指示退出,或者在任何通道上接收到四个连续的 EIOS。检测 EIOS 的要求见 § Section 4.2.5.3。
  - 可选地,当前链路速度为 2.5 GT/s 时,接收到 EIOS 或在任何通道上检测/推断到电气空闲。
    - 注:如 § Section 4.2.5.4 所述,如果任何已配置通道在 128 μs 内连续保持电气空闲,且整个 128 μs 窗口内未检测到退出电气空闲,则可以推断为电气空闲状态。
    - Loopback Follower 必须能够在 EIOS 被接收到后 1 ms 内检测到任一通道的电气空闲状态。
    - 注:在 EIOS 被接收到、且 Loopback Follower 实际检测到电气空闲之间的这段时间内,Loopback Follower 可能会接收到一种由编码方案未定义的比特流,该比特流可被发送器回环。
    - 在此情况下 TTX-IDLE-SET-TO-IDLE 参数不适用,因为 Loopback Follower 在 EIOS 之后最多 1 ms 内可能都还未检测到电气空闲。

</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
</div>


[⬆️ 返回目录](#-本章目录-table-of-contents)

<!-- 📄 Page 574 -->

<a id="sec-4-2-7-10-3"></a>
## 4.2.7.10.3 Loopback.Exit | Loopback.Exit

<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th width="50%">🇬🇧 English</th>
<th width="50%" style="background-color:#e8e8e8">🇨🇳 中文</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>

- The next state of the Loopback Lead is Loopback.Exit if directed.
- The Loopback Lead sends an EIOS for Ports that support only the 2.5 GT/s data rate and eight consecutive EIOSs for Ports that support greater than 2.5 GT/s data rate, and optionally for Ports that only support the 2.5 GT/s data rate, irrespective of the current Link speed, and enters Electrical Idle on all Lanes for 2 ms.
  - The Loopback Lead must transition to a valid Electrical Idle condition^(91) on all Lanes within TTX-IDLE-SET-TO-IDLE after sending the last EIOS.
  - Note: The EIOS can be useful in signifying the end of transmit and compare operations that occurred by the Loopback Lead. Any data received by the Loopback Lead after any EIOS is received should be ignored since it is undefined.
- The Loopback Follower must enter Electrical Idle on all Lanes for 2 ms.
  - Before entering Electrical Idle the Loopback Follower must Loopback all Symbols that were received prior to detecting Electrical Idle. This ensures that the Loopback Lead may see the EIOS to signify the logical end of any Loopback send and compare operations.
- The next state of the Loopback Lead and Loopback Follower is Detect.

^(91). The common mode being driven does not need to meet the Absolute Delta Between DC Common Mode During L0 and Electrical Idle (VTX-CM-DC-ACTIVE-IDLE-DELTA) specification (see § Table 8-7).

</td>
<td style="background-color:#e8e8e8">

- 如果被指示退出,Loopback Lead 的下一状态为 Loopback.Exit。
- 对于仅支持 2.5 GT/s 数据速率的端口,Loopback Lead 发送一个 EIOS;对于支持大于 2.5 GT/s 数据速率的端口,发送八个连续的 EIOS;对于仅支持 2.5 GT/s 数据速率的端口,无论当前链路速度如何,也可选地使用相同做法。然后在所有通道上进入电气空闲 2 ms。
  - Loopback Lead 必须在发送最后一个 EIOS 之后的 TTX-IDLE-SET-TO-IDLE 时间内,在所有通道上转换到有效的电气空闲状态。^(91)
  - 注:EIOS 可用于标识 Loopback Lead 的发送与比较操作的结束。在任何 EIOS 之后,Loopback Lead 接收到的任何数据都应被忽略,因为其未定义。
- Loopback Follower 必须在所有通道上进入电气空闲 2 ms。
  - 在进入电气空闲之前,Loopback Follower 必须回环在检测到电气空闲之前已接收到的所有 Symbol。这可确保 Loopback Lead 能看到 EIOS,以标识任何 Loopback 发送和比较操作的逻辑结束。
- Loopback Lead 和 Loopback Follower 的下一状态均为 Detect。

^(91). 驱动出的共模电压不需要满足 L0 与电气空闲之间 DC 共模绝对差值 (VTX-CM-DC-ACTIVE-IDLE-DELTA) 规范 (见 § Table 8-7)。

</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

[⬆️ 返回目录](#-本章目录-table-of-contents)

<a id="sec-4-2-7-11"></a>
### 4.2.7.11 Hot Reset | 热复位


<div style="overflow-x: auto; max-width: 100%;">
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th width="50%">🇬🇧 English</th>
<th width="50%" style="background-color:#e8e8e8">🇨🇳 中文</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>

- Lanes that were not directed by a higher Layer to initiate Hot Reset (i.e., received two consecutive TS1 Ordered Sets with the Hot Reset bit asserted on any configured Lanes):
  - LinkUp = 0b (False)
  - If any Lane of an Upstream Port of a Switch receives two consecutive TS1 Ordered Sets with the Hot Reset bit asserted, all configured Downstream Ports must transition to Hot Reset as soon as possible.
    - Any optional crosslinks on the Switch are an exception to this rule and the behavior is system specific.
  - All Lanes in the configured Link transmit TS1 Ordered Sets with the Hot Reset bit asserted and the configured Link and Lane numbers.
  - If two consecutive TS1 Ordered Sets were received with the Hot Reset bit asserted and the configured Link and Lane numbers, the state continues to be Hot Reset and the 2 ms timer is reset.
  - Otherwise, the next state is Detect after a 2 ms timeout.

Note: Generally, Lanes of a Downstream or optional crosslink Port will be directed to Hot Reset, and Lanes of an Upstream or optional crosslink Port will enter Hot Reset by receiving two consecutive TS1 Ordered Sets with the Hot Reset bit asserted on any configured Lanes, from Recovery.Idle state.

</td>
<td style="background-color:#e8e8e8">

- 未被更高层指示启动热复位的 Lane(即在任何已配置的 Lane 上接收到两个连续的 Hot Reset 位置 1 的 TS1 Ordered Set):
  - LinkUp = 0b (False)
  - 如果交换机 (Switch) 上游端口 (Upstream Port) 的任何 Lane 收到两个连续的 Hot Reset 位置 1 的 TS1 Ordered Set,则所有已配置的下游端口 (Downstream Port) 必须尽快进入热复位 (Hot Reset) 状态。
    - 交换机上的任何可选 crosslink 不受此规则约束,行为视具体系统而定。
  - 已配置链路 (Link) 中的所有 Lane 发送 Hot Reset 位置 1 且带有已配置 Link 和 Lane 编号的 TS1 Ordered Set。
  - 如果收到两个连续的 Hot Reset 位置 1 且 Link 和 Lane 编号匹配的 TS1 Ordered Set,则保持热复位状态并复位 2 ms 定时器。
  - 否则,经过 2 ms 超时后,下一状态为 Detect (检测)。

注:通常,下游端口或可选 crosslink 端口的 Lane 将被指示进入热复位,而上游端口或可选 crosslink 端口的 Lane 则通过在 Recovery.Idle 状态下,任何已配置 Lane 上接收到两个连续的 Hot Reset 位置 1 的 TS1 Ordered Set 来进入热复位。

</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
</div>


---

<a id="sec-4-2-8"></a>
## 4.2.8 Clock Tolerance Compensation | 时钟容差补偿

<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th width="50%">🇬🇧 English</th>
<th width="50%" style="background-color:#e8e8e8">🇨🇳 中文</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>

SKP Ordered Sets (defined in § Section 4.2.8.1 , § Section 4.2.8.2 , and § Section 4.2.8.3 ) are used to compensate for differences in frequencies between bit rates at two ends of a Link. The Receiver Physical Layer logical sub-block must include elastic buffering which performs this compensation. The interval between SKP Ordered Set transmissions is derived from the Transmit, Receiver, and Refclk specifications specified in § Table 8-6, § Table 8-12, and § Table 8-19.

The specification supports shared reference clocking architectures (common Refclk) where there is no difference between the Tx and Rx Refclk rates, and two kinds of reference clocking architectures where the Tx and Rx Refclk rates differ. Separate Reference Clocks With No SSC - SRNS, and Separate Reference Clocks with Independent SSC - SRIS. The maximum difference with SRNS is 600 ppm which can result in a clock shift once every 1666 clocks. The maximum difference with SRIS is 5600 ppm which can result in a clock shift every 178 clocks.

Specific form factor specifications are permitted to require the use of only SRIS, only SRNS, or to provide a mechanism for clocking architecture selection. Upstream Ports are permitted to implement support for any combination of SRIS and SRNS (including no support for either), but must conform to the requirements of any associated form factor specification. Downstream Ports supporting SRIS must also support SRNS unless the port is only associated with a specific form factor(s) which modifies these requirements. Port configuration to satisfy the requirements of a specific associated form factor is implementation specific. Specific guidance for form factor specifications is provided in § Section 8.6.8 .

If the receiver is capable of operating with SKP Ordered Sets being generated at the rate used in SRNS even though the Port is running in SRIS, the Port is permitted to Set its bit for the appropriate data rate in the Lower SKP OS Reception Supported Speeds Vector field of the Link Capabilities 2 Register. If the transmitter is capable of operating with SKP Ordered Sets being generated at the rate used in SRNS even though the Port is running in SRIS, the Port is permitted to Set its bit for the appropriate data rate in the Lower SKP OS Generation Supported Speeds Vector field of the Link Capabilities 2 register. System software must check that the bit is Set in the Lower SKP OS Reception Supported Speeds Vector field before setting the appropriate data rate's bit in the link partner's Enable Lower SKP OS Generation Vector field of the Link Control 3 Register. Any software transparent Extension Devices (such as a repeater) present on a Link must also support lower SKP OS Generation for system software to set the bit in the Enable Lower SKP OS Generation Vector field. Software determination of such support in such extension devices is implementation specific. When the bit for the data rate that the link is running in is Set in the Enable Lower SKP OS Generation Vector field, the transmitter schedules SKP Ordered Set generation in L0 at the rate used in SRNS, regardless of which clocking architecture the link is running in. In other LTSSM states, SKP Ordered Set scheduling is at the appropriate rate for the clocking architecture.

</td>
<td style="background-color:#e8e8e8">

SKP Ordered Sets (定义见 § Section 4.2.8.1、§ Section 4.2.8.2 和 § Section 4.2.8.3) 用于补偿链路 (Link) 两端比特率之间的频率差异。接收器物理层逻辑子块必须包含弹性缓冲器以执行此补偿。SKP Ordered Set 发送间隔由 § Table 8-6、§ Table 8-12 和 § Table 8-19 中规定的发送、接收和参考时钟 (Refclk) 规范导出。

本规范支持共享参考时钟架构(common Refclk,即 Tx 和 Rx Refclk 速率无差异),以及两种 Tx 和 Rx Refclk 速率不同的参考时钟架构:无 SSC 的独立参考时钟 (Separate Reference Clocks With No SSC, SRNS),以及具有独立 SSC 的独立参考时钟 (Separate Reference Clocks with Independent SSC, SRIS)。SRNS 的最大差异为 600 ppm,可能导致每 1666 个时钟出现一次时钟偏移。SRIS 的最大差异为 5600 ppm,可能导致每 178 个时钟出现一次时钟偏移。

具体的外形规格 (Form Factor) 规范可要求仅使用 SRIS、仅使用 SRNS,或提供时钟架构选择机制。上游端口可实现对 SRIS 和 SRNS 任意组合的支持(包括对两者都不支持),但必须遵守任何关联外形规格规范的要求。支持 SRIS 的下游端口也必须支持 SRNS,除非该端口仅与修改这些要求的特定外形规格相关联。满足特定关联外形规格要求的端口配置因实现而异。有关外形规格规范的具体指导见 § Section 8.6.8 。

如果接收器能够在端口以 SRIS 运行时,使用 SRNS 中使用的速率生成 SKP Ordered Sets,则该端口可以在 Link Capabilities 2 寄存器的 Lower SKP OS Reception Supported Speeds Vector 字段中为相应数据率置 1。如果发送器能够在端口以 SRIS 运行时,使用 SRNS 中使用的速率生成 SKP Ordered Sets,则该端口可以在 Link Capabilities 2 寄存器的 Lower SKP OS Generation Supported Speeds Vector 字段中为相应数据率置 1。系统软件必须在设置链路对端 Link Control 3 寄存器的 Enable Lower SKP OS Generation Vector 字段中相应数据率的位之前,先检查 Lower SKP OS Reception Supported Speeds Vector 字段中该位是否被置 1。链路上存在的任何软件透明的扩展设备(如中继器)也必须支持 Lower SKP OS Generation,以便系统软件设置 Enable Lower SKP OS Generation Vector 字段中的位。对此类扩展设备支持能力的软件确定方式因实现而异。当 Enable Lower SKP OS Generation Vector 字段中当前链路运行数据率对应的位被置 1 时,无论链路运行于哪种时钟架构,发送器都按 SRNS 使用的速率在 L0 中调度 SKP Ordered Set 的生成。在其他 LTSSM 状态中,SKP Ordered Set 的调度采用相应时钟架构对应的速率。

</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

---

<!-- 📄 Page 579 -->
---


<div style="overflow-x: auto; max-width: 100%;">
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th width="50%">🇬🇧 English</th>
<th width="50%" style="background-color:#e8e8e8">🇨🇳 中文</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>

Components supporting SRIS may need more entries in their elastic buffers than designs supporting SRNS only. This requirement takes into account the extra time it may take to schedule a SKP Ordered Set if the latter falls immediately after a maximum payload sized packet.

When using 8b/10b encoding, a transmitted SKP Ordered Set is a COM Symbol followed by three SKP Symbols, except as is allowed for a Loopback Follower in the Loopback.Active LTSSM state. A received SKP Ordered Set is a COM Symbol followed by one to five SKP Symbols. See § Section 4.3.6.7 for Retimer rules on SKP Ordered Set modification.

When using 128b/130b encoding, a transmitted SKP Ordered Set is 16 Symbols, and a received SKP Ordered Set can be 8, 12, 16, 20, or 24 Symbols. See § Section 4.3.6.7 for Retimer rules on SKP Ordered Set modification.

There are two SKP Ordered Set formats defined for 128b/130b encoding as shown in § Table 4-52 and § Table 4-53. Both formats contain one to five groups of four SKP Symbols followed by a final group of four Symbols indicated by a SKP_END or SKP_END_CTL Symbol. When operating at 8.0 GT/s in Non-Flit Mode, only the Standard SKP Ordered Set is used. When operating at 16.0 GT/s or 32.0 GT/s in Non-Flit Mode, both the Standard and Control SKP Ordered Sets are used. When operating at 8.0, 16.0, 32.0 GT/s in Flit Mode, both the Standard SKP Ordered Sets and Control SKP Ordered Sets are used. All statements in this specification that do not refer to a specific SKP Ordered Set format apply to both formats. When a SKP Ordered Set is transmitted, all Lanes must transmit the same format of SKP Ordered Set - all Lanes must transmit the Standard SKP Ordered Set, or all Lanes must transmit the Control SKP Ordered Set.

The Standard SKP Ordered Set contains information following the SKP_END Symbol that is based on the LTSSM state and the sequence of Blocks. When in the Polling.Compliance state, the Symbols contain the Lane's error status information (see § Section 4.2.7.2.2 for more information). Otherwise, the Symbols contain the Lane's scrambling LFSR value, and a Data Parity bit when the SKP Ordered Set follows a Data Block. The Control SKP Ordered Set contains three Data Parity bits and additional information following the SKP_END_CTL Symbol.

When operating at 8.0 GT/s in Non-Flit Mode, the Data Parity bit of the Standard SKP Ordered Set is the even parity of the payload of all Data Blocks communicated by a Lane and is computed for each Lane independently<sup>92</sup>. Upstream and Downstream Port Transmitters compute the parity as follows:

- Parity is initialized when an SDS Ordered Set is transmitted.
- Parity is updated with each bit of a Data Block's payload after scrambling has been performed.
- The Data Parity bit of a Standard SKP Ordered Set transmitted immediately following a Data Block is set to the current parity.
- Parity is initialized after a Standard SKP Ordered Set is transmitted.

Upstream and Downstream Port Receivers compute and act on the parity as follows:

- Parity is initialized when an SDS Ordered Set is received.
- Parity is updated with each bit of a Data Block's payload before de-scrambling has been performed.
- When a Standard SKP Ordered Set is received immediately following a Data Block, each Lane compares the received Data Parity bit to its calculated parity. If a mismatch is detected, the receiver must set the bit of the Port's Lane Error Status register that corresponds to the Lane's default Lane number. The mismatch is not a Receiver Error and must not cause a Link retrain.

</td>
<td style="background-color:#e8e8e8">

支持 SRIS 的组件可能比仅支持 SRNS 的设计需要更多弹性缓冲器条目。此要求考虑了当 SKP Ordered Set 紧跟在最大有效负载大小的数据包之后时调度所需额外的时间。

使用 8b/10b 编码时,发送的 SKP Ordered Set 由一个 COM 符号后跟三个 SKP 符号组成,Loopback.Active LTSSM 状态下的 Loopback Follower 除外。接收到的 SKP Ordered Set 由一个 COM 符号后跟一至五个 SKP 符号组成。Retimer 对 SKP Ordered Set 修改的规则见 § Section 4.3.6.7。

使用 128b/130b 编码时,发送的 SKP Ordered Set 为 16 个符号,接收的 SKP Ordered Set 可以为 8、12、16、20 或 24 个符号。Retimer 对 SKP Ordered Set 修改的规则见 § Section 4.3.6.7。

128b/130b 编码定义了两种 SKP Ordered Set 格式,见 § Table 4-52 和 § Table 4-53。两种格式均包含一至五组四个 SKP 符号,后跟由 SKP_END 或 SKP_END_CTL 符号指示的最后一组四个符号。在非 Flit 模式下以 8.0 GT/s 运行时,仅使用 Standard SKP Ordered Set。在非 Flit 模式下以 16.0 GT/s 或 32.0 GT/s 运行时,使用 Standard 和 Control SKP Ordered Set。在 Flit 模式下以 8.0、16.0、32.0 GT/s 运行时,使用 Standard SKP Ordered Set 和 Control SKP Ordered Set。本规范中未特别指明 SKP Ordered Set 格式的所有陈述均适用于这两种格式。发送 SKP Ordered Set 时,所有 Lane 必须发送相同格式的 SKP Ordered Set —— 所有 Lane 必须发送 Standard SKP Ordered Set,或所有 Lane 必须发送 Control SKP Ordered Set。

Standard SKP Ordered Set 在 SKP_END 符号之后包含基于 LTSSM 状态和 Block 序列的信息。在 Polling.Compliance 状态下,符号包含 Lane 的错误状态信息(详见 § Section 4.2.7.2.2)。否则,符号包含 Lane 的加扰 LFSR 值,以及当 SKP Ordered Set 跟在 Data Block 之后时的数据奇偶校验位。Control SKP Ordered Set 包含三个数据奇偶校验位以及 SKP_END_CTL 符号之后的附加信息。

在非 Flit 模式下以 8.0 GT/s 运行时,Standard SKP Ordered Set 的数据奇偶校验位是 Lane 通信的所有 Data Block 有效负载的偶校验,且对每个 Lane 独立计算<sup>92</sup>。上游和下游端口发送器按以下方式计算奇偶校验:

- 在发送 SDS Ordered Set 时初始化奇偶校验。
- 在加扰之后,用 Data Block 有效负载的每一位更新奇偶校验。
- 紧跟在 Data Block 之后发送的 Standard SKP Ordered Set 的数据奇偶校验位设置为当前奇偶校验值。
- 在发送 Standard SKP Ordered Set 后初始化奇偶校验。

上游和下游端口接收器按以下方式计算并处理奇偶校验:

- 在接收 SDS Ordered Set 时初始化奇偶校验。
- 在解扰之前,用 Data Block 有效负载的每一位更新奇偶校验。
- 当紧跟在 Data Block 之后接收到 Standard SKP Ordered Set 时,每个 Lane 将接收到的数据奇偶校验位与其计算的奇偶校验进行比较。如果检测到不匹配,接收器必须将端口 Lane Error Status 寄存器中与该 Lane 默认 Lane 编号对应的位置 1。该不匹配不是接收器错误 (Receiver Error),不得导致链路 (Link) 重新训练 (retrain)。

</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
</div>


<a id="sec-4-2-8-1"></a>
### 4.2.8.1 SKP Ordered Set for 8b/10b Encoding | 8b/10b 编码的 SKP Ordered Set

<a id="sec-4-2-8-2"></a>
### 4.2.8.2 SKP Ordered Set for 128b/130b Encoding | 128b/130b 编码的 SKP Ordered Set

---

<sup>92</sup> The requirements for 8.0 GT/s operation documented here are identical to those in [PCIe-3.1].

<!-- 📄 Page 580 -->
---

<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th width="50%">🇬🇧 English</th>
<th width="50%" style="background-color:#e8e8e8">🇨🇳 中文</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>

- Parity is initialized when a Standard SKP Ordered Set is received.

When operating at a data rate of 16.0 or 32.0 GT/s in Non-Flit Mode or 8.0, 16.0m or 32.0 GT/s in Flit Mode, the Data Parity bits of both the Standard SKP Ordered Set in non-Flit-Mode and the Control SKP Ordered Set is the even parity of the payload of all Data Blocks communicated by a Lane and is computed for each Lane independently. Upstream and Downstream Port Transmitters compute the parity as follows:

- Parity is initialized when the LTSSM is in Recovery.Speed.
- Parity is initialized when an SDS Ordered Set is transmitted.
- Parity is updated with each bit of a Data Block's payload after scrambling has been performed.
- Thus, in Flit Mode, Parity is computed post FEC.
- The Data Parity bit of a Standard SKP Ordered Set transmitted immediately following a Data Block is set to the current parity.
- The Data Parity, First Retimer Data Parity, and Second Retimer Data Parity bits of a Control SKP Ordered Set are all set to the current parity.
- Parity is initialized after a Control SKP Ordered Set is transmitted. However, parity is not initialized when a Standard SKP Ordered Set is transmitted.

Upstream and Downstream Port Receivers compute and act on the parity as follows:

- Parity is initialized when the LTSSM is in Recovery.Speed.
- Parity is initialized when an SDS Ordered Set is received.
- Parity is updated with each bit of a Data Block's payload before de-scrambling has been performed.
- Thus, in Flit Mode, Parity is compared prior to FEC decoding.
- When a Control SKP Ordered Set is received, each Lane compares the received Data Parity bit to its calculated parity. It is strongly recommended that this check be performed for Control SKP Ordered Sets immediately following a Data Block only. If a mismatch is detected, the receiver must set the bit of the Port's Local Data Parity Mismatch Status Register that corresponds to the Lane's default Lane number. The mismatch is not a Receiver Error and must not cause a Link retrain.
- When a Control SKP Ordered Set is received, each Lane compares the received First Retimer Data Parity bit to its calculated parity. It is strongly recommended that this check be performed for Control SKP Ordered Sets immediately following a Data Block only. If a mismatch is detected, the receiver must set the bit of the Port's First Retimer Data Parity Mismatch Status Register that corresponds to the Lane's default Lane number. The mismatch is not a Receiver Error and must not cause a Link retrain.
- When a Control SKP Ordered Set is received, each Lane compares the received Second Retimer Data Parity bit to its calculated parity. It is strongly recommended that this check be performed for Control SKP Ordered Sets immediately following a Data Block only. If a mismatch is detected, the receiver must set the bit of the Port's Second Retimer Data Parity Mismatch Status Register that corresponds to the Lane's default Lane number. The mismatch is not a Receiver Error and must not cause a Link retrain.
- When a Standard SKP Ordered Set is received immediately following a Data Block, the receiver is permitted to compare the received Data Parity bit to its calculated parity bit. However, the results of such a comparison must not affect the state of the Lane Error Status Register.
- Parity is initialized when a Control SKP Ordered Set is received. However, parity is not initialized when a Standard SKP Ordered Set is received.

See § Section 4.3.6.7 for the definition of First Retimer and Second Retimer, and for Retimer Pseudo Port requirements for parity computation and modification of the First Retimer Data Parity and Second Retimer Data Parity bits of Control SKP Ordered Sets.

</td>
<td style="background-color:#e8e8e8">

- 在接收到 Standard SKP Ordered Set 时初始化奇偶校验。

在非 Flit 模式下以 16.0 或 32.0 GT/s 数据率运行,或在 Flit 模式下以 8.0、16.0 或 32.0 GT/s 数据率运行时,非 Flit 模式下 Standard SKP Ordered Set 和 Control SKP Ordered Set 的数据奇偶校验位都是 Lane 通信的所有 Data Block 有效负载的偶校验,且对每个 Lane 独立计算。上游和下游端口发送器按以下方式计算奇偶校验:

- 当 LTSSM 处于 Recovery.Speed 时初始化奇偶校验。
- 在发送 SDS Ordered Set 时初始化奇偶校验。
- 在加扰之后,用 Data Block 有效负载的每一位更新奇偶校验。
- 因此,在 Flit 模式下,奇偶校验在 FEC 之后计算。
- 紧跟在 Data Block 之后发送的 Standard SKP Ordered Set 的数据奇偶校验位设置为当前奇偶校验值。
- Control SKP Ordered Set 的数据奇偶校验位、第一 Retimer 数据奇偶校验位和第二 Retimer 数据奇偶校验位均设置为当前奇偶校验值。
- 发送 Control SKP Ordered Set 后初始化奇偶校验。但发送 Standard SKP Ordered Set 时不初始化奇偶校验。

上游和下游端口接收器按以下方式计算并处理奇偶校验:

- 当 LTSSM 处于 Recovery.Speed 时初始化奇偶校验。
- 在接收 SDS Ordered Set 时初始化奇偶校验。
- 在解扰之前,用 Data Block 有效负载的每一位更新奇偶校验。
- 因此,在 Flit 模式下,奇偶校验在 FEC 解码之前进行比较。
- 收到 Control SKP Ordered Set 时,每个 Lane 将接收到的数据奇偶校验位与其计算的奇偶校验进行比较。强烈建议仅对紧跟在 Data Block 之后的 Control SKP Ordered Set 执行此检查。如果检测到不匹配,接收器必须将端口 Local Data Parity Mismatch Status 寄存器中与该 Lane 默认 Lane 编号对应的位置 1。该不匹配不是接收器错误 (Receiver Error),不得导致链路 (Link) 重新训练 (retrain)。
- 收到 Control SKP Ordered Set 时,每个 Lane 将接收到的第一 Retimer 数据奇偶校验位与其计算的奇偶校验进行比较。强烈建议仅对紧跟在 Data Block 之后的 Control SKP Ordered Set 执行此检查。如果检测到不匹配,接收器必须将端口 First Retimer Data Parity Mismatch Status 寄存器中与该 Lane 默认 Lane 编号对应的位置 1。该不匹配不是接收器错误 (Receiver Error),不得导致链路 (Link) 重新训练 (retrain)。
- 收到 Control SKP Ordered Set 时,每个 Lane 将接收到的第二 Retimer 数据奇偶校验位与其计算的奇偶校验进行比较。强烈建议仅对紧跟在 Data Block 之后的 Control SKP Ordered Set 执行此检查。如果检测到不匹配,接收器必须将端口 Second Retimer Data Parity Mismatch Status 寄存器中与该 Lane 默认 Lane 编号对应的位置 1。该不匹配不是接收器错误 (Receiver Error),不得导致链路 (Link) 重新训练 (retrain)。
- 当紧跟在 Data Block 之后接收到 Standard SKP Ordered Set 时,允许接收器将接收到的数据奇偶校验位与其计算的奇偶校验位进行比较。但是,这种比较的结果不得影响 Lane Error Status 寄存器的状态。
- 收到 Control SKP Ordered Set 时初始化奇偶校验。但收到 Standard SKP Ordered Set 时不初始化奇偶校验。

有关第一 Retimer 和第二 Retimer 的定义,以及 Retimer 伪端口 (Pseudo Port) 对奇偶校验计算和 Control SKP Ordered Set 的第一 Retimer 数据奇偶校验位、第二 Retimer 数据奇偶校验位修改的要求,见 § Section 4.3.6.7。

</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

---

<!-- 📄 Page 581 -->
---

**Table 4-52 Standard SKP Ordered Set with 128b/130b Encoding | 表 4-52 128b/130b 编码的 Standard SKP Ordered Set**

| Symbol Number | Value | Description |
|---------------|-------|-------------|
| 0 through (4*N-1) [N can be 1 through 5] | AAh for 8.0 GT/s and 16.0 GT/s data rates<br>99h for 32.0 GT/s and higher data rates | SKP Symbol.<br>Symbol 0 is the SKP Ordered Set identifier. |
| 4*N | E1h | SKP_END Symbol<br>Signifies the end of the SKP Ordered Set after three more Symbols. |
| 4*N + 1 | 00-FFh | (i) If LTSSM state is Polling.Compliance: AAh<br>(ii) Else if prior block was a Data Block:<br>&nbsp;&nbsp;Bit[7] = Data Parity<br>&nbsp;&nbsp;Bit[6:0] = LFSR[22:16]<br>(iii) Else:<br>&nbsp;&nbsp;Bit[7] = ~LFSR[22]<br>&nbsp;&nbsp;Bit[6:0] = LFSR[22:16] |
| 4*N + 2 | 00-FFh | (i) If the LTSSM state is Polling.Compliance: Error_Status[7:0]<br>(ii) Else LFSR[15:8] |
| 4*N + 3 | 00-FFh | (i) If the LTSSM state is Polling.Compliance: ~Error_Status[7:0]<br>(ii) Else: LFSR[7:0] |


<div style="overflow-x: auto; max-width: 100%;">
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th width="50%">🇬🇧 English</th>
<th width="50%" style="background-color:#e8e8e8">🇨🇳 中文</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>

The Control SKP Ordered Set is different from the Standard SKP Ordered Set in the last 4 Symbols. It is used to communicate the parity bits, as computed by each Retimer, in addition to the Data Parity bit computed by the Upstream/Downstream Port. It may also be used for Lane Margining at a Retimer's Receiver, as described below.

**IMPLEMENTATION NOTE:**
**LFSR IN STANDARD SKP ORDERED SET**

The LFSR value is transmitted to enable trace tools to be able to function even if they need to reacquire block alignment in the midst of a bit stream. Since trace tools cannot force the link to enter Recovery, they can reacquire bit lock, if needed, and monitor for the SKP Ordered Set to obtain Block alignment and perform Lane-to-Lane de-skew. The LFSR value from the SKP Ordered Set can be loaded into its LFSR to start interpreting the bit stream. It must be noted that with a bit stream one may alias to a SKP Ordered Set on a non-Block boundary. The trace tools can validate their Block alignment by using implementation specific means such as receiving a fixed number of valid packets or Sync Headers or subsequent SKP Ordered Sets.

</td>
<td style="background-color:#e8e8e8">

Control SKP Ordered Set 在最后 4 个符号上与 Standard SKP Ordered Set 不同。它用于传递由每个 Retimer 计算的奇偶校验位,以及由上游/下游端口 (Upstream/Downstream Port) 计算的数据奇偶校验位。它也可用于 Retimer 接收器处的 Lane Margining,如下所述。

**实现说明:**
**STANDARD SKP ORDERED SET 中的 LFSR**

发送 LFSR 值是为了使追踪工具 (trace tools) 即使在比特流中间需要重新获取块对齐 (block alignment) 时也能正常工作。由于追踪工具无法强制链路进入 Recovery,它们可在需要时重新获取比特锁定 (bit lock),并监视 SKP Ordered Set 以获得块对齐并执行 Lane-to-Lane 去偏斜 (de-skew)。SKP Ordered Set 中的 LFSR 值可加载到其 LFSR 中,用于开始解释比特流。必须注意,在比特流中可能在非块边界上混叠到 SKP Ordered Set。追踪工具可通过接收固定数量的有效数据包或 Sync Header 或后续的 SKP Ordered Set 等实现特定方式来验证其块对齐。

</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
</div>


---

<!-- 📄 Page 582 -->
---

**Table 4-53 Control SKP Ordered Set with 128b/130b Encoding | 表 4-53 128b/130b 编码的 Control SKP Ordered Set**

| Symbol Number | Value | Description |
|---------------|-------|-------------|
| 0 through (4*N-1) [N can be 1 through 5] | AAh for 8.0 GT/s and 16.0 GT/s data rates<br>99h for 32.0 GT/s and higher data rates | SKP Symbol.<br>Symbol 0 is the SKP Ordered Set identifier. |
| 4*N | 78h | SKP_END_CTL Symbol.<br>Signifies the end of the Control SKP Ordered Set after three more Symbols. |
| 4*N + 1 | 00-FFh | Bit 7: Data Parity<br>Bit 6: First Retimer Data Parity<br>Bit 5: Second Retimer Parity<br>Bits [4:0]: Margin CRC [4:0] |
| 4*N + 2 | 00-FFh | Bit 7: Margin Parity<br>Bits [6:0]: Refer to § Section 4.2.18.1 |
| 4*N + 3 | 00-FFh | Bits [7:0]: Refer to § Section 4.2.18.1 |

<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th width="50%">🇬🇧 English</th>
<th width="50%" style="background-color:#e8e8e8">🇨🇳 中文</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>

The 'Margin CRC[4:0]' is computed from Bits [6:0] in Symbols 4N+2 (referred to as d[6:0] in the equations below, where d[0] is Bit 0 of Symbol 4N+2, d[1] is Bit 1 of Symbol 4N+2, … d[6] is Bit 6 of Symbol 4N+2) and Bits [7:0] of Symbol 4N+3 (referred to as d[14:7], where d[7] is Bit 0 of Symbol 4N+3, d[8] is Bit 1 of Symbol 4N+3, .. d[14] is Bit 7 of Symbol 4N+3) as follows:

Margin CRC[0] = d[0] ^ d[3] ^ d[5] ^ d[6] ^ d[9] ^ d[10] ^ d[11] ^ d[12] ^ d[13]
Margin CRC[1] = d[1] ^ d[4] ^ d[6] ^ d[7] ^ d[10] ^ d[11] ^ d[12] ^ d[13] ^ d[14]
Margin CRC[2] = d[0] ^ d[2] ^ d[3] ^ d[6] ^ d[7] ^ d[8] ^ d[9] ^ d[10] ^ d[14]
Margin CRC[3] = d[1] ^ d[3] ^ d[4] ^ d[7] ^ d[8] ^ d[9] ^ d[10] ^ d[11]
Margin CRC[4] = d[2] ^ d[4] ^ d[5] ^ d[8] ^ d[9] ^ d[10] ^ d[11] ^ d[12]

'Margin Parity' is the even parity of Bits [4:0] of Symbol 4N+1, Bits [6:0] of Symbol 4N+2, and Bits [7:0] of Symbol 4N+3 (i.e., Margin Parity = Margin CRC[0] ^ Margin CRC[1] ^ Margin CRC[2] ^ Margin CRC[3] ^ Margin CRC[4] ^ d[0] ^ d[1] ^ d[2] ^ d[3] ^ d[4] ^ d[5] ^ d[6] ^ d[7] ^ d[8] ^ d[9] ^ d[10] ^ d[11] ^ d[12] ^ d[13] ^ d[14]).

'Margin Parity' only applies to 128b/130b encoding. 1b/1b Control SKP Ordered Sets do not contain a 'Margin Parity' field.

The rules for generating and checking the Margin CRC and Margin Parity are described in § Section 4.2.1.3 .

</td>
<td style="background-color:#e8e8e8">

"Margin CRC[4:0]" 由符号 4N+2 的位 [6:0](在以下公式中称为 d[6:0],其中 d[0] 是符号 4N+2 的位 0,d[1] 是符号 4N+2 的位 1,...,d[6] 是符号 4N+2 的位 6)和符号 4N+3 的位 [7:0](称为 d[14:7],其中 d[7] 是符号 4N+3 的位 0,d[8] 是符号 4N+3 的位 1,...,d[14] 是符号 4N+3 的位 7)按如下方式计算:

Margin CRC[0] = d[0] ^ d[3] ^ d[5] ^ d[6] ^ d[9] ^ d[10] ^ d[11] ^ d[12] ^ d[13]
Margin CRC[1] = d[1] ^ d[4] ^ d[6] ^ d[7] ^ d[10] ^ d[11] ^ d[12] ^ d[13] ^ d[14]
Margin CRC[2] = d[0] ^ d[2] ^ d[3] ^ d[6] ^ d[7] ^ d[8] ^ d[9] ^ d[10] ^ d[14]
Margin CRC[3] = d[1] ^ d[3] ^ d[4] ^ d[7] ^ d[8] ^ d[9] ^ d[10] ^ d[11]
Margin CRC[4] = d[2] ^ d[4] ^ d[5] ^ d[8] ^ d[9] ^ d[10] ^ d[11] ^ d[12]

"Margin Parity" 是符号 4N+1 的位 [4:0]、符号 4N+2 的位 [6:0] 和符号 4N+3 的位 [7:0] 的偶校验(即 Margin Parity = Margin CRC[0] ^ Margin CRC[1] ^ Margin CRC[2] ^ Margin CRC[3] ^ Margin CRC[4] ^ d[0] ^ d[1] ^ d[2] ^ d[3] ^ d[4] ^ d[5] ^ d[6] ^ d[7] ^ d[8] ^ d[9] ^ d[10] ^ d[11] ^ d[12] ^ d[13] ^ d[14])。

"Margin Parity" 仅适用于 128b/130b 编码。1b/1b Control SKP Ordered Set 不包含 "Margin Parity" 字段。

Margin CRC 和 Margin Parity 的生成和检查规则见 § Section 4.2.1.3。

</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

---

<!-- 📄 Page 583 -->
---


<div style="overflow-x: auto; max-width: 100%;">
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th width="50%">🇬🇧 English</th>
<th width="50%" style="background-color:#e8e8e8">🇨🇳 中文</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>

- Only Control SKP Ordered Sets are transmitted in 1b/1b Encoding.
- A transmitted SKP Ordered Set is 40 symbols (40B), and a received SKP Ordered Set can be 24, 32, 40, 48 or 56 symbols (24B, 32B, 40B, 48B or 56B).
- The transmitted SKP Ordered Set consists of the SKPs (F00F_F00F), followed by a SKP_END (FFF0_00F0), followed by PHY Payload (8B), as shown in § Table 4-54.
- The PHY Payload field of the 1b/1b SKP Ordered Set is illustrated in § Table 4-55, § Figure 4-58, § Figure 4-59, and § Figure 4-60.
- The Payload Type and Parity fields are replicated four times, spaced more than 16 bits apart.
  - The Receiver can implement a majority voting to correct these fields if three or more sets match. If two sets of value are 0b and two sets are 1b, there is a tie. A tie in the parity can be considered to mismatch. A tie in the Payload Type results in ignoring the PHY payload field.
- The Payload field is replicated twice.
- For Margin payload with its own CRC, the Receiver can choose whichever copy passes CRC (and if both pass CRC, can perform a comparison before acting on it).

The Data Parity bit is the even parity of the payload of all Data Blocks communicated by a Lane and is computed for each Lane independently. Upstream and Downstream Port Transmitters compute the parity as follows:

- Parity is initialized when the LTSSM is in Recovery.Speed.
- Parity is initialized when an SDS Ordered Set is transmitted.
- Parity is initialized after a SKP Ordered Set is transmitted.
- Parity is updated with each bit of a Data Block's payload after scrambling has been performed. Thus, gray coding and precoding, if any, does not affect the Parity calculation and Parity is computed post FEC.
- The Data Parity bit of a SKP Ordered Set transmitted immediately following a Data Block is set to the current parity.

**IMPLEMENTATION NOTE:**
**ERROR PROTECTION IN CONTROL SKP ORDERED SET**

The 21 bits in Symbol 4N+1 (Bits [4:0]), Symbol 4N+2 (Bits[7:0]) and Symbol 4N+3 (Bits[7:0]) is protected by 5 bits of CRC and one bit of parity, leaving 15 bits for information passing. The parity bit provides detection against odd number of bit-flips (e.g., 1-bit, 3-bit), whereas the CRC provides guaranteed detection of 1-bit and 2-bit flips; thus resulting in a triple bit flip detection guarantee over the 21 bits as well as guaranteed detection of burst errors of length 5. The 5-bit CRC is derived from the primitive polynomial: x5 + x2 + 1.

Since these 21 bits are not part of a TLP, repeated delivery of the same content provides delivery guarantee. This is achieved through architected registers. Downstream commands are sent from the Downstream Port, reflecting the contents of an architected register whereas the upstream status that passes the error checking is updated into a status register in the Downstream Port. Software thus has a mechanism to issue a command and wait for the status to be reflected back before issuing a new command. Thus, these 15 bits of information act as a micro-packet.

</td>
<td style="background-color:#e8e8e8">

- 在 1b/1b 编码中仅发送 Control SKP Ordered Set。
- 发送的 SKP Ordered Set 为 40 个符号(40B),接收的 SKP Ordered Set 可为 24、32、40、48 或 56 个符号(24B、32B、40B、48B 或 56B)。
- 发送的 SKP Ordered Set 由 SKP (F00F_F00F) 后接 SKP_END (FFF0_00F0) 再后接 PHY Payload (8B) 组成,见 § Table 4-54。
- 1b/1b SKP Ordered Set 的 PHY Payload 字段如 § Table 4-55、§ Figure 4-58、§ Figure 4-59 和 § Figure 4-60 所示。
- Payload Type 和 Parity 字段被复制四次,间隔超过 16 位。
  - 如果三个或更多集合匹配,接收器可以实现多数投票来纠正这些字段。如果两组值为 0b,两组为 1b,则出现平局。Parity 平局可视为不匹配。Payload Type 平局导致忽略 PHY payload 字段。
- Payload 字段被复制两次。
- 对于带其自身 CRC 的 Margin payload,接收器可选择通过 CRC 校验的任一副本(如果两副本都通过 CRC,则可在使用前进行比较)。

数据奇偶校验位是 Lane 通信的所有 Data Block 有效负载的偶校验,且对每个 Lane 独立计算。上游和下游端口发送器按以下方式计算奇偶校验:

- 当 LTSSM 处于 Recovery.Speed 时初始化奇偶校验。
- 在发送 SDS Ordered Set 时初始化奇偶校验。
- 发送 SKP Ordered Set 后初始化奇偶校验。
- 在加扰之后,用 Data Block 有效负载的每一位更新奇偶校验。因此,任何灰度编码 (gray coding) 和预编码 (precoding) 都不影响奇偶校验计算,奇偶校验在 FEC 之后计算。
- 紧跟在 Data Block 之后发送的 SKP Ordered Set 的数据奇偶校验位设置为当前奇偶校验值。

**实现说明:**
**CONTROL SKP ORDERED SET 中的错误保护**

符号 4N+1 (位 [4:0])、符号 4N+2 (位 [7:0]) 和符号 4N+3 (位 [7:0]) 中的 21 位由 5 位 CRC 和 1 位奇偶校验位保护,剩下 15 位用于信息传递。奇偶校验位提供针对奇数次位翻转(例如 1 位、3 位)的检测,而 CRC 提供 1 位和 2 位翻转的保证检测;从而在这 21 位上提供三位翻转检测保证,以及对长度为 5 的突发错误的保证检测。5 位 CRC 派生自本原多项式: x5 + x2 + 1。

由于这 21 位不属于 TLP,重复传递相同内容提供传递保证。这通过架构寄存器实现。下游命令从下游端口 (Downstream Port) 发送,反映架构寄存器的内容,而通过错误检查的上游状态则更新到下游端口中的状态寄存器。因此,软件具有在发出新命令前先发出命令并等待状态回传的机制。因此,这 15 位信息充当微数据包 (micro-packet)。

</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
</div>


<a id="sec-4-2-8-3"></a>
### 4.2.8.3 SKP Ordered Set for 1b/1b Encoding | 1b/1b 编码的 SKP Ordered Set

---

<!-- 📄 Page 584 -->
---

<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th width="50%">🇬🇧 English</th>
<th width="50%" style="background-color:#e8e8e8">🇨🇳 中文</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>

- The Data Parity, First Retimer Data Parity, and Second Retimer Data Parity bits of a SKP Ordered Set are all set to the current parity.

Upstream and Downstream Port Receivers compute and act on the parity as follows:

- Parity is initialized when the LTSSM is in Recovery.Speed.
- Parity is initialized when an SDS Ordered Set is received.
- Parity is updated with each bit of a Data Block's payload before de-scrambling has been performed. Thus, this is performed after gray coding and precoding, if any, by the Receiver and Parity is compared pre FEC.
- When a SKP Ordered Set is received, each Lane compares the received Data Parity bit to its calculated parity. It is strongly recommended that this check be performed for Control SKP Ordered Sets immediately following a Data Block only. If a mismatch is detected, the receiver must set the bit of the Port's Local Data Parity Mismatch Status Register that corresponds to the Lane's default Lane number. The mismatch is not a Receiver Error and must not cause a Link retrain.
- When a SKP Ordered Set is received, each Lane compares the received First Retimer Data Parity bit to its calculated parity. It is strongly recommended that this check be performed for Control SKP Ordered Sets immediately following a Data Block only. If a mismatch is detected, the receiver must set the bit of the Port's First Retimer Data Parity Mismatch Status Register that corresponds to the Lane's default Lane number. The mismatch is not a Receiver Error and must not cause a Link retrain.
- When a SKP Ordered Set is received, each Lane compares the received Second Retimer Data Parity bit to its calculated parity. It is strongly recommended that this check be performed for Control SKP Ordered Sets immediately following a Data Block only. If a mismatch is detected, the receiver must set the bit of the Port's Second Retimer Data Parity Mismatch Status Register that corresponds to the Lane's default Lane number. The mismatch is not a Receiver Error and must not cause a Link retrain.
- Parity is initialized when a SKP Ordered Set is received. See § Section 4.3.6.7 for the definition of First Retimer and Second Retimer, and for Retimer Pseudo Port requirements for parity computation and modification of the First Retimer Data Parity and Second Retimer Data Parity bits of Control SKP Ordered Sets.

</td>
<td style="background-color:#e8e8e8">

- SKP Ordered Set 的数据奇偶校验位、第一 Retimer 数据奇偶校验位和第二 Retimer 数据奇偶校验位均设置为当前奇偶校验值。

上游和下游端口接收器按以下方式计算并处理奇偶校验:

- 当 LTSSM 处于 Recovery.Speed 时初始化奇偶校验。
- 在接收 SDS Ordered Set 时初始化奇偶校验。
- 在解扰之前,用 Data Block 有效负载的每一位更新奇偶校验。因此,这在接收器执行任何灰度编码 (gray coding) 和预编码 (precoding) 之后执行,奇偶校验在 FEC 之前进行比较。
- 收到 SKP Ordered Set 时,每个 Lane 将接收到的数据奇偶校验位与其计算的奇偶校验进行比较。强烈建议仅对紧跟在 Data Block 之后的 Control SKP Ordered Set 执行此检查。如果检测到不匹配,接收器必须将端口 Local Data Parity Mismatch Status 寄存器中与该 Lane 默认 Lane 编号对应的位置 1。该不匹配不是接收器错误 (Receiver Error),不得导致链路 (Link) 重新训练 (retrain)。
- 收到 SKP Ordered Set 时,每个 Lane 将接收到的第一 Retimer 数据奇偶校验位与其计算的奇偶校验进行比较。强烈建议仅对紧跟在 Data Block 之后的 Control SKP Ordered Set 执行此检查。如果检测到不匹配,接收器必须将端口 First Retimer Data Parity Mismatch Status 寄存器中与该 Lane 默认 Lane 编号对应的位置 1。该不匹配不是接收器错误 (Receiver Error),不得导致链路 (Link) 重新训练 (retrain)。
- 收到 SKP Ordered Set 时,每个 Lane 将接收到的第二 Retimer 数据奇偶校验位与其计算的奇偶校验进行比较。强烈建议仅对紧跟在 Data Block 之后的 Control SKP Ordered Set 执行此检查。如果检测到不匹配,接收器必须将端口 Second Retimer Data Parity Mismatch Status 寄存器中与该 Lane 默认 Lane 编号对应的位置 1。该不匹配不是接收器错误 (Receiver Error),不得导致链路 (Link) 重新训练 (retrain)。
- 收到 SKP Ordered Set 时初始化奇偶校验。有关第一 Retimer 和第二 Retimer 的定义,以及 Retimer 伪端口 (Pseudo Port) 对奇偶校验计算和 Control SKP Ordered Set 的第一 Retimer 数据奇偶校验位、第二 Retimer 数据奇偶校验位修改的要求,见 § Section 4.3.6.7。

</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
