**Table 4-55 PHY Payload for Control SKP Ordered Set with 1b/1b Encoding | 表 4-55 1b/1b 编码的 Control SKP Ordered Set 的 PHY Payload**

| Field | Bit Position(s) (Replicated Bit Position(s)) | Description |
|-------|----------------------------------------------|-------------|
| Phy Payload Type | 0 (20) (40) (60) | If the LTSSM state is Polling.Compliance: this bit is Set to 1b<br>Else:<br>0b - Margin Payload<br>1b - LFSR<br>See § Section 4.2.8.4 for Phy Payload Type field usage. |
| Port Parity | 1 (21) (41) (61) | If the LTSSM state is Polling.Compliance: this bit is Set to 1b<br>Else:<br>even parity of all the bits in the Data Blocks on that Lane from the last SKP Ordered Set |
| Retimer 1 Parity | 2 (22) (42) (62) | If the LTSSM state is Polling.Compliance: this bit is Set to 1b<br>Else:<br>Port sets this bit with Port Parity; First Retimer, if present, overwrites with its own calculated even parity of all the bits in the Data Blocks on that Lane from the last SKP ordered Set |
| Retimer 2 Parity | 3 (23) (43) (63) | If the LTSSM state is Polling.Compliance: this bit is Set to 1b<br>Else:<br>Port sets this bit with Port Parity; Second Retimer, if present, overwrites with its own calculated even parity of all the bits in the Data Blocks on that Lane from the last SKP Ordered Set |
| Payload | [23:0] {31:24, 19:4} ({59:44, 39:32}) | If the LTSSM state is Polling.Compliance:<br>{ Error_Status[7:0], ~Error_Status[7], Error_Status[6], ~Error_Status[5], Error_Status[4], ~Error_Status[3], Error_Status[2], ~Error_Status[1], Error_Status[0], 22h }<br>Else If PHY Payload Type == 0b Margin:<br>{ Margin Payload[7:0], Usage Model, Margin Type[2:0], Receiver Number[2:0], Margin CRC[4:0], Reserved[3:0] }<br>Else:<br>{ Even Parity of LFSR[22:0], LFSR[22:0] }<br>All of these are in little-endian format. Thus, for example, the 8 bits of Margin Payload occupies bits 31:24 and 59:52 |

<a id="sec-4-2-8-4"></a>
### 4.2.8.4 Rules for Transmitters | 发送器规则


<div style="overflow-x: auto; max-width: 100%;">
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th width="50%">🇬🇧 English</th>
<th width="50%" style="background-color:#e8e8e8">🇨🇳 中文</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>

- All Lanes shall transmit Symbols at the same frequency (the difference between bit rates is 0 ppm within all multi-Lane Links).
- When transmitted, all Lanes of a multi-Lane Link must simultaneously transmit SKP Ordered Sets of the same length and type (Control or Standard), except as allowed for a Loopback Follower in the Loopback.Active LTSSM State (see § Section 4.2.5.11 and § Table 8-7 for the definition of simultaneous in this context).
- The transmitted SKP Ordered Set when using 8b/10b encoding must follow the definition in § Section 4.2.8.1 .

</td>
<td style="background-color:#e8e8e8">

- 所有 Lane 必须以相同频率发送符号(在所有多 Lane 链路 (Link) 内,比特率差异为 0 ppm)。
- 发送时,多 Lane 链路的所有 Lane 必须同时发送相同长度和类型(Control 或 Standard)的 SKP Ordered Set,Loopback.Active LTSSM 状态下的 Loopback Follower 除外(本上下文中"同时"的定义见 § Section 4.2.5.11 和 § Table 8-7)。
- 使用 8b/10b 编码时,发送的 SKP Ordered Set 必须遵循 § Section 4.2.8.1 中的定义。

</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
</div>


---

<!-- 📄 Page 588 -->
---

<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th width="50%">🇬🇧 English</th>
<th width="50%" style="background-color:#e8e8e8">🇨🇳 中文</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>

- The transmitted SKP Ordered Set when using 128b/130b encoding must follow the definition in § Section 4.2.8.2 .
- The transmitted SKP Ordered Set when using 1b/1b-encoding must follow the definition in § Section 4.2.8.3 .
- When using 8b/10b encoding:
  - If the Link is not operating in SRIS, or the bit corresponding to the current Link speed is Set in the Enable Lower SKP OS Generation Vector field and the LTSSM is in L0, a SKP Ordered Set must be scheduled for transmission at an interval between 1180 and 1538 Symbol Times.
  - If the Link is operating in SRIS and either the bit corresponding to the current Link speed is Clear in the Enable Lower SKP OS Generation Vector field or the LTSSM is not in L0, a SKP Ordered Set must be scheduled for transmission at an interval of less than 154 Symbol Times.
- When using 128b/130b encoding:
  - If the Link is not operating in SRIS, or the bit corresponding to the current Link speed is Set in the Enable Lower SKP OS Generation Vector field and the LTSSM is in L0, a SKP Ordered Set must be scheduled for transmission at an interval between 370 and 375 Blocks, in Non-Flit Mode or while not sending Data Stream in Flit Mode. Loopback Followers must meet this requirement until they start looping back the incoming bit stream.
  - If the Link is operating in SRIS and either the bit corresponding to the current Link speed is Clear in the Enable Lower SKP OS Generation Vector field or the LTSSM is not in L0, a SKP Ordered Set must be scheduled for transmission at an interval less than 38 Blocks, in Non-Flit Mode or while not sending Data Stream in Flit Mode. Loopback Followers must meet this requirement until they start looping back the incoming bit stream.
  - When the LTSSM is in the Loopback state and the Link is not operating in SRIS, the Loopback Lead must schedule two SKP Ordered Sets to be transmitted, at most two Blocks apart from each other, at an interval between 370 to 375 blocks. For 32.0 GT/s, the Loopback Lead is permitted to have an EIEOSQ between the two SKP Ordered Sets.
  - When the LTSSM is in the Loopback state and the Link is operating in SRIS, the Loopback Lead must schedule two SKP Ordered Sets to be transmitted, at most two Blocks apart from each other, at an interval of less than 38 Blocks. For 32.0 GT/s, the Loopback Lead is permitted to have an EIEOSQ between the two SKP Ordered Sets.
  - When operating in Flit Mode during a Data Stream or just prior to transitioning to transmitting the Data Stream, SKP Ordered Set transmission rules as specified in § Section 4.2.3.1.5 .
  - The Control SKP Ordered Set is transmitted only at the following times:
    - In Non-Flit Mode when the data rate is 16.0 or 32.0 GT/s and in Flit Mode when the data rate is 8.0, 16.0, or 32.0 GT/s and one of the following conditions is met:
      - A Data Stream is being transmitted.

        SKP Ordered Sets transmitted within a Data Stream must alternate between the Standard SKP Ordered Set and the Control SKP Ordered Set except for when undergoing an L0p upsize. In L0p when an inactive Lane is transitioning to active the Link must send a Control SKP Ordered Set on all Lanes prior to transmitting the Data Stream on the transitioning Lanes. During an L0p upsize, active lanes are permitted to transmit Control SKP Ordered Sets instead of Standard SKP Ordered Sets to reduce the latency of the that L0p upsize.
      - The LTSSM enters the Configuration.Idle state or Recovery.Idle state.

        See § Section 4.2.7.3.6 and § Section 4.2.7.4.5 for more information. Transmission of this instance of the Control SKP Ordered Set is not subject to any minimum scheduling interval requirements described above. Transmitters are permitted,

</td>
<td style="background-color:#e8e8e8">

- 使用 128b/130b 编码时,发送的 SKP Ordered Set 必须遵循 § Section 4.2.8.2 中的定义。
- 使用 1b/1b 编码时,发送的 SKP Ordered Set 必须遵循 § Section 4.2.8.3 中的定义。
- 使用 8b/10b 编码时:
  - 如果链路 (Link) 不在 SRIS 下运行,或 Enable Lower SKP OS Generation Vector 字段中当前链路速度对应的位被置 1 且 LTSSM 处于 L0,则必须以 1180 至 1538 符号时间之间的间隔调度发送 SKP Ordered Set。
  - 如果链路在 SRIS 下运行,且 Enable Lower SKP OS Generation Vector 字段中当前链路速度对应的位被清 0 或 LTSSM 不在 L0,则必须以小于 154 符号时间的间隔调度发送 SKP Ordered Set。
- 使用 128b/130b 编码时:
  - 如果链路不在 SRIS 下运行,或 Enable Lower SKP OS Generation Vector 字段中当前链路速度对应的位被置 1 且 LTSSM 处于 L0,则在非 Flit 模式下或 Flit 模式下未发送数据流 (Data Stream) 时,必须以 370 至 375 个 Block 之间的间隔调度发送 SKP Ordered Set。Loopback Follower 在开始回环传入比特流之前必须满足此要求。
  - 如果链路在 SRIS 下运行,且 Enable Lower SKP OS Generation Vector 字段中当前链路速度对应的位被清 0 或 LTSSM 不在 L0,则在非 Flit 模式下或 Flit 模式下未发送数据流时,必须以小于 38 个 Block 的间隔调度发送 SKP Ordered Set。Loopback Follower 在开始回环传入比特流之前必须满足此要求。
  - 当 LTSSM 处于 Loopback 状态且链路不在 SRIS 下运行时,Loopback Lead 必须调度发送两个 SKP Ordered Set,彼此间隔不超过两个 Block,以 370 至 375 个 Block 之间的间隔发送。对于 32.0 GT/s,允许 Loopback Lead 在两个 SKP Ordered Set 之间插入 EIEOSQ。
  - 当 LTSSM 处于 Loopback 状态且链路在 SRIS 下运行时,Loopback Lead 必须调度发送两个 SKP Ordered Set,彼此间隔不超过两个 Block,以小于 38 个 Block 的间隔发送。对于 32.0 GT/s,允许 Loopback Lead 在两个 SKP Ordered Set 之间插入 EIEOSQ。
  - 在 Flit 模式下处于数据流期间或即将转换到发送数据流时,SKP Ordered Set 发送规则见 § Section 4.2.3.1.5。
  - Control SKP Ordered Set 仅在以下时间发送:
    - 在非 Flit 模式下数据率为 16.0 或 32.0 GT/s 时,或在 Flit 模式下数据率为 8.0、16.0 或 32.0 GT/s 时,且满足以下条件之一:
      - 正在发送数据流 (Data Stream)。

        数据流内发送的 SKP Ordered Set 必须在 Standard SKP Ordered Set 和 Control SKP Ordered Set 之间交替,但正在进行 L0p upsize 时除外。在 L0p 中,当非活动 Lane 转换为活动时,链路必须在转换的 Lane 上发送数据流之前在所有 Lane 上发送 Control SKP Ordered Set。在 L0p upsize 期间,允许活动 Lane 发送 Control SKP Ordered Set 代替 Standard SKP Ordered Set,以降低该 L0p upsize 的延迟。
      - LTSSM 进入 Configuration.Idle 状态或 Recovery.Idle 状态。

        详见 § Section 4.2.7.3.6 和 § Section 4.2.7.4.5。此 Control SKP Ordered Set 实例的发送不受上述任何最小调度间隔要求的约束。允许发送器

</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

---

<!-- 📄 Page 589 -->
---


<div style="overflow-x: auto; max-width: 100%;">
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th width="50%">🇬🇧 English</th>
<th width="50%" style="background-color:#e8e8e8">🇨🇳 中文</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>

but not required, to reset their SKP Ordered Set scheduling interval timer after transmitting this instance of the Control SKP Ordered Set.
    - The first SKP Ordered Set is being sent after an L0p upsizing.

      A Control SKP Ordered Set must be transmitted on all Lanes - the Lanes that are active and the Lanes that are being activated.
- When using 1b/1b encoding: only Control SKP Ordered Sets are sent. The following rules must be followed, except when transmitting Compliance Modified Compliance patterns:
  - If the Link is not operating in SRIS, or the bit corresponding to the current Link speed is Set in the Enable Lower SKP OS Generation Vector field and the LTSSM is in L0, a SKP Ordered Set must be scheduled for transmission at an interval of 740 to 750 Blocks from the prior SKP Ordered Set, while a Data Stream is not in progress. Loopback Followers must meet this requirement until they start looping back the incoming bit stream.
  - Behavior is undefined if the Enable Lower SKP OS Generation Vector field setting is changed in FM at a data rate other than 2.5 GT/s.
  - If the Link is operating in SRIS and either the bit corresponding to the current Link speed is Clear in the Enable Lower SKP OS Generation Vector field or the LTSSM is not in L0, a SKP Ordered Set must be scheduled for transmission at an interval of less than 76 Blocks, while a Data Stream is not in progress. Loopback Followers must meet this requirement until they start looping back the incoming bit stream.
  - When the LTSSM is in the Loopback state and the Link is not operating in SRIS, the Loopback Lead must schedule two back-to-back SKP Ordered Sets to be transmitted. The SKP Ordered Sets must be sent, at an interval of 740 to 750 blocks from the prior SKP Ordered Set when not in a Data Stream.
  - When the LTSSM is in the Loopback state and the Link is operating in SRIS, the Loopback Lead must schedule two back-to-back SKP Ordered Sets to be transmitted. The SKP Ordered Sets must be sent at an interval of less than 76 Blocks, when not in a Data Stream.
  - During the Data Stream, just prior to transitioning to transmitting the Data Stream, or immediately after terminating the Data Stream, SKP Ordered Set transmission rules must be followed as specified in § Section 4.2.3.1.5 .
  - Phy Payload Type must be set as follows:
    - If the LTSSM state is Polling.Compliance: 1b.
    - Else: For Lane 0, alternate between 0b and 1b in consecutive Control SKP OS, with any starting value after an exit from electrical idle. Any other Lane must send the same value as Lane 0. Receivers must not depend on this alternation.
- Scheduled SKP Ordered Sets shall be transmitted if a packet or Ordered Set is not already in progress, otherwise they are accumulated and then inserted consecutively at the next packet or Ordered Set boundary.

Note: When using 128b/130b or 1b/1b encoding, SKP Ordered Sets cannot be transmitted in consecutive Blocks within a Data Stream. See § Section 4.2.2.3.2 for more information.

- SKP Ordered Sets do not count as an interruption when monitoring for consecutive Symbols or Ordered Sets (e.g., eight consecutive TS1 Ordered Sets in Polling.Active).
- When using 8b/10b encoding: SKP Ordered Sets must not be transmitted while the Compliance Pattern or the Modified Compliance Pattern (see § Section 4.2.9 ) is in progress during Polling.Compliance if the Compliance SOS bit of the Link Control 2 register is 0b. If the Compliance SOS bit of the Link Control 2 register is 1b, two consecutive SKP Ordered Sets must be sent (instead of one) for every scheduled SKP Ordered Set time interval while the Compliance Pattern or the Modified Compliance Pattern is in progress when using 8b/10b encoding.

</td>
<td style="background-color:#e8e8e8">

(但不是必须)在发送此 Control SKP Ordered Set 实例后复位其 SKP Ordered Set 调度间隔定时器。
    - 在 L0p upsize 后发送第一个 SKP Ordered Set。

      必须在所有 Lane(活动 Lane 和正在激活的 Lane)上发送 Control SKP Ordered Set。
- 使用 1b/1b 编码时:仅发送 Control SKP Ordered Set。除发送 Compliance Modified Compliance 码型外,必须遵守以下规则:
  - 如果链路不在 SRIS 下运行,或 Enable Lower SKP OS Generation Vector 字段中当前链路速度对应的位被置 1 且 LTSSM 处于 L0,则在未处于数据流 (Data Stream) 期间,必须以距前一个 SKP Ordered Set 740 至 750 个 Block 的间隔调度发送 SKP Ordered Set。Loopback Follower 在开始回环传入比特流之前必须满足此要求。
  - 如果在 FM 中以 2.5 GT/s 以外的数据率更改 Enable Lower SKP OS Generation Vector 字段设置,则行为未定义。
  - 如果链路在 SRIS 下运行,且 Enable Lower SKP OS Generation Vector 字段中当前链路速度对应的位被清 0 或 LTSSM 不在 L0,则在未处于数据流期间,必须以小于 76 个 Block 的间隔调度发送 SKP Ordered Set。Loopback Follower 在开始回环传入比特流之前必须满足此要求。
  - 当 LTSSM 处于 Loopback 状态且链路不在 SRIS 下运行时,Loopback Lead 必须调度发送两个背靠背 (back-to-back) 的 SKP Ordered Set。在未处于数据流时,SKP Ordered Set 必须以距前一个 SKP Ordered Set 740 至 750 个 Block 的间隔发送。
  - 当 LTSSM 处于 Loopback 状态且链路在 SRIS 下运行时,Loopback Lead 必须调度发送两个背靠背的 SKP Ordered Set。在未处于数据流时,SKP Ordered Set 必须以小于 76 个 Block 的间隔发送。
  - 在数据流期间、即将转换到发送数据流之前,或数据流终止后立即,SKP Ordered Set 发送规则必须遵循 § Section 4.2.3.1.5。
  - Phy Payload Type 必须按如下方式设置:
    - 如果 LTSSM 状态为 Polling.Compliance: 1b。
    - 否则:对于 Lane 0,在连续的 Control SKP OS 中,在 0b 和 1b 之间交替,退出电气空闲 (electrical idle) 后的起始值任意。其他任何 Lane 必须发送与 Lane 0 相同的值。接收器不得依赖此交替。
- 已调度的 SKP Ordered Set 应在数据包或 Ordered Set 未进行中时发送,否则将累积并在下一个数据包或 Ordered Set 边界连续插入。

注:使用 128b/130b 或 1b/1b 编码时,SKP Ordered Set 不能在数据流内连续 Block 中发送。详见 § Section 4.2.2.3.2。

- 在监视连续符号或 Ordered Set(例如 Polling.Active 中的八个连续 TS1 Ordered Set)时,SKP Ordered Set 不计为中断。
- 使用 8b/10b 编码时:在 Polling.Compliance 期间,如果 Link Control 2 寄存器的 Compliance SOS 位为 0b,则在 Compliance Pattern 或 Modified Compliance Pattern(见 § Section 4.2.9 )进行中时不得发送 SKP Ordered Set。如果 Link Control 2 寄存器的 Compliance SOS 位为 1b,则在使用 8b/10b 编码时,在 Compliance Pattern 或 Modified Compliance Pattern 进行中的每个已调度的 SKP Ordered Set 时间间隔必须发送两个连续的 SKP Ordered Set(而不是一个)。

</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
</div>


---

<!-- 📄 Page 590 -->
---

<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th width="50%">🇬🇧 English</th>
<th width="50%" style="background-color:#e8e8e8">🇨🇳 中文</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>

- When using 128b/130b or 1b/1b encoding: The Compliance SOS register bit has no effect. While in Polling.Compliance, Transmitters must not transmit any SKP Ordered Sets other than those specified as part of the Modified Compliance Pattern in § Section 4.2.12 .
- Any and all time spent in a state when the Transmitter is electrically idle does not count in the scheduling interval used to schedule the transmission of SKP Ordered Sets.
- It is recommended that any counter(s) or other mechanisms used to schedule SKP Ordered Sets be reset any time when the Transmitter is electrically idle.
- Receivers shall recognize received SKP Ordered Sets as defined in § Section 4.2.8.1 when using 8b/10b encoding, as defined in § Section 4.2.8.2 when using 128b/130b encoding, and as defined in § Section 4.2.8.3 when using the 1b/1b encoding.
  - The length of the received SKP Ordered Sets shall not vary from Lane-to-Lane in a multi-Lane Link, except as may occur during Loopback.Active.
- Receivers must be tolerant to receive and process SKP Ordered Sets sent by a transmitter, as defined by the appropriate rules in § Section 4.2.4.1 , § Section 4.2.8.1 , § Section 4.2.8.2 , and § Section 4.2.8.3
  - Note: Since Transmitters in electrical idle are not required to reset their mechanism for time-based scheduling of SKP Ordered Sets, Receivers shall be tolerant to receive the first time-scheduled SKP Ordered Set following electrical idle in less than the average time interval between SKP Ordered Sets.
- For 8.0, 16.0, and 32.0 GT/s data rates, in L0 state, Receivers must check that each SKP Ordered Set is preceded by a Data Block with an EDS token.
- Receivers shall be tolerant to receive and process consecutive SKP Ordered Sets in 2.5 GT/s and 5.0 GT/s data rates.
  - Receivers shall be tolerant to receive and process SKP Ordered Sets that have a maximum separation dependent on the largest Rx_MPS_Limit a component supports. For 2.5 GT/s and 5.0 GT/s data rates, the formula for the maximum number of Symbols (N) between SKP Ordered Sets is:

    N = 1538 + Rx_MPS_Limit (in bytes) + 28. For example, if Rx_MPS_Limit is 4096 bytes, N = 1538 + 4096 + 28 = 5662.
- When using 1b/1b encoding, each Receiver is permitted to insert or delete 8 Bytes of SKP at an aligned 8 byte boundary. Thus, a received SKP Ordered Set can be 24, 32, 40, 48 or 56 bytes.

</td>
<td style="background-color:#e8e8e8">

- 使用 128b/130b 或 1b/1b 编码时:Compliance SOS 寄存器位无效。在 Polling.Compliance 中,发送器不得发送 § Section 4.2.12 中作为 Modified Compliance Pattern 一部分指定的 SKP Ordered Set 之外的任何 SKP Ordered Set。
- 发送器处于电气空闲 (Electrical Idle) 状态时所花费的任何及所有时间,均不计入用于调度发送 SKP Ordered Set 的调度间隔。
- 建议在发送器处于电气空闲时,随时复位用于调度 SKP Ordered Set 的任何计数器或其他机制。
- 接收器应按 § Section 4.2.8.1(使用 8b/10b 编码时)、§ Section 4.2.8.2(使用 128b/130b 编码时)和 § Section 4.2.8.3(使用 1b/1b 编码时)中定义的方式识别接收到的 SKP Ordered Set。
  - 在多 Lane 链路中,接收到的 SKP Ordered Set 的长度不得因 Lane 而异,Loopback.Active 期间可能发生的情况除外。
- 接收器必须能够容忍接收和处理发送器发送的 SKP Ordered Set,具体规则见 § Section 4.2.4.1、§ Section 4.2.8.1、§ Section 4.2.8.2 和 § Section 4.2.8.3。
  - 注:由于处于电气空闲的发送器无需复位其基于时间的 SKP Ordered Set 调度机制,接收器应容忍在小于 SKP Ordered Set 之间的平均时间间隔内,接收到电气空闲后的第一个时间调度的 SKP Ordered Set。
- 对于 8.0、16.0 和 32.0 GT/s 数据率,在 L0 状态下,接收器必须检查每个 SKP Ordered Set 之前是否为带有 EDS 令牌的 Data Block。
- 接收器应能够容忍在 2.5 GT/s 和 5.0 GT/s 数据率下接收和处理连续的 SKP Ordered Set。
  - 接收器应能够容忍接收和处理最大间隔取决于组件支持的最大 Rx_MPS_Limit 的 SKP Ordered Set。对于 2.5 GT/s 和 5.0 GT/s 数据率,SKP Ordered Set 之间的最大符号数 (N) 公式为:

    N = 1538 + Rx_MPS_Limit (以字节为单位) + 28。例如,如果 Rx_MPS_Limit 为 4096 字节,则 N = 1538 + 4096 + 28 = 5662。
- 使用 1b/1b 编码时,允许每个接收器在 8 字节对齐边界上插入或删除 8 字节的 SKP。因此,接收的 SKP Ordered Set 可为 24、32、40、48 或 56 字节。

</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

---

<a id="sec-4-2-8-5"></a>
## 4.2.8.5 Rules for Receivers | 接收器规则

<!-- 📄 Page 591 -->
---

<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th width="50%">🇬🇧 English</th>
<th width="50%" style="background-color:#e8e8e8">🇨🇳 中文</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>

During Polling, the Polling.Compliance substate must be entered from Polling.Active based on the conditions described in § Section 4.2.7.2.1 . The compliance pattern consists of the sequence of 8b/10b Symbols K28.5, D21.5, K28.5, and D10.2 repeating. The Compliance sequence is as follows:

</td>
<td style="background-color:#e8e8e8">

在 Polling 期间，必须根据 § 4.2.7.2.1 节所述条件从 Polling.Active 进入 Polling.Compliance 子状态。一致性测试码型 (Compliance Pattern) 由 8b/10b 编码 的符号 K28.5、D21.5、K28.5 和 D10.2 重复序列组成。一致性序列如下：

</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

**Table 4-58 Compliance Sequence | 表 4-58 一致性序列**

| Symbol | Current Disparity | Pattern |
|--------|-------------------|---------|
| K28.5 | Negative | 0011111010 |
| D21.5 | Positive | 1010101010 |
| K28.5 | Positive | 1100000101 |
| D10.2 | Negative | 0101010101 |


<div style="overflow-x: auto; max-width: 100%;">
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th width="50%">🇬🇧 English</th>
<th width="50%" style="background-color:#e8e8e8">🇨🇳 中文</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>

The first Compliance sequence Symbol must have negative disparity. It is permitted to create a disparity error to align the running disparity to the negative disparity of the first Compliance sequence Symbol.

For any given device that has multiple Lanes, every eighth Lane is delayed by a total of four Symbols. A two Symbol delay occurs at both the beginning and end of the four Symbol Compliance Pattern sequence. A x1 device, or a xN device operating a Link in x1 mode, is permitted to include the Delay Symbols with the Compliance Pattern.

This delay sequence on every eighth Lane is then:

</td>
<td style="background-color:#e8e8e8">

一致性序列的第一个符号必须为负极性偏差 (Negative Disparity)。允许产生极性偏差错误以使运行偏差 (Running Disparity) 与一致性序列第一个符号的负极性偏差对齐。

对于具有多条通道 (Lane) 的任意设备，每第 8 条通道被延迟共 4 个符号。在 4 个符号的一致性测试码型序列的起始和结束处各产生 2 个符号的延迟。x1 设备或以 x1 模式运行链路 (Link) 的 xN 设备，允许将延迟符号与一致性测试码型一起包含。

每第 8 条通道上的延迟序列为：

</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
</div>


| Symbol: | D | D | K28.5 | D21.5 | K28.5 | D10.2 | D | D |
|---------|---|---|-------|-------|-------|-------|---|---|

<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th width="50%">🇬🇧 English</th>
<th width="50%" style="background-color:#e8e8e8">🇨🇳 中文</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>

Where D is a K28.5 Symbol. The first D Symbol has negative disparity to align the delay disparity with the disparity of the Compliance sequence.

After the eight Symbols are sent, the delay Symbols are advanced to the next Lane, until the delay Symbols have been sent on all eight lanes. Then the delay Symbols cycle back to Lane 0, and the process is repeated. It is permitted to advance the delay sequence across all eight lanes, regardless of the number of lanes detected or supported. An illustration of this process is shown below:

</td>
<td style="background-color:#e8e8e8">

其中 D 为 K28.5 符号。第一个 D 符号为负极性偏差，以使延迟偏差与一致性序列的偏差对齐。

发送完 8 个符号后，延迟符号推进到下一条通道，直到延迟符号在所有 8 条通道上都发送完毕。然后延迟符号循环回到 Lane 0，并重复该过程。无论检测到或支持的通道数为多少，都允许在全部 8 条通道上推进延迟序列。该过程的图示如下：

</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

| Lane 0 | D | D | K28.5- | D21.5 | K28.5+ | D10.2 | D | D | K28.5- | D21.5 | K28.5+ | D10.2 |
|--------|---|---|--------|-------|--------|-------|---|---|--------|-------|--------|-------|


<div style="overflow-x: auto; max-width: 100%;">
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th width="50%">🇬🇧 English</th>
<th width="50%" style="background-color:#e8e8e8">🇨🇳 中文</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>

**IMPLEMENTATION NOTE:**
**SKP ORDERED SETS IN A DATA STREAM IN FLIT MODE**

- For 1b/1b, Receivers can predict when SKP OS will occur.
- For 128b/130b, Receivers can predict when SKP OS will occur. This is needed since the EDS Token is not used in Flit Mode.
- For 8b/10b, Receivers need to look for COM SKP. SKP OS will occur at a period specified in § Section 4.2.8.4 .

When upconfiguring Lanes in L0p:

- For 8b/10b, there is no CTL SKP OS but there also is no retimer parity bits that need to be initialized.
- For 128b/130b, the CTL SKP OS is needed to restart the parity computations
- For 1b/1b, CTL SKP OS are always sent to restart the parity computations. Identical values in Phy Payload type are required for simplicity (see Section 4.2.8.4)

</td>
<td style="background-color:#e8e8e8">

**实现说明 (IMPLEMENTATION NOTE):**
**Flit 模式 数据流中的 SKP 有序集 (SKP Ordered Set)**

- 对于 1b/1b，接收器 (Receiver) 可以预测 SKP OS 何时出现。
- 对于 128b/130b 编码，接收器可以预测 SKP OS 何时出现。这一点是必需的，因为 Flit 模式 (Flit Mode) 下不使用 EDS Token。
- 对于 8b/10b 编码，接收器需要查找 COM SKP。SKP OS 将以 § 4.2.8.4 节规定的周期出现。

在 L0p 中向上配置通道 (Lane) 时：

- 对于 8b/10b 编码，没有 CTL SKP OS，但同样也不存在需要初始化的重定时器 (Retimer) 奇偶校验位。
- 对于 128b/130b 编码，需要 CTL SKP OS 以重新启动奇偶校验计算。
- 对于 1b/1b，总是发送 CTL SKP OS 以重新启动奇偶校验计算。为简化起见，Phy Payload 类型中的值必须相同（参见 4.2.8.4 节）。

</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
</div>

<a id="sec-4-2-9"></a>
## 4.2.9 Compliance Pattern in 8b/10b Encoding | 8b/10b 编码下的一致性测试码型

<!-- 📄 Page 592 -->
---

| Lane 1 | K28.5- | D21.5 | K28.5+ | D10.2 | K28.5- | D21.5 | K28.5+ | D10.2 | D | D | K28.5- | D21.5 |
|--------|--------|-------|--------|-------|--------|-------|--------|-------|---|---|--------|-------|

| Lane 2 | K28.5- | D21.5 | K28.5+ | D10.2 | K28.5- | D21.5 | K28.5+ | D10.2 | K28.5- | D21.5 | K28.5+ | D10.2 |
|--------|--------|-------|--------|-------|--------|-------|--------|-------|--------|-------|--------|-------|

| Lane 3 | K28.5- | D21.5 | K28.5+ | D10.2 | K28.5- | D21.5 | K28.5+ | D10.2 | K28.5- | D21.5 | K28.5+ | D10.2 |
|--------|--------|-------|--------|-------|--------|-------|--------|-------|--------|-------|--------|-------|

| Lane 4 | K28.5- | D21.5 | K28.5+ | D10.2 | K28.5- | D21.5 | K28.5+ | D10.2 | K28.5- | D21.5 | K28.5+ | D10.2 |
|--------|--------|-------|--------|-------|--------|-------|--------|-------|--------|-------|--------|-------|

| Lane 5 | K28.5- | D21.5 | K28.5+ | D10.2 | K28.5- | D21.5 | K28.5+ | D10.2 | K28.5- | D21.5 | K28.5+ | D10.2 |
|--------|--------|-------|--------|-------|--------|-------|--------|-------|--------|-------|--------|-------|

| Lane 6 | K28.5- | D21.5 | K28.5+ | D10.2 | K28.5- | D21.5 | K28.5+ | D10.2 | K28.5- | D21.5 | K28.5+ | D10.2 |
|--------|--------|-------|--------|-------|--------|-------|--------|-------|--------|-------|--------|-------|

| Lane 7 | K28.5- | D21.5 | K28.5+ | D10.2 | K28.5- | D21.5 | K28.5+ | D10.2 | K28.5- | D21.5 | K28.5+ | D10.2 |
|--------|--------|-------|--------|-------|--------|-------|--------|-------|--------|-------|--------|-------|

| Lane 8 | D | D | K28.5- | D21.5 | K28.5+ | D10.2 | D | D | K28.5- | D21.5 | K28.5+ | D10.2 |
|--------|---|---|--------|-------|--------|-------|---|---|--------|-------|--------|-------|

| Lane 9 | K28.5- | D21.5 | K28.5+ | D10.2 | K28.5- | D21.5 | K28.5+ | D10.2 | D | D | K28.5- | D21.5 |
|--------|--------|-------|--------|-------|--------|-------|--------|-------|---|---|--------|-------|

**Key:**

- COM when disparity is negative, specifically: "0011111010"
- COM when disparity is positive, specifically: "1100000101"
- Out of phase data Symbol, specifically: "1010101010"
- Out of phase data Symbol, specifically: "0101010101"
- Delay Symbol K28.5 (with appropriate disparity)

<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th width="50%">🇬🇧 English</th>
<th width="50%" style="background-color:#e8e8e8">🇨🇳 中文</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>

This sequence of delays ensures interference between adjacent Lanes, enabling measurement of the compliance pattern under close to worst-case Inter-Symbol Interference and cross-talk conditions.

The Modified Compliance Pattern consists of the same basic Compliance Pattern sequence (see § Section 4.2.9 ) with one change. Two identical error status Symbols followed by two K28.5 are appended to the basic Compliance sequence of 8b/10b Symbols (K28.5, D21.5, K28.5, and D10.2) to form the Modified Compliance Sequence of (K28.5, D21.5, K28.5, D10.2, error status Symbol, error status Symbol, K28.5, K28.5). The first Modified Compliance Sequence Symbol must have negative disparity. It is permitted to create a disparity error to align the running disparity to the negative disparity of the first Modified Compliance Sequence Symbol. For any given device that has multiple Lanes, every eighth Lane is moved by a total of eight Symbols. Four Symbols of K28.5 occurs at the beginning and another four Symbols of K28.7 occurs at the end of the eight Symbol Modified Compliance Pattern sequence. The first D Symbol has negative disparity to align the delay disparity with the disparity of the Modified Compliance Sequence. After the 16 Symbols are sent, the delay Symbols are advanced to the next Lane, until the delay Symbols have been sent on all eight lanes. Then the delay Symbols cycle back to Lane 0, and the process is repeated. It is permitted to advance the delay sequence across all eight lanes, regardless of the number of lanes detected or supported. A x1 device, or a xN device operating a Link in x1 mode, is permitted to include the Delay symbols with the Modified Compliance Pattern.

An illustration of the Modified Compliance Pattern is shown in § Table 4-59. Note: This table was "wrapped" to allow it to fit on the page.

</td>
<td style="background-color:#e8e8e8">

该延迟序列确保相邻通道之间产生干扰，从而可在接近最坏情况的符号间干扰 (ISI, Inter-Symbol Interference) 与串扰条件下对一致性测试码型进行测量。

修改后的一致性测试码型 (Modified Compliance Pattern) 与基本一致性测试码型序列（参见 § 4.2.9 节）相同，仅有一处变化。在由 8b/10b 符号（K28.5、D21.5、K28.5 和 D10.2）组成的基本一致性序列之后追加两个相同的错误状态符号 (Error Status Symbol) 与两个 K28.5，从而形成修改后的一致性序列 (K28.5, D21.5, K28.5, D10.2, error status Symbol, error status Symbol, K28.5, K28.5)。修改后一致性序列的第一个符号必须为负极性偏差。允许产生极性偏差错误以使运行偏差与修改后一致性序列第一个符号的负极性偏差对齐。对于具有多条通道的任意设备，每第 8 条通道被移动共 8 个符号。在 8 个符号的修改后一致性测试码型序列的起始处有 4 个 K28.5 符号，结束处有 4 个 K28.7 符号。第一个 D 符号为负极性偏差，以使延迟偏差与修改后一致性序列的偏差对齐。发送完 16 个符号后，延迟符号推进到下一条通道，直到延迟符号在所有 8 条通道上都发送完毕。然后延迟符号循环回到 Lane 0，并重复该过程。无论检测到或支持的通道数为多少，都允许在全部 8 条通道上推进延迟序列。x1 设备或以 x1 模式运行链路的 xN 设备，允许将延迟符号与修改后的一致性测试码型一起包含。

修改后一致性测试码型的图示见 § 表 4-59。注：本表经过"换行"处理以适应页面。

</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

**Table 4-59 Illustration of Modified Compliance Pattern | 表 4-59 修改后一致性测试码型图示**

| Lane 0 | D | D | D | D | K28.5- | D21.5 | K28.5+ | D10.2 | ERR | →next row prev row → | ERR | K28.5- | K28.5+ | K28.7- | K28.7- | K28.7- | K28.7- | K28.5- | D21.5 |
|--------|---|---|---|----|--------|-------|--------|-------|-----|------------------------|-----|--------|--------|--------|--------|--------|--------|--------|-------|

| Lane 1 | K28.5- | D21.5 | K28.5+ | D10.2 | ERR | ERR | K28.5- | K28.5+ | K28.5- | →next row prev row → | D21.5 | K28.5+ | D10.2 | ERR | ERR | K28.5- | K28.5+ | D | D |
|--------|--------|-------|--------|-------|-----|-----|--------|--------|--------|------------------------|-------|--------|-------|-----|-----|--------|--------|---|---|

---

<a id="sec-4-2-10"></a>

| Lane 3 | K28.5- | D21.5 | K28.5+ | D10.2 | ERR | ERR | K28.5- | K28.5+ | K28.5- | →next row prev row → | D21.5 | K28.5+ | D10.2 | ERR | ERR | K28.5- | K28.5+ | K28.5- | D21.5 |
|--------|--------|-------|--------|-------|-----|-----|--------|--------|--------|------------------------|-------|--------|-------|-----|-----|--------|--------|--------|-------|

|--------|--------|-------|--------|-------|-----|-----|--------|--------|--------|------------------------|-------|--------|-------|-----|-----|--------|--------|--------|-------|

|--------|--------|-------|--------|-------|-----|-----|--------|--------|--------|------------------------|-------|--------|-------|-----|-----|--------|--------|--------|-------|

|--------|--------|-------|--------|-------|-----|-----|--------|--------|--------|------------------------|-------|--------|-------|-----|-----|--------|--------|--------|-------|

|--------|--------|-------|--------|-------|-----|-----|--------|--------|--------|------------------------|-------|--------|-------|-----|-----|--------|--------|--------|-------|

|--------|---|---|---|----|--------|-------|--------|-------|-----|------------------------|-----|--------|--------|--------|--------|--------|--------|--------|-------|

|--------|--------|-------|--------|-------|-----|-----|--------|--------|--------|------------------------|-------|--------|-------|-----|-----|--------|--------|---|---|

**Key:**

- COM when disparity is negative, specifically: "0011111010"
- COM when disparity is positive, specifically: "1100000101"
- Out of phase data Symbol specifically: "1010101010"
- Out of phase data Symbol, specifically: "0101010101"
- Delay Symbol K28.5 (with appropriate disparity)
- error status Symbol (with appropriate disparity)
- EIE when disparity is negative, specifically "0011111000"

This table was wrapped so it fits on the page. The column after →next row is the one following prev row →

<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th width="50%">🇬🇧 English</th>
<th width="50%" style="background-color:#e8e8e8">🇨🇳 中文</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>

The reason two identical error Symbols are inserted instead of one is to ensure disparity of the 8b/10b sequence is not impacted by the addition of the error status Symbol.

All other Compliance Pattern rules are identical (i.e., the rules for adding delay Symbols) so as to preserve all the crosstalk characteristics of the Compliance Pattern.

The error status Symbol is an 8b/10b data Symbol, maintained on a per-Lane basis, and defined in 8-bit domain in the following way:

</td>
<td style="background-color:#e8e8e8">

之所以插入两个相同的错误符号而非一个，是为了确保 8b/10b 序列的极性偏差不受错误状态符号插入的影响。

其他所有一致性测试码型规则均相同（即添加延迟符号的规则），以保持一致性测试码型的全部串扰特性。

错误状态符号 (Error Status Symbol) 是一个 8b/10b 数据符号，以每条通道为单位维护，并在 8 位域中按以下方式定义：

</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

| Bit Position | Field | Description |
|--------------|-------|-------------|
| Bit 6:0 | Receiver Error Count | Incremented on every Receiver error after the Pattern Lock bit becomes asserted. |
| Bit 7 | Pattern Lock | Asserted when the Lane locks to the incoming Modified Compliance Pattern. |

---

<a id="sec-4-2-11"></a>
## 4.2.11 Compliance Pattern in 128b/130b Encoding | 128b/130b 编码下的一致性测试码型

<!-- 📄 Page 594 -->
---

<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th width="50%">🇬🇧 English</th>
<th width="50%" style="background-color:#e8e8e8">🇨🇳 中文</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>

The compliance pattern consists of the following repeating sequence of 36 or 37 Blocks:

1. One block with a Sync Header of 01b followed by a 128-bit unscrambled payload of 64 1's followed by 64 0's
2. One block with a Sync Header of 01b followed by a 128-bit unscrambled payload of the following:

</td>
<td style="background-color:#e8e8e8">

一致性测试码型由以下 36 或 37 个数据块 (Block) 的重复序列组成：

1. 一个数据块：同步头 (Sync Header) 为 01b，后接 128 位未加扰的有效负载 (Payload)，其中前 64 位为 1，后 64 位为 0。
2. 一个数据块：同步头为 01b，后接 128 位未加扰的有效负载，具体内容如下：

</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

| Symbol | Lane No modulo 8 = 0 | Lane No modulo 8 = 1 | Lane No modulo 8 = 2 | Lane No modulo 8 = 3 | Lane No modulo 8 = 4 | Lane No modulo 8 = 5 | Lane No modulo 8 = 6 | Lane No modulo 8 = 7 |
|--------|----------------------|----------------------|----------------------|----------------------|----------------------|----------------------|----------------------|----------------------|
| Symbol 0 | 55h | FFh | FFh | FFh | 55h | FFh | FFh | FFh |
| Symbol 1 | 55h | FFh | FFh | FFh | 55h | FFh | FFh | FFh |
| Symbol 2 | 55h | 00h | FFh | FFh | 55h | FFh | FFh | FFh |
| Symbol 3 | 55h | 00h | FFh | FFh | 55h | FFh | F0h | F0h |
| Symbol 4 | 55h | 00h | FFh | C0h | 55h | FFh | 00h | 00h |
| Symbol 5 | 55h | 00h | C0h | 00h | 55h | E0h | 00h | 00h |
| Symbol 6 | 55h | 00h | 00h | 00h | 55h | 00h | 00h | 00h |
| Symbol 7 | {P,~P} | {P,~P} | {P,~P} | {P,~P} | {P,~P} | {P,~P} | {P,~P} | {P,~P} |
| Symbol 8 | 00h | 1Eh | 2Dh | 3Ch | 4Bh | 5Ah | 69h | 78h |
| Symbol 9 | 00h | 55h | 00h | 00h | 00h | 55h | 00h | F0h |
| Symbol 10 | 00h | 55h | 00h | 00h | 00h | 55h | 00h | 00h |
| Symbol 11 | 00h | 55h | 00h | 00h | 00h | 55h | 00h | 00h |
| Symbol 12 | 00h | 55h | 0Fh | 0Fh | 00h | 55h | 07h | 00h |
| Symbol 13 | 00h | 55h | FFh | FFh | 00h | 55h | FFh | 00h |
| Symbol 14 | 00h | 55h | FFh | FFh | 7Fh | 55h | FFh | 00h |
| Symbol 15 | 00h | 55h | FFh | FFh | FFh | 55h | FFh | 00h |

**Key:**

- **P** Indicates the 4-bit encoding of the Transmitter preset value being used.
- **~P** Indicates the bit-wise inverse of P.

</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>

3. One block with a Sync Header of 01b followed by a 128-bit unscrambled payload of the following:

</td>
<td style="background-color:#e8e8e8">

3. 一个数据块：同步头为 01b，后接 128 位未加扰的有效负载，具体内容如下：

</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

| Symbol | Lane No modulo 8 = 0 | Lane No modulo 8 = 1 | Lane No modulo 8 = 2 | Lane No modulo 8 = 3 | Lane No modulo 8 = 4 | Lane No modulo 8 = 5 | Lane No modulo 8 = 6 | Lane No modulo 8 = 7 |
|--------|----------------------|----------------------|----------------------|----------------------|----------------------|----------------------|----------------------|----------------------|
| Symbol 0 | FFh | FFh | 55h | FFh | FFh | FFh | 55h | FFh |
| Symbol 1 | FFh | FFh | 55h | FFh | FFh | FFh | 55h | FFh |
| Symbol 2 | FFh | FFh | 55h | FFh | FFh | FFh | 55h | FFh |

## 4.2.11 (Continued) | 4.2.11（续）

<!-- 📄 Page 595 -->
---

| Symbol | Lane No modulo 8 = 0 | Lane No modulo 8 = 1 | Lane No modulo 8 = 2 | Lane No modulo 8 = 3 | Lane No modulo 8 = 4 | Lane No modulo 8 = 5 | Lane No modulo 8 = 6 | Lane No modulo 8 = 7 |
|--------|----------------------|----------------------|----------------------|----------------------|----------------------|----------------------|----------------------|----------------------|
| Symbol 3 | F0h | F0h | 55h | F0h | F0h | F0h | 55h | F0h |
| Symbol 4 | 00h | 00h | 55h | 00h | 00h | 00h | 55h | 00h |
| Symbol 5 | 00h | 00h | 55h | 00h | 00h | 00h | 55h | 00h |
| Symbol 6 | 00h | 00h | 55h | 00h | 00h | 00h | 55h | 00h |
| Symbol 7 | {P,~P} | {P,~P} | {P,~P} | {P,~P} | {P,~P} | {P,~P} | {P,~P} | {P,~P} |
| Symbol 8 | 00h | 1Eh | 2Dh | 3Ch | 4Bh | 5Ah | 69h | 78h |
| Symbol 9 | 00h | 00h | 00h | 55h | 00h | 00h | 00h | 55h |
| Symbol 10 | 00h | 00h | 00h | 55h | 00h | 00h | 00h | 55h |
| Symbol 11 | 00h | 00h | 00h | 55h | 00h | 00h | 00h | 55h |
| Symbol 12 | FFh | 0Fh | 0Fh | 55h | 0Fh | 0Fh | 0Fh | 55h |
| Symbol 13 | FFh | FFh | FFh | 55h | FFh | FFh | FFh | 55h |
| Symbol 14 | FFh | FFh | FFh | 55h | FFh | FFh | FFh | 55h |
| Symbol 15 | FFh | FFh | FFh | 55h | FFh | FFh | FFh | 55h |

**Key:**

- **P** Indicates the 4-bit encoding of the Transmitter preset being used.
- **~P** Indicates the bit-wise inverse of P.


<div style="overflow-x: auto; max-width: 100%;">
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th width="50%">🇬🇧 English</th>
<th width="50%" style="background-color:#e8e8e8">🇨🇳 中文</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>

4. One EIEOSQ
5. 32 Data Blocks, each with a payload of 16 Idle data Symbols (00h) scrambled

The payload in each Data Block is the output of the scrambler in that Lane (i.e., input data is 0b). The Lane numbers used to determine the scrambling LFSR seed value depend on how Polling.Compliance is entered. (See § Section 4.2.2.4 for more on assigning Lane numbers and other Scrambler requirements.) The Data Blocks of the compliance pattern do not form a Data Stream and hence are exempt from the requirement of transmitting an SDS Ordered Set or EDS Token during Ordered Set Block to Data Block transition and vice-versa.

</td>
<td style="background-color:#e8e8e8">

4. 一个 EIEOSQ。
5. 32 个数据块，每个数据块的有效负载为 16 个经加扰的 Idle 数据符号（00h）。

每个数据块的有效负载是该通道上加扰器 (Scrambler) 的输出（即输入数据为 0b）。用于确定加扰 LFSR 种子值的通道号取决于进入 Polling.Compliance 的方式。（关于通道号分配及其他加扰器要求，参见 § 4.2.2.4 节。）一致性测试码型的数据块不构成数据流 (Data Stream)，因此在有序集数据块 (Ordered Set Block) 与数据块 (Data Block) 之间相互转换时，无须发送 SDS 有序集或 EDS Token。

</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
</div>


**IMPLEMENTATION NOTE:**
**FIRST TWO BLOCKS OF THE COMPLIANCE PATTERN**

The first block is a very low frequency pattern to help with measurement of the preset settings. The second block is to notify the Lane number and preset encoding the compliance pattern is using along with ensuring the entire compliance pattern is DC Balanced.

<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th width="50%">🇬🇧 English</th>
<th width="50%" style="background-color:#e8e8e8">🇨🇳 中文</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td></td>
<td style="background-color:#e8e8e8">

**实现说明 (IMPLEMENTATION NOTE):**
**一致性测试码型的前两个数据块**

第一个数据块是极低频码型，用于辅助测量预设 (Preset) 设置。第二个数据块用于通知当前一致性测试码型所使用的通道号与预设编码，并确保整个一致性测试码型直流平衡 (DC Balanced)。

</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

---

<a id="sec-4-2-12"></a>
## 4.2.12 Modified Compliance Pattern in 128b/130b Encoding | 128b/130b 编码下修改后的一致性测试码型

<!-- 📄 Page 596 -->
---


<div style="overflow-x: auto; max-width: 100%;">
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th width="50%">🇬🇧 English</th>
<th width="50%" style="background-color:#e8e8e8">🇨🇳 中文</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>

The modified compliance pattern, when not operating in SRIS, consists of repeating the following sequence of 65792 or 65793 Blocks:

1. One EIEOSQ
2. 256 Data Blocks, each with a payload of 16 Idle data Symbols (00h), scrambled
3. 255 sets of the following sequence:
   i. One SKP Ordered Set
   ii. 256 Data Blocks, each with a payload of 16 Idle data Symbols (00h), scrambled

The modified compliance pattern, when operating in SRIS, consists of repeating the following sequence of 67585 or 67586 Blocks:

1. One EIEOSQ
2. 2048 sets of the following sequence:
   i. One SKP Ordered Set
   ii. 32 Data Blocks, each with a payload of 16 Idle data Symbols (00h), scrambled

The payload in each Data Block is the output of the scrambler in that Lane (i.e., input data is 0b). The Lane numbers used to determine the scrambling LFSR seed value depend on how Polling.Compliance is entered. (See § Section 4.2.2.4 for more on assigning Lane numbers.) The Data Blocks of the modified compliance pattern do not form a Data Stream and hence are exempt from the requirement of transmitting an SDS Ordered Set or EDS Token during Ordered Set Block to Data Block transition and vice-versa.

The jitter measurement pattern consists of repeating the following Block:

- Sync Header of 01b followed by a 128-bit unscrambled payload of 16 Symbols of 55h

This generates a pattern of alternating 1s and 0s for measuring the transmitter's jitter.

</td>
<td style="background-color:#e8e8e8">

当未运行在 SRIS 模式时，修改后的一致性测试码型由以下 65792 或 65793 个数据块的重复序列组成：

1. 一个 EIEOSQ。
2. 256 个数据块，每个数据块的有效负载为 16 个经加扰的 Idle 数据符号（00h）。
3. 255 组以下序列：
   i. 一个 SKP 有序集 (SKP Ordered Set)。
   ii. 256 个数据块，每个数据块的有效负载为 16 个经加扰的 Idle 数据符号（00h）。

当运行在 SRIS 模式时，修改后的一致性测试码型由以下 67585 或 67586 个数据块的重复序列组成：

1. 一个 EIEOSQ。
2. 2048 组以下序列：
   i. 一个 SKP 有序集。
   ii. 32 个数据块，每个数据块的有效负载为 16 个经加扰的 Idle 数据符号（00h）。

每个数据块的有效负载是该通道上加扰器的输出（即输入数据为 0b）。用于确定加扰 LFSR 种子值的通道号取决于进入 Polling.Compliance 的方式。（关于通道号分配，参见 § 4.2.2.4 节。）修改后一致性测试码型的数据块不构成数据流，因此无须在有序集数据块与数据块之间相互转换时发送 SDS 有序集或 EDS Token。

抖动测量码型 (Jitter Measurement Pattern) 由以下数据块的重复组成：

- 同步头为 01b，后接 128 位未加扰的有效负载（16 个 55h 符号）。

该码型生成交替的 1 和 0 序列，用于测量发送器 (Transmitter) 的抖动。

</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
</div>


**IMPLEMENTATION NOTE:**
**ORDERED SETS IN COMPLIANCE AND MODIFIED COMPLIANCE PATTERNS IN 128B/130B ENCODING**

The various Ordered Sets (e.g., EIEOS and SKP OS) follow the Ordered Set definition corresponding to the current Data Rate of operation. For example, at 32.0 GT/s Data Rate, the EIEOS is the 32.0 GT/s EIEOS; at 16.0 GT/s Data Rate, the EIEOS is the 16.0 GT/s EIEOS; whereas at 8.0 GT/s Data Rate, the EIEOS is the 8.0 GT/s EIEOS defined earlier. As defined in § Section 4.2.8 , the SKP Ordered Set is the Standard SKP Ordered Set.

<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th width="50%">🇬🇧 English</th>
<th width="50%" style="background-color:#e8e8e8">🇨🇳 中文</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td></td>
<td style="background-color:#e8e8e8">

**实现说明 (IMPLEMENTATION NOTE):**
**128B/130B 编码下一致性与修改后一致性测试码型中的有序集**

各种有序集（例如 EIEOS 与 SKP OS）遵循与当前运行数据速率 (Data Rate) 相对应的有序集定义。例如，在 32.0 GT/s 数据速率下，EIEOS 为 32.0 GT/s 的 EIEOS；在 16.0 GT/s 数据速率下，EIEOS 为 16.0 GT/s 的 EIEOS；而在 8.0 GT/s 数据速率下，EIEOS 为先前定义的 8.0 GT/s EIEOS。如 § 4.2.8 节所定义，SKP 有序集为标准 SKP 有序集 (Standard SKP Ordered Set)。

</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

---

<a id="sec-4-2-13"></a>
## 4.2.13 Jitter Measurement Pattern in 128b/130b | 128b/130b 编码下的抖动测量码型

---

<a id="sec-4-2-14"></a>
## 4.2.14 Compliance Pattern in 1b/1b Encoding | 1b/1b 编码下的一致性测试码型

<!-- 📄 Page 597 -->
---


<div style="overflow-x: auto; max-width: 100%;">
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th width="50%">🇬🇧 English</th>
<th width="50%" style="background-color:#e8e8e8">🇨🇳 中文</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>

The Compliance Pattern consists of the following repeating sequence of 137 Blocks. Gray-coding and precoding are not performed during the compliance pattern.

1. One block, unscrambled: 64 UIs of 11b each (voltage level 3 throughout)
2. One block, unscrambled: 64 UIs of 00b each (voltage level 0 throughout)
3. Two unscrambled blocks of Toggle Pattern (Ch repeated 32 times for each block)
4. Two blocks with an unscrambled payload of the following: This is in hex format starting with the most significant Symbol. For example, in Lane 1, Block 5 (38_DA_CC_C4_E2_3F_1D_35_3B_25_63_CC_B2_CC_FF_FF), Symbol 0 is FFh and Symbol 15 is 38. Note that these are inserted for establishing DC balance.

**Lane 0, 8:**
- Block 5: FF_FF_FF_FF_FF_FF_FF_FF_FF_FF_FF_FF_FF_FF_FF_FF
- Block 6: 5F_26_CC_65_C2_3B_C5_3F_FF_FF_FF_FF_FF_FF_FF_FF

**Lane 1, 9:**
- Block 5: 38_DA_CC_C4_E2_3F_1D_35_3B_25_63_CC_B2_CC_FF_FF
- Block 6: B1_CB_0D_33_C5_D4_EC_32_A2_AC_CC_53_DC_C6_38_B4

**Lane 2, 10:**
- Block 5: 52_3D_D4_99_EC_0F_3C_4E_56_00_00_00_00_00_00_00
- Block 6: A5_2A_69_C3_C9_C3_93_2F_30_CF_1C_C3_37_C0_D8_ED

**Lane 3, 11:**
- Block 5: E8_00_00_00_00_00_00_00_00_00_00_00_00_00_00_00
- Block 6: AC_71_6C_3C_CC_93_73_52_8E_6C_DC_0C_E7_C4_E2_D0

**Lane 4, 12:**
- Block 5: 93_6C_C8_3A_63_93_70_F6_6F_FF_FF_FF_FF_FF_FF_FF
- Block 6: 6A_65_DC_1D_A4_DD_28_F1_C3_2E_4F_2C_5C_2D_D6_C2

**Lane 5, 13:**
- Block 5: 33_C3_9C_6D_60_CF_71_8D_C3_35_D2_8E_3C_6D_0D_DD
- Block 6: 5E_C4_8C_ED_6C_4E_53_33_6D_C2_D5_3C_33_28_FC_53

**Lane 6, 14:**
- Block 5: 00_00_00_00_00_00_00_00_00_00_00_00_00_00_00_00
- Block 6: 63_6B_31_37_20_00_00_00_00_00_00_00_00_00_00_00

**Lane 7, 15:**
- Block 5: D9_C3_33_CC_A0_D3_DC_FF_FF_FF_FF_FF_FF_FF_FF_FF
- Block 6: 5D_2D_CD_0E_C3_23_E1_F0_8F_1D_32_8E_B3_31_39_C2

5. One EIEOSQ (unscrambled) – this resets the scrambler
6. 64 Blocks, each comprising of 16 Symbols of 00h scrambled.
7. One block, unscrambled: 64 UIs of 10b each (voltage level 2 throughout). The scrambler does not advance.
8. One block, unscrambled: 64 UIs of 01b each (voltage level 1 throughout). The scrambler does not advance.
9. 64 Blocks, each comprising of 16 Symbols of 00h scrambled.

</td>
<td style="background-color:#e8e8e8">

一致性测试码型由以下 137 个数据块的重复序列组成。一致性测试码型期间不执行格雷编码 (Gray-coding) 与预编码 (Precoding)。

1. 一个数据块，未加扰：64 个 UI 均为 11b（电压电平始终为 3）。
2. 一个数据块，未加扰：64 个 UI 均为 00b（电压电平始终为 0）。
3. 两个未加扰的 Toggle Pattern 数据块（每个数据块中 Ch 重复 32 次）。
4. 两个数据块，具有以下未加扰的有效负载：采用十六进制格式，从最高有效符号 (Symbol) 开始。例如，在 Lane 1 的 Block 5（38_DA_CC_C4_E2_3F_1D_35_3B_25_63_CC_B2_CC_FF_FF）中，Symbol 0 为 FFh，Symbol 15 为 38。注意，这些数据块用于建立直流平衡 (DC Balance)。

**Lane 0、8：**
- Block 5：FF_FF_FF_FF_FF_FF_FF_FF_FF_FF_FF_FF_FF_FF_FF_FF
- Block 6：5F_26_CC_65_C2_3B_C5_3F_FF_FF_FF_FF_FF_FF_FF_FF

**Lane 1、9：**
- Block 5：38_DA_CC_C4_E2_3F_1D_35_3B_25_63_CC_B2_CC_FF_FF
- Block 6：B1_CB_0D_33_C5_D4_EC_32_A2_AC_CC_53_DC_C6_38_B4

**Lane 2、10：**
- Block 5：52_3D_D4_99_EC_0F_3C_4E_56_00_00_00_00_00_00_00
- Block 6：A5_2A_69_C3_C9_C3_93_2F_30_CF_1C_C3_37_C0_D8_ED

**Lane 3、11：**
- Block 5：E8_00_00_00_00_00_00_00_00_00_00_00_00_00_00_00
- Block 6：AC_71_6C_3C_CC_93_73_52_8E_6C_DC_0C_E7_C4_E2_D0

**Lane 4、12：**
- Block 5：93_6C_C8_3A_63_93_70_F6_6F_FF_FF_FF_FF_FF_FF_FF
- Block 6：6A_65_DC_1D_A4_DD_28_F1_C3_2E_4F_2C_5C_2D_D6_C2

**Lane 5、13：**
- Block 5：33_C3_9C_6D_60_CF_71_8D_C3_35_D2_8E_3C_6D_0D_DD
- Block 6：5E_C4_8C_ED_6C_4E_53_33_6D_C2_D5_3C_33_28_FC_53

**Lane 6、14：**
- Block 5：00_00_00_00_00_00_00_00_00_00_00_00_00_00_00_00
- Block 6：63_6B_31_37_20_00_00_00_00_00_00_00_00_00_00_00

**Lane 7、15：**
- Block 5：D9_C3_33_CC_A0_D3_DC_FF_FF_FF_FF_FF_FF_FF_FF_FF
- Block 6：5D_2D_CD_0E_C3_23_E1_F0_8F_1D_32_8E_B3_31_39_C2

5. 一个 EIEOSQ（未加扰）—— 用于重置加扰器。
6. 64 个数据块，每个数据块由 16 个经加扰的 00h 符号组成。
7. 一个数据块，未加扰：64 个 UI 均为 10b（电压电平始终为 2）。加扰器不推进。
8. 一个数据块，未加扰：64 个 UI 均为 01b（电压电平始终为 1）。加扰器不推进。
9. 64 个数据块，每个数据块由 16 个经加扰的 00h 符号组成。

</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
</div>

<a id="sec-4-2-15"></a>
## 4.2.15 Modified Compliance Pattern in 1b/1b Encoding | 1b/1b 编码下修改后的一致性测试码型

<!-- 📄 Page 598 -->
---

<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th width="50%">🇬🇧 English</th>
<th width="50%" style="background-color:#e8e8e8">🇨🇳 中文</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>

The payload in each scrambled Block is the output of the scrambler in that Lane (i.e., input data is 0b), which are then gray-coded, and precoded, if performed, as shown in § Figure 4-22. The Lane numbers used to determine the scrambling LFSR seed value depend on how Polling.Compliance is entered. (See § Section 4.2.2.4 for more on assigning Lane numbers and other Scrambler requirements.) The scrambled Blocks of the compliance pattern do not form a Data Stream and hence are exempt from the requirement of transmitting an SDS Ordered Set or the FEC / CRC / Flit formation requirements.

The modified compliance pattern, when not operating in SRIS, consists of repeating the following sequence of 65792 Blocks:

1. One EIEOSQ (that resets the scrambler)
2. 256 Blocks, each comprising of 16 Symbols of 00h scrambled
3. 255 sets of the following sequence:
   a. One SKP Ordered Set
   b. 256 Data Blocks, each comprising of 16 Symbols of 00h scrambled

The modified compliance pattern, when operating in SRIS, consists of repeating the following sequence of 67585 Blocks:

1. One EIEOSQ (that resets the scrambler)
2. 2048 sets of the following sequence:
   a. One SKP Ordered Set
   b. 32 Blocks, each comprising of 16 Symbols of 00h scrambled

The payload in each scrambled Block is the output of the scrambler in that Lane (i.e., input data is 0b), which are then gray-coded, and precoded, if performed, as shown in § Figure 4-22. The Lane numbers used to determine the scrambling LFSR seed value depend on how Polling.Compliance is entered. (See § Section 4.2.2.4 for more on assigning Lane numbers.) The scrambled Blocks of the modified compliance pattern do not form a Data Stream and hence are exempt from the requirement of transmitting an SDS Ordered Set or the FEC / CRC / Flit formation requirements.

The jitter measurement pattern consists of repeating the following 52 UI, consisting of the following 4 sets of 13 UI each:

{ 00b, 01b, 00b, 11b, 00b, 10b, 01b, 10b, 11b, 01b, 11b, 10b, 10b,
  00b, 01b, 00b, 11b, 00b, 10b, 01b, 10b, 11b, 01b, 11b, 10b, 00b,
  00b, 01b, 00b, 11b, 00b, 10b, 01b, 10b, 11b, 01b, 11b, 11b, 10b,
  00b, 01b, 00b, 11b, 00b, 10b, 01b, 10b, 11b, 01b, 01b, 11b, 10b }

</td>
<td style="background-color:#e8e8e8">

每个经加扰的数据块的有效负载是该通道上加扰器的输出（即输入数据为 0b），随后按 § 图 4-22 所示执行格雷编码与预编码（如有）。用于确定加扰 LFSR 种子值的通道号取决于进入 Polling.Compliance 的方式。（关于通道号分配及其他加扰器要求，参见 § 4.2.2.4 节。）一致性测试码型的经加扰数据块不构成数据流，因此无须发送 SDS 有序集或满足 FEC / CRC / Flit 组合要求。

当未运行在 SRIS 模式时，修改后的一致性测试码型由以下 65792 个数据块的重复序列组成：

1. 一个 EIEOSQ（用于重置加扰器）。
2. 256 个数据块，每个数据块由 16 个经加扰的 00h 符号组成。
3. 255 组以下序列：
   a. 一个 SKP 有序集。
   b. 256 个数据块，每个数据块由 16 个经加扰的 00h 符号组成。

当运行在 SRIS 模式时，修改后的一致性测试码型由以下 67585 个数据块的重复序列组成：

1. 一个 EIEOSQ（用于重置加扰器）。
2. 2048 组以下序列：
   a. 一个 SKP 有序集。
   b. 32 个数据块，每个数据块由 16 个经加扰的 00h 符号组成。

每个经加扰的数据块的有效负载是该通道上加扰器的输出（即输入数据为 0b），随后按 § 图 4-22 所示执行格雷编码与预编码（如有）。用于确定加扰 LFSR 种子值的通道号取决于进入 Polling.Compliance 的方式。（关于通道号分配，参见 § 4.2.2.4 节。）修改后一致性测试码型的经加扰数据块不构成数据流，因此无须发送 SDS 有序集或满足 FEC / CRC / Flit 组合要求。

抖动测量码型由以下 52 个 UI 的重复组成，其中包含 4 组各 13 个 UI：

{ 00b, 01b, 00b, 11b, 00b, 10b, 01b, 10b, 11b, 01b, 11b, 10b, 10b,
  00b, 01b, 00b, 11b, 00b, 10b, 01b, 10b, 11b, 01b, 11b, 10b, 00b,
  00b, 01b, 00b, 11b, 00b, 10b, 01b, 10b, 11b, 01b, 11b, 11b, 10b,
  00b, 01b, 00b, 11b, 00b, 10b, 01b, 10b, 11b, 01b, 01b, 11b, 10b }

</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>


---

<a id="sec-4-2-16"></a>
## 4.2.16 Jitter Measurement Pattern in 1b/1b Encoding | 1b/1b 编码中的抖动测量码型

<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th width="50%">🇬🇧 English</th>
<th width="50%" style="background-color:#e8e8e8">🇨🇳 中文</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>

Two types of Toggle Patterns are defined for the best single edge jitter measurement accuracy:
High Swing Toggle Pattern
This comprises of alternating UIs between 00b and 11b (i.e., back to back symbols of 33h unscrambled, effectively alternating between voltage levels 0 and 3 in successive UIs).
Low Swing Toggle Pattern
This comprises of alternating UIs between 01b and 10b (i.e., back to back symbols of 66h unscrambled, effectively alternating between voltage levels 1 and 2 in successive UIs).

</td>
<td style="background-color:#e8e8e8">

为获得最佳的单边沿抖动测量精度,本规范定义了两类 Toggle Pattern(翻转码型):

**High Swing Toggle Pattern(大幅翻转码型)**
由 00b 与 11b 之间交替的 UI 构成(即未经加扰的 33h 符号背靠背排列,等效于在连续 UI 中于电压电平 0 与 3 之间翻转)。

**Low Swing Toggle Pattern(小幅翻转码型)**
由 01b 与 10b 之间交替的 UI 构成(即未经加扰的 66h 符号背靠背排列,等效于在连续 UI 中于电压电平 1 与 2 之间翻转)。

</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

[⬆️ 返回目录](#-本章目录-table-of-contents)

---

<a id="sec-4-2-17"></a>
## 4.2.17 Toggle Patterns in 1b/1b encoding | 1b/1b 编码中的翻转码型


<div style="overflow-x: auto; max-width: 100%;">
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th width="50%">🇬🇧 English</th>
<th width="50%" style="background-color:#e8e8e8">🇨🇳 中文</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>

Lane Margining at Receiver, as defined in this section, is mandatory for all Ports supporting a data rate of 16.0 GT/s or higher, including Pseudo Ports (Retimers). Lane Margining at Receiver enables system software to obtain the margin information of a given Receiver while the Link is in the L0 state. The margin information includes both voltage and time, in either direction from the current Receiver position. For all Ports that implement Lane Margining at Receiver, Lane Margining at Receiver for timing is required, while support of Lane Margining at Receiver for voltage is optional at 16.0 GT/s and required at 32.0 GT/s and higher data rates.

Lane Margining at Receiver begins when a Margin Command is received, the Link is operating at 16.0 GT/s Data Rate or higher, and the Link is in L0 state. Lane Margining at Receiver ends when either a Go to Normal Settings command is received, the Link changes speed, or the Link exits either the L0 or Recovery states. Lane Margining at Receiver optionally ends when certain error thresholds are exceeded. Lane Margining at Receiver is permitted to be suspended while the Link is in Recovery for independent samplers.

Lane Margining at Receiver is not supported by Links operating at 2.5 GT/s, 5.0 GT/s, or 8.0 GT/s.

**IMPLEMENTATION NOTE:**
**JITTER PATTERN RATIONALE**
The base pattern used above for voltage levels is: { 0, 1, 0, 3, 0, 2, 1, 2, 3, 1, 3, 2 }. This pattern, when repeated, covers all 12 voltage level transitions while being fully DC balanced and using the minimum number of UI.
However, for implementations that use interleaved bit steams, this 12 UI base pattern may not test all the circuits during all the transitions. To address this, a 13th UI is introduced to ensure coverage even with interleaved bitstreams (13 is a prime number). This insertion is done by keeping the same set of transitions and cycling across the 4 sets of values over 52 UI, as shown above. Thus:
- Voltage level 2 (10b) is repeated in the 12th and 13th UI of the first row;
- voltage level 0 (00b) is repeated in the 13th UI of the second row and the 1st UI of the third row;
- voltage level 3 (11b) is repeated in the 11th and 12th UI of the third row; and
- voltage level 1 (01b) is repeated in the 10th and 11th UI of the last row.
Across these 52 UI, DC balance is maintained and the DC imbalance between the rows has been minimized by the choice of the sequence of the repeated voltage level.

</td>
<td style="background-color:#e8e8e8">

本节定义的 Lane Margining at Receiver(接收端通道裕量测试)对所有支持 16.0 GT/s 或更高数据速率的端口(包括 Pseudo Port,即 Retimer 上的伪端口)均为强制要求。Lane Margining at Receiver 使系统软件能够在链路处于 L0 状态时获取给定接收器(Receiver)的裕量信息,该裕量信息包含以当前接收器位置为中心、向上下与前后两个方向的电压与时间裕量。对于所有实现 Lane Margining at Receiver 的端口,时序(Timing)方向上的裕量测试是必需的;而电压(Voltage)方向上的裕量测试在 16.0 GT/s 下为可选项,在 32.0 GT/s 及更高数据速率下为必选项。

Lane Margining at Receiver 在以下条件同时满足时启动:接收到 Margin Command(裕量命令)、链路工作于 16.0 GT/s 或更高数据速率、且链路处于 L0 状态。Lane Margining at Receiver 在以下任一情况发生时结束:接收到 Go to Normal Settings(恢复正常设置)命令、链路改变速率、或链路退出 L0 或 Recovery 状态。当某些错误阈值被超出时,Lane Margining at Receiver 可选地结束。当使用独立采样器(independent sampler)时,Lane Margining at Receiver 允许在链路处于 Recovery 状态期间暂停。

Lane Margining at Receiver 不被运行于 2.5 GT/s、5.0 GT/s 或 8.0 GT/s 的链路所支持。

**实现说明(IMPLEMENTATION NOTE):**
**抖动码型设计依据(JITTER PATTERN RATIONALE)**
上文用于电压电平的基础码型为:{ 0, 1, 0, 3, 0, 2, 1, 2, 3, 1, 3, 2 }。该码型在重复使用时,能以最少的 UI 个数完全 DC 平衡地覆盖全部 12 种电压电平转换。

然而,对于使用交织比特流(interleaved bit stream)的实现,该 12 UI 基础码型在所有转换过程中可能无法测试到全部电路。为解决此问题,引入第 13 个 UI,以保证即使在比特流交织的场景下也能覆盖所有电路(13 是质数)。插入方式为:在保持相同转换集合的前提下,在 52 UI 内循环遍历 4 组数值,具体如上所示。即:
- 电压电平 2(10b)在第一行的第 12 与第 13 个 UI 中重复;
- 电压电平 0(00b)在第二行的第 13 个 UI 与第三行的第 1 个 UI 中重复;
- 电压电平 3(11b)在第三行的第 11 与第 12 个 UI 中重复;
- 电压电平 1(01b)在最后一行的第 10 与第 11 个 UI 中重复。

在这 52 个 UI 内,DC 平衡得以维持,通过选择重复电压电平的顺序,行与行之间的 DC 不平衡被最小化。

</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
</div>


[⬆️ 返回目录](#-本章目录-table-of-contents)

---

<a id="sec-4-2-18"></a>
## 4.2.18 Lane Margining at Receiver | 接收端通道裕量测试

<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th width="50%">🇬🇧 English</th>
<th width="50%" style="background-color:#e8e8e8">🇨🇳 中文</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>

Software uses the per-Lane Margining Lane Control Register and Margining Lane Status Register in each Port (Downstream or Upstream) for sending Margin Commands and obtaining margin status information for the corresponding Receiver associated with the Port. For the Retimers, the commands to get information about the Receiver's capabilities and status and the commands to margin the Receiver are conveyed in the Control SKP Ordered Sets in the Downstream direction. The status and error reporting of the target Retimer Receiver is conveyed in the Control SKP Ordered Sets in the Upstream direction. Software controls margining in the Receiver of a Retimer by writing to the appropriate bits in the Margining Lane Control Register in the Downstream Port. The Downstream Port also updates the status information conveyed by the Retimer(s) in the Link through the Control SKP Ordered Set into its Margining Lane Status Register.

The contents of the four command fields of the Margining Lane Control Register in the Downstream Port are always reflected in the identical fields in the Downstream Control SKP Ordered Sets. The contents of the Upstream Control SKP Ordered Set received in the Downstream Port is always reflected in the corresponding status fields of the Margining Lane Status Register in the Downstream Port. The following table provides the bit placement of these fields in the Control SKP Ordered Set.

**Table 4-62 Margin Command Related Fields in the Control SKP Ordered Set**

</td>
<td style="background-color:#e8e8e8">

软件使用每个端口(下游端口或上游端口)中的每通道 Margining Lane Control Register(裕量控制寄存器)与 Margining Lane Status Register(裕量状态寄存器),向与该端口关联的对应接收器发送 Margin Command 并获取其裕量状态信息。对于 Retimer,获取其接收器能力与状态的命令,以及对接收器执行裕量测试的命令,均通过 Downstream 方向的 Control SKP Ordered Set(控制 SKP 有序集)传递。目标 Retimer 接收器的状态与错误上报则通过 Upstream 方向的 Control SKP Ordered Set 传递。软件通过写入 Downstream Port 的 Margining Lane Control Register 中相应的位来控制对 Retimer 接收器的裕量测试。Downstream Port 还通过 Control SKP Ordered Set 将链路上 Retimer 传递的状态信息更新至其 Margining Lane Status Register。

Downstream Port 中 Margining Lane Control Register 的四个命令字段内容始终反映在 Downstream Control SKP Ordered Set 的相同字段中。Downstream Port 收到的 Upstream Control SKP Ordered Set 的内容始终反映在其 Margining Lane Status Register 的对应状态字段中。下表给出这些字段在 Control SKP Ordered Set 中的位布局。

**Table 4-62 | 表 4-62 Control SKP Ordered Set 中与 Margin Command 相关的字段**

</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

**Table 4-62 Margin Command Related Fields in the Control SKP Ordered Set | 表 4-62 Control SKP Ordered Set 中与 Margin Command 相关的字段**

| Symbol | Description | Usage Model = 0b | Usage Model = 1b |
|--------|-------------|------------------|------------------|
| 4*N + 2 | Bit 7: Margin Parity (see § Table 4-53)<br>Bit 6: Usage Model = 0b: Lane Margining at Receiver<br>Bits [5:3]: Margin Type<br>Bits [2:0]: Receiver Number | <reserved> | Reserved |
| 4*N + 3 | Bits [7:0]: Margin Payload | <reserved> | Reserved |


<div style="overflow-x: auto; max-width: 100%;">
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th width="50%">🇬🇧 English</th>
<th width="50%" style="background-color:#e8e8e8">🇨🇳 中文</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>

**Usage Model:** An encoding of 0b indicates that the usage model is Lane Margining at Receiver. An encoding of 1b in this field is reserved for future usages.

If the Usage Model field is 1b, Bits [5:0] of Symbol 4N+2 and Bits [7:0] of Symbol 4N+3 are Reserved.

When evaluating received Control SKP Ordered Set for Margin Commands, all Receivers that do not comprehend the usage associated with Usage Model = 1b are required to ignore Bits[5:0] of Symbol 4N+2 and Bits[7:0] of Symbol 4N+3 of the Control SKP Ordered Set, if the Usage Model field is 1b.

**IMPLEMENTATION NOTE:**
**POTENTIAL FUTURE USAGE OF CONTROL SKP ORDERED SET**
The intended usage for the 15 bits of information in the Control SKP Ordered Set, as defined in § Table 4-62 is Lane Margining at Receiver. However a single bit (Bit 7 of Symbol 4N+2) is Reserved for any future usage beyond Lane Margining at Receiver. If such a usage is defined in the future, this bit will be set to 1b and the remaining 14 bits can be defined as needed by the new usage model. Alternatively, Symbol 4N could use a different encoding than 78h for any future usage, permitting all bits in Symbols 4N+1, 4N+2, and 4N+3 to be defined for that usage model.

</td>
<td style="background-color:#e8e8e8">

**Usage Model(使用模式):** 编码 0b 表示使用模式为 Lane Margining at Receiver。该字段的 1b 编码为未来用途保留(Reserved)。

若 Usage Model 字段为 1b,则 Symbol 4N+2 的 Bits [5:0] 与 Symbol 4N+3 的 Bits [7:0] 均为 Reserved(保留)。

当对接收到的 Control SKP Ordered Set 进行 Margin Command 评估时,所有不能理解 Usage Model = 1b 所对应用途的接收器,在 Usage Model 字段为 1b 时,必须忽略 Control SKP Ordered Set 中 Symbol 4N+2 的 Bits[5:0] 与 Symbol 4N+3 的 Bits[7:0]。

**实现说明(IMPLEMENTATION NOTE):**
**Control SKP Ordered Set 潜在的未来用途(POTENTIAL FUTURE USAGE OF CONTROL SKP ORDERED SET)**
如 § Table 4-62 所定义,Control SKP Ordered Set 中 15 位信息的预期用途为 Lane Margining at Receiver。然而,Symbol 4N+2 的 Bit 7 被保留,以供 Lane Margining at Receiver 之外的未来用途使用。若未来定义了此类用途,该位将被置为 1b,其余 14 位可由新的使用模式按需定义。或者,Symbol 4N 可针对未来用途采用不同于 78h 的编码,从而允许将 Symbols 4N+1、4N+2、4N+3 中的所有位都用于该使用模式的定义。

</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
</div>


[⬆️ 返回目录](#-本章目录-table-of-contents)

---

<!-- 📄 Page 600 -->
---

<a id="sec-4-2-18-1"></a>
## 4.2.18.1 Receiver Number, Margin Type, Usage Model, and Margin Payload Fields | 4.2.18.1 Receiver Number、Margin Type、Usage Model 与 Margin Payload 字段

<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th width="50%">🇬🇧 English</th>
<th width="50%" style="background-color:#e8e8e8">🇨🇳 中文</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>

**Receiver Number:** Receivers are identified in § Figure 4-61. The following Receiver Number encodings are used in the Downstream Port for Margin Commands targeting that Downstream Port or a Retimer below that Downstream Port:

- **000b** — Broadcast (Downstream Port Receiver and all Retimer Pseudo Port Receivers)
- **001b** — Rx(A) (Downstream Port Receiver)
- **010b** — Rx(B) (Retimer X or Z Upstream Pseudo Port Receiver)
- **011b** — Rx(C) (Retimer X or Z Downstream Pseudo Port Receiver)
- **100b** — Rx(D) (Retimer Y Upstream Pseudo Port Receiver)
- **101b** — Rx(E) (Retimer Y Downstream Pseudo Port Receiver)
- **110b** — Reserved
- **111b** — Reserved

The following Receiver Number encodings are used in the Upstream Port for Margin Commands targeting that Upstream Port:

- **000b** — Broadcast (Upstream Port Receiver)
- **001b** — Reserved
- **010b** — Reserved
- **011b** — Reserved
- **100b** — Reserved
- **101b** — Reserved
- **110b** — Rx (F) (Upstream Port Receiver)
- **111b** — Reserved

</td>
<td style="background-color:#e8e8e8">

**Receiver Number(接收器编号):** 接收器的标识见 § Figure 4-61。Downstream Port 中,针对该 Downstream Port 或位于其下游的 Retimer 的 Margin Command 使用以下 Receiver Number 编码:

- **000b** — 广播(Broadcast)(Downstream Port 接收器与所有 Retimer Pseudo Port 接收器)
- **001b** — Rx(A)(Downstream Port 接收器)
- **010b** — Rx(B)(Retimer X 或 Z 的 Upstream Pseudo Port 接收器)
- **011b** — Rx(C)(Retimer X 或 Z 的 Downstream Pseudo Port 接收器)
- **100b** — Rx(D)(Retimer Y 的 Upstream Pseudo Port 接收器)
- **101b** — Rx(E)(Retimer Y 的 Downstream Pseudo Port 接收器)
- **110b** — 保留(Reserved)
- **111b** — 保留(Reserved)

Upstream Port 中,针对该 Upstream Port 的 Margin Command 使用以下 Receiver Number 编码:

- **000b** — 广播(Broadcast)(Upstream Port 接收器)
- **001b** — 保留(Reserved)
- **010b** — 保留(Reserved)
- **011b** — 保留(Reserved)
- **100b** — 保留(Reserved)
- **101b** — 保留(Reserved)
- **110b** — Rx(F)(Upstream Port 接收器)
- **111b** — 保留(Reserved)

</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

<p align="center">

</p>

<!-- 📄 Page 601 -->
---

<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th width="50%">🇬🇧 English</th>
<th width="50%" style="background-color:#e8e8e8">🇨🇳 中文</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>

(Link with no Retimers) | (Link with One Retimer) | (Link with Two Retimers)
Various System Topologies with or without Retimers

**Figure 4-61 Receiver Number Assignment**

</td>
<td style="background-color:#e8e8e8">

(无 Retimer 的链路) | (含一个 Retimer 的链路) | (含两个 Retimer 的链路)
(各种有无 Retimer 的系统拓扑)

**Figure 4-61 | 图4-61 接收器编号分配**

</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>


<div style="overflow-x: auto; max-width: 100%;">
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th width="50%">🇬🇧 English</th>
<th width="50%" style="background-color:#e8e8e8">🇨🇳 中文</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>

**Margin Type and Margin Payload:** The Margin Type field together with a valid Receiver Number(s), associated with the Margin Type encoding, and specific Margin Payload field define various commands used for margining (referred to as Margin Command). § Table 4-63 defines the encodings of valid Margin Commands along with the corresponding responses, used in both the Control SKP Ordered Sets as well as the Margining Lane Control Register and Margining Lane Status Register. Margin commands that are always broadcast will use the broadcast encoding for the Receiver Number, even when only one Receiver is the target (e.g., UP or a DP in a Link with no Retimers). The Receiver Number field in the response to a Margin Command other than No Command reflects the number of the Receiver that is responding, even for a Margin Command that is broadcast. The Margin Commands go Downstream whereas the responses go Upstream in the Control SKP Ordered Sets. The responses reflect the Margin Type to which the target Receiver is responding. The Receiver Number field of the response corresponds to the target Receiver that is responding. All unused encodings in § Table 4-63 are Reserved and must not be considered to be a valid Margin Command.

The parameters used here (e.g., MSampleCount) are defined in § Section 8.4.4 . Each data rate has an independent set of parameters and the values in § Table 4-63 reflect the current data rate. Any relationship between values for different data rates is implementation specific. For example, the timing/voltage step sizes might differ between 64.0 GT/s in PAM-4 mode and 16.0 GT/s or 32.0 GT/s in NRZ mode; N voltage steps at 64.0 GT/s is likely to be a different eye height from N voltage steps at 16.0 GT/s or 32.0 GT/s.

In PAM-4 mode, the Step Margin commands apply to all 3 eyes simultaneously.

</td>
<td style="background-color:#e8e8e8">

**Margin Type 与 Margin Payload(裕量类型与裕量负载):** Margin Type 字段、与该 Margin Type 编码相关联的有效 Receiver Number(们),以及特定的 Margin Payload 字段共同定义了用于裕量测试的各种命令(统称为 Margin Command)。§ Table 4-63 定义了有效 Margin Command 的编码及其对应的响应,这些命令与响应既用于 Control SKP Ordered Set,也用于 Margining Lane Control Register 与 Margining Lane Status Register。对于总是采用广播的 Margin Command,即使目标只有一个接收器(例如无 Retimer 链路中的 UP 或 DP),其 Receiver Number 也应使用广播编码。对于 No Command 之外的 Margin Command,其响应中的 Receiver Number 字段反映的是正在响应的接收器编号,即使该 Margin Command 本身是广播的。Margin Command 沿 Downstream 方向下发,而响应则沿 Upstream 方向通过 Control SKP Ordered Set 上传。响应反映目标接收器正在响应的 Margin Type。响应中的 Receiver Number 字段对应正在响应的目标接收器。§ Table 4-63 中所有未使用的编码均为 Reserved,不得视为有效的 Margin Command。

此处使用的参数(例如 MSampleCount)在 § Section 8.4.4 中定义。每个数据速率对应一组独立的参数,§ Table 4-63 中的值反映当前数据速率下的参数。不同数据速率之间数值的任何关系均为实现相关(Implementation Specific)。例如,64.0 GT/s PAM-4 模式下的时序/电压步长可能与 16.0 GT/s 或 32.0 GT/s NRZ 模式下不同;在 64.0 GT/s 下的 N 个电压步长对应的眼高,与在 16.0 GT/s 或 32.0 GT/s 下的 N 个电压步长对应的眼高,可能并不相同。

在 PAM-4 模式下,Step Margin(步进裕量)命令同时作用于全部 3 个眼。

</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
</div>

<!-- 📄 Page 602 -->

**Table 4-63 Margin Commands and Corresponding Responses | 表 4-63 Margin Command 及对应响应**

| Margin Command | Margin Type[2:0] | Valid Receiver Number(s)[2:0] | Margin Payload[7:0] | Response Margin Type[2:0] | Response Margin Payload[7:0] |
|----------------|------------------|-------------------------------|---------------------|----------------------------|------------------------------|
| No Command | 111b | 000b | 9Ch | 111b | (No Command is also an independent command in Upstream direction. The expected Response is No Command with the Receiver Number = 000b.) |
| Access Retimer Register | 001b | 010b, 100b | Register offset in bytes: 00h - 87h, A0h - FFh | 001b | Register value, if supported. It is recommended that the Target Receiver on Retimer return 00h if it does not support accessing its registers. It is permitted that the Retimer not respond. |
| Report Margin Control Capabilities | 001b | 001b through 110b | 88h | 001b | Margin Payload[7:5] = Reserved; Margin Payload[4:0] = {MIndErrorSampler, MSampleReportingMethod, MIndLeftRightTiming, MIndUpDownVoltage, MVoltageSupported} |
| Report MNumVoltageSteps | 001b | 001b through 110b | 89h | 001b | Margin Payload[7] = Reserved<br>Margin Payload[6:0] = MNumVoltageSteps |
| Report MNumTimingSteps | 001b | 001b through 110b | 8Ah | 001b | Margin Payload[7:6] = Reserved<br>Margin Payload[5:0] = MNumTimingSteps |
| Report MMaxTimingOffset | 001b | 001b through 110b | 8Bh | 001b | Margin Payload[7] = Reserved<br>Margin Payload[6:0] = MMaxTimingOffset |
| Report MMaxVoltageOffset | 001b | 001b through 110b | 8Ch | 001b | Margin Payload[7] = Reserved<br>Margin Payload[6:0] = MMaxVoltageOffset |
| Report MSamplingRateVoltage | 001b | 001b through 110b | 8Dh | 001b | Margin Payload[7:6] = Reserved<br>Margin Payload[5:0] = {MSamplingRateVoltage[5:0]} |
| Report MSamplingRateTiming | 001b | 001b through 110b | 8Eh | 001b | Margin Payload[7:6] = Reserved<br>Margin Payload[5:0] = {MSamplingRateTiming[5:0]} |

[⬆️ 返回目录](#-本章目录-table-of-contents)

---

<!-- 📄 Page 603 -->
---

**Table 4-63 Margin Commands and Corresponding Responses (continued) | 表 4-63 Margin Command 及对应响应(续)**

| Margin Command | Margin Type[2:0] | Valid Receiver Number(s)[2:0] | Margin Payload[7:0] | Response Margin Type[2:0] | Response Margin Payload[7:0] |
|----------------|------------------|-------------------------------|---------------------|----------------------------|------------------------------|
| Report MSampleCount | 001b | 001b through 110b | 8Fh | 001b | Margin Payload[7] = Reserved<br>Margin Payload[6:0] = MSampleCount |
| Report MMaxLanes | 001b | 001b through 110b | 90h | 001b | Margin Payload[7:5] = Reserved<br>Margin Payload[4:0] = MMaxLanes |
| Report Reserved | 001b | 001b through 110b | 91-9Fh | 001b | Margin Payload[7:0] = Reserved |
| Set Error Count Limit | 010b | 001b through 110b | Margin Payload[7:6] = 11b<br>Margin Payload[5:0] = Error Count Limit | 010b | Margin Payload[7:6] = 11b<br>Margin Payload[5:0] = Error Count Limit registered by the target Receiver |
| Go to Normal Settings | 010b | 000b through 110b | 0Fh | 010b | 0Fh |
| Clear Error Log | 010b | 000b through 110b | 55h | 010b | 55h |
| Step Margin to timing offset to right/left of default | 011b | 001b through 110b | See § Section 4.2.18.1.2 | 011b | Margin Payload[7:6] = Step Margin Execution Status (see § Section 4.2.18.1.1)<br>Margin Payload[5:0] = MErrorCount |
| Step Margin to voltage offset to up/down of default | 100b | 001b through 110b | See § Section 4.2.18.1.2 | 100b | Margin Payload[7:6] = Step Margin Execution Status (see § Section 4.2.18.1.1)<br>Margin Payload[5:0] = MErrorCount |
| Vendor Defined | 101b | 001b through 110b | Vendor Defined | 101b | Vendor Defined |

**Note:**

1. The term Step Margin command is used to refer to either a Step Margin to timing offset to right/left of default or a Step Margin to voltage offset to up/down of default command.

<!-- 📄 Page 604 -->
