<a id="sec-4-2-18-1-1"></a>
## 4.2.18.1.1 Step Margin Execution Status | 4.2.18.1.1 Step Margin 执行状态

<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th width="50%">🇬🇧 English</th>
<th width="50%" style="background-color:#e8e8e8">🇨🇳 中文</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>

The Step Margin Execution Status used in § Table 4-63 is a 2-bit field defined as follows:

- **11b** — NAK. Indicates that an unsupported Lane Margining command was issued. For example, timing margin beyond ±0.2 UI. MErrorCount is 0.
- **10b** — Margining in progress. The Receiver is executing a Step Margin command. MErrorCount reflects the number of errors detected as defined in § Section 8.4.4.
- **01b** — Set up for margin in progress. This indicates the Receiver is getting ready but has not yet started executing a Step Margin command. MErrorCount is 0.
- **00b** — Too many errors - Receiver autonomously went back to its default settings. MErrorCount reflects the number of errors detected as defined in § Section 8.4.4. Note that MErrorCount might be greater than Error Count Limit.

</td>
<td style="background-color:#e8e8e8">

§ Table 4-63 中使用的 Step Margin Execution Status(Step Margin 执行状态)为 2 位字段,定义如下:

- **11b** — NAK(否认)。表示发出了不受支持的 Lane Margining 命令。例如,时序裕量超过 ±0.2 UI。MErrorCount 为 0。
- **10b** — Margining in progress(裕量测试进行中)。接收器正在执行 Step Margin 命令。MErrorCount 反映 § Section 8.4.4 所定义的检测到的错误数。
- **01b** — Set up for margin in progress(裕量测试准备中)。表示接收器正在准备,但尚未开始执行 Step Margin 命令。MErrorCount 为 0。
- **00b** — Too many errors(错误过多)——接收器自主恢复到默认设置。MErrorCount 反映 § Section 8.4.4 所定义的检测到的错误数。注意:MErrorCount 可能大于 Error Count Limit(错误计数门限)。

</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

[⬆️ 返回目录](#-本章目录-table-of-contents)

---

<a id="sec-4-2-18-1-2"></a>
## 4.2.18.1.2 Margin Payload for Step Margin Commands | 4.2.18.1.2 Step Margin 命令的 Margin Payload 字段


<div style="overflow-x: auto; max-width: 100%;">
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th width="50%">🇬🇧 English</th>
<th width="50%" style="background-color:#e8e8e8">🇨🇳 中文</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>

For the Step Margin to timing offset to right/left of default command, the Margin Payload field is defined as follows:

- **Margin Payload [7]:** Reserved.
- **If MIndLeftRightTiming for the targeted Receiver is Set:**
  - Margin Payload [6] indicates whether the Margin Command is right vs. left. A 0b indicates to move the Receiver to the right of the normal setting whereas a 1b indicates to move the Receiver to the left of the normal setting.
  - Margin Payload [5:0] indicates the number of steps to the left or right of the normal setting.
- **If MIndLeftRightTiming for the targeted Receiver is Clear:**
  - Margin Payload [6]: Reserved
  - Margin Payload [5:0] indicates the number of steps beyond the normal setting.

For the Step Margin to voltage offset to up/down of default command, the Margin Payload field is defined as follows:

- **If MIndUpDownVoltage for the targeted Receiver is Set:**
  - Margin Payload [7] indicates whether the Margin Command is up vs. down. A 0b indicates to move the Receiver up from the normal setting whereas a 1b indicates to move the Receiver down from the normal setting.
  - Margin Payload [6:0] indicates the number of steps up or down from the normal setting.
- **If MIndUpDownVoltage for the targeted Receiver is Clear:**
  - Margin Payload [7]: Reserved
  - Margin Payload [6:0] indicates the number of steps beyond the normal setting.

</td>
<td style="background-color:#e8e8e8">

对于 "Step Margin to timing offset to right/left of default"(在默认位置基础上向左右进行时序偏移步进裕量)命令,Margin Payload 字段定义如下:

- **Margin Payload [7]:** 保留(Reserved)。
- **若目标接收器的 MIndLeftRightTiming 被置位(Set):**
  - Margin Payload [6] 表示 Margin Command 是右移还是左移。0b 表示将接收器移至正常设置的右侧,1b 表示将接收器移至正常设置的左侧。
  - Margin Payload [5:0] 表示相对于正常设置向左或向右的步进数。
- **若目标接收器的 MIndLeftRightTiming 被清零(Clear):**
  - Margin Payload [6]:保留(Reserved)
  - Margin Payload [5:0] 表示在正常设置基础上向某一方向的步进数。

对于 "Step Margin to voltage offset to up/down of default"(在默认位置基础上向上下进行电压偏移步进裕量)命令,Margin Payload 字段定义如下:

- **若目标接收器的 MIndUpDownVoltage 被置位(Set):**
  - Margin Payload [7] 表示 Margin Command 是上移还是下移。0b 表示将接收器从正常设置向上移动,1b 表示将接收器从正常设置向下移动。
  - Margin Payload [6:0] 表示相对于正常设置向上或向下的步进数。
- **若目标接收器的 MIndUpDownVoltage 被清零(Clear):**
  - Margin Payload [7]:保留(Reserved)
  - Margin Payload [6:0] 表示在正常设置基础上向某一方向的步进数。

</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
</div>


[⬆️ 返回目录](#-本章目录-table-of-contents)

---

<!-- 📄 Page 605 -->
---

<a id="sec-4-2-18-2"></a>
## 4.2.18.2 Margin Command and Response Flow | 4.2.18.2 Margin Command 与响应流程

<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th width="50%">🇬🇧 English</th>
<th width="50%" style="background-color:#e8e8e8">🇨🇳 中文</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>

Each Receiver advertises its capabilities as defined in § Section 8.4.4 . The Receiver being margined must report the number of errors that are consistent with data samples occurring at the indicated location for margining. For simplicity, the Margin Commands and requirements are described in terms of moving the data sampler location though the actual margining method may be implementation specific. For example, the timing margin could be implemented on the actual data sampler or an independent error sampler. Further, the timing margin can be implemented by injecting an appropriate amount of stress/jitter to the data sample location, or by actually moving the data/error sample location.

When an independent data/error sampler is used, the errors encountered with the independent data/error sampler must be reported in MErrorCount even though the Link may not experience any errors. To margin a Receiver, Software moves the target Receiver to a voltage/timing offset from its default sampling position.

The following rules must be followed:

</td>
<td style="background-color:#e8e8e8">

每个接收器按 § Section 8.4.4 的定义通告其能力。正在被测试裕量的接收器必须上报与在所指示的裕量位置上发生的数据采样相一致的错误数。为简化描述,Margin Command 与相关需求以"移动数据采样器位置"为模型进行说明,而实际的裕量测试方法可为实现相关(Implementation Specific)。例如,时序裕量可在实际数据采样器上实现,也可在独立的错误采样器上实现。此外,时序裕量可通过向数据采样位置注入适量的压力/抖动来实现,也可通过实际移动数据/错误采样位置来实现。

当使用独立的数据/错误采样器时,即使链路可能并未出现任何错误,该独立采样器所遇到的错误也必须通过 MErrorCount 上报。要对接收器进行裕量测试,软件将目标接收器从其默认采样位置移动到某个电压/时序偏移位置。

以下规则必须被遵守:

</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>


<div style="overflow-x: auto; max-width: 100%;">
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th width="50%">🇬🇧 English</th>
<th width="50%" style="background-color:#e8e8e8">🇨🇳 中文</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>

- Every Retimer Upstream Pseudo Port Receiver and the Downstream Port Receiver must compute the Margin CRC and Margin Parity bits and compare against the received Margin CRC and Margin Parity bits. Any mismatch must result in ignoring the contents of Symbols 4N+2 and 4N+3. A Downstream Port Receiver must report Margin CRC and Margin Parity errors in the Lane Error Status Register (see § Section 7.7.3.3 ).
- The Upstream Port Receiver is permitted to ignore the Margin CRC bits, Margin Parity bits, and all bits in the Symbols 4N+2 and 4N+3 of the Control SKP Ordered Set. If it checks Margin CRC and Margin Parity, any mismatch must be reported in the Lane Error Status Register.
- The Downstream Port must transmit Control SKP Ordered Sets in each Lane, with the Margin Type, Receiver Number, Usage Model, and Margin Payload fields reflecting the corresponding control fields in the Margining Lane Control Register. Any Control SKP Ordered Set transmitted more than 10 μs after the Configuration Write Completion must reflect the Margining Lane Control Register values written by that Configuration Write.
  - This requirement applies regardless of the values in the Margining Lane Control Register.
  - This requirement applies regardless of the number of Retimer(s) in the Link.
- For Control SKP Ordered Sets received by the Upstream Pseudo Port, a Retimer Receiver is the target of a valid Margin Command, if all of the following conditions are true:
  - the Margin Type is not No Command
  - the Receiver Number is the number assigned to the Receiver, or Margin Type is either Clear Error Log or Go to Normal Settings and the Receiver Number is 'Broadcast'.
  - the Usage Model field is 0b
  - the Margin Type, Receiver Number, and Margin Payload fields are consistent with the definitions in § Table 4-62 and § Table 4-63
  - the Margin CRC check and Margin Parity check pass.
- For Upstream and Downstream Ports, a Receiver is the target of a valid Margin Command, if all of the following conditions are true for its Margining Lane Control Register:
  - the Margin Type is not No Command
  - the Receiver Number is the number assigned to the Receiver or Margin Type is either Clear Error Log or Go to Normal Settings and the Receiver Number is 'Broadcast'
  - the Usage Model field is 0b
  - the Margin Type, the Receiver Number, and Margin Payload fields are consistent with the definitions in § Table 4-62 and § Table 4-63

</td>
<td style="background-color:#e8e8e8">

- 每个 Retimer 的 Upstream Pseudo Port 接收器与 Downstream Port 接收器必须计算 Margin CRC 与 Margin Parity 位,并与接收到的 Margin CRC 与 Margin Parity 位进行比较。任何不匹配都必须导致忽略 Symbols 4N+2 与 4N+3 的内容。Downstream Port 接收器必须在 Lane Error Status Register(见 § Section 7.7.3.3)中上报 Margin CRC 与 Margin Parity 错误。
- Upstream Port 接收器可忽略 Control SKP Ordered Set 中的 Margin CRC 位、Margin Parity 位以及 Symbols 4N+2 与 4N+3 中的全部位。若其检查 Margin CRC 与 Margin Parity,任何不匹配都必须在 Lane Error Status Register 中上报。
- Downstream Port 必须在每条 Lane 上发送 Control SKP Ordered Set,其中 Margin Type、Receiver Number、Usage Model 与 Margin Payload 字段必须反映 Margining Lane Control Register 中的对应控制字段。在该 Configuration Write 完成之后超过 10 μs 才发出的任何 Control SKP Ordered Set,都必须反映该 Configuration Write 所写入的 Margining Lane Control Register 值。
  - 此要求与 Margining Lane Control Register 中的值无关。
  - 此要求与链路中 Retimer 的数量无关。
- 对于 Upstream Pseudo Port 收到的 Control SKP Ordered Set,当且仅当以下所有条件同时成立时,Retimer 接收器才是该有效 Margin Command 的目标:
  - Margin Type 不是 No Command
  - Receiver Number 等于该接收器所分配的编号,或 Margin Type 为 Clear Error Log 或 Go to Normal Settings 且 Receiver Number 为 "Broadcast"。
  - Usage Model 字段为 0b
  - Margin Type、Receiver Number 与 Margin Payload 字段与 § Table 4-62 及 § Table 4-63 中的定义一致
  - Margin CRC 检查与 Margin Parity 检查通过。
- 对于 Upstream Port 与 Downstream Port,当且仅当其 Margining Lane Control Register 满足以下所有条件时,接收器才是该有效 Margin Command 的目标:
  - Margin Type 不是 No Command
  - Receiver Number 等于该接收器所分配的编号,或 Margin Type 为 Clear Error Log 或 Go to Normal Settings 且 Receiver Number 为 "Broadcast"
  - Usage Model 字段为 0b
  - Margin Type、Receiver Number 与 Margin Payload 字段与 § Table 4-62 及 § Table 4-63 中的定义一致

</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
</div>


[⬆️ 返回目录](#-本章目录-table-of-contents)

---

<!-- 📄 Page 606 -->
---

<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th width="50%">🇬🇧 English</th>
<th width="50%" style="background-color:#e8e8e8">🇨🇳 中文</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>

- The Upstream Port must transmit the Control SKP Ordered Set with No Command.
- A target Receiver must apply and respond to the Margin Command within 1 ms of receiving the valid Margin Command if the Link is still in L0 state and operating at 16.0 GT/s or higher Data Rate.
  - A target Receiver in a Retimer must send a response in the Control SKP Ordered Set in the Upstream Direction within 1 ms of receiving the Margin Command.
  - A target Receiver in the Upstream Port must update the Status field of the Lane Margin Command and Status register within 1 ms of receiving the Margin Command.
  - A target Receiver in the Downstream Port must update the Status field of the Lane Margin Command and Status register within 1 ms of receiving the Margin Command if the command is not broadcast or no Retimer(s) are present
- For a valid Margin Type, other than No Command, that is broadcast and received by a Retimer:
  - A Retimer, in position X (see § Figure 4-61), forwards the response unmodified in the Upstream Control SKP Ordered Set, if the command has been applied, else it sends the No Command.
  - The Receiver Number field of the response must be set to an encoding of one of the Retimer's Pseudo Ports.
  - The Retimer must respond only after both Pseudo Ports have completed the Margin Command.
- The Retimer must overwrite Bits [4:0] of Symbol 4N+1, Bits[7, 5:0] of Symbol 4N+2 and Bits [7:0] in Symbol 4N+3 as it forwards the Control SKP Ordered Set in the Upstream direction if it is the target Receiver of a Margin Command and is executing the command.
- On receipt of a Control SKP Ordered Set, the Downstream Port must reflect the Margining Lane Status Register from the corresponding fields in the received Control SKP Ordered Set within 1 μs, if it passes the Margin CRC and Margin Parity checks and one of the following conditions apply:
  - In the Margining Lane Control Register: Receiver Number is 010b through 101b
  - In the Margining Lane Control Register: Receiver Number is 000b, Margin Command is Clear Error Log, No Command, or Go to Normal Settings, and there are Retimer(s) in the Link
  - Optionally, if the Margining Lane Control Register Usage Model field is 1b
  - Optionally, if the Margining Lane Control Register Receiver Number field is 110b or 111b
  The Margining Lane Status Register fields are updated regardless of the Usage Model bit in the received Control SKP Ordered Set.
- A component must advertise the same value for each parameter defined in § Table 8-13 in § Section 8.4.4 across all its Receivers. A component must not change any parameter value except for MSampleCount and MErrorCount defined in § Table 8-13 in § Section 8.4.4 while LinkUp = 1b.
- A target Receiver that receives a valid Step Margin command must continue to apply that offset until any of the following occur:
  - it receives a valid Go to Normal Settings command
  - it receives a subsequent valid Step Margin command with different Margin Type or Margin Payload field
  - MIndErrorSampler is 0b and MErrorCount exceeds Error Count Limit
  - Optionally, MIndErrorSampler is 1b and MErrorCount exceeds Error Count Limit.

</td>
<td style="background-color:#e8e8e8">

- Upstream Port 必须发送携带 No Command 的 Control SKP Ordered Set。
- 若链路仍处于 L0 状态且工作于 16.0 GT/s 或更高数据速率,目标接收器必须在接收到有效 Margin Command 后的 1 ms 内应用该命令并给出响应。
  - Retimer 中的目标接收器必须在接收到 Margin Command 后的 1 ms 内,通过 Upstream 方向的 Control SKP Ordered Set 给出响应。
  - Upstream Port 中的目标接收器必须在接收到 Margin Command 后的 1 ms 内,更新 Lane Margin Command and Status 寄存器的 Status 字段。
  - Downstream Port 中的目标接收器必须在接收到 Margin Command 后的 1 ms 内,更新 Lane Margin Command and Status 寄存器的 Status 字段(前提是该命令不是广播,或链路中不存在 Retimer)。
- 对于 No Command 之外的、由 Retimer 接收到的有效广播 Margin Type:
  - 位于 X 位置(见 § Figure 4-61)的 Retimer,若该命令已被应用,则在 Upstream Control SKP Ordered Set 中原样转发响应;否则发送 No Command。
  - 响应中的 Receiver Number 字段必须设置为该 Retimer 的某个 Pseudo Port 编码。
  - Retimer 必须在两个 Pseudo Port 都完成 Margin Command 之后才可响应。
- 当 Retimer 是某 Margin Command 的目标接收器且正在执行该命令时,在 Upstream 方向转发 Control SKP Ordered Set 时,Retimer 必须改写 Symbol 4N+1 的 Bits [4:0]、Symbol 4N+2 的 Bits[7, 5:0] 以及 Symbol 4N+3 的 Bits [7:0]。
- 在收到 Control SKP Ordered Set 时,若 Margin CRC 与 Margin Parity 检查通过,且满足以下任一条件,Downstream Port 必须在 1 μs 内根据所收到 Control SKP Ordered Set 中的对应字段更新 Margining Lane Status Register:
  - Margining Lane Control Register 中:Receiver Number 为 010b 至 101b
  - Margining Lane Control Register 中:Receiver Number 为 000b,Margin Command 为 Clear Error Log、No Command 或 Go to Normal Settings,且链路中存在 Retimer
  - 可选:Margining Lane Control Register 的 Usage Model 字段为 1b
  - 可选:Margining Lane Control Register 的 Receiver Number 字段为 110b 或 111b
  Margining Lane Status Register 字段的更新与所收到 Control SKP Ordered Set 中的 Usage Model 位无关。
- 一个组件必须为其全部接收器通告 § Section 8.4.4 中 § Table 8-13 所定义的各参数,且这些值在其全部接收器之间保持一致。在 LinkUp = 1b 期间,组件不得更改 § Section 8.4.4 中 § Table 8-13 所定义的任何参数,MSampleCount 与 MErrorCount 除外。
- 接收到有效 Step Margin 命令的目标接收器必须持续应用该偏移,直至以下任一情况发生:
  - 接收到有效的 Go to Normal Settings 命令
  - 接收到后续的、且 Margin Type 或 Margin Payload 字段不同的有效 Step Margin 命令
  - MIndErrorSampler 为 0b 且 MErrorCount 超过 Error Count Limit
  - 可选:MIndErrorSampler 为 1b 且 MErrorCount 超过 Error Count Limit

</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

[⬆️ 返回目录](#-本章目录-table-of-contents)

<!-- 📄 Page 607 -->
---


<div style="overflow-x: auto; max-width: 100%;">
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th width="50%">🇬🇧 English</th>
<th width="50%" style="background-color:#e8e8e8">🇨🇳 中文</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>

- If a Step Margin command terminates because MErrorCount exceeds Error Count Limit, the target Receiver must automatically return to its default sample position and indicate this in the Margin Payload field (Step Margin Execution Status = 00b). Note: termination for this reason is optional if MIndErrorSampler is 1b.
- If MIndErrorSampler is 0b, an error is detected when:
  - The target Receiver is a Port that enters Recovery or detects a Data Parity mismatch while in L0
  - The target Receiver is a Pseudo Port that enters Forwarding training sets or detects a Data Parity mismatch while forwarding non-training sets.
- If MIndErrorSampler is 1b, an error is detected when:
  - The target Receiver is a Port and a bit error is detected while in L0
  - The target Receiver is a Pseudo Port and a bit error is detected while the Retimer is forwarding non-training sets
- If MIndErrorSampler is 0b and either (1) the target Receiver is a Port that enters Recovery or (2) the target Receiver is a Pseudo Port that enters Forwarding training sets:
  - The target Receiver must go back to the default sample position
  - If the target Receiver is a Port that is still performing margining, it must resume the margin position within 128 μs of entering L0
  - If the target Receiver is a Pseudo Port that is still performing margining, it must resume the margin position within 128 μs of Forwarding non-training sets
- A target Receiver is required to clear its accumulated error count on receiving Clear Error Log command, while it continues to margin (if it is the target Receiver of a Step Margin command still in progress), if it was doing so.
- For a target Receiver of a Set Error Count Limit command, the new value is used for all future Step Margin commands until a new Set Error Count Limit command is received.
- If no Set Error Count Limit is received by a Receiver since entering L0, the default value is 4.
- Behavior is undefined if a Set Error Count Limit command is received while a Step Margin command is in effect.
- Once a target Receiver reports a Step Margin Execution Status of 11b (NAK) or 00b ('Too many errors'), it must continue to report the same status as long as the Step Margin command is in effect.
- A target Receiver must not report a Step Margin Execution Status of 01b ('Set up for margin in progress') for more than 100 ms after it receives a new valid Step Margin command
- A target Receiver that reports a Step Margin Execution Status other than 01b, cannot report 01b subsequently unless it receives a new valid Step Margin command.
- Reserved bits in the Margin Payload field must follow these rules:
  - The Downstream or Upstream Port must transmit 0s for Reserved bits
  - The retimer must forward Reserved bits unmodified
  - All Receivers must ignore Reserved bits
- Reserved encodings of the Margin Type, Receiver Number, or Margin Payload fields must follow these rules:
  - The retimer must forward Reserved encodings unmodified
  - All Receivers must treat Reserved encodings as if they are not the target of the Margin Command
- A Vendor Defined Margin Command or response, that is not defined by a retimer is ignored and forwarded normally.
- A target Receiver on a Retimer must return 00h on the response payload on Access Retimer Register command, if it does not support register access. If a Retimer supports Access Retimer Register command, the following must be observed:
  - It must return a non-zero value for the DWORD at locations 80h and 84h respectively.
  - It must not place any registers corresponding to Margin Payload locations 88h through 9Fh.

</td>
<td style="background-color:#e8e8e8">

- 若 Step Margin 命令因 MErrorCount 超过 Error Count Limit 而终止,目标接收器必须自动返回到其默认采样位置,并在 Margin Payload 字段(Step Margin Execution Status = 00b)中指示该状态。注意:若 MIndErrorSampler 为 1b,则因该原因终止为可选行为。
- 若 MIndErrorSampler 为 0b,则在以下情况检测到错误:
  - 目标接收器为 Port,且进入 Recovery 或在 L0 中检测到 Data Parity 不匹配
  - 目标接收器为 Pseudo Port,且进入 Forwarding 训练集,或在转发非训练集时检测到 Data Parity 不匹配
- 若 MIndErrorSampler 为 1b,则在以下情况检测到错误:
  - 目标接收器为 Port,且在 L0 中检测到比特错误
  - 目标接收器为 Pseudo Port,且在 Retimer 转发非训练集时检测到比特错误
- 若 MIndErrorSampler 为 0b 且满足以下任一条件:(1)目标接收器为 Port 且进入 Recovery,或(2)目标接收器为 Pseudo Port 且进入 Forwarding 训练集:
  - 目标接收器必须返回到默认采样位置
  - 若目标接收器为 Port 且仍在进行裕量测试,则必须在进入 L0 后的 128 μs 内恢复裕量位置
  - 若目标接收器为 Pseudo Port 且仍在进行裕量测试,则必须在进入 Forwarding 非训练集后的 128 μs 内恢复裕量位置
- 目标接收器在收到 Clear Error Log 命令时必须清除其累计的错误计数;若其当前是某 Step Margin 命令的目标接收器且该命令仍在执行中,则在清除错误计数的期间继续进行裕量测试(若其原本正在测试的话)。
- 对于 Set Error Count Limit 命令的目标接收器,在收到新的 Set Error Count Limit 命令之前,所有后续的 Step Margin 命令均使用该新值。
- 自进入 L0 以来,若接收器未收到 Set Error Count Limit,则默认值为 4。
- 若在 Step Margin 命令生效期间收到 Set Error Count Limit 命令,则行为未定义(Undefined)。
- 目标接收器一旦上报 Step Margin Execution Status 为 11b(NAK)或 00b("错误过多"),在该 Step Margin 命令生效期间,必须持续上报相同的状态。
- 目标接收器在收到新的有效 Step Margin 命令后,上报 Step Margin Execution Status 为 01b("裕量测试准备中")的持续时间不得超过 100 ms。
- 已上报过非 01b 状态的目标接收器,在收到新的有效 Step Margin 命令之前,不得再上报 01b。
- Margin Payload 字段中的保留位(Reserved bits)必须遵守以下规则:
  - Downstream 或 Upstream Port 必须将保留位发送为 0
  - Retimer 必须原样转发保留位
  - 所有接收器必须忽略保留位
- Margin Type、Receiver Number 或 Margin Payload 字段的保留编码(Reserved encodings)必须遵守以下规则:
  - Retimer 必须原样转发保留编码
  - 所有接收器必须将保留编码视为其不是该 Margin Command 的目标
- 对于 Vendor Defined Margin Command 或响应,若 Retimer 未定义该命令/响应,则被忽略并按通常方式转发。
- Retimer 上的目标接收器在收到 Access Retimer Register 命令时,若其不支持寄存器访问,响应负载必须返回 00h。若 Retimer 支持 Access Retimer Register 命令,则必须遵守以下规定:
  - 必须分别在 80h 与 84h 位置的 DWORD 处返回非零值。
  - 不得在对应于 Margin Payload 位置 88h 至 9Fh 的范围内放置任何寄存器。

</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
</div>

<!-- 📄 Page 608 -->

<a id="sec-4-2-18-3"></a>
## 4.2.18.3 Flit Mode 8.0 GT/s Margining Behavior | 4.2.18.3 Flit 模式下 8.0 GT/s 的裕量测试行为

<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th width="50%">🇬🇧 English</th>
<th width="50%" style="background-color:#e8e8e8">🇨🇳 中文</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>

Lane Margining is defined for 16.0 GT/s and higher data rates. Lane Margining is not supported at 2.5, 5.0, and 8.0 GT/s. In Non-Flit Mode, Control SKP Ordered Sets only present at 16.0 GT/s and higher data rates so margin commands at slower speeds are not possible. In Flit Mode, Control SKP Ordered Sets are also used at 8.0 GT/s.

The following behavior is recommended in Flit Mode at 8.0 GT/s:

- Upstream and Downstream Ports must send Control SKP Ordered Sets as defined, but the margin command should always be No Command, regardless of the contents of the Margining Lane Control Register.
- Upstream Ports, Downstream Ports, and Retimer Upstream Ports should ignore the margin command in received Control SKP Ordered Sets.
  - The Margining Lane Status Register value is unpredictable.
  - Upstream and Downstream Ports are permitted to compute the Margin CRC and Margin Parity bits and compare against the received Margin CRC and Margin Parity bits. If checked, any mismatch must be reported as Margin CRC and Margin Parity errors in the Lane Error Status Register (see § Section 7.7.3.3 ).

Software must ensure that the following conditions are met before performing Lane Margining at Receiver:

- The current Link data rate must be 16.0 GT/s or higher.
- The current Link width must include the Lanes that are to be tested.
- The Upstream Port's Function(s) must be programmed to a D-state that prevents the Port from entering the L1 Link state. See § Section 5.2 for more information.
- The ASPM Control field of the Link Control register must be set to 00b (Disabled) in both the Downstream Port and Upstream Port.
- The state of the Hardware Autonomous Speed Disable bit of the Link Control 2 register and the Hardware Autonomous Width Disable bit of the Link Control register must be saved to be restored later in this procedure.
- If writeable, the Hardware Autonomous Speed Disable bit of the Link Control 2 register must be Set in both the Downstream Port and Upstream Port. (If hardwired to 0b, the autonomous speed change mechanism is not implemented and is therefore inherently disabled.)
- If writeable, the Hardware Autonomous Width Disable bit of the Link Control register must be Set in both the Downstream Port and Upstream Port. (If hardwired to 0b, the autonomous width change mechanism is not implemented and is therefore inherently disabled.)

While margining, software must ensure the following:

</td>
<td style="background-color:#e8e8e8">

Lane Margining 定义于 16.0 GT/s 及更高的数据速率,2.5、5.0 与 8.0 GT/s 不支持 Lane Margining。在 Non-Flit Mode(非 Flit 模式)下,Control SKP Ordered Set 仅在 16.0 GT/s 及更高数据速率下出现,因此低速下无法下发 margin command。在 Flit 模式(Flit Mode)下,8.0 GT/s 也使用 Control SKP Ordered Set。

在 Flit 模式 8.0 GT/s 下,推荐采用以下行为:

- Upstream 与 Downstream Port 必须按定义发送 Control SKP Ordered Set,但 margin command 应始终为 No Command,与 Margining Lane Control Register 的内容无关。
- Upstream Port、Downstream Port 与 Retimer 的 Upstream Port 应忽略所收到 Control SKP Ordered Set 中的 margin command。
  - Margining Lane Status Register 的值不可预测。
  - Upstream 与 Downstream Port 允许计算 Margin CRC 与 Margin Parity 位,并与接收到的 Margin CRC 与 Margin Parity 位进行比较。若进行检查,任何不匹配都必须作为 Margin CRC 与 Margin Parity 错误上报至 Lane Error Status Register(见 § Section 7.7.3.3)。

在执行 Lane Margining at Receiver 之前,软件必须确保满足以下条件:

- 当前链路数据速率必须为 16.0 GT/s 或更高。
- 当前链路宽度必须包含待测试的 Lanes。
- Upstream Port 的 Function(s) 必须被编程至一个 D-state(设备电源状态),以阻止该 Port 进入 L1 链路状态。详见 § Section 5.2。
- 在 Downstream Port 与 Upstream Port 中,Link Control 寄存器的 ASPM Control 字段必须被设置为 00b(Disabled)。
- 必须保存 Link Control 2 寄存器中 Hardware Autonomous Speed Disable 位与 Link Control 寄存器中 Hardware Autonomous Width Disable 位的状态,以便在本流程的稍后阶段恢复。
- 若可写,在 Downstream Port 与 Upstream Port 中,Link Control 2 寄存器的 Hardware Autonomous Speed Disable 位必须被置位(Set)。(若硬连线为 0b,则自主速率变更机制未实现,故而被固有禁用。)
- 若可写,在 Downstream Port 与 Upstream Port 中,Link Control 寄存器的 Hardware Autonomous Width Disable 位必须被置位(Set)。(若硬连线为 0b,则自主宽度变更机制未实现,故而被固有禁用。)

在进行裕量测试期间,软件必须确保满足以下条件:

</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

[⬆️ 返回目录](#-本章目录-table-of-contents)

---


---

<a id="sec-4-2-18-4"></a>
## 4.2.18.4 Receiver Margin Testing Requirements | 接收器裕量测试要求


<div style="overflow-x: auto; max-width: 100%;">
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th width="50%">🇬🇧 English</th>
<th width="50%" style="background-color:#e8e8e8">🇨🇳 中文</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>

- All Margin Commands must have the Usage Model field in the Margining Lane Control Register set to 0b. While checking for the status of an outstanding Margin Command, software must check that the Usage Model field of the status part of the Margining Lane Status Register is set to 0b.
- Software must read the capabilities offered by a Receiver and margin it within the constraints of the capabilities it offers. The commands issued and the process followed to determine the margin must be consistent with the definitions provided in § Section 4.2.18 and § Section 8.4.4. For example, if the Port does not support voltage testing, then software must not initiate a voltage test. In addition, if a Port supports testing of 2 Lanes simultaneously, then software must test only 1 or 2 Lanes at the same time and not more than 2 Lanes.
- For Receivers where MIndErrorSampler is 1b, any combination of such Receivers are permitted to be margined in parallel.
- For Receivers where MIndErrorSampler is 0b, at most one such Receiver is permitted to be margined at a time. However, margining may be performed on multiple Lanes simultaneously, as long as it is within the maximum number of Lanes the device supports.
- Software must ensure that the Margin Command it provides in the Margining Lane Control Register is a valid one, as defined in § Section 4.2.18.1. For example, the Margin Type must have a defined encoding and the Receiver Number and Margin Payload consistent with it.
- After issuing a command by writing to the Margining Lane Control Register atomically, software must check for the completion of this command. This is done by atomically reading the Margining Lane Status Register and checking that the status fields match the expected response for the issued command (see § Table 4-62 and § Table 4-63). It is strongly recommended that software continue to reread the Margining Lane Status Register if it does not find the expected Receiver Number. If 10 ms has elapsed after a new Margin Command was issued and the values read do not match the expected response, software is permitted to assume that the Receiver will not respond, and declare that the target Receiver failed margining. For a broadcast command other than No Command the Receiver Number in the response must correspond to one of the Pseudo Ports in Retimer Y or Retimer Z, if Retimers are present, or the Downstream Port if they are not, as described in § Figure 4-61.
- Any two reads of the Margining Lane Status Register should be spaced at least 10 μs apart to make sure they are reading results from different Control SKP Ordered Sets.
- Software must broadcast No Command and wait for it to complete, or for 10 ms to elapse without observing that completion, prior to issuing a new Margin Type or Receiver Number or Margin Payload in the Margining Lane Control Register.
- At the end of margining in a given direction (voltage/ timing and up/down/left/right), software must broadcast Go to Normal Settings, No Command, Clear Error Log, and No Command in series in the Downstream and Upstream Ports, after ensuring each command has been acknowledged by the target Receiver.
- If the Data Rate has changed during margining, margining results (if any) are not accurate and software must exit the margining procedure. Software must set the Margining Lane Control Register to No Command to avoid starting margining if the Data Rate later changes to 16.0 GT/s or higher.
- Software is permitted to issue a Clear Error Log command periodically while margining is in progress, to gather error information over a long period of time.
- Software must not attempt to margin both timing and voltage of a target Receiver simultaneously. Results are undefined if a Receiver receives commands that would place both voltage and timing margin locations away from the default sample position at the same time.
- Software should allow margining to run for at least 10^8 bits margined by the Receiver under test before switching to the next margin step location (unless the error limit is exceeded).
- Software must account for the 'set up for margin in progress' status while measuring the margin time or the number of bits sampled by the Receiver.

</td>
<td style="background-color:#e8e8e8">

- 所有 Margin Command (裕量命令) 必须将 Margining Lane Control Register (裕量通道控制寄存器) 中的 Usage Model 字段设置为 0b。在检查尚未完成的裕量命令的状态时,软件必须检查 Margining Lane Status Register (裕量通道状态寄存器) 状态部分的 Usage Model 字段是否设置为 0b。
- 软件必须读取接收器 (Receiver) 所提供的功能,并在其能力范围内对其进行裕量测试。所发出的命令以及用于确定裕量的流程必须与 § Section 4.2.18 和 § Section 8.4.4 中给出的定义保持一致。例如,如果端口 (Port) 不支持电压测试,则软件不得发起电压测试。此外,如果某个端口支持同时测试 2 条通道 (Lane),则软件每次只能测试 1 条或 2 条通道,不能超过 2 条。
- 对于 MIndErrorSampler 为 1b 的接收器,允许以任意组合的形式对这些接收器并行进行裕量测试。
- 对于 MIndErrorSampler 为 0b 的接收器,任何时候最多只能对其中一个接收器进行裕量测试。不过,只要在设备所支持的最大通道数范围内,允许同时在多条通道上进行裕量测试。
- 软件必须确保其在 Margining Lane Control Register 中提供的 Margin Command 是有效的,具体定义见 § Section 4.2.18.1。例如,Margin Type (裕量类型) 必须具有已定义的编码,且 Receiver Number (接收器编号) 和 Margin Payload (裕量负载) 必须与之保持一致。
- 通过原子地 (atomically) 写入 Margining Lane Control Register 来发出命令后,软件必须检查该命令的完成情况。其做法是原子地读取 Margining Lane Status Register,并检查状态字段是否与所发出命令的预期响应相匹配(参见 § Table 4-62 和 § Table 4-63)。强烈建议软件在未找到预期的 Receiver Number 时继续重复读取 Margining Lane Status Register。如果在发出新的 Margin Command 之后 10 ms 已过,而读取的值与预期响应不匹配,则软件可以假定该接收器不会响应,并声明目标接收器裕量测试失败。对于 No Command 以外的广播命令,响应中的 Receiver Number 必须对应于 Retimer Y 或 Retimer Z 中的某个 Pseudo Port(若存在 Retimer),或者不存在 Retimer 时对应于 Downstream Port,具体描述见 § Figure 4-61。
- 对 Margining Lane Status Register 的任意两次读取之间应至少间隔 10 μs,以确保读取的是来自不同 Control SKP Ordered Set (控制 SKP 有序集) 的结果。
- 软件必须先广播 No Command 并等待其完成,或在 10 ms 内未观察到完成的情况下,才能在 Margining Lane Control Register 中发出新的 Margin Type、Receiver Number 或 Margin Payload。
- 在某个方向(电压/时序,以及上/下/左/右)的裕量测试结束时,在确保目标接收器已确认每条命令之后,软件必须在 Downstream Port 和 Upstream Port 上按顺序依次广播 Go to Normal Settings、No Command、Clear Error Log 和 No Command。
- 如果在裕量测试过程中 Data Rate (数据速率) 发生了变化,则测试结果(若有)不准确,软件必须退出裕量测试流程。软件必须将 Margining Lane Control Register 设置为 No Command,以避免在 Data Rate 之后变化为 16.0 GT/s 或更高时启动裕量测试。
- 在裕量测试进行过程中,允许软件定期发出 Clear Error Log 命令,以在较长的时间内收集错误信息。
- 软件不得同时对目标接收器的时序和电压进行裕量测试。如果接收器收到会使其电压和时序裕量位置同时偏离默认采样位置 (default sample position) 的命令,则结果未定义。
- 在切换到下一个裕量步进位置之前,软件应允许裕量测试至少在被测接收器上累计 10^8 比特(除非已达到错误上限)。
- 在测量裕量时间或接收器所采样的比特数时,软件必须考虑 "set up for margin in progress" (裕量设置进行中) 状态。

</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
</div>


<!-- 📄 Page 611 -->
---

<a id="sec-4-2-18-4-continued"></a>
## 4.2.18.4 (续) Receiver Margin Testing Requirements | 接收器裕量测试要求

<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th width="50%">🇬🇧 English</th>
<th width="50%" style="background-color:#e8e8e8">🇨🇳 中文</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>

- If a target Receiver is reporting 'set up for margin in progress' for 200 ms after issuing one of the Step Margin commands, Software is permitted to assume that the Receiver will not respond and declare that the target Receiver failed margining.
- If a Receiver reports a 'NAK' in the Margin Payload status field and the corresponding Step Margin command was valid and within the allowable range (as defined in § Section 4.2.18 and § Section 8.4.4), Software is permitted to declare that the target Receiver failed margining.
- When the margin testing procedure is completed, the state of the Hardware Autonomous Speed Disable bit and the Hardware Autonomous Width Disable bit must be restored to the previously saved values.

</td>
<td style="background-color:#e8e8e8">

- 在发出 Step Margin (步进裕量) 命令之一之后,若目标接收器持续 200 ms 报告 "set up for margin in progress",则软件可以假定该接收器不会响应,并声明目标接收器裕量测试失败。
- 如果接收器在 Margin Payload 状态字段中报告 "NAK"(否认),且对应的 Step Margin 命令有效且处于允许范围内(定义见 § Section 4.2.18 和 § Section 8.4.4),则软件可以声明目标接收器裕量测试失败。
- 裕量测试流程完成后,必须将 Hardware Autonomous Speed Disable 位和 Hardware Autonomous Width Disable 位的状态恢复为先前保存的值。

</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

<!-- 📄 Page 612 -->
---

<a id="sec-4-2-18-4-implementation-note"></a>
## 4.2.18.4 (续) Implementation Note: Example Software Flow for Lane Margining at Receiver | 实现说明:接收器通道裕量测试的示例软件流程


<div style="overflow-x: auto; max-width: 100%;">
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th width="50%">🇬🇧 English</th>
<th width="50%" style="background-color:#e8e8e8">🇨🇳 中文</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>

**IMPLEMENTATION NOTE:**
**EXAMPLE SOFTWARE FLOW FOR LANE MARGINING AT RECEIVER**

For getting the invariant parameters the following steps may be followed. Once obtained, the same parameters can be used across multiple sets of margining tests as long as LinkUp=1b continues to be true. For each component in the Link, do the following Steps. Software can do these steps in parallel for different components on different Lanes of the Link.

**Step A1:**
Issue Report Margin Control Capabilities (Margin Type = 001b, Margin Payload = 88h, Receiver Number = target device in the Margining Lane Control Register)

**Step A2:**
Read the Margining Lane Status Register.
  a. If Margin Type = 001b and Receiver Number = target Receiver: Go to Step A3
  b. Else: If 10 ms has expired since command issued, declare Receiver failed margining and exit; else wait for >10 μs and Go to Step A2

**Step A3:**
Store the information provided Margin Payload status field for use during margining.

**Step A4:**
Broadcast No Command (Margin Type = 111b, Receiver Number = 000b, and Margin Payload = 9Ch in the Margining Lane Control Register) and wait for those to be reflected back in the Margining Lane Status Register. If 10 ms expires without getting the command completion handshake, declare the Receiver failed margining and exit.

**Step A5:**
Repeat Step A1 through Step A4 for Report MNumVoltageSteps, Report MNumTimingSteps, Report MMaxTimingOffset, Report MMaxVoltageOffset, Report MSamplingRateVoltage, and Report MSamplingRateTiming. It may be noted that this step can be executed in parallel across different Lanes for different Margin Type.

Margining on each Lane across the Link can be a sequence of separate commands. Prior to launching the sequence, software should read the maximum number of Lanes it is allowed to run margining simultaneously. The steps would be similar to Step A1 through Step A4 above with the Report MMaxLanes command. After that software can simultaneously margin up to that many Lanes of the Link. On each Link, each Receiver is margined based on its capability, subject to the constraints described here, after ensuring the Link is operating at full width in 16.0 GT/s or higher Data Rate and the hardware autonomous width and speed change as well as ASPM power states have been disabled.

If software desires to set an Error Count Limit value different than default of 4 or whatever was programmed last, it executes the following Steps prior to going to Step C1 below.

**Step B1:**
Issue Set Error Count Limit (Margin Type = 010b, the target Receiver Number, and Margin Payload = {11b, Error Count Limit} in the Margining Lane Control Register)

**Step B2:**
Read the Margining Lane Status Register.

</td>
<td style="background-color:#e8e8e8">

**实现说明:**
**接收器通道裕量测试的示例软件流程**

为了获取不变的 (invariant) 参数,可以按照以下步骤进行。一旦获得,在 LinkUp=1b 持续为真的前提下,这些参数可以用于多组裕量测试。对于链路 (Link) 中的每个组件,请执行以下步骤。软件可以在链路不同通道上的不同组件上并行执行这些步骤。

**步骤 A1:**
在 Margining Lane Control Register 中发出 Report Margin Control Capabilities(Margin Type = 001b,Margin Payload = 88h,Receiver Number = 目标设备)。

**步骤 A2:**
读取 Margining Lane Status Register。
  a. 若 Margin Type = 001b 且 Receiver Number = 目标接收器:转到步骤 A3。
  b. 否则:若自命令发出以来已过去 10 ms,则声明该接收器裕量测试失败并退出;否则等待 >10 μs 并转到步骤 A2。

**步骤 A3:**
保存 Margin Payload 状态字段所提供的信息,以供裕量测试期间使用。

**步骤 A4:**
广播 No Command(在 Margining Lane Control Register 中,Margin Type = 111b,Receiver Number = 000b,Margin Payload = 9Ch),并等待这些信息反映回 Margining Lane Status Register。若 10 ms 内未收到命令完成握手,则声明该接收器裕量测试失败并退出。

**步骤 A5:**
对 Report MNumVoltageSteps、Report MNumTimingSteps、Report MMaxTimingOffset、Report MMaxVoltageOffset、Report MSamplingRateVoltage 和 Report MSamplingRateTiming 重复步骤 A1 到步骤 A4。需要注意的是,该步骤可在不同通道上对不同 Margin Type 并行执行。

对链路上每条通道的裕量测试可以是若干独立命令的序列。在启动该序列之前,软件应读取其允许同时运行裕量测试的最大通道数。流程与上面使用 Report MMaxLanes 命令的步骤 A1 到 A4 类似。之后,软件可同时对该数量的链路通道进行裕量测试。在确保链路以 16.0 GT/s 或更高的 Data Rate 在全宽度下工作,并且硬件自主的宽度与速率变更以及 ASPM 电源状态都已被禁用之后,可根据每个接收器的能力,在上述约束条件下,逐个对链路上的每个接收器进行裕量测试。

如果软件希望将错误计数限制 (Error Count Limit) 设置为不同于默认值 4 或上一次所设的值,则在进入下面的步骤 C1 之前执行以下步骤。

**步骤 B1:**
在 Margining Lane Control Register 中发出 Set Error Count Limit(Margin Type = 010b,目标 Receiver Number,Margin Payload = {11b, Error Count Limit})。

**步骤 B2:**
读取 Margining Lane Status Register。

</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
</div>


<!-- 📄 Page 613 -->
---

<a id="sec-4-2-18-4-step-b3-c3"></a>
## 4.2.18.4 (续) Example Software Flow Steps B3 – C3 | 示例软件流程 步骤 B3 – C3

<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th width="50%">🇬🇧 English</th>
<th width="50%" style="background-color:#e8e8e8">🇨🇳 中文</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>

  a. If Margin Type = 010b, Receiver Number = target Receiver, and Margin Payload = Margin Payload control field (Bits [14:7]), go to Step B4
  b. Else: If 10 ms has expired since command issued, go to Step B3; else wait for >10 μs and Go to Step B2

**Step B3:**
Margining has failed. Invoke the system checks to find out if the Link degraded in width/speed due to reliability reasons.

**Step B4:**
Broadcast No Command and wait for those to be reflected back in the status fields. If 10 ms expires without getting the command completion handshake, declare the Receiver failed margining and exit.

The following steps is an example flow of one margin point for a given Receiver executing Step Margin to timing offset to right/left of default starting with 15 steps to the right:

**Step C1:**
Write Margin Type = 011b, the target Receiver Number, and Margin Payload = {0000b, 1111b} in the Margining Lane Control Register

**Step C2:**
Read the Margining Lane Status Register.
  a. If Margin Type = 011b and Receiver Number = target Receiver, Go to Step C3
  b. Else If 10 ms has expired since command issued, declare Receiver has failed margining and go to Step C7
  c. Wait for >10 μs and Go to Step C2

**Step C3:**
In the Margining Lane Status Register:
  a. If Margin Payload[7:6] = 11b:
    i. If we exceeded the 0.2 UI, that is the margin;
    ii. Else report margin failure at this point and go to Step C7;
  b. Else if Margin Payload[7:6] = 00b:
    i. report margin failure at this point and go to Step C7
  c. Else if Margin Payload[7:6] = 01b:
    i. If 200 ms has elapsed since entering Step C3, report that the Receiver failed margining test and exit;
    ii. else wait 1 ms, read the Margining Lane Status Register and go to Step C3
  d. Else go to Step C4

**Step C4:**
Wait for the desired amount of time for margining to happen while sampling the Margining Lane Status Register periodically for the number of errors reported in the Margin Payload field (Bits [5:0] - MErrorCount). For longer runs, issue the No Command followed by the Clear Error Log commands, (using procedures similar to Step B1 through Step B4, with the corresponding expected status field) if the length of time will cause the error count to exceed the Set Error Count Limit even when staying within the expected BER target.

</td>
<td style="background-color:#e8e8e8">

  a. 若 Margin Type = 010b,Receiver Number = 目标接收器,且 Margin Payload = Margin Payload 控制字段(Bit [14:7]),则转到步骤 B4。
  b. 否则:若自命令发出以来已过去 10 ms,则转到步骤 B3;否则等待 >10 μs 并转到步骤 B2。

**步骤 B3:**
裕量测试已失败。调用系统检查以确认链路是否因可靠性原因发生了宽度/速率降级。

**步骤 B4:**
广播 No Command,并等待其反映回状态字段。若 10 ms 内未收到命令完成握手,则声明该接收器裕量测试失败并退出。

以下步骤是针对给定接收器执行 Step Margin,以从默认位置向右/左移动时序偏移,初始向右 15 个步进的一个示例流程:

**步骤 C1:**
在 Margining Lane Control Register 中写入 Margin Type = 011b,目标 Receiver Number,以及 Margin Payload = {0000b, 1111b}。

**步骤 C2:**
读取 Margining Lane Status Register。
  a. 若 Margin Type = 011b 且 Receiver Number = 目标接收器,则转到步骤 C3。
  b. 否则若自命令发出以来已过去 10 ms,则声明该接收器裕量测试失败并转到步骤 C7。
  c. 等待 >10 μs 并转到步骤 C2。

**步骤 C3:**
在 Margining Lane Status Register 中:
  a. 若 Margin Payload[7:6] = 11b:
    i. 若已超过 0.2 UI,则该值即为裕量;
    ii. 否则报告此点裕量测试失败,并转到步骤 C7;
  b. 否则若 Margin Payload[7:6] = 00b:
    i. 报告此点裕量测试失败,并转到步骤 C7。
  c. 否则若 Margin Payload[7:6] = 01b:
    i. 若自进入步骤 C3 起已过去 200 ms,则报告该接收器裕量测试失败并退出;
    ii. 否则等待 1 ms,读取 Margining Lane Status Register 并转到步骤 C3。
  d. 否则转到步骤 C4。

**步骤 C4:**
等待所需的裕量测试时长,同时周期性地读取 Margining Lane Status Register,以获取 Margin Payload 字段(Bit [5:0] – MErrorCount)所报告的错误数。对于较长时间的运行,若持续时间会导致错误计数在不超过预期 BER 目标的情况下仍超过 Set Error Count Limit,则发出 No Command,然后再发出 Clear Error Log 命令(流程与步骤 B1 到 B4 类似,并对应相应的预期状态字段)。

</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

<!-- 📄 Page 614 -->
---

<a id="sec-4-2-18-4-step-c5-c8"></a>
## 4.2.18.4 (续) Example Software Flow Steps C5 – C8 | 示例软件流程 步骤 C5 – C8


<div style="overflow-x: auto; max-width: 100%;">
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th width="50%">🇬🇧 English</th>
<th width="50%" style="background-color:#e8e8e8">🇨🇳 中文</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>

If the aggregate error count remains within the expected error count and the Margin Payload[7:6] in the status field remains 10b till the end, the Receiver has the required Margin at the timing margin step; else it fails that timing margin step go to Step C7.

**Step C5:**
Broadcast No Command and wait for those to be reflected back in the status fields. If 10 ms expires without getting the command completion handshake, declare the Receiver failed margining and exit.

**Step C6:**
Go to Step C1, incrementing the number of timing steps through the Margin Payload control field (Bits[5:0]) if we want to test against a higher margin amount; else go to Step C8 noting the margin value that the Receiver passed

**Step C7:**
Margin failed; The previous margin step the Receiver passed in Step C6 is the margin of the Receiver

**Step C8:**
Broadcast No Command, Clear Error Log, No Command, Go to Normal Settings series of commands (using a procedure similar to Step B1 through Step B4 with the corresponding expected status fields)

</td>
<td style="background-color:#e8e8e8">

如果累计错误计数保持在预期错误计数之内,且状态字段中 Margin Payload[7:6] 在结束前始终保持 10b,则该接收器在该时序裕量步进下具有所需的裕量;否则该时序裕量步进失败,转到步骤 C7。

**步骤 C5:**
广播 No Command,并等待其反映回状态字段。若 10 ms 内未收到命令完成握手,则声明该接收器裕量测试失败并退出。

**步骤 C6:**
转到步骤 C1,若要测试更高的裕量量级,则通过 Margin Payload 控制字段(Bit [5:0])增加时序步数;否则转到步骤 C8,并记下接收器通过的裕量值。

**步骤 C7:**
裕量测试失败;接收器在步骤 C6 中通过的上一个裕量步进即为该接收器的实际裕量。

**步骤 C8:**
依次广播 No Command、Clear Error Log、No Command、Go to Normal Settings 这一系列命令(流程与步骤 B1 到 B4 类似,并对应相应的预期状态字段)。

</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
</div>


<a id="sec-4-3"></a>
## 4.3 Retimers | 重定时器 (Retimer)

<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th width="50%">🇬🇧 English</th>
<th width="50%" style="background-color:#e8e8e8">🇨🇳 中文</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>

This Section defines the requirements for Retimers that are Physical Layer protocol aware and that interoperate with any pair of components with any compliant channel on each side of the Retimer. An important capability of a Physical Layer protocol aware Retimer is to execute the Phase 2/3 of the equalization procedure in each direction. A maximum of two Retimers are permitted between an Upstream and a Downstream Port.

The two Retimer limit is based on multiple considerations, most notably limits on modifying SKP Ordered Sets and limits on the time spent in Phase 2/3 of the equalization procedure. To ensure interoperability, platform designers must ensure that the two Retimer limit is honored for all PCI Express Links, including those involving form factors as well as those involving active cables. Form factor specifications may define additional Retimer rules that must be honored for their form factors. Assessing interoperability with any Extension Device not based on the Retimer definition in this section is outside the scope of this specification.

Many architectures of Extension Devices are possible, i.e., analog only Repeater, protocol unaware Retimer, etc. This specification describes a Physical Layer protocol aware Retimer. It may be possible to use other types of Extension Devices in closed systems if proper analysis is done for the specific channel, Extension Device, and end-device pair - but a specific method for carrying out this analysis is outside the scope of this specification.

Retimers have two Pseudo Ports, one facing Upstream, and the other facing Downstream. The Transmitter of each Pseudo Port must derive its clock from a 100 MHz reference clock. The reference clock(s) must meet the requirements of § Section 8.6. A Retimer supports one or more reference clocking architectures as defined in § Section 8.6 Electrical Sub-block.

In most operations Retimers simply forward received Ordered Sets, DLLPs, TLPs, Logical Idle, and Electrical Idle. Retimers are completely transparent to the Data Link Layer and Transaction Layer. System software shall not enable L0s on any Link where a Retimer is present. Support of beacon by Retimers is optional and beyond the scope of this specification.

When using 128b/130b encoding the Retimer executes the protocol so that each Link Segment undergoes independent Link equalization as described in § Section 4.3.6.

</td>
<td style="background-color:#e8e8e8">

本节定义了对 Retimer (重定时器) 的要求,这些 Retimer 是物理层协议感知 (Physical Layer protocol aware) 的,并且能够与 Retimer 两侧任意合规通道上的任意一对组件互通。物理层协议感知 Retimer 的一个重要能力是能够在每个方向上执行均衡过程的 Phase 2/3。在一个 Upstream Port (上游端口) 和一个 Downstream Port (下游端口) 之间最多允许两个 Retimer。

两个 Retimer 的限制基于多方面考虑,尤其涉及对 SKP Ordered Set (跳过有序集) 修改的限制,以及 Phase 2/3 均衡过程所花费时间的限制。为确保互通性,平台设计者必须确保所有 PCI Express 链路都遵守两个 Retimer 的限制,包括涉及外形规格 (form factor) 的链路以及涉及有源线缆的链路。外形规格规范可以定义其外形规格必须遵守的额外 Retimer 规则。评估任何不基于本节 Retimer 定义的扩展设备 (Extension Device) 的互通性不在本规范范围内。

扩展设备可以有多种架构,即纯模拟 Repeater (中继器)、非协议感知 Retimer 等。本规范描述的是物理层协议感知 Retimer。在针对特定通道、扩展设备和端设备对进行充分分析的前提下,其他类型的扩展设备或许可在封闭系统中使用,但执行此类分析的具体方法不在本规范范围内。

Retimer 具有两个 Pseudo Port (伪端口),一个面向 Upstream,另一个面向 Downstream。每个 Pseudo Port 的 Transmitter (发送器) 必须由 100 MHz 的参考时钟 (reference clock) 驱动其时钟。参考时钟必须满足 § Section 8.6 的要求。Retimer 支持 § Section 8.6 电气子块 (Electrical Sub-block) 中定义的一种或多种参考时钟架构。

在大多数操作中,Retimer 只是简单地转发所接收到的 Ordered Set (有序集)、DLLP、TLP、Logical Idle (逻辑空闲) 和 Electrical Idle (电气空闲)。Retimer 对数据链路层 (Data Link Layer) 和事务层 (Transaction Layer) 完全透明。系统软件不得在存在 Retimer 的任何链路上启用 L0s。Retimer 对 Beacon 信号的支持是可选的,且不在本规范范围内。

在使用 128b/130b 编码时,Retimer 执行相应协议,以使每个 Link Segment (链路段) 按照 § Section 4.3.6 中的描述独立进行链路均衡。

</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

<!-- 📄 Page 615 -->
---

<a id="sec-4-3-retimers-continued"></a>
## 4.3 (续) Retimers | 重定时器 (Retimer)


<div style="overflow-x: auto; max-width: 100%;">
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th width="50%">🇬🇧 English</th>
<th width="50%" style="background-color:#e8e8e8">🇨🇳 中文</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>

The Pseudo Port orientation (Upstream or Downstream) is determined dynamically, while the Link partners are in Configuration. Both crosslink and regular Links are supported.

The following is a high level summary of Retimer requirements:

- Retimers are required to comply with all the electrical specification described in § Chapter 8. Electrical Sub-block. Retimers must operate in one of two modes:
  - Retimers' Receivers operate at 8.0 GT/s and above with an impedance that meets the range defined by the ZRX-DC parameter for 2.5 GT/s.
  - Retimers' Receivers operate at 8.0 GT/s and above with an impedance that does not meet the range defined by the ZRX-DC parameter for 2.5 GT/s. In this mode the ZRX-DC parameter for 2.5 GT/s must be met with in 1 ms of receiving an EIOS or inferring Electrical Idle and while the Receivers remain in Electrical Idle.
- Forwarded Symbols must always be de-skewed when more than one Lane is forwarding Symbols (including upconfigure cases).
- Determine Port orientation dynamically.
- Determine Data Stream Mode (Flit Mode or Non-Flit Mode) dynamically.
- Perform Lane polarity inversion (if needed).
- Interoperate with the Link equalization procedure for Phase 2 and Phase 3, when using 128b/130b or 1b/1b encoding, on each Link Segment.
- Interoperate with de-emphasis negotiation at 5.0 GT/s, on each Link Segment.
- Interoperate with Link Upconfigure.
- Interoperate with L0p.
- Pass loopback data between the Loopback Lead and Loopback Follower.
  - Optionally execute Follower Loopback on one Pseudo Port when using 8b/10b or 128b/130b encoding
  - Execute Follower Loopback on one Pseudo Port when using 1b/1b
- Generate the Compliance Pattern on each Pseudo Port.
  - Load board method (i.e., time out in Polling.Active).
- Forward Modified Compliance Pattern when the Link enters Polling.Compliance via Compliance Receive bit in TS1 Ordered Sets.
- Forward Compliance or Modified Compliance Patterns when Ports enter Polling.Compliance via the Enter Compliance bit in the Link Control 2 register is set to 1b in both the Upstream Port and the Downstream Port and Retimer Enter Compliance is set to 1b (accessed in an implementation specific manner) in the Retimer.
- Adjust the data rate of operation in concert with the Upstream and Downstream Ports of the Link.
- Adjust the Link width in concert with the Upstream and Downstream Ports of the Link.
- Capture Lane numbers during Configuration.
  - Lane numbers are required when using 128b/130b and 1b/1b encoding for the scrambling seed.
- Capture the Flit Mode Supported bit during Polling and Configuration during Link training.
  - The Flit Mode Supported bit is used to determine the Data Stream Mode.
- Dynamically adjust Retimer Receiver impedance to match end Component Receiver impedance.

</td>
<td style="background-color:#e8e8e8">

Pseudo Port 的方向(Upstream 或 Downstream)是在链路伙伴处于 Configuration 状态时动态确定的。Crosslink (交叉链路) 和常规链路均受支持。

以下是 Retimer 要求的高层摘要:

- Retimer 必须遵守 § Chapter 8 电气子块中所述的所有电气规范。Retimer 必须在以下两种模式之一下运行:
  - Retimer 的接收器在 8.0 GT/s 及以上速率下工作,其阻抗满足 2.5 GT/s 下 ZRX-DC 参数所定义的范围。
  - Retimer 的接收器在 8.0 GT/s 及以上速率下工作,其阻抗不满足 2.5 GT/s 下 ZRX-DC 参数所定义的范围。在此模式下,2.5 GT/s 的 ZRX-DC 参数必须在接收到 EIOS 或推断进入 Electrical Idle 后 1 ms 内满足,并且在接收器保持 Electrical Idle 期间一直满足。
- 在多于一条通道转发 Symbols (符号)时(包括 Upconfigure 的情况),所转发的 Symbols 必须始终经过去偏斜 (de-skewed) 处理。
- 动态确定端口方向。
- 动态确定 Data Stream Mode (数据流模式:Flit 模式或非 Flit 模式)。
- 在需要时执行通道极性反转 (Lane polarity inversion)。
- 在使用 128b/130b 或 1b/1b 编码时,需在每个 Link Segment 上与 Phase 2 和 Phase 3 链路均衡过程互通。
- 在 5.0 GT/s 速率下,需在每个 Link Segment 上与去加重 (De-emphasis) 协商互通。
- 与 Link Upconfigure (链路向上配置) 互通。
- 与 L0p 互通。
- 在 Loopback Lead (回环主导) 和 Loopback Follower (回环从属) 之间传递 Loopback 数据。
  - 在使用 8b/10b 或 128b/130b 编码时,可选地在某个 Pseudo Port 上执行 Follower Loopback。
  - 在使用 1b/1b 编码时,在某个 Pseudo Port 上执行 Follower Loopback。
- 在每个 Pseudo Port 上生成 Compliance Pattern (一致性测试码型)。
  - 加载板 (Load board) 方法(即在 Polling.Active 状态下超时)。
- 当链路通过 TS1 Ordered Set 中的 Compliance Receive 位置 1 而进入 Polling.Compliance 状态时,转发 Modified Compliance Pattern。
- 当端口通过 Link Control 2 寄存器中的 Enter Compliance 位进入 Polling.Compliance 状态时,若 Upstream Port 和 Downstream Port 中该位均被置 1b,且 Retimer 中的 Retimer Enter Compliance 也被置 1b(以实现特定方式访问),则转发 Compliance 或 Modified Compliance Pattern。
- 协调链路 Upstream Port 和 Downstream Port,共同调整工作数据速率。
- 协调链路 Upstream Port 和 Downstream Port,共同调整链路宽度。
- 在 Configuration 状态期间捕获通道号 (Lane number)。
  - 在使用 128b/130b 和 1b/1b 编码时,通道号用作加扰 (scrambling) 种子时是必需的。
- 在链路训练的 Polling 和 Configuration 状态期间捕获 Flit Mode Supported 位。
  - Flit Mode Supported 位用于确定 Data Stream Mode。
- 动态调整 Retimer 接收器阻抗,以与端点组件的接收器阻抗相匹配。

</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
</div>


<a id="sec-4-3-1"></a>
## 4.3.1 Retimer Requirements | 重定时器 (Retimer) 要求

<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th width="50%">🇬🇧 English</th>
<th width="50%" style="background-color:#e8e8e8">🇨🇳 中文</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>

- Infer entering Electrical Idle at all data rates.
- Modify certain fields of Ordered Sets while forwarding.
- Perform clock compensation via addition or removal of SKP Symbols.
- Support L1.
  - Optionally Support L1 PM Substates.
- If 32.0 GT/s capable, then interoperate with Link equalization to the highest data rate.
- If 32.0 GT/s capable, then interoperate with No Equalization Needed mode.
  - If 32.0 GT/s capable, then interoperate with the use of Modified TS1/TS2 Ordered Sets.
- Forward 1b/1b Control SKP Ordered Sets that have Phy Payload Type equal to 0b. Thus, 1b/1b Control SKP Ordered Sets with Margin Payload will be forwarded.

</td>
<td style="background-color:#e8e8e8">

- 在所有数据速率下推断进入 Electrical Idle。
- 在转发期间修改 Ordered Set 的某些字段。
- 通过增加或删除 SKP Symbol 来执行时钟补偿 (clock compensation)。
- 支持 L1。
  - 可选地支持 L1 PM Substates (L1 电源管理子状态)。
- 若支持 32.0 GT/s,则需与最高数据速率的链路均衡互通。
- 若支持 32.0 GT/s,则需与 No Equalization Needed (无需均衡) 模式互通。
  - 若支持 32.0 GT/s,则需与 Modified TS1/TS2 Ordered Set 的使用互通。
- 转发 Phy Payload Type 等于 0b 的 1b/1b Control SKP Ordered Set。因此,带有 Margin Payload 的 1b/1b Control SKP Ordered Set 将被转发。

</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

<!-- 📄 Page 616 -->
---

<a id="sec-4-3-1-continued"></a>
## 4.3.1 (续) Retimer Requirements | 重定时器 (Retimer) 要求


<div style="overflow-x: auto; max-width: 100%;">
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th width="50%">🇬🇧 English</th>
<th width="50%" style="background-color:#e8e8e8">🇨🇳 中文</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>

§ Figure 4-62 shows the topologies supported by Retimers defined in this specification. There may be one or two Retimers between the Upstream and Downstream Ports on a Link. Each Retimer has two Pseudo Ports, which determine their Downstream/Upstream orientation dynamically. Each Retimer has an Upstream Path and a Downstream Path. Both Pseudo Ports must always operate at the same data rate, when in Forwarding mode. Thus, each Path will also be at the same data rate. A Retimer is permitted to support any width option defined by this specification as its maximum width.

The behavior of the Retimer in each high level operating mode is:

- Forwarding mode:
  - Symbols, Electrical Idle, and exit from Electrical Idle; are forwarded on each Upstream and Downstream Path.
- Execution mode:
  - The Upstream Pseudo Port acts as an Upstream Port of a Component. The Downstream Pseudo Port acts as a Downstream Port of a Component. This mode is used in the following cases:
    - Polling.Compliance.
    - Phase 2 and Phase 3 of the Link equalization procedure.
    - Optionally Follower Loopback.

</td>
<td style="background-color:#e8e8e8">

§ Figure 4-62 展示了本规范中所定义 Retimer 所支持的拓扑。在链路的 Upstream Port 和 Downstream Port 之间可以有一个或两个 Retimer。每个 Retimer 具有两个 Pseudo Port,其 Downstream/Upstream 方向是动态确定的。每个 Retimer 包含一条 Upstream Path (上行路径) 和一条 Downstream Path (下行路径)。在 Forwarding mode (转发模式) 下,两个 Pseudo Port 必须始终以相同的数据速率运行。因此,每条 Path 也将以相同的数据速率运行。Retimer 可支持本规范中定义的任意宽度选项作为其最大宽度。

Retimer 在各高层运行模式下的行为如下:

- Forwarding mode (转发模式):
  - 在每条 Upstream Path 和 Downstream Path 上转发 Symbols、Electrical Idle,以及从 Electrical Idle 退出。
- Execution mode (执行模式):
  - Upstream Pseudo Port 充当组件的 Upstream Port,Downstream Pseudo Port 充当组件的 Downstream Port。该模式在以下情形中使用:
    - Polling.Compliance。
    - 链路均衡过程的 Phase 2 和 Phase 3。
    - 可选的 Follower Loopback。

</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
</div>

<a id="sec-4-3-3"></a>
## 4.3.3 Variables | 变量


<div style="overflow-x: auto; max-width: 100%;">
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th width="50%">🇬🇧 English</th>
<th width="50%" style="background-color:#e8e8e8">🇨🇳 中文</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>

The following variables are set to the following specified values following a Fundamental Reset or whenever the Retimer receives Link and Lane number equal to PAD on two consecutive TS2 Ordered Sets on all Lanes that are receiving TS2 Ordered Sets on both Upstream and Downstream Pseudo Ports within a 1 μs time window from the last Symbol of the second TS2 Ordered Set on the first Lane to the last Symbol of the second TS2 Ordered Set on the last Lane.

- RT_port_orientation = undefined
- RT_captured_lane_number = PAD
- RT_captured_link_number = PAD
- RT_G3_EQ_complete = 0b
- RT_G4_EQ_complete = 0b
- RT_G5_EQ_complete = 0b
- RT_G6_EQ_complete = 0b

</td>
<td style="background-color:#e8e8e8">

在 Fundamental Reset (基本复位) 之后,或者在 Retimer 于 1 μs 时间窗内(从第一条通道上第二个 TS2 Ordered Set 的最后一个 Symbol 开始,到最后一条通道上第二个 TS2 Ordered Set 的最后一个 Symbol 结束)在 Upstream 和 Downstream Pseudo Port 上所有正在接收 TS2 Ordered Set 的通道上,连续两个 TS2 Ordered Set 收到 Link 和 Lane number 等于 PAD 时,以下变量被设置为以下指定值。

- RT_port_orientation = undefined (未定义)
- RT_captured_lane_number = PAD
- RT_captured_link_number = PAD
- RT_G3_EQ_complete = 0b
- RT_G4_EQ_complete = 0b
- RT_G5_EQ_complete = 0b
- RT_G6_EQ_complete = 0b

</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
</div>


<!-- 📄 Page 618 -->
---

<a id="sec-4-3-3-continued"></a>
## 4.3.3 (续) Variables | 变量

<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th width="50%">🇬🇧 English</th>
<th width="50%" style="background-color:#e8e8e8">🇨🇳 中文</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>

- RT_LinkUp = 0b
- RT_number = undefined
- RT_next_data_rate = 2.5 GT/s
- RT_error_data_rate = 2.5 GT/s
- RT_flit_mode_enabled = 0b

The Retimer Transmitters and Receivers shall meet the requirements in § Section 4.2.5.9.1 while Fundamental Reset is asserted. When Fundamental Reset is deasserted the Retimer is permitted to take up to 100 ms to begin active determination of its Receiver impedance. A Retimer that supports only Link speeds 5.0 GT/s or less must do this within 20 ms. During this interval the Receiver impedance remains as required during Fundamental Reset. Once this interval has expired Receiver impedance on Retimer Lanes is determined as follows:

- Within 1.0 ms of the Upstream or Downstream Port's Receiver meeting the ZRX-DC parameter, the low impedance is back propagated, (i.e., the Retimer's Receiver shall meet the ZRX-DC parameter on the corresponding Lane on the other Pseudo Port). Each Lane operates independently and this requirement applies at all times.
- The Retimer must keep its Transmitter in Electrical Idle until the ZRX-DC condition has been detected. This applies on an individual Lane basis.

The Retimer operates in two basic modes, Forwarding mode or Execution mode. When switching between these modes the switch must occur on an Ordered Set boundary for all Lanes of the Transmitter at the same time. No other Symbols shall be between the last Ordered Set transmitted in the current mode and the first Symbol transmitted in the new mode.

When using 128b/130b or 1b/1b the Transmitter must maintain the correct scrambling seed and LFSR value when switching between modes.

When switching between Forwarding and Execution modes, the Retimer must ensure that at least 16 TS1 Ordered Sets and at most 64 TS1 Ordered Sets are transmitted between the last EIEOS transmitted in the previous mode and the first EIEOS transmitted in the new mode.

When switching to and from the Execution Link Equalization mode the Retimer must ensure a Transmitter does not send two SKP Ordered Sets in a row, and that the maximum allowed interval is not exceeded between SKP Ordered Sets, see § Section 4.2.8.4.

These rules apply when the Retimer is in Forwarding mode. The Retimer is in Forwarding mode after the deassertion of Fundamental Reset.

- If the Retimer's Receiver detects an exit from Electrical Idle on a Lane the Retimer must enter Forwarding mode and forward the Symbols on that Lane to the opposite Pseudo Port as described in § Section 4.3.6.3.

</td>
<td style="background-color:#e8e8e8">

- RT_LinkUp = 0b
- RT_number = undefined (未定义)
- RT_next_data_rate = 2.5 GT/s
- RT_error_data_rate = 2.5 GT/s
- RT_flit_mode_enabled = 0b

在 Fundamental Reset 处于有效状态期间,Retimer 的 Transmitter 和 Receiver 必须满足 § Section 4.2.5.9.1 的要求。当 Fundamental Reset 解除后,Retimer 最多可以花费 100 ms 来开始主动确定其 Receiver 阻抗。仅支持 5.0 GT/s 或更低链路速率的 Retimer 必须在 20 ms 内完成此操作。在此期间,Receiver 阻抗保持为 Fundamental Reset 期间所要求的状态。一旦该时间窗到期,Retimer 通道上的 Receiver 阻抗按下述方式确定:

- 在 Upstream 或 Downstream Port 的 Receiver 满足 ZRX-DC 参数后的 1.0 ms 内,低阻抗会被反向传播(即 Retimer 的 Receiver 必须在另一个 Pseudo Port 上对应的通道上满足 ZRX-DC 参数)。每条通道独立运行,该要求始终适用。
- Retimer 必须将其 Transmitter 保持在 Electrical Idle,直到检测到 ZRX-DC 条件。该规则按单条通道适用。

Retimer 以两种基本模式运行:Forwarding mode (转发模式) 或 Execution mode (执行模式)。在这两种模式之间切换时,必须在发送器所有通道的 Ordered Set 边界处同时发生切换。在当前模式下发送的最后一个 Ordered Set 与新模式下发送的第一个 Symbol 之间不得存在其他 Symbol。

在使用 128b/130b 或 1b/1b 编码时,Transmitter 在模式切换之间必须保持正确的加扰种子 (scrambling seed) 和 LFSR 值。

在 Forwarding mode 与 Execution mode 之间切换时,Retimer 必须确保在前一种模式下发送的最后一个 EIEOS 与新模式下发送的第一个 EIEOS 之间发送的 TS1 Ordered Set 数量不少于 16 个且不多于 64 个。

在切换进出 Execution Link Equalization mode 时,Retimer 必须确保 Transmitter 不会连续发送两个 SKP Ordered Set,并且 SKP Ordered Set 之间的最大允许间隔不被超过,详见 § Section 4.2.8.4。

这些规则在 Retimer 处于 Forwarding mode 时适用。在 Fundamental Reset 解除后,Retimer 即处于 Forwarding mode。

- 如果 Retimer 的 Receiver 在某条通道上检测到从 Electrical Idle 退出,则 Retimer 必须进入 Forwarding mode,并按 § Section 4.3.6.3 中的描述,将该通道上的 Symbols 转发到对端的 Pseudo Port。

</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

<a id="sec-4-3-4"></a>
## 4.3.4 Receiver Impedance Propagation Rules | 接收器阻抗传播规则

---

[⬆️ 返回目录](#-本章目录-table-of-contents)


---

<a id="sec-4-3-6"></a>
## 4.3.6 Forwarding Rules | 转发规则

<a id="sec-4-3-6-1"></a>
## 4.3.6.1 Forwarding Type Rules | 转发类型规则

<a id="sec-4-3-6-2"></a>
## 4.3.6.2 Orientation, Lane Numbers, and Data Stream Mode Rules | 方向、通道号与数据流模式规则


<div style="overflow-x: auto; max-width: 100%;">
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th width="50%">🇬🇧 English</th>
<th width="50%" style="background-color:#e8e8e8">🇨🇳 中文</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>

4.3.5 Switching Between Modes §

4.3.6 Forwarding Rules §

<!-- 📄 Page 619 -->
---

- The Retimer must continue to forward the received Symbols on a given Lane until it enters Execution mode or until an EIOS is received, or until Electrical Idle is inferred on that Lane. This requirement applies even if the Receiver loses Symbol lock or Block Alignment. See § Section 4.3.6.5 for rules regarding Electrical Idle entry.
- A Retimer shall forward all Symbols unchanged, except as described in § Section 4.3.6.9 and § Section 4.3.6.7.
- When operating at 64.0 GT/s data rate, a Retimer must follow the requirements of § Section 4.2.3.2 in order to identify SKP OS, EIEOS, and EIOS received.
- When operating at 2.5 GT/s data rate, if any Lane of a Pseudo Port receives TS1 Ordered Sets with Link and Lane numbers set to PAD for 5 ms or longer, and the other Pseudo Port does not detect an exit from Electrical Idle on any Lane in that same window, and either of the following occurs:
  - The following sequence occurs:
    - An EIOS is received on any Lane that was receiving TS1 Ordered Sets
    - followed by a period of Electrical Idle, for less than 5 ms
    - followed by Electrical Idle Exit that cannot be forwarded according to § Section 4.3.6.3
    - Note: this is interpreted as the Port attached to the Receiver going into Electrical Idle followed by a data rate change for a Compliance Pattern above 2.5 GT/s.
  - Compliance Pattern at 2.5 GT/s is received on any Lane that was receiving TS1 Ordered Sets.
  
  Then the Retimer enters the Execution mode CompLoadBoard state, and follows § Section 4.3.7.1.
- If any Lane on the Upstream Pseudo Port receives two consecutive TS1 Ordered Sets with the EC field equal to 10b, when using 128b/130b or 1b/1b encoding, then the Retimer enters Execution mode Equalization, and follows § Section 4.3.7.2.
- If the Retimer is configured to support Execution mode Follower Loopback and if any Lane on either Pseudo Port receives two consecutive TS1 Ordered Sets or two consecutive TS2 Ordered Sets with the Loopback bit set to 1b then the Retimer enters Execution mode Follower Loopback, and follows § Section 4.3.7.3.

A Retimer must determine what type of Symbols it is forwarding. The rules for inferring Electrical Idle are a function of the type of Symbols the Retimer is forwarding. If a Path forwards two consecutive TS1 Ordered Sets or two consecutive TS2 Ordered Sets, on any Lane, then the Path is forwarding training sets. If a Path forwards eight consecutive Symbol Times of Idle data on all Lanes that are forwarding Symbols then the Path is forwarding non-training sets. When a Retimer transitions from forwarding training sets to forwarding non-training sets, the variable RT_error_data_rate is set to 2.5 GT/s.

The Retimer must determine the Port orientation, Lane assignment, Lane polarity, and Data stream Mode dynamically as the Link trains.

- When RT_LinkUp=0, the first Pseudo Port to receive two consecutive TS1 Ordered Sets with a non-PAD Lane number on any Lane, has its RT_port_orientation variable set to Upstream Port, and the other Pseudo Port has its RT_port_orientation variable set to Downstream Port.
- The Retimer plays no active part in Lane number determination. The Retimer must capture the Lane numbers with the RT_captured_lane_number variable at the end of the Configuration state, between the Link Components. This applies on the first time through Configuration, i.e., when the RT_LinkUp variable is set to 0b. Subsequent trips through Configuration during Link width configure must not change the Lane numbers.

</td>
<td style="background-color:#e8e8e8">

4.3.5 模式切换 (Switching Between Modes) §

4.3.6 转发规则 (Forwarding Rules) §

<!-- 📄 Page 619 -->
---

- Retimer 必须持续转发某一通道 (Lane) 上接收到的符号 (Symbol)，直到进入 Execution 模式、收到 EIOS，或推断该通道进入电气空闲 (Electrical Idle)。即使接收器 (Receiver) 失去符号锁 (Symbol lock) 或块对齐 (Block Alignment)，此要求仍然适用。有关进入电气空闲的规则，请参见 § 4.3.6.5。
- Retimer 应保持原样转发所有符号，但 § 4.3.6.9 和 § 4.3.6.7 中另有说明的情况除外。
- 在 64.0 GT/s 数据率下工作时，Retimer 必须遵循 § 4.2.3.2 的要求以识别所接收的 SKP OS、EIEOS 和 EIOS。
- 在 2.5 GT/s 数据率下工作时，如果某个伪端口 (Pseudo Port) 的任意通道在 5 ms 或更长时间内接收到链路号和通道号字段为 PAD 的 TS1 有序集 (Ordered Set)，且另一个伪端口在同一时间窗内未在任何通道上检测到电气空闲退出 (Electrical Idle Exit)，并出现以下任一情况：
  - 出现以下序列：
    - 在原先接收 TS1 有序集的任意通道上收到一个 EIOS
    - 随后进入一段电气空闲状态，持续时间少于 5 ms
    - 接着出现无法按照 § 4.3.6.3 进行转发的电气空闲退出
    - 注：这被解释为连接到接收器的端口先进入电气空闲，随后切换到 2.5 GT/s 以上的一致性测试码型 (Compliance Pattern) 数据率。
  - 在原先接收 TS1 有序集的任意通道上收到 2.5 GT/s 的一致性测试码型。
  
  则 Retimer 进入 Execution 模式 CompLoadBoard 状态，并遵循 § 4.3.7.1。
- 在使用 128b/130b 或 1b/1b 编码的情况下，如果上游伪端口 (Upstream Pseudo Port) 的任意通道接收到两个连续的 EC 字段为 10b 的 TS1 有序集，则 Retimer 进入 Execution 模式 Equalization，并遵循 § 4.3.7.2。
- 如果 Retimer 配置为支持 Execution 模式 Follower Loopback，并且任一伪端口的任意通道接收到两个连续的 Loopback 位置 1 的 TS1 有序集或 TS2 有序集，则 Retimer 进入 Execution 模式 Follower Loopback，并遵循 § 4.3.7.3。

Retimer 必须确定其正在转发的符号类型。推断电气空闲的规则取决于 Retimer 正在转发的符号类型。如果某条通路 (Path) 在任意通道上转发两个连续的 TS1 有序集或两个连续的 TS2 有序集，则该通路正在转发训练序列。如果某条通路在所有正在转发符号的通道上转发八个连续的 Idle 数据符号时间，则该通路正在转发非训练序列。当 Retimer 从转发训练序列切换到转发非训练序列时，变量 RT_error_data_rate 被设置为 2.5 GT/s。

Retimer 必须在链路 (Link) 训练过程中动态地确定端口方向、通道分配、通道极性和数据流模式 (Data Stream Mode)。

- 当 RT_LinkUp=0 时，先在任意通道上接收到两个连续的、通道号非 PAD 的 TS1 有序集的伪端口，将其 RT_port_orientation 变量设置为 Upstream Port，另一个伪端口的 RT_port_orientation 变量设置为 Downstream Port。
- Retimer 不主动参与通道号的确定。Retimer 必须在两个链路组件 (Link Components) 之间的 Configuration 状态结束时，通过 RT_captured_lane_number 变量捕获通道号。这适用于第一次通过 Configuration 状态时，即 RT_LinkUp 变量被设置为 0b 的情况。在链路宽度配置期间后续通过 Configuration 状态时，不得更改通道号。

</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
</div>

<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th width="50%">🇬🇧 English</th>
<th width="50%" style="background-color:#e8e8e8">🇨🇳 中文</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>

<!-- 📄 Page 620 -->
---

Lane numbers are required for the scrambling seed when using 128b/130b or 1b/1b. Link numbers are required in some cases when the Retimer is in Execution mode. Link numbers and Lane numbers are captured with the RT_captured_lane_number, and RT_captured_link_number variables whenever the first two consecutive TS2 Ordered Sets that contain non-PAD Lane and non-PAD Link numbers are received after the RT_LinkUp variable is set to 0b. A Retimer must function normally if Lane reversal occurs. When the Retimer has captured the Lane numbers and Link numbers the RT_LinkUp variable is set to 1b. In addition, if the Disable Scrambling bit in the TS2 Ordered Sets is set to 1b, in either case above, then the Retimer determines that scrambling is disabled when using 8b/10b encoding.

- Lane polarity is determined any time the Lane exits Electrical Idle, and achieves Symbol lock at 2.5 GT/s as described in § Section 4.2.5.5:
  - If polarity inversion is determined the Receiver must invert the received data. The Transmitter must never invert the transmitted data.
- The Retimer plays an active part of Data Stream Mode determination. If the Retimer supports Flit Mode operation, for each Pseudo Port, it must capture the value of the Flit Mode Supported bit of the Data Rate Identifier field in the eight consecutive TS2 Ordered Sets received with Link and Lane numbers set to PAD when the RT_LinkUp variable is set to 0b. If the Flit Mode Supported bit is 1b in eight consecutive TS2 Ordered Sets received by both Pseudo Ports, the RT_flit_mode_enabled variable must be set to 1b and each Pseudo Port must follow Flit Mode rules (as specified in § Section 4.2) to identify transitions between Ordered Set Data and Data Streams. If the Retimer does not support Flit Mode operation, its RT_flit_mode_enabled variable must remain set to 0b and it must set bit 0 of the Data Rate Identifier (Symbol 0) to 0b in all TS Ordered Sets that it forwards (as described in § Section 4.3.6.7).
  - When using 8b/10b with Flit Mode, NOP Flits (instead of Idle data) identify the start of the data stream.
  - When using 128b/130b or 1b/1b with Flit Mode, SDS Ordered Sets identify the start of the data stream.
- The Retimer's place in the system topology is determined when eight consecutive TS2 Ordered Sets are received with (non-PAD) matching Link and Lane numbers and identical data rate identifiers. If the Retimer Present bits are set to 01b on the Upstream Pseudo Port, the RT_number must be set to 10b, otherwise RT_number must be set to 01b. The RT_number is used to determine Pseudo Ports B, C, D and E. This identification is needed for Execution Mode Follower Loopback with 1b/1b encoding.

At data rates other than 2.5 GT/s, EIEOS are sent within the training sets to ensure that the analog circuit detects an exit from Electrical Idle. Receiving an EIEOS is required when using 128b/130b or 1b/1b encoding to achieve Block Alignment. When the Retimer starts forwarding data after detecting an Electrical Idle exit, the Retimer starts transmitting on a training set boundary. The first training sets it forwards must be an EIEOS, when operating at data rates higher than 2.5 GT/s. The first EIEOS sent will be in place of the TS1 or TS2 Ordered Set that it would otherwise forward.

4.3.6.3 Electrical Idle Exit Rules | 电气空闲退出规则

If no Lanes meet ZRX-DC on a Pseudo Port, and the following sequence occurs:

- An exit from Electrical Idle is detected on any Lane of that Pseudo Port.
- And then if not all Lanes infer Electrical Idle, via absence of exit from Electrical Idle in a 12 ms window on that Pseudo Port and the other Pseudo Port is not receiving Ordered Sets on any Lane in that same 12 ms window.

Then the same Pseudo Port, where no Lanes meet ZRX-DC, sends the Electrical Idle Exit pattern described below for 5 μs on all Lanes.

If operating at 2.5 GT/s and the following occurs:

</td>
<td style="background-color:#e8e8e8">

<!-- 📄 Page 620 -->
---

在使用 128b/130b 或 1b/1b 编码时，加扰 (Scrambling) 种子需要通道号。在某些情况下，Retimer 处于 Execution 模式时需要链路号。当 RT_LinkUp 变量被设置为 0b 之后，每当接收到包含非 PAD 通道号和非 PAD 链路号的前两个连续 TS2 有序集时，链路号和通道号就通过 RT_captured_lane_number 和 RT_captured_link_number 变量被捕获。如果出现通道反转 (Lane reversal)，Retimer 必须能够正常工作。当 Retimer 捕获到通道号和链路号后，RT_LinkUp 变量被设置为 1b。此外，如果在上述任一情况下，TS2 有序集中的 Disable Scrambling 位为 1b，则 Retimer 判定在使用 8b/10b 编码时不进行加扰。

- 通道极性在通道退出电气空闲并在 2.5 GT/s 下实现符号锁时确定，详见 § 4.2.5.5：
  - 如果确定存在极性反转，则接收器必须对接收到的数据进行反转。发送器 (Transmitter) 永远不得反转所发送的数据。
- Retimer 主动参与数据流模式的确定。如果 Retimer 支持 Flit 模式 (Flit Mode) 操作，则对于每个伪端口，当 RT_LinkUp 变量被设置为 0b 时，它必须在所接收的八个连续 TS2 有序集（链路号和通道号字段为 PAD）中捕获数据率标识符字段中 Flit Mode Supported 位的值。如果两个伪端口各自接收的八个连续 TS2 有序集中 Flit Mode Supported 位均为 1b，则 RT_flit_mode_enabled 变量必须被设置为 1b，且每个伪端口必须遵循 Flit 模式规则（如 § 4.2 所规定）来识别有序集数据和数据流之间的转换。如果 Retimer 不支持 Flit 模式操作，则其 RT_flit_mode_enabled 变量必须保持为 0b，并且必须将其所转发的所有 TS 有序集的数据率标识符（Symbol 0）bit 0 设置为 0b（详见 § 4.3.6.7）。
  - 在 8b/10b 编码下使用 Flit 模式时，NOP Flit（而不是 Idle 数据）标识数据流的开始。
  - 在 128b/130b 或 1b/1b 编码下使用 Flit 模式时，SDS 有序集标识数据流的开始。
- 当收到八个连续的、链路号和通道号（非 PAD）相匹配且数据率标识符相同的 TS2 有序集时，便确定了 Retimer 在系统拓扑中的位置。如果上游伪端口上的 Retimer Present 位为 01b，则 RT_number 必须被设置为 10b，否则 RT_number 必须被设置为 01b。RT_number 用于确定伪端口 B、C、D 和 E。该标识在 1b/1b 编码下进行 Execution 模式 Follower Loopback 时是必需的。

在 2.5 GT/s 以外的数据率下，训练序列中会发送 EIEOS，以确保模拟电路能够检测到电气空闲退出。使用 128b/130b 或 1b/1b 编码时，接收 EIEOS 是实现块对齐 (Block Alignment) 的必要条件。当 Retimer 在检测到电气空闲退出后开始转发数据时，Retimer 在训练集边界开始发送。在高于 2.5 GT/s 的数据率下工作时，其转发的第一个训练集必须是 EIEOS。第一个 EIEOS 将替代原本转发的 TS1 或 TS2 有序集。

4.3.6.3 电气空闲退出规则 (Electrical Idle Exit Rules) | 电气空闲退出规则

如果某伪端口上没有任何通道满足 ZRX-DC，且出现以下序列：

- 在该伪端口的任意通道上检测到电气空闲退出。
- 随后，如果在 12 ms 时间窗内并非所有通道都通过"未出现电气空闲退出"而推断为电气空闲，且另一个伪端口在同一 12 ms 时间窗内未在任何通道上接收到有序集。

则同一伪端口（其上没有任何通道满足 ZRX-DC）在所有通道上发送下述电气空闲退出码型，持续 5 μs。

如果工作在 2.5 GT/s 且出现以下情况：

</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

<div style="overflow-x: auto; max-width: 100%;">
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th width="50%">🇬🇧 English</th>
<th width="50%" style="background-color:#e8e8e8">🇨🇳 中文</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>

<!-- 📄 Page 621 -->
---

- any Lane detects an exit from Electrical Idle
- and then receives two consecutive TS1 Ordered Sets with Lane and Link numbers equal to PAD
- and the other Pseudo Port is not receiving Ordered Sets on any Lane

Then Receiver Detection is performed on all Lanes of the Pseudo Port that is not receiving Ordered Sets. If no Receivers were detected then:

- The result is back propagated as described in § Section 4.3.4, within 1.0 ms.
- The same Pseudo Port that received the TS1 Ordered Sets with Lane and Link numbers equal to PAD, sends the Electrical Idle Exit pattern described below for 5 μs on all Lanes.

If a Lane detects an exit from Electrical Idle then the Lane must start forwarding when all of the following are true:

- Data rate is determined, see § Section 4.3.6.4, current data rate is changed to RT_next_data_rate if required.
- Lane polarity is determined, see § Section 4.3.6.2.
- Two consecutive TS1 Ordered Sets or two consecutive TS2 Ordered Sets are received.
- Two consecutive TS1 Ordered Sets or two consecutive TS2 Ordered Sets are received on all Lanes that detected an exit from Electrical Idle or the max Retimer Exit Latency has occurred, see § Table 4-64.
- Lane De-skew is achieved on all Lanes that received two consecutive TS1 or two consecutive TS2 Ordered Sets.
- If a data rate change has occurred then 6 μs has elapsed since Electrical Idle Exit was detected.

All Ordered Sets used to establish forwarding must be discarded. Only Lanes that have detected a Receiver on the other Pseudo Port, as described in § Section 4.3.4, are considered for forwarding.

Otherwise after a 3.0 ms timeout, if the other Pseudo Port is not receiving Ordered Sets then Receiver Detection is performed on all Lanes of the Pseudo Port that is not receiving Ordered Sets, the result is back propagated as described in § Section 4.3.4, and if no Receivers were detected:

- Then the same Pseudo Port that was unable to receive two consecutive TS1 or TS2 Ordered Sets on any Lane sends the Electrical Idle Exit pattern described below for 5 μs on all Lanes.
- Else the Electrical Idle Exit pattern described below is forwarded on all Lanes that detected an exit from Electrical Idle.
- When using 8b/10b encoding:
  - The Modified Compliance Pattern with the error status Symbol set to 00h.
- When using 128b/130b encoding:
  - One EIEOS or one EIEOSQ (recommended).
  - 32 Data Blocks, each with a payload of 16 Idle data Symbols (00h), scrambled, for Symbols 0 to 13.
  - Symbol 14 and 15 of each Data Block either contain Idle data Symbols (00h), scrambled, or DC Balance, determined by applying the same rules in § Section 4.2.5.1 to these Data Blocks.
- When using 1b/1b encoding:
  - Four consecutive EIEOS, uninterrupted by any other Ordered Set including the Control SKP Ordered Set.
  - 32 Data Blocks, each with a payload of 16 Idle data Symbols (00h), scrambled, for Symbols 0-6, 8-14.
  - Symbol 7 and 15 of each Data Block either contain Idle data Symbols (00h), scrambled, or DC Balance, determined by applying the same rules in § Section 4.2.5.1 to these Data Blocks.

</td>
<td style="background-color:#e8e8e8">

<!-- 📄 Page 621 -->
---

- 任意通道检测到电气空闲退出
- 随后接收到两个连续的、通道号和链路号等于 PAD 的 TS1 有序集
- 且另一个伪端口未在任何通道上接收到有序集

则对未接收到有序集的伪端口的所有通道执行接收器检测 (Receiver Detection)。如果未检测到任何接收器，则：

- 该结果在 1.0 ms 内按照 § 4.3.4 所述进行反向传播。
- 同一伪端口（即接收到通道号和链路号等于 PAD 的 TS1 有序集的伪端口）在所有通道上发送下述电气空闲退出码型，持续 5 μs。

如果某通道检测到电气空闲退出，则必须满足以下所有条件后该通道才能开始转发：

- 数据率已确定（参见 § 4.3.6.4），如需要，当前数据率切换为 RT_next_data_rate。
- 通道极性已确定（参见 § 4.3.6.2）。
- 已接收到两个连续的 TS1 有序集或两个连续的 TS2 有序集。
- 在所有检测到电气空闲退出的通道上都已接收到两个连续的 TS1 有序集或两个连续的 TS2 有序集，或者已达到最大 Retimer 退出延迟（参见 § 表 4-64）。
- 在已接收到两个连续的 TS1 或 TS2 有序集的所有通道上完成通道间去偏斜 (Lane De-skew)。
- 如果发生了数据率切换，则自检测到电气空闲退出起已过去 6 μs。

用于建立转发的所有有序集必须被丢弃。只有在另一个伪端口上检测到接收器的通道（参见 § 4.3.4）才会被纳入转发考虑。

否则，在 3.0 ms 超时之后，如果另一个伪端口仍未在接收有序集，则对未接收到有序集的伪端口的所有通道执行接收器检测，结果按 § 4.3.4 所述进行反向传播，且如果未检测到任何接收器：

- 则同一伪端口（即在任意通道上都未接收到两个连续的 TS1 或 TS2 有序集的伪端口）在所有通道上发送下述电气空闲退出码型，持续 5 μs。
- 否则，将下述电气空闲退出码型在所有检测到电气空闲退出的通道上进行转发。
- 在使用 8b/10b 编码时：
  - 错误状态符号 (error status Symbol) 设置为 00h 的 Modified Compliance Pattern。
- 在使用 128b/130b 编码时：
  - 一个 EIEOS 或一个 EIEOSQ（推荐）。
  - 32 个数据块，每个数据块的有效载荷为 16 个经加扰的 Idle 数据符号 (00h)，对应符号 0 到 13。
  - 每个数据块的符号 14 和 15 既可包含经加扰的 Idle 数据符号 (00h)，也可为 DC Balance，由对数据块应用 § 4.2.5.1 的相同规则来确定。
- 在使用 1b/1b 编码时：
  - 四个连续的 EIEOS，其间不被任何其他有序集（包括 Control SKP 有序集）打断。
  - 32 个数据块，每个数据块的有效载荷为 16 个经加扰的 Idle 数据符号 (00h)，对应符号 0-6、8-14。
  - 每个数据块的符号 7 和 15 既可包含经加扰的 Idle 数据符号 (00h)，也可为 DC Balance，由对数据块应用 § 4.2.5.1 的相同规则来确定。

</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
