<!-- 📄 Page 634 -->
---

<a id="sec-4-3-6-15"></a>
## 4.3.6.15 Enter Compliance Rules | 进入一致性规则


<div style="overflow-x: auto; max-width: 100%;">
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th width="50%">🇬🇧 English</th>
<th width="50%" style="background-color:#e8e8e8">🇨🇳 中文</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>

The Retimer follows these additional rules if the Retimer is exiting Electrical Idle after entering Electrical Idle as a result of Hot Reset, and the Retimer Enter Compliance bit is Set in the Retimer. The purpose of the following rules is to support Link operation with a Retimer when the Link partners enter compliance as a result of the Enter Compliance bit in the Link Control 2 Register set to 1b in both Link Components and a Hot Reset occurring on the Link. Retimers do not support Link operation if the Link partners enter compliance when they exit detect if the entry into detect was not caused by a Hot Reset.

Retimers must support the following register fields in an implementation specific manner:

- **Retimer Target Link Speed**
  - One field per Retimer
  - Type = RWS
  - Size = 3 bits
  - Default = 001b
  - Encoding:
    - 001b = 2.5 GT/s
    - 010b = 5.0 GT/s
    - 011b = 8.0 GT/s
    - 100b = 16.0 GT/s
    - 101b = 32.0 GT/s
    - 110b = 64.0 GT/s

- **Retimer Transmit Margin**
  - One field per Pseudo Port
  - Type = RWS
  - Size = 3 bits
  - Default = 000b
  - Encoding:
    - 000b = Normal Operating Range
    - 001b-111b = As defined in § Section 8.3.4, not all encodings are required to be implemented

- **Retimer Enter Compliance**
  - One bit per Retimer
  - Type = RWS
  - Size = 1 bit
  - Default = 0b
  - Encoding:
    - 0b = do not enter compliance
    - 1b = enter compliance

- **Retimer Enter Modified Compliance**
  - One bit per Retimer
  - Type = RWS
  - Size = 1 bit
  - Default = 0b
  - Encoding:
    - 0b = do not enter modified compliance
    - 1b = enter modified compliance

- **Retimer Compliance SOS**
  - One bit per Retimer
  - Type = RWS
  - Size = 1 bit
  - Default = 0b
  - Encoding:
    - 0b = Send no SKP Ordered Sets between sequences when sending the Compliance Pattern or Modified Compliance Pattern with 8b/10b encoding.
    - 1b = Send two SKP Ordered Sets between sequences when sending the Compliance Pattern or Modified Compliance Pattern with 8b/10b encoding.

- **Retimer Compliance Preset/De-emphasis**
  - One field per Pseudo Port
  - Type = RWS
  - Size = 4 bits
  - Default = 0000b
  - Encoding when Retimer Target Link Speed is 5.0 GT/s:
    - 0000b -6.0 dB
    - 0001b -3.5 dB
  - Encoding when Retimer Target Link Speed is 8.0 GT/s or higher: the Transmitter Preset.

A Retimer must examine the values in the above registers when the Retimer exits from Hot Reset. If the Retimer Enter Compliance bit is Set the following rules apply:

- The Retimer adjusts its data rate as defined by Retimer Target Link Speed. No data is forwarded until the data rate change has occurred.
- The Retimer configures its Transmitters according to Retimer Compliance Preset/De-emphasis on a per Pseudo Port basis.
- The Retimer must forward the Compliance or Modified Compliance Pattern when it has locked to the pattern. The Retimer must search for the Compliance Pattern if the Retimer Enter Modified Compliance bit is Clear or search for the Modified Compliance Pattern if the Retimer Enter Modified Compliance bit is Set. This occurs independently on each Lane in each direction.
- When using 8b/10b encoding, a particular Lane's Receiver independently determines a successful lock to the incoming Modified Compliance Pattern or Compliance Pattern by looking for any one occurrence of the Modified Compliance Pattern or Compliance Pattern.
  - An occurrence is defined above as the sequence of 8b/10b Symbols defined in § Section 4.2.9.
  - In the case of the Modified Compliance Pattern, the error status Symbols are not to be used for the lock process since they are undefined at any given moment.

</td>
<td style="background-color:#e8e8e8">

如果 Retimer 正在退出电气空闲（该电气空闲由热复位 Hot Reset 导致），并且 Retimer Enter Compliance 位在 Retimer 中被置位，则 Retimer 须遵循以下附加规则。以下规则的目的是在两个链路组件（Link Components）的 Link Control 2 寄存器中 Enter Compliance 位被置 1b，且链路上发生热复位而导致链路合作伙伴进入一致性时，支持带 Retimer 的链路操作。如果链路合作伙伴在退出 Detect 时进入一致性（且进入 Detect 不是由热复位引起的），则 Retimer 不支持链路操作。

Retimer 必须以实现特定的方式支持以下寄存器字段：

- **Retimer Target Link Speed（Retimer 目标链路速度）**
  - 每个 Retimer 一个字段
  - Type = RWS
  - Size = 3 bits
  - Default = 001b
  - 编码：
    - 001b = 2.5 GT/s
    - 010b = 5.0 GT/s
    - 011b = 8.0 GT/s
    - 100b = 16.0 GT/s
    - 101b = 32.0 GT/s
    - 110b = 64.0 GT/s

- **Retimer Transmit Margin（Retimer 发送裕量）**
  - 每个伪端口一个字段
  - Type = RWS
  - Size = 3 bits
  - Default = 000b
  - 编码：
    - 000b = 正常工作范围（Normal Operating Range）
    - 001b-111b = 如 § 8.3.4 节所定义，并非所有编码都需要实现

- **Retimer Enter Compliance（Retimer 进入一致性）**
  - 每个 Retimer 一位
  - Type = RWS
  - Size = 1 bit
  - Default = 0b
  - 编码：
    - 0b = 不进入一致性
    - 1b = 进入一致性

- **Retimer Enter Modified Compliance（Retimer 进入修改一致性）**
  - 每个 Retimer 一位
  - Type = RWS
  - Size = 1 bit
  - Default = 0b
  - 编码：
    - 0b = 不进入修改一致性
    - 1b = 进入修改一致性

- **Retimer Compliance SOS（Retimer 一致性 SKP 有序集）**
  - 每个 Retimer 一位
  - Type = RWS
  - Size = 1 bit
  - Default = 0b
  - 编码：
    - 0b = 在以 8b/10b 编码发送 Compliance Pattern 或 Modified Compliance Pattern 时，序列之间不发送 SKP 有序集。
    - 1b = 在以 8b/10b 编码发送 Compliance Pattern 或 Modified Compliance Pattern 时，序列之间发送两个 SKP 有序集。

- **Retimer Compliance Preset/De-emphasis（Retimer 一致性预设/去加重）**
  - 每个伪端口一个字段
  - Type = RWS
  - Size = 4 bits
  - Default = 0000b
  - 当 Retimer Target Link Speed 为 5.0 GT/s 时的编码：
    - 0000b -6.0 dB
    - 0001b -3.5 dB
  - 当 Retimer Target Link Speed 为 8.0 GT/s 或更高时的编码：发送器预设（Transmitter Preset）。

当 Retimer 从热复位退出时，Retimer 必须检查上述寄存器中的值。如果 Retimer Enter Compliance 位被置位，则适用以下规则：

- Retimer 按 Retimer Target Link Speed 所定义调整其数据速率。在数据速率更改完成之前不转发任何数据。
- Retimer 在每个伪端口上按 Retimer Compliance Preset/De-emphasis 配置其发送器。
- Retimer 在锁定到该码型后必须转发 Compliance Pattern 或 Modified Compliance Pattern。如果 Retimer Enter Modified Compliance 位被清零，则 Retimer 必须搜索 Compliance Pattern；如果 Retimer Enter Modified Compliance 位被置位，则搜索 Modified Compliance Pattern。这在每个方向的每个 Lane 上独立发生。
- 当使用 8b/10b 编码工作时，特定 Lane 的接收器通过查找 Modified Compliance Pattern 或 Compliance Pattern 的任一出现来独立确定对传入码型的成功锁定。
  - 如上所定义，一次出现即 § 4.2.9 节中定义的 8b/10b 符号序列。
  - 对于 Modified Compliance Pattern，错误状态符号不应用于锁定过程，因为它们在任一时刻都是未定义的。

</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
</div>


[⬆️ 返回目录](#-本章目录-table-of-contents)

---

<!-- 📄 Page 635 -->
---

<a id="sec-4-3-6-15-cont"></a>
## 4.3.6.15 Enter Compliance Rules (continued) | 进入一致性规则（续）

<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th width="50%">🇬🇧 English</th>
<th width="50%" style="background-color:#e8e8e8">🇨🇳 中文</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>

- Lock must be achieved within 1.0 ms of receiving the Modified Compliance Pattern.
- When using 128b/130b or 1b/1b encoding each Lane determines Pattern Lock independently when it achieves Block Alignment as described in § Section 4.2.2.2.1.
  - Lock must be achieved within 1.5 ms of receiving the Modified Compliance Pattern or Compliance Pattern.
- When 128b/130b or 1b/1b encoding is used, Symbols with errors are forwarded unmodified by default, or may optionally be corrected to remove error pollution. The default behavior must be supported and the method of selecting the optional behavior, if supported, is implementation specific.
- When 8b/10b encoding is used, Symbols with errors are replaced with the D21.3 Symbol with incorrect disparity by default, or may optionally be corrected to remove error pollution. The default behavior must be supported.
- Once locked, the Retimer keeps an internal count of received Symbol errors, on a per-Lane basis. If the Retimer is forwarding the Modified Compliance Pattern then the error status Symbol when using 8b/10b encoding or the Error_Status field when using 128b/130b encoding is forwarded unmodified by default, or may optionally be redefined as it is transmitted by the Retimer. The default behavior must be supported and the method of selecting the optional behavior, if supported, is implementation specific. The Retimer is permitted to make the pattern lock and Lane error information available in an implementation specific manner, on a per-Lane basis.
- If an EIOS is received on any Lane then:
  - All Lanes in that direction transmit 8 EIOS and then all Transmitters in that direction are placed in Electrical Idle.
  - When both directions have sent 8 EIOS and placed their Transmitters in Electrical Idle the data rate is changed to 2.5 GT/s.
  - Set the RT_next_data_rate variable to 2.5 GT/s.
  - Set the RT_error_data_rate variable to 2.5 GT/s.
  - The Retimer Enter Compliance bit and Retimer Enter Modified Compliance bit are both set to 0b.
  - The above additional rules no longer apply unless the rules for entering this section and clause are met again.

In Execution mode, Retimers directly control all information transmitted by the Pseudo Ports rather than forwarding information.

While the Retimer is in the CompLoadBoard (Compliance Load Board) state both Pseudo Ports are executing the protocol as regular Ports, generating Symbols as specified in the following sub-sections on each Port, rather than forwarding from one Pseudo Port to the other.

</td>
<td style="background-color:#e8e8e8">

- 必须在接收到 Modified Compliance Pattern 后的 1.0 ms 内实现锁定。
- 当使用 128b/130b 或 1b/1b 编码工作时，每个 Lane 在按 § 4.2.2.2.1 节所述实现块对齐时独立确定码型锁定（Pattern Lock）。
  - 必须在接收到 Modified Compliance Pattern 或 Compliance Pattern 后的 1.5 ms 内实现锁定。
- 当使用 128b/130b 或 1b/1b 编码时，默认情况下，带错误的符号未经修改即被转发，或者可选地被纠正以消除错误污染。必须支持默认行为；如果支持可选行为，则选择该行为的方法是实现特定的。
- 当使用 8b/10b 编码时，默认情况下，带错误的符号被替换为具有错误不一致性的 D21.3 符号，或者可选地被纠正以消除错误污染。必须支持默认行为。
- 一旦锁定，Retimer 在每个 Lane 的基础上保留对已接收符号错误的内部计数。如果 Retimer 正在转发 Modified Compliance Pattern，则在使用 8b/10b 编码时，错误状态符号；或在使用 128b/130b 编码时，Error_Status 字段；默认情况下未经修改即被转发，或者可选地在 Retimer 发送时重新定义。必须支持默认行为；如果支持可选行为，则选择该行为的方法是实现特定的。Retimer 允许以实现特定的方式、按每个 Lane 提供码型锁定状态和 Lane 错误信息。
- 如果任一 Lane 接收到 EIOS，则：
  - 该方向上的所有 Lane 发送 8 个 EIOS，然后将该方向上的所有发送器置入电气空闲。
  - 当两个方向都已发送 8 个 EIOS 并将发送器置入电气空闲时，将数据速率更改为 2.5 GT/s。
  - 将 RT_next_data_rate 变量设置为 2.5 GT/s。
  - 将 RT_error_data_rate 变量设置为 2.5 GT/s。
  - Retimer Enter Compliance 位和 Retimer Enter Modified Compliance 位都被清零为 0b。
  - 除非再次满足进入本节和本条款的规则，否则上述附加规则不再适用。

在执行模式（Execution mode）下，Retimer 直接控制由伪端口传输的所有信息，而不是转发信息。

当 Retimer 处于 CompLoadBoard（Compliance Load Board，一致性负载板）状态时，两个伪端口都作为常规端口执行协议，按以下各小节中每个端口所规定的方式生成符号，而不是从一个伪端口向另一个伪端口转发。

</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

[⬆️ 返回目录](#-本章目录-table-of-contents)

---

<!-- 📄 Page 636 -->
---


---

4.3.7 Execution Mode Rules §
4.3.7.1 CompLoadBoard Rules §

<!-- 📄 Page 637 -->
---

<a id="sec-4-3-7"></a>
## 4.3.7 Execution Mode Rules | 执行模式规则


<div style="overflow-x: auto; max-width: 100%;">
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th width="50%">🇬🇧 English</th>
<th width="50%" style="background-color:#e8e8e8">🇨🇳 中文</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>

Execution Mode Rules.

CompLoadBoard Rules.

- RT_LinkUp = 0b.
- The Pseudo Port that received Compliance Pattern (Pseudo Port A) does the following:
  - The data rate remains at 2.5 GT/s.
  - The Transmitter is placed in Electrical Idle.
  - The Receiver ignores incoming Symbols.
- The other Pseudo Port (Pseudo Port B) does the following:
  - The data rate remains at 2.5 GT/s.
  - The Transmitter is placed in Electrical Idle. Receiver Detection is performed on all Lanes as described in § Section 8.4.5.7.
  - The Receiver ignores incoming Symbols.
- If Pseudo Port B's Receiver Detection determines there are no Receivers attached on any Lanes, then the next state for both Pseudo Ports is CompLoadBoard.Exit.
- Else the next state for both Pseudo Ports is CompLoadBoard.Pattern.

</td>
<td style="background-color:#e8e8e8">

执行模式 (Execution Mode) 规则。

CompLoadBoard (一致性测试负载板) 规则。

- RT_LinkUp = 0b。
- 收到 Compliance Pattern (一致性测试码型) 的 Pseudo Port (Pseudo Port A) 执行以下操作：
  - 数据速率保持在 2.5 GT/s。
  - 发送器 (Transmitter) 进入 Electrical Idle (电气空闲)。
  - 接收器 (Receiver) 忽略收到的 Symbols (符号)。
- 另一个 Pseudo Port (Pseudo Port B) 执行以下操作：
  - 数据速率保持在 2.5 GT/s。
  - 发送器 (Transmitter) 进入 Electrical Idle (电气空闲)。按 § Section 8.4.5.7 所述在所有 Lane (通道) 上执行 Receiver Detection (接收器检测)。
  - 接收器 (Receiver) 忽略收到的 Symbols (符号)。
- 若 Pseudo Port B 的 Receiver Detection (接收器检测) 判定任何 Lane (通道) 上都没有连接的接收器，则两个 Pseudo Port 的下一状态均为 CompLoadBoard.Exit。
- 否则两个 Pseudo Port 的下一状态均为 CompLoadBoard.Pattern。

</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
</div>


[⬆️ 返回目录](#-本章目录-table-of-contents)

---

<a id="sec-4-3-7-1-1"></a>
## 4.3.7.1.1 CompLoadBoard.Entry | CompLoadBoard.Entry 状态

<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th width="50%">🇬🇧 English</th>
<th width="50%" style="background-color:#e8e8e8">🇨🇳 中文</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>

When The Retimer enters CompLoadBoard.Pattern the following occur:

- Pseudo Port A does the following:
  - The Transmitter remains in Electrical Idle.
  - The Receiver ignores incoming Symbols.
- Pseudo Port B does the following:
  - The Transmitter sends out the Compliance Pattern on all Lanes that detected a Receiver at the data rate and de-emphasis/preset level determined as described in § Section 4.2.7.2.2, (i.e., each consecutive entry into CompLoadBoard advances the pattern), except that the Setting is not set to Setting #1 during Polling.Configuration. Setting #26 and later are not used if Pseudo Port B has received a TS1 or TS2 Ordered Set (or their complement) since the exit of Fundamental Reset. If the new data rate is not 2.5 GT/s, the Transmitter is placed in Electrical Idle prior to the data rate change. The period of Electrical Idle must be greater than 1 ms but it is not to exceed 2 ms.
- If Pseudo Port B detects an Electrical Idle exit of any Lane that detected a Receiver, then the next state for both Pseudo Ports is CompLoadBoard.Exit.

> **IMPLEMENTATION NOTE:**
> **PASSIVE LOAD ON TRANSMITTER**
> This state is entered when a passive load is placed on one Pseudo Port, and the other Pseudo Port is receiving traffic.

</td>
<td style="background-color:#e8e8e8">

当 Retimer (重定时器) 进入 CompLoadBoard.Pattern 时发生以下情况：

- Pseudo Port A 执行以下操作：
  - 发送器 (Transmitter) 保持在 Electrical Idle (电气空闲)。
  - 接收器 (Receiver) 忽略收到的 Symbols (符号)。
- Pseudo Port B 执行以下操作：
  - 发送器 (Transmitter) 按 § Section 4.2.7.2.2 中确定的数据速率与去加重 (de-emphasis) / 预设 (preset) 等级，在所有检测到 Receiver (接收器) 的 Lane (通道) 上发出 Compliance Pattern (一致性测试码型)（即每次连续进入 CompLoadBoard 都会推进码型），但 Polling.Configuration 期间 Setting 不设为 Setting #1。若 Pseudo Port B 在退出 Fundamental Reset (基本复位) 之后收到过 TS1 或 TS2 Ordered Set (训练序列有序集)（或其补码），则不使用 Setting #26 及之后。若新数据速率不是 2.5 GT/s，则发送器在数据速率变更之前先进入 Electrical Idle。Electrical Idle 持续时间必须大于 1 ms 且不超过 2 ms。
- 若 Pseudo Port B 在任何检测到 Receiver (接收器) 的 Lane 上检测到 Electrical Idle 退出，则两个 Pseudo Port 的下一状态均为 CompLoadBoard.Exit。

> **实现说明 (IMPLEMENTATION NOTE)：**
> **发送器上的被动负载 (PASSIVE LOAD ON TRANSMITTER)**
> 当一个 Pseudo Port 上接有被动负载、而另一个 Pseudo Port 正在接收流量时，会进入此状态。

</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

[⬆️ 返回目录](#-本章目录-table-of-contents)

---

<a id="sec-4-3-7-1-2"></a>
## 4.3.7.1.2 CompLoadBoard.Pattern | CompLoadBoard.Pattern 状态

<!-- 📄 Page 638 -->
---


<div style="overflow-x: auto; max-width: 100%;">
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th width="50%">🇬🇧 English</th>
<th width="50%" style="background-color:#e8e8e8">🇨🇳 中文</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>

When The Retimer enters CompLoadBoard.Exit the following occur:

- The Pseudo Port A:
  - Data rate remains at 2.5 GT/s.
  - The Transmitter sends the Electrical Idle Exit pattern described in § Section 4.3.6.3, on the Lane(s) where Electrical Idle exit was detected on Pseudo Port B for 1 ms. Then the Transmitter is placed in Electrical Idle.
  - The Receiver ignores incoming Symbols.
- Pseudo Port B:
  - If the Transmitter is transmitting at a rate other than 2.5 GT/s the Transmitter sends eight consecutive EIOS.
  - The Transmitter is placed in Electrical Idle. If the Transmitter was transmitting at a rate other than 2.5 GT/s the period of Electrical Idle must be at least 1.0 ms.
  - Data rate is changed to 2.5 GT/s, if not already at 2.5 GT/s.
- Both Pseudo Ports are placed in Forwarding mode.

When in the Execution mode performing Link Equalization, the Pseudo Ports act as regular Ports, generating Symbols on each Port rather than forwarding from one Pseudo Port to the other. When the Retimer is in Execution mode it must use the Lane and Link numbers stored in RT_captured_lane_number and RT_captured_link_number.

This mode is entered while the Upstream and Downstream Ports on the Link are in negotiation to enter Phase 2 of the Equalization procedure following the procedure for switching to Execution mode described in § Section 4.3.5.

</td>
<td style="background-color:#e8e8e8">

当 Retimer (重定时器) 进入 CompLoadBoard.Exit 时发生以下情况：

- Pseudo Port A：
  - 数据速率保持在 2.5 GT/s。
  - 发送器 (Transmitter) 在 Pseudo Port B 上检测到 Electrical Idle 退出的那些 Lane (通道) 上，按 § Section 4.3.6.3 所述发送 Electrical Idle Exit (电气空闲退出) 码型，持续 1 ms；之后发送器进入 Electrical Idle。
  - 接收器 (Receiver) 忽略收到的 Symbols (符号)。
- Pseudo Port B：
  - 若发送器正以 2.5 GT/s 之外的速率发送，则发送八个连续的 EIOS (电气空闲有序集)。
  - 发送器 (Transmitter) 进入 Electrical Idle。若发送器原本以 2.5 GT/s 之外的速率发送，则 Electrical Idle 持续时间必须至少为 1.0 ms。
  - 若数据速率原本不是 2.5 GT/s，则将其变更为 2.5 GT/s。
- 两个 Pseudo Port 均进入 Forwarding mode (转发模式)。

在 Execution mode (执行模式) 下进行 Link Equalization (链路均衡) 时，Pseudo Port 表现得如同普通 Port (端口)，在每个 Port 上生成 Symbols (符号)，而不是从一个 Pseudo Port 转发到另一个。当 Retimer 处于 Execution mode 时，必须使用存储在 RT_captured_lane_number 与 RT_captured_link_number 中的 Lane 与 Link 编号。

当链路上 Upstream Port (上游端口) 与 Downstream Port (下游端口) 正在协商进入 Equalization (均衡) 流程的 Phase 2 时，会按 § Section 4.3.5 所述切换到 Execution mode 的流程进入本模式。

</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
</div>


[⬆️ 返回目录](#-本章目录-table-of-contents)

---

<a id="sec-4-3-7-1-3"></a>
## 4.3.7.1.3 CompLoadBoard.Exit | CompLoadBoard.Exit 状态

<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th width="50%">🇬🇧 English</th>
<th width="50%" style="background-color:#e8e8e8">🇨🇳 中文</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>

> **IMPLEMENTATION NOTE:**
> **TS1 ORDERED SETS IN FORWARDING MODE**
> Once in Forwarding mode one of two things will likely occur:
> - TS1 Ordered Sets are received and forwarded from Pseudo Port's B Receiver to Pseudo Port's A Transmitter. Link training continues.
> - Or: TS1 Ordered Sets are not received because 100 MHz pulses are being received on a lane from the compliance load board, advancing the Compliance Pattern. In this case the Retimer must transition from Forwarding mode to CompLoadBoard when the device attached to Pseudo Port A times out from Polling.Active to Polling.Compliance. The Retimer advances the Compliance Pattern on each entry to CompLoadBoard.

</td>
<td style="background-color:#e8e8e8">

> **实现说明 (IMPLEMENTATION NOTE)：**
> **转发模式下的 TS1 有序集 (TS1 ORDERED SETS IN FORWARDING MODE)**
> 进入 Forwarding mode (转发模式) 后，通常会发生以下两种情况之一：
> - TS1 Ordered Sets 从 Pseudo Port B 的 Receiver (接收器) 收到并被转发到 Pseudo Port A 的 Transmitter (发送器)。链路训练继续进行。
> - 或者：因通道上从 compliance load board (一致性测试负载板) 收到 100 MHz 脉冲而未收到 TS1 Ordered Sets，Compliance Pattern (一致性测试码型) 持续推进。此时当连接到 Pseudo Port A 的设备从 Polling.Active 超时转入 Polling.Compliance 时，Retimer 必须从 Forwarding mode 切换到 CompLoadBoard。每次进入 CompLoadBoard 时，Retimer 都会推进 Compliance Pattern。

</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

[⬆️ 返回目录](#-本章目录-table-of-contents)

---

<a id="sec-4-3-7-2"></a>
## 4.3.7.2 Link Equalization Rules | 链路均衡规则

<!-- 📄 Page 639 -->
---


<div style="overflow-x: auto; max-width: 100%;">
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th width="50%">🇬🇧 English</th>
<th width="50%" style="background-color:#e8e8e8">🇨🇳 中文</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>

The LF and FS values received in two consecutive TS0 or TS1 Ordered Sets when the Upstream Port is in Phase 1 must be stored for use during Phase 3, if the Downstream Pseudo Port wants to adjust the Upstream Port's Transmitter.

Transmitter behaves as described in § Section 4.2.7.4.2.1.1 except as follows:

- If the data rate of operation is 64.0 GT/s or above, the Retimer Equalization Extend bit of the transmitted TS0 Ordered Sets is set to 1b when the Upstream Pseudo Port state is Phase 0. The EC field is initially set to 00b. After two consecutive TS0 Ordered Sets are received with Retimer Equalization Extend bit set to 0b, the EC field is set to 01b. The Retimer Equalization Extend bit of the transmitted TS0 Ordered Sets it is set to 0b when the Upstream Pseudo Port state is Phase 1. The 24 ms timeout is decreased to 22 ms.

Transmitter behaves as described in § Section 4.2.7.4.2.1.2 except as follows:

- If the data rate of operation is 16.0 GT/s or above, the Retimer Equalization Extend bit of the transmitted TS1 Ordered Sets is set to 1b when the Upstream Pseudo Port state is Phase 2 Active, and it is set to 0b when the Upstream Pseudo Port state is Phase 2 Passive.
- Next phase is Phase 3 Active if all configured Lanes receive two consecutive TS1 Ordered Sets with EC=11b.
- Else, if the data rate of operation is less than 64.0 GT/s: next state is Force Timeout after a 32 ms timeout with a tolerance of -0 ms and +4 ms.
- Else, if the data rate of operation is 64.0 GT/s: next state is Force Timeout after a 64 ms timeout with a tolerance of -0 ms and +4 ms.

If the data rate of operation is 8.0 GT/s then the transmitter behaves as described in § Section 4.2.7.4.2.1.3 except the 24 ms timeout is 2.5 ms and as follows:

- Next phase is Phase 3 Passive if all configured Lanes are operating at their optimal settings.
- Else, next state is Force Timeout after a timeout of 2.5 ms with a tolerance of -0 ms and +0.1 ms

If the data rate of operation is 16.0 GT/s or 32.0 GT/s then the transmitter behaves as described in § Section 4.2.7.4.2.1.3 except the 24 ms timeout is 22 ms and as follows:

- The Retimer Equalization Extend bit of transmitted TS0 or TS1 Ordered Sets is set to 0b.
- Next phase is Phase 3 Passive if all configured Lanes are operating at their optimal settings and all configured Lanes receive two consecutive TS1 Ordered Sets with the Retimer Equalization Extend bit set to 0b.
- Else, next state is Force Timeout after a timeout of 22 ms with a tolerance of -0 ms and +1.0 ms.

If the data rate of operation is 64.0 GT/s then the transmitter behaves as described in § Section 4.2.7.4.2.1.3 except the 48 ms timeout is 46 ms and as follows:

</td>
<td style="background-color:#e8e8e8">

当 Upstream Port (上游端口) 处于 Phase 1 时，若在两个连续的 TS0 或 TS1 Ordered Sets (训练序列有序集) 中收到 LF 与 FS 值，则必须保存这些值以便 Phase 3 使用，前提是 Downstream Pseudo Port (下游伪端口) 想要调整 Upstream Port 的 Transmitter (发送器)。

发送器 (Transmitter) 行为如 § Section 4.2.7.4.2.1.1 所述，但有以下例外：

- 若工作数据速率为 64.0 GT/s 或更高，则当 Upstream Pseudo Port 状态为 Phase 0 时，所发 TS0 Ordered Sets 的 Retimer Equalization Extend (重定时器均衡扩展) 位置为 1b。EC 字段初始为 00b。在连续收到两个 Retimer Equalization Extend 位置为 0b 的 TS0 Ordered Sets 后，EC 字段置为 01b。当 Upstream Pseudo Port 状态为 Phase 1 时，所发 TS0 Ordered Sets 的 Retimer Equalization Extend 位置为 0b。24 ms 超时缩短为 22 ms。

发送器 (Transmitter) 行为如 § Section 4.2.7.4.2.1.2 所述，但有以下例外：

- 若工作数据速率为 16.0 GT/s 或更高，则当 Upstream Pseudo Port 状态为 Phase 2 Active 时，所发 TS1 Ordered Sets 的 Retimer Equalization Extend 位置为 1b；当 Upstream Pseudo Port 状态为 Phase 2 Passive 时，该位置为 0b。
- 若所有已配置 Lane (通道) 都收到两个 EC=11b 的连续 TS1 Ordered Sets，则下一阶段为 Phase 3 Active。
- 否则，若工作数据速率低于 64.0 GT/s：在 32 ms 超时（容差 -0 ms / +4 ms）后，下一状态为 Force Timeout (强制超时)。
- 否则，若工作数据速率为 64.0 GT/s：在 64 ms 超时（容差 -0 ms / +4 ms）后，下一状态为 Force Timeout。

若工作数据速率为 8.0 GT/s，则发送器行为如 § Section 4.2.7.4.2.1.3 所述，但 24 ms 超时改为 2.5 ms，并遵循以下规则：

- 若所有已配置 Lane 均工作在其最优设置下，则下一阶段为 Phase 3 Passive。
- 否则，在 2.5 ms 超时（容差 -0 ms / +0.1 ms）后，下一状态为 Force Timeout。

若工作数据速率为 16.0 GT/s 或 32.0 GT/s，则发送器行为如 § Section 4.2.7.4.2.1.3 所述，但 24 ms 超时改为 22 ms，并遵循以下规则：

- 所发 TS0 或 TS1 Ordered Sets 的 Retimer Equalization Extend 位置为 0b。
- 若所有已配置 Lane 均工作在其最优设置下，并且所有已配置 Lane 都收到两个 Retimer Equalization Extend 位置为 0b 的连续 TS1 Ordered Sets，则下一阶段为 Phase 3 Passive。
- 否则，在 22 ms 超时（容差 -0 ms / +1.0 ms）后，下一状态为 Force Timeout。

若工作数据速率为 64.0 GT/s，则发送器行为如 § Section 4.2.7.4.2.1.3 所述，但 48 ms 超时改为 46 ms，并遵循以下规则：

</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
</div>


[⬆️ 返回目录](#-本章目录-table-of-contents)

<a id="sec-4-3-7-2-1-1"></a>
## 4.3.7.2.1.1 Phase 1 | Phase 1 阶段

<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th width="50%">🇬🇧 English</th>
<th width="50%" style="background-color:#e8e8e8">🇨🇳 中文</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>

The LF and FS values received in two consecutive TS0 or TS1 Ordered Sets when the Upstream Port is in Phase 1 must be stored for use during Phase 3, if the Downstream Pseudo Port wants to adjust the Upstream Port's Transmitter.

Transmitter behaves as described in § Section 4.2.7.4.2.1.1 except as follows:

- If the data rate of operation is 64.0 GT/s or above, the Retimer Equalization Extend bit of the transmitted TS0 Ordered Sets is set to 1b when the Upstream Pseudo Port state is Phase 0. The EC field is initially set to 00b. After two consecutive TS0 Ordered Sets are received with Retimer Equalization Extend bit set to 0b, the EC field is set to 01b. The Retimer Equalization Extend bit of the transmitted TS0 Ordered Sets it is set to 0b when the Upstream Pseudo Port state is Phase 1. The 24 ms timeout is decreased to 22 ms.

</td>
<td style="background-color:#e8e8e8">

当 Upstream Port (上游端口) 处于 Phase 1 时，若在两个连续的 TS0 或 TS1 Ordered Sets (训练序列有序集) 中收到 LF 与 FS 值，则必须保存这些值以便 Phase 3 使用，前提是 Downstream Pseudo Port (下游伪端口) 想要调整 Upstream Port 的 Transmitter (发送器)。

发送器 (Transmitter) 行为如 § Section 4.2.7.4.2.1.1 所述，但有以下例外：

- 若工作数据速率为 64.0 GT/s 或更高，则当 Upstream Pseudo Port 状态为 Phase 0 时，所发 TS0 Ordered Sets 的 Retimer Equalization Extend (重定时器均衡扩展) 位置为 1b。EC 字段初始为 00b。在连续收到两个 Retimer Equalization Extend 位置为 0b 的 TS0 Ordered Sets 后，EC 字段置为 01b。当 Upstream Pseudo Port 状态为 Phase 1 时，所发 TS0 Ordered Sets 的 Retimer Equalization Extend 位置为 0b。24 ms 超时缩短为 22 ms。

</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

[⬆️ 返回目录](#-本章目录-table-of-contents)

---

<a id="sec-4-3-7-2-1-2"></a>
## 4.3.7.2.1.2 Phase 2 | Phase 2 阶段


<div style="overflow-x: auto; max-width: 100%;">
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th width="50%">🇬🇧 English</th>
<th width="50%" style="background-color:#e8e8e8">🇨🇳 中文</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>

Transmitter behaves as described in § Section 4.2.7.4.2.1.2 except as follows:

- If the data rate of operation is 16.0 GT/s or above, the Retimer Equalization Extend bit of the transmitted TS1 Ordered Sets is set to 1b when the Upstream Pseudo Port state is Phase 2 Active, and it is set to 0b when the Upstream Pseudo Port state is Phase 2 Passive.
- Next phase is Phase 3 Active if all configured Lanes receive two consecutive TS1 Ordered Sets with EC=11b.
- Else, if the data rate of operation is less than 64.0 GT/s: next state is Force Timeout after a 32 ms timeout with a tolerance of -0 ms and +4 ms.
- Else, if the data rate of operation is 64.0 GT/s: next state is Force Timeout after a 64 ms timeout with a tolerance of -0 ms and +4 ms.

</td>
<td style="background-color:#e8e8e8">

发送器 (Transmitter) 行为如 § Section 4.2.7.4.2.1.2 所述，但有以下例外：

- 若工作数据速率为 16.0 GT/s 或更高，则当 Upstream Pseudo Port 状态为 Phase 2 Active 时，所发 TS1 Ordered Sets 的 Retimer Equalization Extend 位置为 1b；当 Upstream Pseudo Port 状态为 Phase 2 Passive 时，该位置为 0b。
- 若所有已配置 Lane (通道) 都收到两个 EC=11b 的连续 TS1 Ordered Sets，则下一阶段为 Phase 3 Active。
- 否则，若工作数据速率低于 64.0 GT/s：在 32 ms 超时（容差 -0 ms / +4 ms）后，下一状态为 Force Timeout (强制超时)。
- 否则，若工作数据速率为 64.0 GT/s：在 64 ms 超时（容差 -0 ms / +4 ms）后，下一状态为 Force Timeout。

</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
</div>


[⬆️ 返回目录](#-本章目录-table-of-contents)

---

<a id="sec-4-3-7-2-1-3"></a>
## 4.3.7.2.1.3 Phase 3 Active | Phase 3 Active 阶段

<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th width="50%">🇬🇧 English</th>
<th width="50%" style="background-color:#e8e8e8">🇨🇳 中文</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>

If the data rate of operation is 8.0 GT/s then the transmitter behaves as described in § Section 4.2.7.4.2.1.3 except the 24 ms timeout is 2.5 ms and as follows:

- Next phase is Phase 3 Passive if all configured Lanes are operating at their optimal settings.
- Else, next state is Force Timeout after a timeout of 2.5 ms with a tolerance of -0 ms and +0.1 ms

If the data rate of operation is 16.0 GT/s or 32.0 GT/s then the transmitter behaves as described in § Section 4.2.7.4.2.1.3 except the 24 ms timeout is 22 ms and as follows:

- The Retimer Equalization Extend bit of transmitted TS0 or TS1 Ordered Sets is set to 0b.
- Next phase is Phase 3 Passive if all configured Lanes are operating at their optimal settings and all configured Lanes receive two consecutive TS1 Ordered Sets with the Retimer Equalization Extend bit set to 0b.
- Else, next state is Force Timeout after a timeout of 22 ms with a tolerance of -0 ms and +1.0 ms.

If the data rate of operation is 64.0 GT/s then the transmitter behaves as described in § Section 4.2.7.4.2.1.3 except the 48 ms timeout is 46 ms and as follows:

</td>
<td style="background-color:#e8e8e8">

若工作数据速率为 8.0 GT/s，则发送器行为如 § Section 4.2.7.4.2.1.3 所述，但 24 ms 超时改为 2.5 ms，并遵循以下规则：

- 若所有已配置 Lane (通道) 均工作在其最优设置下，则下一阶段为 Phase 3 Passive。
- 否则，在 2.5 ms 超时（容差 -0 ms / +0.1 ms）后，下一状态为 Force Timeout。

若工作数据速率为 16.0 GT/s 或 32.0 GT/s，则发送器行为如 § Section 4.2.7.4.2.1.3 所述，但 24 ms 超时改为 22 ms，并遵循以下规则：

- 所发 TS0 或 TS1 Ordered Sets 的 Retimer Equalization Extend 位置为 0b。
- 若所有已配置 Lane 均工作在其最优设置下，并且所有已配置 Lane 都收到两个 Retimer Equalization Extend 位置为 0b 的连续 TS1 Ordered Sets，则下一阶段为 Phase 3 Passive。
- 否则，在 22 ms 超时（容差 -0 ms / +1.0 ms）后，下一状态为 Force Timeout。

若工作数据速率为 64.0 GT/s，则发送器行为如 § Section 4.2.7.4.2.1.3 所述，但 48 ms 超时改为 46 ms，并遵循以下规则：

</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

<a id="sec-4-3-7-2-1-4"></a>
## 4.3.7.2.1.4 Phase 3 Passive | Phase 3 Passive 阶段

<!-- 📄 Page 640 -->
---


<div style="overflow-x: auto; max-width: 100%;">
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th width="50%">🇬🇧 English</th>
<th width="50%" style="background-color:#e8e8e8">🇨🇳 中文</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>

- The Retimer Equalization Extend bit of transmitted TS0 or TS1 Ordered Sets is set to 0b.
- Next phase is Phase 3 Passive if all configured Lanes are operating at their optimal settings and all configured Lanes receive two consecutive TS1 Ordered Sets with the Retimer Equalization Extend bit set to 0b.
- Else, next state is Force Timeout after a timeout of 46 ms with a tolerance of -0 ms and +1.0 ms.
- Transmitter sends TS1 Ordered Sets with EC = 11b, Retimer Equalization Extend = 0b, and the Transmitter Preset field and the Coefficients fields must not be changed from the final value transmitted in Phase 3 Active.
- The transmitter switches to Forwarding mode when the Upstream Pseudo Port exits Phase 3.

The LF and FS values received in two consecutive TS1 Ordered Sets when the Downstream Port is in Phase 1 must be stored for use during Phase 2, if the Upstream Pseudo Port wants to adjust the Downstream Port's Transmitter.

Transmitter follows Phase 0 rules for Upstream Lanes in § Section 4.2.7.4.2.2.1 except as follows:

- If the data rate of operation is 64.0 GT/s or above, the Retimer Equalization Extend bit of the transmitted TS0 Ordered Sets is set to 1b when the Downstream Pseudo Port state is Phase 1 and is transmitting TS0 Ordered Sets with the EC = 00b otherwise it is set to 0b; the 12 ms timeout is 10 ms.

Transmitter follows Phase 1 rules for Upstream Lanes in § Section 4.2.7.4.2.2.2.

If the data rate of operation is 8.0 GT/s then the transmitter behaves as described in § Section 4.2.7.4.2.2.3 except the 24 ms timeout is decreased to 2.5 ms and as follows:

- Next state is Phase 2 Passive if all configured Lanes are operating at their optimal settings.
- Else, next state is Force Timeout after a 2.5 ms timeout with a tolerance of -0 ms and +0.1 ms

If the data rate of operation is 16.0 GT/s or 32.0 GT/s then the transmitter behaves as described in § Section 4.2.7.4.2.2.3 except the 24 ms timeout is 22 ms and as follows:

- The Retimer Equalization Extend bit of transmitted TS1 Ordered Sets is set to 0b.
- Next phase is Phase 2 Passive if all configured Lanes are operating at their optimal settings and all configured Lanes receive two consecutive TS1 Ordered Sets with the Retimer Equalization Extend bit set to 0b.
- Else, next state is Force Timeout after a 22 ms timeout with a tolerance of -0 ms and +1.0 ms.

</td>
<td style="background-color:#e8e8e8">

- 所发 TS0 或 TS1 Ordered Sets 的 Retimer Equalization Extend 位置为 0b。
- 若所有已配置 Lane (通道) 均工作在其最优设置下，并且所有已配置 Lane 都收到两个 Retimer Equalization Extend 位置为 0b 的连续 TS1 Ordered Sets，则下一阶段为 Phase 3 Passive。
- 否则，在 46 ms 超时（容差 -0 ms / +1.0 ms）后，下一状态为 Force Timeout。
- 发送器发送 EC = 11b、Retimer Equalization Extend = 0b 的 TS1 Ordered Sets，并且 Transmitter Preset (发送器预设) 字段与 Coefficients (系数) 字段必须保持 Phase 3 Active 中所发的最终值不变。
- 当 Upstream Pseudo Port 退出 Phase 3 时，发送器切换到 Forwarding mode (转发模式)。

当 Downstream Port (下游端口) 处于 Phase 1 时，若在两个连续的 TS1 Ordered Sets (训练序列有序集) 中收到 LF 与 FS 值，则必须保存这些值以便 Phase 2 使用，前提是 Upstream Pseudo Port (上游伪端口) 想要调整 Downstream Port 的 Transmitter (发送器)。

发送器遵循 § Section 4.2.7.4.2.2.1 中 Upstream Lanes (上游通道) 的 Phase 0 规则，但有以下例外：

- 若工作数据速率为 64.0 GT/s 或更高，则当 Downstream Pseudo Port 状态为 Phase 1 且发送 EC = 00b 的 TS0 Ordered Sets 时，所发 TS0 Ordered Sets 的 Retimer Equalization Extend 位置为 1b；否则为 0b；12 ms 超时缩短为 10 ms。

发送器遵循 § Section 4.2.7.4.2.2.2 中 Upstream Lanes 的 Phase 1 规则。

若工作数据速率为 8.0 GT/s，则发送器行为如 § Section 4.2.7.4.2.2.3 所述，但 24 ms 超时缩短为 2.5 ms，并遵循以下规则：

- 若所有已配置 Lane 均工作在其最优设置下，则下一状态为 Phase 2 Passive。
- 否则，在 2.5 ms 超时（容差 -0 ms / +0.1 ms）后，下一状态为 Force Timeout。

若工作数据速率为 16.0 GT/s 或 32.0 GT/s，则发送器行为如 § Section 4.2.7.4.2.2.3 所述，但 24 ms 超时改为 22 ms，并遵循以下规则：

- 所发 TS1 Ordered Sets 的 Retimer Equalization Extend 位置为 0b。
- 若所有已配置 Lane 均工作在其最优设置下，并且所有已配置 Lane 都收到两个 Retimer Equalization Extend 位置为 0b 的连续 TS1 Ordered Sets，则下一阶段为 Phase 2 Passive。
- 否则，在 22 ms 超时（容差 -0 ms / +1.0 ms）后，下一状态为 Force Timeout。

</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
</div>

<a id="sec-4-3-7-2-2-1"></a>
## 4.3.7.2.2.1 Phase 0 | Phase 0 阶段

<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th width="50%">🇬🇧 English</th>
<th width="50%" style="background-color:#e8e8e8">🇨🇳 中文</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>

The LF and FS values received in two consecutive TS1 Ordered Sets when the Downstream Port is in Phase 1 must be stored for use during Phase 2, if the Upstream Pseudo Port wants to adjust the Downstream Port's Transmitter.

Transmitter follows Phase 0 rules for Upstream Lanes in § Section 4.2.7.4.2.2.1 except as follows:

- If the data rate of operation is 64.0 GT/s or above, the Retimer Equalization Extend bit of the transmitted TS0 Ordered Sets is set to 1b when the Downstream Pseudo Port state is Phase 1 and is transmitting TS0 Ordered Sets with the EC = 00b otherwise it is set to 0b; the 12 ms timeout is 10 ms.

</td>
<td style="background-color:#e8e8e8">

当 Downstream Port (下游端口) 处于 Phase 1 时，若在两个连续的 TS1 Ordered Sets (训练序列有序集) 中收到 LF 与 FS 值，则必须保存这些值以便 Phase 2 使用，前提是 Upstream Pseudo Port (上游伪端口) 想要调整 Downstream Port 的 Transmitter (发送器)。

发送器遵循 § Section 4.2.7.4.2.2.1 中 Upstream Lanes (上游通道) 的 Phase 0 规则，但有以下例外：

- 若工作数据速率为 64.0 GT/s 或更高，则当 Downstream Pseudo Port 状态为 Phase 1 且发送 EC = 00b 的 TS0 Ordered Sets 时，所发 TS0 Ordered Sets 的 Retimer Equalization Extend 位置为 1b；否则为 0b；12 ms 超时缩短为 10 ms。

</td>
</tr>

<a id="sec-4-3-7-2-2-2"></a>
## 4.3.7.2.2.2 Phase 1 Active | Phase 1 Active 阶段

<table>
<thead>

<th width="50%">🇬🇧 English</th>
<th width="50%" style="background-color:#e8e8e8">🇨🇳 中文</th>
</tr>

<tr>
<td>

Transmitter follows Phase 1 rules for Upstream Lanes in § Section 4.2.7.4.2.2.2.

If the data rate of operation is 8.0 GT/s then the transmitter behaves as described in § Section 4.2.7.4.2.2.3 except the 24 ms timeout is decreased to 2.5 ms and as follows:

- Next state is Phase 2 Passive if all configured Lanes are operating at their optimal settings.
- Else, next state is Force Timeout after a 2.5 ms timeout with a tolerance of -0 ms and +0.1 ms

</td>
<td style="background-color:#e8e8e8">

发送器遵循 § Section 4.2.7.4.2.2.2 中 Upstream Lanes (上游通道) 的 Phase 1 规则。

若工作数据速率为 8.0 GT/s，则发送器行为如 § Section 4.2.7.4.2.2.3 所述，但 24 ms 超时缩短为 2.5 ms，并遵循以下规则：

- 若所有已配置 Lane (通道) 均工作在其最优设置下，则下一状态为 Phase 2 Passive。
- 否则，在 2.5 ms 超时（容差 -0 ms / +0.1 ms）后，下一状态为 Force Timeout。

</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

<a id="sec-4-3-7-2-2-3"></a>
## 4.3.7.2.2.3 Phase 2 Active | Phase 2 Active 阶段


<div style="overflow-x: auto; max-width: 100%;">
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th width="50%">🇬🇧 English</th>
<th width="50%" style="background-color:#e8e8e8">🇨🇳 中文</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>

If the data rate of operation is 16.0 GT/s or 32.0 GT/s then the transmitter behaves as described in § Section 4.2.7.4.2.2.3 except the 24 ms timeout is 22 ms and as follows:

- The Retimer Equalization Extend bit of transmitted TS1 Ordered Sets is set to 0b.
- Next phase is Phase 2 Passive if all configured Lanes are operating at their optimal settings and all configured Lanes receive two consecutive TS1 Ordered Sets with the Retimer Equalization Extend bit set to 0b.
- Else, next state is Force Timeout after a 22 ms timeout with a tolerance of -0 ms and +1.0 ms.

</td>
<td style="background-color:#e8e8e8">

若工作数据速率为 16.0 GT/s 或 32.0 GT/s，则发送器行为如 § Section 4.2.7.4.2.2.3 所述，但 24 ms 超时改为 22 ms，并遵循以下规则：

- 所发 TS1 Ordered Sets 的 Retimer Equalization Extend 位置为 0b。
- 若所有已配置 Lane (通道) 均工作在其最优设置下，并且所有已配置 Lane 都收到两个 Retimer Equalization Extend 位置为 0b 的连续 TS1 Ordered Sets，则下一阶段为 Phase 2 Passive。
- 否则，在 22 ms 超时（容差 -0 ms / +1.0 ms）后，下一状态为 Force Timeout。

<!-- 📄 Page 641 -->
---

<a id="sec-4-3-7-2-2-3-cont"></a>
## 4.3.7.2.2.3 Phase 2 Active (续) | Phase 2 Active（续）

<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th width="50%">🇬🇧 English</th>
<th width="50%" style="background-color:#e8e8e8">🇨🇳 中文</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>

If the data rate of operation is 64.0 GT/s then the transmitter behaves as described in § Section 4.2.7.4.2.2.3 except the 48 ms timeout is 46 ms and as follows:

- The Retimer Equalization Extend bit of transmitted TS1 Ordered Sets is set to 0b.
- Next phase is Phase 2 Passive if all configured Lanes are operating at their optimal settings and all configured Lanes receive two consecutive TS1 Ordered Sets with the Retimer Equalization Extend bit set to 0b.
- Else, next state is Force Timeout after a 46 ms timeout with a tolerance of -0 ms and +1.0 ms.
- Transmitter sends TS1 Ordered Sets with EC = 10b, Retimer Equalization Extend = 0b, and the Transmitter Preset field and the Coefficients fields must not be changed from the final value transmitted in Phase 2 Active.
- If the data rate of operation is 8.0 GT/s, the next state is Phase 3 when the Downstream Pseudo Port has completed Phase 3 Active.
- If the data rate of operation is 16.0 GT/s or above, the next state is Phase 3 when the Downstream Pseudo Port has started Phase 3 Active.

Transmitter follows Phase 3 rules for Upstream Lanes in § Section 4.2.7.4.2.2.4 except as follows:

- If the data rate of operation is 16.0 GT/s or above, the Retimer Equalization Extend bit of the transmitted TS1 Ordered Sets is set to 1b when the Downstream Pseudo Port state is Phase 3 Active, and it is set to 0b when the Downstream Pseudo Port state is Phase 3 Passive.
- If all configured Lanes receive two consecutive TS1 Ordered Sets with EC=00b then the Retimer switches to Forwarding mode.
- Else, if the data rate of operation is less than 64.0 GT/s: next state is Force Timeout after a timeout of 32 ms with a tolerance of -0 ms and +4 ms.
- Else, if the data rate of operation is 64.0 GT/s: next state is Force Timeout after a timeout of 64 ms with a tolerance of -0 ms and +4 ms.
- The Electrical Idle Exit Pattern described in § Section 4.3.6.3 is transmitted by both Pseudo Ports at the current data rate for a minimum of 1.0 ms.
- If on any Lane, a Receiver receives an EIOS or infers Electrical Idle via not detecting an exit from Electrical Idle (see § Table 4-65) then, the Transmitters on all Lanes of the opposite Pseudo Port send an EIOSQ and are then placed in Electrical Idle.
- If both Paths have placed their Transmitters in Electrical Idle then, the RT_next_data_rate is set to the RT_error_data_rate, and the RT_error_data_rate is set to 2.5 GT/s, on both Pseudo Ports, and the Retimer enters Forwarding mode.
  - The Transmitters of both Pseudo Ports must be in Electrical Idle for at least 6 μs, before forwarding data.
- Else after a 48 ms timeout, the RT_next_data_rate is set to 2.5 GT/s and the RT_error_data_rate is set to 2.5 GT/s, on both Pseudo Ports, and the Retimer enters Forwarding mode.

</td>
<td style="background-color:#e8e8e8">

若工作数据速率为 64.0 GT/s，则发送器行为如 § Section 4.2.7.4.2.2.3 所述，但 48 ms 超时改为 46 ms，并遵循以下规则：

- 所发 TS1 Ordered Sets 的 Retimer Equalization Extend 位置为 0b。
- 若所有已配置 Lane (通道) 均工作在其最优设置下，并且所有已配置 Lane 都收到两个 Retimer Equalization Extend 位置为 0b 的连续 TS1 Ordered Sets，则下一阶段为 Phase 2 Passive。
- 否则，在 46 ms 超时（容差 -0 ms / +1.0 ms）后，下一状态为 Force Timeout。
- 发送器发送 EC = 10b、Retimer Equalization Extend = 0b 的 TS1 Ordered Sets，并且 Transmitter Preset (发送器预设) 字段与 Coefficients (系数) 字段必须保持 Phase 2 Active 中所发的最终值不变。
- 若工作数据速率为 8.0 GT/s，当 Downstream Pseudo Port 完成 Phase 3 Active 时，下一状态为 Phase 3。
- 若工作数据速率为 16.0 GT/s 或更高，当 Downstream Pseudo Port 开始 Phase 3 Active 时，下一状态为 Phase 3。

发送器遵循 § Section 4.2.7.4.2.2.4 中 Upstream Lanes (上游通道) 的 Phase 3 规则，但有以下例外：

- 若工作数据速率为 16.0 GT/s 或更高，则当 Downstream Pseudo Port 状态为 Phase 3 Active 时，所发 TS1 Ordered Sets 的 Retimer Equalization Extend 位置为 1b；当 Downstream Pseudo Port 状态为 Phase 3 Passive 时，该位置为 0b。
- 若所有已配置 Lane 都收到两个 EC=00b 的连续 TS1 Ordered Sets，则 Retimer 切换到 Forwarding mode (转发模式)。
- 否则，若工作数据速率低于 64.0 GT/s：在 32 ms 超时（容差 -0 ms / +4 ms）后，下一状态为 Force Timeout。
- 否则，若工作数据速率为 64.0 GT/s：在 64 ms 超时（容差 -0 ms / +4 ms）后，下一状态为 Force Timeout。
- 两个 Pseudo Port 均按 § Section 4.3.6.3 所述，在当前数据速率上发送 Electrical Idle Exit Pattern (电气空闲退出码型)，持续时间至少为 1.0 ms。
- 若在任何 Lane 上，Receiver (接收器) 收到 EIOS (电气空闲有序集) 或因未检测到 Electrical Idle 退出（见 § Table 4-65）而推断处于 Electrical Idle，则对端 Pseudo Port 在所有 Lane 上的 Transmitter (发送器) 发送 EIOSQ (电气空闲有序集静默)，随后进入 Electrical Idle。
- 若两条 Path (路径) 上的 Transmitter 均已置入 Electrical Idle，则在两个 Pseudo Port 上将 RT_next_data_rate 设为 RT_error_data_rate，并将 RT_error_data_rate 设为 2.5 GT/s，随后 Retimer 进入 Forwarding mode。
  - 在转发数据之前，两个 Pseudo Port 的 Transmitter 必须保持 Electrical Idle 至少 6 μs。
- 否则，在 48 ms 超时后，在两个 Pseudo Port 上将 RT_next_data_rate 设为 2.5 GT/s，并将 RT_error_data_rate 设为 2.5 GT/s，随后 Retimer 进入 Forwarding mode。

</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

[⬆️ 返回目录](#-本章目录-table-of-contents)

---


---

<a id="sec-4-3-7-2-2-4"></a>
## 4.3.7.2.2.4 Phase 2 Passive | 第 2 阶段被动

<a id="sec-4-3-7-2-2-5"></a>
## 4.3.7.2.2.5 Phase 3 | 第 3 阶段

<a id="sec-4-3-7-2-3"></a>
## 4.3.7.2.3 Force Timeout | 强制超时

<!-- 📄 Page 642 -->
---


<div style="overflow-x: auto; max-width: 100%;">
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th width="50%">🇬🇧 English</th>
<th width="50%" style="background-color:#e8e8e8">🇨🇳 中文</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>

Retimers optionally support Follower Loopback in Execution mode at 8b/10b and 128b/130b encoding. Follower Loopback in Execution mode must be supported at 1b/1b. By default, Retimers are configured to forward loopback between Loopback Lead and Loopback Follower. At 8b/10b and 128b/130b, Retimers are permitted to allow configuration in an implementation specific manner to act as a Loopback Follower on either Pseudo Port; at 1b/1b Loopback Follower on either Pseudo Port is mandatory. The other Pseudo Port that is not the Loopback Follower, places its Transmitter in Electrical Idle, and ignores any data on its Receivers.

The Pseudo Port that is not operating as the Loopback bit Follower does the following:

- The Transmitter is placed in Electrical Idle.
- The Receiver ignores incoming Symbols.

The Pseudo Port that is operating as the Loopback Follower behaves as the Loopback Follower as described in § Section 4.2.7.10.1 with the following exceptions:

- The statement "LinkUp = 0b (False)" is replaced by "RT_LinkUp = 0b".
- The statement "If Loopback.Entry was entered from Configuration.Linkwidth.Start" is replaced by "If Follower.Loopback.Entry was entered when RT_LinkUp =0b".
- References to Loopback.Active become Follower Loopback.Active.

The Pseudo Port that is not operating as the Loopback Follower does the following:

- The Transmitter remains in Electrical Idle.
- The Receiver continues to ignore incoming Symbols.

The Pseudo Port that is operating the Loopback Follower behaves as the Loopback Follower as described in § Section 4.2.7.10.2 with the following exception:

- References to Loopback.Exit become Follower Loopback.Exit.

</td>
<td style="background-color:#e8e8e8">

Retimer (重定时器) 可选地在 8b/10b 编码 和 128b/130b 编码 下支持 Execution 模式中的 Follower Loopback。在 1b/1b 编码下必须支持 Execution 模式中的 Follower Loopback。默认情况下，Retimer 被配置为在 Loopback Lead 和 Loopback Follower 之间转发 loopback。在 8b/10b 编码 和 128b/130b 编码 下，Retimer 允许以实现特定的方式配置为在任一 Pseudo Port (伪端口) 上充当 Loopback Follower；在 1b/1b 编码下，任一 Pseudo Port 上的 Loopback Follower 是强制要求的。另一个不充当 Loopback Follower 的 Pseudo Port 将其发送器 (Transmitter) 置于电气空闲 (Electrical Idle) 状态，并忽略其接收器 (Receiver) 上的任何数据。

不充当 Loopback bit Follower 的 Pseudo Port 执行以下操作：

- 发送器被置于电气空闲状态。
- 接收器忽略输入的符号 (Symbol)。

充当 Loopback Follower 的 Pseudo Port 的行为如 § 4.2.7.10.1 节所述，但有以下例外：

- 语句 "LinkUp = 0b (False)" 被替换为 "RT_LinkUp = 0b"。
- 语句 "If Loopback.Entry was entered from Configuration.Linkwidth.Start" 被替换为 "If Follower.Loopback.Entry was entered when RT_LinkUp =0b"。
- 对 Loopback.Active 的引用变为 Follower Loopback.Active。

不充当 Loopback Follower 的 Pseudo Port 执行以下操作：

- 发送器保持电气空闲状态。
- 接收器继续忽略输入的符号。

充当 Loopback Follower 的 Pseudo Port 的行为如 § 4.2.7.10.2 节所述，但有以下例外：

- 对 Loopback.Exit 的引用变为 Follower Loopback.Exit。

</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
</div>


<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th width="50%">🇬🇧 English</th>
<th width="50%" style="background-color:#e8e8e8">🇨🇳 中文</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>

**IMPLEMENTATION NOTE:**
**PURPOSE OF FORCE TIMEOUT STATE**

The purpose of this state is to ensure both Link Components are in Recovery.Speed at the same time so they go back to the previous data rate.

</td>
<td style="background-color:#e8e8e8">

**实现说明 (IMPLEMENTATION NOTE)：**
**强制超时状态 (Force Timeout State) 的目的**

此状态的目的是确保两个链路组件 (Link Component) 同时处于 Recovery.Speed 状态，从而回到先前的工作速率。

</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

<a id="sec-4-3-7-3"></a>
## 4.3.7.3 Follower Loopback | Follower Loopback

<a id="sec-4-3-7-3-1"></a>
## 4.3.7.3.1 Follower Loopback.Entry | Follower Loopback.Entry

<a id="sec-4-3-7-3-2"></a>
## 4.3.7.3.2 Follower Loopback.Active | Follower Loopback.Active

<!-- 📄 Page 643 -->
---


<div style="overflow-x: auto; max-width: 100%;">
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th width="50%">🇬🇧 English</th>
<th width="50%" style="background-color:#e8e8e8">🇨🇳 中文</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>

The Pseudo Port that is not operating as the Loopback Follower must do the following:

- Maintain the Transmitter in Electrical Idle.
- Set the data rate to 2.5 GT/s.
- The Receiver continues to ignore incoming Symbols.

The Pseudo Port that is operating as the Loopback Follower must behave as the Loopback Follower as described in § Section 4.2.7.10.3 with the following exception:

- The clause "The next state of the Loopback Lead and Loopback Follower is Detect" becomes "The Data rate is set to 2.5 GT/s and then both Pseudo Ports are placed in Forwarding mode".

This Section defines the requirements on allowed Retimer Latency.

Latency must be measured when the Retimer is in Forwarding mode and the Link is in L0, and is defined as the time from when the last bit of a Symbol is received at the input pins of one Pseudo Port to when the equivalent bit is transmitted on the output pins of the other Pseudo Port.

Retimer vendors are strongly encouraged to specify the latency of the Retimer in their data sheets.

Retimers are permitted to have different latencies at different data rates, and when this is the case the latency MUST@FLIT be specified per data rate.

Retimer latency shall be less than the following limit, when not operating in SRIS.

</td>
<td style="background-color:#e8e8e8">

不充当 Loopback Follower 的 Pseudo Port 必须执行以下操作：

- 保持发送器处于电气空闲状态。
- 将数据速率设置为 2.5 GT/s。
- 接收器继续忽略输入的符号。

充当 Loopback Follower 的 Pseudo Port 的行为必须符合 § 4.2.7.10.3 节所述，但有以下例外：

- 子句 "The next state of the Loopback Lead and Loopback Follower is Detect" 变为 "The Data rate is set to 2.5 GT/s and then both Pseudo Ports are placed in Forwarding mode"。

本节定义了对 Retimer 允许延迟 (Latency) 的要求。

延迟必须在 Retimer 处于 Forwarding 模式且链路 (Link) 处于 L0 状态时进行测量，定义为从一个 Pseudo Port 输入引脚接收到一个符号的最后一个比特开始，到在另一 Pseudo Port 的输出引脚上发送相应比特为止的时间。

强烈建议 Retimer 厂商在其数据手册中指定 Retimer 的延迟。

Retimer 允许在不同数据速率下具有不同的延迟，在这种情况下，必须按数据速率分别指定延迟 (MUST@FLIT)。

在非 SRIS 操作时，Retimer 延迟应小于以下限制。

</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
</div>


**Table 4-66 Retimer Latency Limit not SRIS (Symbol times) | 表 4-66 非 SRIS 下的 Retimer 延迟限制 (符号时间)**

| Maximum Latency | 2.5 GT/s | 5.0 GT/s | 8.0 GT/s | 16.0 GT/s | 32.0 GT/s | 64.0 GT/s |
|-----------------|----------|----------|----------|-----------|-----------|-----------|
|                 | 32       | 32       | 64       | 128       | 256       | 512       |

<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th width="50%">🇬🇧 English</th>
<th width="50%" style="background-color:#e8e8e8">🇨🇳 中文</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>

Retimers will add to the channel latency. The round trip delay is 4 times the specified latency when two Retimers are present. It is recommended that designers of Upstream and Downstream Ports consider Retimer latency when determining the following characteristics:

- Data Link Layer Retry Buffer size
- Transaction Layer Receiver buffer size and Flow Control Credits

</td>
<td style="background-color:#e8e8e8">

Retimer 会增加信道延迟。当存在两个 Retimer 时，往返延迟是指定延迟的 4 倍。建议上游端口 (Upstream Port) 和下游端口 (Downstream Port) 的设计者在确定以下特性时考虑 Retimer 延迟：

- 数据链路层 (Data Link Layer) Retry Buffer (重试缓冲区) 大小
- 事务层 (Transaction Layer) 接收器缓冲区大小和流控信用 (Flow Control Credit)

</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

<a id="sec-4-3-7-3-3"></a>
## 4.3.7.3.3 Follower Loopback.Exit | Follower Loopback.Exit

<a id="sec-4-3-8"></a>
## 4.3.8 Retimer Latency | Retimer 延迟

<a id="sec-4-3-8-1"></a>
## 4.3.8.1 Measurement | 测量方法

<a id="sec-4-3-8-2"></a>
## 4.3.8.2 Maximum Limit on Retimer Latency | Retimer 延迟的最大限制

<a id="sec-4-3-8-3"></a>
## 4.3.8.3 Impacts on Upstream and Downstream Ports | 对上游端口和下游端口的影响

<!-- 📄 Page 644 -->
---


<div style="overflow-x: auto; max-width: 100%;">
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th width="50%">🇬🇧 English</th>
<th width="50%" style="background-color:#e8e8e8">🇨🇳 中文</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>

- Data Link Layer REPLAY_TIMER Limits

Additional buffering (replay or FC) may be required to compensate for the additional channel latency.

Retimers are permitted but not required to support SRIS. Retimers that support SRIS must provide a mechanism for enabling the higher rate of SKP Ordered Set transmission, as Retimers must generate SKP Ordered Sets while in Execution mode. Retimers that are enabled to support SRIS will incur additional latency in the elastic store between receive and transmit clock domains. The additional latency is required to handle the case where a Tx_MPS_Limit TLP is transmitted and SKP Ordered Sets, which are scheduled, are not sent. The additional latency is a function of Link width and Max_Payload_Size. This additional latency is not included in § Table 4-66.

A SRIS capable Retimer must provide an implementation specific mechanism to configure its supported Max_Payload_Size while in SRIS, which must be greater than or equal to the largest Tx_MPS_Limit for the Transmitter in the Port that the Pseudo Port is receiving. Retimer latency must be less than the following limit for the current supported Max_Payload_Size, with SRIS.

</td>
<td style="background-color:#e8e8e8">

- 数据链路层 REPLAY_TIMER (重放定时器) 限制

可能需要额外的缓冲 (重放或流控 FC) 来补偿额外的信道延迟。

允许但不要求 Retimer 支持 SRIS。支持 SRIS 的 Retimer 必须提供一种机制来启用更高速率的 SKP (跳过有序集) Ordered Set 传输，因为 Retimer 必须在 Execution 模式下生成 SKP Ordered Set。已启用 SRIS 支持的 Retimer 将在接收和发送时钟域之间的弹性缓冲 (elastic store) 中产生额外延迟。该额外延迟用于处理发送 Tx_MPS_Limit TLP 而已调度的 SKP Ordered Set 未被发送的情况。额外延迟是链路宽度 (Link Width) 和 Max_Payload_Size 的函数。此额外延迟未包含在 § 表 4-66 中。

支持 SRIS 的 Retimer 必须提供一种实现特定的机制来配置其在 SRIS 时所支持的 Max_Payload_Size，该值必须大于或等于 Pseudo Port 正在接收的端口中发送器的最大 Tx_MPS_Limit。在 SRIS 模式下，对于当前支持的 Max_Payload_Size，Retimer 延迟必须小于以下限制。

</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
</div>


**Table 4-67 Retimer Latency Limit SRIS (Symbol times) | 表 4-67 SRIS 下的 Retimer 延迟限制 (符号时间)**

| Max_Payload_Size | 2.5 GT/s | 5.0 GT/s | 8.0 GT/s | 16.0 GT/s | 32.0 GT/s | 64.0 GT/s |
|------------------|----------|----------|----------|-----------|-----------|-----------|
| 128 Bytes        | 34 (max) | 34 (max) | 66 (max) | 130 (max) | 258 (max) | 514 (max) |
| 256 Bytes        | 36 (max) | 36 (max) | 68 (max) | 132 (max) | 260 (max) | 516 (max) |
| 512 Bytes        | 39 (max) | 39 (max) | 71 (max) | 135 (max) | 263 (max) | 519 (max) |
| 1024 Bytes       | 46 (max) | 46 (max) | 78 (max) | 142 (max) | 270 (max) | 526 (max) |
| 2048 Bytes       | 59 (max) | 59 (max) | 91 (max) | 155 (max) | 283 (max) | 539 (max) |
| 4096 Bytes       | 86 (max) | 86 (max) | 118 (max)| 182 (max) | 310 (max) | 566 (max) |

<a id="sec-4-3-9"></a>
## 4.3.9 SRIS | SRIS

<!-- 📄 Page 645 -->
---

<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th width="50%">🇬🇧 English</th>
<th width="50%" style="background-color:#e8e8e8">🇨🇳 中文</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>

Retimers that optionally support SRIS, may optionally support a dynamic elastic store. Dynamic elastic store changes the nominal buffer fill as the link width changes. Retimers are permitted to delay the Link LTSSM transitions, only while the Link down configures, in Configuration, for up to 40 μs. Retimers are permitted to delay the TS1 Order Set to TS2 Ordered Set transition between Configuration.Lanenum.Accept and Configuration.Complete to increase their elastic store.

</td>
<td style="background-color:#e8e8e8">

可选支持 SRIS 的 Retimer 可以选择支持动态弹性缓冲 (Dynamic Elastic Store)。动态弹性缓冲会随着链路宽度的变化而改变标称缓冲区填充量。允许 Retimer 延迟链路 LTSSM (链路训练与状态机) 转换，但仅在链路下配置 (down configure) 期间在 Configuration 状态下延迟最多 40 μs。允许 Retimer 延迟从 TS1 (训练序列) Ordered Set 到 TS2 Ordered Set 的转换 (在 Configuration.Lanenum.Accept 与 Configuration.Complete 之间) 以增大其弹性缓冲。

</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>


<div style="overflow-x: auto; max-width: 100%;">
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th width="50%">🇬🇧 English</th>
<th width="50%" style="background-color:#e8e8e8">🇨🇳 中文</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>

**IMPLEMENTATION NOTE:**
**RETIMER LATENCY WITH SRIS CALCULATION:**

§ Table 4-67 is calculated assuming that the link is operating at x1 Link width. The max Latency is the sum of § Table 4-66 and the additional latency required in the elastic store for SRIS clock compensation. The SRIS additional latency in symbol times required for SRIS clock compensation is described in the following equation:

2 × ( ( ( SRIS Link Payload Size + TLP Overhead ) / Link Width ) / SKP_rate )

**Equation 4-3 Retimer Latency with SRIS**

Where:

**SRIS Link Payload Size** is the value programmed in the Retimer.

**TLP Overhead** Represents the additional TLP components which consume Link bandwidth (TLP Prefix, header, LCRC, framing Symbols) and is treated here as a constant value of 28 Symbols.

**Link Width** The operating width of the Link.

**SKP_rate** The rate that a transmitter schedules SKP Ordered Sets when using 8b/10b encoding, 154, see § Section 4.2.8.4 . When using the 128b/130b encoding the effective rate is the same.

The nominal latency would be ½ of the SRIS additional latency, and is the nominal fill of the elastic store. This makes a worse case assumption that every blocked SKP Ordered Set requires an additional symbol of latency in the elastic store. When an Rx_MPS_Limit size TLP is transmitted, the actual fill of the elastic store could go to zero, or two times the nominal fill depending on the relative clock frequencies. Link width down configure may occur at any time, a lane fails for example, and this down configure may occur faster than the Retimer is able to adjust its nominal elastic store. By default Retimer's will configure its nominal fill based on x1 link width, regardless of the actual current link width.

</td>
<td style="background-color:#e8e8e8">

**实现说明 (IMPLEMENTATION NOTE)：**
**SRIS 下 Retimer 延迟的计算：**

§ 表 4-67 的计算假设链路以 x1 链路宽度运行。最大延迟是 § 表 4-66 与 SRIS 时钟补偿所需弹性缓冲中的额外延迟之和。SRIS 时钟补偿所需的额外延迟 (以符号时间为单位) 由以下公式描述：

2 × ( ( ( SRIS 链路有效负载大小 + TLP 开销 ) / 链路宽度 ) / SKP_rate )

**公式 4-3 SRIS 下的 Retimer 延迟**

其中：

**SRIS 链路有效负载大小 (SRIS Link Payload Size)** 是 Retimer 中编程设定的值。

**TLP 开销 (TLP Overhead)** 表示消耗链路带宽的额外 TLP 组件 (TLP 前缀、包头、LCRC、帧定界符号)，此处视为一个常数 28 个符号。

**链路宽度 (Link Width)** 链路的运行宽度。

**SKP_rate** 发送器在使用 8b/10b 编码 时调度 SKP Ordered Set 的速率，即 154，参见 § 4.2.8.4 节。当使用 128b/130b 编码 时，有效速率相同。

标称延迟为 SRIS 额外延迟的 1/2，也是弹性缓冲的标称填充量。这是一种最坏情况假设，即每个被阻塞的 SKP Ordered Set 在弹性缓冲中都需要额外一个符号的延迟。当发送一个 Rx_MPS_Limit 大小的 TLP 时，弹性缓冲的实际填充量可能为零，或根据相对时钟频率为标称填充量的两倍。链路宽度下配置 (down configure) 可能随时发生 (例如某条通道失效)，且其发生速度可能快于 Retimer 调整其标称弹性缓冲的速度。默认情况下，无论当前实际链路宽度如何，Retimer 将根据 x1 链路宽度配置其标称填充量。

</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
</div>


<!-- 📄 Page 646 -->
---

<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th width="50%">🇬🇧 English</th>
<th width="50%" style="background-color:#e8e8e8">🇨🇳 中文</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>

The following Section describes the Retimer's requirements to support the optional L1 PM Substates.

The Retimer enters L1.1 when CLKREQ# is sampled as deasserted. The following occur:

- REFCLK to the Retimer is turned off.
- The PHY remains powered.
- The Retimer places all Transmitters in Electrical Idle on both Pseudo Ports (if not already in Electrical Idle, the expected state). Transmitters maintain their common mode voltage.
- The Retimer must ignore any Electrical Idle exit from all Receivers on both Pseudo Ports.

The Retimer exits L1.1 when CLKREQ# is sampled as asserted. The following occur:

- REFCLK to the Retimer is enabled.
- Normal operation of the Electrical Idle exit circuit is resumed on all Lanes of both Pseudo Ports of the Retimer.
- Normal exit from Electrical Idle exit behavior is resumed, See § Section 4.3.6.3 .

Retimers do not support L1.2, but if they support L1.1 and the removal of the reference clock then they must not interfere with the attached components' ability to enter L1.2.

Retimer vendors must document specific implementation requirements applying to CLKREQ#. For example, a Retimer implementation that does not support the removal of the reference clock might require an implementation to pull CLKREQ# low.

</td>
<td style="background-color:#e8e8e8">

以下章节描述 Retimer 支持可选的 L1 PM 子状态 (L1 PM Substates) 的要求。

当 CLKREQ# 采样为解除断言 (deasserted) 时，Retimer 进入 L1.1。发生以下情况：

- Retimer 的 REFCLK (参考时钟) 被关闭。
- PHY 保持上电。
- Retimer 将两个 Pseudo Port 上的所有发送器置于电气空闲状态 (如果尚未处于电气空闲状态，这将是预期状态)。发送器维持其共模电压。
- Retimer 必须忽略两个 Pseudo Port 上所有接收器发出的任何电气空闲退出 (Electrical Idle exit) 信号。

当 CLKREQ# 采样为断言 (asserted) 时，Retimer 退出 L1.1。发生以下情况：

- Retimer 的 REFCLK 被使能。
- Retimer 两个 Pseudo Port 的所有通道上的电气空闲退出电路恢复正常运行。
- 恢复正常的电气空闲退出行为，参见 § 4.3.6.3 节。

Retimer 不支持 L1.2，但如果 Retimer 支持 L1.1 以及参考时钟的移除，则不得干扰所连接组件进入 L1.2 的能力。

Retimer 厂商必须记录适用于 CLKREQ# 的具体实现要求。例如，不支持移除参考时钟的 Retimer 实现可能要求实现将 CLKREQ# 拉低。

</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

<a id="sec-4-3-10"></a>
## 4.3.10 L1 PM Substates Support | L1 PM 子状态支持

<!-- 📄 Page 647 -->

<td>

Retimers must provide an implementation specific mechanism to configure each of the parameters in this section.

</td>
<td style="background-color:#e8e8e8">

Retimer 必须提供一种实现特定的机制来配置本节中的每个参数。

</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

</thead>

In this platform configuration Downstream Port (A) has only a single CLKREQ# signal. The Upstream and Downstream Ports' CLKREQ# (A and C), and the Retimer's CLKREQB# signals are connected to each other. In this case, Downstream Port (A), must assert CLKREQ# signal whenever it requires a reference clock. Component A, Component B, and the Retimer have their REFCLKs removed/restored at the same time.

</td>
<td style="background-color:#e8e8e8">

**实现说明 (IMPLEMENTATION NOTE)：**
**支持 L1 PM 子状态的 Retimer 的 CLKREQ# 连接拓扑**

在此平台配置中，下游端口 (A) 只有一个 CLKREQ# 信号。上游端口和下游端口的 CLKREQ# (A 和 C) 与 Retimer 的 CLKREQB# 信号相互连接。在这种情况下，下游端口 (A) 在需要参考时钟时必须断言 CLKREQ# 信号。组件 A、组件 B 和 Retimer 的 REFCLK 同时被移除/恢复。

<a id="sec-4-3-11"></a>
## 4.3.11 Retimer Configuration Parameters | Retimer 配置参数

<!-- 📄 Page 648 -->
---

<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th width="50%">🇬🇧 English</th>
<th width="50%" style="background-color:#e8e8e8">🇨🇳 中文</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>

The parameters are split into two groups: parameters that are configurable globally for the Retimer and parameters that are configurable for each physical Retimer Pseudo Port.

If a per Pseudo Port parameter only applies to an Upstream or a Downstream Pseudo Port the Retimer is not required to provide an implementation specific mechanism to configure the parameter for the other type of Pseudo Port.

</td>
<td style="background-color:#e8e8e8">

这些参数分为两组：在 Retimer 全局可配置的参数，以及为每个物理 Retimer Pseudo Port 可配置的参数。

如果某 Pseudo Port 参数仅适用于上游或下游 Pseudo Port，则不要求 Retimer 为另一种类型的 Pseudo Port 提供实现特定的机制来配置该参数。

</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

<a id="sec-4-3-11-1"></a>
## 4.3.11.1 Global Parameters | 全局参数


<div style="overflow-x: auto; max-width: 100%;">
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th width="50%">🇬🇧 English</th>
<th width="50%" style="background-color:#e8e8e8">🇨🇳 中文</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>

- **Port Orientation Method.** This controls whether the Port Orientation is determined dynamically as described in § Section 4.3.6.2 , or statically based on vendor assignment of Upstream and Downstream Pseudo Ports. If the Port Orientation is set to static the Retimer is not required to dynamically adjust the Port Orientation as described in § Section 4.3.6.2 . The default behavior is for the Port Orientation to be dynamically determined.

- **Maximum Data Rate.** This controls the maximum data rate that the Retimer sets in the Data Rate Identifier field of training sets that the Retimer transmits. Retimers that support only the 2.5 GT/s speed are permitted not to provide this configuration parameter.

- **SRIS Enable.** This controls whether the Retimer is configured for SRIS and transmits SKP Ordered Sets at the SRIS mode rate when in Execution mode. Retimers that do not support SRIS and at least one other clocking architecture are not required to provide this configuration parameter.

- **SRIS Link Payload Size.** This controls the maximum payload size the Retimer supports while in SRIS. The value must be selectable from all the Maximum Payload Sizes shown in § Table 4-67. The default value of this parameter is to support a maximum payload size of 4096 bytes. Retimers that do not support SRIS are not required to provide this configuration parameter.

The following are examples of cases where it might be appropriate to configure the SRIS Link Payload Size to a smaller value than the default:

  - A Retimer is part of a motherboard connected to Root Port that supports a maximum payload size less than 4096 bytes.
  - A Retimer is part of an adapter connected to an Upstream Port (e.g., Endpoint) that supports a maximum payload size less than 4096 bytes.
  - A Retimer is located Downstream of the Downstream Port of a Switch integrated as part of a system, the Root Port supports a maximum payload size less than 4096 bytes and the system does not support peer to peer traffic.

- **Enhanced Link Behavior Control.** This controls the ability for the Retimer to either bypass equalization to the highest data rate or completely bypass equalization when it supports 32.0 GT/s.

- **Port Orientation.** This is applicable only when the Port Orientation Method is configured for static determination. This is set for either Upstream or Downstream. Each Pseudo Port must be configured for a different orientation, or the behavior is undefined.

- **Selectable De-emphasis.** When the Downstream Pseudo Port is operating at 5.0 GT/s this controls the transmit de-emphasis of the Link to either -3.5 dB or -6 dB in specific situations and the value of the Selectable De-emphasis field in training sets transmitted by the Downstream Pseudo Port. See § Section 4.2.7 for detailed usage information. When the Link Segment is not operating at the 5.0 GT/s speed, the setting of this bit has no effect. Retimers that support only the 2.5 GT/s speed are permitted not to provide this configuration parameter.

- **Rx Impedance Control.** This controls whether the Retimer dynamically applies and removes 50 Ω terminations or statically has 50 Ω terminations present. The value must be selectable from Dynamic, Off, and On. The default behavior is Dynamic.

</td>
<td style="background-color:#e8e8e8">

- **端口方向方法 (Port Orientation Method)。** 该参数控制端口方向 (Port Orientation) 是按 § 4.3.6.2 节所述动态确定，还是基于厂商对上游和下游 Pseudo Port 的分配静态确定。如果端口方向设置为静态，则不要求 Retimer 按 § 4.3.6.2 节所述动态调整端口方向。默认行为是动态确定端口方向。

- **最大数据速率 (Maximum Data Rate)。** 该参数控制 Retimer 在其发送的训练集 (training set) 的 Data Rate Identifier 字段中设置的最大数据速率。仅支持 2.5 GT/s 速率的 Retimer 允许不提供此配置参数。

- **SRIS 使能 (SRIS Enable)。** 该参数控制 Retimer 是否配置为 SRIS 模式，并在 Execution 模式下以 SRIS 模式速率发送 SKP Ordered Set。不支持 SRIS 且至少支持一种其他时钟架构的 Retimer 不要求提供此配置参数。

- **SRIS 链路有效负载大小 (SRIS Link Payload Size)。** 该参数控制 Retimer 在 SRIS 下支持的最大有效负载大小。该值必须可从 § 表 4-67 中显示的所有最大有效负载大小中选择。此参数的默认值是支持最大有效负载大小为 4096 字节。不支持 SRIS 的 Retimer 不要求提供此配置参数。

以下是适合将 SRIS 链路有效负载大小配置为小于默认值的示例情况：

  - Retimer 是连接到根端口 (Root Port) 的主板的一部分，该根端口支持的最大有效负载大小小于 4096 字节。
  - Retimer 是连接到上游端口 (例如端点 Endpoint) 的适配器的一部分，该上游端口支持的最大有效负载大小小于 4096 字节。
  - Retimer 位于作为系统一部分集成的交换机 (Switch) 的下游端口下游，根端口支持的最大有效负载大小小于 4096 字节，且系统不支持对等 (peer-to-peer) 流量。

- **增强链路行为控制 (Enhanced Link Behavior Control)。** 该参数控制 Retimer 在支持 32.0 GT/s 时能够旁路均衡至最高数据速率或完全旁路均衡。

- **端口方向 (Port Orientation)。** 该参数仅在端口方向方法配置为静态确定时适用。设置为 Upstream 或 Downstream。每个 Pseudo Port 必须配置为不同的方向，否则行为未定义。

- **可选去加重 (Selectable De-emphasis)。** 当下游 Pseudo Port 以 5.0 GT/s 运行时，该参数控制在特定情况下链路发送去加重 (De-emphasis) 为 -3.5 dB 或 -6 dB，以及下游 Pseudo Port 发送的训练集中 Selectable De-emphasis 字段的值。有关详细用法信息，请参见 § 4.2.7 节。当链路段 (Link Segment) 未以 5.0 GT/s 速率运行时，此位的设置无效。仅支持 2.5 GT/s 速率的 Retimer 允许不提供此配置参数。

- **Rx 阻抗控制 (Rx Impedance Control)。** 该参数控制 Retimer 是动态施加和移除 50 Ω 终端，还是静态保持 50 Ω 终端。该值必须可从 Dynamic、Off 和 On 中选择。默认行为为 Dynamic。

</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
</div>


<a id="sec-4-3-11-2"></a>
## 4.3.11.2 Per Physical Pseudo Port Parameters | 按物理 Pseudo Port 参数

<!-- 📄 Page 649 -->
---

<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th width="50%">🇬🇧 English</th>
<th width="50%" style="background-color:#e8e8e8">🇨🇳 中文</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>

- **Tx Compliance Disable.** This controls whether the Retimer transmits the Compliance Pattern in the CompLoadBoard.Pattern state. The default behavior is for the Retimer to transmit the Compliance Pattern in the CompLoadBoard.Pattern state. If TX Compliance Pattern is set to disabled, the Retimer Transmitters remain in Electrical Idle and do not transmit Compliance Pattern in CompLoadBoard.Pattern - all other behavior in the CompLoadBoard state is the same.

- **Pseudo Port Follower Loopback.** This controls whether the Retimer operates in a Forwarding mode during loopback on the Link or enters Follower Loopback on the Pseudo Port. The default behavior is for the Retimer to operate in Forwarding mode during loopback. Retimers that do not support optional Follower Loopback are permitted not to provide this configuration parameter. This configuration parameter shall only be enabled for one physical Port. Retimer behavior is undefined if the parameter is enabled for more than one physical Port.

- **Downstream Pseudo Port 8GT TX Preset.** This controls the initial TX preset used by the Downstream Pseudo Port transmitter for 8.0 GT/s transmission. The default value is implementation specific. The value must be selectable from all applicable values in § Table 4-23.

- **Downstream Pseudo Port 16GT TX Preset.** This controls the initial TX preset used by the Downstream Pseudo Port transmitter for 16.0 GT/s transmission. The default value is implementation specific. The value must be selectable from all applicable values in § Table 4-23.

- **Downstream Pseudo Port 32GT TX Preset.** This controls the initial TX preset used by the Downstream Pseudo Port transmitter for 32.0 GT/s transmission. The default value is implementation specific. The value must be selectable for all applicable values in § Table 4-23.

- **Downstream Pseudo Port 64GT TX Preset.** This controls the initial TX preset used by the Downstream Pseudo Port transmitter for 64.0 GT/s transmission. The default value is implementation specific. The value must be selectable for all applicable values in § Table 4-23.

- **Downstream Pseudo Port 8GT Requested TX Preset.** This controls the initial transmitter preset value used in the EQ TS2 Ordered Sets transmitted by the Downstream Pseudo Port for use at 8.0 GT/s. The default value is implementation specific. The value must be selectable from all values in § Table 4-23.

- **Downstream Pseudo Port 16GT Requested TX Preset.** This controls the initial transmitter preset value used in the 128b/130b EQ TS2 Ordered Sets transmitted by the Downstream Pseudo Port for use at 16.0 GT/s. The default value is implementation specific. The value must be selectable from all values in § Table 4-23.

- **Downstream Pseudo Port 32GT Requested TX Preset.** This controls the initial transmitter preset value used in the 128b/130b EQ TS2 Ordered Sets transmitted by the Downstream Pseudo Port for use at 32.0 GT/s. The default value is implementation specific. The value must be selectable from all values in § Table 4-23.

- **Downstream Pseudo Port 64GT Requested TX Preset.** This controls the initial transmitter preset value used in the 128b/130b EQ TS2 Ordered Sets transmitted by the Downstream Pseudo Port for use at 64.0 GT/s. The default value is implementation specific. The value must be selectable from all values in § Table 4-23.

- **Downstream Pseudo Port 8GT RX Hint.** This controls the Receiver Preset Hint value used in the EQ TS2 Ordered Sets transmitted by the Downstream Pseudo Port for use at 8.0 GT/s. The default value is implementation specific. The value must be selectable from all values in § Table 4-24.

</td>
<td style="background-color:#e8e8e8">

- **Tx 一致性禁用 (Tx Compliance Disable)。** 该参数控制 Retimer 是否在 CompLoadBoard.Pattern 状态下发送一致性测试码型 (Compliance Pattern)。默认行为是 Retimer 在 CompLoadBoard.Pattern 状态下发送一致性测试码型。如果 TX 一致性测试码型被设置为禁用，则 Retimer 发送器保持电气空闲状态，不在 CompLoadBoard.Pattern 中发送一致性测试码型 — CompLoadBoard 状态中的所有其他行为保持不变。

- **Pseudo Port Follower Loopback。** 该参数控制 Retimer 在链路上进行 loopback 时以 Forwarding 模式运行，还是在 Pseudo Port 上进入 Follower Loopback。默认行为是 Retimer 在 loopback 期间以 Forwarding 模式运行。不支持可选 Follower Loopback 的 Retimer 允许不提供此配置参数。此配置参数只能为一个物理端口启用。如果在多个物理端口上启用该参数，则 Retimer 行为未定义。

- **下游 Pseudo Port 8GT TX 预设 (Downstream Pseudo Port 8GT TX Preset)。** 该参数控制下游 Pseudo Port 发送器用于 8.0 GT/s 传输的初始 TX 预设 (Preset)。默认值是实现特定的。该值必须可从 § 表 4-23 中的所有适用值中选择。

- **下游 Pseudo Port 16GT TX 预设 (Downstream Pseudo Port 16GT TX Preset)。** 该参数控制下游 Pseudo Port 发送器用于 16.0 GT/s 传输的初始 TX 预设。默认值是实现特定的。该值必须可从 § 表 4-23 中的所有适用值中选择。

- **下游 Pseudo Port 32GT TX 预设 (Downstream Pseudo Port 32GT TX Preset)。** 该参数控制下游 Pseudo Port 发送器用于 32.0 GT/s 传输的初始 TX 预设。默认值是实现特定的。该值必须可从 § 表 4-23 中的所有适用值中选择。

- **下游 Pseudo Port 64GT TX 预设 (Downstream Pseudo Port 64GT TX Preset)。** 该参数控制下游 Pseudo Port 发送器用于 64.0 GT/s 传输的初始 TX 预设。默认值是实现特定的。该值必须可从 § 表 4-23 中的所有适用值中选择。

- **下游 Pseudo Port 8GT 请求的 TX 预设 (Downstream Pseudo Port 8GT Requested TX Preset)。** 该参数控制下游 Pseudo Port 发送的 EQ TS2 Ordered Set 中用于 8.0 GT/s 的初始发送器预设值。默认值是实现特定的。该值必须可从 § 表 4-23 中的所有值中选择。

- **下游 Pseudo Port 16GT 请求的 TX 预设 (Downstream Pseudo Port 16GT Requested TX Preset)。** 该参数控制下游 Pseudo Port 发送的 128b/130b 编码 EQ TS2 Ordered Set 中用于 16.0 GT/s 的初始发送器预设值。默认值是实现特定的。该值必须可从 § 表 4-23 中的所有值中选择。

- **下游 Pseudo Port 32GT 请求的 TX 预设 (Downstream Pseudo Port 32GT Requested TX Preset)。** 该参数控制下游 Pseudo Port 发送的 128b/130b 编码 EQ TS2 Ordered Set 中用于 32.0 GT/s 的初始发送器预设值。默认值是实现特定的。该值必须可从 § 表 4-23 中的所有值中选择。

- **下游 Pseudo Port 64GT 请求的 TX 预设 (Downstream Pseudo Port 64GT Requested TX Preset)。** 该参数控制下游 Pseudo Port 发送的 128b/130b 编码 EQ TS2 Ordered Set 中用于 64.0 GT/s 的初始发送器预设值。默认值是实现特定的。该值必须可从 § 表 4-23 中的所有值中选择。

- **下游 Pseudo Port 8GT RX 提示 (Downstream Pseudo Port 8GT RX Hint)。** 该参数控制下游 Pseudo Port 发送的 EQ TS2 Ordered Set 中用于 8.0 GT/s 的接收器预设提示 (Receiver Preset Hint) 值。默认值是实现特定的。该值必须可从 § 表 4-24 中的所有值中选择。

</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

<a id="sec-4-3-12"></a>
## 4.3.12 In Band Register Access | 带内寄存器访问


<div style="overflow-x: auto; max-width: 100%;">
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th width="50%">🇬🇧 English</th>
<th width="50%" style="background-color:#e8e8e8">🇨🇳 中文</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>

- Retimers operating at 16.0 GT/s or higher may optionally support inband read only access. Control SKP Ordered Sets at 16.0 GT/s or higher provide the mechanism via the Margin Command 'Access Retimer Register', see § Table 4-63. Retimers that support inband read only access must return a non-zero value for the DWORD at Registers offsets 80h and 84h. Retimers that do not support inband read only access must return a zero value.

- Register offsets between A0h and FFh are designated as Vendor Defined register space.

- Register offsets from 00h to 7Fh and 85H to 9Fh are Reserved for PCI-SIG future use.

</td>
<td style="background-color:#e8e8e8">

- 以 16.0 GT/s 或更高数据速率运行的 Retimer 可以选择支持带内只读访问。16.0 GT/s 或更高数据速率下的 Control SKP Ordered Set 通过 Margin Command "Access Retimer Register" 提供该机制，参见 § 表 4-63。支持带内只读访问的 Retimer 必须在寄存器偏移量 80h 和 84h 处返回非零值。不支持带内只读访问的 Retimer 必须返回零值。

- 寄存器偏移量 A0h 到 FFh 之间被指定为厂商定义 (Vendor Defined) 寄存器空间。

- 寄存器偏移量 00h 到 7Fh 和 85h 到 9Fh 保留供 PCI-SIG 未来使用。

</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
</div>
